Matthew1:1 Ela elivuru ya ikhapira sa Yeesu Kristu, Mwaana a Davide, mwaana a Abrahaamu:" 
Matthew1:2 Abrahaamu aamuyanre Isaaki; Isaaki aamuyanre Yakobe ni Yakobe aamuyanre Yuda ni axunneiye. 
Matthew1:3 Yuda aamuyanre Perexi ni Seera. Amayawe Perexi ni Seera yaari Tamari. Perexi aamuyanre Hesironi; Hesironi aamuyanre Arami; 
Matthew1:4 Arami aamuyanre Aminadabi; Aminadabi aamuyanre Naasoni; 
Matthew1:5 Naasoni aamuyanre Salomoni ni Salomoni aamuyanre Bowasi. Amayawe Bowasi yaari Rakhabi. Bowasi aamuyanre Obeedi. Amayawe Obeedi yaari Ruuti. Obeedi aamuyanre Yixai; 
Matthew1:6 Yixai aamuyanre mwene Davide. Davide aamuyanre Salomoni. Amayawe Salomoni yaari mwaara a Uriya. 
Matthew1:7 Salomoni aamuyanre Robowamu; Robowamu aamuyanre Abiya; Abiya aamuyanre Asafi; 
Matthew1:8 Asafi aamuyanre Yoosafati; Yoosafati aamuyanre Yoorami; Yoorami aamuyanre Uziya; 
Matthew1:9 Uziya aamuyanre Yootami; Yootami aamuyanre Ahazi; Ahazi aamuyanre Hezekiya; 
Matthew1:10 Hezekiya aamuyanre Manaxe; Manaxe aamuyanre Amoni; Amoni aamuyanre Yoosiya; 
Matthew1:11 Yoosiya aamuyanre Yekoniya ni axunneiye. Yaari ehuhuweene yeele atthu a oYixrayeli yaakuxiwaaya eronghiwaka elapo ya oBabiloniya. 
Matthew1:12 Yaamalihaaya ehuhuweene yeele, Yekoniya aamuyanre Salathiyeli ni Salathiyeli aamuyanre Zorobabeli." 
Matthew1:13 Zorobabeli aamuyanre Abiyuudi; Abiyuudi aamuyanre Eliyakimi; Eliyakimi aamuyanre Azoori; 
Matthew1:14 Azoori aamuyanre Zadoki; Zadoki aamuyanre Akhimi; Akhimi aamuyanre Eliyuudi; 
Matthew1:15 Eliyuudi aamuyanre Eleyazari; Eleyazari aamuyanre Mathani; Mathani aamuyanre Yakobe. 
Matthew1:16 Yakobe aamuyanre Yoseefe, aiyawe Mariya, mwa yoowo aayariwa Yeesu oniitthaniwa Kristu." 
Matthew1:17 Okhuma Abrahaamu mpaka Davide saari ikhapira muloko niixexe; okhuma ekhapira ya Davide mpaka ehuhu ya oBabiloniya saari ikhapira muloko niixexe, ni okhuma ehuhuweene yeele mpaka Kristu saari ikhapira muloko niixexe." 
Matthew1:18 Oyariwa wa Yeesu Kristu weereiye ha: Mariya, amayawe Yeesu, aatthomeriwe ni Yoseefe. Ahinaayetho otheliwa, aarupala ni ikuru sa Munepa Wootteela." 
Matthew1:19 Yoseefe, aiyawe Mariya, aari mulopwana oororomeleya. Khaatthunne omuulihiha muru Mariya mwaatthuni. Tivawo uupuwenlaawe omuhiya Mariya muxiirini." 
Matthew1:20 Uupuwelaka hiiho, aahiixoonihera wa yoowo ndyelo a Apwiya moolohani, ni aamweerela: “Yoseefe, mwaana a Davide, ohoove omwaakhela Mariya ntoko mwaariyo, niwoko yeeyo erupaliwe ti ya Munepa Wootteela." 
Matthew1:21 Owo anaamuyare Mwaana Mulopwana, ni nyuwo mmunttehe Nsinanawe Yeesu, niwoko anaavuluxe mulokwaawe mwa sootthekasaya.”" 
Matthew1:22 Sootheene seiye seereiye weera sikwaniheriwe seiye Apwiya yaahimalaaya ni mprofeeti: 
Matthew1:23 “Mwaamwali oowiikosoopa anaarupale, ni anaamuyare Mwaana Mulopwana ni atthu eniimwiitthane Emanuweli, entaphulela: Muluku ni hiyo.”" 
Matthew1:24 Woovenyani, Yoseefe aapaka yeeyo ndyelo a Apwiya aamurumalaawe, ni aamwaakhela Mariya ntoko amwaarawe." 
Matthew1:25 Khaakonnenotho ahinaaye omuyara Mwaana. Vano, yaamutteha Nsinanawe Yeesu." 
Matthew2:1 Yeesu aayariwe oBetelehemu, elapo ya oYudeiya, mmahukuni a mwene Herodi. Anamiruku yaarweenle ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka oYerusaleemu, ni" 
Matthew2:2 yaakoha: “Ori woowi Mwaana mukhaani oyariwe mwene a aYuda? Naahoona ethenyeeriyaawe ninkhuma nsuwa, ni naarweenle omuttittimiha.”" 
Matthew2:3 Mwene Herodi iiwalaawe seiyo, aariipiwa murima, vamohatho ni atthu a oYerusaleemu." 
Matthew2:4 Aathukumanyinghaawe ahooleli a asaserdoti* a muloko wa atthu ni anamawera a nlamulo*, aahaakohakoha weera Kristu anaayariwe woowi." 
Matthew2:5 Awo yaamwaakhula: “oBetelehemu, elapo ya oYudeiya, niwoko mprofeeti aalepa ha:" 
Matthew2:6 ‘Weyotho, Betelehemu, wa elapo ya oYudeiya, vekhaikhai khoohiyono mukhaani variyari wa ibooma sa oYudeiya, niwoko mwa weyo anaakhumelele Muhooleli anaakhale Mukukhuli a atthwaaka, aYixrayeli.’”" 
Matthew2:7 Herodi aawiitthana anamiruku muxiirini, ni aahaakohakoha mwaha wa ehuhuweene yeeyo ethenyeeri yaawiiyaaya." 
Matthew2:8 Aahaarumihela anamiruku oBetelehemu aweerelaka: “Murowe mwiiwelele nnenesene mwaha wa Mmiravo Owo. Mwaamphwanyakaru, mukileele weera miyotho kimuttittimihe.”" 
Matthew2:9 Yaamwiiwalaaya mwene, yaapwahawo, ni ethenyeeri yoonnaaya ninkhuma nsuwa yaarowa ohoolowaya. Ethenyeeri yaaheemela nipuro aaraawewo Mmiravo." 
Matthew2:10 Yoonnaaya ethenyeeri, yaahakalalaxa." 
Matthew2:11 Woovolowani mpaani, yaamoona Mwaana areene ni amayawe Mariya. Yaamukokhorela ni yaamulapa. Yaahula mirupasaya ni itthu sooreera saarimo, enamvaha samahala: iyuuma soorikaxa ni makhura oowunkhelaxa." 
Matthew2:12 Muluku aahaaleela anamiruku moolohani weera ehihokoleele wa Herodi. Vano yaawo yaapwaha elapwaaya, eviraka ephiro ekina." 
Matthew2:13 Yaarongwaaya, ndyelo a Apwiya aahoowa wa Yoseefe moolohani, eeraka: “Mvenye, munkuxe Mwaana ni amayawe, ni muroweke wExipitu. Mwakhale weiwo mpaka miyo kineeraaka kooleeleni, niwoko Herodi anaamwaase Mwaana weera amwiive.”" 
Matthew2:14 Vano Yoseefe aavenya, aamukuxa Mwaana ni amayawe ehuhu ya ohiyu, enapwaha erowaka wExipitu." 
Matthew2:15 Yaakhalawo mpaka okhwa wa Herodi. Ti hiiho yaakwaniheriwaaya yeeyo Muluku aahimalaawe mwa mprofeeti, eeraka: “Miyo kaamwiitthana Mwanaka wExipitu.”" 
Matthew2:16 Aasuwenlaawe Herodi weera aalokotthiwa ni anamiruku, aanyoonyiwa vancipale ni, aalikelelaka ehuhu anamiruku yaahimalaaya, aalamula owiiva anamwane asilopwana ootheene a oBetelehemu ni mukhwipimwaya yaarino iyaakha piili mpaka ooyariwa vaanaano." 
Matthew2:17 Ti hiiho yaakwaniheriwaaya yeeyo aahimalaawe mprofeeti Yeremiya eeraka: 
Matthew2:18 “Waahiiwanyeya okhuwela oRama – wiinla ni olalamika vancipale. Rakheli awiinlelaka anamwanaawe ni akhoottaka opepesiwa, niwoko khaawowo anamwane.”" 
Matthew2:19 Aakhwiiyaawe Herodi, aahoowa ndyelo a Apwiya moolohani mwa Yoseefe wExipitu," 
Matthew2:20 eeraka: “Mvenye, munkuxe Mwaana ni amayawe ni murowe elapo ya oYixrayeli, niwoko yaale yaamwaasaasa Mwaana weera emwiive, ahookhwa.”" 
Matthew2:21 Owo aavenya, aamukuxa Mwaana ni amayawe ni aahokoleela elapo ya oYixrayeli." 
Matthew2:22 Iiwalaawetho weera Arikilawo aari namukalamba a atithawe Herodi, alamulaka elapo ya oYudeiya, Yoseefe aahoova orowa weiwo. Muluku aamooperera Yoseefe moolohani, ni owo aarowa elapo ya oGalileiya." 
Matthew2:23 Aarowa ni aamaka esidade emoha yiitthaniwa Nasarete. Ti hiiho yaakwaniheriwaaya yeeyo yaahimmwale ni maprofeeti: “Owo aniitthaniwe muNasarete.” 
Matthew3:1 Vamahuku ale aahoowa Yohaane mpatisa munikareni na oYudeiya, alaleiyaka:" 
Matthew3:2 “Murukunxe mirima, niwoko omwene wa wiirimu wookhuveela.”" 
Matthew3:3 Waari mwaha wa yoowo mprofeeti Yesaya uulumalaawe eeraka: “Nsu na mutthu onlaleiyaawe munikareni: ‘Mwaarehererele ephiro Apwiya. Ngwookolele ephiro Yaawo.’” 
Matthew3:4 Ikuwosawe Yohaane saari soopakiwa ni ixapala sa ekamelu*, ni aangwara laamba a exapala. Soocasawe saari misoope ni oravo wa ntuphini." 
Matthew3:5 Yaarowa wa yoowo atthu a oYerusaleemu, awo a ilapo sootheene sa oYudeiya nitho soowaattamana ni oYordanu." 
Matthew3:6 Elapaka sootthekasaya, yaapatisiwa ni yoowo mmoolokoni Yordanu." 
Matthew3:7 Aawoonnaawe Yohaane afarasi* ni aSaduki* ancipale ewaaka weiwo aapatisaawewo, aaweerela: “Inowa! Aweerenleni taani weera mutthawe isara sa Muluku sinkhuveela?" 
Matthew3:8 Muruwere soowiima sinoonihera orukunxa murima! 
Matthew3:9 Muhuupuwele weera nyuwo munoowera wiixeerela: ‘Nookhalano Abrahaamu ntoko atiithi.’ Vano miyo kinooleelani weera Muluku ongwera otatuxa maluku ala anamwane a Abrahaamu. 
Matthew3:10 Epaso eri yoolikaneene weera ethikile mikwankhwaari sa nyiri. Nyiri sootheene sihiniima soowiima sooreera, sinoothikiliwa ni sinoovonyeriwa mmooroni." 
Matthew3:11 Miyo kinoopatisani ni maahi mpaka orukunxa murima. Ottuliwaka onimoowa Mukina ooweraxa ookipwaha miyo. Nkiphwanenle okuxa ikwakwaattasawe. Yoowo anoopatiseni ni Munepa Wootteela, nitho ni mooro." 
Matthew3:12 Yoowo ookhalano ethelo mmatatanimwawe weera amveere namwaali a etrigu. Anaathokorore etrigu vatathani, ni anaamuhise namwaali mmooroni woohimala.”" 
Matthew3:13 Vano Yeesu aarowa oGalileiya mpaka mooloko Yordanu weera apatisiwe ni Yohaane. 
Matthew3:14 Yohaanetho aaheerera omukhoottiha, eeraka: “Ontthuneya weera miyo kipatisiwe ni Nyuwo, vano Nyuwo mungwa wa miyo?”" 
Matthew3:15 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Muhiye hiiho! Ontthuneya weera nikwanihere yeeyo Muluku ontthunaawe.”Yohaane aamwaakhulela. 
Matthew3:16 Apatisiwakaru, Yeesu aakhuma mmaahini. Wa ehuhuweene yeele, wiirimu waahuleiya ni aahoona Munepa wa Muluku omukhuruwelaka Yoowo ntoko ekhunda." 
Matthew3:17 Vano nsu nimoha wiirimu naaheera: “Ola Mwanaka oosiveleyaxa mwa Yoowo kinnahakala.” 
Matthew4:1 Yeesu aakuxiwa ni Munepa aronghiwaka onikareni weera eereriwe ni Diyabu*. 
Matthew4:2 Vahoolo wa otthuka amalihaka othana ni ohiyu miloko mixexe, aavoliwa etala." 
Matthew4:3 Namweerera aamukhuveela ni aamweerela: “Weyo waari Mwaana a Muluku, olamule maluku ala weera ethatuwe yooca.”" 
Matthew4:4 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Yoolempwa: ‘Mutthu khankhala ni okumi niwoko na yooca paahi, mene na masu ootheene aangwa wa Muluku.’”" 
Matthew4:5 Vano Diyabu* aamurongha Yoowo osidade yootteela, anamwiikaathi vanankatthani a Empa ya Muluku, anamweerela:" 
Matthew4:6 “Waari Mwaana a Muluku, wiivonyere vathi va, niwoko yoolempwa: ‘Owo anaalamule andyelowaawe weera yookhapeleleni, ni awo eniyoovareleni ni matata weera muhikwattule mwetto ni maluku.’”" 
Matthew4:7 Yeesu aamwaakhula: Yoolempwatho: ‘Muhiweerere Apwiya Mulukwaanyu.’” 
Matthew4:8 Diyabu* aamukuxatho Yeesu amurowanaka vamwaako woorakama vancipale, ni aamoonihera omwene wootheene wa elapo ya vathi ni ovuwawaya," 
Matthew4:9 eeraka: “Sootheene iya nkoovahe Weyo wakikokhorela ni wakilapa.” 
Matthew4:10 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Osuse Satana! Niwoko yoolempwa: ‘Mwaalapeke Apwiya Mulukwaanyu, ni mwaarumeeleke Yaawo paahi.’”" 
Matthew4:11 Vano Diyabu* aamuhiya Yeesu, ni andyelo yaahoowa, enamurumeela." 
Matthew4:12 Yeesu iiwalaawe weera Yohaane aawaleliwa okaliposo, aahokoleela oGalileiya." 
Matthew4:13 Avenyaka oNasarete, aarowa okhala oKafarnawu, okhwipi wa ephareiya, mweelaponi ya oZabuloni ni oNafitali," 
Matthew4:14 weera akwanihere seiye aaleeliwaawe ni mprofeeti Yesaya: 
Matthew4:15 “Elapo ya oZabuloni ni elapo ya oNafitali, ephiro ya mphareiyani okhopela wa oYordanu, Galileiya a amalapo:" 
Matthew4:16 Muloko wa atthu waakhala mpiphini waahoona waara otokotoko. Waara waahaarweela atthu yaakilaathiye wa elapo ya munttuusi wa okhwa.” 
Matthew4:17 Vahoolowaya Yeesu aapacera olaleiya: “Murukunxe mirima, niwoko omwene wa wiirimu wookhuveela.”" 
Matthew4:18 Eettaka mukerekhere wa ephareiya ya oGalileiya, Yeesu aawoona axunna eeli: Simeyoni iitthaniwa Pedru, ni munneiye Andreiya. Awo yeera evonyeraka itthavi sa ihopa mphareiyani, niwoko yaari anamatothela a ihopa." 
Matthew4:19 Vano Yeesu aaweerela: “Mukitthare, ni Miyo kinimootatuxani anamatothela a atthu.”" 
Matthew4:20 Woowaakuveya yaahiya itthavisaya ni yaamutthara. 
Matthew4:21 Eettaka wookela ohoolo, Yeesu aawoona axunna eeli akina: Yakobe, ni munneiye Yohaane, anamwane a Zebedeyo. Awo yaari munikulani ni atithaya, erehereraka itthavisaya. Yeesu aawiitthana," 
Matthew4:22 ni woowaakuveya awo yaahiya itthavisaya ni atithaya, enamutthara Yeesu." 
Matthew4:23 Eetteettaka oGalileiya, Yeesu aahusiha muSinagoganimwaya*, alaleiyaka masu ooreeraxa ni alamihaka makhwatta ni iretta sootheene sa muloko." 
Matthew4:24 Saahuulummwa sa Yoowo ni elapo yootheene ya oSiriya. Yannangwiihera atthu ootheene yaahaawa ni iretta sincipale soonanara. Akina yaarino minepa soonanara; akina yaarino ecilecile, ni akinatho yaari ooheetta. Vano Yeesu aahaalamiha ootheene." 
Matthew4:25 Atthu ancipale yaamutthara, ekhumaka oGalileiya, oDekapoli, oYerusaleemu, oYudeiya ni okhopela wa oYordanu." 
Matthew5:1 Awoonaka atthu ancipale, Yeesu aawela vamwaakoni, anakilaathi. Oohuseraawe yaamwaattamela," 
Matthew5:2 ni Owo aapacera waaxuttiha, eeraka:" 
Matthew5:3 “Ooreelihiwa ti yaale ansuwela omuhaawelawaya Muluku, niwoko omwene wa wiirimu ti wawaya." 
Matthew5:4 Ooreelihiwa ti yaale aniinla, niwoko eniimaalihiwe." 
Matthew5:5 Ooreelihiwa ti yaale aniiyeviha, niwoko eniiphwanye elapo ya vathi ntoko yoohiyeriwa*." 
Matthew5:6 Ooreelihiwa ti yaale anghaawelaxa weera yaakhuleliwe ni Muluku, niwoko eniivonihiwe." 
Matthew5:7 Ooreelihiwa ti yaale ammorela ikharari, niwoko eniimoreliwe ikharari." 
Matthew5:8 Ooreelihiwa ti yaale ari ootteela murima, niwoko eniimoone Muluku." 
Matthew5:9 Ooreelihiwa ti yaale ampaka murettele variyari wa atthu, niwoko eniyiitthaniwe anamwane a Muluku." 
Matthew5:10 Ooreelihiwa ti yaale ansoondiwa mwaha wa opaka otthuna wa Muluku, niwoko omwene wa wiirimu ti wawaya." 
Matthew5:11 Ooreelihiwa ti nyuwo akina yooruwanakani, yoosoondakani ni yaawuulumelakani soonanara ni soowootha niwoko na Miyo." 
Matthew5:12 Muhakalale ni musarihiwe ni ohakalala, niwoko ntthuvelonanyu nri ntokotoko wiirimu. Yaahaasoonda mooteene yoowo maprofeeti yaakhala muhinaaye nyuwo." 
Matthew5:13 Nyuwo muri maakha a elapo ya vathi. Maakha yamala osivawaya, mmweelele hai weera esivetho? Khaamvareliwa etthu, ohikhanle ovonyeriwa vaate ni onyikaliwawo ni atthu." 
Matthew5:14 Nyuwo muri waara wa elapo ya vathi. Khoongwereya ovitha esidade eri vasulu vamwaako. 
Matthew5:15 Navetho khaawo ompattiha onyaari ni anapopheela vathi wa elaata. Ohiyanawaya, oniikaathi vanipuroni na nnene weera waamwaleele ootheene ari mpaani." 
Matthew5:16 Hiihotho mwaarihe waarawanyu ohoolo wa atthu, weera yooneke mitekosanyu sooreera ni yaavuwihe Atithinyu ari wiirimu." 
Matthew5:17 Muhuupuwele weera kaaweenle omaliha nlamulo, hoye hoye maprofeeti. Nkiweenle omaliha, mene okwanihera seiyo." 
Matthew5:18 Kinooleelani ekhaikhai: wiirimu ni vathi onuumale, mene hata yooruma, naari nlepo nimoha na nlamulo na Muluku khanimala mpaka sineeraaya sikwaniheriwe soothesene." 
Matthew5:19 Ootheene ahiniiwelela yakhalaru a malamulo ala ni anaaxuttiha akina opaka moota mmoha, eniyiitthaniwe ooyevaxa moomweneni wa wiirimu. Vaheera ootheene aniiwelela ni anxuttiha malamulo ala, eniyiitthaniwe asitokweene moomweneni wa wiirimu." 
Matthew5:20 Vanonto kinooleelani weera opakawanyu otthuna wa Muluku waahipwahaxa wa aFarisi* ni anamawera a nlamulo*, khoongwereya hata vakhaani weera nyuwo muvolowe omwene wa wiirimu." 
Matthew5:21 Nyuwo mohiiwa yeeyo yaahimmwale ni makholowaanyu: ‘Muhiive; ni yoowo aniive, anaathorihiwe.’" 
Matthew5:22 Mene Miyo kinooleelani weera khula mutthu anaamunyoonyeriwe munneiye, anaathorihiwe. Nitho, akhalaru mutthu anaamuruwane munneiye, anaaronghiwe wa alipa oowuuluma milattu, ni akhalaru mutthu ommweerela munneiye: ‘naanepa!’ omphwanela orowa omooroni." 
Matthew5:23 Tivawo, nyuwo mooniheraka sooveleelasanyu valtaarini*, ni vaavaawo munuupuwelela weera munninyu ookhalano etthu mmurimani ni nyuwo," 
Matthew5:24 muhiye toko soovahasanyu vaavaawo valtaarini*, ni murowe weera mwiiraane ni munninyu. Vahoolowaya, muhokoleeleke ni moonihereke soovahasanyu." 
Matthew5:25 Mwiiwanane woowaakuveya ni mwiittanaanyu atthunaka wooronghani wa alipa oowuuluma milattu. Mpake yeeyo nyuwo nlelo murowaka wa yaawo, niwoko wavirikanawo onimooveleelani wa mphuki, ni mphuki onimooveleelani wa mpilixa, ni nyuwo munoovonyeriwa okaliposo." 
Matthew5:26 Kinoororomelihani weera nyuwo khamurwa mukhumamo muhinaaye oliva soothesene. 
Matthew5:27 Nyuwo mohiiwa yeeyo yaahimmwale: ‘Muhiraruwe,’" 
Matthew5:28 mene Miyo kinooleelani: akhalaru mutthu oningwehexexa muthiyana amuhaawelaka, ooraruwano mmurimanimwawe." 
Matthew5:29 Niithonanyu na moono mulopwana nootthekihani, muzoole ni murihele vaate. Fataari oriha mpatta mmoha wa erutthwaanyu, ohikhanle weera erutthwaanyu yootheene eriheliwe omooroni." 
Matthew5:30 Ntatananyu na moono mulopwana nootthekihani, mukwitule ni murihele vaate. Fataari oriha mpatta mmoha wa erutthwaanyu, ohikhanle weera erutthwaanyu yootheene eriheliwe omooroni." 
Matthew5:31 Yaahimmwa: khula mulopwana anaamwalane ni mwaariye ontthuneya weera amvahe ekaratta ya omwalana. 
Matthew5:32 Mene Miyo kinooleelani weera khula mutthu anaamwalane ni mwaariye, ohikhanle mwaha wa oraruwa, onimukhaliha namararuwa. Vano yoowo onimuthela muthiyana omwalanne, onooraruwano." 
Matthew5:33 Nyuwo mohiiwatho yeeyo yaahimmwale ni makholowaanyu: ‘Muhihiye soolipelasanyu, mene mukwanihere seiyo nyuwo mulipenlaanyu vamaithoni wa Apwiya.’" 
Matthew5:34 Mene Miyo kinooleelani: muhilipeleru naari etthu – naari ni wiirimu, niwoko ti ehice ya Muluku;" 
Matthew5:35 naari ni elapo ya vathi, niwoko ti yoonyikalelaawe ya inaawosawe; naari ni oYerusaleemu, niwoko ti esidade ya Mwene Mutokweene." 
Matthew5:36 Muhilipele ni muruwaanyu, niwoko khamungwera oceendya niihi nimoha weera nikhale nootteela, hoye hoye nooriipa." 
Matthew5:37 Mweera: “aani,” okhaleke “aani” ni mweera: “hoye,” okhaleke “hoye.” Sootheene simvira mwa yeeyo, siri sa mutakhali." 
Matthew5:38 Nyuwo mohiiwa yeeyo yaahimmwale: ‘Niitho wa niitho, ni niino wa niino.’" 
Matthew5:39 Mene Miyo kinooleelani: muhimwiinlele ikukuttula mutakhali. Yoowo anoomaneeni nrama na moono mulopwana, mmwinnyereretho nrama nikina." 
Matthew5:40 Akhala mukina anoorongheni wa alipa oowuuluma milattu weera ooruleeni mukaandyo, mumvahetho ekuwaanyu." 
Matthew5:41 Mukina anoonyesereriheni weetta ni yoowo vakhiviru, mweetteno ottaiwene." 
Matthew5:42 Mumvahe yoowo onoovekelani, ni muhimwiimane yoowo onoovekelani wooliha etthu." 
Matthew5:43 Nyuwo mohiiwa yeeyo yaahimmwale: ‘Munsivele mukhwiinyu, ni munthanye mwiittanaanyu.’" 
Matthew5:44 Mene Miyo kinooleelani: mwaasivele amwiittanaanyu, ni mwaavekelele yaawo anoosoondani," 
Matthew5:45 weera nyuwo mukhale anamwane a Atithinyu ari wiirimu. Vano, Yaawo anaariha nsuwanaya nnaamwaleela oonanara murima ni ooreera murima, ni animwaarupihela epula oororomela ni oohiroromela." 
Matthew5:46 Nyuwo mwaasivela paahi yaale anoosivelani, ntthuvelo heeni muneeraanyu mwaakhele? Anamaliviha a musokotho ampaka yeeyo." 
Matthew5:47 Nyuwo mwawuulumiha paahi axunninyu – mumpaka eheeni yooreera waapwaha akina? Amalapo ampaka hiihaawotho! 
Matthew5:48 Tivawo, mukhale ookwanela, ntoko Atithinyu ari wiirimu." 
Matthew6:1 Mwiipasoope weera muhipake mitekosanyu sa ororomeleya mwaatthuni weera mooniwe ni atthu. Mwapaka seiyo, khamurwa mwaakhela ntthuvelo wa Atiithi ari wiirimu." 
Matthew6:2 Vano, mwaavahaka samahala, muhikhuweleleke yeeyo ni mapalapatta ntoko ampakaaya anamwiixeera muSinagogani* ni mmuseweni weera ettottopeliwe ni atthu. Kinoororomelihani weera awo ahaakhelela ntthuvelonaya nootheene." 
Matthew6:3 Mene nyuwo mwaavahaka yamahala, nihisuwele ntata na moono muthiyana yeeyo nimpakaaya na moono mulopwana," 
Matthew6:4 weera yamahalaanyu ekhale muxiirini. Atithinyu anoona yeeyo empakiwa muxiirini, eniyootthuveleni." 
Matthew6:5 Nyuwo mwaavekelaka, muhikhale ntoko anamwiixeera. Awo antthuna ovekela yeemenleene muSinagogani* ni mapuro oowooneya, weera yooniweke ni atthu. Miyo kinooleelani vekhaikhai weera ahaakhelela ntthuvelonaya nootheene." 
Matthew6:6 Nyuwotho mwaavekelaka, murowe munkonaanyumo, mwawale mulako ni mwaavekele Atithinyu ari muxiirini. Vano, Atithinyu ari muxiirini eniyootthuveleni." 
Matthew6:7 Mwaavekelaka, muhitipure ntoko ampakaaya amalapo. Awo anuupuwela weera eniyiiwiwe niwoko na masu mancipale." 
Matthew6:8 Muhilikane ni yaawo, niwoko Atithinyu ansuwela yeeyo muntthunaanyu muhinaaye ovekela." 
Matthew6:9 Vanonto nyuwo muvekeleke ha: ‘Atithihu ari wiirimu, Nsinananyu ntteelihiwe," 
Matthew6:10 omwenaanyu orwe; otthunawanyu opakiwe vathi va, hiiho ntoko wiirimu." 
Matthew6:11 Munivahe yoocaahu ya khula nihuku. 
Matthew6:12 Munilevelele sootthekasahu ntoko nnaalevelelaahu yaawo annitthekela. 
Matthew6:13 Muhinihiye nivolowaka ngweereriwani, mene munivuluxe mwa soonanara.’" 
Matthew6:14 Mwaalevelela akina anootthekelani, Atithinyu ari wiirimu eniyoolevelelenitho nyuwo." 
Matthew6:15 Mwaahaalevelelatho akina, Atithinyu ari wiirimu kheerwa yoolevelelani." 
Matthew6:16 Mwaatthukaka, muhikhale ni ekhalelo yoothanana ntoko anamwiixeera, niwoko awo anooceendya ekhovaaya weera atthu akina ewoone weera aatthuka. Miyo kinooleelani vekhaikhai weera ahaakhelela ntthuvelonaya nootheene." 
Matthew6:17 Mwaatthukaka, muttikitthele makhura muruwaanyu ni musuusule," 
Matthew6:18 weera atthu ehisuwele weera nyuwo mootthuka, ehikhanle Atithinyu paahi anoona muxiirini. Atithinyu anoona muxiirini eniyootthuveleni." 
Matthew6:19 Muhithukumanye mihakhu sa elapo ya vathi annanarihaayawo atthumpwiha ni murawa, nitho weiwo anamwiiya amvolowaaya ni aniiyaaya." 
Matthew6:20 Muthukumanye toko mihakhusanyu wiirimu, weiwo ahinnanarihaayawo atthumpwiha ni murawa, ni weiwo anamwiiya ahimvolowaaya ni ahiniiyaayamo." 
Matthew6:21 Vano, sinkhalaayawo mihakhusanyu, murimaanyutho onuukhale weiwo." 
Matthew6:22 Maithwaanyu ti onyaari wa erutthu. Maithwaanyu yakhala ooreera, erutthwaanyu yootheene enoosareya waara." 
Matthew6:23 Maithwaanyu yakhala oonanara, erutthwaanyu yootheene enoosareya epiphi. Vano, waara ori mpuwamwanyu waari epiphi, epiphi ele eniikhale etokotoko!" 
Matthew6:24 Khaawo angwera waarumeela asineene eeli, niwoko mmoha onoomuthanya ni mukina onoomusivela, naari oopacera onoomurumeela ni nthiti, mene anaaveeli onoomuramusa. Nyuwo khamungwera omurumeela Muluku nitho musurukhu." 
Matthew6:25 Vano Miyo kinooleelani: muhiixeeteteele ni okumi: eheeni muneeraanyu muce; muwure, naari eheeni muneeraanyu ngwarihe erutthwaanyu. Khoohiyono okumi wootthuneyaxa opwaha yooca, ni erutthu yoopwaha ikuwo?" 
Matthew6:26 Ngwehe ipalame sa wiirimu. Khasinaala, hata khasinghepha, naari khasinthata, wa soothesene, Atiithi ari wiirimu anoociha. Vano, nyuwo khamuhiyono ootthuneyaxa opwaha ipalame?" 
Matthew6:27 Taani a nyuwo, iixeeteteelaka, anaawere waandyeerera ehuhu vakhaani okumaawe?" 
Matthew6:28 Niwoko heeni muneeteteyaanyu ni ikuwo? Ngwehe moota sinunnuwaaya ithutu sa ntuphini. Seiyo khasimvara muteko, hata khasintthava." 
Matthew6:29 Wa soothesene, Miyo kinooleelani weera, naari Salomoni ni ovuwawawe wootheene, aawara ntoko emoha ya seiyo." 
Matthew6:30 Muluku awariha hiiha malaxi a ntuphini ari olelo ni omaalo anoovonyeriwa omooroni, Owo kharwa atepaxa woowarihani nyuwo, atthu a nroromelo vakhaani?" 
Matthew6:31 Tivawo, muhiixeeteteele mweeraka: ‘nnice eheeni?’ hoye hoye ‘nniwure eheeni?’ naari ‘nniware eheeni?’" 
Matthew6:32 Amalapo ti yaawo anghaawano itthusene seiyo. Atiithitho a wiirimu ansuwela weera nyuwo muntthuna seiyo. 
Matthew6:33 Mwaasaase toko omwene wa Muluku ni opaka otthunawawe, ni itthu seiyo sootheene mmwivahiwe nyuwo." 
Matthew6:34 Tivawo, muhiixeeteteele ni omaalo, niwoko nihuku na omaalo nnikhaleno sooweeteteelasaya nneenaaya. Khula nihuku nookhalano soonanarasaya soowaatta." 
Matthew7:1 Muhaathorihe akina weera nyuwo muhithorihiwe. 
Matthew7:2 Vano, mooteene yoowo munthorihaanyu, nyuwo munoothorihiwa, ni muringo mumvarelaanyu muteko, onoovareliwatho muteko wa nyuwo." 
Matthew7:3 Niwoko heeni mungwehaanyu ekokhola eri muniithoni na munninyu, mene khamunoona mukhukulu ori muniithonimwanyu?" 
Matthew7:4 Mungwera hai omweerela munninyu: ‘mukihiye kivenxeke ekokhola eri muniithonimwanyu,’ nyuwo mureeneno mukhukulu muniithonimwanyu mwaneenaanyu?" 
Matthew7:5 Namwiixeera! Muvenxe toko mukhukulu muniithonimwanyu, ni vahoolowaya munimoona nnenesene weera mvenxe ekokhola eri muniithoni mwa munninyu." 
Matthew7:6 Muhaavahe itthu sooreera alapwa, niwoko anoorukunuwa yoolumekeni. Muhivonyere itthu sooreera ikhumba, niwoko sinoonyikalasa." 
Matthew7:7 Muvekele, ni mmwivahiwe. Mwaasaase, ni mmwiphanye. Mmane nsele, ni mmwihuleliwe." 
Matthew7:8 Vano, ootheene amvekela, animwaakhela; ootheene anaasa, anoophwanya; ni wa yoole ommana nsele, anaahuleliwe." 
Matthew7:9 Taani a nyuwo, mwaninyu avekela yooca, onoomvaha nluku?" 
Matthew7:10 Hoye hoye, avekela ehopa, onoomvaha enowa?" 
Matthew7:11 Wakhala weera nyuwo mureene anamattheka moosuwela waavaha itthu sooreera anamwanaanyu, wootepaxa Atithinyu ari wiirimu eniyaavahe itthu sooreera yaawo anaavekela!" 
Matthew7:12 Mwa soothesene, mwaapakele akina yeeyo muntthunaanyu weera yoopakeeni. Vano, ela ti ekwanihero ya malamulo ni maprofeeti." 
Matthew7:13 Muvolowe mulako woophureya, niwoko mulako woothanuwa ni ephiro yoothanuwa enrowa omooroni, ni ancipale ti yaawo amvolowa mwa yoowo." 
Matthew7:14 Mulakotho woophureya ni ephiro yoophureya enrowa wa okumi! Yaawo amphwanya, ari vakhaani." 
Matthew7:15 Mwiipasoope ni maprofeeti oolokottha. Awo angwa wa nyuwo ewanreene ixapala sa ikhondoolo, mene mpuwa ari miici soolumaxa." 
Matthew7:16 Nyuwo mmwaasuwele ni soowiimasaya. Atthu anoowera orukula iwuuva* mwa nyiri sa nyiiwa, hoye hoye ifiigu mwa malaxi?" 
Matthew7:17 Hiihotho nyiri sooreera sootheene siniima soowiima sooreera, mene nyiri soonanara siniima soowiima soonanara." 
Matthew7:18 Mwiri wooreera khooniima soowiima soonanara, naari mwiri woonanara soowiima sooreera." 
Matthew7:19 Nyiri sootheene sihiniima soowiima sooreera, sinoothikiliwa, ni sinoovonyeriwa omooroni." 
Matthew7:20 Hiihaawotho, nyuwo mmwaasuwele yaawo ni soowiimasaya." 
Matthew7:21 Khaahiyono ootheene ankeerela ‘Apwiya, Apwiya!’ eniivolowe moomweneni wa wiirimu, mene paahi yaawo ampaka otthuna wa Atithaka ari wiirimu." 
Matthew7:22 Ancipale eniikeerele nihuku nenno: ‘Apwiya, Apwiya, khanilaleiye mwa Nsinananyu? Ni mwa Nsinananyu khanoomonle minepa soonanara, ni khanipanke sootikhiniha sincipale?" 
Matthew7:23 Vano Miyo nkaaleele nnenesene: “Nkinoosuweleni. Mususe wa Miyo, nyuwo mumpaka sootakhala.”" 
Matthew7:24 Tivawo, yoowo oniiwa maswaaka yaala ni oniiwelela, ori ntoko namiruku otenke empaawe vamwala." 
Matthew7:25 Yaarupa epula, saasareya nyooloko, yaahoopa epheyo ni ikuru, emanaka empa ele, mene empa ele khayunttungwe, niwoko yaalipihiwa ni mwala." 
Matthew7:26 Vaheera yoowo oniiwa maswaaka yaala ni ahiiwelela, ori ntoko mutthu oohileeleya otenke empaawe vamuhaavani." 
Matthew7:27 Yaarupa epula, saasareya nyooloko, yaahoopa epheyo ni ikuru, emanaka empa ele, ni empa ele yaapittuwa, ni emorelowaaya yaari etokotoko.”" 
Matthew7:28 Yeesu amalihaka ohima itthu iye, atthu yaatikhina ni oxuttihawawe," 
Matthew7:29 niwoko Owo aahaaxuttiha ntoko Mulopwana ookhalano ikuru, ohikhanle ntoko anamawera a nlamulo*." 
Matthew8:1 Aakhuruwalaawe vamwaakoni, atthu ancipale yaamutthara Yoowo." 
Matthew8:2 Namakokho mmoha aamwaattamela Yoowo, anamukokhorela amweerelaka: “Apwiya, mwatthuna, munoowera okilamiha!”" 
Matthew8:3 Yeesu aahookola moono ni aamutava, eeraka: “Kinootthuna. Mulamihiwe!” Woowaakuveya aalamihiwa makokhwaawe." 
Matthew8:4 Vahoolowaya Yeesu aamweerela: “Mwiiwe, muhaaleele iya akina, mene mwiixoonihere wa musaserdoti* ni mvahe sooveleela aaruminghaawe Moisesi, weera iyo sikhale onamoona wa yaawo.”" 
Matthew8:5 Yeesu avolowaka oKafarnawu, aarowa wa Yoowo kenturiyoni* mmoha avekelaka ekhavihero," 
Matthew8:6 amweerelaka: “Apwiya murimeiyaaka ori owaani ahiweraka weetta ni moohaawaxani otokotoko.” 
Matthew8:7 Yeesu aamweerela: “Miyo nkirowe omulamiha.” 
Matthew8:8 Aamwaakhula kenturiyoni*: “Apwiya, nkiphwanenle owaakhelelani owannyaka. Muulumetho nsu nimoha paahi, ni murumeiyaaka anaalamihiwe." 
Matthew8:9 Vano, miyo kookhalano asitokweenaaka kimphwanelaaka owiiwelela. Ni kookhalanotho anakhotto ankiiwelela miyo. Kimmweerela mukina: ‘Orowe!’ ni onoorowa; ni wa mukina: ‘Owe!’ ni onimoowa. Kimmweerela murumeiyaaka: ‘Opake ela!’ ni onoopaka.”" 
Matthew8:10 Woowiiwa seiyo, Yeesu aatikhina, ni aaweerela yaamutthara: “Kinooleelani ekhaikhai: nkimphwannye oYixrayeli mutthu orino nroromelo hiihaawo." 
Matthew8:11 Miyo kinooleelani weera animoowa atthu ancipale ninkhuma nsuwa ni ninkela nsuwa, ni anookilaathi vameesa vamoha ni Abrahaamu, Isaaki ni Yakobe moomweneni wa wiirimu." 
Matthew8:12 Yaawotho oororomelihiwa yeera yaakhele omwene, eniivonyeriwe vaate, mpiphini, weiwo onuukhale wiinla ni okhuuriha maino.”" 
Matthew8:13 Yeesu aamweerela kenturiyoni*: “Murowe! Eniyeereiye hiiho ntoko muntthunaanyu.” Ehuhuweene yeele, murumeiyi ole aalamihiwa." 
Matthew8:14 Yeesu avolowaka empa ya Pedru, aahaaphwanya apwiyamwaanaawe Pedru ereene vabeettini, evoreiwaka oviha wa erutthu." 
Matthew8:15 Aavaraka Yeesu ni ntatanaya, eretta ele yaamaala. Awo yaavenya ni yaapacera omurumeela Yeesu." 
Matthew8:16 Wiilalaaya, aawiiheriwa Yoowo atthu ancipale yaarino minepa soonanara, ni Owo aahoomola minepa iye ni nsu nimoha, nitho aahaalamiha aretta ootheene." 
Matthew8:17 Ti hiiho yaakwaniheriwaaya yeeyo yaahimmwale ni mprofeeti Yesaya: “Owo aakuxa irettasahu ni aathatela ikwereresahu.” 
Matthew8:18 Yeesu awoonaka atthu ancipale emurukurenreene, aahaalamulela weera elapuwele okhopela wa ephareiya." 
Matthew8:19 Vano namawera a nlamulo* mmoha aamwaattamela Yoowo, eeraka: “Muhusiha, miyo kinimoottharani weiwo muneeraanyu murowe.”" 
Matthew8:20 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Akhwatte aakhalano mapuro ankonaayamo, ni ipalame sa wiirimu sookhalano ipuurusaya, mene Mwaana a mutthu khakhalanne nipuro noowiitthuuwiha muru.”" 
Matthew8:21 Oohusera mukina aamweerela: “Apwiya, mukihiye toko kaavithe atithaka.”" 
Matthew8:22 Vano Yeesu aamweerela: “Mukitthare, ni muhiye mittembo sivithe mittembosaya.”" 
Matthew8:23 Yeesu aavolowa munikulani, ni oohuseraawe yaamutthara." 
Matthew8:24 Wootutuxereya, yaapacera ettheku etokotoko mphareiyani, moota wooweera mitekuteku saapacera okhuneela nikula. Wa soothesene, Yeesu eera akonaka." 
Matthew8:25 Oohusera yaarowa omvenxa, ekhuwelaka: “Apwiya, munivuluxe! Nnooriheya!”" 
Matthew8:26 Yeesu aahaakoha: “Heeni munoovaanyu vancipale, atthu a nroromelo vakhaani?” Vano aavenya, anahiiha epheyo ni ephareiya, ni yaamaaleleya vancipale." 
Matthew8:27 Axilopwana yaatikhinaxa ni yaakohana: “Taani Ola? Mpaka epheyo ni ephareiya omwiiwelela!” 
Matthew8:28 Aphiyaka okhopela wa elapo ya oGadarene, atthu eeli yaarino minepa soonanara, ewaaka omahiyeni, yaarowa okumana ni Yoowo. Awo yaari oonanara moota wooweera khaawo aawera ovira ephiro ele." 
Matthew8:29 Vano awo yaakhuwela: “Mwaana a Muluku, muntthuna eheeni ni hiyo? Mwaaweenle va onihooxa ehinaaye ophiya ehuhuwaahu?”" 
Matthew8:30 Vakhiviru ni vale aakukhuliwa nakupa a ikhumba sincipale. 
Matthew8:31 Minepa soonaanara saamudyoonttelela Yeesu: “Nyuwo mwaanoomolaka hiyo, munilamule weera hiyo nivolowe mukhumbani.”" 
Matthew8:32 Yeesu aaweerela: “Mpwaheke!” Iyo saapwaha ni saavolowa mukhumbani. Vano nakupa ootheene aatthimaka akhuruwaka mwaako, amorelaka mphareiyani ni aamireya." 
Matthew8:33 Awo yaakukhula ikhumba yaatthimakela osidade ni yaathaliha sootheene seiye, nitho yeeyo yeereiye ni asilopwana eeli yaarino minepa soonanara." 
Matthew8:34 Atthu ootheene a esidade yaarowa okumana ni Yeesu. Emoonaka Yeesu, yaamudyoonttelela, ottimula mwa elapwaaya." 
Matthew9:1 Avolowaka Yeesu munikulani, aalapuwa ni aarowa osidade ya owannyawe." 
Matthew9:2 Atthu akina yaamuruuhela mutthu ooheetta aataleliweene munrepani. Oonaka Yeesu nroromelo yaakhalannaaya, aamweerela mutthu ooheetta: “Olipihe murimaawo mwanaka! Sootthekasawo sooleveleliwa.”" 
Matthew9:3 Vahoolowaya, akina a anamawera a nlamulo* yaaheerelana: “Mulopwana ola onimuveiha Muluku!”" 
Matthew9:4 Asuwelaka soowuupuwelasaya, Yeesu aaweerela: “Heeni munuupuwelaanyu soonanara mmirimanimwanyu?" 
Matthew9:5 Eheeni yookhweya weera: ‘Sootthekasawo sooleveleliwa,’ hoye hoye ‘Weemele ni weette’?" 
Matthew9:6 Weeratho musuwele weera Mwaana a mutthu ookhalano vathi ikuru soolevelela soottheka…,” vano aamweerela mutthu ooheetta: “Weemele, okuxe nrepanawo ni orowe owaani.”" 
Matthew9:7 Owo aaheemela ni aarowa owaani. 
Matthew9:8 Yoonaka yeeyo, atthu ancipale yaahoova, ni yaamvuwiha Muluku aavanghe ikuru iye atthu." 
Matthew9:9 Avenyaka vaavaale, Yeesu aamoona mutthu iitthaniwa Matheyo akilaantheene nipuro nne waaliviwa musoko, anamweerela: “Mukitthare.” Matheyo aaheemela anamutthara." 
Matthew9:10 Areene Yeesu owaani, yaarowa oca ni Yoowo vamoha ni oohuseraawe, anamaliviha a musoko ni anamattheka ancipale." 
Matthew9:11 Yoonaka yeeyo, aFarisi* yaahaakoha oohusera a Yeesu: “Heeni Muhusihaanyu oncaawe ni anamaliviha a musoko ni anamattheka?”" 
Matthew9:12 Iiwalaawe yeeyo, Yeesu aaweerela: “Khaahiyono yaale ari ni okumi animuhaawela meediku, mene aani aretta." 
Matthew9:13 Murowe ni muupuwele etaphulelowaaya ela: ‘Kintthuna ikharari, sihikhanle sooveleela.’ Miyo nkaaweenle owiitthana atthu oororomeleya, mene anamattheka.”" 
Matthew9:14 Vano oohusera a Yohaane yaahoowa omukoha: “Heeni hiyo ni aFarisi* nintthukaahu, mene oohuseraanyu naari?”" 
Matthew9:15 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Khoongwereya weera oolattuliwa wa ootthomera okhala oohihakalala, ootthomera areene nlelo ni yaawo. Eniirwe mahuku ootthomera aneeraawe avenxiwe wa yaawo. Wa ehuhuweene yeeyo anootthuka." 
Matthew9:16 Khaawo onghela nipareyo nnyowani ekuwo ya khalayi, niwoko nipareyo nnaandyeerere waahula ekuwo ni waahuwa onootepa." 
Matthew9:17 Kheengheliwatho eviinyu enyowani mmirupani sa exapala ya khalayi. Apaka, mirupa nsithaale ni eviinyu eniiriheye, ni mirupa nsinanare. Ohiyanawaya, engheliwa eviinyu enyowani mmirupani sinyowani, ni hiiho sootheene sinoothokororeya.”" 
Matthew9:18 Aalokololaawe yeeyo, aaphiya muhooleli mmoha. Aamukokhorela ohoolowawe eeraka: “Mwanaka ohookhwa vaanaano va. Ngwe ni muntave ni matataanyu, ni owo anaakhale ni okumi.”" 
Matthew9:19 Yeesu aaheemela ni aarowa ni yoowo, nitho oohuseraawe yaarowa." 
Matthew9:20 Mwa yeeyo muthiyana mmoha aamanle iyaakha muloko ni piili ahaawaka mweerutthunimwawe ekhumaka ephome, aaphiya ottuli wa Yeesu ni aatava nleembe na ikuwo aawanraawe." 
Matthew9:21 Vano owo aahiixeerela: “Miyo katava soowarasawe, nkilamihiwe.”" 
Matthew9:22 Arukunuwaka, Yeesu aamoona muthiyana ni aamweerela: “Olipihere murima, mwaana muthiyana, nroromelonawo nohoolamiha.” Wookhuma ehuhuweene yeele, muthiyana aalama." 
Matthew9:23 Aphiyaka owannyawe muhooleli ni awoonaka alipa aampetta ni atthu ancipale yiinlaka," 
Matthew9:24 Yeesu aaweerela: “Mpwaheke! Mwaana khakhwiiye, mene onookona.” Vanonto awo yaamutheiya." 
Matthew9:25 Vano, aasusihalaawe atthu, Yeesu aavolowa ni aamutava mwaana ni matataawe, ni owo aaheemela." 
Matthew9:26 Masu a sooweereiya yaamwaramwaxeya mweelaponi yootheene ele. 
Matthew9:27 Yesu avenyaka vaavaale, atthu eeli oohoona yaamutthara, ekhuwelaka: “Munimorele ikharari hiyo, Mwaana a Davide!”" 
Matthew9:28 Avolowaka Yeesu mpaani, atthu oohoona yaamwaattamela, ni Yeesu aahaakoha: “Nyuwo munoororomela weera Miyo kinoowera opaka yeeyo?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Aani, Apwiya!”" 
Matthew9:29 Ni Owo atavaka maithwaaya aaweerela: “Okhale ntoko muroromenlaanyu!” 
Matthew9:30 Ni oohoona ooweeli yaahoona. Yeesu aahaaleela nnenesene: “Mwiipasoope weera ehikhale akina eneera esuwele yeeyo.” 
Matthew9:31 Wa soothesene, awo yaavenya ni yaamwaramwaxa masu mweelaponi yootheene ele." 
Matthew9:32 Evenyaka ale, aaronghiwa wa Yeesu mutthu oohuuluma aarino munepa woonanara." 
Matthew9:33 Munepa woonanara woomoliwaaya, oohuuluma aapacera wuuluma. Atthu ancipale yaatikhina yeeraka: “Kheenooniwe etthu yoolikana ela oYixrayeli.”" 
Matthew9:34 Vaheera aFarisi* yaaheera: “Ti ni ikuru sa mutokweene a minepa soonanara ole onoomolaawe minepa soonanara.” 
Matthew9:35 Yeesu anneetteetta isidade ni mittetthe sootheene, axuttihaka muSinagogani*, alaleiyaka masu ooreeraxa a omwene, ni alamihaka ikwerere ni iretta sootheene." 
Matthew9:36 Awoonaka atthu ancipale, Yeesu aahaamorela ikharari yaawo, niwoko yaakhala oohooxiwa ni oovololeene ntoko ikhondoolo soohikhalano mukukhuli." 
Matthew9:37 Vano aaweerela oohuseraawe: “Sookhala soohepha sincipale, mene anamiteko ari vakhaani." 
Matthew9:38 Mumvekele muneene a soohepha weera aarumihele atthu akina soohephasawe. 
Matthew10:1 Awiitthanaka oohuseraawe muloko neeli, aahaavaha ikuru soowoomola minepa soonanara ni soolamiha iretta ni ikwerere." 
Matthew10:2 Ala ari masina a arummwa muloko neeli: Simeyoni (iitthaniwa Pedru) ni munneiye Andreiya; Yakobe, mwaana a Zebedeyo, ni munneiye Yohaane;" 
Matthew10:3 Filipe ni Bartolomeyo; Tomaxi ni Matheyo, namaliviha a musoko; Yakobe, mwaana a Alfeyu, ni Tadaiyo;" 
Matthew10:4 Simeyoni nanthiti, ni Yudasi Iskariyoti, yoowo aamvarihale Yeesu." 
Matthew10:5 Yeesu aahaarumiha muloko neeli ni malamulo ala: “Muhirowe wa amalapo, naari muhivolowe esidade emoha ya aSamariya." 
Matthew10:6 Murowe toko wa ikhondoolo siriheiye sa oYixrayeli. 
Matthew10:7 Munrowaanyuwo, mwalaleiye mutthenga ola: ‘omwene wa wiirimu wookhuveela.’" 
Matthew10:8 Mwaalamihe aretta, mwaavenyererihe akhwiiye, mwaalamihe anamakokho, moomole minepa soonanara. Nyuwo mohaakhela ya mahala, vano muvahetho ya mahala." 
Matthew10:9 Muhikuxe itthu sooreeraxa mulaambanimwanyu; 
Matthew10:10 muhikuxe mirupa sa ekwaha, hata mikaandyo miili, naari ikwakwaatta, naari ttootto, niwoko namuteko omphwanela yoocaawe." 
Matthew10:11 Mwaaphiyaka musidade, hoye hoye mmuttettheni, mwamwaasaase mutthu oophwanela, ni mwakhale owannyawe mpaka opwaha." 
Matthew10:12 Mwaavolowaka mpaani, mwawuulumihe atthu ari mwemmo." 
Matthew10:13 Atthu a vaate yakhala oophwanela, murettelaanyu wakhale ni yaawo; yaahikhalatho, murettelaanyu woohokoleeleni nyuwo." 
Matthew10:14 Mukina aahiwaakhelelani, hata aahiiwa maswaanyu, mwatathe ntthupi na inaawosanyu mwaakhumaka vaatewawe, hoye hoye esidade eyo." 
Matthew10:15 Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: vanihukuni na othorihiwa onuukhale ohaawa wootepaxa wa esidade eyo opwaha wa oSodoma ni oGomora. 
Matthew10:16 Miyo kinoorumihani ntoko ikhondoolo variyari wa miici. Tivawo, mukhale ni miruku ntoko inowa, ni oohikhalano milattu ntoko ikhunda." 
Matthew10:17 Mwiipasoope ni alopwana. Awo eniyooveleeleni wa alipa oowuuluma milattu ni eniyoowaxuleni muSinagoganimwaya*. 
Matthew10:18 Niwoko na Miyo, nyuwo mmwikuxiwe muronghiwaka vamaithoni wa maguvernadori ni mamwene, weera mwakhaleliwe onamoona wa yaawo ni wa amalapo." 
Matthew10:19 Yootthukani, muheeteteele moota, naari seiyo muneeraanyu muulume. Emaareene yeeyo mmwivahiwe nyuwo itthu soowuuluma," 
Matthew10:20 niwoko khamuhiyono nyuwo muneera muulume, mene Munepa wa Atithinyu oneera wuulume mwa nyuwo." 
Matthew10:21 Mutthu anaamvaherere munneiye weera iiviwe, ni atiithi mwanaya. Anamwane eniyaapittikuwele asinaangolo ni eniiwiive." 
Matthew10:22 Atthu ootheene eniyoothanyeeni niwoko na Miyo, mene yoowo anaavilele mpaka ommaleloni, anaavuluxiwe." 
Matthew10:23 Nyuwo yoosoondakani musidadeni emoha, mutthaweleke ekina. Miyo kinoororomelihani weera Mwaana a mutthu anaawe nyuwo muhinaaye ovira isidade sootheene sa oYixrayeli." 
Matthew10:24 Khaawo oohusera onimpwaha muhusihaawe, hata murumeiyi khanimpwaha yoowo onimurumeelaawe." 
Matthew10:25 Oohusera ori ntoko muhusihaawe paahi, ni murumeiyi ntoko yoowo onimurumeelaawe. Mwaneene vaate iitthaniwa Beelzebuli, wootepaxa atthu a emusaawe!" 
Matthew10:26 Tivawo, muhiwoove yaawo. Itthu sootheene soowiipithiheiya nsooneiye, ni itthu sootheene sookhuneeliwa, nsisuwelihiwe." 
Matthew10:27 Yeeyo kinooleelaakani mpiphini, muulume ni waara wa othana, ni masu anaapiwa mmaaruni, mulaleiye mmapathoni." 
Matthew10:28 Muhiwoove yaawo aniiva erutthu, mene ehiweraka wiiva munepa. Mmoove toko Yoowo ongwera ophwata erutthu ni munepa mmooroni." 
Matthew10:29 Khaanthumihiwa masiri meeli ni nikhoobiri nimoha? Wa soothesene, khaawo mmoha a yaawo ommorela vathi ehisuwelaka Atithinyu." 
Matthew10:30 Mpaka mayihi a mmurumwanyu wootheene ari oowaalikeliwa. 
Matthew10:31 Vano, muhiwoove; nyuwo muri ootthuneyaxa opwaha masiri mancipale!" 
Matthew10:32 Yoowo onkilapa Miyo variyari wa atthu, Miyo nkimuromoletho yoowo ohoolo wa Atithaka ari wiirimu." 
Matthew10:33 Vaheera yoowo onkikhootta Miyo variyari wa atthu, Miyo nkimukhoottetho ohoolo wa Atithaka ari wiirimu." 
Matthew10:34 Muhuupuwele weera kirweenle oruuha murettele vathi. Nkirweenle oruuha murettele, mene ekatana." 
Matthew10:35 Vano, kirweenle ohimwiiwananiha mwaana ni atithawe, mwaana ni amayawe, ootheliwa ni pwiyamwaanaawe," 
Matthew10:36 amwiittanaawe mutthu eniikhale yaawo a vaatevawe. 
Matthew10:37 Yoowo onaasivelaxa atithawe, hoye hoye amayawe wookipwaha Miyo, khakiphwanenle Miyo. Yoowo onaasivelaxa anamwanaawe wookipwaha Miyo, khakiphwanenle Miyo." 
Matthew10:38 Yoowo ohinkuxa muttandaawe ni ohinkitthara Miyo, khakiphwanenle Miyo." 
Matthew10:39 Yoowo onthokorora okumaawe, anaarihe yoowo, mene yoowo onriha okumaawe niwoko na Miyo, anaaphwanye yoowo." 
Matthew10:40 Yoowo ongwaakhelelani nyuwo, onkaakhelela Miyo, ni yoowo onkaakhelela, ongwaakhelela Yaawo akirumihale." 
Matthew10:41 Yoowo ommwaakhelela mprofeeti niwoko ori mprofeeti, anaakhele ntthuvelo na mprofeeti, ni yoowo ommwaakhelela mutthu oororomeleya niwoko ori oororomeleya, anaakhele ntthuvelo na mutthu oororomeleya." 
Matthew10:42 Yoowo anaavahe, hata ekhalaka ekoomixi ya maahi ooriira wa mmoha a asikhaani ala niwoko owo ori oohuseraaka, Miyo kinoororomelihani vekhaikhai weera owo anaakhele ntthuvelonawe.”" 
Matthew11:1 Amalihaka waavaha malamulo ala oohuseraawe muloko neeli, Yeesu aarowa oxuttiha ni olaleiya mmittettheni sa oGalileiya." 
Matthew11:2 Yohaane iiwalaawe okaliposo yeeyo Kristu aapakaawe, aahaarumiha oohuseraawe weera yaamukohe:" 
Matthew11:3 “Ti nyuwo Yoole eera awe, hoye hoye ningweherereke mukina?”" 
Matthew11:4 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Muhokolowe ni mwamuleele Yohaane seiyo muniiwaanyu ni munoonaanyu: 
Matthew11:5 atthu oohoona animoona; atthu oorakala animweetta; anamakokho anoolamihiwa; atthu oohiiwa animwiiwa; akhwiiye anoovenyererihiwa, ni masu ooreeraxa anoolaleeriwa oohaawa" 
Matthew11:6 ni ooreelihiwa ti yoole ohinkihovela Miyo.” 
Matthew11:7 Evenyaka oohusera a Yohaane, Yeesu aapacera wuuluma wa atthu ancipale mwaha wa Yohaane: “Eheeni nyuwo mwaarongwaanyu woona munikareni? Ettheere etannyiwaka ni epheyo?" 
Matthew11:8 Eheeni mwaarongwaanyu woona? Mulopwana awanreene ikuwo sooreeraxa? Moone, yaawo angwara ikuwo sooreeraxa ari mpaani mwa mamwene." 
Matthew11:9 Vatthuva, eheeni mwaarongwaanyu woona? Mprofeeti? Aani, Miyo kinooleelani, ompwaha mprofeeti." 
Matthew11:10 Ole ti yoole mwaha wa yoowo olempwe: “Miyo nkimurumihe murummwaaka ohoolowanyu; owo anaareherere ephirowaanyu ohoolo wa Nyuwo.” 
Matthew11:11 Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: Variyari wa atthu ooyariwa ni asithiyana, khaawo mukina okhumelenle mutokweene ompwaha Yohaane mpatisa. Wa soothesene, ooyevaxa wa omwene wa wiirimu ti mutokweene ompwaha yoowo." 
Matthew11:12 Okhuma ehuhu ya Yohaane mpatisa mpaka olelo, omwene wa wiirimu waawaneliwa ni atthu a owali, ni yaawo angwanela antthuna ovara yoowo." 
Matthew11:13 Mpaka ehuhu ya Yohaane, maprofeeti ni malamulo yaathalihera otthuna wa Muluku." 
Matthew11:14 Vano, nyuwo mwatthuna waakhulela – owo ti Eliya eera awe." 
Matthew11:15 Yoowo orino maaru, iiwe!" 
Matthew11:16 Ni heeni kineeraaka kilikanxere ekhapira ela? Eri ntoko anamwane ekilaantheene omerekadu ni ekhuwelelanaka: 
Matthew11:17 “Hiyo noowiipelani mpetta, mene nyuwo khamwiinale; naahiipa ncipo noolalamika, mene nyuwo khamwiinlale.”" 
Matthew11:18 Aahoowa Yohaane ahicaaka ni ahiwuraka, ni atthu aneera: ‘Owo ookhalano munepa woonanara.’" 
Matthew11:19 Aahoowa Mwaana a mutthu acaaka ni awuraka, ni atthu aneera: ‘Ori vawo Namaca ni Namawura, Nthamwene a anamaliviha a musoko ni namattheka.’ Miruku sinaakhuleliwa ni mitekosaya.”" 
Matthew11:20 Vano Yeesu aapacera ottaruxa ni masu isidade weiwo aapankaawe sootikhiniha sincipale soopwaha mapuro makina, niwoko khasaarukunxale murima, eeraka:" 
Matthew11:21 “Ii! Onoohaawa weyo, Khorazini! Ii! Onoohaawa weyo, Bethesayida, niwoko sootikhiniha Miyo kaapankaaka mwa weyo kaapanke oTiro ni oSidoni, atthu a oTiro ni oSidoni khalayi saano erukunxaleene murima, ewanreene ikuwo sa esaakho ni ekilaantheene vattuurani." 
Matthew11:22 Miyo kinooleelani: nihuku na othorihiwa nnikhale nootepaxa wa weyo opwaha oTiro ni oSidoni. 
Matthew11:23 Ni weyo, Kafarnawu, onuupuwela weera onookuxiwa mpaka wiirimu? Hoye! Onuukhuruwe mpaka oHadesi*! Miyo kaapanke sootikhiniha oSodoma kaapankaaka mwa weyo, esidade ele saano ekhanleene mpaka olelo." 
Matthew11:24 Miyo kinooleelani: nihuku na othorihiwa nnikhale nootepaxa wa weyo opwaha oSodoma.” 
Matthew11:25 Ehuhuweene yeele, Yeesu aaheera: “Miyo kinootthapelani Nyuwo, Atiithi, Apwiya a wiirimu ni vathi, niwoko mohaavithera itthu iya asuweli ni anamiruku, ni mwaawoonihera asikhaani." 
Matthew11:26 Aani Atiithi, vano eyo yohoosivelihani." 
Matthew11:27 Itthu sootheene kivahereriwe ni Atithaka. Khaawo amusuwenle Mwaana, ehikhanle Atiithi, ni khaawo aasuwenle Atiithi ahikanle Mwaana ni yaale Mwaana ontthunaawe owoonihera Atiithi." 
Matthew11:28 Ngweeke wa Miyo, ootheene nyuwo mukhulumungwe ni mulemelingwe yoolemela, ni Miyo nkoovaheeni wiitthuuwa." 
Matthew11:29 Mwiikumanyihe ni Miyo ni muxuttere wa Miyo, niwoko kiri Oomaala murima ni Oowiiyeviha, ni nyuwo mmwiphwanye wiitthuuwa wa okumaanyu." 
Matthew11:30 Vano, yoolemelaaka ti yooveruwa, ni murindaaka woohilemela.”" 
Matthew12:1 Ehuhuweene yeele, Yeesu aavira imatta sa etrigu nihuku na eSaabadu. Oohuseraawe yaavoliwa etala, ni yaapacera ovurula makala weera ekhuureke." 
Matthew12:2 aFarisi* yoonaka yeele, yaamweerela: “Mwaawehe, oohuseraanyu ampaka yeeyo ehintthuniheriwa opaka nihuku na eSaabadu.”" 
Matthew12:3 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Nyuwo khamusomme yeeyo aapankaawe Davide ole ni asikhwaawe yaavoliwaaya? 
Matthew12:4 Awo yaavolowa Empa ya Muluku, ni vamoha ni asikhwaawe, Davide aahooca ipaawu sooreelihiwa. Eyo khayaatthuniheriwa opaka, ehikhanle ni asaserdoti* paahi." 
Matthew12:5 Nyuwo khamusomme munlamuloni weera, munihukuni na eSaabadu Mpaani mwa Muluku, asaserdoti* yaaveiha eSaabadu, mene yaari oohikhalano nthowa?" 
Matthew12:6 Miyo kinooleelani weera Yoowo ori va, ti Mutokweene opwaha Empa ya Muluku." 
Matthew12:7 Nyuwo mwaasuwenle etaphulelo ya masu ala: ‘Kintthuna ikharari, sihikhanle sooveleela,’ khamwaathoriha atthu oohikhalano milattu." 
Matthew12:8 Vano, Mwaana a mutthu ti Apwiya a eSaabadu.”" 
Matthew12:9 Avenyaka nipuro nne, aarowa muSinagoganimwaya*," 
Matthew12:10 ni aari weiwe mulopwana mmoha ni ntata nimoha noorakala. Yaasaasaka nthowa noomoothera Yeesu, aFarisi* yaamukoha: “Ti wootthuneya olamiha nihuku na eSaabadu?”" 
Matthew12:11 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Taani a nyuwo akhalano ekhondoolo, ni eyo yamorela munlittini nihuku na eSaabadu, khanrowa ovara ni okhumiha mmwe?" 
Matthew12:12 Mutthu ti ootthuneyaxa opwaha ekhondoolo. Ti wootthuneya opaka yooreera nihuku na eSaabadu.” 
Matthew12:13 Vano Owo aamweerela mulopwana ole: “Mookole ntatananyu!” Owo aahookola ntata, ni ntata nne naalamihiwa ni naakhala nnene ntoko nikina." 
Matthew12:14 Vano aFarisi* yaakhuma ni yaapacera ovaanela moota heeni yeeraaya emwiive Yeesu. 
Matthew12:15 Asuwelaka yeeyo, Yeesu aavenyawo nipuro nne. Atthu ancipale yaamutthara, ni Owo aahaalamiha aretta ootheene yaari variyariwaya," 
Matthew12:16 aaleelaka weera ehihime weera Yoole ti nnexe. 
Matthew12:17 Seiye seereiye weera sikwaniheriwe seiye saahimmwe ni mprofeeti Yesaya: 
Matthew12:18 “Ola ti Murumeiyaaka, mwa Yoowo kaamuthanlalaaka, Oosiveleyaaka, ni mwa Yoowo onkihakalaliha. Miyo nkihele wa Yoole Munepaaka, ni Owo anaalaleiye otthunawaka wa miloko." 
Matthew12:19 Owo khanrowa waakhulana, hoye hoye okhuwela; khaawo aneera iiwe nsunawe mmuseweni." 
Matthew12:20 Owo kharwa ananariha ettheere yookhuneiya, naari ocipiha mutthambo ni mwiixi mwincipale, mpaka aneeraawe eettihere ekhaikhai owina." 
Matthew12:21 Miloko sinoomuroromela Yoowo.” 
Matthew12:22 Yaangwiihera Yeesu mutthu aari oohoona ni oohuuluma ni aarino munepa woonanara. Yeesu aamulamiha moota wooweera owo aawera wuuluma ni woona. 
Matthew12:23 Atthu ootheene yaakoha ootikhineene: “Khahiyono yoola mwaana a Davide?” 
Matthew12:24 Vaheera aFarisi* yiiwalaaya yeeyo, yaaheera: “Ti ni ikuru sa Beelzebuli, mutokweene a minepa soonanara paahi onoomolaawe minepa soonanara.”" 
Matthew12:25 Yeesu asuwelaka soowuupuwelasaya, aaweerela: “Omwene wootheene onkawanyeiya mwaneenaayaru, onuuphwatiwe, ni esidade, hoye hoye yakhalaru empa yookawanyeiya mwaneenaayaru, kheempwaherera." 
Matthew12:26 Satana amoomola Satana, ori ookawanyeiya muneenaaweru. Vano, onuupwaherere hai omwenaawe?" 
Matthew12:27 Miyo koomola minepa soonanara ni Beelzebuli, ni taani angwoomolela anamwanaanyu minepa soonanara? Wa yeeyo, ale eniikhale aphukaanyu." 
Matthew12:28 Vano Miyo koomola minepa soonanara ni Munepa wa Muluku, vano wohoophiyerani omwene wa Muluku." 
Matthew12:29 Ongwereya hai mutthu ovolowa empa ya mulopwana oolipa ni okuxa itthusawe sooreera, ahinaaye toko omutthuka mulopwana oolipa? Paahi hiiho owo aneeraawe iiyeke empa." 
Matthew12:30 Owo ohikhanle ni Miyo onookisoonda, ni owo ohinthukumanyiha ni Miyo onoomwalamwaxa." 
Matthew12:31 Tivawo, Miyo kinooleelaakani: soottheka sootheene ni oveiha wootheene onuuleveleliwe wa atthu, mene yoowo omveiha Munepa kharwa aleveleliwa." 
Matthew12:32 Ootheene yaale ammuulumela masu oonanara Mwaana a mutthu eniileveleliwe, eneeratho yuulumele masu oonanara Munepa Wootteela kheerwa eleveleliwa, hata vaanaano vaava, naari muhoolo." 
Matthew12:33 Muupuwele: mwiri wooreera oniima soowiima sooreera, ni mwiri woonanara oniima soowiima soonanara. Vano, mwiri onsuweliwa ni soowiimasaya." 
Matthew12:34 Inowa! Ongwereya hai nyuwo muri oonanara ohima itthu sooreera? Eyano enlokolola sa itthu siri vamurimani. 
Matthew12:35 Mulopwana ooreera murima onookhumiha itthu sooreera mmuhakhunimwawe wooreera, ni mulopwana oonanara murima onookhumiha itthu soonanara sa mmuhakhunimwawe woonanara." 
Matthew12:36 Miyo kinooleelani weera nihuku na othorihiwa, atthu eniithalihe masu ootheene a siiyo yuulumalaaya." 
Matthew12:37 Vano, ni maswaanyu nyuwo munoovariwa ni milattu, hoye hoye woohikhalano." 
Matthew12:38 Vano akina a aFarisi* ni anamawera a nlamulo* yaamweerela: “Muhusiha, nintthuna noone eneneero yootikhiniheiya yoopakiwa ni Nyuwo.”" 
Matthew12:39 Owo aawaakhula: “Ekhapira yoonanara ni yooraruwa enoovekela eneneero yootikhiniheiya! Kheewotho eneneero ekina eneeraaya evahiwe, ehikhanle eneneero ya mprofeeti Yoonasi." 
Matthew12:40 Vano, hiiho ntoko Yoonasi aaraawe mahuku mararu ni ohiyu miraru mmirimani mwa ehopa etokotoko, hiihotho Mwaana a mutthu anaakhale mahuku mararu ni ohiyu miraru mpuwa mwa etthaya." 
Matthew12:41 Atthu a oNinive eniivenyerere nihuku na othorihiwa vamoha ni ekhapira ela, ni atthu a oNinive eniithorihe ela, niwoko yaawo yaarukunxa mirimasaya yiiwalaaya olaleiya wa Yoonasi. Vanonto, ori va Yoowo Mutokweene ompwaha Yoonasi." 
Matthew12:42 Apwiyamwene a ohitto eniivenyerere nihuku na othorihiwa ni ekhapira ela, ni eniithorihe ela, niwoko yaahoowa woorakamaxa wiiwa miruku sa Salomoni. Vano, ori va Yoowo Mutokweene ompwaha Salomoni." 
Matthew12:43 Waakhumaka munepa woonanara mweerutthuni ya mutthu, onimweetta mapuro oowuuma waasaasaka wiitthuuwa, mene khoomphwanya." 
Matthew12:44 Vanonto oneera: ‘Miyo kinoohokoleela owaani kivenyenraakawo.’ Waaphiyaka owaani iwo, omphwanya empa eyo ehikhaliwe, ekwesiweene ni ereene yooreheriwa." 
Matthew12:45 Onrowa oruuha minepa mithannamiili soonanara soopwaha yoowo, ni sivolowaka sinoovira sikilaathiki mwemmwe. Vano, wootepaxa ti mukhalelo wa ommaleloni wa mulopwana ole opwaha woopacera. Hiiho ngweereiye wa ekhapira ela yootakhala.”" 
Matthew12:46 Eera uulumaka Yeesu ni atthu ancipale, amayawe ni axunneiye yaaraaya okhwipi wa vaate, etthunaka weera yuulume ni Yoowo." 
Matthew12:47 Mukina aamweerela: “Amayinyu ni axunninyu ari vaate, ni antthuna wuuluma ni Nyuwo.”" 
Matthew12:48 Yeesu aakoha: “Amayaka taani, ni axunnaka taani?”" 
Matthew12:49 Ookolelaka ntata wa oohuseraawe, Owo aaheera: “Va aakhala amayaka ni axunnaka." 
Matthew12:50 Vano, yoowo ompaka otthuna wa Atiithi ari wiirimu, owo munnaka, murokoraka ni amayaka.”" 
Matthew13:1 Nihuku nenenenne Yeesu aavenya owaani ni aakilaathi mukerekhere wa ephareiya. 
Matthew13:2 Yaathukumana mukhwipimwawe atthu ancipale, moota wooweera Owo aavolowa munikulani ni aakilaathi atthu ootheene ereene mukhwipi mwemmwe." 
Matthew13:3 Vano Owo aahuuluma itthu sincipale ni soolikanyiha, eeraka: “Namwaala aarowa waala." 
Matthew13:4 Aalaka, mpatta wa mmiso waamorela mukerekhere wa ephiro, ni ipalame saahoowa ni saahooca." 
Matthew13:5 Mpatta mukina waamorela vamasorosoroni wahaakhanlewo etthaya yincipale, ni waamela woowaakuveya, niwoko etthaya yeeyo khayiixenre." 
Matthew13:6 Naakhumalaaya nsuwa, mmiso ole waamenle waahoosa ni waahuuma niwoko khawaarino mikwankhwaari." 
Matthew13:7 Mpatta mukina waamorela vanyiiwani, saahunnuwa ni saavuvura mmiso ole." 
Matthew13:8 Mukinatho waamorela vatthayani yooreera ni waavaha soohepha sooreera: mmiso mmoha soowiima imaara ncira, mmiso mukina soowiima imaara miloko mithannamosa, ni mukinatho imaara miloko miraru." 
Matthew13:9 Yoowo orino maaru, iiwe.”" 
Matthew13:10 Oohusera yaamwaattamela ni yaamukoha: “Heeni Nyuwo munuulumaanyu ni atthu ni soolikanyiha?” 
Matthew13:11 Owo aahaakhula: “Wa nyuwo moovahiwa osuwela ixiiri sa omwene wa wiirimu, mene wa yaawo, naari." 
Matthew13:12 Yoowo okhalanne, onoovahiwatho, ni owo anaakhalane yincipale. Yoowo ohikhalanne, mpaka yeeyo orinaawe, enoovenxiwa." 
Matthew13:13 Niwoko na yeeyo Miyo kinimwaaleela ni soolikanyiha: ‘Niwoko yoonaka, khaanoonexexa, ni yiiwaka, khaniiwa, hata khaaniiwexexa.’" 
Matthew13:14 Mwa yaawo aakwaniheriwa masu a mprofeeti Yesaya owo eenraawe: ‘Nyuwo mahuku ootheene muneera mwiiwaka, mene khamurwa mwiiwexexa, mahuku ootheene muneera moonaka, mene khamurwa moonexexa.’" 
Matthew13:15 Vano mirima sa muloko ola saathatuwa soohipwattha, waakhalano maaru oolipa ni maitho ookhuneeleya. Wahaari hiihaawo, yaahereke woona ni maitho, wiiwa ni maaru, wiiwexexa ni murima ni orukunxa murima, ni Miyo kaamwaalamiha.’" 
Matthew13:16 Ooreelihiwatho ti maithwaanyu niwoko animoona, ni ooreelihiwa maaruwaanyu niwoko animwiiwa." 
Matthew13:17 Vano Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: maprofeeti ni atthu oororomeleya ancipale yaatthunaxa woona yeeyo munoonaanyu, mene khayoonne. Awo yaatthunaxa wiiwa yeeyo muniiwaanyu, mene khayiiwale." 
Matthew13:18 Tivawo, mwiiwe etaphulelo ya yoolikanyiha ya namwaala:" 
Matthew13:19 Mutthu iiwa mutthenga wa omwene ni aahiiwexexa mutthenga ole, mutakhali onimoowa ni onoomwaakha mmiso waaliwe mmurimanimwawe. Ola ti mmiso waaliwe mukerekhere wa ephiro." 
Matthew13:20 Mwaha wa mmiso ole waaliwe vamasorosoroni, owo ti yoole mutthu oniiwa masu ni woowaakuveya onaakhelela ni ohakalala." 
Matthew13:21 Wa soothesene, woonaka weera khanono mukwankhwaari mwaneenaawe, onoopwaherera ehuhu vakhaani paahi. Saakhumelelaka soohooxa, hoye hoye ottharatthariwa niwoko na masu ala, woowaakuveya onoohiya." 
Matthew13:22 Mwaha wa mmiso ole waaliwe vanyiiwani, owo ti mutthu yoole oniiwa masu, mene weeteteiya wa okumi ola ni olokottha wa opuha onimvuvura omutatuxaka oohiima." 
Matthew13:23 Woomalihera, mmiso ole waaliwe vatthayani yooreera, owo ti mutthu yoole oniiwa masu ni oniiwexexa. Onnavaha yoohepha: mmiso mmoha sinimwiima imaara ncira, mmiso mukina imaara miloko mithannamosa ni mukinatho imaara miloko miraru.”" 
Matthew13:24 Yeesu aahaathalihera yoolikanyiha ekina eeraka: “Omwene wa wiirimu ori ntoko mulopwana aanle mmiso wooreera mmattamwawe. 
Matthew13:25 Vaheera ootheene ekonaka, aahoorwa mwiittanaawe ni aamwaala nakhwaali variyari wa etrigu, ni aapwaha." 
Matthew13:26 Etrigu yaathapuruwaaya ni ekhalanaka nyiiwa, nakhwaalitho aamela." 
Matthew13:27 Anamiteko a muneene yaahoorwa wa yoowo ni yaaheera: ‘Khamwaanle mmiso wooreera mmattamwanyu? Vano, ongweela woowi nakhwali?’" 
Matthew13:28 Aawaakhula: ‘Mwiittanaaka opanke yeeyo.’ Anamiteko yaamukoha: ‘Apwiya, muntthuna weera nimuvenxe?’" 
Matthew13:29 Owo aawaakhula: ‘Hoye! Woomvenxa nakhwali, mmwivenxetho etrigu." 
Matthew13:30 Muhiye weera sunnuwe vamoha mpaka ehuhu ya ohepha. Vano, miyo nkiweerele anamahepha weera epacere omuukela nakhwali, emutthukaka irecesene weera sihisiwe. Vahoolowaya nkiweerele weera ethukumanye etrigu ni ethokorore vatathaniwaka.’”" 
Matthew13:31 Vano aahaathalihera yoolikanyiha ekina: “Omwene wa wiirimu ori ntoko enuku ya mwiri wa emostarda* mulopwana aakuxalaawe ni aanlaawe mmattamwawe. 
Matthew13:32 Erookhalaru ekhaaneene yoopwaha inuku sikina, yunnuwa, onookhala mwiri mutokotoko moota wooweera apalame animoowa ni ampaka ipuurusaya mphandinimwaya.”" 
Matthew13:33 Aahaathaliheratho yoolikanyiha ekina: “Omwene wa wiirimu ori ntoko eferementu muthiyana aakuxalaawe ni aatakansenraawe ni ephepa yincipale mpaka yootheene enanyaruwa.” 
Matthew13:34 Yeesu aahima itthu sootheene seiya wa atthu ancipale ni soolikanyiha. Kheewo aahimaawe woohikhala ni yoolikanyiha," 
Matthew13:35 akwaniheraka hiiho yeeyo aaleeliwaawe ni mprofeeti: “Nkuulume ni soolikanyiha, nkihime itthu saavithiwe okhuma ephattuwelo ya elapo ya vathi.”" 
Matthew13:36 Vano Owo aahaahiya atthu ancipale ni aarowa owaani. Oohuseraawe yaamwaattamela Yoowo ni yaamweerela: “Munithalihere yoolikanyiha ya nakhwali mmatta.” 
Matthew13:37 Owo aawaakhula: “Owo aanle mmiso wooreera ti Mwaana a mutthu. 
Matthew13:38 Ematta ti elapo ya vathi, ni mmiso wooreera ti anamwane a omwene. Nakhwali ti anamwane a mutakhali." 
Matthew13:39 Mwiittana aamwaanle nakhwali ti Diyabu*. Ohepha ti emalihero ya ehuhu, ni anamahepha ti andyelo." 
Matthew13:40 Hiiho ntoko nakhwali onkuxiwaawe ni onghisiwaawe mmooroni, hiihotho eniyeereiye emalihero ya ehuhu." 
Matthew13:41 Mwaana a mutthu anaarumihe andyelowaawe, ni awo eniikhumihe sa omwenaawe sootheene sinaakwattula akina ni ootheene yaawo ampaka sootakhala." 
Matthew13:42 Awo eniyaavonyere mmooroni, weiwo oneeraaya okhale wiinla ni okhuuriha maino." 
Matthew13:43 Vano, atthu oororomeleya eniyaare ntoko nsuwa moomweneni wa Atithaya. Yoowo orino maaru, iiwe!" 
Matthew13:44 Omwene wa wiirimu ori ntoko muhakhu woottittimiheyaxa ovithiwe mmatta. Mutthu mmoha aaphwannyaawe, aavitha emaara yanaaveeli, anarowa ni ohakalala anathumiha sootheene aarinaawe. Vano aathuma ematta ele." 
Matthew13:45 Omwene wa wiirimu ori ntoko nanakoso onaasaasa maluku oowaaraxa oottittimiheyaxa. 
Matthew13:46 Aphwanyaka nluku noowaaraxa noottittimiheyaxa, aarowa, anathumiha sootheene aarinaawe, anathuma nluku nne." 
Matthew13:47 Omwene wa wiirimu ori ntoko ntthavi na nikoka nimvonyeriwa mphareiyani ni nimvara moota woohiyanahiyana wa ihopa. 
Matthew13:48 Nisaraka, anamakoka anoopurula ntthavi mpaka mukerekhere wa ephareiya. Vano, anookilaathi ni anoothukumanya ihopa sooreera mmipaparani, mene anooriha seiyo soonanara." 
Matthew13:49 Hiiho eniyeereiye emalihero ya ehuhu. Andyelo animoowa ni eniyaamwalamwaxe anamatakhala ni oororomeleya. 
Matthew13:50 Eniyaavonyere anamatakhala mmooroni, weiwo oneeraaya okhale wiinla ni okhuuriha maino." 
Matthew13:51 Nyuwo mohiiwexexa itthu sootheene iya?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Aani!” 
Matthew13:52 Owo aaweerela: “Tivawo namawera a nlamulo* ootheene ooxuttihiwa mwaha wa omwene wa wiirimu, onoolikana ntoko mwaneene a vaate onkhumiha mmuhakhunimwawe itthu sooreeraxa sinyowani ni itthu sa khalayi.”" 
Matthew13:53 Amalihaka wuuluma soolikanyiha seiye, Yeesu aavenya vaavaale." 
Matthew13:54 Aphiyaka esidadaawe, aapacera oxuttiha muloko wa atthu muSinagogani*. Ootheene yaatikhina ni yaakohana: “Singweela woowi mirukusawe ni ikuru seiya sootikhiniheiya?" 
Matthew13:55 Khahiyono Ola Mwaana a kalipinteiro? Khanihiyono nsina na amayawe ole Mariya? Axunneiye khahiyono Yakobe, Yoseefe, Simeyoni ni Yudasi?" 
Matthew13:56 Khaakhanle vamoha ni hiyo axirokoriye ootheene? Woowi Ola ophwannyaawe itthu seiya?” 
Matthew13:57 Niwoko nenenenno awo yaamuhovela Yoowo. Yeesutho aaweerela: “Mprofeeti ori oottittimihiwa mapuro ootheene, ohikhanle elapwaawe ni vaatevawe.”" 
Matthew13:58 Vano, khaapankewo sootikiniha sincipale niwoko na ohiroromelawaya." 
Matthew14:1 Ehuhuweene yeele Herodi tetrarkha* a elapo ya oGalileiya aahiiwa soowuulummwa mwaha wa 
Matthew14:2 Yeesu, ni aahaaleela yaawo yaamurumeela: “Ole Yohaane mpatisa. Owo oovenyerera mookhwaani! Tivawo okhalannaawe ikuru soopaka sootikhiniha.”" 
Matthew14:3 Herodi aahaarumiha atthu weera emvare ni emutthuke Yohaane ni emuwalele yoowo mukaliposo," 
Matthew14:4 niwoko Yohaane aamuleenlaawe Herodi weera khoontthuniheriwa okhala ni Herodiyas, amwaarawe munneiye Filipe." 
Matthew14:5 Herodi aatthuna omwiiva Yohaane, mene aahoova muloko wa atthu, niwoko muloko ole wannamuttittimiha ntoko mprofeeti." 
Matthew14:6 Vano, naaphiyalaaya nihuku Herodi uupuwelaawe oyariwawawe, mwaana a Herodiyas aahiina ohoolo wa atthu ootheene. Aasiveliwa vancipale Herodi, moota wooweera" 
Matthew14:7 aamuroromeliha vekhaikhai omvaha yeeyo mwaana ole aatthunaawe omvekela. 
Matthew14:8 Amayawe yaamviriyela owo weera aamweerele mwene: “Mukivahe musasaanini muru wa Yohaane mpatisa.” 
Matthew14:9 Mwene aathananiheiya vancipale, mene niwoko na olipela ni na oolattuliwa aalamula omvaha yeeyo aavekenlaawe." 
Matthew14:10 Aalamula weera ahitiwe Yohaane mukaliposo. 
Matthew14:11 Muruwaawe waaheliwa musasaanini ni aavahereriwa mwaana ole, ni owo aarongha wa amayawe." 
Matthew14:12 Oohusera a Yohaane yaarowa ni yaakuxa erutthwaawe, ni yaavitha. Vano yaarowa omuleela yeeyo Yeesu." 
Matthew14:13 Yeesu aakhenlaawe masu ale, aavenya munikulani ni aarowa vanipuroni na meekhaawe. Atthu ancipale esuwelaka yeeyo, yaavenya musidadeni ni yaamutthara yeettaka." 
Matthew14:14 Yeesu avenyaka munikulani ni awoonaka atthu ancipale, aahaamorela ikharari yaawo ni aahaalamiha arettaaya." 
Matthew14:15 Wiilaka, oohuseraawe yaamwaattamela Yoowo emweerelaka: “Nna ti nipuro na munikareni, ni oneera wiilaka. Ngweerele atthu ancipale ala weera eroweke mmittettheni yathumeke yooca.”" 
Matthew14:16 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Khoontthuneya orowa, mwaavahetho nyuwo etthu weera eceeke.”" 
Matthew14:17 Awo yaamweerela: “Va nrino ipaawu ithanu ni ihopa piili paahi.” 
Matthew14:18 Yeesu aaheera: “Mukiwiihere va!” 
Matthew14:19 Owo aahaalamulela atthu ancipale weera ekilaathiki vathi. Akuxaka ipaawu ithanu ni ihopa piili ni awehaka osulu wiirimu, aamutthapela Muluku ni aameiyanyiha ipaawu. Vahoolowaya aahaavaha oohuseraawe, enaakawela atthu ancipale." 
Matthew14:20 Ootheene yaahooca ni yaavona. Oohusera yaattottanyiha ni yaasariha mipapara muloko ni miili sa mivithe saahanle. 
Matthew14:21 Yaaciiye yaari asilopwana ookwanaka macira miloko mithanu, ehaalikeliwaka athiyana ni anamwane." 
Matthew14:22 Vahoolowaya Yeesu aahaanyesereriha oohuseraawe weera evolowe munikulani ni erowe vahoolowawe okhopela, aalaxeraka Yeesu atthu ancipale." 
Matthew14:23 Aalaxerakaru atthu ancipale, aawela meekhaawe vamwaakoni weera avekele. Wiilalaaya, Owo aari meekhaawe." 
Matthew14:24 Vano, nikula naarakamela mukerekhere wa ephareiya, nimaniwaka ni mitekuteku niwoko epheyo yaahoopa erweelaka ohoolo wa nikula." 
Matthew14:25 Oyaaka ni oxa Yeesu aarowa wa yaawo, eettaka vasulu wa ephareiya." 
Matthew14:26 Yaamoonnaaya Yeesu eettaka vasulu ephareiya, yaahoova vancipale yeeraka: “Ti namanxepaani”! Yaakhuwela ni woova." 
Matthew14:27 Yeesutho aaweerela woowaakuveya: “Mulipiheke mirimasanyu, ti Miyo! Muhoove!”" 
Matthew14:28 Pedru aamweerela: “Apwiya, mwaari ti Nyeenyu, mukilamule weera kirwe kookumananeni vasulu wa maahi.”" 
Matthew14:29 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Ngweeke!” Vano Pedru aakhuma munikulani, aneetta vasulu wa maahi, anarowa wa Yeesu." 
Matthew14:30 Oonnaawe epheyo weera yaari yoolipaxa, aahoova ni apaceraka oneela, aakhuwela: “Apwiya, mukivuluxe!”" 
Matthew14:31 Woowaakuveya Yeesu aahookola moonowaawe ni aamvarela, eeraka: “Mulopwana a nroromelo vakhaani! Heeni nyuwo muhovenlaanyu?”" 
Matthew14:32 Evolowakaru munikulani, epheyo yaamaala." 
Matthew14:33 Awo yaari munikulani mmwe yaanimuttottopela Yoowo yeeraka: “Vekhaikhai, Nyuwo ti Mwaana a Muluku!”" 
Matthew14:34 Elapuwakaru ephareiya, yaaphiya oGenesarete." 
Matthew14:35 Atthu a elapweene yeele emusuwelaka Yeesu, yaamwaramwaxa masu mmittettheni sootheene sa mukerekhere, ni yaangwiihera arettaaya." 
Matthew14:36 Yaamudyoonttelela weera aretta etave paahi ikuwosawe. Ootheene yaamutamve yaalamihiwa. 
Matthew15:1 Vano afarasi* akina ni anamawera a nlamulo* akina erweelaka oYerusaleemu yaarowa wa Yeesu ni yaamukoha: 
Matthew15:2 “Heeni oohuseraanyu ahiniiwelelaaya ekhovelelo ya asitokweene? Vano, khaannyawa matata ehinaaye oca.”" 
Matthew15:3 Yeesu aahaakhula: “Ni heeni nyuwo muhiniiwelelaanyu nlamulo na Muluku niwoko na ekhovelelowaanyu? 
Matthew15:4 Vano Muluku eenre: ‘Mwaattittimihe atithinyu ni amayinyu,’ ni ‘yaawo anaalapha atithaya, hoye hoye amayaya, eniithorihiheliwe okhwa.’" 
Matthew15:5 Mukinatho aweerela atithawe, hoye hoye amayawe: ‘Sakhalaru sookhavihera nyuwo muneeraanyu mwaakhele wa miyo, ti yamahala yoovahiwa wa Muluku.’" 
Matthew15:6 Apaka yeeyo, nyuwo munnaakhulela weera owo khanyesererihiwa waattittimiha atithawe mooteene yoola. Hiiho nyuwo munkhootta masu a Muluku niwoko na ekhovelelowaanyu." 
Matthew15:7 Anamwiixeera! Yesaya aahuuluma nnenesene sa nyuwo eeraka: 
Matthew15:8 ‘Muloko ola onkittittimiha ni eyano paahi, mene mirimasaya siri ottaiwene wa Miyo." 
Matthew15:9 Ankittottopela siiyoweene. Oxuttihawaaya ti ikano sooxuttihiwa ni atthu.’” 
Matthew15:10 Yeesu aawiitthana atthu ancipale vamoha ni Yoowo ni aaweerela: “Mwiiwe ni mwiiwexexe! 
Matthew15:11 Kheehiyono yeeyo emvolowa mmwaano enimunanariha mutthu, mene yeeyo enkhuma mmwaano.”" 
Matthew15:12 Vano oohuseraawe yaamwaattamela ni yaamukoha: “Moosuwela weera afarasi* yaari oonyoonyiweene yiiwalaaya yeeyo?” 
Matthew15:13 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Mwiri wootheene Atithaka a wiirimu ahiphatteiyaaya, onuupheliwe ni mikwankhwaarisaya." 
Matthew15:14 Mwaahiye, awo ari ahooleli oohoona. Oohoona mmoha amweettiha oohoona mukina, ooweeli anoomorela mulittini.”" 
Matthew15:15 Vano Pedru aamvekela: “Munithalihere yoolikanyiha ela.” 
Matthew15:16 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Weeraka nlelo nyuwo khamuniiwexexa?” 
Matthew15:17 Khamuniiwexexa weera yeeyo emvolowa mmwaano enrowa munipwiipwini ni vahoolowaya enooriheliwa mucumbusini? 
Matthew15:18 Itthutho sinkhuma mmwaano sinrweela mmurimani, ni ti seiyo sinimunanariha mutthu." 
Matthew15:19 Vano, wa mmurimani sinkhumelelaaya soowuupuwela soonanara, wiiva, oraruwa, olavilavi, wiiya, wootha ni waapa." 
Matthew15:20 Itthusene seiya sinimunanariha mutthu, mene oca woohinyawa khoonimunanariha mutthu.”" 
Matthew15:21 Avenyaka nipuro nne, Yeesu aarowa elapo ya oTiro ni oSidoni." 
Matthew15:22 Muthiyana mmoha a oKanaani, owannyawe elapweene yeeyo, aahoorwa wa Yoowo akhuwelaka: “Apwiya, Mwaana a Davide, mukimorele ikharari! Mwanaka onnahaawa vancipale niwoko ookhalano munepa woonanara.”" 
Matthew15:23 Yeesutho khaamwaakhunle. Vano oohuseraawe yaamwaattamela ni yaamudyoonttelela: “Mmoomole weera aroweke, niwoko ongwa akhuwelaka ottuliwahu!”" 
Matthew15:24 Owo aawaakhula: “Miyo kirumiheliwe paahi ikhondoolo siriheiye sa oYixrayeli.” 
Matthew15:25 Muthiyana aahoorwa, aamukokhorela ni aamweerela: “Apwiya, mukikhavihere!”" 
Matthew15:26 Owo aamwaakhula eeraka: “Khoonreera ovenxa yooca ya anamwane ni waavonyera alapwa.” 
Matthew15:27 Ole aamweerela: “Aani, Apwiya, mene mpaka alapwa animooca inyenyeeri simmora vameesa wa asineene a alapwa.”" 
Matthew15:28 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Muthiyana, ntokotoko nri nroromelonanyu. Okhale ntoko munghaawelaanyu.” Ni ehuhuweene yeele mwanawe aalamihiwa." 
Matthew15:29 Yeesu aavenya vaavaale ni aarowa mukerekhere wa ephareiya ya oGalileiya. Aawela vamwaako mmoha ni aakilaathi. 
Matthew15:30 Atthu ancipale yaamwaattamela Yoowo, yaakuxaka atthu oorakala, oovulala, oohoona, oohuuluma ni ancipale akina, ni yaahaakilaathiha wa nyettoniwawe. Vano Owo aahaalamiha." 
Matthew15:31 Muloko wa atthu waatikhina waawoonnaaya oohuuluma yuulumaka, oovulala elammeene, oorakala yeettaka, ni oohoona yoonaka. Yaamuttottopela Muluku a oYixrayeli." 
Matthew15:32 Yeesu aawiitthana oohuseraawe eeraka: “Kinimwaamorela ikharari atthu ancipale ala, niwoko aakhala mahuku mararu vamoha ni Miyo ehicaaka. Nkintthuna owoomola ereene ni etala, niwoko eniikomoke mphironi.”" 
Matthew15:33 Yaamwaakhula oohuseraawe: “Woowi nneeraahu niphwanye munikareni nna yooca yookwana waavaha atthu ancipale ala?” 
Matthew15:34 Yeesu aahaakoha: “Murino ipaawu ihayi?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Ithannapiili, ni ihopa vakhaani”" 
Matthew15:35 Yeesu aahaalamulela atthu ancipale weera ekilaathi vathi. 
Matthew15:36 Akuxaka ipaawu ithannapiili ni ihopa, aareeliha, anameiyanyiha ipaawu, anaavaha oohusera. Vano oohusera yaahaakawela atthu ancipale." 
Matthew15:37 Ootheene yaahooca ni yaavona, enattottanyiha oohusera mivithesene, soosareya mipapara mithannamiili." 
Matthew15:38 Yaale yaaciiye yaari asilopwana macira miloko mixexe, ehaalikeleliwaka athiyana, hoye hoye anamwane." 
Matthew15:39 Aalaxeraka atthu ancipale, Yeesu aavolowa munikulani ni aarowa elapo ya oMagada." 
Matthew16:1 Afarasi* ni aSaduki* yaamwaattamela Yeesu ni yaapacera omweerera, emvekelaka weera awoonihere eneneero ya wiirimu." 
Matthew16:2 Vano Yeesu aawaakhula: “Oxekuwa waawaaka, nyuwo muneera: ‘Enookhala ehuhu yooreera, niwoko erimu eri yooxeera’" 
Matthew16:3 ni ohinaxe muneera: ‘Olelo eniikhale epheyo etokotoko niwoko erimu eri yooxeera ni yoosareya mahutte.’ Nyuwo moosuwela otaphulela ineneero sa wiirimu, mene khamusuwenle otaphulela ineneero sa ihuhu!" 
Matthew16:4 Ekhapira yoonanara ni yooraruwa emvekela eneneero yootikhiniheiya, mene kheemvahiwa naari eneneero emoha, ehikhanle eneneero ya Yoonasi!” Vano Yeesu aavenya, aahiyaka ale vaavaale." 
Matthew16:5 Oohusera erowaka okhopela wa ephareiya, yaattiwala okuxa ipaawu." 
Matthew16:6 Yeesu aaweerela: “Mukhale oowehaweha ni mwiipasoope ni eferementu ya afarasi* ni aSaduki*.” 
Matthew16:7 Ni awo yaaheerelana yaaworu yeeraka: “Niwoko khaniruuhale ipaawu.” 
Matthew16:8 Iiwaka wuulumawaya, Yeesu aahaakoha: “Asilopwana a nroromelo vakhaani! Niwoko heeni nyuwo munuulumaanyu mwaha muhikhalannaanyu ipaawu?" 
Matthew16:9 Nlelo khamuniiwexexa? Khamunuupuwelela ipaawu ithanu wa atthu macira miloko mithanu ni mipapara mihayi mwaattottannyaanyu? 
Matthew16:10 Hata ipaawu ithannapiili wa atthu macira miloko mixexe ni mipapara mihayi mwaattottannyaanyu? 
Matthew16:11 Niwoko heeni nyuwo muhiiwexenxaanyu weera khayaahiyono ya epaawu Miyo kihimmaaka! Mwiipasoopetho ni eferementu ya aFarisi* ni aSaduki*.” 
Matthew16:12 Vano yaahiiwexexa weera Owo khaahima wiipasoopa ni eferementu ya ipaawu, mene ni nihusiho na afarasi* ni aSaduki*." 
Matthew16:13 Yeesu aphiyaka elapo ya oSesareya wa oFilipi, aahaakoha oohuseraawe: “Atthu aneera, Mwaana a mutthu ori taani?”" 
Matthew16:14 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Akina aneera Yohaane mpatisa, akina Eliya, ni akinatho Yeremiya, hoye hoye mprofeeti mmoha.”" 
Matthew16:15 Yeesu aahaakoha: “Ankha nyuwo – munkeera Miyo taani?” 
Matthew16:16 Simeyoni Pedru aamwaakhula: “Nyuwo ti Kristu, Mwaana a Muluku Mukumi.”" 
Matthew16:17 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Ooreelihiwa ti nyuwo Simeyoni, mwaana a Yoonasi, niwoko yeeyo khamuleeliwe ni mutthu, mene ni Atithaka ari wiirimu." 
Matthew16:18 Ni Miyo kinooleelani weera nyuwo ti Pedru, ni vanlukuni nna kinooteka ekerexaaka, ni milako sa oHadesi* khasirwa siwera owina ekerexa ela." 
Matthew16:19 Miyo nkoovaheeni ixaavi sa omwene wa wiirimu. Yeeyo muneeraanyu mutthuke vathi, eniitthukiwetho wiirimu, ni yeeyo muneeraanyu mutaphule vathi, eniitaphuliwetho wiirimu.”" 
Matthew16:20 Vano aawooperera oohuseraawe weera ehimuleele naari mutthu mmoha weera Owo ti Kristu. 
Matthew16:21 Okhuma ehuhuweene yeele Yeesu aapacera waathalihera oohuseraawe weera waatthuneya orowa oYerusaleemu ni ohaawa itthu sincipale niwoko na asitokweene, ahooleli a asaserdoti*, ni anamawera a nlamulo*, nitho okhwa ni ovenyerera nihuku nanaararu." 
Matthew16:22 Pedru amwiitthanaka Yeesu okhwipi, aapacera omooperera: “Hoye Apwiya! Iyo khasiweereelani!”" 
Matthew16:23 Yeesu aarukunuwa ni aamweerela Pedru: “Osuseke wa miyo, Satana! Weyo ti nluku ninkikwattula, ni khoonuupuwela itthu sa Muluku, mene sa atthu.”" 
Matthew16:24 Vano Yeesu aaweerela oohuseraawe: “Akhala mukina ontthuna okitthara Miyo, iikhootte muneenaawe, akuxe muttandaawe ni akitthare." 
Matthew16:25 Yoowo ontthuna ovuluxa okumaawe, anaayeleele, mene yoowo ongyeleela okumaawe niwoko na Miyo, anaaphwanye." 
Matthew16:26 Yooreera heeni mutthu ophwanya elapo yootheene ya vathi, ayeleelakatho okumaawe? Hoye hoye anaavahe eheeni mutthu yoowaakakhanyiha ni okumaawe?" 
Matthew16:27 Mwaana a mutthu anaawe moovuwani wa Atithawe ni andyelowaaya, ni anaamutthuvele khula mutthu wa yeeyo owo opankaawe." 
Matthew16:28 Miyo kinoororomelihani weera akina ari va, khaanrowa okhwa ehinaaye omoona Mwaana a mutthu awaaka moomwenenimwawe.”" 
Matthew17:1 Amalihaka mahuku mathannamosa, Yeesu aamukuxa Pedru, Yakobe, ni Yohaane, munneiye Yakobe ni aahaarongha meekhaaya vamwaako woorakama." 
Matthew17:2 Vale Owo aatatuxiwa ohoolowaya. Ekhovaawe yaahaara ntoko nsuwa ni ikuwosawe saathatuwa sootteela ntoko waara. 
Matthew17:3 Wa ehuhuweene yeele yahiixoonihera ohoolowaya Moisesi ni Eliya, emutthekulakano Yeesu." 
Matthew17:4 Vano Pedru aamweerela Yeesu: “Apwiya, ti wooreera hiyo okhala vaava. Mwatthuna, kipake mikottha miraru: mmoha wawinyu, mukina wa Moisesi, ni mukinatho wa Eliya.”" 
Matthew17:5 Alokololaka, nihutte nootteelaxa nahaakhuneela, ni mwa nenno naakhuma nsu nimoha neeraka: “Ola ti Mwanaka oosiveleyaxa. Owo onkisiveliha vancipale. Mmwiiwe Yoowo.”" 
Matthew17:6 Yiiwaka yeeyo, oohusera yaahuuramela vathi ni yaahoova vancipale." 
Matthew17:7 Yeesutho aawaattamela ni aahaatava yaawo aawerelaka: “Muvenye, muhoove.”" 
Matthew17:8 Awo ewehaka osulu, khayaawoonne akina, ahikhanle Yeesu paahi." 
Matthew17:9 Ekhuruwaka vamwaako, Yeesu aahaalamulela eeraka: “Muhaaleele akina yeeyo moonnaanyu mpaka Mwaana a mutthu aneeraawe avenyererihiwe mookhwaani.”" 
Matthew17:10 Oohusera yaamukoha: “Niwoko heeni anamawera a nlamulo* aneeraaya weera ontthuneya aweeke toko Eliya?” 
Matthew17:11 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Ettiitthu, Eliya onimoowa ni anaareherere itthu sootheene." 
Matthew17:12 Mene Miyo kinooleelani weera Eliya aahoowa, ni yaawo khaamusuwenle yoowo, mene yaampakela sootheene yaatthunaaya. Mooteene yoowo Mwaana a mutthu anaahaawe mmatatanimwaya.”" 
Matthew17:13 Vano oohusera yaahiiwexexa weera Owo uulumale sa Yohaane mpatisa. 
Matthew17:14 Ephiyakaru yaaraaya atthu ancipale, mulopwana mmoha aamwaattamela Yeesu, anakokhora vahoolowawe, anamweerela:" 
Matthew17:15 “Apwiya, mummorele ikharari mwanaka. Owo onnakomokasa ni onnahaawa vancipale. Imaara sincipale onnimorela mmooroni, hoye hoye mmaahini." 
Matthew17:16 Miyo kaangwiiha wa oohuseraanyu, mene awo khaawenre omulamiha.”" 
Matthew17:17 Yeesu aahaakhula: “Ekhapira yoohiroromela ni yoonanara! Mpaka yaakhani kineeraaka kikhale ni nyuwo? Mpaka yaakhani kineeraaka koovileleni? Mukiruuhele mmiravo.” 
Matthew17:18 Yeesu aahiiha munepa woonanara. Owo waavenya wa mmiravo, ni okhuma ehuhuweene yeele mmiravo ole aalamihiwa." 
Matthew17:19 Vano oohusera yaamwaattamela Yeesu vakhwipi ni yaamukoha: “Nihiwerenle heeni woomola?” 
Matthew17:20 Owo aawaakhula: “Niwoko na nroromelo vakhaani nyuwo murinaanyu. Miyo kinooleelani vekhaikhai weera, mwakhalano nroromelo ntoko enuku ekhaani, munoowera weerela mwaako ola: ‘Muvenye vaava mpaka vale,’ ni ole onoorowa. Kheewo eneera ekhale yoohiwereya wa nyuwo!" 
Matthew17:21  
Matthew17:22 Awo ethukumanaka oGalileiya, Yeesu aaweerela: “Mwaana a mutthu anaavahereriwe mmatatani mwa atthu." 
Matthew17:23 Awo eniimwiive, ni nihuku nanaararu anaavenyerere.” Ni oohusera yaathanana vancipale." 
Matthew17:24 Yeesu ni oohuseraawe yaaphiyalaaya oKafarnawu, yaamwaattamela Pedru anamaliviha a musoko wa Empa ya Muluku, ni yaamukoha: “Muhusihaanyu khanliva musoko wa Empa ya Muluku?”" 
Matthew17:25 Pedru aahaakhula: “Onooliva.” Avolowakaru Pedru mpaani, Yeesu aari oopacera omuulumano, amukohaka: “Munuupuwela hai Simeyoni? Wa taani mamwene a vathi anaakhelelaaya soovahiwa ni misoko: wa anamwanaaya, hoye hoye wa akina?”" 
Matthew17:26 “Wa akina,” aamwaakhula Pedru. Yeesu aamweerela: “Vano, anamwane ari maneethi." 
Matthew17:27 Weeratho nihaakwattulihe yaawo, murowe ophareiya, mwavonyere nimeso, mwavenxe ehopa muneeraanyu mwapacere owarula, mwahule eyanowaaya ni mmwaphwanyemo nikhoobiri na indarama* ixexe. Mwakuxe nno ni mwakilivele Miyo ni mwiiliveletho nyuwo.”" 
Matthew18:1 Ehuhuweene yeele oohusera yaaphiya wa Yeesu ni yaamukoha: “Mutokweene taani oopwaha sootheene moomweneni wa wiirimu?” 
Matthew18:2 Amwiitthanaka mwaana mmoha, aamwiikaathi variyariwaya" 
Matthew18:3 eeraka: “Miyo kinoororomelihani weera nyuwo muhiiceendye ni muhiitatunxe ntoko anamwane, vekhaikhai khamumvolowa moomweneni wa wiirimu." 
Matthew18:4 Tivawo, yoowo oniiyeviha ntoko mwaana ola, owo ti mutokweene moomweneni wa wiirimu." 
Matthew18:5 Yoowo onimwaakhela mmoha a anamwane ala, onkaakhelatho Miyo." 
Matthew18:6 Mukinatho amutthekiha mmoha a anamwane ala ankiroromela Miyo, waari fataari omutthukelela nxilo muxiko ni ovonyeriwa mphareiyani moowiixa!" 
Matthew18:7 Ii! Enoohaawa elapo ya vathi niwoko na itthu sintthekiha! Khasinsembeiya weera itthu iyo sikhumelele, mene Ii! Ohaawa wa yoowo ontannyera seiyo!" 
Matthew18:8 Matataanyu, hoye hoye nnaawonanyu nootthekihani, muthikile ni muvonyere okerekhere. Fataari ovolowa mookumini oorakaleene, naari oovulaleene, ohikhanle oreeneno matata meeli, hoye hoye inaawo soopiili ovonyeriwa mmooroni woohimala." 
Matthew18:9 Niithonaanyu nootthekihani, muzoole ni muriheleke okerekhere. Fataari ovolowa mookumini ni niitho nimoha paahi, ohikhanle oreeneno maitho oomeeli ovonyeriwa mmooroni woohimala." 
Matthew18:10 Mwiipasoope weera muhimuramuse hata mmoha a yaala asikhaani! Miyo kinooleelani weera andyelowaaya a wiirimu annoona ekhove ya Atithaka ari wiirimu. 
Matthew18:11  
Matthew18:12 Munuupuwela hai? Mukina akhalanneene ikhondoolo ncira, ni emoha ya seiyo enathweelela, khanghiya toko miloko mithannamixexe niithaniixexe omwaako, arowaka waasa yeeyo ethweelenle?" 
Matthew18:13 Miyo kinoororomelihani weera aphwanya, owo onoohakalalela ekhondoolo eyo ohiya iyo miloko mithannamixexe niithaniixexe sahaathweelenle." 
Matthew18:14 Mooteene yoowo, Atithinyu ari wiirimu khaantthuna weera hata mmoha a asikhaani ala ariheiyeene." 
Matthew18:15 Munninyu ootthekelani nyuwo, murowe okhwipi ni yoowo ni mwamoonihere yoottheka. Owo iiwa, nyuwo moongwina munninyu." 
Matthew18:16 Owo aahiwiiwanitho, munkuxe ni nyuwo mmoha mukinatho, hoye hoye eeli. Hiiho, ni iyano sa anamoona eeli, hoye hoye araru, milattu sootheene sikhale soomalihiwa." 
Matthew18:17 Akhootta wiiwelela, mwaleele ekerexa, ni owo aahiiwelelatho ekerexa, akhale ntoko mmalapwaanyu, naari namaliviha a musoko." 
Matthew18:18 Kinooleelani ni ekhaikhai: sootheene muntthukaanyu vathi, sinootthukiwatho wiirimu, ni sootheene munghulaanyu vathi, nsihuliwetho wiirimu." 
Matthew18:19 Ni kinooleelanitho weera, eeli a nyuwo yaakhulela vathi mwaha wa wakhalaru mulattu muneeraanyu muvekele, yeeyo Atithaka ari wiirimu anoowaakhulani." 
Matthew18:20 Vano, weiwo anthukumanaayawo eeli, naari araru mwa Nsinanaka, vawo Miyo kiri variyariwaya.”" 
Matthew18:21 Pedru aamwaattamela Yeesu ni aamukoha: “Apwiya, imaara ihayi kineeraaka kimulevelele munnaka akitthekela? Mpaka imaara ithannapiili?”" 
Matthew18:22 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Miyo kinooleelani weera khasihiyono imaara ithannapiili, mene mpaka imaara soothesene." 
Matthew18:23 Tivawo omwene wa wiirimu ori ntoko mwene aatthunne waalikela ikoongori sa arumeiyaawe. 
Matthew18:24 Aapacenraawe waalikela, aaruuheliwa mmoha vamaithoniwawe aakoongonre italento* macira macireene muloko." 
Matthew18:25 Hapo Okhala khaawenre oliva, apwiya yaamulamulela weera owo, amwaarawe, anamwanaawe ni sootheene yaarinaaya sithumihiwe weera elive ekoongoraawe." 
Matthew18:26 Murumeiyi ole aahuuramela ohoolowaya ni aahaadyoonttelela eeraka: “Mukivilele. Miyo kinimoolivani sootheene.” 
Matthew18:27 Apwiya a murumeiyi ole yaammorela ikharari, aamaliha ekoongori ni aamuhiya weera arowe." 
Matthew18:28 Murumeiyi ole avenyaka, aamphwanya murumeiyi mukhwaawe mmoha aamukoongorenle idinaariyu* ncira. Aamvara ni aapacera omunyooka eeraka: “Mukilive yeele mukikoongorenlaanyu!”" 
Matthew18:29 Vano murumeiyi mukhwaawe ole aamukokhorela ni aamudyoonttelela eeraka: “Mukivilele! Miyo kinimoolivani sootheene.” 
Matthew18:30 Mene owo khaatthuna. Aarowa waalamula atthu akina weera engwalele mukaliposo mpaka aneeraawe alive ekoongori. 
Matthew18:31 Vano arumeiyi asikhwaawe akina, yoonnaaya yeele yeereiye, yaathanana vancipale ni yaarowa waaleela apwiyaawe sootheene seiye seereiye."
