Matthew18:32 Apwiya yaamwiitthana murumeiyi ole ni yaamweerela: “Murumeiyi oonanara murima! Koomaliha ikoongorisawo sootheene niwoko waakidyoonttelela. 
Matthew18:33 Khawaatthuneya weera weyo ommorele ikharari murumeiyi mukhwaawo ntoko miyo kaaweerihalaaka weyo? 
Matthew18:34 Enyoonyiweene, apwiyaawe yaamvaherera anamahooxa mpaka eeraawe alive sootheene aakoongonraawe." 
Matthew18:35 Hiihotho animoopakani Atithaka ari wiirimu nyuwo ootheene mwaahimulevelela munninyu ni murima wootheene.” 
Matthew19:1 Amalihaka ohima itthu seiye, Yeesu aavenya oGalileiya ni aarowa elapo ya oYudeiya, okhopela wa oYordanu." 
Matthew19:2 Atthu ancipale yaamutthara, ni Owo aahaalamiha weiwe." 
Matthew19:3 aFarisi* akina yaamwaattamela Yoowo weera emweerere. Yaamukoha: “Enootthunihereiya wa mutthu omuhiya mwaarawe mwaha wa wakhalaru mulattu?” 
Matthew19:4 Owo aawaakhula: “Nyuwo khamusomme weera ompacereroni, Mpattuxa aampaka mulopwana ni muthiyana?" 
Matthew19:5 Owo eenre: ‘Tivawo, mulopwana anaahiye atithawe ni amayawe, ni anaakhale vamoha ni mwaarawe, ni ooweeli eniikhale erutthu emoha.’" 
Matthew19:6 Hiiho, khaakhanle eeli, mene vekhaikhai erutthu emoha paahi. Tivawo, yaawo Muluku aakhalinghaawe vamoha, mutthu ahaamwalanyihe!”" 
Matthew19:7 Awo yaamukoha: “Vano, niwoko heeni Moisesi aalamunlaawe weera mulopwana amvaheke ekaratta ya omwalana wa muthiyana ni amoomoleke?”" 
Matthew19:8 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Moisesi aahootthuniherani omwalana ni axaarinyu niwoko na mirimasanyu soowuuma. Khawaakhanletho hiiho okhuma ompacereroni. 
Matthew19:9 Miyo kinooleelani weera khula mulopwana ommwalana ni mwaariye, ohikhanle mwaha wa oraruwa, anamuthela muthiyana mukina, onooraruwano.”" 
Matthew19:10 Oohusera yaamweerela: “Waari hiiho nyaha sa mulopwana ni mwaariye, fataari ohithela.”" 
Matthew19:11 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Khaahiyono ootheene angwera waakhela masu ala, mene yaawo paahi avahiwe yeeyo." 
Matthew19:12 Akina ari inoko* niwoko ayariwe hiiho. Akina apakiwe hiiho ni atthu, akinatho yiipakiye yeeyo niwoko na omwene wa wiirimu. Yoowo ongwera waakhela yeeyo, aakhele.”" 
Matthew19:13 Vahoolowaya yaangwiihera anamwane Yeesu weera awiiyaathere matataawe ni aavekelele yaawo. Oohuseratho yahaahiiha ni masu. 
Matthew19:14 Yeesu aaweerela: “Mwaahiye anamwane awo erwe wa Miyo ni muhiwooceelihe, niwoko omwene wa wiirimu ti wawaya yaawo anlikana ntoko ala.”" 
Matthew19:15 Aatavakaru, aavenya vaavaale." 
Matthew19:16 Vano mukina aamwaattamela Yeesu ni aamukoha: “Muhusiha, kipake eheeni yooreera weera kiphwanye okumi woohimala?”" 
Matthew19:17 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Heeni munkikohaanyu ya yooreera? Ori mmoha paahi ooreera. Mwatthuna ovolowa mookumini woohimala, mwiiwelele malamulo.”" 
Matthew19:18 “Taavi?” aamukoha. Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Muhiive, muhiraruwe, muhiiye, muhoothe," 
Matthew19:19 mwaattittimihe atithinyu ni amayinyu,” ni “munsivele mukhwiinyu ntoko muniisivelaanyu.”" 
Matthew19:20 Mmiravo aamweerela: “Ootheene awo miyo kinniiwelela. Enkihaleelatho eheeni?” 
Matthew19:21 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Mwatthuna okhala ookwanela, murowe, mwathumihe sooreelasanyu ni mwaavahe oohaawa, ni mmwikhaleno etthu yooreeraxa wiirimu. Vahoolowaya, ngwe ni mukitthare.”" 
Matthew19:22 Iiwalaawe yeeyo, mmiravo ole aasusa ahihakalalaka, niwoko aakhalano itthu sincipale sooreeraxa." 
Matthew19:23 Vano Yeesu aaweerela oohusera: “Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: ti woorika namapuha ovolowa moomweneni wa wiirimu. 
Matthew19:24 Ni kinooleelanitho: ti wookhweiya ekamelu* ovolowa vamwiitheni wa singano, ohikhanle namapuha ovolowa moomweneni wa wiirimu.”" 
Matthew19:25 Woowiiwa yeeyo, oohusera yaatikhinaxa ni yaamukoha: “Wa mwaheene yoola, taani aneera awere ovuluxiwa?”" 
Matthew19:26 Yeesu aahaaweha yaawo ni aawaakhula: “Wa mutthu khoongwereya, mene wa Muluku itthu sootheene sinoowereya.”" 
Matthew19:27 Pedru aamwaakhula: “Hiyo noohiya sootheene weera nootthareeni. Nnaakhele eheeni?” 
Matthew19:28 Yeesu aaweerela: Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: mweehuhuni enyowani engwa, Mwaana a mutthu akilaathiyeene vahiceni ya ovuwa, nyuwo mukitthanre mmwikilaathi vahiceni muloko ni piili weera muthorihe ipuumba* muloko ni piili sa oYixrayeli." 
Matthew19:29 Ni ootheene ahiyale impasaya, axunnaya, axirokoraya, asitithaya, asimayaya, anamwanaaya, hoye hoye imattasaya niwoko na Nsinanaka, eniyaakhele seiyo imaara ncira, ni eniiphwanyetho okumi woohimala." 
Matthew19:30 Wa soothesene, ancipale oopacera eniikhale oomalihera ni ancipale oomalihera, eniikhale oopacera.”" 
Matthew20:1 Vano, omwene wa wiirimu ori ntoko mwaneene aavennye ohinaxe arowaka owaasa anamiteko wa emattaawe ya iwuuva*." 
Matthew20:2 Owo aahiiwanana waaliva edinaariyu* emoha vanihukuni, ni aahaalamula wa emattaawe ya iwuuva*." 
Matthew20:3 Siviraka iwoora tthaaru, owo aavenya veeli ni aawoona omerekadu akina yahaavara muteko." 
Matthew20:4 Aaweerela: ‘Murowetho, mwavare muteko mmattamwaka ya iwuuva*, ni miyo kinimoolivani yeeyo eri yootthuneya.’" 
Matthew20:5 Ni awo yaarowa. Aavenyatho nsuwa vamuru, nitho oxekuwa apakaka mooteene yoowo." 
Matthew20:6 Avenyaka iwoora muloko niithannapiili, aahaaphwanya akinatho yahaavanre muteko, ni aahaakoha: ‘Niwoko heeni nyuwo muhimvaraanyu muteko nsuwa nootheene?’" 
Matthew20:7 Awo yaamwaakhula: ‘Niwoko khaawo onilempe muteko.’ Vano, aaweerela: ‘Muroweke nyuwotho mmattamwaka ya iwuuva*.’" 
Matthew20:8 Wiilalaaya, mwaneene a ematta ya iwuuva* aamweerela namaawehaweha anamiteko: ‘Ngwiitthane anamiteko, ni mwaalive mwaapaceraka oomalihera olepiwa mpaka ophiyera oopacera.’" 
Matthew20:9 Yaahoowa anamiteko ale yaalempwe muteko iwoora muloko niithannapiili sooxekuwa, ni aahaakhela mutthu ti mutthu edinaariyu* emoha." 
Matthew20:10 Yaaphiyalaaya ale yaapacenre olempwa, yuupuwela weera animwaandyeereriwa musurukhu. Mene khula mutthu a yaale aahaakhelatho edinaariyu* emoha." 
Matthew20:11 Yaakhelakaru, yaapacera omuttaandawula mwaneene a ematta ya iwuuva*" 
Matthew20:12 emweerelaka: ‘Alopwana awo oomalihera olempwa avanre muteko ewoora emoha paahi, ni apwiya munaalikanxa ni hiyo nivilenle olemela wa muteko ni oviha wa nihuku.’" 
Matthew20:13 Vano owo aamwaakhula mmoha a yaawo eeraka: ‘Nthamwene, miyo nkinoopakela weyo yeeyo eri yoonanara. Weyo khaniiwananne ovara muteko wa edinaariyu* emoha?" 
Matthew20:14 Waakhele yeeyo eri yawawo ni oroweke. Miyo kintthuna waavaha yaawo oomalihera olempwa ntoko yeeyo miyo koovanghaaka. 
Matthew20:15 Nkiphwanenle soovarela yeeyo kintthunaaka ni musurukhwaaka? Weyo nanrima niwoko nkinlipa mmatatanimwaka ni musurukhwaaka?’ 
Matthew20:16 Hiiho, oomalihera eniikhale oopacera, ni oopacera eniikhale oomalihera.”" 
Matthew20:17 Arowaka oYerusaleemu, Yeesu aawiitthana vakhwipi oohusera muloko neeli ni aaweerela:" 
Matthew20:18 “Ninrowa oYerusaleemu, ni Mwaana a mutthu anaavahereriwe wa ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni anamawera a nlamulo*. Awo eniimuthorihele okhwa" 
Matthew20:19 ni eniimveleele wa amalapo weera emuramuse, engwaxule ni emukhomele vamuttandani. Vanihukuni nanaararu Owo anaavenyererihiwe!”" 
Matthew20:20 Vano yaamwaattamela Yeesu amayaya anamwane a Zebedeyo, ehooliwaka ni anamwanaaya, ni yaahuurama vahoolowawe weera emvekele etthu." 
Matthew20:21 Yeesu aamukoha: “Muntthuna eheeni nyuwo?” Awo yaamweerela: “Kinoovekelani weera, mwaaphiyaka moomwenenimwanyu, anamwanaaka ala eeli yakilaathi mmoha moonowaanyu mulopwana ni mukina moonowaanyu muthiyana.”" 
Matthew20:22 Yeesu aaweerela: “Nyuwo khamusuwenle etthu mumvekelaanyu. Nyuwo munoowera owura ekoomixi eyo Miyo kineeraaka kiwure?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Ninoowera.” 
Matthew20:23 Yeesu aaweerela: “Vekhaikhai nyuwo mmwiwure ekoomixaaka, okilaathitho moonowaaka mulopwana, naari muthiyana khoohiyono otthuniherawaka. Mapuroweene yaawo ari a yaawo Atithaka yaarehererenlaaya.”" 
Matthew20:24 Yiiwalaaya yeeyo muloko akina, yaahaanyoonyeriwa axunna eeli ale." 
Matthew20:25 Yeesu aawiitthana ni aaweerela: “Moosuwela weera anamalamula a ilapo animwaalamula, ni asitokweenaaya animwaalamula ni ikuru atthu ale a ilapo." 
Matthew20:26 Ohikhale hiihaawo variyariwanyu. Ohiyanawaya, yoole ontthuna okhala mutokweene variyariwanyu, akhaleke murumeiyaanyu," 
Matthew20:27 ni yoole ontthuna okhala oopacera, akhaleke epotthaanyu." 
Matthew20:28 Hiihotho Mwaana a mutthu khaaweenle orumeeliwa, mene weera arumeele, ni aveleele okumaawe ntoko yoowoopola ancipale." 
Matthew20:29 Woovenyani oYeriko, atthu ancipale yaamutthara Yeesu." 
Matthew20:30 Vano, atthu eeli oohoona yaakilaathi mukerekhere musewe. Yiiwalaaya weera Yeesu eera aviraka, yaapacera okhuwela, yeeraka: “Apwiya, Mwaana a Davide, munimorele ikharari hiyo!”" 
Matthew20:31 Muloko wa atthu waaheerera waahiiha, mene awo yannapwaherera okhuwela: “Apwiya, Mwaana a Davide, munimorele ikharari hiyo!”" 
Matthew20:32 Yeesu, eemelaka, aawiitthana ni aahaakoha: “Eheeni muntthunaanyu woopakani Miyo?”" 
Matthew20:33 Yaamwaakhula: “Apwiya, hiyo nintthuna weera ehuleiye maithwaahu.”" 
Matthew20:34 Yeesu aahaamorela ikharari ni aatava maithwaaya. Woowaakuveya yaawera woona ni yaamutthara. 
Matthew21:1 Ekhuveelaka oYerusaleemu ni ephiyaka oBetefage, omwaakoni Sooliveira, Yeesu aahaarumiha oohusera eeli" 
Matthew21:2 aweerelaka: “Murowe omuttettheni ori ohoolowanyu, ni munoomphwanya buuru muthiyana atthukiweene ni buuru muxaana mukerekheremwawe; mwaataphule ni mukiwiihere." 
Matthew21:3 Mutthu ookohani, mwamuleele weera Apwiya anaatthuna ni eniyaahokoloxe.”" 
Matthew21:4 Seiyo seereiye weera sikwaniheriwe seiyo saahimmwale ni mprofeeti: 
Matthew21:5 “Munleele mwaana a Siyoni: Mmoone, Mwenaanyu onimoowa wa nyuwo, iiyevihaka ni angwenleene buuru muthiyana, buuru muxaana, mwaana a buuru.”" 
Matthew21:6 Oohusera yaarowa ni yaapaka yeeyo Yeesu aalamulenlaawe. 
Matthew21:7 Yaangwiiha buuru muthiyana ni buuru muxaana, yaahiikaathi mikaandyosaya vasulu wa buuru, ni Yeesu aahaakilaathela yaawo." 
Matthew21:8 Atthu ancipale yaahaatala mikaandyosaya mphironi. Akina yaathikila iphandi sa nyiri ni yaamwaramwaxa mphironi. 
Matthew21:9 Atthu yaari ohoolowawe ni ottuliwawe yaahiipa ni ohakalalaxa yeeraka: “Hosana* wa Mwaana a Davide! Ooreelihiwa ti Yoowo ongwa mwa Nsina na Apwiya! Hosana* musulusulu!” 
Matthew21:10 Yeesu avolowaka oYerusaleemu, atthu ootheene a esidade ele yaasesereiya ni yaakohana: “Ola taani?”" 
Matthew21:11 Atthu ancipale yaavolongwe yaahaakhula: “Ola ti Yeesu, mprofeeti a oNasarete, elapo ya oGalileiya.”" 
Matthew21:12 Yeesu aavolowa Empa ya Muluku, ni aawoomola ootheene yaale yaathumiha ni yaathuma. Aapittula meesa a anamaceendya musurukhu ni ihice sa anamathumiha a ikhunda," 
Matthew21:13 ni aaweerela: “Yoolempwa: ‘Empaaka eniyiitthaniwe empa ya nivekelo,’ mene nyuwo mumpaka nikhuku na anamwiiya!”" 
Matthew21:14 Atthu oohoona ni atthu oorakala yaamwaattamela Yoowo Mpaani mwa Muluku, ni Owo aahaalamiha." 
Matthew21:15 Yoonakatho ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni anamawera a nlamulo* itthu sootikhiniheiya Yeesu aapankaawe, ni anamwane ekhuwelaka Mpaani mwa Muluku: “Hosana* wa Mwaana a Davide,” yaanyoonyiwa" 
Matthew21:16 ni yaamukoha: “Nyuwo khamuniiwa anamwane anghimaaya?” Yeesu aawaakhula: “Aani, khamunatoko osoma: ‘Wa iyano sa ooyariwa vaanaano ni anamwane oottuli mohiirehererela ottottopela?”’" 
Matthew21:17 Vano, aahiyaka, aavenya wa esidade arowaka oBetaniya, aavirihalaawe ohiyu wootheene." 
Matthew21:18 Oyaaka ni oxa, ahokolowaka osidade, Yeesu aavoliwa etala." 
Matthew21:19 Oonaka mwiri wa efiigu mukerekhere ephiro, aahaattamela, mene khaaphwannye etthu, ehikhanle makukhu. Vano aaheerela: “Ohiime mahuku ootheene!” Woowaakuveya mwiri ole waahuuma." 
Matthew21:20 Yoonaka yeeyo, oohusera yaatikhina ni yaakohana: “Heeni mwiri wa efiigu wuumalaaya moota woowaakuveya ola?”" 
Matthew21:21 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Kinoororomelihani weera mwakhalano nroromelo ni mwaahihovela, nyuwo munoowera opaka, ohikhanle paahi yeeyo opakiwaaya mwiri ola wa efiigu, menetho munoowera weerela mwaako ola: ‘Ovenye ni wamorele mphareiyani,’ ni hiiho eniipakeiye." 
Matthew21:22 Sootheene muneeraanyu muvekele ni mavekelo, mwaroromela, nyuwo mmwaakhele." 
Matthew21:23 Yeesu aavolowa Empa ya Muluku ni axuttihaka, yaamwaattamela ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni asitokweene a muloko wa atthu ni yaamukoha: “Ni ikuru heeni mumpakaanyu itthu iya? Ni taani yoovangheni ikurusene seiya?”" 
Matthew21:24 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Miyo kinimookohanitho; mwakaakhula, kinimooleelani ni ikuru heeni kimpakelaaka itthu iya." 
Matthew21:25 Opatiso wa Yohaane, waari wa wiirimu, hoye hoye wa atthu?” Awo yaakohana yaaworu: “Neera ‘wa wiirimu,’ ola onoonikoha: ‘Vano, niwoko heeni nyuwo mwahaamuroromenlaanyu?’" 
Matthew21:26 Menetho neera ‘wa atthu’ – ninoova muloko wa atthu, niwoko ootheene aneera weera Yohaane ori mprofeeti.”" 
Matthew21:27 Awo yaamwaakhula Yeesu: “Hiyo khanisuwenle.” Vano Owo aaweerela: “Hata Miyo nkinooleelani ni ikuru heeni kimpakelaaka itthu iya. 
Matthew21:28 Munuupuwela hai? Aakhala mulopwana mmoha aarino anamwane eeli. Aphiyaka oopacera, aamweerela: ‘Mwanaka, oroweke wavareke muteko olelo mmattamwaka mwa iwuuva*.’" 
Matthew21:29 Ni owo aamwaakhula: ‘Nkintthuna.’ Vahoolotho vakhaani aaceendya soowuupuwelasawe ni aarowa. 
Matthew21:30 Atiithi yaaphiya wa mwaana mukina ni yaamweerela mooteene yoowo. Owo aawaakhula: ‘Aani, Apwiya,’ mene khaarongwe." 
Matthew21:31 Wa eeli ale, taani aapanke otthuna wa atithaya?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Oopacera.” Yeesu aaweerela: “Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: anamaliviha a musoko ni mapuuta anoovolowa moomweneni wa Muluku muhinaaye nyuwo," 
Matthew21:32 niwoko Yohaane aarweenle owooniherani ephiro ya waakhuleliwa ni Muluku, mene khamunroromenle, vano anamaliviha a musokotho ni mapuuta aamuroromela. Nyuwo, hata moonakaru seiyo, khamurukunxale murima, hata khamunroromenle yoowo." 
Matthew21:33 Mwiiwe yoolikanyiha ekina. Aakhala mwaneene aaphatteiye ematta ya iwuuva*. Aapaka mukuso arukureerihaka ematta ele. Aapakatho nipuro noovotta iwuuva* ni aateka nipuro na anamalipelela. Vano aawooliha ematta ele anamalima akina ni aarowa mukwahaawe. 
Matthew21:34 Yaattamelaka ehuhu ya ohepha, aahaarumihela arumeiyaawe anamalima weera yaakhele soowiimasaya." 
Matthew21:35 Anamalimatho yaahaavara arumeiyaawe: Mmoha yaammana, mukina yaamwiiva ni anaararu yaamvonya maluku." 
Matthew21:36 Vanonto aahaarumihela arumeiyi akina oopwaha oopacera, ni anamalima yaahaapakela mooteene yoowo." 
Matthew21:37 Woomalihera aamurumiha mwanawe eeraka: “Awo eniimuttittimihe mwanaka.” 
Matthew21:38 Emoonakarutho, yaaheerelana: ‘Ola ti namahiyeriwa a muneene. Nrowe, nimwiive weera naakhele ematta eeraawe aakhele.’" 
Matthew21:39 Hiiho, awo yaamvara, enamvonyera vaate wa ematta ya iwuuva*, enamwiiva." 
Matthew21:40 Aawaaka mwaneene a ematta ya iwuuva* ele, anaapakele eheeni anamalima ale?”" 
Matthew21:41 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Owo anaawiive moota woowoopiha atthu ootakhala ale, ni anaawoolihe ematta ya iwuuva* anamalima akina eneera emvahe mpattaawe wa soowiima ehuhu ya ohepha.”" 
Matthew21:42 Yeesu aaweerela: “Khamunasome Yoolempwa*: ‘Nluku anamateka yaakhoonttaaya, naathatuwa nluku noottittimiheyaxa. Apwiya yaapanke yeeyo ni ti yootikhinihaxa mmaithonimwahu?’" 
Matthew21:43 Tivawo, Miyo kinooleelani weera omwene wa wiirimu onuuvenxiwe wa nyuwo ni onuuvahiwe muloko omvaha soowiima sa omwene." 
Matthew21:44 Yoowo anuuwele nluku nna, anaanyakatteiye, ni yoowo aneera amoreliwe ni nna anaattikittheiye ntoko ntthupi.”" 
Matthew21:45 Yiiwalaaya ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni aFarisi* soolikanyiha sa Yeesu, yaasuwela weera Owo uulumale mwaha wa yaawo." 
Matthew21:46 Vano yaasaasa moota woomvara, mene yaawoova atthu ancipale, niwoko yaamweerela weera Yeesu ori mprofeeti." 
Matthew22:1 Yeesu aawuulumelatho ni soolikanyiha eeraka: 
Matthew22:2 “Omwene wa wiirimu ori ntoko mwene omurehererenle mwanawe efesta ya othelana. 
Matthew22:3 Aahaarumihela arumeiyaawe atthu yaalattuliwe ofestani, eweerelaka weera eweeke, mene awo khayaatthunne orwa." 
Matthew22:4 Aahaarumihatho arumeiyi akina aweerelaka: ‘Mwaaleele oolattuliwa weera miyo kooreherera efesta ya othelana. Imombesaka ni ikhondoolosaka sooneneva soohiiviwa, ni sootheene soorehereriwa.’" 
Matthew22:5 Vano awo khayaapwantthetho ni yaavenya: mmoha omattawawe, mukina othumihawawe." 
Matthew22:6 Yaahanle, yaavaraka arumeiyi, yaahaahasula ni yaawiiva." 
Matthew22:7 Mwene aanyoonyiwa ni aahaarumiha anakhottwaawe, ni awo yaawiiva anamwiiva ale ni yaahisa esidadaaya." 
Matthew22:8 Vano aaweerela arumeiyaawe: ‘Efesta ya othelana yoolikana, mene oolattuliwa khayaaphwanenle." 
Matthew22:9 Murowe mmalakani ni mwaalattule ootheene muneeraanyu mwaaphwanye.’ 
Matthew22:10 Arumeiyi yaarowa mmiseweni ni yaahaathukumanya ootheene yaawenraaya waaphwanya – ooreera ni oonanara murima. Nipuro na efesta ya othelana naasareya ni oolattuliwa. 
Matthew22:11 Avolowaka mwene weera awoone oolattuliwa, aamoona mutthu ahaawanre yoowara ya othelana" 
Matthew22:12 ni aamukoha: ‘Nthamwene, heeni muvolongwaanyu muumu muhiwaraka yoowara ya othelana?’ Mulopwana aamaalatho." 
Matthew22:13 Vano mwene aaweerela arumeiyi: ‘Muntthuke matata ni inaawo, ni mumvonyere vaate, mpiphini. Weiwo onuukhale wiinla ni okhuuriha maino.’" 
Matthew22:14 Vano, ancipale anniitthaniwa, mene vakhaani ti oothanliwa.”" 
Matthew22:15 aFarisi* yaavenya ni yaapacera ovaanela moota heeni yeeraaya emvare ni maswaawe. 
Matthew22:16 Yaamurumihela oohuseraaya vamoha ni atthu a Herodi yaamweerenle: “Muhusiha, noosuwela weera Nyuwo muri oororomeleya nitho weera munghusiha ephiro ya Muluku moota wa ekhaikhai. Khamumviriyeliwa ni akina, hata khamunimuthanla mutthu." 
Matthew22:17 Munileeletho, munuupuwela hai: ontthuneya omuliva musoko Seesari, hoye hoye naari?”" 
Matthew22:18 Yeesutho, asuwelaka soowuupuwelasaya soonanara, aahaakoha: “Anamwiixeera! Heeni nyuwo munkeereraanyu?" 
Matthew22:19 Mukoonihere nikhoobiri na musoko.” Awo yaamoonihera edinaariyu* emoha," 
Matthew22:20 ni Owo aahaakoha: “Ecaambulo ela ni soolempwa iya ti sawani”? 
Matthew22:21 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Sa Seesari.” Owo aaweerela: “Vano, mumvahe Seesari yeeyo eri yawawe, ni wa Muluku eri yawawe.”" 
Matthew22:22 Yiiwaka yeeyo, awo yaatikhina ni emuhiyaka, yaapwaha." 
Matthew22:23 Nihuku nenenenne aSaduki*, anxuttiha weera khoowowo ovenyerera, yaamwaattamela Yoowo ni yookoha ela:" 
Matthew22:24 “Muhusiha, Moisesi aaheera weera mulopwana akhwa woohimuhiya mwaana mulopwana, munneiye amutheleke naamukhweli, anaamuhiyere ekhapira." 
Matthew22:25 Variyari wa hiyo yaakhala axunna athanneeli. Oopacera aathela ni aahookhwa. Hapo khaakhalanne mwaana mulopwana, anamuhiyera mwaarawe munneiye." 
Matthew22:26 Etthweene yeeyo yaaheereiya ni anaaveeli, anaararu mpaka anaathanneeli." 
Matthew22:27 Woomalihera, muthiyana aahookhwa." 
Matthew22:28 Vanonto, moovenyererani, yeenre ootheene yamuthelaka, taani a athanneeli anaakhale iyawe?”" 
Matthew22:29 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Nyuwo mootapanya vancipale, niwoko khamusuwenle Yoolempwa*, hata ikuru sa Muluku." 
Matthew22:30 Moovenyererani, atthu khaanthela, hata khoonthelaniwa, mene eniikhale ntoko andyelo wiirimu." 
Matthew22:31 Mwaha wa ovenyerera wa akhwiiye, khamusomme yeeyo Muluku aaweerenlaaweni:" 
Matthew22:32 ‘Miyo kiri Muluku a Abrahaamu, Isaaki ni Yakobe’? Owo khahiyono Muluku a akhwiiye, mene a akumi!”" 
Matthew22:33 Yiiwaka yeeyo, atthu ancipale yaatikhina ni nihusihonawe." 
Matthew22:34 Yiiwaka weera yeeriwe Yeesu aahaahiya aSaduki* ehaakhunle, aFarisi* yaathukumana." 
Matthew22:35 Mmoha a yaawo, namawera a nlamulo*, aamweerera Yeesu ni yookoha ela:" 
Matthew22:36 “Muhusiha, malamulo heeni oopwaha ootheene?”" 
Matthew22:37 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “‘Mwaasivele Apwiya Mulukwaanyu ni murimaanyu wootheene, ni okumaanyu wootheene, ni wuupuwelawanyu wootheene.’" 
Matthew22:38 Nna ti noopacera ni noottittimiheyaxa. 
Matthew22:39 Ni nanaaveeli nri noolikana ni nenna: ‘Munsivele mukhwiinyu ntoko muniisivelaanyu muneenaanyu.’ 
Matthew22:40 Malamulo ootheene ni maprofeeti ootheene akumanyihiwe ni malamulo meeli ala.” 
Matthew22:41 Ethukumanneene hiihaawo aFarisi*, Yeesu aahaakoha:" 
Matthew22:42 “Munuupuwela hai mwaha wa Kristu? Mwaana awani”? Awo yaamwaakhula: “Mwaana a Davide.” 
Matthew22:43 Vano Owo aaweerela: “Heeni Davide, uulumaka mMunepani, ommwiitthanaawe: ‘Apwiya’? Owo oneera:" 
Matthew22:44 ‘Apwiya yeenre wa Apwiyaaka: Mukilaathi moonowaaka mulopwana mpaka Miyo kineeraaka kiwiikaathi amwiitanaanyu vathi wa inaawosanyu.’ 
Matthew22:45 Davide amwiitthana ‘Apwiya,’ ongwereya hai Owo okhala mwanawe?”" 
Matthew22:46 Khaawo yaawenre omwaakhula. Ni okhuma nihuku nenne mpaka ohoolo, khaawo eerenre omukoha yookoha ekina." 
Matthew23:1 Vano Yeesu aaweerela atthu ancipale ni oohuseraawe: 
Matthew23:2 “Anamawera a nlamulo* ni aFarisi* anookilaathi vahiceni ya Moisesi. 
Matthew23:3 Ngwiiwelele ni mupake sootheene awo angweerelaayani. Muhipaketho yeeyo awo ampakaaya, niwoko khaampaka yeeyo anlaleiyaaya." 
Matthew23:4 Awo antthuka mirindi soolemela, anaathateliha atthu, mene awo asineenaaya khaantthuna ovarela muteko hata ekathaaya emoha weera esusihe mirindi iyo." 
Matthew23:5 Sootheene ampakaaya, ampakela weera yooniwe ni atthu. Awo ampaka sitokotoko ikaxoottisaya sa mipatta sa Yoolempwa* vayuucini*, ni miramba sa soowarasaya soorakama." 
Matthew23:6 Awo antthuna nipuro noottittimiheya na ofestani, ni ihice soottittimiheyaxa muSinagogani*." 
Matthew23:7 Antthunatho wuulumihiwa omerekadu ni wiitthaniwa ‘Muhusiha.’ 
Matthew23:8 Nyuwotho muhiitthaniweke muhusiha, niwoko mmoha paahi ori Muhusihaanyu, ni ootheene nyuwo muri axunna." 
Matthew23:9 Muhimwiitthane mukina vathi atiithi, niwoko murino Atiithi amoharu paahi – Awo ari wiirimu." 
Matthew23:10 Hata vakhaani nyuwo muhiitthaniwe muhusiha, niwoko murino Muhusiha mmoha: Kristu." 
Matthew23:11 Mutokweenaanyu akhaleke murumeiyaanyu. 
Matthew23:12 Vano, khula mutthu oniivuwiha, anaakhale ooyevihiwa, ni khula mutthu oniiyeviha, anaakhale oovuwihiwa." 
Matthew23:13 Ii! Munoohaawa nyuwo, anamawera a nlamulo*, aFarisi*, anamwiixeera! Nyuwo mungwala nsele na omwene wa wiirimu ohoolo wa atthu. Nyuwo muneenaanyu khamumvolowa, hata khamunaahiya evolowaka yaawo antthuna." 
Matthew23:14  
Matthew23:15 Ii! Munoohaawa nyuwo, anamawera a nlamulo*, aFarisi*, anamwiixeera! Niwoko munimweetta mapuro mancipale weera mumviriyele mutthu okhala oohuseraanyu, ni mwawera, munoomutatuxa mwaana a mooro ootepaxa woopwahani nyuwo." 
Matthew23:16 Ii! Munoohaawa nyuwo, oohoona anamweettiha oohoona. Vano, nyuwo muneera: ‘Mukina alipela ni Empa ya Muluku, eyo kheentaphulela etthu, mene mukina alipela ni eyuuma yooreeraxa ya Empa ya Muluku, owo onoonyesereriwa ni olipelawawe.’" 
Matthew23:17 Atthu oohoona ni alolo! Ti heeni yootthuneyaxa? Eyuuma yooreeraxa, hoye hoye Empa ya Muluku entteeliha eyuuma eyo?" 
Matthew23:18 Nyuwo muneeratho: ‘Mukina alipela ni altaari*, eyo kheentaphulela etthu, mene mukina alipela ni yoovaha eri vasulu wa nenno, owo onoonyesereriwa ni olipelawawe.’" 
Matthew23:19 Atthu oohoona! Ti heeni yootthuneyaxa? Yoovaha, hoye hoye altaari* antteeliha yoovaha eyo?" 
Matthew23:20 Tivawo, yoole onlipela ni altaari*, onlipela ni nenno nitho ni sootheene siri vasuluwaya," 
Matthew23:21 ni yoole onlipela ni Empa ya Muluku, onlipela ni yeeyo nitho ni Yoowo onkhala mwemmo." 
Matthew23:22 Yoole onlipela ni wiirimu, onlipela ni ehice ya Muluku nitho ni Yoowo onkilaathelawo." 
Matthew23:23 Ii! Munoohaawa nyuwo, anamawera a nlamulo*, aFarisi*, anamwiixeera! Nyuwo mumvaha mpatta wanaamuloko wa sooreerela sooreeraxa, endro*, ni kominyu*, mene munnattiwala iyo sinnyesereriwa sa nlamulo: ekhaikhai, ikharari, ni ororomeleya. Ontthuneya nyuwo opaka itthusene seiya muhihiyakatho soopacera." 
Matthew23:24 Anamweettiha oohoona! Nyuwo munseefa ececema, mene mummira ekamelu*." 
Matthew23:25 Ii! Munoohaawa nyuwo, anamawera a nlamulo*, aFarisi*, anamwiixeera! Nyuwo munrapiha omokoni wa ekoomixi ni wa esasaani, mene mpuwa yoosareya ni ohaawelaxa ni milili." 
Matthew23:26 aFarisi* oohoona! Murapihe toko mpuwa mwa ekoomixi ni esasaani, weera omokoni orapiheiyetho." 
Matthew23:27 Ii! Munoohaawa nyuwo, anamawera a nlamulo*, aFarisi*, anamwiixeera! Munlikana ntoko mahiye ootteelihiwa: anreera omokoni, mene mpuwamwaya ansareya makhuva ni itthu soohitteela." 
Matthew23:28 Nyuwotho muri hiiho. Mwaatthuni munlikana ntoko oororomeleya, mmirimanimwanyutho woosareya wiixeera ni sootakhala." 
Matthew23:29 Ii! Munoohaawa nyuwo, anamawera a nlamulo*, aFarisi*, anamwiixeera! Nyuwo munaatekela mahiye maprofeeti ni munreeriha mahiye a atthu oororomeleya" 
Matthew23:30 mweeraka: ‘Naakhanle ehuhu ya makholowaahu, saano nihiwiivale maprofeeti vamoha ni yaawo.’" 
Matthew23:31 Hiiho nyuwo muniikhalela onamoona weera muri ekhapira ya yaale yaawiivale maprofeeti. 
Matthew23:32 Vano, mukwanihere muringo wa soottheka sa makholowaanyu!" 
Matthew23:33 Inowa! Ekhalelo ya evili! Moota heeni muneeraanyu moopowe wa nthorihelo mmooroni? 
Matthew23:34 Tivawo Miyo kineeraaka koorumiheleni maprofeeti, asuweli ni ahusiha. Akina a yaawo mmwiwiive ni mmwaakhomele, akina mmwaawaxule muSinagoganimwanyu ni mmwaasoonde esidade ni esidade." 
Matthew23:35 Ni hiiho, ephome yootheene yoororomeleya evuuviheriwe vatthayani, eniyoothoonyereni nyuwo, okhuma ephome ya Abeli oororomeleya mpaka ephome ya Zakariya, mwaana a Barakiya, yoole nyuwo mmwiivalaanyu eriyari ya Empa ya Muluku ni altaari*." 
Matthew23:36 Miyo kinoororomelihani weera sootheene seiyo nsikhuruwele ekhapira ela. 
Matthew23:37 Yerusaleemu, Yerusaleemu, weyo ongwiiva maprofeeti ni onaavonya maluku yaawo onrumiheliwaawo! Hapo kaatthuna waathukumanya anamwanaawo ntoko nttehi nnaathukumanyaaya axaanaaya vathi wa mapuphaaya, mene khawaatthuna!" 
Matthew23:38 Woone, empaawo eniithaamiwe." 
Matthew23:39 Vano Miyo kinooleela weyo weera khoorwa okoonatho okhuma vaanaano va mpaka oneeraawo weere: ‘Ooreelihiwa ti Yoowo ongwa mwa Nsina na Apwiya.’” 
Matthew24:1 Yeesu aakhuma Mpaani mwa Muluku ni eera eettaka, oohuseraawe yaamwaattamela Yoowo weera emoonihere otekiwa wa Empa ya Muluku." 
Matthew24:2 Vano Owo aahaakoha: “Munimoona sootheene iya? Miyo kinoororomelihani: khanirwa nikhala va nluku ni nluku. Ootheene awo eniipwexiwe.” 
Matthew24:3 Yeesu akilaantheene vamwaakoni wa Sooliveira, oohuseraawe yaarowa wa Yoowo okhwipi ni yaamweerela: “Munileele, yaakhani sineeraaya sikhumelele itthu iyo? Ni eneneero heeni ya owawanyu ni emalihero ya ihuhu?”" 
Matthew24:4 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Mwiipasoope weera ahikhale aneera oolokottheni," 
Matthew24:5 niwoko ancipale eniirwe mwa Nsinanaka yeeraka: ‘Miyo ti Kristu,’ ni eniyaalokotthe ancipale." 
Matthew24:6 Nyuwo mmwiiwe sa ikhotto ni suulummwaka sa ikhotto, vano mwiipasoope weera muhituthuwe. Ontthuneya weera itthusene seiyo seereiye, mene iyo khasinthoonyera ommaleloni." 
Matthew24:7 Elapo eniiwane ni elapo, aani, omwene onuuwane ni omwene. Nsikhale itala ni otetereiya wa mapuro makina." 
Matthew24:8 Sootheene iyo nsikhale ompacereroni wa ovoreiya wa oyara. 
Matthew24:9 Vano awo eniyoovaherereni weera musoondiwe ni mmwiiviwe. Nyuwo mmwithanyiwe ni ilapo sootheene niwoko na Miyo. 
Matthew24:10 Ehuhuweene yeeyo, ancipale eniihapuwe munroromeloni, evarihanaka ni esoondanaka akina ni akhwaaya." 
Matthew24:11 Maprofeeti oowootha ancipale eniiwe ni eniyaalokotthe ancipale. 
Matthew24:12 Niwoko na waandyeerereiya otakhala, osivela wa ancipale onuuriire," 
Matthew24:13 mene yoowo anaavilele mpaka ommaleloni anaavuluxiwe. 
Matthew24:14 Ni masu ooreeraxa ala a omwene eniilaleiwe mweelaponi yootheene ntoko onamoona wa miloko sootheene, ni vahoolowaya onuuwe ommaleloni." 
Matthew24:15 Hiiho, nyuwo moonaka yiikaathiweene vaNipuroni Nootteela* etthu yoonanaraxa yoowuulihaxa muru* mwa yeeyo uulumalaawe mprofeeti Daniyeli, – owo onsoma iiwexexeke!" 
Matthew24:16 Vano, moona, awo eneera ekhale oYudeiya, etthaweleke omwaakoni." 
Matthew24:17 Yoowo aneera akhale vanipathoni na empaawe, ahikhuruwe weera akuxe etthu mpaani." 
Matthew24:18 Yoowo aneera akhale omattawawe ahihokolowe weera akuxe mukaandyowaawe. 
Matthew24:19 Eniikhale oowoopihaxa mahuku awo wa asithiyana oorupala ehuhuweene yeeyo ni wa yaawo oowaamwiha. 
Matthew24:20 Muvekele weera otthawawanyu ohikhumelele mulaala, hoye hoye eSaabadu," 
Matthew24:21 niwoko ehuhuweene yeeyo nsikhale soohooxa sincipale, moota wooweera kheenatoko okhumelela okhuma ompacereroni wa elapo ya vathi mpaka vaanaano vaava, hata kheerwa ekhumelelatho." 
Matthew24:22 Vano, mahukweene yaawo yahaavukuliwe, saano ahivuluxiwe hata mmoha, mene niwoko na oothanliwa, mahuku awo eniivukuliwe." 
Matthew24:23 Akhala mukina ongweerelani: ‘Moone, Kristu ori va!’ Hoye hoye: ‘Iwe ori Owo,’ muhimwaakhulele!" 
Matthew24:24 Eniikhumelele akristu oowootha ni maprofeeti oowootha eneera epake ineneero sitokotoko ni sootikhiniha weera, wawereya, yaalokotthe mpaka oothanliwa." 
Matthew24:25 Moone, Miyo kooleenleni ehinaaye." 
Matthew24:26 Hiihotho akhala mukina ongweerelani: ‘Owo ori onikareni iwe,’ muhirowe, naari ‘Owo ori mpaani mmwe,’ muhimwaakhulele!" 
Matthew24:27 Vano, ntoko overinya onkhuma ninkhuma nsuwa ti woowooneya mpaka ninkela nsuwa, hiihotho onuukhale owa wa Mwaana a mutthu." 
Matthew24:28 Weiwo onkhalaayawo muttembo, marepo eniithukumanewotho." 
Matthew24:29 Woowaakuveya saamalakaru soohooxa sa mahukweene yaawo, ‘Nsuwa khanoopa ni mweeri khawaaratho; ithenyeeri sinoomora sikhumaka wiirimu, ni ikuru sa wiirimu nsikhale sootathiwa.’" 
Matthew24:30 Vano eniiwe wiirimu eneneero ya Mwaana a mutthu. Miloko sootheene sa elapo ya vathi nsilalamike, ni nsimoone Mwaana a mutthu arweelaka mmahutteni a wiirimu ni ikuru ni ovuwa otokotoko." 
Matthew24:31 Owo anaarumihe andyelowaawe ni nsu ntokotoko na nipalapatta, ni awo eniyaathukumanyihe oothanliwaawe wa elapo ya vathi yootheene, okhuma ekotenle erimu mpaka mpatta mukinatho." 
Matthew24:32 Muxuttere yeeyo ya efiigu: iphandisaya saakhalaka sikithi ni makukhwaaya yaapaceraka ophuwa, moosuwela weera elimwe eri vakhiviru." 
Matthew24:33 Hiihotho, moonaka itthu sootheene seiyo, musuwele weera Owo ookhuveela wa milako." 
Matthew24:34 Miyo kinoororomelihani: ekhapira ela kheerwa emala mpaka sootheene iyo sineeraaya seereiye. 
Matthew24:35 Wiirimu ni vathi onuuvire, mene maswaaka kheerwa eviratho." 
Matthew24:36 Nihuku ni ewoora khaawo asuwenle, hata andyelo a wiirimu, hata Mwaana, ehikhanle Atiithi paahi." 
Matthew24:37 Ntoko yaakhumelenlaaya mahuku a Nowe, hiihotho onuukhale moowaani wa Mwaana a mutthu." 
Matthew24:38 Vano, mahuku a khalayi ale, sihinaaye mirupi, atthu yeera ecaaka, ewuraka, ethelaka ni ethelanaka, mpaka nihuku nenne Nowe aavolongwaawe munikulani." 
Matthew24:39 Awo khayiiwexenxe mpaka saaphiyalaaya mirupi ni saakuxalaaya ootheene. Hiiho eniyeereiye moowaani wa Mwaana a mutthu. 
Matthew24:40 Asilopwana eeli eniikhale omatta: mmoha anaakuxiwe; mukina anaahale. 
Matthew24:41 Asithiyana eeli eniixile vamoha: mmoha anaakuxiwe; mukina anaahale. 
Matthew24:42 Tivawo, mukhale oowehaweha, niwoko khamusuwenle nihuku angwaaya Apwiyaanyu." 
Matthew24:43 Mwiiwexexetho yeeyo: Mwaneene a vaate aasuwenle ewoora heeni aneeraawe awe namwiiya, owo saano alipelenleene ni ahihiyale vaatewawe wiiyiwaka." 
Matthew24:44 Hiiho nyuwotho ontthuneya wiireherera, niwoko Mwaana a mutthu anaawe ewoora nyuwo mungwehereraanyu vakhaani." 
Matthew24:45 Murumeiyi heeni oororomeleya ni a miruku wa yoowo animvahereraaya Apwiyaawe sa owannyaya weera aavaheke akina yooca ya ehuhu yootthuneya? 
Matthew24:46 Ooreelihiwa ti murumeiyi, Apwiyaawe yaahokolowaka, eneeraaya emphwanye apakaka yeeyo." 
Matthew24:47 Miyo kinoororomelihani weera awo enimukhalihe muneene a sooreelasaya sootheene. 
Matthew24:48 Waaritho weera murumeiyi owo onkhala oonanara ni oniixeerela: ‘Apwiyaaka anoopisa’ 
Matthew24:49 ni vano anapacera waamana arumeiyi akhwaawe, acaaka ni awuraka ni anamawura," 
Matthew24:50 vanonto Apwiya a murumeiyi owo eniiwe nihuku ohinaawehereraawe yaawo ni ewoora ohisuwenlaawe. 
Matthew24:51 Awo eniimuthikile eriyariru ni eniimvaherere vanipuroni na anamwiixeera, weiwo onuukhale wiinla ni okhuuriha maino." 
Matthew25:1 Omwene wa wiirimu onuulikane ntoko aximwali oowiikosoopa muloko yaakuxale onyaaraaya ni yaarongwe weera yakumane ni namatthomera. 
Matthew25:2 Athanu a yaawo yaari oohikhalano miruku, ni akinaawo yaari a miruku." 
Matthew25:3 Yaawo oohikhalano miruku yaakuxa onyaaraaya, mene khayaakuxaletho makhura." 
Matthew25:4 Wa soothesene, amiruku ti yaakuxale makhura mmapoottoroni vamoha ni onyaaraaya." 
Matthew25:5 Namatthomera aapisa ophiya, ni ootheene yaavoliwa ikhove ni yaakona." 
Matthew25:6 Ohiyu eriyari waahiiwiwa okhuwela: ‘Namatthomera ookhuveela! Mukhume weera munkumaneno!’ 
Matthew25:7 Vano aximwali oowiikosoopa ootheene yaavenya ni yaapattiha onyaaraaya. 
Matthew25:8 Yaawo oohikhalano miruku yaawerela ale a miruku: ‘Munivahe vakhaani makhuraanyu, niwoko onyaaraahu onoocipha.’" 
Matthew25:9 Awo a miruku yaawaakhula: ‘Hoye! Onoowereya weera khaankwana wa hiyo ni wa nyuwo. Murowe wa anthumiha makhura ni mwathume.’ 
Matthew25:10 Erowaka awo othuma makhura, namatthomera aaphiya. Aximwali oowiikosoopa yaari oolikaneene, yaavolowa ni yoowo mufestani ya othelana. Ni nsele naawaliwa." 
Matthew25:11 Vahoolowaya yaahoowatho aximwali oowiikosoopa akina ni yaaheera: ‘Apwiya, Apwiya, munihulele nsele!’" 
Matthew25:12 Vano owo aawaakhula: ‘Vekhaikhai miyo nkoosuwenleni.’ 
Matthew25:13 Tivawo, mwiipasoope, niwoko khamusuwenle nihuku, hata ewoora." 
Matthew25:14 Omwene wa wiirimu onuukhaletho ntoko mulopwana, atthunaka weetta mukwaha, aawiitthana arumeiyaawe ni aahaaroromeliha sooreelasawe." 
Matthew25:15 Mmoha aamvaha italentu* ithanu, mukina italentu* piili, ni mukinatho aamvaha emoha, wa mutthu ti mutthu aamvaha moota ongweraawe. Vahoolowaya aapwaha ni mukwahaawe." 
Matthew25:16 Yoowo aakhenle italentu* ithanu aavenya woowaakuveya, aavarela muteko ni aawina ithanutho sikina." 
Matthew25:17 Nitho yoowo aakhenle italentu* piili aawina piili sikina. 
Matthew25:18 Yoowo aakhenle etalentu* emoha, aavenya, anathipa nlitti, anavitha musurukhu wa Apwiyaawe." 
Matthew25:19 Yavinraaya ehuhu yincipale, Apwiya a arumeiyi ale yaahokolowa ni yaamaliha mulattu wa musurukhu ni yaawo." 
Matthew25:20 Yoowo aakhenle italentu* ithanu ahaawiihera ithanu sikina ni aaweerela: ‘Apwiya, mwaakiroromela ni italentu* ithanu; moone, koowina ithanutho.’" 
Matthew25:21 Apwiya yaamwaakhula: ‘Ti wooreera, murumeiyi ooreera ni oororomeleya! Weyo waari oororomeleya wa vakhaani, miyo nkoororomele wa sincipale. Owe ni ovolowe moohakalalani wa Apwiyaawo.’" 
Matthew25:22 Aahoowatho yoowo aakhenle italentu* piili ni aaweerela: ‘Apwiya mwaakiroromela ni italentu* piili; moone, koowina piilitho.’" 
Matthew25:23 Apwiya yaamwaakhula: ‘Ti wooreera, murumeiyi ooreera ni oororomeleya! Weyo waari oororomeleya wa vakhaani, miyo nkoororomele wa sincipale. Owe ni ovolowe moohakalalani wa Apwiyaawo.’" 
Matthew25:24 Wookisera aahoowa yoowo aakhenle etalentu* emoha anaweerela: ‘Apwiya, miyo kaasuwela weera nyuwo ti mulopwana oowuuma murima munghepha weiwo muhiphatteiyaanyu ni muntakansa weiwo muhaaliyaanyu." 
Matthew25:25 Tivawo kaahoova, kaavenya ni kaavitha etalentwaanyu* munlittini. Moone, va eri yawinyu.’" 
Matthew25:26 Apwiya yaamwaakhula: ‘Murumeiyi oonanara ni ooreesi! Weyo waasuwela weera miyo kinghepha weiwo kahaaphatteiyaaka ni kintakansa weiwo kahaaliyaaka? 
Matthew25:27 Vano, waatthuneya weyo othokorora musurukhwaaka wa anamathokorora musurukhu, weera miyo kaahokolowaka, kaakhele musurukhu woopwaha." 
Matthew25:28 Mmwaakhe etalentwaawe* ni mumvahe yoowo orino muloko. 
Matthew25:29 wa yoowo orino, anaavahiwe, ni anaakhalane vancipale, ni yoowo ohikhalannetho, mpaka yeeyo orinaawe, onimwaakhiwa." 
Matthew25:30 Ni mumvonyere mpiphini murumeiyi oohivareleya muteko, weiwo onuukhale wiinla ni okhuuriha maino.’" 
Matthew25:31 Mwaana a mutthu aawaaka moovuwanimwawe vamoha ni andyelowaawe ootheene, anaakilaathi vahiceniwawe ya ovuwa." 
Matthew25:32 Miloko sootheene nsithukumanyihiwe vahoolowawe, Owo anaammwaramwaxe mukina ni mukhwaawe ntoko mukukhuli ommwaramwaxaawe ikhondoolo ni ipuri." 
Matthew25:33 Ni aniikaathi ikhondoolo moonowaawe mulopwana, ni ipuri moonowaawe muthiyana." 
Matthew25:34 Vano Mwene anaaweerele yaawo a moono mulopwana: ‘Ngwe, ootteelihiwa a Atithaka. Mwaakhele ntoko yoohiyeriwa* omwene mureherereliwaanyu okhuma ompacereroni wa elapo ya vathi." 
Matthew25:35 Kaavoliwa etala, ni mwaakivaha yooca; kaavoliwatho ntthona, ni mwaakivaha maahi; kaari namarwa, ni mwaakaakhela nnene;" 
Matthew25:36 kaahaawela ikuwo, ni mwaakiwariha; kaavoreiwa, ni mwaakikosoopa; kaari okaliposo ni mwaakixekura.’" 
Matthew25:37 Vano oororomeleya eniiwaakhule: ‘Apwiya, yaakhani naawoonnaahuni ni etala ni nnoovahani yooca, hoye hoye ni ntthona ni nnoovahani maahi?" 
Matthew25:38 Yaakhani naawoonnaahuni ntoko namarwa ni nnawaakhelani nnene, hoye hoye muhaawelaka ikuwo ni nnoowarihani?" 
Matthew25:39 Yaakhani naawoonnaahuni muvoreiwaka, hoye hoye mureene okaliposo ni nnooxekurani?’" 
Matthew25:40 Mwene anaakhule: ‘Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: ‘Yeeyo mwaampakenlaanyu mmoha a axunnaka ooyevaxa, mwaakipakenle Miyo." 
Matthew25:41 Vano Owo anaaweerele yaawo a moono muthiyana: ‘Oolaphiwa! Mususeke wa Miyo mpaka mmooroni woohimala oreherereliwaawe Satana ni andyelowaawe. 
Matthew25:42 Vano, kaavoliwa etala, ni khamwaakivanghe yooca; kaavoliwa ntthona, ni khamwaakivanghe maahi;" 
Matthew25:43 kaari namarwa, ni khamwaakaakhenle nnene; kaahaawela ikuwo, ni khamwaakiwaringhe; kaavoreiwa ni kaari okaliposo, ni khamwaakixekunre.’" 
Matthew25:44 Awotho eniiwaakhule: ‘Apwiya, yaakhani naawoonnaahuni ni etala, hoye hoye ntthona, hoye hoye ntoko namarwa, hoye hoye muhaawelaka ikuwo, hoye hoye muvoreiwaka, naari mureene okaliposo, ni nihookhaviherani?" 
Matthew25:45 Awo eniiwaakhule: ‘Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: Yeeyo mwaahiyalaanyu ompakela mukina a asikhaani ala, mwaahiyatho okipakela Miyo.’" 
Matthew25:46 Ni awo eniirowe moottaruxiwani woohimala, oororomeleyatho mookumini woohimala.”" 
Matthew26:1 Amalihaka ohima itthu iye, Yeesu aaweerela oohuseraawe:" 
Matthew26:2 “Moosuwela weera ahanle mahuku meeli ophiya ehuhu ya mPaska*, ni Mwaana a mutthu anaavahereriwe weera athomeiwe.”" 
Matthew26:3 Wa ehuhuweene yeele, ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni asitokweene a muloko yaathukumana empa etotoko ya mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, nsinanawe iitthaniwa Kayafasi," 
Matthew26:4 ni ootheene yaavaanela omvara Yeesu ni moota mukina woomvariha weera emwiive. 
Matthew26:5 Yaaheeratho: “Ehikhale ehuhu ya efesta ya mPaska*, weera ohikhale onyakuleleiya variyari wa muloko.”" 
Matthew26:6 Areene Yeesu oBetaniya owannyawe Simeyoni namakokho," 
Matthew26:7 aamwaattamela muthiyana mmoha ni mukoomba woopakiwa ni alabaster, ereenemo makhura oowunkhelaxa ni oorikaxa. Amphwanyaka Yeesu uurammeene vameesa, owo aarihela makhura ale mmuru mwa Yeesu." 
Matthew26:8 Oohusera, yoonaka yeeyo, khayaahakalanle ni yaakoha: “Annanariheliwa heeni?" 
Matthew26:9 Makhura ala yaathumihiwe, saano naakhenleene musurukhu mwincipale, ni owo yaamvahiwa atthu oohaawa.”" 
Matthew26:10 Iiwaka yeeyo, Yeesu aaweerela: “Heeni nyuwo munimxupaanyu muthiyana ola? Ola ookipakela etthu yooreera." 
Matthew26:11 Vano, atthu oohaawa eniikhale ni nyuwo mahuku ootheene, mene Miyo nkinrowa okhala ni nyuwo mahuku ootheene." 
Matthew26:12 Orihenlaawe makhura oowunkhelaxa mweerutthunimwaka, owo oopaka yeeyo weera akirehererele ovithiwawaka." 
Matthew26:13 Miyo kinoororomelihani weera mapuro yaawo ootheene a elapo ya vathi masu ooreeraxa ala eneeraaya elaleiweke, yeeyotho owo opankaawe eniithalihiwe, weera ola uupuweleliwe.”" 
Matthew26:14 Vano mmoha a muloko neeli, iitthaniwa Yudasi Iskariyoti, aarowa wa ahooleli a asaserdoti*" 
Matthew26:15 ni aahaakoha: “Mmukivahe hai miyo koovahererani Owo?” Hiiho awo yaamuliva makhoobiri miloko miraru a eparatha*. 
Matthew26:16 Evinyero vaavaale, Yudasi aapacera waasa ehuhu yootthuneya weera amvaherere." 
Matthew26:17 Nihuku noopacera na efesta ya ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu oohusera yaamwaattamela Yeesu ni yaamukoha: “Muntthuna woowi Nyuwo weera hiyo nareherere yooca ya mPaska*?” 
Matthew26:18 Owo aawaakhula: “Mwavolowe mmuttettheni ni mwamwaase mulopwana mukina ni mwamuleele: ‘Muhusiha eenre: ‘Ehuhuwaaka yookhuveela. Miyo kinrowa omuca mPaska* owannyinyu vamoha ni oohuseraaka.’” 
Matthew26:19 Oohusera yaapaka ntoko Yeesu aaleenlaawe, ni yaamureherera mPaska*." 
Matthew26:20 Wiilaka, Yeesu aahuurama vameesa vamoha ni muloko neeli" 
Matthew26:21 ni ecaaka, Owo aaweerela: “Kinooleelani vekhaikhai weera mmoha a nyuwo anaakivarihe.”" 
Matthew26:22 Awo yaathanana vancipale, enapacera omukoha mutthu ti mutthu eeraka: “Vekhaikhai nkihiyono miyo, Apwiya!”" 
Matthew26:23 Yeesu aaheeratho: “Yoowo ociiye vamoha ni Miyo esasaani emoharu yeela, anaakivarihe." 
Matthew26:24 Mwaana a mutthu anaavarihiwe ntoko elempwalaaya mwaha wa Yoowo, mene Ii! Onoohaawa yoowo aneera amvarihe Mwaana a mutthu! Fataari ahaayariwe!”" 
Matthew26:25 Vano Yudasi, eera amvarihe, aamweerela: “Vekhaikhai nkihiyono miyo, Muhusiha.” Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Aani, ti weyo!”" 
Matthew26:26 Ecaaka, Yeesu aakuxa epaawu, anamutthapela Muluku, anameiyanya, anaavaha oohuseraawe, eeraka: “Mukuxeke ni muceeke: ela ti erutthwaaka.”" 
Matthew26:27 Vahoolowaya aakuxa ekoomixi, anamutthapelatho Muluku, anaavaha oohusera, eeraka: “Ngwureke ootheene." 
Matthew26:28 Ela ti ephomaaka ya wiiraanyiha, enriheya mwaha wa atthu ancipale weera eleveleliwe soottheka." 
Matthew26:29 Miyo kinooleelani weera okhuma vaanaano va mpaka ohoolo, nkinrowa owura wa yoowiima ya ematta ya iwuuva* mpaka nihuku nenno kineeraaka kiwure eviinyu enyowani vamoha ni nyuwo moomweneni wa Atithaka.”" 
Matthew26:30 Yiipakaru ecipo, yaavenya erowaka omwaako wa Sooliveira." 
Matthew26:31 Vano Yeesu aaweerela: “Ohiyuweene yoola ootheene nyuwo munookihiya, niwoko yoolempwa: ‘Kinoomuvulaliha Mukukhuli, ni ikhondoolo sa muhuwo nsimwaareiye.’" 
Matthew26:32 Kaavenyererakatho, kinoorowa ohoolowanyu wa oGalileiya.”" 
Matthew26:33 Pedru aamwaakhula: “Hata ootheene yoohiyeeni, miyo nkinoohiyani!”" 
Matthew26:34 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Kinoororomelihani weera ohiyuweene yoola, ahinaaye wiipa muthupi, munookiruna imaara tthaaru.”" 
Matthew26:35 Pedrutho aaheera: “Hata otthuneyaka weera miyo kikhwe vamoha ni Nyuwo, miyo nkinoorunani.” Ni oohusura akina ootheene yaaheeratho yeeyo." 
Matthew26:36 Yeesu aarowa ni oohuseraawe vanipuroni niitthaniwa Gesemani, anaweerela: “Mukilaathiki va, Miyo kinrowa vale ovekela.”" 
Matthew26:37 Amurowanaka ni yoowo Pedru ni anamwane eeli a Zebedeyo, aapacera othananaxa ni oripiwa murima." 
Matthew26:38 Vano aaweerela: “Munepaaka ori woothananaxa, mpakatho okhwa. Mukhale va ni mulipeleleke ni Miyo.”" 
Matthew26:39 Arowaka vahoolo vakhaani, aahuuramihela ekhovaawe vathi, anavekela: “Tiithi, wawereya, mususihe wa Miyo ekoomixi ela, wa soothesene, ohikhale ntoko kintthunaaka, mene ntoko muntthunaanyu.”" 
Matthew26:40 Aahokoleela wa oohuseraawe ni aahaaphwanya ekonaka. Vanonto Owo aamukoha Pedru: “Khamuwenre olipelela ni Miyo hata ewoora emoha paahi? 
Matthew26:41 Mulipelele ni muvekele weera muhivariwe ni yooweereriwa. Munepa ti woolikana, mene erutthu ti yoohilipa.”" 
Matthew26:42 Aavenyatho arowaka ovekela: “Atithaka, waahiwereya osusiha wa Miyo ekoomixi ela kihiwuraka, opakiwe otthunawanyu.”" 
Matthew26:43 Ahokoleelakatho, aahaaphwanya ekonaka, niwoko yaavoliwa ikhove." 
Matthew26:44 Vano aahaahiya ni aavekela emaara yanaararu, ahimaka masu mamoharu." 
Matthew26:45 Aahokoleela wa oohuseraawe anaweerela: “Nyuwo nlelo munookona ni munimwiitthuuwa? Yookhuveela ewoora aneeraawe avahereriwe Mwaana a mutthu mmatatani mwa anamattheka. 
Matthew26:46 Muvenye ni nrowe. Iwe onimoowa namavarihaaka.” 
Matthew26:47 Eeraka olokolola Yeesu, aaphiya Yudasi, mmoha a muloko neeli. Atthu ancipale yaari ni yoowo, ekunxeene mavaka ni ikopo, yaarumihiwe ni ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni asitokweene a muloko wa atthu." 
Matthew26:48 Namavariha aahiiwanana eneneero ni yaawo, aweerelaka: “Yoowo kineeraaka kamuulumihe ni ebeecu, ti Yoowo. Mwamvareke!”" 
Matthew26:49 Arowaka woowaakuveya wa Yeesu, Yudasi aamweerela: “Salaama Muhusiha,” ni aambeeca." 
Matthew26:50 Yeesu aamukoha: “Nthamwene, mwaaweenle eheeni?” Atthu akina yaamwaattamela, yaamvara Yeesu enamutthuka." 
Matthew26:51 Mmoha a yaale yaari ni Yeesu, ookolaka moonowaawe, aakhumiha ekatanaawe ni aakwasa naaru na murumeiyi a mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*." 
Matthew26:52 Yeesu aamweerela: “Muhokoloxere mwaalo munluwoni! Vano, ootheene ankuxa mwaalo, eniiriheiye ni mwaalo." 
Matthew26:53 Khamusuwenle weera Miyo kinoowera waavekela Atithaka, ni Awo eniikurumihele khuluwi andyelo oohaalikeleiya?" 
Matthew26:54 Moota heeni yeeraaya ekwaniheriwe Yoolempwa* yeenre ontthuneya weera itthu iya seereiye mooteene yoola?” 
Matthew26:55 Ehuhuweene yeele Yeesu aaweerela atthu ancipale: “Niwoko heeni mungwaanyu okivara ni nyaalo ni ikopo? Miyo kinaalamula atthu weera ewane ni ebooma? Mahuku ootheene Miyo kannaxuttiha Mpaani mwa Muluku, ni khamwaakitthunke." 
Matthew26:56 Sootheenetho iya seereiye weera ekwaniheriwe Yoolempwa* ya maprofeeti.” Vano oohusera ootheene yaamuhiya ni yaatthawa. 
Matthew26:57 Yaawo yaamutthunke Yeesu yaamukuxa emuronghaka wa Kayafasi, mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, weiwo yaathukumannaaya anamawera a nlamulo* ni asitokweene." 
Matthew26:58 Pedrutho aamutthara areene ottaiwene mpaka vaate wa empa ya mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*. Vano, aavolowa ni aakilaathi ni anamalipelela weera oone seiyo seera sikhumelele." 
Matthew26:59 Ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni ootheene a eSineedriyu* yaasaasa nthowa na Yeesu weera emuthorihele okhwa," 
Matthew26:60 mene khayaaphwannye, naamwi yiixooniheraka anamoona ancipale oowootha." 
Matthew26:61 Woomaliha, yaahiixoonihera anamoona eeli yeeraka: “Mulopwana Ola aaheera: ‘Miyo kinoowera ophwata Empa ya Muluku ni kinooteka mmahukuni mararu paahi.’”" 
Matthew26:62 Vano aaheemela mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, anamweerela Yeesu: “Khamunaakhula yeeyo awo angwootheraayani?”" 
Matthew26:63 Yeesutho aamaala. Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* aamweerela: “Kinoonyesererani weera munlipele Muluku Mukumi: Nyuwo mwaari Kristu, Mwaana a Muluku, munileele!”" 
Matthew26:64 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Nyuwo moheera muneenaanyu. Miyo kinooleelanitho: nniphiye nihuku muneeraanyu mmoone Mwaana a mutthu akilaantheene moono mulopwana wa Yoowo a ikuru sootheene ni awaaka mmahutteni a wiirimu.” 
Matthew26:65 Ti vaavaawo mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* aahunlaawe soowarasawe eeraka: “Oomuveiha Muluku! Khaninaatthuna anamoona akina. Nyuwo mohiiwa omuveihawawe Muluku. 
Matthew26:66 Munuupuwela hai?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Omphwanela okhwa!” 
Matthew26:67 Vano akina yaamusenyela owiitho, emmanaka ni icipakhira; akina yaammana ni ilatuma" 
Matthew26:68 yeeraka: “Otthome, Kristu, taani oomanne?”" 
Matthew26:69 Pedru akilaantheene vaate, ni namuteko muthiyana amwaattamelaka yoowo, aamweerela: “Nyuwotho mwaari ni Yeesu Yoole muGalileiya.”" 
Matthew26:70 Vano owo aaruna vamaithoni wa ootheene eeraka: “Nkisuwenle yeeyo munuulumaanyu.” 
Matthew26:71 Vano aavenya mpatta waari mulako mutokotoko, weiwo namuteko muthiyana mukina aamoonnaawe, ni aaweerela yaale yaari vaavaale: “Mulopwana ola aari ni Yeesu muNasarete.”" 
Matthew26:72 Ni owo, alipelaka, aarunatho eeraka: “Nkimusuwenle Mulopwana Owo.”" 
Matthew26:73 Eviraka ehuhu vakhaani, yaawo yaari weiwe yaaphiya wa Pedru ni yaamweerela: “Vekhaikhai, nyuwo ti mmoha a yaale. Muulumelowaanyu onoothoonyani.”" 
Matthew26:74 Vano aapacera onyohola ni olipela eeraka: “Nkimusuwenle Mulopwana Owo.” Woowaakuveya muthupi aahiipa. 
Matthew26:75 Pedru aahuupuwelela masu Yeesu aamuleenlaawe eeraka: “Ahinaaye wiipa muthupi, munookiruna imaara tthaaru.” Avenyaka vaavaale, aahiinlaxa omvoreiyaka murima." 
Matthew27:1 Oyaaka ni oxa, ahooleli a asaserdoti* ootheene ni asitokweene a muloko wa atthu yaaphiya woovaanelani weera emuthorihele Yeesu okhwa." 
Matthew27:2 Emutthukaka, yaamukuxa ni yaamvaherera wa Pilatu, guvernadori." 
Matthew27:3 Yudasi, yoole aamvarihale Yeesu, oonakaru weera Yeesu oothoriheliwa okhwa, murimaawe waathananaxa ni aahaahokoloxera ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni asitokweene a muloko makhoobiri miloko miraru a eparatha*," 
Matthew27:4 ni aaweerela: “Koottheka, niwoko koovariha ephome yoohikhala ni milattu.” Ni awo yaamwaakhula: “Hiyo khanimwaha. Ikuru ti sawinyu.”" 
Matthew27:5 Vano Yudasi aavonyera musurukhu mpuwa mwa Empa ya Muluku ni iivenxaka, aarowa ni aahiixiiva iitthukelelaka." 
Matthew27:6 Ahooleli a asaserdoti* yaathukumanya makhoobiri a musurukhu ni yaaheera: “Nlamulo ninkhootta weera musurukhu ola waandyeereriwe vamoha ni mukina wa Empa ya Muluku, niwoko woothuma ephome.”" 
Matthew27:7 Yaalakela ovarela muteko musurukhu ole weera yathume ematta ya nanyaapu, weera anamarwa evithiwe mwemmo." 
Matthew27:8 Niwoko nenenenno, ematta ele eniitthaniwa mpaka vaanaano vaava ematta ya ephome." 
Matthew27:9 Hiihotho yookwaniheriwa yeeyo yaahimmwale, ni mprofeeti Yeremiya: “Yaakuxa makhoobiri miloko miraru a eparatha*, mutteengo yiiwanannaaya ni muloko wa aYixrayeli olivela okumaawe," 
Matthew27:10 ni waavarela muteko ole weera othume ematta ya nanyaapu, ntoko Apwiya akiruminghaaya.”" 
Matthew27:11 Yeesu aakuxiwa mpaka vamaithoni wa guvernadori, ni owo aamukoha: “Nyuwo muri Mwene a aYuda?” Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Ti ntoko muneeraanyu.”" 
Matthew27:12 Ootheriwaka ni ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni asitokweene a muloko, Yeesu khaakhunle." 
Matthew27:13 Vano Pilatu aamukoha: “Khamuniiwa soowootheriwa awo anoopakaayani Nyuwo?” 
Matthew27:14 Yeesutho khaakhunle hata nsu nimoha, moota wooweera guvernadori aatikhina vancipale." 
Matthew27:15 Vanonto, ehuhu ya efesta yaari ekhovelelo ya guvernadori omtaphula namatthukiwa mmoha oothanliwa ni atthu ancipale." 
Matthew27:16 Ehuhuweene yeele awo yaakhalano namatthukiwa oosuwanyeya iitthaniwa Baraba. 
Matthew27:17 Vano, woothukumanani atthu ancipale, Pilatu aahaakoha: “Taani a yaale muntthunaanyu weera miyo kimutaphule: Baraba, hoye hoye Yeesu oniitthaniwa Kristu?”" 
Matthew27:18 Owo aasuwela weera awo yaamvaherera Yeesu niwoko na nrima. 
Matthew27:19 Pilatu akilaantheene nipuro noowuuluma milattu, amwaariye yaarumiha mutthenga ola: ‘Muhivolowe mulattweene yoola wa Yoole ohikhanleno mulattu, niwoko olelo moolohani koohaawaxa niwoko na Mulopwana Owo.’" 
Matthew27:20 Vaheera ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni asitokweene a muloko yaahaasesera atthu ancipale weera emvekele omtaphula Baraba ni emvaherere okhwa Yeesu. 
Matthew27:21 Guvernadori aahaakoha: “Taani a eeli awo muntthunaanyu weera miyo kimutaphule?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Baraba!” 
Matthew27:22 Pilatu aahaakoha: “Keereke hai ni Yeesu oniitthaniwa Kristu?” Ootheene yaamwaakhula: “Munkhomele!” 
Matthew27:23 Pilatu aahaakoha: “Niwoko heeni? Yoonanara heeni opankaawe?” Awo yaatepaxa okhuwelatho: “Munkhomele!” 
Matthew27:24 Oonaka Pilatu weera khaawera etthu, menetho weera waahanle vakhaani opacera onyakuleleiya, aahiitthaniha maahi. Vano aanyawa matata vamaithoni wa atthu ancipale eeraka: “Miyo nkinono mulattu ni ephome ya Mulopwana Ola. Ikuru ti sawinyu.”" 
Matthew27:25 Atthu ootheene yaamwaakhula: “Ephomaawe Ola eniriheele hiyo ni anamwanaahu.” 
Matthew27:26 Pilatu aamutaphula Baraba, ni aahaalamulela weera engwaxule Yeesu ni aamvaherera weera akhomeliwe." 
Matthew27:27 Anakhotto a guvernadori yaamurongha Yeesu owannyawe, ni yaathukumana anakhotto ootheene emurukurenreene." 
Matthew27:28 Yaamurula ikuwosawe ni yaangwariha mukaandyo wooxeera. 
Matthew27:29 Yaapaka ecireemba ya nyiiwa ni yaangwariha mmurumwawe. Yaamvareliha muttontto mmatatani, ni emukokhorelaka, yaamutheiya yeeraka: “Salaama Mwene a aYuda!”" 
Matthew27:30 Yaamusenyela, ni emwaakhaka muttontto yaammanela mmurumwawe." 
Matthew27:31 Emutheiyakaru, yaamurula mukaandyo, ni yaangwariha ikuwosawe. Vano yaamukuxa weera emukhomele." 
Matthew27:32 Evenyaka, yaamphwanya mulopwana a oSireene iitthaniwa Simeyoni, ni yaamunyesereriha okuxa muttanda." 
Matthew27:33 Yaaphiya nipuro niitthaniwa Golgota, entaphulela nipuro na nikarakasa." 
Matthew27:34 Iwe yaamvaha eviinyu yootakansiwa ni eviinyu yoonyuunya weera awure. Alawihakarutho, Owo aakhootta owura." 
Matthew27:35 Emukhomelakaru, yaakawana ikuwosawe epakaka macitta." 
Matthew27:36 Vano, ekilaantheene vaavaale, yaamulipelela." 
Matthew27:37 Vasulu wa muruwaawe yaahiikaathi yoolempwa yoomoothera yoole yeeraka: ‘Ola ti Yeesu, Mwene a aYuda.’" 
Matthew27:38 Anamwiiya eeli yaakhomeliwa ni Yoowo, mukina moonowaawe mulopwana, mukina muthiyana." 
Matthew27:39 Yaawo yaavira yaamuruwana, yiinihaka nyurusaya" 
Matthew27:40 yeeraka: “Weyo weera ophwate Empa ya Muluku ni oteke mmahukuni mararu – wiivuluxe! Okhuruwe vamuttandani, Weyo waari Mwaana a Muluku!”" 
Matthew27:41 Mooteene yoowo ahooleli a asaserdoti*, anamawera a nlamulo*, ni asitokweene a muloko yaamutheiya" 
Matthew27:42 yeeraka: “Aahaavuluxa akina, khangweratho wiivuluxa. Ori mwene a aYixrayeli? Akhuruwa vamuttandani, hiyo nnoomuroromela." 
Matthew27:43 Owo aamuroromela Muluku, vano Muluku amvuluxe amutthuna, niwoko Owo eenre: ‘Miyo ti Mwaana a Muluku.’”" 
Matthew27:44 Hiihotho anamwiiya yaakhomeliwe ni Yoowo yaamuruwana. 
Matthew27:45 Yaakhala epiphi mweelaponi yootheene wa iwoora tthaaru okhuma nsuwa vamuru. 
Matthew27:46 Siviraka iwoora tthaaru iye, Yeesu aakhuwela ni nsu ntokotoko: “Eloyi, Eloyi, lama sabaktani,” entaphulela: “Mulukwaaka, Mulukwaaka, niwoko heeni mukihingyaanyu?”" 
Matthew27:47 Akina yaari weiwe yiiwalaaya yeeyo, yaaheera: “Owo onimwiitthana Eliya.”" 
Matthew27:48 Woowaakuveya mmoha a yaale aatthimaka weera akuxe nttapwatta, aaruweiya mviinyuni yoonyuunya, aahiikaathi okhwipi wa ekopo, anamvaha Yeesu weera awure." 
Matthew27:49 Akinatho yaamweerela: “Munghiye, noone Eliya arwa omvuluxa.”" 
Matthew27:50 Aakhuwenlaawetho ni nsu ntokotoko, Yeesu aahookhwa." 
Matthew27:51 Ehuhuweene yeele ekuwo etokotoko ya Empa ya Muluku yaahaahuwa, ekawanyeyaka okhuma vasulu mpaka vathi. Etthaya yaatetereiya ni nyala saaphweeya." 
Matthew27:52 Mahiye yaahuuhuwa, ni mittembo sa atthu ootteela ancipale yaakhwiiye saavenyererihiwa." 
Matthew27:53 Yaakhuma mmahiyeni, ni Yeesu avenyerenreene, yaavolowa musidadeni yootteela ni yaahooniwa ni atthu ancipale." 
Matthew27:54 Oonakaru kenturiyoni* ni yaawo yaamulipelenle Yeesu ni yoowo otetereiya ni sootheene seiye seereiye, yaahoova vancipale yeeraka: “Vekhaikhai, Ola aari Mwaana a Muluku.”" 
Matthew27:55 Athiyana ancipale yaari weiwe, ewehaka ereene ottaiwene. Awo yaamutthara Yeesu okhuma oGalileiya weera emurumeeleke." 
Matthew27:56 Variyariwaya aari Mariya oMagadalene, Mariya amayawe Yakobe, ni Yoseefe ni amayaya anamwane a Zebedeyo." 
Matthew27:57 Wiilaka, aaphiya namapuha mmoha a wArimateiya, iitthaniwa Yoseefe, aari oohusera a Yeesu." 
Matthew27:58 Arowaka wa Pilatu, aamvekela muttembo wa Yeesu, ni Pilatu aalamula weera avahiwe." 
Matthew27:59 Yoseefe aakuxa muttembo, anavitikelela musaandani yooreera," 
Matthew27:60 ni aniikaathi mmahiyeni manyowani owo aaruminghaawe othipiwa vamwala. Aahiikaathi nluku ntokotoko vamulako ni aavenya. 
Matthew27:61 Mariya oMagadalene ni Mariya mukina yaakilaathi weiwe ohoolo wa nihiye. 
Matthew27:62 Oxaawaya naari nihuku naattharelana nihuku na orehereriwa, ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni aFarisi* yaarowa wa Pilatu ni" 
Matthew27:63 yaamweerela: “Apwiya, ninuupuwelela weera areene mukumi, namalokottha Ole aaheera: ‘Kinoovenyerera yamala mahuku mararu.’" 
Matthew27:64 Vano mwaalamulele anakhotto weera nihiyenawe nilipeleliwe mpaka nihuku nanaararu, weera ehiwe oohuseraawe ni yiiyaka muttembwaawe, anooleela muloko wa atthu weera Owo oovenyerera mookhwaani. Olokottha wu wanaaveeli onuukhale woonanaraxa opwaha woopacera.”" 
Matthew27:65 Pilatu aawaakhula: “Mukuxe mpatta wa anakhotto. Muroweke ni mwalipeleleke nihiye ntoko muupuwenlaanyu.” 
Matthew27:66 Awo yaarowa ni yaalipiha nihiye ni mpatta wa anakhotto, ehelakatho vanlukuni eneneero ya ewalelo*." 
Matthew28:1 Niviraka nihuku na eSaabadu, nittaandaka nihuku noopacera na esimana, Mariya oMagadalene ni Mariya mukina yaarowa woona nihiye." 
Matthew28:2 Vano waakhala otetereiya otokotoko, ni ndyelo a Apwiya aakhuruwa wiirimu ni aphiyaka vanihiyeni, aapirikixa nluku naawaleliwe ni aakilaathi vasuluwaya." 
Matthew28:3 Ekhalelowaawe yaari ntoko overinya ni ikuwosawe saari sootteela ntoko etthapwe. 
Matthew28:4 Anamalipelela yaathukumela ni woova ni yaahookhwa maririmela. 
Matthew28:5 Ndyelo aaweerela asithiyana: “Muhoove! Koosuwela weera nyuwo mummwaasa Yeesu okhomeliwe. 
Matthew28:6 Owo khaamomo, oovenyerera ntoko aahimalaawe. Ngwe, moone nipuro waaraaya muttembo." 
Matthew28:7 Murowe woowaakuveya ni mwaaleele oohuseraawe: ‘Owo oovenyerera mookhwaani ni onrowa ohoolowanyu mpaka oGalileiya, weiwo muneeraanyu mwamoone. Vano kohooleelani.”" 
Matthew28:8 Hiiho, asithiyana yaavenya mmahiyeni yoovaka nitho ehakalalaka. Yaatthimaka ni yaahaaleela oohusera a Yeesu." 
Matthew28:9 Wootutuxereya Yeesu aahaakumanano asithiyana ni aaweerela: “Salaama!” Awo yaamwaattamela Yoowo, yaamukhubaara nyetto ni yaamulapa." 
Matthew28:10 Vano Yeesu aaweerela: “Muhoove. Murowe mwaaleele axunnaka weera erowe mpaka oGalileiya. Weiwo awo eniikoone.” 
Matthew28:11 Asithiyana ale ereene nlelo mphironi, akina a anamalipelela yaarowa osidade ni yaahaathalihera ahooleli a asaserdoti* sootheene seiye seereiye." 
Matthew28:12 Ethukumanaka ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni asitokweene a muloko, yaavaanela weera yaavahe anakhotto musurukhu mwincipale," 
Matthew28:13 eweerelaka: “Nyuwo ontthuneya weera: ‘Oohuseraawe yaahoowa ohiyu ni yaahiiya muttembo, hiyo nikonaka.’" 
Matthew28:14 Iiwa guvernadori yeeyo, hiyo ninoomuthalihera ni khamukhalano mulattu.”" 
Matthew28:15 Hiiho anakhotto yaahaakhela musurukhu ni yaapaka ntoko yaalamuleliwaaya. Mwaha ola waamwaramwaxeya variyari wa aYuda mpaka olelo. 
Matthew28:16 Vano oohusera muloko ni mmoha yaarowa oGalileiya mpaka mwaako Yeesu aathoonyenraawe. 
Matthew28:17 Emoonaka Yeesu, yaamulapa, mene akina yaahovela." 
Matthew28:18 Yeesu aawaattamela yaawo ni aaweerela: “Koovahiwa ikuru sootheene sa wiirimu ni vathi. 
Matthew28:19 Tivawo, murowe ni mwaakhalihe oohusera a amalapo ootheene, mwaapatisaka mwa Nsina na Atiithi, na Mwaana ni na Munepa Wootteela," 
Matthew28:20 mwaaxuttihaka wiiwelela sootheene Miyo koolamulenlaakani. Ni Miyo kinookhala ni nyuwo mahuku ootheene, mpaka ommaleloni wa ehuhu.”" 
Mark1:1 Epacerero ya masu ooreeraxa mwaha wa Yeesu Kristu, Mwaana a Muluku, yaari ha:" 
Mark1:2 Ntoko elempwalaaya mulivuruni ya Yesaya: “Nkimurumihe ohoolowanyu namutthengaaka, ni owo anaareherere ephirowaanyu –" 
Mark1:3 nsu ninkhuwela munikareni: ‘Mwaarehererele ephiro Apwiya! Ngwookolele ephiro Yaawo.’” 
Mark1:4 Hiiho aahoowa Yohaane, apatisaka munikareni ni alaleiyaka opatiso wa orukunxa murima, weera atthu yaakhele elevelelo ya soottheka." 
Mark1:5 Atthu a elapo yootheene ya oYudeiya ni muloko wootheene wa oYerusaleemu yaahoowa wa yoole. Elapaka sootthekasaya, yaapatisiwa ni yoowo mmoolokoni Yordanu." 
Mark1:6 Yohaane aawara ikuwo sa ixapala sa ekamelu* ni laamba a exapala, ni aakhuura misoope nitho oravo wa ntuphini." 
Mark1:7 Vano, mutthengaawe waari ola: “Ottuliwaka anaawe Mutthu ooweraxa okipwaha miyo. Nkimphwanela okokhora weera kitaphule miraamba sa ikwakwaattasawe." 
Mark1:8 Miyo kinoopatisani ni maahi, mene Owo anoopatiseni ni Munepa Wootteela.”" 
Mark1:9 Ehuhuweene yeele, Yeesu aahoowa oNasarete elapo ya oGalileiya, ni aapatisiwa ni Yohaane muYordanu." 
Mark1:10 Akhumakaru Yeesu mmaahini, aahoona wiirimu ohuleiyeene ni Munepa omukhuruwelaka Yoowo ntoko ekhunda." 
Mark1:11 Vano naakhuma nsu na wiirimu neeraka: “Weyo ori Mwanaka ootthuneyaxa. Mwa Weyo, onkisiveliha!”" 
Mark1:12 Woowaakuveya Munepa waamweettiha Yeesu mpaka munikareni. 
Mark1:13 Weiwo aakhala mahuku miloko mixexe, eereriwaka ni Satana. Aakhala ni inama sa ntuphini, ni andyelo yaamurumeela." 
Mark1:14 Yohaane atthukiweene, Yeesu aarowa oGalileiya, alaleiyaka masu ooreeraxa a Muluku." 
Mark1:15 Owo anneera: “Yoophiya ehuhu! Omwene wa Muluku wookhuveela. Murukunxe murima, ni muroromele masu ooreeraxa!”" 
Mark1:16 Eettaka mukerekhere wa ephareiya ya oGalileiya, Yeesu aamoona Simeyoni ni munneiye Andreiya evonyeraka itthavi mphareiyani, niwoko yaari anamakoka." 
Mark1:17 Vano Yeesu aaweerela: “Mukitthare, ni Miyo kinimookhalihani anamakoka a atthu.”" 
Mark1:18 Woowaakuveya yaahiya itthavisaya ni yaamutthara. 
Mark1:19 Arowaka vahoolo vakhaani, Yeesu aamoona munikulani Yakobe, mwaana a Zebedeyo, ni munneiye Yohaane, erehereraka itthavisaya." 
Mark1:20 Woowaakuveya aawiitthana, ni awo yaamutthara, yaahiyaka atithaya ni anamiteko munikulani." 
Mark1:21 Awo yaarowa oKafarnawu, ni niphiyaka nihuku na eSaabadu, Yeesu aavolowa muSinagogani* ni aapacera oxuttiha." 
Mark1:22 Ootheene yaatikhina mwaha wa nihusihonawe, niwoko aaxuttiha ntoko Mutthu a ikuruxa, ohikhanle ntoko anamawera a nlamulo*." 
Mark1:23 Ehuhu emoharu yeeyo muSinagogani*, mulopwana aarino munepa woonanara aakhuwela:" 
Mark1:24 “Ontthuna eheeni ni hiyo, Yeesu a oNasarete? Waaweenle oniphwata? Koosuwela Weyo taani: ori Ootteela a Muluku.”" 
Mark1:25 Vano Yeesu aahiiha: “Omaaleke ni okhume mwa yoowo!” 
Mark1:26 Munepa woonanara waamutathaxa mulopwana ni waakhuma mwa yoowo okhuwelaka. 
Mark1:27 Ootheene yaatikhina, moota wooweera yaakohana: “Eheeni yeeyo? Nihusiho nnyowani, nitho ni ikuru! Owo onoolamula mpaka minepa soonanara, ni seiyo sinoomwiiwelela!”" 
Mark1:28 Vano ihaali mwaha wa Yeesu saamwaramwareiya woowaakuveya mweelaponi yootheene ya oGalileiya. 
Mark1:29 Woovenyani muSinagogani*, Yeesu aarowa vamoha ni Yakobe ni Yohaane mpaka vaate wa Simeyoni ni Andreiya." 
Mark1:30 Apwiyamwaanaawe Simeyoni yaari vabeettini, yaavihaka erutthu, ni oohusera yaamuleela Yeesu weera anoovoreiwa." 
Mark1:31 Yeesu aawaattamela, anaavara ntata, anaakhavihera weera yeemele. Oviha wa erutthu waamaala, ni awo yaapacera waarumeela." 
Mark1:32 Wiilaka, nsuwa nineenleene, muloko wa atthu waahaarongha wa Yeesu aretta ootheene ni atthu yaarino minepa soonanara." 
Mark1:33 Atthu ootheene a esidade yaathukumana vamulako," 
Mark1:34 ni Yeesu aahaalamiha ancipale yaahaawa ni iretta soohiyanahiyana. Aahoomolatho minepa soonanara sincipale, mene khaatthunihera weera iyo suulume, niwoko minepa iyo saasuwela weera Yeesu taani." 
Mark1:35 Oyaaka ni oxa, Yeesu aaheemela, aakhuma mpaani ni aarowa wa nipuro na meekhaawe, ni iwe aavekela." 
Mark1:36 Simeyoni ni asikhwaawe yaarowa weera yaamwaasaase," 
Mark1:37 ni emphwanyakaru, yaamweerela: “Ootheene anoowaasani.”" 
Mark1:38 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Nrowe wa nipuro nikina, wa mmittettheni soowaattamana, weera iwotho Miyo kalaleiye. Vano, Miyo kaarweenle yeeyo.”" 
Mark1:39 Owo aheetteetta elapo ya oGalileiya yootheene, alaleiyaka muSinagogani* ni oomolaka minepa soonanara." 
Mark1:40 Namakokho mmoha aamwaattamela Yoowo ni aamukokhorela amudyoonttelelaka: “Mwatthuna, munoowera okitteeliha.”" 
Mark1:41 Asareiyeene ni ikharari, Yeesu aahookola moono, anamutava, anamweerela: “Kinootthuna, mukhale ootteelihiwa.”" 
Mark1:42 Woowaakuveya makokho yaamuhiya, ni owo aatteelihiwa." 
Mark1:43 Woottharelana, Yeesu aamupwahiha yoowo ni aamooperera vancipale eeraka:" 
Mark1:44 “Moone, muhaaleele yeeyo akina, mene murowe ni mwiixoonihere wa musaserdoti* ni mwavahe sooveleela sa otteelihiwawanyu ntoko Moisesi aalamulenlaawe, weera eyo ekhale eneneero wa atthu.”" 
Mark1:45 Wa soothesene, owo aavenya, anapacera wuuluma mwaatthuni, amwaramwaxaka ihaali. Tivawo Yeesu khaawera ovolowatho hata esidade emoha, mene annakhala okerekhere, mmapuroni a meekhaawe. Hata hiiho, yannawa wa Yoowo atthu a ilapo sootheene." 
Mark2:1 Vahoolo wa mahuku vakhaani, areene veeli Yeesu oKafaranawu, atthu yaahiiwa wuulummwaka weera Owo aari owaani." 
Mark2:2 Vano atthu ancipale yaathukumana weiwe, moota wooweera khanaariwo nipuro, hata vaate wa vamulako, ni Owo aalaleera masu." 
Mark2:3 Yaahoowa atthu akina, engwiiheraka mutthu ooheetta ateexiweene ni asilopwana axexe." 
Mark2:4 Ehiweraka omuphiyera Yeesu niwoko na atthu ancipale, awo yaathamula mpatta wa nipatho na nipuro Yeesu aaraawe. Yaakuruxa nrepa aataleliwaawe mutthu ooheetta, evirihaka vanlakani nne yaapankaaya vanipathoni." 
Mark2:5 Oonaka nroromelonaya, Yeesu aamweerela mutthu ooheetta: “Mwaana, sootthekasanyu sooleveleliwa.”" 
Mark2:6 Yaakilaathi weiwe anamawera a nlamulo* akina, yuupuwelaka mmurimanimwaya moota ola:" 
Mark2:7 “Heeni Mulopwana Ola onuulumaawe hiiho? Owo onimveiha Muluku. Taani ongwera olevelela soottheka, ahikhanle Muluku paahi?”" 
Mark2:8 Woowaakuveya Yeesu aasuwela mmunepanimwawe weera awo yuupuwela yeeyo, ni aaweerela: “Heeni nyuwo munaapaanyu itthu iya mmurimanimwanyu?" 
Mark2:9 Yookhweya eheeni omweerela mutthu ooheetta: ‘Sootthekasanyu sooleveleliwa,’ hoye hoye ‘Muvenye, mukuxe nrepananyu ni mweette’?" 
Mark2:10 Vano weera musuwele weera Mwaana a mutthu ookhalano mweelaponimu ikuru weera alevelele soottheka....” Yeesu aamweerela mutthu ooheetta: 
Mark2:11 “Miyo kinooleelani: muvenye, mukuxe nrepananyu ni murowe owaani.”" 
Mark2:12 Owo aavenya, aakuxa nrepa ni aakhuma ooniwaka ni atthu ootheene. Ootheene yaatikhinaxa ni yaamvuwiha Muluku yeeraka: “Khaninatoko woona etthu ntoko yeela!”" 
Mark2:13 Yeesu aavenyatho mpaka mukerekhere wa ephareiya. Atthu ancipale yaamwaattamela, ni Owo aapacera waaxuttiha." 
Mark2:14 Aviraka weiwe, aamoona Leevi, mwaana a Alfeyu, akilaantheene vanipuroni naalivihiwa musoko, ni aamweerela: “Mukitthare!” Leevi aaheemela anamutthara." 
Mark2:15 Acaaka Yeesu ni oohuseraawe vaate wa Leevi, yeera ecaakatho anamaliviha a musoko ni anamattheka ancipale, niwoko yaari ancipale yaamutthara." 
Mark2:16 Anamawera a nlamulo* yaari aFarisi* emoonaka Yeesu acaaka ni anamattheka ni anamaliviha a musoko, yaahaakoha oohuseraawe: “Heeni Ola oncaawe ni anamaliviha a musoko ni anamattheka?”" 
Mark2:17 Iiwaka yeeyo, Yeesu aaweerela: “Khaahiyono yaale ari ni okumi animuhaawela meediku, mene aani aretta. Miyo nkaaweenle owiitthana oororomeleya, mene anamattheka.”" 
Mark2:18 Oohusera a Yohaane ni aFarisi* yeera etthukaka. Atthu akina yaahoowa wa Yeesu ni yaamukoha: “Heeni oohusera a Yohaane ni a aFarisi* antthukaaya, mene yaawo awinyu hoye?”" 
Mark2:19 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Khoongwereya otthuka oolattuliwa a namatthomera owo areene ni yaawo. Khoongwereya owo nlelo areene ni yaawo. 
Mark2:20 Vano eniikhale mahuku namatthomera aneeraawe avenxiwe wa yaawo, ni ehuhu eyo awo eniitthuke." 
Mark2:21 Khaawo onghela nipareyo nnyowani vakuwoni ya khalayi, niwoko nipareyo ninrowa otepiha waahuwa wa ekuwo." 
Mark2:22 Ni khaawo onghela eviinyu enyowani munrupani wa exapala wa khalayi. Ahela, eviinyu enoophula murupa wa exapala, ni hiiho eviinyu nitho murupa sinoonanariheya. Ohiyanawaya, onghela eviinyu enyowani munrupani munyowani.”" 
Mark2:23 eSaabadu emoha, Yeesu eera alapuwaka imatta sa etrigu. Yeettaka hiihaale, oohuseraawe yaapacera ovurula makala." 
Mark2:24 aFarisi* yaamukoha: “Moone, heeni awo ampakaaya yeeyo ehintthuniheriwa eSaabadu?”" 
Mark2:25 Owo aawaakhula: “Khamusomme yeele Davide aapankaawe ehuhuweene yeele owo ni asikhwaawe yaahaawaaya, ereene ni etala?" 
Mark2:26 Mmahukuni a Abiyatari, mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, owo aavolowa Mpaani mwa Muluku ni aahooca ipaawu sootteelihiwa, saatthuniheriwa paahi ociwa ni asaserdoti*, ni aahaavahatho asikhwaawe.”" 
Mark2:27 Vano Yeesu aaweerelatho: “eSaabadu epakeliwe atthu, ehikhanle atthu wa eSaabadu." 
Mark2:28 Tivawo Mwaana a mutthu ti Apwiya mpaka a eSaabadu.” 
Mark3:1 Ehuhu ekina Yeesu aavolowa muSinagogani*, ni aakhala mwemmwe mulopwana aarino ntata nimoha noorakala." 
Mark3:2 Akina a yaawo yannaasaasa nthowa weera emoothere Yeesu. Tivawo yaangwehexenxaaya weera yoone Owo aariki alamihe eSaabadu. 
Mark3:3 Yeesu aamweerela mulopwana oorakala ntata: “Mweemele ni ngwe eriyari va.” 
Mark3:4 Vano Yeesu aahaakoha: “Entthuniheriwa eheeni opaka eSaabadu: yooreera, hoye hoye yoonanara, ovuluxa okumi, hoye hoye wiiva?” Mene awosa yaamaala." 
Mark3:5 Anyoonyiweene, aahaaweha yaawo yaamurukureenre, ni athananihiweene vancipale niwoko na mirimasaya soowuuma, Owo aamweerela mulopwana: “Mookole ntatananyu.” Owo aahookola, ni ntata naalamihiwa." 
Mark3:6 Vano aFarisi* yaavenya ni yaapacera omvaanelela ni atthu a Herodi moota heeni yeeraaya emwiive Yeesu. 
Mark3:7 Yeesu aavenya ni oohuseraawe, arowaka ophareiyani. Atthu ancipale eweelaka oGalileiya yaamutthara." 
Mark3:8 Yiiwalaaya mwaha wa sootheene Owo aapakaawe, atthu ancipale eweelaka oYudeiya, oYerusaleemu, wIdumeiya, ilapo sa mukhwipi wa oYordanu ni sa mukerekhere wa oTiro ni oSidoni yaahoorwa wa Yoowo." 
Mark3:9 Hapo yaakhala atthu ancipale, Owo aahaalamulela oohuseraawe weera yaasaase nikula nikhaani weera ahaamaane ni atthu." 
Mark3:10 Vano Owo aahaalamiha ancipale, moota wooweera aretta yaamukakhana yeerelaka omutava." 
Mark3:11 Imaara sootheene saamoonaaya minepa soonanara Yeesu, saamukokhorela vahoolowawe sikhuwelaka: “Weyo Mwaana a Muluku!.”" 
Mark3:12 Vano Owo aalamulelaxa weera sihimuhime. 
Mark3:13 Yeesu aawela vamwaakoni ni aawiitthana yaawo aatthunaawe, ni awo yaahoorwa wa Yoowo." 
Mark3:14 Aahaathanla muloko neeli, aakhalihaka ntoko arummwa, weera ekhale ni Yoowo, ni erumihiwe olaleiya" 
Mark3:15 nitho weera ekhalane ikuru soowoomola minepa soonanara. 
Mark3:16 Vano, muloko neeli aathanlalaawe ti ala: Simeyoni (aamuttenghaawe nsina na Pedru)," 
Mark3:17 Yakobe, mwaana a Zebedeyo ni munneiye Yohaane (wa yaawo aattenghaawe nsina na Bowanergesi, entaphulela anamwane a etari)," 
Mark3:18 Andreiya, Filipe, Bartolomeyo, Matheyo, Tomaxi, Yakobe mwaana a Alfeyu, Tadaiyo, Simeyoni Zeloti*," 
Mark3:19 ni Yudasi Iskariyoti aamvarihale Yeesu. 
Mark3:20 Yeesu aavolowa mpaani, ni yaathukumanatho mwemmwe atthu ancipale, moota wooweera Owo ni oohuseraawe hata khayaawenre oca." 
Mark3:21 Yiiwalaaya amusaawe mwaha wa yeeyo, yaavenya weera emvenxe, niwoko yeera: “Owo naanepa.”" 
Mark3:22 Ni anamawera a nlamulo* yaarweenle oYerusaleemu yeeratho: “Owo ookhalano Beelzebuli. Ti ni ikuru sa muneene a minepa soonanara Owo onoomolaawe minepa soonanara.” 
Mark3:23 Vano Yeesu aawiitthana ni aawuulumela ni soolikanyiha: “Ongwereya hai Satana omoomola Satana? 
Mark3:24 Omwene wakawanyeiya muneenaayaru, khoongwereya opwaherera." 
Mark3:25 Vaate wakawanyeiya muneenaayaru, khoongwereyatho opwaherera." 
Mark3:26 Satana iiwananaka muneenaawe ni iikawanyiha muneenaaweru, khangwereya okhala; ommaleloniwawe woophiya." 
Mark3:27 Mwa yeeyo, khaawo ongwera ovolowa mpaani mwa mulopwana oolipa ni okuxamo sooreelasawe, ahinaaye toko omutthuka. Paahi hiiho onoowera omwiiyera empaawe." 
Mark3:28 Kinooleelani ni ekhaikhai weera onoowereya atthu waakhela elelevelo ya soottheka sootheene ni oveiha wootheene," 
Mark3:29 mene yoowo omveiha Munepa Wootteela, khanleveleliwaru: owo ookhalano nthowa na yoottheka yoohimala.”" 
Mark3:30 Yeesu uulumale yeeyo niwoko awo yeenre: “Ole ookhalano munepa woonanara.” 
Mark3:31 Yaaphiya amayawe ni axunneiye Yeesu. Ereene vaate, yaamurumiha mukina weera amwiitthane." 
Mark3:32 Yaakhala atthu ancipale ekilaantheene ni emurukureenreene Yeesu, awo yaamweerela: “Amayinyu ni axunninyu ari vaate ni anoowaasani.”" 
Mark3:33 Vano Owo aahaakoha: “Amayaka ni axunnaka taani?” 
Mark3:34 Aahaaweha atthu yaakilaanthi emurukureenreene ni aaweerela: “Va ari amayaka ni axunnaka. 
Mark3:35 Yoowo oniiwelela otthuna wa Muluku, owo ti munnaka, murokoraka ni amayaka.”" 
Mark4:1 Yeesu aapaceratho oxuttiha mukerekhere wa ephareiya. Yaathukumana emurukureenreene atthu ancipale, moota wooweera aavolowa munikulani ni mwemmo aakilaathi. Nikula naari mphareiyani, atthu ereene mukerekhere wa ephareiya." 
Mark4:2 Owo aahaaxuttiha itthu sincipale ni soolikanyiha, eeraka munihusihonimwawe:" 
Mark4:3 “Mwiiwe, namwaala aavenya weera aale." 
Mark4:4 Aalaka mmiso, mpatta mmoha waamorela mukerekhere wa ephiro, ni ipalame saahoowa ni saahooca." 
Mark4:5 Mpatta mukina waamorela vamasorosoroni yahaakhanlewo etthaya yincipale, ni woowaakuveya waamela, niwoko etthaya khayiixenre." 
Mark4:6 Naakhumalaaya nsuwa, mmiso ole waamenle waanyaala ni waahuuma, niwoko khawaarino mikwankhwaari." 
Mark4:7 Mpatta mukina waamorela vanyiiwani ni, sunnuwaka, saavuvura mmiso ole moota wooweera khawiimale." 
Mark4:8 Mpatta mukinatho waamorela vatthayani yooreera, waamela, waahunnuwa ni waahiima, ovahaka soohepha sooreera ophiyera mukina imaara miloko miraru, mukina imaara miloko mithannamosa ni mukinatho mpaka imaara ncira.”" 
Mark4:9 Woottharelana Yeesu aaheera: “Yoowo orino maaru oowiiwela, iiweke!”" 
Mark4:10 Yaapwahaaya atthu ancipale, muloko neeli ni yaawo yaari mukhwipimwawe Yeesu yaamukoha mwaha wa soolikanyiha seiye." 
Mark4:11 Owo aaweerela: “Wa nyuwo moovahiwa exiiri ya omwene wa Muluku, mene wa yaawo ari vaate, sootheene anleeliwa ni soolikanyiha" 
Mark4:12 weera: ‘hata yoonaka, khaanoonexexa, ni yiiwaka, khaaniiwexexa, weera ehirukunxe murima ni ehileveleliwe.’" 
Mark4:13 Vano Yeesu aahaakoha: “Nyuwo khamuniiwexexa yoolikanyiha ela? Vanonto, mmwiiwexexe hai yakhalaru yoolikanyiha ekina?" 
Mark4:14 Namwaala onaala masu. 
Mark4:15 Atthu akina ari yaawo mukerekhere ephiro weiwo masu yaalingwaaya. Yiiwaru masu, Satana onimoowa ni onoovenxa masu yaalingwe mwa yaawo." 
Mark4:16 Akina, ntoko mmiso woomisiwa vamasorosoroni, aniiwa masu ni woowaakuveya anaakhelela ni ohakalala." 
Mark4:17 Wa soothesene, woonaka weera awo khaanono mikwankhwaari asineenaaya, khaankhala ehuhu yincipale. Waakhumelelaka ohaawa, hoye hoye ottharatthariwa niwoko na masu, woowaakuveya anoohiya ale." 
Mark4:18 Akina ntoko mmiso woomisiwa vanyiiwani, aniiwa masu," 
Mark4:19 mene saaphiyaka sooweeteteela sa okumi ola ni olokottha wa opuha ni ohaawela itthu sikina, sinoovuvura masu, etatuxaka ale oohiima." 
Mark4:20 Atthu akina, ntoko mmiso woomisiwa vatthayani yooreera, aniiwa masu, anaakhulela ni anruwera soohepha sa imaara miloko miraru, imaara miloko mithannamosa ni mpaka imaara ncira.”" 
Mark4:21 Yeesu aaweerela: “Taani ongwiiha onyaari weera apopheelele owo ni elaata, hoye hoye vathi vabeetti? Hoye! Muniikaathi nipuro nootthuneya." 
Mark4:22 Vano, itthu sootheene sa wiiphiini nsithupululiwe, nitho itthu sootheene soovithiwa nsilaleiwe." 
Mark4:23 Mukina orino maaru oowiiwela, iiweke!”" 
Mark4:24 Yeesu aapwaherera eeraka: “Muupuweleke nnenesene yeeyo muniiwaanyu. Muringo munringelaanyu, nyuwo mmuringeliwe, ni mmwaandyeereriwetho." 
Mark4:25 Owo orino, onimwaandyeereriwatho. Owo ohikhalanne, mpaka yeeyo orinaawe onimwaakhiwa.”" 
Mark4:26 Owo aapwaherera eeraka: “Omwene wa Muluku onlikana ni mulopwana onaala mmiso vatthayani. 
Mark4:27 Ohiyu ni othana, akonaka, hoye hoye avenyaka, mmiso onoomela ni onimunnuwa, naari owo ahisuwelaka moota heeni." 
Mark4:28 Etthaya eneenaaya enooruwera etrigu: woopacera muropo, vahoolowaya nikala, ni ommaleloni inuku soosareya munikalani." 
Mark4:29 Yiitthwaru etrigu, mulopwana onoopacera waanyuula, niwoko yoophiya ehuhu ya ohepha.”" 
Mark4:30 Aaheeratho: “Nnilikanxe ni eheeni omwene wa Muluku? Yoolikanyiha heeni nneeraahu nivarele muteko weera nithalihe owo? 
Mark4:31 Ori ntoko enuku ya emostarda* eri ekhaani yoopwaha inuku sootheene sinaaliwa vatthayani. 
Mark4:32 Wa sootheesene, yaaliwaka, ela enimunnuwa ni enoothatuwa mwiri mutokotoko woopwaha nyiri sootheene sa nttimbeni ni iphandi sitokotoko, moota wooweera ipalame sa wiirimu sinoowera omaka mmunttuusinimwaya.”" 
Mark4:33 Ni soolikanyiha sincipale ntoko iya Yeesu aalaleera masu, yeeyo awo yaaweraaya wiiwexexa." 
Mark4:34 Khaaleela etthu, ohikhanle ni soolikanyiha. Vano, aakhalaawe ni oohuseraawe paahi, annaathalihera sootheene." 
Mark4:35 Vanihukuni nne, wiilaka, Owo aaweerela oohuseraawe: “Nrowe nilapuwele okhopela.”" 
Mark4:36 Yaahiyaka atthu ancipale, yaamukuxa munikulani mooteene yoowo aaraawe. Makula makinatho yaamuhoola." 
Mark4:37 Yaapacera ettheku, ni mitekuteku saavolowa munikulani moota wooweera nikula naahanle vakhaani osareya maahi." 
Mark4:38 Yeesu aari mpatta wa ottuli wa nikula akonaka, ni muruwaawe iikaathiyeene vakuwoni. Oohusera yaamvenxa ni yaakhuwela: “Muhusiha, khamumpwattha weera hiyo ninooriheya?”" 
Mark4:39 Owo aavenya, aahiiha epheyo ni aaheerela ephareiya: “Omaale ni wiikhalele.” Epheyo yaamaala, ni sootheene saakhala soomaaleleyaxa." 
Mark4:40 Vano aahaakoha oohuseraawe: “Heeni nyuwo munoovaanyu vancipale? Nlelo khamunroromela?” 
Mark4:41 Awo yaahoova vancipale ni yaakohana: “Ola taani? Mpaka epheyo ni ephareiya enoomwiiwelela!” 
Mark5:1 Awo yaalapuwa ephareiya ni yaarowa elapo ya oGeraseno. 
Mark5:2 Akhuruwakaru Yeesu munikulani, mutthu aarino munepa woonanara aahoowa wa Yoowo, akhumelelaka omahiyeni." 
Mark5:3 Mulopwana owo annakhala variyari wa mahiye. Khaawo yaangwera omutthuka, hata ni onyooro," 
Mark5:4 niwoko imaara sincipale yaamutthukaaya ni onyooro munaawoni ni mmatatani, mene owo annapasa onyooro ni iyuuma sa mmanaawoni. Khaawo aarino ikuru weera angwere." 
Mark5:5 Ohiyu ni othana owo anneetta variyari wa mahiye ni mattumuxa, akhuwelaka ni iithikilaka ni maluku." 
Mark5:6 Amoonakaru Yeesu ottaiwene, aatthimaka ni aamukokhorela vahoolowawe," 
Mark5:7 anakhuwela vancipale: “Nyuwo ni miyo muntthuna eheeni, Yeesu, Mwaana a Muluku musulusulu? Kinoodyoonttelelani ni Muluku weera muhikittaruxe.”" 
Mark5:8 Munepa ole wuulumale yeeyo niwoko Yeesu aaheerela: “Okhume wa mulopwana ola, munepa woonanara!”" 
Mark5:9 Vano Yeesu aakoha: “Nsinanawo taani?” Owo waamwaakhula: “Nsinanaka ti Elexawu*, niwoko nri minepa sincipale.”" 
Mark5:10 Ni munepa woonanara waamudyoonttelelaxa Yeesu weera Owo ahilamulele ovenya elapo ele. 
Mark5:11 Vano, nakupa mutokotoko a ikhumba eera acaaka vanttumuxani nookhuveela." 
Mark5:12 Minepa soonanara saamudyoonttelela Yeesu: “Munoomolele okhumbani weera navolowe mwemmo.” 
Mark5:13 Owo aatthunihera, ni minepa soonanara saakhuma ni saavolowa mukhumbani. Nakupa oophiyera macira miloko miili a ikhumba aatthimaka arowaka oxepani, anakhumbwela mpareiyani ni anamireiya mwemmo." 
Mark5:14 Yaawo yaakukhula ikhumba, yaatthawa ni yaathaliha itthu iye osidade ni mmamattani, ni muloko wa atthu waarowa weera woone yeeyo yeereiye." 
Mark5:15 Omwaattamelaka Yeesu, waamoona vaavaale mulopwana aarino Elexawu* ya minepa soonanara, akilaantheene, awanreene ni uupuwelaka nnenesene, ni waahoova." 
Mark5:16 Yaawo yoonne yaathalihera muloko wa atthu yeeyo yeereiye ni mulopwana ole aarino minepa soonanara, ni yaahuulumatho mwaha wa ikhumba." 
Mark5:17 Vano muloko wa atthu waapacera omudyoonttelela Yeesu weera avenye elapwaaya ele. 
Mark5:18 Yeesu avolowaka munikulani, mulopwana aarino minepa soonanara aamudyoonttelela weera amutthunihere orowa vamoha ni Yoowo." 
Mark5:19 Yeesu khaamutthunihenre, mene aamweerela: “Murowe owaani wa emusaanyu ni mwaaleele yeeyo Apwiya yoopankaayani, ni moota yoomorenlaayani ikharari nyuwo.”" 
Mark5:20 Mulopwana ole aarowa ni aapacera olaleiya elapo ya oDekapolisi yeeyo Yeesu aamupakenlaawe. Vano ootheene yaatikhina. 
Mark5:21 Ahokoleenleenetho Yeesu okhopela munikulani, atthu ancipale yaathukumana emurukureenreene Owo areene mukerekhere wa ephareiya." 
Mark5:22 Vano aaphiya vaavaale muhooleli mmoha a eSinagoga* iitthaniwa Yairu. Amoonakaru Yeesu, aamukokhorela inaawosawe" 
Mark5:23 ni aamudyoonttelela ni ovilela, eeraka: “Mwanaka muthiyana ohanle vakhaani okhwa. Dyoontte, murowe ni mwamwiikaathere matata weera alamihiwe ni akhale ni okumi.”" 
Mark5:24 Vanonto Yeesu aarowa ni yoowo. Atthu ancipale yaamutthara ni yaahaamaana ni Yoowo. 
Mark5:25 Aakhala vaavaale muthiyana mmoha aahaawa iyaakha muloko ni piili eretta ya okhuma ephome. 
Mark5:26 Annahaawa vancipale niwoko na weereriwa ni mameediku, ni aananariha sootheene aarinaawe, mene ohiya olama, aamweera otepa." 
Mark5:27 Owo iiwalaawe wuulummwa sa Yeesu, aaphiya ottuli wa Yeesu variyari wa atthu ancipale, anatava soowarasawe," 
Mark5:28 niwoko uupuwela: “Miyo paahi katavaru soowarasawe, kinoolama.”" 
Mark5:29 Woowaakuveya, yaamaala okhuma ephome, ni owo aahiiwelela mweerutthunimwawe weera aalama mohaawanimwawe." 
Mark5:30 Ehuhu emoharu yeele Yeesu aasuwela weera saakhuma ikuru wa Yoowo. Aahaarukunuwela atthu ancipale ni aahaakoha: “Taani otamve soowarasaka?” 
Mark5:31 Oohuseraawe yaamwaakhula: “Ngwoone atthu ancipale amaraanne variyariwanyu, ni munookohatho: ‘Taani okitamve?’”" 
Mark5:32 Yeesutho aapwaherera awehawehaka mukhwipimwawe weera amoone taani aapanke yeeyo. 
Mark5:33 Muthiyana asuwelaka yeeyo yaamukhumelenle, aamwaattamela, anamukokhorela inaawosawe, ni athukumelaka ni woova, anamuthalihera ekhaikhai yootheene."
