Mark5:34 Vano Owo aamweerela: “Mwaana, nroromelonanyu nohoolamihani. Murowe mmuretteleni ni mukhale oolamihiwa ni ohaawawanyu.”" 
Mark5:35 Yeesu nlelo eera uulumaka, yaaphiyalaaya atthu akina a muhooleli a eSinagoga*. Awo yaamweerela: “Mwaninyu ohookhwa. Khoontthuneyatho omuxupa Muhusiha.”" 
Mark5:36 Ahipwatthaka etthu yeeyo awo yeenraaya, Yeesu aamweerela muhooleli a eSinagoga*: “Muhoove, muroromele paahi.”" 
Mark5:37 Khaatthunihenre akina omutthara Yoowo, ahikhanle Pedru, Yakobe, ni axunneiye Yohaane." 
Mark5:38 Yaaphiyalaaya owannyawe muhooleli a eSinagoga*, Yeesu aaphwanya onyakula otokotoko ni atthu yiinlaka ni elalamikaka vancipale." 
Mark5:39 Vanonto aavolowa ni aaweerela: “Heeni onyakula otokotoko ni olalamika wu? Mwaana khakhwiiye, mene onookona.”" 
Mark5:40 Vaheera awo yaamutheiya. Awoomolakaru ootheene, aahaakuxa atithawe ni amayawe mwaana, ni oohusera yaari ni Yoowo. Aavolowa weiwo aaraawe mwaana." 
Mark5:41 Aamvara ntata anamweerela: “Talita kumi!” entaphulela: “Mwaamwali, Miyo kinoolamula weera ovenye!”" 
Mark5:42 Woowaakuveya mwaamwali, aarino iyaakha muloko ni piili, aavenya anapacera weetta. Eyo yaahaatikhinihaxa akina yaari mwemmo." 
Mark5:43 Owo aahaalamulelaxa weera ahikhale aneera asuwele, nitho weera emvahe etthu ace." 
Mark6:1 Yeesu aavenya vaavaale ni aarowa wa esidadaawe, ahooliwaka ni oohuseraawe." 
Mark6:2 Niphiyakaru nihuku na eSaabadu, aapacera oxuttiha muSinagogani*, ni ancipale yaamwiiwale, yaatikhina. Awo yannakohana: “Itthu seiya ophwannye woowi Mulopwana Ola? Miruku heeni ovahiwaawe weera mpaka apake sootikhiniha?" 
Mark6:3 Khahiyono Ola kalipinteiro, Mwaana a Mariya ni munna a Yakobe, Yoseete, Yudasi ni Simeyoni? Axirokoriye khaakhanle va ni hiyo?” Ni awo yaamunyoonyeriwa Yoowo." 
Mark6:4 Yeesu aaweerela: “Paahi mweelaponimwawe muneenaawe, variyari wa emusaawe ni vaatewawe, mprofeeti khanttittimiheya.”" 
Mark6:5 Ni khaawera opaka weiwo sootikhiniha, ohikhanle owiikaathera matata oovoreiwa akina ni waalamiha." 
Mark6:6 Ni Yeesu aatikhina mwaha wa ohiroromelawaya. Vano Yeesu aavenya eetteettaka mmittettheni, axuttihaka." 
Mark6:7 Awiitthanaka muloko neeli wa Yoowo, aahaarumiha eeli-eeli, ni aahaavaha ikuru soolamula minepa soonanara." 
Mark6:8 Malamulowaawe yaari ala: “Muhikuxe naari etthu mphironi, ahikhanle ttootto. Muhikuxe yooca, hata esaakho, naari musurukhu mmahotthanimwanyu." 
Mark6:9 Ngwareke ikwakwaatta, muhikuxetho mukaandyo wanaaveeli." 
Mark6:10 Imaara sootheene muneeraanyu mwavolowe vatthokoni, mwakhale weiwo mpaka ovenyawanyu." 
Mark6:11 Wakhala muttetthe wakhalaru oneera ohiwaakheleni, naari ohiwiiweni, mwatathe ntthupi na inaawosanyu, mwaavenyaka ntoko eneneero ya nthorihelonaya.”" 
Mark6:12 Awo yaavenya ni yaalaleiya weera muloko orukunxe mirimasaya. 
Mark6:13 Yaahoomola minepa soonanara sincipale ni yaahaattikitthela aretta ancipale ni makhura, ni yaahaalamiha." 
Mark6:14 Mwene Herodi aahiiwa suulummwaka itthu iye, niwoko Nsina na Yeesu naasuwanyeyaxa. Atthu akina yeera: “Yohaane mpatisa oovenyerera mookhwaani. Tivawo simpakeyaaya mwa yoowo ikuru sootikhiniheiya.”" 
Mark6:15 Akina yeeratho: “Owo ti Eliya,” ni akinatho yaanaakhulela yeeraka: “Owo ti mprofeeti ntoko maprofeeti a khalayi.”" 
Mark6:16 Iiwalaawetho Herodi itthu iye, aaheera: “Yohaane – mulopwana kaamuhitalaaka – oovenyerera mookhwaani.”" 
Mark6:17 Ti Herodi muneenaawe aavanghe nlamulo weera emvare Yohaane, emutthuke, ni engwalele mukaliposo, niwoko Herodi aathelanne ni Herodiya, mwaara a munneiye iitthaniwa Filipe." 
Mark6:18 Vano, waari niwoko Yohaane aamweerenlaawe Herodi: “Khamuntthuniheriwa okhala ni mwaara a munninyu.”" 
Mark6:19 Hiiho, Herodiya aamuthanya ni aatthuna omwiiva, mene khaawera opaka," 
Mark6:20 niwoko Herodi aamoova Yohaane ni aamwaakiha, asuwelaka weera aari mulopwana oororomeleya ni ootteela. Aamwiiwaawe Yohaane, aatikhinaxa. Waarookhalaru hiiho, annatthuna omwiiwa." 
Mark6:21 Nihuku nimoha yaaphiya ehuhu yootthuneya. Nihuku na wuupuwelela oyariwawawe, Herodi aahaavaha yooca ya efesta etokotoko ahooleli oottittimiheyaxa, ahooleli a anakhotto ni atthu oosunwanyeiyaxa a mweelaponi ya oGalileiya." 
Mark6:22 Avolowaka mwaana muthiyana a Herodiya ni iinalaawe, aamusiveliha Herodi ni oolattuliwa. Mwene aamweerela mwaamwali ole: “Okivekeleke yakhalaru etthu ontthunaawo, ni miyo kinimoovaha.”" 
Mark6:23 Ni aamuroromeliha ni olipela: “Yakhalaru etthu oneeraawo okivekele, miyo kinimoovaha, mpaka mpatta wa eriyari ya omwenaaka.”" 
Mark6:24 Owo aavenya ni aahaavekela amayawe: “Kivekele eheeni?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Muru wa Yohaane mpatisa.” 
Mark6:25 Woowaakuveya mwaamwali aahaakuveya weera amuleele mwene yeeyo aatthunaawe, eeraka: “Kintthuna vaanaano vaava weera mukivahe muru wa Yohaane mpatisa musasaanini.”" 
Mark6:26 Mwene aathananaxa vancipale, mene niwoko na olipela ni na oolattuliwa, khaatthunne okhootta yoovekela ya mwaamwali." 
Mark6:27 Hiiho aamurumiha nakhotto oowiiva weera amuruuhele muru wa Yohaane. Mulopwana aarowa, anamuhita Yohaane mukaliposo," 
Mark6:28 anaruuha muruwaawe musasaanini. Owo aamvaha muru mwaamwali ni owo aahaavaha amayawe. 
Mark6:29 Yiiwalaaya yeeyo, oohusera a Yohaane yaahoowa, yaakuxa muttembwaawe ni yaavitha munihiyeni." 
Mark6:30 Arummwa yaathukumana ni Yeesu ni yaamuthalihera sootheene yaapankaaya ni yaaxuttinghaaya. 
Mark6:31 Yaakhala atthu ancipale erowaka ni erwaaka, moota wooweera awo khayaarino ehuhu weera ece. Yeesu aaweerela: “Ngwe ni Miyo vanipuroni na wiiphiini, ni mwiitthuuwe vakhaani.”" 
Mark6:32 Hiiho awo yaasusa munikulani mpaka nipuro na wiiphiini. 
Mark6:33 Ancipaletho a yaale yaawoonne evenyaka, emusuwelaka Yeesu, yaatthimakela isidade sootheene ni yaaphiya weiwe Yeesu ahinaaye." 
Mark6:34 Avenyaka Yeesu munikulani ni awoonaka atthu ancipale, aahaamorela ikharari, niwoko yaari ntoko ikhondoolo soohikhalano mukukhuli. Vano aapacera waaxuttiha itthu sincipale." 
Mark6:35 Waari oxekuwa, tivawo oohuseraawe yaamwaattamenlaaya Yoowo, emweerelaka: “Nna nri nipuro na ottaiwene, ni wooxekuwa." 
Mark6:36 Mwaarumihe atthu weera erowe mmawaani ni mmittettheni soowaattamana weera yathume etthu yooca.” 
Mark6:37 Wa soothesene, Owo aawaakhula: “Mwaavahe nyuwo etthu weera ece.” Awo yaamweerela: “Eyo entthuneya idinaariyu* macira meeli! Ninanariheke musurukhu mwincipale ni ipaawu weera naavahe yooca?”" 
Mark6:38 Owo aahaakoha: “Murino ipaawu ihai? Ngwehe!” Ewehakaru, yaamweerela: “Ipaawu ithanu ni ihopa piili.”" 
Mark6:39 Vano Yeesu aahaalamula weera awo yaakilaathihe atthu ootheene mapuro mapuro munnyepuni. 
Mark6:40 Hiiho awo yaakilaathi mmapuroni, ekhalaka ncira ncira, naari miloko mithanu mithanu." 
Mark6:41 Akuxaka ipaawu ithanu ni ihopa piili ni awehaka wiirimu, aatthapela ni aameiyanya ipaawu. Vahoolowaya aahaavaha oohuseraawe weera yaakawele atthu. Ni aahaakawelatho ihopa piili ootheene." 
Mark6:42 Ootheene yaahooca ni yaavona," 
Mark6:43 ni oohusera yaathukumanyiha mipapara muloko ni miili soosareya mivithe sa ipaawu ni ihopa. 
Mark6:44 Yaaciiye yaari asilopwanaru macira miloko mithanu. 
Mark6:45 Vahoolo vakhaani, Yeesu aahaanyesereriha oohuseraawe weera evolowe munikulani ni ehoolele erowaka oBetisayida, Owo aalaxeraka atthu ancipale." 
Mark6:46 Aalaxenreene, Yeesu aawela vamwaakoni weera avekele." 
Mark6:47 Wiilaka, nikula naari eriyari ya ephareiya, ni Yeesu aahanle meekhaawe vatthayani." 
Mark6:48 Owo aawoona oohuseraawe ehaawanaka weettiha, niwoko epheyo yaaweela weiwo yaakelaayawo. Oyaaka ni oxa, Yeesu aarowa wa yaawo, eettaka vasulu wa ephareiya. Vanonto eeraka avire wa yaawosa." 
Mark6:49 Awo emoonakaru eettaka vasulu wa ephareiya, yuupuwela weera aari namanxepaani. Vano yaakhuwela," 
Mark6:50 niwoko ootheene yaamoona ni yaahookhwa maririmela. Woowaakuveyatho Yeesu aaweerela: “Mwiilipihere! Ti Yoomi. Muhoove!” 
Mark6:51 Aavolowa munikulani vamoha ni yaawo, ni epheyo yaamaala. Awo yaatikhinaxa, niwoko" 
Mark6:52 khayiiwexenxe yootikhiniha ya ipaawu, woonaka weera mirimasaya saari soowuuma." 
Mark6:53 Elapuwakaru ephareiya, yaaphiya oGenesarete, ni weiwo yaatthukelela nikula." 
Mark6:54 Evenyakaru munikulani, atthu yaamusuwela Yeesu." 
Mark6:55 Awo yanneetteetta elapo yootheene ele, ni yannaakuxa mmarepani aretta, yaaronghaka weiwo yiiwaaya weera Owo aakhalawo." 
Mark6:56 Mapuro ootheene aakhalaawewo, hata mmittettheni, musidade, mmawaani, awo yaawiikaathi aretta mmitthekoni sa mwemmo. Yannamudyoonttelela weera naari yaatamve mmakoteloni wa mukaandyowaawe. Vano, ootheene yaamutamve, yaalama." 
Mark7:1 aFarisi* ni akina a anamawera a nlamulo* erweelaka oYerusaleemu yaathukumana ni Yeesu. 
Mark7:2 Yaawoona oohuseraawe akina ecaaka ni matata oohitteela, eyo tiiyo woohinyawa." 
Mark7:3 Vano, aFarisi* ni aYuda ootheene khaanca ehinyangwe mmatatani, ettharihaka hiiho ekhovelelo ya asitokweene." 
Mark7:4 Yaahokolowaka omerekadu, khaanca ehinaaye onyawa. Antthariha ikhovelelo sikina sincipale ntoko orapiha ikoomixi, nyaapu ni ipirinka sa eyuuma." 
Mark7:5 Vano aFarisi* ni anamawera a nlamulo* yaamukoha Yeesu: “Heeni oohuseraanyu ahinttharihaaya ikhovelelo sa asitokweene, ecaaka yooca ni matata oohitteela?”" 
Mark7:6 Owo aawaakhula: “Mprofeeti Yesaya aahuuluma nnene mwaha wa nyuwo, anamwiixeera, aalempaawe: ‘Muloko ola onkittittimiha ni eyano, mene mirimasaya sookirakamela." 
Mark7:7 Ankilapa siiyo. Mahusihowaaya ari malamulo a atthu paahi.’ 
Mark7:8 Nyuwo munkhootta malamulo a Muluku ni muntthariha ikhovelelo sa atthu.” 
Mark7:9 Ni aaweerelatho: “Nyuwo munnavaanela nnenesene weera mukhootte malamulo a Muluku weera muttharihe ikhovelelosanyu. 
Mark7:10 Vano Moisesi aaheera: ‘Mwaattittimihe atithinyu ni amayinyu,’ ni ‘yoole onaaveiha atithawe, naari amayawe anaathorihiwe mpaka okhwa.’" 
Mark7:11 Nyuwotho munaakhulela mukina aweerelaka atithawe, naari amayawe: ‘yakhalaru ekhavihero nyuwo muneeraanyu mwaakhele wa miyo ti Korobani’ (eyo entaphulela: yootteeliheriwa Muluku)." 
Mark7:12 Hiiho nyuwo khamunimunyesereriha yoole waakwaniherela yakhalaru etthu atithawe, naari amayawe." 
Mark7:13 Hiihotho nyuwo munkhaliha a siiyo masu a Muluku ni ekhovelelowaanyu nyuwo mummwaramwaxaanyu. Mumpakatho itthu sincipale ntoko yeela.” 
Mark7:14 Yeesu aawiitthanatho atthu ancipale ni aaweerela: “Mukiiweke ootheene ni mwiiwexexe ela: 
Mark7:15 Kheewowo yakhalaru etthu eri omokoni wa mutthu eneera yavolowa mwa yoowo, enoowera omutatuxa oohitteela. Ohiyanawaya, ti yeeyo enkhuma mwa mutthu enimutatuxa oohitteela.”*" 
Mark7:16  
Mark7:17 Aahiyaka atthu ancipale ni evolowaka mpaani, oohusera yaamvekela Yeesu weera aathalihere yoolikanyiha ele." 
Mark7:18 Yeesu aahaakoha: “Weeraka nyuwotho khamungwera wiiwexexa? Khamunsuwela weera kheewo etthu emvolowa mwa mutthu engwera omtatuxa ole oohitteela? 
Mark7:19 Kheemvolowa mmurimanimwawe, mene munipwiipwini, ni vahoolo eniikhume.” Ahimaka yeeyo, Yeesu aaheera weera sooca sootheene ti sootteela." 
Mark7:20 Owo aapwaherera eeraka: “Itthu sinkhuma wa mutthu sinimutatuxa oohitteela. 
Mark7:21 Vano, ti wa mmurimani wa mutthu sinkhumaaya soowuupuwela soonanara, olavilavi, soowiiya, soowiiva, sooraruwa," 
Mark7:22 wiinlela mihakhu, soonanara murima, soolokottha, soohiisuumaaliha, nrima, waapa, wiixoona ni ololo." 
Mark7:23 Soonanara sootheene iya sinkhuma mpuwa ni sinimutatuxa mutthu oohitteela.” 
Mark7:24 Yeesu aavenya nipuro nne ni aarowa elapo ya oTiro. Aavolowa mpaani ni khaatthuna weera akina emusuwele. Wa soothesene, aahooceela wiivitha weera ahisuweliwe." 
Mark7:25 Mwa yeeyo, iiwakaru wuulummwa sa Yoowo, muthiyana mmoha, mwanawe muthiyana aarino munepa woonanara, aahoowa ni aahuuwela vanaawoniwawe." 
Mark7:26 Muthiyana ole aari muGrego, aayariwe oSiro-Fenisiya, ni aamdyoonttelela Yeesu weera oomole munepa woonanara wa mwanawe ole." 
Mark7:27 Owo aamweerela: “Mwaahiye toko weera anamwane ece mpaka evone, niwoko khoontthuneya ovenxa yooca ya anamwane ni waavonyera alapwa.”" 
Mark7:28 Owo aamwaakhula: “Apwiya, mene mpaka alapwa vathi vameesa anca inyenyeeri sa anamwane.”" 
Mark7:29 Vano Owo aamweerela: “Niwoko na yoowaakhula ela, nyuwo muroweke, munepa woonanara woovenya wa mwaninyu.”" 
Mark7:30 Owo aarowa owaani ni aamphwanya mwanawe iixaatalenleene vabeettini, ni munepa woonanara omuhiyaleene." 
Mark7:31 Vahoolowaya Yeesu aavenya mweelaponi mwa oTiro ni aaheetteetta oSidoni, mpaka ephareiya ya oGalileiya ni elapo ya oDekapolisi." 
Mark7:32 Weiwo atthu akina yaamuruuhela Yoowo mulopwana aari oohiiwa ni oohuuluma nnene, emudyoonttelelaka weera Owo amwiikaathere matata." 
Mark7:33 Amuronghakaru mulopwana okerekhere, ottaiwene wa atthu ancipale, Yeesu aamvoleiha ikathasawe mmaarunimwawe. Vahoolowaya, Yeesu aasenya, anatava nlumi na mulopwana," 
Mark7:34 anattukhula maitho, awehaka wiirimu, ni ahihimeraxaka, aamweerela mulopwana: “Efata,” entaphulela: “Muhuleiyeke!”" 
Mark7:35 Ni hiiho, maaru a mulopwana yaahuleiya, nluminawe naataphuleiya, ni owo aapacera wuuluma nnenesene." 
Mark7:36 Yeesu aahaalamula weera ehaaleele akina. Wa soothesene, atepaka waahiiha, awo yaatepaxatho wuuluma." 
Mark7:37 Muloko wa atthu waatikhinaxa ni waaheera: “Owo ompaka sootheene sooreera. Onoowera mpaka omwiiwiha oohiiwa ni omuulumiha oohuuluma.” 
Mark8:1 Wa mahuku ale yaathukumanatho atthu ancipalexa. Woonaka weera khayaarino etthu weera ece, Yeesu aawiitthana oohuseraawe ni aaweerela:" 
Mark8:2 “Kinaamorela ikharari atthu ancipale ala. Aamala mahuku mararu ereene ni Miyo ehicaaka. 
Mark8:3 Miyo kaalamulela orowa owaani ni etala, eniikomoke mphironi, niwoko akina a yaawo yaakhumme ottai.”" 
Mark8:4 Oohuseraawe yaamwaakhula: “Woowi aneeraawe aphwanye mutthu yooca yookwana waavaha atthu ancipale ala vanipuroni nna na ottai?” 
Mark8:5 Yeesu aahaakoha: “Ipaawu ihayi murinaanyu?”Awo yaamwaakhula: “Ithannapiili.” 
Mark8:6 Yeesu aahaalamula atthu ancipale weera ekilaathi vathi. Aakuxa ipaawu ithannapiili, ni atthapenleene, aameyanyiha ipaawu ni aahaavaha oohuseraawe weera yaakawele atthu ancipale, ni awo yaapaka hiiho." 
Mark8:7 Yaakhalanotho ihopa sikina sikhaanene. Owo aatthapelatho mooteene yoole, ni aaweerela oohuseraawe weera yaakawele." 
Mark8:8 Muloko wa atthu waahooca mpaka waavona. Ni yaathukumanyiha mipapara mithannamiili soosareya mivithe saahanle. 
Mark8:9 Yaakhalawo wookwanaka asilopwanaru macira miloko mixexe yaari vaavaale. Aalaxerakaru atthu ancipale," 
Mark8:10 Yeesu aavolowa munikulani vamoha ni oohuseraawe ni yaarowa elapo ya oDalmanutha. 
Mark8:11 aFarisi* yaahoowa ni yaapacera omukohakoha Yeesu. Etthunaka omweerera, yaamvekela eneneero ya wiirimu." 
Mark8:12 Aahihimeraxa ni aaweerela: “Heeni ekhapira ela emvekelaaya eneneero yootikhiniheiya? Miyo kinooleelani ni ekhaikhai weera hata eneneero emoha kheemvahiwa ela.” 
Mark8:13 Vano aasusa wa yaawo, anahokoleela munikulani analapuwela okhopela." 
Mark8:14 Oohusera yaattiwala okuxa ipaawu, ehikhanle epaawu emoha yaarinaaya munikulani." 
Mark8:15 Yeesu aawooperera oohusera eeraka: “Mukhale oowiisuwela, ni mwiipasoope wa eferementu ya aFarisi* ni ya atthu a Herodi.”" 
Mark8:16 Awo yaaheerelana yaaworu: “Ti niwoko na ohikhalanawahu epaawu?” 
Mark8:17 Asuwelaka wuulumawaya, Yeesu aahaakoha: “Heeni munuulumaanyu mwaha wa ohikhalanawanyu epaawu? Nlelo khamuniiwexexa, naari khamunsuwela? Mirimasanyu siri soowuuma?" 
Mark8:18 Nyuwo mookhalano maitho, vano khamunoona? Mookhalano maaru, vano khamuniiwa? Khamunuupuwelela?" 
Mark8:19 Kaameiyanyinghaaka ipaawu ithanu wa atthu macira miloko mithanu, mipapara mihayi saasareiye mivithe mwaathukumanyinghaanyu?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “muloko ni miili.”" 
Mark8:20 “Kaameiyanyinghaaka ipaawu ithannapiili wa atthu macira miloko mixexe, mipapara mihayi saasareiye mivithe mwaathukumanyinghaanyu?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Mithannamiili.”" 
Mark8:21 Owo aaweerela: “Nlelo khamuniiwexexa?” 
Mark8:22 Awo yaarowa oBetisayida, ni atthu akina yaamuruuhela Yeesu mutthu oohoona, emdyoonttelelaka weera amutave." 
Mark8:23 Owo aavara ntata na mutthu oohoona ni aamukhumihera vaate wa mmuttettheni. Amusenyelakaru mmaithoni mwa mulopwana ni amwiikaatherakaru matata, Yeesu aamukoha: “Nyuwo munimoona etthu?”" 
Mark8:24 Aahula maitho ni aamwaakhula: “Kingwoona atthu; awo anlikana ntoko nyiri seettaka.” 
Mark8:25 Yeesu aamwiikaatheratho matata mmaithoni mwa mulopwana. Vano maithwaawe yaahuliwa ni ohoonawawe waalamihiwa, ni owo aahoona sootheene nnenesene." 
Mark8:26 Yeesu aamurumiha owaani eeraka: “Muhivolowe mmuttettheni.” 
Mark8:27 Yeesu ni oohuseraawe yaarowa wa mittetthe soowaattamela sa oSesareya-Filipe. Yeettaka, Owo aahaakoha: “Atthu ankeera Miyo taani?”" 
Mark8:28 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Akina aneera Yohaane mpatisa, akina Eliya, ni akinatho mprofeeti mmoha.”" 
Mark8:29 Vano Yeesu aahaakoha: “Ankha nyuwo? Munkeera Miyo taani?” Pedru aamwaakhula: “Nyuwo ti Kristu.” 
Mark8:30 Yeesu aawooperera weera ehaaleele akina mwaha wa Yoowo. 
Mark8:31 Owo aapacera waaxuttiha weera waatthuneya Mwaana a mutthu ohaawa ni itthu sincipale, okhoottiwa ni asitokweene, ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni anamawera a nlamulo*, okhwa, ni ovenyerera nihuku nanaararu." 
Mark8:32 Owo aahuuluma nnenesene mwaha wa yeeyo. Vano Pedru, amwiitthanaka okhwipi, aapacera omooperera." 
Mark8:33 Wa soothesene, Yeesu aarukunuwa, aahaaweha oohuseraawe ni aamuhiiha Pedru, eeraka: “Osuseke wa Miyo, Satana! Weyo khoonuupuwela itthu sa Muluku, mene sa atthu.”" 
Mark8:34 Vano aawiitthana atthu ancipale vamoha ni oohusera ni aaweerela: “Akhala mukina ontthuna okitthara Miyo, iikhootte muneenaawe, akuxe muttandaawe ni akitthare." 
Mark8:35 Vanonto, yoowo ontthuna ovuluxa okumaawe, anaayeleele, mene yoowo ongyeleela okumi niwoko na Miyo ni na masu ooreeraxa, anaavuluxe yoowo." 
Mark8:36 yooreera heeni mutthu owina elapo yootheene, ayeleelakatho okumaawe?" 
Mark8:37 Hoye hoye mutthu anaavahe eheeni yoowaakakhanyiha ni okumaawe? 
Mark8:38 Akhala mukina variyari wa ekhapira yooraruwa ni yoottheka ela onuuliwa muru niwoko na Miyo, naari na maswaaka, Mwaana a mutthu anuuliwetho muru wa yoowo aawaaka vamoha ni andyelowaawe ootteela moovuwani mwa Atithawe.”" 
Mark9:1 Vano Yeesu aapwaherera eeraka: “Miyo kinoororomelihani weera akina ari va, kheerwa ekhwa hata vakhaani, ehinaaye woona omwene wa Muluku owaaka ni ikuru.”" 
Mark9:2 Amalihaka mahuku mathannamosa, Yeesu aamurowano Pedru, Yakobe ni Yohaane, ni aahaarongha vamwaako woorakamela, weiwo yaakhanlaaya yaawo paahi. Vale Owo aatatuxiwa ohoolowaya." 
Mark9:3 Ikuwosawe saathatuwa sootteelaxa moota wooweera khawoworu namakattha eera awere otteeliha. 
Mark9:4 Yaahiixoonihera ohoolowaya Moisesi ni Eliya, wa yaawo yaatthekula ni Yeesu." 
Mark9:5 Vano Pedru aamweerela Yeesu: “Muhusiha, ti wooreera okhala vaava hiyo. Nrowe nipake mikottha miraru: mmoha wa Nyuwo, mukina wa Moisesi ni mukina wa Eliya.”" 
Mark9:6 Owo khaasuwenle yeeyo yaatthuneya weera, niwoko yaahoova." 
Mark9:7 Vahoolowaya naahoowa nihutte nimoha ni naahaakhuneela. Wa nenne, naakhuma nsu nimoha neeraka: “Ola ti Mwanaka oosiveleya. Mmwiiwe Yoowo.”" 
Mark9:8 Wootutuxereya, ewehakaru mukhwipi, khayaamoonnetho mukina, ahikhanle Yeesu." 
Mark9:9 Ekhuruwaka vamwaako, Yeesu aawooperera weera ehaaleele akina yeeyo yoonnaaya, mpaka ehuhuweene yeeyo Mwaana a mutthu aneeraawe avenyerere mookhwaani." 
Mark9:10 Awo yaavitha mwaha ole yaaleru, evaanyihanaka entaphulela eheeni “ovenyerera mookhwaani.”" 
Mark9:11 Awo yaamukoha: “Heeni anamawera a nlamulo* aneeraaya weera ontthuneya toko Eliya orwa?” 
Mark9:12 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Mwa yeeyo, Eliya onimoowa toko ni onooreherera itthu sootheene. Vano, heeni elempwalaaya weera ontthuneya Mwaana a mutthu ohaawa vancipale ni okhoottiwa?" 
Mark9:13 Mene Miyo kinooleelani: Eliya ohoowa, ni awo yaampakela yoowo sootheene seiyo yaatthunaaya, ntoko elempwalaaya mwaha wa yoowo.”" 
Mark9:14 Yaaphiyalaaya weiwo yaaraayawo oohusera akina, yaawoona atthu ancipalexa yaarukureenreene ni anamawera a nlamulo* evaanyihanaka ni yaawo." 
Mark9:15 Emoonakaru Yeesu, atthu ancipale yaatikhina ni yaamutthimakela weera yamuulumihe." 
Mark9:16 Yeesu aahaakoha: “Eheeni mumvaanyihanaanyu?” 
Mark9:17 Mulopwana mmoha eriyari ya atthu ancipale aamwaakhula: “Muhusiha, kihoowiiherani mwanaka orino munepa onimuhiiha wuuluma." 
Mark9:18 Imaara sootheene munepa onimvaraaya, onoomvonyera vathi. Owo onnakhuma nimpheru mmwaano, onnakhuuriha maino, ni erutthwaawe ennakhala yoowuuma. Kohaavekela oohuseraanyu weera yoomole munepa, mene yaahooceela.”" 
Mark9:19 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Ekhapira yoohiroromela! Ihuhu ihayi kineeraaka kikhale ni nyuwo? Mpaka yaakhani kineeraaka koovileleni? Mukiwiihere mmiravo.” 
Mark9:20 Vano awo yaangwiihera. Omoonakaru munepa Yeesu, woowaakuveya waamuthukumeliha mwaana. Mwaana ole aamorela vathi ni aapacera wuupuruwa, akhumihaka nimpheru mmwaano." 
Mark9:21 Yeesu aahaakoha atithawe mwaana: “Opacenre yaakhani eeraka hiiha?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Opacenre areene mwaana. 
Mark9:22 Imaara sincipale munepa wannamvonyera mmooroni ni mmaahini weera omwiive. Mwawera opaka etthu, munimorele ikharari ni munikhavihere.”" 
Mark9:23 “Mwawera?” Yeesu aamweerela. “Sootheene singwereya wa yoowo onroromela.” 
Mark9:24 Woowaakuveya atithawe mwaana yaakhuwela: “Koororomela, mukikhavihere owina ohiroromelawaka.”" 
Mark9:25 Yeesu awoonaka atthu ancipale ekhuveelaka, aahiiha munepa woonanara, eeraka: “Munepa woohuuluma ni woohiiwa, Miyo kinoolamula weera okhume wa yoowo, ni ohimvolowetho mwaana ola.”" 
Mark9:26 Munepa waakhuwela, onamutatha, onavenya. Mwaana aakhala ntoko muttembo, moota wooweera atthu ancipale yaaheera: “Ohookhwa.”" 
Mark9:27 Yeesutho aamvara ntata, anamvenxa, ni owo aneemela." 
Mark9:28 Yeesu avolowaka mpaani, oohuseraawe yaamukoha wiiphiini: “Heeni nihiwenraahu woomola?”" 
Mark9:29 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Moota ola omvenya paahi ni ovekela.” 
Mark9:30 Awo yaavenya nipuro nne ni yaaheetteetta oGalileiya. Yeesu khaatthuna weera akina ehikhale oosuwela weiwo yaaraayawo," 
Mark9:31 niwoko eera aahusihaka oohuseraawe. Vano aaweerela: “Mwaana a mutthu anaavahereriwe mmatatani mwa atthu. Awo eniimwiive, ni akhwiyeene mahuku mararu, anaavenyerere.”" 
Mark9:32 Mene awosa khayiiwexenxe yeeyo aatthunaawe ohima, ni yaamuhovela omukoha." 
Mark9:33 Yaaphiya oKafaranawu. Areene owaani, aahaakoha: “Eheeni mwaavaanyihanaanyu mphironi?”" 
Mark9:34 Mene awosa yaamaala, niwoko mphironi yaavaanyihana mwaha wa mutokweene taani?" 
Mark9:35 Aakilaanthaawe, Yeesu aawiitthana muloko neeli aweerelaka: “Akhala mukina ontthuna okhala oopacera, akhaleke oomalihera, ni murumeiyi a atthu ootheene.”" 
Mark9:36 Vano, amukuxaka mwaana, aamweemexa eriyaraaya. Amukhubaaraka, aaweerela:" 
Mark9:37 “Yoowo ommwaakhela mwaana mmoha ntoko ola mwa Nsinanaka, onkaakhela Miyo. Ni yoowo onkaakhela Miyo, khankaakhela Miyo, mene Yaale akiruminghe.”" 
Mark9:38 Yohaane aamweerela Yeesu: “Muhusiha, naamoona mutthu oomolaka minepa soonanara mwa Nsinananyu. Naaheerera omooceeliha, niwoko owo khahiyono awihu.”" 
Mark9:39 Yeesu aamweerela: “Muhimooceelihe. Khaawo ompaka yootikhiniha mwa Nsinanaka, ongwera okuulumela vahoolo vakhaani." 
Mark9:40 Vano, yoowo ohiittanne ni hiyo, onoonikhalela hiyo." 
Mark9:41 Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: yoowo onoovahani ekoomixi emoha ya maahi mwa Nsinanaka niwoko muri aKristu, vekhaikhai kharwa ayeleela ntthuvelonawe." 
Mark9:42 Akhala mukina onimutthekiha mmoha a asikhaani ala ankiroromela Miyo, waari fataari ovonyeriwa mphareiyani ni nluku ntokotoko ntthukeleliweene vaxiko." 
Mark9:43 Ntatananyu nootthekihani, mukwituleke. Fataari ovolowa mookumini oorakaleene, ohikhanle mureeneno matata meeli orowa mmooroni, weiwo mooro ohimmalaaya." 
Mark9:44  
Mark9:45 Nnaawonanyu nootthekihani, mukwitule. Fataari ovolowa mookumini oorakaleene, ohikhanle mureeneno inaawo piili ovonyeriwa mmooroni." 
Mark9:46  
Mark9:47 Niithonanyu nootthekihani, muzoole. Fataari ovolowa moomweneni wa Muluku ni niitho nimoha paahi, ohikhanle mureeneno maitho meeli, ovonyeriwa mmooroni," 
Mark9:48 weiwo nyuungusaya sihinkhwaayawo ni mooro ohinciphaayawo. 
Mark9:49 Ootheene eniyeeleeliwe ni mooro. 
Mark9:50 Maakha ti ooreera. Osivawayatho wamala, eniyeeleeliwe hai maakha ale? Mukhalane maakha mwa nyuwo muneenaanyu, ni mukhale ni murettele mukina ni mukhwaawe.”" 
Mark10:1 Vano Yeesu aavenya vaavaale ni aarowa wa elapo ya oGalileiya ni okhopela wa oYordanu. Yaahoowatho atthu ancipale wa Yoowo, ni ntoko aakhovelenlaawe, Owo aahaaxuttiha." 
Mark10:2 Akina a aFarisi* yaamwaattamela Yoowo weera emweerere, emukohaka: “Enootthuniheriwa wa mulopwana omwalana ni mwaariye?”" 
Mark10:3 Yeesu aahaakoha: “Eheeni Moisesi oolamulenlaaweni?” 
Mark10:4 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Moisesi aatthunihera weera mulopwana amvahe ekaratta ya omwalana ni amoomoleke mwaariye.” 
Mark10:5 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Moisesi aalempe nlamulo nne niwoko na murimaanyu woowuuma. 
Mark10:6 Ompacereronitho wa ephattuwelo, Muluku aampaka mulopwana ni muthiyana." 
Mark10:7 Niwoko na yeeyo mulopwana anaahiye atithawe ni amayawe ni anaathukumane ni mwaariye," 
Mark10:8 ni ooweeli awo eniithatuwe mmoha paahi. Hiiho awo khaahiyono eeli, mene mmoha paahi." 
Mark10:9 Tivawo yaawo Muluku aathukumannyaawe, ahikhale mukina aneera aamwaramwaxe.”" 
Mark10:10 Areenetho owaani, oohusera yaamukohakoha Yeesu mwaha wa yeeyo." 
Mark10:11 Owo aawaakhula: “Khula mulopwana ommwalana ni mwaariye ni onthelana ni muthiyana mukina, anaamuraruwele muthiyana yoole oopacera," 
Mark10:12 ni muthiyana amwalana ni iyawe ni atheliwa ni mulopwana mukina, anaararuwetho." 
Mark10:13 Akina yaangwiihera Yeesu anamwane weera aatave, mene oohusera yaahaahiiha." 
Mark10:14 Oonaka yeeyo, Yeesu aanyoonyiwa ni aaweerela: “Mwaahiyeke anamwane eweeke wa Miyo, ni muhiwooceelihe, niwoko omwene wa Muluku ori wa yaale anlikana ntoko yaawo." 
Mark10:15 Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: Yoowo ohinaakhela omwene wa Muluku ntoko mwaana, khanrowa ovolowa moomweneni.”" 
Mark10:16 Vahoolowaya, aahaakhubaara anamwane, anawiikaathera matata anaareeliha." 
Mark10:17 Yeesu eeraka avenye, mulopwana mmoha aamutthimakela Yoowo, anamukokhorela anamukoha: “Muhusiha ooreera, kipakeke eheeni weera kiphwanye okumi woohimala?”" 
Mark10:18 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Heeni nyuwo munkiitthanaanyu ‘ooreera’? Khaawo ooreera mukina, ahikhanle mmoha paahi, ori Muluku." 
Mark10:19 Nyuwo moosuwela malamulo: Muhiive, muhiraruwe, muhiiye, muhoothe, muhilokotthe, mwaattittimihe atithinyu ni amayinyu.”" 
Mark10:20 Vano owo aahima: “Muhusiha, ootheene ala kiniiwelela okhuma enamwanaaka.”" 
Mark10:21 Yeesu aamuweha, aamusivela ni aamweerela: “Yohoohaleelani etthu emoha paahi. Murowe, mwathumihe sootheene murinaanyu, mwaavahe seiyo oohaawa, ni mmwikhaleno muhakhu wiirimu. Vahoolowaya, ngwe ni mukitthare.”" 
Mark10:22 Iiwalaawe yeeyo, aathananaxa ni aasusa oohihakalala, niwoko aakhalano mihakhu sincipale." 
Mark10:23 Yeesu aaweha mukhwipimwawe ni aaweerela oohuseraawe: “Ti woorikaxa anamapuha ovolowa moomweneni wa Muluku!” 
Mark10:24 Oohusera yaatikhina ni masu ala. Yeesutho aaphitela eeraka: “Anamwane, ti woorikaxa ovolowa moomweneni wa Muluku." 
Mark10:25 Ti wookhweiya ekamelu* ovira vamwiitheni wa singano, ohikhanle namapuha ovolowa moomweneni wa Muluku.”" 
Mark10:26 Oohusera yaatepaxa otikhina, ni yaakohana: “Vamwaheene yoola, taani aneera avuluxiwe?”" 
Mark10:27 Yeesu aahaaweha yaawo ni aahaakhula: “Wa mutthu khoongwereya, mene wa Muluku hoye! Itthu sootheene sinoowereya wa Muluku.”" 
Mark10:28 Vano Pedru aamweerela: “Hiyo noohiya sootheene ni nohoottharani.” 
Mark10:29 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: ootheene ahiyale empaaya, axunnaya, axirokoraya, amayaya, atithaya, anamwanaaya ni imattasaya mwaha wa Miyo ni wa masu ooreeraxa," 
Mark10:30 eniyaakhele hata ehuhu ya vaanaano vaava imaara ncira sa impa, axunna, axirokora, amaayi, anamwane ni imatta, ni vamoha ni seiya osoondiwa. Vano mweehuhuni mwa muhoolo eniyaakhele okumi woohimala." 
Mark10:31 Wa soothesene: ancipale ari oopacera eniikhale oomalihera, ni oomalihera oopacera.”" 
Mark10:32 Awo yaarowa oYerusaleemu, ni Yeesu aahoolela. Oohusera yaatikhina, ni yaawo yaamutthara yaahoova. Owo aawiitthanatho muloko neeli vakhwipi, ni aahaaleela yeeyo yeera emukhumelele." 
Mark10:33 Owo aaweerela: “Hiyo nneera nirowaka oYerusaleemu, ni Mwaana a mutthu anaavahereriwe wa ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni anamawera a nlamulo*. Awo eniimuthorihele okhwa ni eniimvaherere wa amalapo," 
Mark10:34 mwa yaawo eniimveihe, eniimusenyele, eniingwaxule, ni eniimwiive. Yaamalaka mahuku mararu, anaavenyerere.”" 
Mark10:35 Vano Yakobe ni Yohaane, anamwane a Zebedeyo, yaamwaattamela Yoowo, yeeraka: “Muhusiha, nintthuna weera munipakele yeeyo nneeraahu noovekeleni.”" 
Mark10:36 Yeesu aahaakoha: “Muntthuna eheeni weera Miyo koopakeleni?” 
Mark10:37 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Munitthunihere weera moovuwanimwanyu, hiyo nakilaathi mmoha moonowaanyu mulopwana ni mukina muthiyana.”" 
Mark10:38 Yeesu aaweerela: “Khamusuwenle yeeyo mumvekelaanyu. Munoowera owura ekoomixi kingwuraaka, hoye hoye opatisiwa ni opatiso Miyo kimpatisiwaaka?”" 
Mark10:39 “Ninoowera,” awo yaamwaakhula. Vano Yeesu aaweerela: “Nyuwo mmwiwure ekoomixi kingwuraaka, ni mmwipatisiwe ni opatiso Miyo kimpatisiwaaka." 
Mark10:40 Okilaathitho moonowaaka mulopwana, hoye hoye muthiyana, nkihiyono Miyo kinlamula. Mapuro ala ari awaya yaale areherereliwe.”" 
Mark10:41 Akina muloko, yiiwalaaya itthu iye, yaamunyoonyeriwa Yakobe ni Yohaane." 
Mark10:42 Yeesu aawiitthana ni aaweerela: “Nyuwo moosuwela weera yaale aniitthaniwa anamalamula a ilapo, anaalamula atthu a weiwo, ni asitokweenaaya anaanyeserera ni ikuru." 
Mark10:43 Khoontthuneya hiiho ni nyuwo. Ohiyanawaya, yoowo ontthuna okhala mutokweene a variyariwanyu, ontthuneya weera akhale murumeiyaanyu." 
Mark10:44 Yoowo ontthuna okhala oopacera, ontthuneya weera akhale epottha ya ootheene." 
Mark10:45 Hata Mwaana a mutthu khaaweenle weera arumeeliwe, mene aani arumeele, ni weera avaherere okumaawe ntoko yoowoopola ancipale.”" 
Mark10:46 Vano yaaphiya oYeriko. Yeesu ni oohuseraawe nitho atthu ancipale akhumaka musidade, Bartimeyo, mwaana a Timaiyo, aari oohoona, eera akilaantheene mukerekhere wa musewe, avekelaka soovaha." 
Mark10:47 Iiwalaawe weera aari Yeesu muNasarete, aapacera okhuwela: “Yeesu, mwaana a Davide, mukimorele ikharari!”" 
Mark10:48 Ancipale yaamuhiiha weera amaale, mene owo aatepa okhuwela: “Mwaana a Davide, mukimorele ikharari”!" 
Mark10:49 Yeesu aaheemela ni aaheera: “Mmwiitthane owo.” Ni yaamwiitthana mutthu oohoona emweerelaka: “Mulipihe murima! Muvenyeke, Owo onoowiitthanani.”" 
Mark10:50 Avonyeraka malayaawe okhwipi, aaheemela atuphaka ni aarowa wa Yeesu." 
Mark10:51 Vano Yeesu aamukoha: “Eheeni muntthunaanyu weera Miyo koopakeleni?” Mutthu oohoona aamwaakhula: “Muhusiha, miyo kintthuna woona.”" 
Mark10:52 “Muroweke,” Yeesu aamweerela, “nroromelonanyu nohoolamihani.” Woowaakuveya aalama oohoona, ni aamutthara Yeesu mphironi." 
Mark11:1 Yaakhuveenlaaya oYerusaleemu ni ephiyaka oBetefage ni oBetaniya, wookhuveela omwaako wa Sooliveira, Yeesu aahaarumiha oohusera eeli" 
Mark11:2 aweerelaka: “Murowe mmuttettheni ori ohoolowanyu. Mwaavolowakaru, munoomphwanya buuru mwaaxaana atthukiweene, mwa yoowo khaawo atonke ongwela. Mwamutaphule ni mukiwiihere." 
Mark11:3 Mukina ookohani: ‘Heeni mumpakaanyu yeeyo?’ mwamuleele: ‘Apwiya anoomutthuna ni eniimuhokoloxe woowaakuveya.’” 
Mark11:4 Awo yaarowa ni yaamphwanya buuru mwaaxaana mmuseweni, atthukeleliweene vamulako. Emutaphulaka," 
Mark11:5 akina yaari vaavaale yaahaakoha: “Mumpaka eheeni nyuwo, muntaphulaka buuru mwaaxaana ola?”" 
Mark11:6 Oohusera yaahaakhula ntoko Yeesu aaleenlaawe, ni awo yaahaahiya erowaka." 
Mark11:7 Yaamuruuhela Yeesu buuru mwaaxaana, yaamvonyera mikaandyosaya, ni Yeesu aangwela." 
Mark11:8 Ancipale yaahaatala mikaandyosaya mphironi. Akina yaamwaramwaxa iphandi yaathikinlaaya mmatta. 
Mark11:9 Yaawo yaahoolenle ni yaawo yaamutthanre yaakhuwela: “Hosana*! Ooreelihiwa ti Yoowo ongwa mwa Nsina na Apwiya! 
Mark11:10 Wooreelihiwa ti omwene wa atithihu Davide onrwa. Hosana* musulusulu!” 
Mark11:11 Yeesu aaphiya oYerusaleemu, anavolowa Mpaani mwa Muluku. Aaweha sootheene sa mukhwipimwawe, ni weenre wakhalaka oxekuwa, aavenya arowaka oBetaniya vamoha ni muloko neeli." 
Mark11:12 Oxaawaya, evenyaka oBetaniya, Yeesu aavoliwa etala." 
Mark11:13 Oonaka ottaiwene mwiri wa efiigu ni makukhu, aarowa weera oone saakhanleene soowiima sa efiigu. Aattamelaka, khaaphwannye etthu, ehikhanle makukhu, niwoko kayaahiyono ehuhu siniimaaya soowiima sa efiigu." 
Mark11:14 Vano aaheerela: “Khaawo anaacetho soowiimasanyu.” Oohuseraawe yaamwiiwa uulumaka yeeyo. 
Mark11:15 Aphiyaka oYerusaleemu, Yeesu aavolowa Mpaani mwa Muluku, ni mwemmwe aapacera owoomola yaathuma ni yaathumiha. Aapittula meesa a anamaceendya a musurukhu ni ihice sa anamathumiha ikhunda." 
Mark11:16 Khaatthunihera weera ahikhale aneera ateexe itthu soothumiha Mpaani mwa Muluku. 
Mark11:17 Ni aahaaxuttiha eeraka: “Kheelempwe: ‘Empaaka eniyiitthaniwe Empa ya Mavekelo wa miloko sootheene?’ Vano nyuwo mootatuxa nikhuku na anamwiiya!” 
Mark11:18 Ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni anamawera a nlamulo* yaahiiwa masu ala ni yaapacera waasaasa mukhalelo weera emwiive, niwoko yaamoova, yeenre atthu ootheene ale yatikhinaka ni oxuttihawawe." 
Mark11:19 Wiilaka, awo yaavenya osidade." 
Mark11:20 Oxeexelo, yeettaka hiihaale, yaahoona mwiri wa efiigu wuumaleene okhuma mikwankhwaarisaya." 
Mark11:21 Uupuwelelaka Pedru, aamweerela Yeesu: “Muhusiha, moone! Mwiri wa efiigu mwalamphaanyu, wohuuma!”" 
Mark11:22 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Munroromele Muluku. 
Mark11:23 Kinoororomelihani weera mukina eerela mwaako ola: ‘Mvenye ni mwiivonyere mphareiyani,’ ni owo aahihovela mmurimanimwawe, mene aroromela weera sinimweereiya seiyo aahimaawe, hiiho nsimweereele." 
Mark11:24 Tivawo, kinooleelani: sootheene mumvekelaanyu munivekeloni, muroromele weera mohaakhela, ni hiiho mmwivahiwe." 
Mark11:25 Mwaavekelaka, mwakhalano mulattu ni mukina, munlevelele weeratho Atiithi ari wiirimu yooleveleleni sootthekasanyu." 
Mark11:26  
Mark11:27 Yaaphiyatho oYerusaleemu. Aviraka Yeesu Empa ya Muluku, yaamwaattamela Yoowo ahooleli a asaserdoti*, anamawera a nlamulo* ni asitokweene a muloko, ni yaamukoha:" 
Mark11:28 “Ni ikuru heeni mumpakaanyu itthu iya? Ni taani yoovangheni ikuru weera mpake iya?” 
Mark11:29 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Miyotho kinimookohani etthu: Mukaakhule, ni kinimooleelani ni ikuru heeni kimpakelaaka itthu iya." 
Mark11:30 Opatiso wa Yohaane waari wa wiirimu, hoye hoye wa atthu? Mukileele!”" 
Mark11:31 Awo yaavaanyihana yaaworu, yeeraka: “Neera ‘wa wiirimu,’ Owo onoonikoha: ‘Vano, heeni mwahaamuroromenlaanyu yoowo?’" 
Mark11:32 Vanonto, neera: ‘wa atthu…’” Awo yoova muloko wa atthu niwoko ootheene yaamweerela vekhaikhai weera Yohaane aari mprofeeti." 
Mark11:33 Awo yaamwaakhula Yeesu: “Khanisuwenle.” Vano Yeesu aaweerela: “Hata Miyo nkinooleelani ni ikuru heeni kimpakelaaka itthu iya.” 
Mark12:1 Owo aapacera waaleela ni soolikanyiha: “Mutthu mmoha aaphatteiya ematta ya iwuuva*. Aapaka mukuso orukureenreene. Aapakatho nipuro noovotta iwuuva*. Vahoolowaya aapaka nipuro na anamalipelela. Vano aawooliha ematta ya iwuuva* anamalima akina, anarowa ni mukwahaawe." 
Mark12:2 Yaaphiyalaaya ehuhu ya ohepha, aamurumiha murumeiyi mmoha wa anamalima weera aakhele mpatta mmoha wa iwuuva*." 
Mark12:3 Vano awo yaamvara, enammana, enamoomola woohikuxa etthu." 
Mark12:4 Vano aahaarumihela murumeiyi mukina, ni yaammana mmurumwawe ni yaamuhasula." 
Mark12:5 Nlelo aahaarumihela mukina, vaheera yaamwiiva. Annaarumiha akina ancipale – akina anamalima yaahaamana, akina yaawiiva." 
Mark12:6 Muneene aahalanotho mmoha weera amurumihe: mwanawe oosiveleya. Woomaliha aamurumiha mwanawe, uupuwelaka: ‘Eniimuttittimihe mwanaka.’" 
Mark12:7 Anamalimatho yaaheerelana yaaworu: ‘Ola ti namarandela a mwaneene. Ngwe, nrowe nimwiive, ni emattaawe eniikhale yawihu.’" 
Mark12:8 Hiiho awo yaamvara, enamwiiva, enamvonyera okerekhere wa ematta ya iwuuva*." 
Mark12:9 Vano, anaapake eheeni mwaneene a ematta ya iwuuva*? Anaawe ni anaawiive anamalima ale, ni anaavahe akina ematta ya iwuuva*." 
Mark12:10 Khamunasome mBibiliyani: ‘Nluku anamateka yaakhoonttaaya naathatuwa nluku noottittimiheyaxa. 
Mark12:11 Apwiya yaapanke yeeyo ni ti yootikhiniha vamaithoniwahu.’” 
Mark12:12 Vano yaapacera waasaasa mukhalelo weera yaamvare, niwoko yaasuwela weera aahima yaale athalihaka yoolikanyiha ele. Yaahoovatho muloko wa atthu, tivawo yaamuhiyalaaya ni yaattimula." 
Mark12:13 Vahoolowaya yaamurumihela Yeesu akina a aFarisi* ni a Herodi weera emvare Yeesu ni maswaawe. 
Mark12:14 Awo yaamwaattamela Yoowo ni yaamweerela: “Muhusiha, noosuwela weera muri Oororomeleya ni khamumviriyeliwa ni akina niwoko khamunthalu, mene munxuttiha ephiro ya Muluku mweekhaikhaiyini. Ontthuneya oliva musoko wa Seesari, naari hoye? Niliveke, hoye hoye naari?”" 
Mark12:15 Yeesutho, asuwelaka wiixeerawaya, aahaakoha: “Heeni muneereraanyu okiphariha mutaphani? Mukiwiihere edinaariyu* emoha weera Miyo koone.”" 
Mark12:16 Awo yaangwiihera nikhoobiri, ni Owo aahaakoha: “Ecaambulo ela ni yoolempwa ela yawani?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Ya Seesari.”" 
Mark12:17 Vano Yeesu aaweerela: “Ya Seesari, mumvahe Seesari, ni ya Muluku, mumvahe Muluku.” Ni yaatikhina mwaha wa Yoowo." 
Mark12:18 Vano aSaduki*, aneera weera khoowowo ovenyerera, yaamwaattamela Yoowo ni yookoha ela:" 
Mark12:19 “Muhusiha, Moisesi aalepa weera, munna a mulopwana akhwa ni aahiya amwaariye oohikhalano mwaana mulopwana, munneiye owo athelane ni naamukhweli owo weera amuyarele munneiye anamwane asilopwana." 
Mark12:20 Yaakhala axunna athanneeli. Oopacera aathela ni aahookhwa woohimuhiya mwaana mulopwana. 
Mark12:21 Anaaveeli aathelanatho ni naamukhweli, menetho aahookhwa woohimuhiya mwaana mulopwana. Mooteene yoowo yaamukhumelelatho anaararu." 
Mark12:22 Wa athanneeli khaawo aamuhingye mwaana mulopwana. Woomalihera, aahookhwatho naamukhweli." 
Mark12:23 Moovenyererani, muthiyana owo anaakhale mwaara a taani a asilopwana athanneeli, awo yeenre athanneeli ootheene yamuthelaka yoowo?”" 
Mark12:24 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Nyuwo mootapanya, niwoko khamusuwenle Yoolempwa*, hata ikuru sa Muluku." 
Mark12:25 Moovenyererani, atthu khaanthela, hata khaanthelana, mene ari ntoko andyelo a wiirimu." 
Mark12:26 Mwaha wa ovenyerera akhwiiye, nyuwo khamusomme elivuru ya Moisesi, mwaandiisini a niphuwa, moota Muluku aamweerenlaawe Moisesi: ‘Miyo ti Muluku a Abrahaamu, Isaaki ni Yakobe’?" 
Mark12:27 Owo khahiyono Muluku a akhwiiye, mene a akumi. Nyuwo mootapanya vancipale!”" 
Mark12:28 Mmoha a anamawera a nlamulo* aamwaattamela ni aawiiwa evaanyihanaka. Uupuwelaka weera Yeesu aawaakhula nnene, aamukoha: “Nlamulo heeni noottittimiheyaxa noopwaha ootheene?”" 
Mark12:29 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Noopwaha ootheene ti nna: ‘Mwiiwe aYixrayeli, Apwiya Mulukwaahu ti Apwiya amoharu." 
Mark12:30 Mwaasivele Apwiya Mulukwaanyu ni murimaanyu wootheene, okumaanyu wootheene, wuupuwelawanyu wootheene ni ikurusanyu sootheene.’" 
Mark12:31 Nanaaveeli ti nna: ‘Munsivele mukhwiinyu ntoko muniisivelaanyu.’ Khaawowo malamulo makina oopwaha yaala.” 
Mark12:32 Mulopwana aamweerela: “Ti wooreera, Muhusiha! Ti ekhaikhai mweenraanyu weera Muluku ti mmoharu, ni khawowo mukina, ahikhanle Yoowo." 
Mark12:33 Omusivela Muluku ni murimaanyu wootheene, wuupuwelawanyu wootheene ni ikurusanyu sootheene, ni omusivela mukhwiinyu ntoko muniisivelaanyu, ti wootthuneyaxa oopwaha sooveleela soohisiwa ni soovaha sootheene.”" 
Mark12:34 Uupuwelaka weera owo aahaakhula ni miruku, Yeesu aamweerela: “Khamukhanle ottai wa omwene wa wiirimu.” Evenyero vaavaale mpaka muhoolo, khaawo yeerenre omukohatho." 
Mark12:35 Axuttihaka Mpaani mwa Muluku, Yeesu aahaakoha: “Niwoko heeni anamawera a nlamulo* aneeraaya weera Kristu ti mwaana a Davide?" 
Mark12:36 Davide muneenaawe, eettihiwaka ni Munepa Wootteela, aaheera: ‘Apwiya yaaweerela Apwiyaaka: ‘Mukilaathi moonowaaka mulopwana mpaka Miyo kineeraaka kiwiikaathi amwiittanaanyu vathi wa inaawosanyu.’" 
Mark12:37 Davide muneenaawe ommwiitthana ‘Apwiya.’ Moota heeni aneeraawe akhale Kristu mwanawe?” Ni atthu ancipalexa yaamwiiwa ni ohakalala. 
Mark12:38 Axuttihaka, Yeesu aaheera: “Mwiipasoope ni anamawera a nlamulo*. Awo antthuna weetta ni soowara sooreeraxa ni wuulumihiwa mwaatthuni." 
Mark12:39 Antthunatho waakamela mapuro ootthuneyaxa muSinagogani* ni mapuro oottittimiheya a ifesta. 
Mark12:40 Awo anca impa sa asinaamukhweli, ni amvekelaxa moota woowiixeera. Awo eniyaakhele nthorihelo noonanaraxa.”" 
Mark12:41 Yeesu aakilaathi ohoolo wa maala mwemmwe saaheliwaaya soovaha. Aahaaweha atthu ancipale ehelaka musurukhu mmaalani mwa soovaha. Anamapuha ancipale yaavonyeramo musurukhu mwincipale. 
Mark12:42 Vano naamukhweli mmoha oohaawa aaphiya, anahela makhoobiri meeli ooyevaxa, eyo tiiyo, waari musurukhu vakhaani woohitthuneyaxa." 
Mark12:43 Awiitthanaka wa Yoowo oohuseraawe, Yeesu aaweerela: “Kinooleelani weera naamukhweli ola oohaawa oohela mmaalani a soovaha vancipale woowaapwaha akina." 
Mark12:44 Ootheene aavonyera mwemmo paahi mpatta wa musurukhwaaya mwincipale, vaheera ola oovonyeramo moohaawanimwawe sootheene aarinaawe weera akhale.”" 
Mark13:1 Akhumaka Mpaani mwa Muluku, mmoha a oohuseraawe aamweerela: “Muhusiha, moone maluku matokotoko ni soopakiwa sooreeraxa!”" 
Mark13:2 Yeesu aamukoha: “Munimoona sootheene soopakiwa sooreeraxa iya?” Va khanirwa nikhala nluku vasulu vanluku – sootheene nsiphwatiwe.” 
Mark13:3 Yeesu akilaathiyeene vamwaakoni wa Sooliveira ohoolo wa Empa ya Muluku, Pedru, Yakobe, Yohaane ni Andreiya yaamukoha vakhwipi:" 
Mark13:4 “Munileele yaakhani sineeraaya seereiye itthu iya? Ni eniikhale eneneero heeni yoowoonihera weera sootheene iyo sihanle vakhaani okwaniheriwa?” 
Mark13:5 Yeesu aaweerela: “Mwiipasoope weera ahikhale aneera oolokottheni. 
Mark13:6 Ancipale animoowa mwa Nsinanaka yeeraka: ‘Ti miyo,’ ni eniyaalokotthe ancipale." 
Mark13:7 Mwiiwaka sa ikhotto ni suulummwaka sa ikhotto, muhoove. Ontthuneya weera itthu iyo seereiye, mene nlelo khoohiyono ommaleloni." 
Mark13:8 Elapo ni elapo eniiwane, aani omwene ni omwene. Onuukhale otetereiya mmapuroni makina, nitho etala. Itthu iyo siri epacerero ya ovoreiya wa oyara." 
Mark13:9 Nnene, niwoko munoovahereriwa wa alipa oowuuluma milattu ni munoomaniwa muSinagogani*. Nyuwo munooronghiwa ohoolo wa asitokweene ni mamwene niwoko na Miyo weera mwaakhalele onamoona yaawo." 
Mark13:10 Ni ontthuneya toko weera masu ooreeraxa ekhale oolaleiwa wa miloko sootheene. 
Mark13:11 Imaara sootheene muneeraanyu muvonyeriwe okaliposo ni muronghiwe woothorihiwani, muheeteteele yeeyo muneeraanyu mwahime. Mwahime paahi yeeyo muneeraanyu mwavahiwe ehuhuweene yeeyo, niwoko khamuhiyono nyuwo muneera muulume, mene Munepa Wootteela." 
Mark13:12 Munna mmoha anaamvarihe munneiye, amvahereraka mookhwaani, ni mooteene yoowo anaapake tiithi ni mwanawe. Anamwane eniiwane ni asinaangolo, ni mpaka eniiwiive." 
Mark13:13 Mmwithanyiwe ni atthu ootheene niwoko na Nsinanaka, mene yoowo anaavilele mpaka ommaleloni onoovuluxiwa." 
Mark13:14 Nyuwo moonaka etthu yoonanaraxa yoowuulihaxa muru yiikaathiweene vanipuroni ehintthunihiwaaya – namasoma, iiwexexe – vano yaawo eneera ekhale oYudeiya, etthawele nnyaakoni." 
Mark13:15 Yoowo aneera akhale vanipathoni na empaawe, ahikhuruwe, hata ahivolowe weera akuxe etthwaawe mwemmo." 
Mark13:16 Yoowo aneera akhale omatta, ahihokolowe weera akuxe mukaandyowaawe." 
Mark13:17 Hapo oowoopihaxa eniikhale mahukweene yaawo wa yaale asimaayi eniirupale ni wa asimaayi eneera yaamwiheke! 
Mark13:18 Muvekele weera itthu iyo siheereiye ehuhu ya mulaala," 
Mark13:19 niwoko mahukweene yaawo eniikhale mahuku a ohaawaxa ntoko kheeneereiye okhuma ehuhuweene yeele Muluku aapattunxaawe elapo ya vathi mpaka vaanaano vaava, hata kheerwa yeereiyatho." 
Mark13:20 Yahaavukunle Apwiya mahuku awo, khaawo eera avuluxiwe. Vano, niwoko na oothanliwa Awo yaathanlalaaya, Apwiya yaavukula ehuhuweene yeeyo." 
Mark13:21 Akhala mukina aneera aweereleni: ‘Mmoone, Kristu ori va!,’ hoye hoye ‘mmoone, ori vale!,’ muhimuroromele!" 
Mark13:22 Vano, eniikhumelele akristu ni maprofeeti oowootha eneera epake ineneero ni sootikhiniha weera, wawereya, yaalokotthe mpaka oothanliwa." 
Mark13:23 Tivawo, nnene. Miyo koowoopererani ehinaaye." 
Mark13:24 Wa mahukweene yaawo, waamalaka ohaawaxa iwo, ‘nsuwa khanirwa noopa, ni mweeri khoorwa waaratho." 
Mark13:25 Ithenyeeri nsimore wiirimu, ni ikuru sa wiirimu nsittikinyeye.’" 
Mark13:26 Ehuhuweene yeeyo anooniwe Mwaana a mutthu awaaka mmahutteni ni ikuru sitokotoko ni ovuwaxa," 
Mark13:27 ni Owo anaarumihe andyelowaawe ni eniyaathukumanyihe oothanliwaawe wa ilapo sootheene, okhuma ekotenle elapo ya vathi mpaka ekotenle erimu." 
Mark13:28 Muxuttere wa mwiri wa efiigu osoma wu: iphandisaya sakhala sikithi ni makukhwaaya yaaphuwaka, munoosuwela weera eyiita yookhuveela." 
Mark13:29 Hiihotho, moonaka itthu iyo seereiyaka, musuwele weera Owo ori vakhiviru – vamulako!" 
Mark13:30 Miyo kinoororomelihani: ekhapira ela kheenrowa ovira mpaka sootheene iyo seereiye. 
Mark13:31 Wiirimu ni vathi onuuvire; maswaakatho kheerwa evira. 
Mark13:32 Mwaha wa nihuku nno ni ewoora eyo khaawo onsuwela, hata andyelo a wiirimu, hata Mwaana, ehikhanle Atiithi paahi." 
Mark13:33 Nnene! Mwiipasoope! Nyuwo khamusuwenle eneeraaya erwe ehuhuweene yeeyo. 
Mark13:34 Ori ntoko mulopwana ompwaha ni mukwahaawe. Owo onghiya empaawe, amuhiyeraka murumeiyi ti murumeiyi ni mutekwaawe, ni onimulamula namalipelela milako weera alipelele." 
Mark13:35 Tivawo, mulipelele, niwoko khamusuwenle ewoora heeni mwaneene a vaate aneeraawe awe – hata okhalaka wiilaka, naari ohiyu eriyari, naari oyaaka ni oxa, hata oxeexelo." 
Mark13:36 Owo awa Wootutuxereya, ahoophwanyeni mukonaka!" 
Mark13:37 Yeeyo kinooleelaakani, kinaaleelatho ootheene: mwiipasoope!”" 
Mark14:1 Yaahala mahuku meeli paahi mpaka nihuku na mPaska* ni efesta ya ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu. Ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni anamawera a nlamulo* yeera yaasaasaka mukhalelo mmoha weera emvare Yeesu ni maswaawe, ni emwiive." 
Mark14:2 Yaaheeratho: “Mmahukuni a efesta – hoye! Weera ohikhumelele onyakuleleiya wa muloko.” 
Mark14:3 Areene Yeesu oBetaniya akilaantheene vameesa owannyawe mulopwana oosuweliwa ntoko Simeyoni, namakokho, aamwaattamela Yeesu muthiyana mmoha ni mukoomba woopakiwa ni alabastre, ereenemo makhura oowunkhelaxa ni oorikaxa a nardu* ootteela. Owo aapwexa mukoomba ni aamuyehera Yeesu mmuru." 
Mark14:4 Akina yaari vaavaale yaapacera ottaandawulelana yeerelanaka: “Heeni onanariheya wu wa makhura? 
Mark14:5 Makhura ala yaaheereke othumihiwa ni idinaariyu* macira mararu, ni musurukhu owo yaaheereke ovahiwa atthu oohaawa.” Ni awo yaamoopopiha vancipale." 
Mark14:6 Yeesutho aaweerela: “Munghiye mmuretteleni! Heeni munimuxupaanyu ola? Owo ookipakela etthu yooreera. 
Mark14:7 Vano, atthu oohaawa eniikhale ni nyuwo mahuku ootheene ni ehuhu yootheene mwaatthunaka munoowera waakhavihera, mene Miyo nkinkhala ni nyuwo mahuku ootheene." 
Mark14:8 Owo oopaka yeeyo owenraawe. Oorihela makhura mweerutthunimwaka ehinaaye weera areherere ovithiwawaka. 
Mark14:9 Miyo kinoororomelihani weera, mapuro ootheene yaawo weiwo masu ooreeraxa eneeraaya elaleiwe, mweelaponi yootheene, yeeyotho owo opankaawe eniithalihiwe mpaka wuupuweleliwawawe.”" 
Mark14:10 Vano Yudasi Iskariyoti, mmoha a muloko neeli, aarowa wa ahooleli a asaserdoti* weera amvarihe Yeesu." 
Mark14:11 Awo yaahakalala yiiwalaaya yeeyo, ni yaamuroromeliha musurukhu. Hiiho owo aasaasa ehuhu yootthuneya weera amvaherere." 
Mark14:12 Vanihukuni noopacera na efesta ya ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu, ehuhu yookhoveleliwa wiiva eputtiputthi ya mPaska*, oohusera a Yeesu yaamukoha: “Muntthuna woowi Nyuwo weera hiyo nooreherereleni yooca ya mPaska*?”" 
Mark14:13 Vano Owo aahaarumiha eeli a oohuseraawe aweerelaka: “Mwavolowe musidadeni, ni munoomphwanya mulopwana akunxeene mwaapu wa maahi. Mwamutthareke" 
Mark14:14 ni mwamuleele mwaneene empa owo aneeraawe avolowe: ‘Muhusiha onookoha: Nri woowi nipuronaka mwa nenno Miyo kineeraaka kimuce mPaska* ni oohuseraaka?’ 
Mark14:15 Owo onoowooniherani nipuro ntokotoko na vasulu ni meesa ni ihice, sootheene soolikana. Mwanirehererele weiwo.”" 
Mark14:16 Oohusera yaavenya, yaavolowa musidadeni, enaphwanya sootheene ntoko Yeesu aaleenlaawe. Ni yaamureherera mPaska*." 
Mark14:17 Wiilaka, Yeesu aaphiya vamoha ni muloko neeli." 
Mark14:18 Yaacaaya ekilaantheene vameesa, Yeesu aaweerela: “Kinooleelani vekhaikhai weera mmoha a nyuwo onookivariha, mukina onca ni Miyo.”" 
Mark14:19 Awo yaathanana ni mmoha-mmoha aamweerela: “Vekhaikhai nkihiyono miyo!?” 
Mark14:20 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Ti mmoha a muloko neeli, yoole onruweya epaawu vamoha ni Miyo esasaani emoharu yeela." 
Mark14:21 Mwaana a mutthu anaavarihiwe ntoko elempwalaaya mwaha wa Yoowo, mene Ii! Onoohaawa yoole anaamvarihe Mwaana a mutthu! Fataari mulopwana owo ahaayariwe!”" 
Mark14:22 Ecaaka, Yeesu aakuxa epaawu, anatthapela, anameiyanya, anaavaha oohusera eeraka: “Mukuxeke, ela ti erutthwaaka.”" 
Mark14:23 Vahoolowaya aakuxa ekoomixi, anatthapela, anaavaha oohusera ni ootheene yaawura." 
Mark14:24 Ni aaweerela: “Ela ti ephomaaka ya wiiraana eyeeheriwe, mwaha wa ancipale." 
Mark14:25 Miyo kinooleelani weera nkingwuratho wa yoowiima ya ematta ya iwuuva* mpaka nihuku nenno kineeraaka kiwure moomweneni wa Muluku.” 
Mark14:26 Emalihaka wiipa ecipo emoha, yaakhuma erowaka omwaako wa Sooliveira." 
Mark14:27 Yeesu aaweerela: “Ootheene nyuwo munookihiya, niwoko elempwe: ‘Kinoomuvulaliha mukukhuli, ni ikhondoolo nsimwareye.’" 
Mark14:28 Kaavenyereraka, kinoorowa ohoolowanyu oGalileiya.”" 
Mark14:29 Pedru aaheera: “Hata ootheene yoohiyeeni, miyo nkinoohiyani!”" 
Mark14:30 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Kinoororomelihani weera olelo va, ohiyuweene yoola, ohinaaye wiipa nthupi imaara piili, munookiruna imaara tthaaru.”" 
Mark14:31 Pedrutho aanyeserera, eeraka: “Hata otthuneyaka okhwa ni Nyuwo, miyo nkinoorunani.” Ni ootheene akina yaahima yeeyo." 
Mark14:32 Vano yaarowa wa nipuro niitthaniwa Gesemani, ni Yeesu aaweerela oohuseraawe: “Mukilaathiki va, Miyo kirowaka ovekela.”" 
Mark14:33 Yeesu aamurowano Pedru, Yakobe ni Yohaane, ni aapacera othanana ni oripiwa murima." 
Mark14:34 Aaweerela: “Munepaaka woosareya othananaxa omalela okhwa. Mukhaleke va ni mulipelele.” 
Mark14:35 Arowaka vahoolo vakhaani, aahuuramela vathi ni aavekela weera wawereya, asusihiwe wa Yoowo ewooreene yeele," 
Mark14:36 eeraka: “Aba, Tiithi, wa Nyuwo sootheene sinoowereya. Mususihe wa Miyo ekoomixi ela, wa soothesene, ohikwaniheriwe otthunawaka, mene otthunawanyu.”" 
Mark14:37 Vano aahokoleela wa oohuseraawe ni aahaaphwanya ekonaka. Owo aamweerela Pedru: “Simeyoni, nyuwo munookona? Khamungwera olipelela hata ewoora emoha?" 
Mark14:38 Mulipelele ni muvekele, weera muhivolowe ngweereriwani. Munepa ori woolikaneene, mene erutthu yoohilipa.”" 
Mark14:39 Aasusatho ni aavekela moota mmoharu. 
Mark14:40 Aahokolongwaawe, aahaaphwanyatho ekonaka, niwoko yaamooseela. Awo khayaasuwenle etthu yeeraaya ehime." 
Mark14:41 Ahokolowaka emaara yanaararu, Owo aaweerela: “Nyuwo nlelo munookona ni munimwiitthuuwa? Wookwana! Yoophiya ehuhu. Moone, Mwaana a mutthu onoovahereriwa mmatatani mwa anamattheka." 
Mark14:42 Muvenye ni nrowe. Iwe onimoowa namavarihaaka.” 
Mark14:43 Yeesu nlelo uulumaka, aaphiya Yudasi, mmoha a muloko neeli. Vamoha ni yoowo yaari atthu ancipale ekunxeene mavaka ni ikopo, yaarumihiwe ni ahooleli a asaserdoti*, anamawera a nlamulo* ni asitokweene a muloko." 
Mark14:44 Namavariha aavaanenle eneneero ni yaawo: “Yoole miyo kineeraaka kamuulumihe ni ebeecu, ti Yoowo. Mumvare ni munlipihe.”" 
Mark14:45 Arowaka woowaakuveya wa Yeesu, Yudasi aamweerela: “Muhusiha!” ni aambeeca." 
Mark14:46 Atthu yaamvara Yeesu ni yaamulipiha. 
Mark14:47 Vano mmoha a yaale aari vakhiviru aatholola ekatana ni aamvulaliha murumeiyi a mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, amukwasaka naarunawe." 
Mark14:48 Yeesu aaweerela: “Niwoko na heeni nyuwo mungwaanyu okivara mukuxaleene ikatana ni ikopo? Apaale Miyo kinaalamula atthu weera ewane ni ebooma? 
Mark14:49 Mahuku ootheene Miyo kaari ni nyuwo kixuttihaka Mpaani mwa Muluku, ni nyuwo khamwaakitthunke. Ontthuneyatho weera Yoolempwa* ekwaniheriwe.”" 
Mark14:50 Vano ootheene yaamuhiya ni yaatthawa. 
Mark14:51 Mmiravo mmoha, awanreene ekuwo mweerutthuni paahi, eera amuttharaka Yeesu. Yeereraka omvara," 
Mark14:52 aatthawa pwitipwiti, ahiyaka ekuwo ottuli." 
Mark14:53 Yaamurongha Yeesu wa mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, ni yaathukumanatho ahooleli a asaserdoti*, asitokweene a muloko ni anamawera a nlamulo*." 
Mark14:54 Pedru aamutthara ottaiwene mpaka vaate wa mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*. Akilaantheene weiwe ni anamalipelela, eera ooraka vamooroni." 
Mark14:55 Ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni ootheene a eSineedriyu* yaahaasaasa mathowa a Yeesu weera emuthorihele okhwa, mene khayaaphwannye hata nthowa nimoha." 
Mark14:56 Ancipale yaakhalela onamoona mwaha wa Yoowo moota woolokottha, mene maswaaya khayeererana." 
Mark14:57 Vano akina yaaheemela ni yaamoothera moota woolokottha: 
Mark14:58 “Hiyo naamwiiwa eeraka: ‘Miyo kinoophwata Empa ya Muluku epakiwe ni atthu, ni wa mahuku mararu kinooteka ekina yoohipakiwa ni atthu.’”" 
Mark14:59 Hata hiihotho, maswaaya khayeererana." 
Mark14:60 Vano aaheemela mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* ohoolowaya, ni aamukoha Yeesu: “Nyuwo khamunaakhula seiyo awo angwootheraayani nyuwo?”" 
Mark14:61 Yeesutho aamaala ni khaamwaakhunle etthu. Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* aamukohatho: “Nyuwo ti Kristu, Mwaana a Muluku ooreelihiwa?”" 
Mark14:62 Yeesu aamwaakhula; “Ti Yoomi. Nyuwo mmwimoone Mwaana a mutthu akilaantheene moono mulopwana wa Muluku a ikuru sootheene awaaka mmahutteni a wiirimu.” 
Mark14:63 Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, aahulaka ikuwosawe, aakoha: “Khaninaatthuna anamoona akina!" 
Mark14:64 Nyuwo mohiiwa oveiha! Munuupuwela hai?” Ootheene yaathoriha weera Yeesu omphwanela okhwa. 
Mark14:65 Vano akina yaapacera omusenyela, yaamutthuka maitho ni emmanaka Yoowo, yaamweerela: “Otthome!” Ni anamalipelela yaamwaakhela Yoowo, emmanaka." 
Mark14:66 Pedru areene vathi, vaate, murumeiyi muthiyana mmoha a mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* aavira vaavaale." 
Mark14:67 Amoonaka Pedru ooraka, aangwehexexa ni aamweerela: “Nyuwotho mwaari ni Yeesu yoole muNasarete.”" 
Mark14:68 Wa soothesene, owo aamuruna Yeesu eeraka: “Nkimusuwenle, hata nkisuwenle yeeyo munuulumaanyu.” Ni aavenya arowaka mmutthekoni." 
Mark14:69 Amoonakatho iwe murumeiyi muthiyana ole, aaweerela yaale yaari vakhiviru: “Ola ori mmoha a yaale.”" 
Mark14:70 Vano aarunatho. Vahoolo vakhaani, yaale yaari vakhiviru yaamweerela: “Vekhaikhai nyuwo muri mmoha a yaale. Nyuwo muri muGalileiya.”" 
Mark14:71 Vano aapacera onyohola ni olipela: “Nkimusuwenle Mulopwana Owo nyuwo munimuhimaanyu.” 
Mark14:72 Woowaakuveya nthupi aahiipa emaara yanaaveeli. Vano Pedru aahuupuwelela masu Yeesu aamuleenlaawe: “Ohinaaye wiipa nthupi imaara piili, nyuwo munookiruna imaara tthaaru.” Ni aahiinla vancipale." 
Mark15:1 Oyaaka ni oxa ahooleli a asaserdoti*, asitokweene a muloko, anamawera a nlamulo* ni ootheene a eSineedriyu* yaaphiya woovaanelani. Emutthukaka Yeesu, yaamukuxa ni yaamvaherera Pilatu." 
Mark15:2 Pilatu aamukoha: “Nyuwo muri mwene a aYuda?” Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Nyuwo muneera yeeyo.” 
Mark15:3 Ahooleli a asaserdoti* yaamoothera Yeesu itthu sincipale. 
Mark15:4 Vano Pilatu aamukohatho: “Nyuwo khamunaakhula? Moone itthu sincipale awo angwootheraayani?” 
Mark15:5 Yeesutho khaakhunle hata nsu nimoha, ni Pilatu aatikhina." 
Mark15:6 Vanonto, wa ehuhu ya efesta yaari ekhovelelo yoomutaphula namatthukiwa mmoha, mwa yoowo muloko wa atthu waamvekelaaya." 
Mark15:7 Mulopwana mmoha iitthaniwa Baraba aari okaliposo vamoha ni anamatthukiwa akina yaawiivale atthu moowanani ni atthu ancipale. 
Mark15:8 Atthu ancipale yaaphiya wa Pilatu ni yaamvekela weera apake yeeyo aakhovelelaawe opaka. 
Mark15:9 Pilatu aahaakoha: “Muntthuna weera miyo kimutaphule Mwene a aYuda?” 
Mark15:10 Aasuwela weera ahooleli a asaserdoti* yaamvaherera wa yoowo Yeesu niwoko na nrima. 
Mark15:11 Mene ahooleli a asaserdoti* yaahaasesera atthu ancipale omvekela Pilatu weera amutaphule Baraba, ahikhanle Yeesu." 
Mark15:12 Vano Pilatu aahaakoha: “Nkeereke hai ni Yoole nyuwo mummwiitthanaanyu Mwene a aYuda?” 
Mark15:13 Awo yaakhuwela: “Munkhomele!” 
Mark15:14 Pilatu aahaakoha: “Niwoko heeni? Mulattu heeni otthenkaawe?” Vano awosa yaatepa okhuwela: “Munkhomele!” 
Mark15:15 Atthunaka waasiveliha atthu ancipale, Pilatu aahaataphulela Baraba ni aalamulela weera Yeesu awaxuliwe, ni aamwinnyerera weera akhomeliwe." 
Mark15:16 Anakhotto yaamurongha Yeesu mpaani mwa Pilatu, eyo tiiyo oPretoriyu, ni yaahaathukumanya anakhotto ootheene." 
Mark15:17 Yaangwariha Yeesu mukaandyo wooxeera ni yaapaka ecireemba ya nyiiwa ni yaangwariha Yoowo. 
Mark15:18 Yaapacera omuulumiha yeeraka: “Salaama, Mwene a aYuda!”" 
Mark15:19 Yannammana mmuru ni ekopo ni yannamusenyela. Vano yaamukokhorela ni yaamuttottopela. 
Mark15:20 Emalihaka omutheiya, yaamurula mukaandyo wooxeera ni yaangwariha ikuwosawe enamukhumihera vaate weera emukhomele." 
Mark15:21 Mulopwana mmoha a oKireene, iitthaniwa Simeyoni, atithawe Alesandere ni Rufo, aavira weiwo akhumaka omatta. Yaamunyeserera weera akuxe muttanda." 
Mark15:22 Yaamurongha Yeesu vanipuroni niitthaniwa Golgota, entaphulela nipuro na nikarakasa." 
Mark15:23 Yaamvaha eviinyu yootakansiwa ni emira*, vaheera Owo khaawunre." 
Mark15:24 Vano yaamukhomela. Yaakawana ikuwosawe, epakaka macitta weera esuwele ni mpatta heeni wa ikuwo khula mutthu eeraawe akhaleno." 
Mark15:25 Yaari ewoora yanaararu awo yaamukhomenlaaya. 
Mark15:26 Ni yoomootheraaya yaalempwale yaari ela: “Mwene a aYuda.” 
Mark15:27 Yaahaakhomela anamwiiya eeli vamoha ni Yoowo – mmoha moonowaawe mulopwana ni mukina muthiyana. 
Mark15:28  
Mark15:29 Yaawo yaavira, yaamuruwana, yiinihaka nyuru, yeeraka: “Khuu! Weyo waarowa ophwata Empa ya Muluku ni waateka wa mahuku mararu," 
Mark15:30 wiivuluxeke ni okhuruwe vamuttandani!” 
Mark15:31 Mooteene yoowo ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni anamawera a nlamulo* yaamutheiya yaaworu yeeraka: “Aahaavuluxa akina, mene khangwera wiivuluxa!" 
Mark15:32 Kristu, Mwene a aYixrayeli! Akhuruwe vamuttandani weera noone ni nimuroromele.” Yaale yaathomeiwe vamoha ni Yoowo yaamuruwanatho." 
Mark15:33 Okhuma nsuwa vamuru yaakhala epiphi mweelaponi yootheene wookwana iwoora tthaaru. 
Mark15:34 Sikwanakaru iwoora tthaaru, Yeesu aakhuwela vancipale: “Eloyi, Eloyi, lama sabaktani?” entaphulela: “Mulukwaaka, Mulukwaaka, heeni mukihingyaanyu?”" 
Mark15:35 Akina yaari weiwe, yiiwalaaya yeeyo, yaaheera: “Mmwiiwe! Owo onimwiitthana Eliya.”" 
Mark15:36 Mmoha a yaale, aatthimaka, anaruweiya nttapwatta mviinyuni yoonyuunya, aniikaathi okhwipi wa ekopo, anamvaha Yeesu weera awure, eeraka: “Noone Eliya awa omvenxa.”" 
Mark15:37 Vano Yeesu aahookhwa, akhuwelaka ni nsu ntokotoko." 
Mark15:38 Ekuwo etokotoko ya Mpaani mwa Muluku yaahaahuwa, enakawanyeiya okhuma vasulu mpaka vathi." 
Mark15:39 Iiwaka kenturiyoni* aari ohoolo wa Yeesu okhuwelawawe, ni amoonaka moota Yeesu aakhwaawe, aaheera: “Vekhaikhai, Mulopwana Ola aari Mwaana a Muluku.”" 
Mark15:40 Asithiyana akina yeera ewehaka ottaiwene. Variyariwaya aari Mariya oMagadalene, Mariya amayawe Yakobe mukhaani ni Yoseete, ni Salome." 
Mark15:41 Ereene oGalileiya, awo yaamutthara Yeesu ni yaamurumeela. Asithiyana ancipale akina yaarwiiye ni Yoowo oYerusaleemu, yaaritho weiwo." 
Mark15:42 Naari nihuku na oreherera, eyo tiiyo, nihinaaye ophiya nihuku na eSaabadu. Wiilaka," 
Mark15:43 Yoseefe a wArimatheiya, mutokweene mmoha oosuwanyeyaxa a eSineedriyu*, mwa yoowo aawehereratho omwene wa Muluku, aalipiha murimaawe ni aarowa wa Pilatu amvekelaka muttembo wa Yeesu." 
Mark15:44 Pilatu aatikhina iiwalaawe weera Owo ohookhwa. Amwiitthanaka kenturiyoni*, aamukoha weera Yeesu aahookhwa." 
Mark15:45 Aleeliwaka ni kenturiyoni*, aamvaherera Yoseefe muttembo." 
Mark15:46 Vano Yoseefe aathuma esaanda, anakuruxa muttembo vamuttandani, anavitikelela muttembo ni esaanda, ni aniikaathi munihiyeni, noothipiwa vamwala. Vahoolowaya aahiikaathi nluku ntokotoko vamulako wa nihiye." 
Mark15:47 Mariya oMagadelene ni Mariya amayawe Yoseete yaahoona weiwo Owo aavithiwaawe. 
Mark16:1 Nimalaka nihuku na eSaabadu, Mariya oMagadalene, Salome, ni Mariya amayawe Yakobe, yaathuma itthu soowunkhelaxa weera ettikitthele muttembo wa Yeesu." 
Mark16:2 Vanihukuni noopacera na esimana, oyaaka ni oxa, nsuwa nikhumaka, awo yaarowa onihiyeni." 
Mark16:3 Yaakohana yaaworu: “Taani anaanipirikixele nluku na mulako wa nihiye?” 
Mark16:4 Erowakatho weera yoone, yaahoona weera nluku ntokotoko nne naapirikixiwa." 
Mark16:5 Evolowakaru munihiyeni, yaamoona mulopwana awanreene ikuwo sootteelaxa akilaantheene moono mulopwana, ni yaatuthuwa." 
Mark16:6 Owo aaweerela: “Muhoove. Munimwaasaasa Yeesu muNasarete, okhomeliwe. Owo oovenyerera! Khamomo. Moone nipuro awo yaamwiikaanthaaya." 
Mark16:7 Murowe ni mwaaleele oohuseraawe ni Pedru: Owo onoorowa oGalileiya ohoolowanyu. Weiwo mmwamoone ntoko Owo ooleenlaaweni.” 
Mark16:8 Ethukumelaka ni etuthuwaka, asithiyana yaakhuma ni yaatthawa munihiyeni. Khayaamuleenle mutthu, niwoko yaahoovaxa. [" 
Mark16:9 Yeesu avenyererakaru oyaaka ni oxa wa nihuku noopacera na esimana, aahiixoonihera toko wa Mariya oMagadelene, mwa yoowo Yeesu aamoomolenlaawe minepa soonanara mithannamiili." 
Mark16:10 Owo aarowa ni aahaaleela yaawo yaari ni Yeesu. Awo yeera elalamikaka ni yiinlaka. 
Mark16:11 Yiiwalaaya weera Yeesu ori ni okumi ni aahooniwa ni Mariya oMagadalene, khayaaroromenle yeeyo." 
Mark16:12 Vahoolowaya Yeesu aahiixoonihera ni ekhalelo ekina wa eeli a yaawo yeettaka mphironi, erowaka omatta." 
Mark16:13 Awo yaahokolowa ni yaahaaleela yeeyo, akinatho khayaaroromenle hata yaawo." 
Mark16:14 Vahoolotho Yeesu aahiixoonihera wa muloko nimmoha, ereene woocaani. Aahaahiiha niwoko na ohiroromelawaya ni wuumawaya murima, woonaka weera khayaaroromenle yaawo yaamoonne Yeesu avenyererakaru." 
Mark16:15 Aaweerela: “Murowe mweelaponi yootheene ni mwaalaleere atthu ootheene masu ooreeraxa. 
Mark16:16 Yoowo onroromela ni ompatisiwa, anaavuluxiwe, vaheera yoowo ohinroromela, anaathorihiwe." 
Mark16:17 Ineneero iya sineera saahoole yaawo anroromela: Mwa Nsinanaka eniyeereke woomola minepa soonanara, wuuluma muulumo manyowani," 
Mark16:18 ovara inowa, ni yawura itthu soowiiva, khasirwa saapakela naari etthu yoonanara emoha. Awo eniwiikaathere matata aretta, ni yaawo eniilamihiwe.”" 
Mark16:19 Emalihakaru wuuluma ni yaawo, Apwiya Yeesu yaawelihiwa wiirimu, ni yaakilaathi moono mulopwana wa Muluku." 
Mark16:20 Vano oohusera yaavenya ni yaalaleiya mapuro ootheene. Apwiya yaavara muteko vamoha ni yaawo, ni yaalipihera maswaaya ni ineneero saahoola masweene yaale.]" 
Luke1:1 Ancipale yaaheerera olepa nyaha sa sookhumelela sookwaniheriwa variyariwahu," 
Luke1:2 ntoko nileeliwaahu ni yaale yaari anamoona ni arumeiyi a masu okhuma ompacereroni. 
Luke1:3 Miyotho muneenaaka koowehaweha nnenesene sootheene okhuma ompacereroni, ni kohuupuwela, Teyofilu oottittimiheyaxa, weera koolepeleni sootheene sookawanyeiya nnene," 
Luke1:4 weera nyuwo musuwele nnenesene ekhaikhai ya itthu mwaaxuttihiwaanyu. 
Luke1:5 Mweehuhuni ya Herodi, mwene a oYudeiya, aakhala musaserdoti* iitthaniwa Zakariya, aari mmoha a mpatta wa asaserdoti* a Abiya. Amwaariyetho, Elisabeti, yaari a ekhapira ya Aharoni." 
Luke1:6 Ooweeli yaari oororomeleya vamaithoni wa Muluku, yiiwelelaka nnenesene malamulo ootheene ni soolamulela sootheene sa Apwiya." 
Luke1:7 Awo khayaarino anamwane, niwoko Elisabeti khaayara, nitho ooweeli yaahuuluvala." 
Luke1:8 Nihuku nimoha, ereene emaara ya mpatta wa Zakariya, owo eera arumeelaka ntoko musaserdoti* vamaithoni wa Muluku." 
Luke1:9 Aapakiwa mwaathanle, ntoko ekhovelelo ya asaserdoti* weera avolowe Mpaani mwa Apwiya ni ahisere mwiixi woowunkhelaxa." 
Luke1:10 Ephiyaka ehuhu yoohisera mwiixi woowunkhelaxa, atthu a muloko wootheene yeera evekelaka vaate." 
Luke1:11 Vano aahiixoonihera wa yoowo ndyelo a Apwiya, eemenleene moono mulopwana wa altaari* a erubani*." 
Luke1:12 Zakariya amoonakaru, aatuthuwa ni aahoova." 
Luke1:13 Ndyelotho aamweerela: “Muhoove Zakariya, nivekelonanyu nohiiwiwa. Amwaarinyu Elisabeti animooyarelani mwaana mulopwana, ni muntthuneya omutteha nsinanawe Yohaane." 
Luke1:14 Owo anaakhale otteeliwa murimaanyu ni ohakalalawanyu, ni ancipale eniitteeliwe niwoko na oyariwawawe." 
Luke1:15 Vano, anaakhale mutokweene vamaithoni wa Apwiya. Owo kharwa awura eviinyu, hoye hoye yoowura ekina. Anaakhale oosareya ni Munepa Wootteela okhuma ohinaaye oyariwawawe." 
Luke1:16 Niwoko na yoowo, atthu ancipale a muloko wa aYixrayeli eniihokoleele wa Apwiya Mulukwaaya." 
Luke1:17 Anaahoole Apwiya mmunepani ni mukuruni sa Eliya. Anaahokoloxe mirima sa asitiithi wa asinamwanaaya, ni mirima sa oohiiwelela wa miruku sa atthu a ekhaikhai. Owo anaahiyere Apwiya muloko wooreherereiya.”" 
Luke1:18 Zakariya aamukoha ndyelo: “Nkisuwele hai yeeyo? Miyo ni amwaaraka nohuuluvala.” 
Luke1:19 Ndyelo aamwaakhula: “Miyo Gabriyeli, kinkhala ohoolo wa Muluku mahuku ootheene. Koorumihiwa weera kooleeleni ni koovaheeni masu ooreera ala." 
Luke1:20 Vano, nyuwo mmwikhale oohuuluma. Khamunrowa owera wuuluma mpaka nihuku nenenenno eneeraaya ekhumelele yeeyo, niwoko khamwaakhulenle maswaaka, eneera ekwaniheriwe ehuhu yeeyo entthuneya.”" 
Luke1:21 Yeereiyaka yeeyo, muloko wa atthu waangweherera Zakariya, otikhinaka mwaha wa opisawawe Mpaani mwa Muluku." 
Luke1:22 Akhumaka, khaawera wuuluma. Awo yaasuwela weera owo aakhenle eyoonihero Mpaani mwa Muluku. Owo aawoonihera ni ineneero, mene aari oohuuluma." 
Luke1:23 Amalihaka ehuhuwaawe ya muteko, aahokoleela owaani." 
Luke1:24 Vahoolowaya amwaariye, Elisabeti, yaarupala, ni sikwanaka nyeeri mithanu, yaahiipitha." 
Luke1:25 Owo aaheera: “Apwiya aakipakela yeeyo. Wa mahuku ala Awo aakiweha miyo ni aamaliha wuulihiwawaka muru vamaithoni wa atthu.” 
Luke1:26 Wa mweeri wanaathannamosa Muluku aamurumiha ndyelo Gabriyeli oNasarete, esidada ya oGalileiya." 
Luke1:27 Aarowa wa mwaamwali oowiikosoopa aatthomeriwe ni mulopwana iitthaniwa Yoseefe, aari a ekhapira ya Davide. Nsina na mwaamwali oowiikosoopa naari Mariya." 
Luke1:28 Ndyelo, amukhuveelaka yoowo, aamweerela: “Muhakalale nyuwo mwaakhenle mahala matokotoko! Apwiya ari ni nyuwo!”" 
Luke1:29 Mariya aatuthuwa niwoko na masu ale, uupuwelaka weera entaphulela eheeni esalaama ela." 
Luke1:30 Vano ndyelo aamweerela: “Muhoove Mariya, niwoko Muluku oowooniherani mahala matokotoko." 
Luke1:31 Nyuwo munoorupala ni munoomuyara Mwaana Mulopwana, ni munoomutteha Nsinanawe Yeesu." 
Luke1:32 Owo anaakhale Mutokweene, ni aniitthaniwe Mwaana a Musulusulu. Apwiya Muluku eniimvahe ehice ya atithawe Davide." 
Luke1:33 Owo anaalamule empa ya Yakobe mahuku ootheene. Olamulawawe onuukhale woohimala.” 
Luke1:34 Mariya aamukoha ndyelo: “Eniikhumelele hai yeeyo, woonaka weera miyo nkinatoko okonano mulopwana?”" 
Luke1:35 Ndyelo aamwaakhula: “Munepa Wootteela onimoorweelani ni ikuru sa Musulusulu nsookhuneeleni ni erungwaawe. Hiiho, Yoole Ootteela anaayariwe, aniitthaniwe Mwaana a Muluku." 
Luke1:36 Mmusaanyu Elisabeti anaamuyaretho mwaana mulopwana ngwuuluvalani. Yoole akina ammweerelaaya weera ole khangyara, ori ni mweeri wanaathannamosa." 
Luke1:37 Kheewowo eri yoohiwereya wa Muluku.” 
Luke1:38 Mariya aamwaakhula: “Miyo murumeiyi a Apwiya. Ekikhumelele miyo ntoko wuulumawanyu.” Vano ndyelo aamuhiya. 
Luke1:39 Mahukweene yaale, Mariya aahiireherera ni aarowa woowaakuveya wa esidade emoha yaari mweelaponi ya nyaako sa oYudeiya," 
Luke1:40 weiwo aavolongwaawe mpaani mwa Zakariya ni aamuulumiha Elisabeti. 
Luke1:41 Iiwaka Elisabeti esalaama ya Mariya, mwaana aattikinyeiya mmirimani mwa yoowo, ni Elisabeti aasareya ni Munepa Wootteela." 
Luke1:42 Vano owo aakhuwela ni nsu ntokotoko: “Ooreelihiwa ti nyuwo variyari wa athiyana, ni ooreelihiwa ti Mwaana nyuwo muneeraanyu mungyare." 
Luke1:43 Heeni miyo kooniheriwaaka mahala matokotoko ala weera mpaka amayaya Apwiyaaka aakixekura? 
Luke1:44 Kiiwakaru esalaamaanyu, mwaana ori mmirimanimwaka oottikinyeiya ni ohakalala." 
Luke1:45 Ooreelihiwa ti yoole ororomenle weera eniikwaniheriwe yeeyo Apwiya yaamuleenlaaya.” 
Luke1:46 Vano Mariya aaheera: “Okumaaka ongwunnuwiha Apwiya. 
Luke1:47 Munepaaka onghakalala mwa Muluku, Mvuluxaaka." 
Luke1:48 Owo ohoona wiiyeviha wa murumeiyaawe. Okhuma vaanaano vaava mpaka ohoolo ikhapira sootheene nsikiitthane ooreelihiwa," 
Luke1:49 niwoko Muluku a ikuru sootheene ookipakela miyo itthu sitokotoko. Nsinanawe ti nootteela. 
Luke1:50 Ikhararisawe simphiyera ikhapira sootheene sa yaawo ammoova. 
Luke1:51 Owo aapaka itthu sa ikuruxa ni moonowaawe. Aahaamwaramwaxa yaawo ari oowiixoona mmirimanimwaya. 
Luke1:52 Aahaakuruxa mamwene muhicenimwaya, mene aahaaweliha oowiiyeviha." 
Luke1:53 Aahaavoniha ni itthu sooreera yaawo yaavoliwe etala, aawoomolatho anamapuha ni matata oohikhalano etthu." 
Luke1:54 Owo aamukhavihera murumeiyaawe Yixrayeli, uupuwelelaka ommorela ikharari" 
Luke1:55 Abrahaamu ni ikhapirasawe mahuku ootheene ntoko aaweerenlaawe makholowaahu.” 
Luke1:56 Mariya aakhala ni Elisabeti saattamelaka nyeeri miraru, ni vahoolowaya aahokoleela owaani." 
Luke1:57 Ephiyaka ehuhu ya oyara wa Elisabeti, aamuyara mwaana mulopwana." 
Luke1:58 Atthu aattamannaaweno ni amusaawe yaahiiwa suulummwaka sa ikharari sitokotoko Apwiya yaamoonihenraaya, ni yaamuhakalalela yoowo." 
Luke1:59 Wa nihuku nanaathannaararu yaarowa weera yamwiinele mwaana, ni yaatthuna omutteha nsina na atithawe, Zakariya." 
Luke1:60 Amayawetho yaahaakhula: “Hoye! Owo aniitthaniwe Yohaane.” 
Luke1:61 Awo yaamweerela: “Khawowo naari mmusaanyu mmoha orino nsina nna.” 
Luke1:62 Vano yaawoonihera ni ineneero atithawe mwaana weera esuwele nsina heeni yaatthunaaya weera attehiwe. 
Luke1:63 Owo aavekela etthaabwa ekhaaneene, ni aatikhinihaka ootheene, aalepa: “Nsinanawe Yohaane.”" 
Luke1:64 Woowaakuveya eyanowaawe yaahuleiya, ni nlumi naataphuwa, anapacera wuuluma, amuttottopelaka Muluku." 
Luke1:65 Aattamannaaweno ootheene yaasareya ni woova, ni mweelaponi yootheene ya nyaako sa oYudeiya suulummwa sa seiyo." 
Luke1:66 Ootheene yiiwa yeeyo yannakoha: “Anaakhale taani mwaana ola?” Vano Apwiya yaari ni yoowo. 
Luke1:67 Atithawe, Zakariya, yaasareya ni Munepa Wootteela ni yaathaliha otthuna wa Muluku yeeraka:" 
Luke1:68 “Oottottopeliwa ekhale Apwiya, Muluku a aYixrayeli, niwoko yaaxekura ni yaavuluxa muloko wa atthwaaya." 
Luke1:69 Awo aaniwerela hiyo ovuluxiwa otokotoko mwa muloko wa murimeiyaaya Davide," 
Luke1:70 ntoko yuulumaaya ni maprofeeti ootteela a khalayi: 
Luke1:71 ovuluxiwa wa amwiittanaahu ni mmatatani a ootheene yaawo annithanya," 
Luke1:72 weera ewoonihere ikhararisawe makholowaahu ni yuupuwelele wiiraanawaya wootteela," 
Luke1:73 eyo tiiyo olipela yaalipenlaaya atithihu Abrahaamu: 
Luke1:74 Aanivuluxa mmatatani a amwiittanaahu weera hiyo naarumeele Apwiya nihoovaka," 
Luke1:75 neettaka mootteelani ni mweekhaikhaiyini vamaithoniwaya mahukwaahu ootheene. 
Luke1:76 Ni weyo, mmiravo, ngwiitthaniwe mprofeeti a Musulusulu niwoko onuurowe ohoolo wa Apwiya weera waarehererele Yaawo ephiro," 
Luke1:77 nitho weera evahe muloko wa atthwaaya esuwelo ya ovuluxiwa ongwa niwoko na elevelelo ya sootthekasaya. 
Luke1:78 Elevelelo ele ti niwoko na omoreliwa ikharari sa Mulukwaahu. Owo anaanixekure wa osulu ntoko nsuwa nikhumaka 
Luke1:79 weera aamwaleele yaale ari mpiphini ni mmunttuusini wa okhwa, ni weera aneettihe mphironi ya murettele.”" 
Luke1:80 Vano, mmiravo annunnuwa ni annalipa mmunepani. Aakhala munikareni mpaka ehuhu eeraawe iixoonihere wa aYixrayeli." 
Luke2:1 Mahukweene yaale Seesari Agustu aahima ekano emoha, alamulaka weera apakiwe namalepela a atthu a ilapo sootheene sa oRooma." 
Luke2:2 Owo aari namalepela oopacera aapakiwe Kiriniyu areene guvernadori a oSiriya. 
Luke2:3 Ootheene yaarowa wa muttetthe weiwo yaayariwaayawo weera yalepeliwe. 
Luke2:4 Hiiho, Yoseefe aarowatho, akhumaka esidade ya oNasarete ya oGalileiya mpaka oBetelehemu, esidade ya Davide, elapo ya oYudeiya, niwoko aari a emusi ni ekhapira ya Davide." 
Luke2:5 Aarowa ni Mariya, yoowo aamutthomenraawe ni aarupanle, weera yalepeliwe." 
Luke2:6 Ereene nlelo weiwe, yaaphiya ehuhu ya omuyara Mwaana," 
Luke2:7 ni Mariya aamuyara Mwaana Mulopwana a ntthaaranawe. Aamvitikelela ikuwo ni aamwiikaathi munikhoolani, niwoko khanaariwo nipuro wa yaawo mpaani mwa aletto." 
Luke2:8 Yaari akukhuli yaakhala mmatta mookhuveela. Moohiyuni yaalipelela muhuwaaya. 
Luke2:9 Ndyelo mmoha a Apwiya aahiixoonihera wa yaawo, ni ovuwa wa Apwiya waahaara waarukureenreene yaawo, vano yaahoova." 
Luke2:10 Ndyelotho aaweerela: “Muhoove, miyo kinooruuhelani masu ooreeraxa a ohakalalaxa ari wa muloko wootheene." 
Luke2:11 Olelo, musidadeni ya Davide, mooyareliwa nyuwo Mvuluxa ori Kristu, Apwiya." 
Luke2:12 Eyo eniikhale eneneerowaanyu: nyuwo mmwimphwanye Mwaana avitikelelingweene ikuwo ni iikaathiweene munikhoolani.” 
Luke2:13 Woowaakuveya mikhalelo sincipale sa anakhotto a wiirimu saahiixoonihera ni ndyelo ole simuttottopelaka Muluku seeraka: 
Luke2:14 “Ovuwa okhale wa Muluku Musulusulu, ni vathi vaava murettele wa yaale animusiveliha Muluku.”" 
Luke2:15 Yaahiyakaru andyelo yaawo, erowaka wiirimu, akukhuli ale yaaheerelana mukina ni mukwaawe: “Nrowe oBetelehemu ni noone yeeyo yeereiye Apwiya anileenlaaya.”" 
Luke2:16 Vano yaatthimaka ni yaamuphwanya Mariya, Yoseefe ni Mwaana aatalelingweene munikhoolani." 
Luke2:17 Emoonaka, awo yaamwaramwaxa yeeyo yaaleeliwaaya mwaha wa Mwaana ole." 
Luke2:18 Ootheene yiiwale yaatikhina ni masu a akukhuli. 
Luke2:19 Wa soothesene, Mariya aathokorora itthu sootheene seiye ni annatthokelela mmurimanimwawe mwaha wa seiyo." 
Luke2:20 Akukhuli yaahokolowa, emvuwihaka ni emuttottopelaka Muluku wa sootheene yoonalaaya ni yiiwalaaya ntoko yaaleeliwaaya." 
Luke2:21 Wa nihuku nanaathannaararu, ephiyaka ehuhu ya omwiinela Mwaana, aattehiwa Nsina na Yeesu, Nsina nne ndyelo aamuttenghaawe ahinaaye oyariwa." 
Luke2:22 Emalihiwaka ehuhu ya otteelihiwawaya ntoko malamulo a Moisesi annyesererihaaya, Yoseefe ni Mariya yaamurongha oYerusaleemu weera yamoonihere wa Apwiya." 
Luke2:23 Ntoko elempwalaaya munlamuloni na Apwiya: “Asilopwana ootheene a matthaara ekhaleke oovahereriwa wa Apwiya.” 
Luke2:24 Yaamuronghatho weera evahe yooveleela ntoko ninghimaaya nlamulo na Apwiya: “Masiya meeli, hoye hoye ikhunda piili.”" 
Luke2:25 Aakhala oYerusaleemu mulopwana mmoha iitthaniwa Simeyoni aari oororomeleya ni a murima wa omuluku. Owo aaweherera opepesiwa wa oYixrayeli, ni Munepa Wootteela waari ni yoowo." 
Luke2:26 Aathupululeliwa yoowo ni Munepa Wootteela weera owo khaarwa okhwa ahinaaye omoona Kristu a Apwiya. 
Luke2:27 Eettihiwaka ni Munepa Wootteela, aarowa Mpaani mwa Muluku. Engwiihaka asinaangolo Mwaana Yeesu weera ekwanihere yeeyo yaatthuneya ni ekhovelelo ya malamulo," 
Luke2:28 Simeyoni aamukuxa Yeesu mmatatanimwawe, anamuttottopela Muluku eeraka:" 
Luke2:29 “Muluku onlamula sootheene, ntoko mwaakiroromelinghaanyu, vano munoowera okilaxera mmuretteleni," 
Luke2:30 niwoko kohoona ni maithwaaka ovuluxawanyu 
Luke2:31 Nyuwo mureherenraanyu vamaithoni wa atthu ootheene: 
Luke2:32 waara weera waamwaleele amalapo ni wa ovuwa wa atthwaanyu aYixrayeli.” 
Luke2:33 Atithawe ni amayawe Mwaana yaatikhina ni yeeyo yaaleeliwaaya mwaha wa Mwaana ole. 
Luke2:34 Vano Simeyoni aahaareeliha ni aaweerela amayawe Yeesu: “Mwaana Ola oothanliwa okhala wuuwa ni ovenya wa atthu ancipale a oYixrayeli, ni anaakhaletho eneneero ya ohiiwanana." 
Luke2:35 Hiiho soowuupuwela sa mirima sincipale nsikhale soothupululiwa. Vano, wa nyuwo, ekatana eniihome munepaanyu.”" 
Luke2:36 Aakhalawo mprofeeti muthiyana, iitthaniwa Ana, mwaana a Fanuweli a nihimo na Axeri. Aari oowuuluvalaxa, ni okhuma otheliwawawe aakhala ni aiyawe iyaakha ithannapiili," 
Luke2:37 ni vahoolowaya aakhala naamukhweli mpaka iyaakha miloko mithannamiraru niixexe. Khanatoko ohiya Empa ya Muluku. Annamulapa Muluku, atthukaka ni avekelaka ohiyu ni othana." 
Luke2:38 Aphiyaka iwe ehuhu emoharu yeeyo, aamutthapela Muluku ni anuuluma mwaha wa Mwaana wa ootheene yaaweherera ovuluxiwa wa Yerusaleemu." 
Luke2:39 Emalihaka sootheene saatthuneya ni malamulo a Apwiya, Yoseefe ni Mariya yaahokoleela esidadaaya, Nasarete, elapo ya oGalileiya." 
Luke2:40 Mmiravo annunnuwa ni annalipa, asareyaka ni miruku, ni mahala a Muluku yaari ni Yoowo." 
Luke2:41 Iyaakha sootheene asinaangolo yannarowa oYerusaleemu ofestani ya mPaska*. 
Luke2:42 Yeesu aaraawe ni iyaakha muloko ni piili, awo yaarowa ofestani ntoko yaakhovelelaaya." 
Luke2:43 Emalaka efesta ni ehokoleelaka asinaangolo owaani, mmiravo Yeesu aahala oYerusaleemu, mene awo khaayaasuwela yeeyo." 
Luke2:44 Yuupuwelaka weera Owo aari ni asikhwaawe a mmukwahani, yaaheetta nihuku nootheene. Vano yaapacera omwaasaasa variyari wa amusi ni atthu yasuwelannaaya." 
Luke2:45 Ehimphwanyaka, yaahokoleela oYerusaleemu weera yamwaasaase." 
Luke2:46 Eviraka mahuku mararu, yaamphwanya Yeesu Mpaani mwa Muluku, akilaantheene variyari wa ahusiha, awiiwaka ni aakohaka." 
Luke2:47 Ootheene yaamwiiwale Yeesu yaatikhinaxa ni wiiwexexawawe ni moota aawaakhunlaawe. 
Luke2:48 Emoonaka asinaangolo Yeesu, yaatikhina. Amayawe yaamweerela: “Mwanaka, heeni onipakenlaawo yeeyo? Atithawo ni miyo naaheeteteiya niwaasaka.”" 
Luke2:49 Owo aahaakoha: “Heeni nyuwo mwaakaasasaanyu: Khamusuwenle weera ontthuneya Miyo okhala Mpaani mwa Atithaka?” 
Luke2:50 Vano awo khayiiwexenxe yeeyo aaleenlaawe. 
Luke2:51 Vano, aarowa ni aahaahoola oNasarete, ni annawiiwelela asinaangolo. Wa soothesene, amayawe yaathokorora itthu sootheene iye mmurimanimwaya." 
Luke2:52 Yeesu annunnuwa ni miruku, mweerutthuni ni mmahalani vamaithoni wa Muluku ni wa atthu." 
Luke3:1 Vano, vayaakhani yanaamuloko niithanu ya omwene wa Tiberiyu Seesari, Ponsiyo Pilaatu aari guvernadori a oYudeiya; Herodi aari tetrarkha* a oGalileiya; munneiye Filipe tetrarkha a wItureya ni oTarakonite, ni Lisaniya tetrarkha* a wAbilene." 
Luke3:2 Yaari ehuhuweene yeeyo Ana ni Kayafasi yaaraaya asitokweenexa a asaserdoti*. Ehuhuweene yeele masu a Muluku yaangweela Yohaane, mwaana a Zakariya, munikareni." 
Luke3:3 Anneetteetta elapo yootheene ya oYordanu, alaleiyaka opatiso wa orukunxa murima weera yaakhele elevelelo ya soottheka," 
Luke3:4 ntoko elempwaaya mulivuruni ya masu a mprofeeti Yesaya: “Nsu ninlaleiya munikareni: ‘Mwaarehererele ephiro Apwiya. Ngwookolele ephiro Yaawo. 
Luke3:5 Maxepa ootheene eniyuuheleliwe, ni nyaako ni mattumuxa ootheene eniikhale oothatawalihiwa. Misewe sookhoromana nsikhale sowookoleliwa, ni iphiro soothipeiya nsikhale soowaataleiya." 
Luke3:6 Atthu ootheene eniyoone ovuluxa wa Muluku.” 
Luke3:7 Yohaane aaweerela atthu ancipale yaavenya weera yapatisiwe ni yoowo: “Ekhapira ya inowa! Aweerenleni taani weera mutthawe isara sa Muluku sinkhuveela? 
Luke3:8 Moonihere soowiima sa orukunxa murima. Muhiixeereleke: ‘Nookhalano Abrahaamu ntoko atithi.’ Vano miyo kinooleelaani weera Muluku onoowera otatuxa maluku ala anamwane a Abrahaamu. 
Luke3:9 Epaso eri yoolikaneene weera ethikile mikwankhwaari sa nyiri. Nyiri sootheene sihiniima soowiima sooreera, sinoothikiliwa ni sinoovonyeriwa mmooroni.”" 
Luke3:10 “Vano, nneereke hai?” yaamukoha atthu ancipale." 
Luke3:11 Yohaane aawaakhula: “Yoowo orino mikaandyo miili, akawane ni yoowo ohikhalanne, ni yoowo orino yooca, apake hiihotho.”" 
Luke3:12 Anamaliviha a musoko akina yaahoowatho weera epatisiwe. Awo yaamukoha: “Muhusiha, nneereke hai?”" 
Luke3:13 Owo aaweerela: “Muhilivihetho musoko, ehikhanle ntoko yeeyo entthuneya.”" 
Luke3:14 Vano anakhotto akina yaamukoha: “Ni hiyo, nneereke hai?” Owo aawaakhula: “Muhipake etthu ni makhwaankwa, hata muhimoothere mukina moota woowootha, ni muhakalalele nlivonanyu.”" 
Luke3:15 Muloko wa atthu waaweherera ni ovilela otokotoko, wiikohaka muneenaaya weeraka Yohaane apaale Kristu." 
Luke3:16 Yohaane aawaakhula ootheene: “Miyo kinoopatisani ni maahi, onimoowatho Mukina ooweraxa okipwaha miyo. Nkiphwanenle otaphula miramba sa ikwawaattasawe. Yoowo anoopatiseni ni Munepa Wootteela ni mooro." 
Luke3:17 Owo onoomukuxa poxoro mmatatanimwawe weera areherere nipuronawe nimveeriwa* etrigu ni athokorore etrigu vatathani, mene anaahise makacapha mmooroni woohimala.”" 
Luke3:18 Vano, ni masu mancipale makina Yohaane aalipihera murima muloko wa atthu ni annalaleiya masu ooreeraxa." 
Luke3:19 Wa soothesene, amuhiihaka Yohaane Herodi, tetrarkha* niwoko na Herodiyasi, amwaarawe munneiye Herodi, nitho na itthu soonanara sootheene sikina owo aapankaawe," 
Luke3:20 Herodi aamwaandyeereratho etthu yoonanara ela: Aamvonyera Yohaane okaliposo.
