Luke3:21 Muloko wa atthu weera opatisiwaka, Yeesutho aapatisiwa. Avekelaka, waahuleiya wiirimu," 
Luke3:22 ni Munepa Wootteela waamukhuruwela ni mukhalelo ntoko ekhunda. Vano naahoowa wa wiirimu nsu nimoha neeraka: “Weyo ori Mwanaka oosiveleya. Weyo onkisiveliha Miyo.” 
Luke3:23 Yeesu aarino wookwanaka iyaakha miloko miraru aapacenraawe mitekosawe. Atthu yuupuwela weera Owo aari mwaana a Yoseefe. Yoseefe aari mwaana a Heeli," 
Luke3:24 mwaana a Matati, mwaana a Leevi, mwaana a Melikhi, mwaana a Yanai, mwaana a Yoseefe," 
Luke3:25 mwaana a Matathiya, mwaana a Amosi, mwaana a Nawume, mwaana a Esili, mwaana a Nagai," 
Luke3:26 mwaana a Maathi, mwaana a Matathiya, mwaana a Semeyi, mwaana a Yoseekhi, mwaana a Yooda," 
Luke3:27 mwaana a Yohanani, mwaana a Reesa, mwaana a Zorobabeli, mwaana a Salathiyeli, mwaana a Neeri," 
Luke3:28 mwaana a Melikhi, mwaana a Adi, mwaana a Koosame, mwaana a Elimadame, mwaana a Eeri," 
Luke3:29 mwaana a Yoxuwa, mwaana a Eleyezeri, mwaana a Yoorimi, mwaana a Matati, mwaana a Leevi," 
Luke3:30 mwaana a Simeyoni, mwaana a Yuda, mwaana a Yoseefe, mwaana a Yooname, mwaana a Eliyakime," 
Luke3:31 mwaana a Meleya, mwaana a Mena, mwaana a Matatha, mwaana a Nathami, mwaana a Davide," 
Luke3:32 mwaana a Yixai, mwaana a Obeedi, mwaana a Bowasi, mwaana a Salimoni, mwaana a Naasoni," 
Luke3:33 mwaana a Aminadabi, mwaana a Adimini, mwaana a Arini, mwaana a Hesirooni, mwaana a Perexi, mwaana a Yuda" 
Luke3:34 mwaana a Yakobe, mwaana a Isaaki, mwaana a Abrahaamu, mwaana a Thara, mwaana a Nakhoore," 
Luke3:35 mwaana a Serukhi, mwaana a Ragawu, mwaana a Faleke, mwaana a Eberi, mwaana a Sala," 
Luke3:36 mwaana a Kayiname, mwaana a Arifaxade, mwaana a Seemi, mwaana a Nowe, mwaana a Lamekhi," 
Luke3:37 mwaana a Mathusala, mwaana a Henookhi, mwaana a Yarete, mwaana a Maleleyeli, mwaana a Kayiname," 
Luke3:38 mwaana a Enoosi, mwaana a Seethi, mwaana a Adamu, mwaana a Muluku." 
Luke4:1 Yeesu, aasareya ni Munepa Wootteela, aahokolowa oYordanu ni aakuxiwa ni Munepa Wootteela aronghiwaka onikareni," 
Luke4:2 weiwo eereriwaawe ni Diyabu* wa mahuku miloko mixexe. Wa ehuhuweene yeele khaaciiye naari etthu, ni amalihaka mahukweene yaale, aavoliwa etala." 
Luke4:3 Vano Diyabu* aamweerela: “Weyo waari Mwaana a Muluku, olamule nluku nna weera nithatuwe yooca.”" 
Luke4:4 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Yoolempwa: ‘Mutthu khankhala ni okumi niwoko na yooca paahi.” 
Luke4:5 Diyabu* aamukuxa Yeesu amuronghaka vanipuroni noorakama vancipale na osulu, ni aamoonihera khuluwi omwene wootheene wa elapo ya vathi" 
Luke4:6 amweerelaka: “Kinimoovaha ovuwa wootheene ni ikuru sootheene sa omwene ole wootheene, niwoko wootheene akivanghaaya miyo, ni miyo kinoomvaha wa yoole kineeraaka kimutthune." 
Luke4:7 Vano, Weyo wakilapa, wootheene onuukhale wawawo.”" 
Luke4:8 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Yoolempwa: ‘Mwaalape Apwiya Mulukwaanyu ni mwaarumeele Yaawo paahi.’” 
Luke4:9 Diyabu* aamukuxa Yoowo amuroghaka oYerusaleemu ni aamwiikaathi vanankatthani a Empa ya Muluku, anamweerela: “Waari Mwaana a Muluku, wiivonyere vathi va," 
Luke4:10 niwoko yoolempwa: ‘Owo anaalamule andyelowaawe mwaha wa Weyo weera yoothokorore. 
Luke4:11 Awo eniyoovarele mmatatanimwaya weera ohikwattuliwe ni maluku.’” 
Luke4:12 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Yoolempwatho: ‘Muhiweerere Apwiya Mulukwaanyu.’” 
Luke4:13 Amalihaka sooweerera sootheene seiye, Diyabu* aamuhiya mpaka ehuhu yootthuneya." 
Luke4:14 Yeesu aahokoleela oGalileiya mukuruni sa Munepa, ni epilaawe yaamwaramwaxeiya mweelaponi yootheene ele." 
Luke4:15 Annaxuttiha muSinagogani*, attottopeliwaka ni ootheene." 
Luke4:16 Owo aarowa oNasarete weiwo unnuwenlaawe. Wa eSaabadu aavolowa muSinagogani* ntoko aakhovelelaawe. Vano aaheemela weera asome. 
Luke4:17 Aavahereriwa elivuru ya mprofeeti Yesaya. Aakhunula ni aaphwanya nipuro naalempwalaaya ha: 
Luke4:18 “Munepa wa Apwiya ori ni Miyo, niwoko Owo wookittikitthela weera kaalaleere masu ooreeraxa atthu oohaawa. Owo wookirumiha weera kaalaleere otaphuliwa yaale ootthukiwa ni olama atthu oohoona, ni weera kaataphule atthu oopuheriwa." 
Luke4:19 Wookirumihatho olaleiya eyaakha ya mahala a Apwiya.” 
Luke4:20 Aakhuneela elivuru, anamuhokoloxera murumeiyi anakilaathi. muSinagogani* ootheene yaangwehexexa Yeesu." 
Luke4:21 Vano Owo aapacera waaleela: “Olelo yookwaniheriwa Yoolempwa* ela mwiiwalaanyu vaanaano vaava.” 
Luke4:22 Ootheene yuuluma nnene wa Yoowo ni yaatikhina ni masu a mahala yaakhumme mmwaanomwawe. Awo yaakohana: “Ola khahiyono mwaana a Yoseefe?” 
Luke4:23 Yeesu aaweerela: “Vekhaikhai munookuupuxera miruku iya: ‘Meediku, mwiilamiheke muneenaanyu! Mpake va mweelaponimwanyu yeeyo niiwalaahu weera mwaampaka oKafaranawu!’”" 
Luke4:24 Owo aapwaherera: “Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: khaawo mprofeeti onaakheliwa mweelaponimwawe. 
Luke4:25 Kinoororomelihani weera mweehuhuni ya Eliya yaakhala asinaankhweli ancipale oYixrayeli. Ehuhuweene yeele wiirimu waawaleiya iyaakha tthaaru ni nyeeri mithannamosa, ni yaakhala etala etokotoko mweelaponi yootheene." 
Luke4:26 Wa soothesene, Eliya khaarumiheliwe hata mmoha a yaawo, ohikhanle wa naamukhweli mmoha a oZarepeta, elapo ya oSidoni." 
Luke4:27 Vanonto, mweehuhuni ya Eliya, mprofeeti, yaakhala anamakokho ancipale oYixrayeli. Wa soothesene, khaawo a yaawo aarapihiwe, ahikhanle Nahamani, muSiriya.”" 
Luke4:28 Wiiwalaaya yeeyo, muloko wa atthu ootheene waanyoonyiwaxa." 
Luke4:29 Yaavenya, enamoomola Yeesu osidade enamukuxa emuronghaka mpaka vasulu wa nttumuxa, mwa nenno yaapakiwaaya esidade weera emvonyere Yeesu vathi." 
Luke4:30 Mene Owo aavira variyariwaya ni aapwaha. 
Luke4:31 Vano Yeesu aarowa oKafarnawu, esidade ya oGalileiya, ni eSaabadu aamweera oxuttiha muloko wa atthu." 
Luke4:32 Ootheene yaatikhina ni nihusihonawe, niwoko maswaawe yaari ni ikuru." 
Luke4:33 muSinagogani* aakhala mutthu aarino munepa woonanara. Owo waakhuwela vancipale: 
Luke4:34 “Khuu! Ontthuna eheeni ni hiyo, Yeesu a oNasarete?! Waaweenle weera oninanarihe? Kohoosuwela – ori Ootteela a Muluku.”" 
Luke4:35 Yeesu aahiiha eeraka: “Omaale weyo, ni okhume mwa yoowo.” Munepa waamvonyera mutthu vathi vamaithoni wa ootheene ni waakhuma wa yoowo woohimuvulaliha." 
Luke4:36 Ootheene yaatikhina ni yaaheerelana akina ni akhwaaya: “Masu heeni ala? Owo onoolamulela ni ikuru, ni owera mpaka minepa soonanara, ni iyo sinookhuma!”" 
Luke4:37 Ni epilaawe yaamwarawareiya mweelaponi yootheene yoowaattamano. 
Luke4:38 Yeesu aakhuma muSinagogani* ni aarowa owannyawe Simeyoni. Apwiyamwaanaawe Simeyoni yaavihaxa erutthu, ni oohusera yaamvekela Yeesu weera aakhavihere." 
Luke4:39 Aawuuramela Yeesu apwiyamwaana ale anahiiha eretta ele, enaahiya. Awo yaavenya woowaakuveya ni yaahaarumeela yaawo." 
Luke4:40 Wiilaka, muloko wa atthu waahaakuxa ootheene yaarino iretta soohiyanahiyana emuruuhelaka Yeesu, ni Owo aahaalamiha amwiiyaatheraka matata khula mutthu a yaawo." 
Luke4:41 Ohiya toko yeeyo, saakhuma wa atthu ancipale minepa soonanara sikhuwelaka: “Weyo Mwaana a Muluku!” Wa soothesene, Owo annahiiha ni annakhoottiha wuuluma, niwoko saasuwela weera Owo ti Kristu." 
Luke4:42 Oyaaka ni oxa, Yeesu aarowa wa nipuro na meekhaawe. Atthu ancipale yaamwaasaasa, ni ephiyaka weiwo aaraawewo, yaamunyesereriha weera ahaahiye." 
Luke4:43 Vano Owo aaheera: “Ontthuneya weera Miyo kilaleiyetho masu ooreeraxa a omwene wa Muluku isidade sikina, niwoko kirumiheliwe niwoko na yeeyo.”" 
Luke4:44 Vano, annapwaherera alaleiyaka muSinagogani* sa oYudeiya." 
Luke5:1 Nihuku nimoha Yeesu aari vakhiviru wa enyandya ya oGenesarete. Atthu ancipale yaahaamaana emurukureenreene weera yiiwe masu a Muluku. 
Luke5:2 Aahoona mukerekhere wa enyandya makula meeli ehiiweene vale, ni anamakoka erapihaka itthavisaya." 
Luke5:3 Aavolowa munikulani nimoha naari na Simeyoni, ni aamvekela weera asuse vakhaani wa mukerekhere. Vano, akilaantheene munikulani, aaxuttiha muloko wa atthu." 
Luke5:4 Amalihaka wuuluma, Yeesu aamweerela Simeyoni: “Murowe mpaka weiwo wiixalaaya, ni mwavonyere itthavi weera mvare ihopa.”" 
Luke5:5 Simeyoni aamwaakhula: “Muhusiha noheerera vancipale ohiyu wootheene ni khanivanre etthu. Woonakatho weera ti Nyuwo munghima yeeyo, miyo kinkela ovonyera itthavi.”" 
Luke5:6 Apakaka yeeyo, yaavara ihopa sincipale, moota wooweera itthavi saapacera waahuwa." 
Luke5:7 Vano awo yaawoonihera ni ineneero asikhwaaya yaari munikulani nikina weera ewe ni yaakhavihere. Yaahoowa ni yaasariha makula oomeeli mpaka yaahanle vakhaani ottatta. 
Luke5:8 Oonaka yeeyo, Simeyoni Pedru aakokhorela inaawo sa Yeesu anamweerela: “Mususe wa miyo, Apwiya, niwoko miyo namattheka!”" 
Luke5:9 Vano owo ni asikhwaawe ootheene yaatikhina ni ihopa sincipale yaavanraaya. 
Luke5:10 Eeli a yaawo yaatikhinne yaari Yakobe ni Yohaane, anamwane a Zebedeyo, ni asikhwaawe Simeyoni. Vano Yeesu aamweerela Simeyoni: “Muhoove, okhuma olelo vaava mpaka ohoolo, mmwikhale namakoka a atthu.”" 
Luke5:11 Hiiho yaapurulela mukerekhere makula, enahiya sootheene enamutthara." 
Luke5:12 Yeesu areene esidade emoha, aahoowa namakokho oosareya makokho. Amoonaka Yeesu, aahuuramihela ekhovaawe vathi, anamudyoonttelela: “Apwiya, mwatthuna, munoowera okilamiha.”" 
Luke5:13 Yeesu aahookola moono anamwiiyaathera, eeraka: “Kinootthuna. Mukhale oolamihiwa.” Woowaakuveya makokho yaamuhiya." 
Luke5:14 Vano Yeesu aamulamulela: “Muhaaleele akina, murowetho ni mwiixoonihere wa musaserdoti*, ni mwavahe sooveleela mwaha wa orapihiwawanyu, seiye Moisesi aalamulenlaawe, weera iyo sikhale eneneero wa atthu.”" 
Luke5:15 Wa soothesene, ihaali mwaha wa Yoowo saatepaxa omwaramwareiya, moota wooweera atthu ancipale yaahoowa weera emwiiwe ni elamihiwe irettasaya." 
Luke5:16 Yeesutho aarowa wa mapuro a meekhaawe anavekela. 
Luke5:17 Nihuku nimoha Yeesu eera axuttihaka, yaakilaathi vaavaale aFarisi* ni anamawera a nlamulo* akina yaaweenle mittetthe sootheene sa oGalileiya, oYudeiya ni soowaattamana oYerusaleemu. Vano, ikuru sa Apwiya saari ni Yoowo weera aalamihe." 
Luke5:18 Yaahoowa atthu akina engwiiheraka Yoowo mutthu ooheetta munrepani. Yaaheerera ovolowa mpaani weera emwiikaathi ohoolo wa Yeesu. 
Luke5:19 Ehiweraka ophwanya moota woovolowa niwoko na atthu ancipale, yaawela vanipathoni, ni emvirihaka variyari vanlakani, yaamukuruxa munrepani mpaka eriyari ya atthu ancipale ohooloxa wa Yeesu." 
Luke5:20 Oonaka Yeesu nroromelonaya, aamweerela ooheetta: “Mulopwana, sootthekasanyu sooleveleliwa.”" 
Luke5:21 aFarisi* ni anamawera a nlamulo* yaapacera wuupuwela asineenaaya moota ola: “Taani Ola omveiha? Taani ongwera olevelela soottheka, ahikhanle Muluku paahi?”" 
Luke5:22 Asuwelaka yeeyo awo yuupuwenlaaya, Yeesu aahaakoha: “Heeni muupuwenlaanyu hiiho?" 
Luke5:23 Yookhweiya eheeni weera: ‘Sootthekasanyu sooleveleliwa,’ hoye hoye ‘Muvenye ni mweette’?" 
Luke5:24 Weeratho musuwele weera Mwaana a mutthu ookhalano mweelaponimu ikuru weera alevelele soottheka” – vano aamweerela mutthu ooheetta: “Miyo kinooleelani: muvenye, mukuxe nrepananyu ni muroweke owaani.”" 
Luke5:25 Woowaakuveya owo aavenya vahoolowaya, aakuxa nrepa mwa nenno aataleliwaawe, ni aarowa owannyawe amuttottopelaka Muluku." 
Luke5:26 Ootheene yaatikhinaxa ni yaamvuwiha Muluku, ni esareiyeene woova, yaaheera: “Olelo nohoona itthu sootikhiniheiya.”" 
Luke5:27 Vahoolowaya Yeesu aavenya ni aamoona namaliviha a musoko iitthaniwa Leevi, akilaantheene vanipuroni naalivihiwa musoko, ni aamweerela: “Mukitthare!”" 
Luke5:28 Leevi aavenya, anahiya sootheene anamutthara." 
Luke5:29 Vano, Leevi aamwiitthanela Yeesu efesta etokotoko owannyawe. Yaakhala atthu ancipale ecaaka vamoha ni yaawo: anamaliviha a musoko ni atthu akina." 
Luke5:30 Vano aFarisi* ni anamawera a nlamulo* yaari a aFarisi*tho yaahaattaandawula oohuseraawe Yeesu yeeraka: “Heeni muncaanyu ni mungwuraanyu vamoha ni anamaliviha a musoko ni anamattheka?” 
Luke5:31 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Khaahiyono yaale arino okumi animuhaawela meediku, mene aani oovoreiwa." 
Luke5:32 Miyo nkaaweenle owiitthana oororomeleya, mene aani anamattheka weera erukunxe murima.”" 
Luke5:33 Awo yaamweerela: “Oohusera a Yohaane annatthuka ni annavekela imaara sincipale ntokotho, oohusera a aFarisi*, vano oohuseraanyu annaca ni annawura.”" 
Luke5:34 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Nyuwo munoowera waanyeserera otthuka oolattuliwa a namatthomera owo areene nlelo ni yaawo? 
Luke5:35 Eniiwetho mahuku namatthomera aneeraawe avenxiwe wa yaawo. Mahuku awo eniitthuke oolattuliwa.” 
Luke5:36 Vano aahaathalihera yoolikanyiha ela: “Khaawo onaahula nipareyo na ekuwo enyowani ni onghela mukuwoni ya khalayi. Apaka yeeyo, onoonanariha ekuwo enyowani nitho nipareyo na ekuwo enyowani khaninkhala nnene mukuwoni ya khalayi." 
Luke5:37 Ni khaawo onghela eviinyu enyowani munrupani wa exapala ya khalayi. Apaka yeeyo, eviinyu enyowani enoophula murupa wa exapala, enoorihiwa, ni murupa onoonanariheya." 
Luke5:38 Ohiyanawaya, entthuneya weera eviinyu enyowani eheliwe munrupani munyowani." 
Luke5:39 Khaawo oneera amaliha owura eviinyu ya khalayi ontthunatho eviinyu enyowani. Vano oneera: Fataari eviinyu ya khalayi!” 
Luke6:1 eSaabadu emoha, Yeesu aviraka imatta sa etrigu, oohuseraawe yaapacera ovurula ni ohupula makala ekhuuraka inukusaya." 
Luke6:2 aFarisi* akina yaahaakoha: “Heeni mumpakaanyu yeeyo ehintthuniheriwa eSaabadu?” 
Luke6:3 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Khamunasome yeeyo aapankaawe Davide, owo ni asikhwaawe yaaraaya ni etala?" 
Luke6:4 Owo aavolowa Mpaani mwa Muluku, ni akuxaka ipaawu sootteelihiwa, aahooca seiyo saatthuniheriwa ociwa ni asaserdoti* paahi. Aahaavahatho asikhwaawe.”" 
Luke6:5 Vano aaweerela: “Mwaana a mutthu ti Apwiya a eSaabadu.” 
Luke6:6 eSaabadu ekina aavolowa muSinagogani* ni aapacera oxuttiha. Aakhala mwemmwe mulopwana a ntatanawe na moono mulopwana noorakala. 
Luke6:7 aFarisi* ni anamawera a nlamulo* yannaasaasa nthowa weera emoothere Yeesu. Tivawo yaamuwehawehanxaaya weera yoone Owo aariki amulamihe eSaabadu. 
Luke6:8 Yeesutho aasuwela yeeyo yuupuwenlaaya, ni aamweerela mutthu a ntata noorakala: “Muvenye ni ngwe variyari va.” Owo aavenya ni aarowa." 
Luke6:9 Yeesu aaweerela: “Miyo kinookohani: eheeni entthuneya opaka eSaabadu: yooreera, hoye hoye yoonanara, ovuluxa okumi, hoye hoye onanariha okumi?”" 
Luke6:10 Vano aahaawehaweha atthu ootheene yamurukureenre, anamweerela mutthu: “Mookole ntatananyu.” Owo aahookola, ni ntata naalamihiwa." 
Luke6:11 Vaheera awosa yaanyoonyiwaxa ni yaapacera ovaanela yaaworu weera epake eheeni ni Yeesu. 
Luke6:12 Wa nihuku nimoha Yeesu aavenya arowaka omwaako weera avekele, ni aamvekela Muluku ohiyu wootheene." 
Luke6:13 Oxaaka, aawiitthana oohuseraawe ni aahaathanla muloko neeli a yaawo, mwa yaawo aakhalinghaawetho ntoko arummwa." 
Luke6:14 Simeyoni aamvanghaawe nsina na Pedru, munneiye Andreiya, Yakobe, Yohaane, Filipe, Bartomlomeyo," 
Luke6:15 Matheyo, Tomaxi, Yakobe mwaana a Alfeyu, Simeyoni iitthaniwa Zeloti*," 
Luke6:16 Yudasi mwaana a Yakobe, ni Yudasi Iskariyoti aathatungwe namavariha." 
Luke6:17 Yeesu aakhuruwa vamoha ni yaawo ni aaheemela vanipuroni noothatawala. Yaakhala weiwe oohuseraawe ancipale, ni atthu ancipalexa yaarweenle wa elapo yootheene ya oYudeiya, oYerusaleemu ni wa elapo ya ophareiya ya oTiro ni oSidoni." 
Luke6:18 Yaahoowa weera emwiiwe ni elamihiwe ni irettasaya. Awo yaahasuliwa ni minepa soonanara yaalamihiwa. 
Luke6:19 Ootheene yanneerera weera emutave, niwoko ikuru saakhuma wa Yoowo saalamihaka ootheene." 
Luke6:20 Aawehaka oohuseraawe, Owo aaheera: “Ooreelihiwa nyuwo oohaawa, niwoko omwene wa Muluku ti wawinyu." 
Luke6:21 Ooreelihiwa nyuwo vaanaano mumvoliwa etala niwoko mmwivone. Ooreelihiwa nyuwo vaanaano muniinla, niwoko mmwitheiye." 
Luke6:22 Ooreelihiwa nyuwo atthu yoothanyani, yawoomolani, yooruwanani ni yanyohola nsinananyu ntoko nsina noonanara niwoko na Mwaana a mutthu." 
Luke6:23 Mutteeliwe nihuku nenno ni mutuphe ni ohakalala, niwoko ntthuvelonanyu ti ntokotoko wiirimu. Vano, makholowaaya yaapakenle maprofeeti mooteene yoowo." 
Luke6:24 Ii! Munoohaawa nyuwo, anamapuha, niwoko mohaakhela opepesiwawanyu." 
Luke6:25 Ii! Munoohaawa nyuwo mumvona vaanaano vaava, niwoko mmwivoliwe etala. Ii! Munoohaawa nyuwo muntheiya vaanaano vaava, niwoko mmwiilalamikele ni mmwiinle." 
Luke6:26 Ii! Munoohaawa nyuwo ootheene yawuulumelani yooreera, niwoko makholowaaya yaahaapakela mooteene yoowo maprofeeti oolokottha." 
Luke6:27 Vano Miyo kinooleelani nyuwo munkiiwa: mwaasivele amwiittanaanyu, ni mwaapakele yooreera yaale anoothanyani." 
Luke6:28 Mwaareelihe yaawo anoolaphani, ni mwaavekelele yaale anoohasulani." 
Luke6:29 Mukina oomanani nrama nimoha, mumvaheketho nrama nikina. Mukina oorulani malayaanyu, muhimukhoottihere yoowo onoorulanitho mukaandyo." 
Luke6:30 Mwaavahe ootheene anoovekelani, ni mukina oneera akuxe yeeyo eri yawinyu, muhinnyeserere woohokoloxerani." 
Luke6:31 Mwaapakele akina yeeyo nyuwo muntthunaanyu weera yoopakeleni. 
Luke6:32 Ntthuvelo heeni muneeraanyu mwaakhele mwaasivela yaawo anoosivelani? Mpaka anamattheka anaasivela yaawo anaasivela. 
Luke6:33 Ntthuvelo heeni muneeraanyu mwaakhele mwaapakela yooreera yaale anoopakani yooreera? Mpaka anamattheka ampaka hiiho. 
Luke6:34 Ntthuvelo heeni muneeraanyu mwaakhele mwawooliha yaale munaaroromelaanyu woohokoloxeranitho? Mpaka anamattheka anoowooliha anamattheka akina eroromelaka waakhelatho yootheene. 
Luke6:35 Mwaasivele amwiittanaanyu, mwaapakele yooreera ni ngwoolihe yaawo muhiwehereraka waakhela naari etthu yoohokoloxeriwa. Vano, ntthuvelonanyu nnikhale ntokotoko, ni mmwikhale anamwane a Musulusulu niwoko Owo ti ooreera murima wa yaale oohitthapela ni oonanara." 
Luke6:36 Mmoriwe ikharari ntoko Atithinyu ammoriwaaya ikharari. 
Luke6:37 Muhithorihe, ni khamurwa muthorihiwa. Muhithoriheleke mmooroni, ni khamurwa muthoriheleliwa mmooroni. Mulevelele, ni mmwileveleliwe." 
Luke6:38 Muvahe, ni mmwivahiwe. Aani, muringo wooreera: wookhitteleiya, woosareyaxa mpaka oyeeheiya. Vano, muringo munringelaanyu, mmwiringeliwetho.”" 
Luke6:39 Yeesu aahaaleelatho yoolikanyiha ela: “Mutthu oohoona onoowera omweettiha mutthu oohoona mukina? Khaanrowa omorela ooweeli mulittini? 
Luke6:40 Oohusera khahiyono oottittimeheiya ompwaha muhusihaawe. Ootheenetho yaale eneera erehereriwe nnenesene eniikhale ntoko muhusihaaya. 
Luke6:41 Heeni munaasaanyu ekokhola eri muniithoni na munninyu, muhoonaka etthaabwa eri muniithonimwanyu?" 
Luke6:42 Ongwereya hai nyuwo omweerela munninyu: ‘Munnaka, muhiyeke kivenxe ekokhola eri muniithonimwanyu,’ nyuwo muhiweraka woona etthaabwa eri muniithonimwanyu? Namwiixeera! Muvenxe toko etthaabwa eri muniithonimwanyu, ni vahoolowaya munimoona nnenesene weera muvenxe ekokhola eri muniithoni na munninyu." 
Luke6:43 Khoowowo mwiri wooreera oniima soowiima soonanara, ni khoowowo woonanara oniima soowiima sooreera." 
Luke6:44 Nyiri sootheene sinsuwanyeya ni soowiimasaya. Khaawo anrukula ifiigu sa nyiiwa, hata iwuuva* sa nyiri sa nyiiwa." 
Luke6:45 Mutthu ooreera onkhumiha itthu sooreera siri mmuhakhuni wooreera ori mmurimanimwawe, ni mutthu oonanara onkhumiha itthu soonanara siri mmuhakhuni woonanara ori mmurimanimwawe. Vano, eyanowaawe enuuluma yeeyo esareiye mmurimanimwawe." 
Luke6:46 Heeni munkiitthanaanyu Apwiya, Apwiya, muhipakaka yeeyo kinghimaaka?" 
Luke6:47 Miyo kinoowooniherani olikannaaweno yoole ongwa wa Miyo, oniiwa maswaaka ni ontthariha." 
Luke6:48 Owo onlikana mulopwana atekaka empa, aathipa woowiixa ni aapaka mathipelo vamwala. Siwaaka mirupi, mooloko waakusakula empa, khawaawenretho ottikinya empa ele, niwoko yaalipa." 
Luke6:49 Yooletho oniiwa maswaaka, ahiiwelelaka kinoomulikanxa ni mulopwana aatenke empa vatthayani yoohikhalano mathipelo. Okusakulakaru mooloko empa ele, yaapittuwa ni ophwateiyawaya waahaatta.”" 
Luke7:1 Amalihaka oleela sootheene iye muloko wa atthu, Yeesu aavolowa oKafarnawu." 
Luke7:2 Weiwe aamvoreiwa murumeiyi a kenturiyoni* mmoha, ahalaka vakhaani okhwa. Vano, apwiyaawe yaamusivela vancipale." 
Luke7:3 Owo aahiiwa suulummwaka sa Yeesu ni aahaarumiha asitokweene a aYuda, emvekelaka weera amulamihe murumeiyaawe." 
Luke7:4 Ephiyaka wa Yeesu, yaamudyoonttelela ni ovilela: “Mulopwana owo omphwanela weera Nyuwo mumpakele yeeyo," 
Luke7:5 niwoko owo onnasivela mulokwaahu ni aateka eSinagogaahu*.” 
Luke7:6 Yeesu aarowa ni yaawo. Ekhuveelaka vaate, kenturiyoni* aahaarumiha akhwaawe weera yaamuleele Yeesu: “Apwiya, muheeteteiye, niwoko nkiphwanenle owaakhelelani vathi wa nipathonaka." 
Luke7:7 Hiihotho nkinuupuwela weera koophwanela woociceerani. Muulume nsu nimoha paahi, ni murimeiyaaka anaalamihiwe." 
Luke7:8 Vano, miyo kookhalanotho asitokweenaaka kimphwanelaaka owiiwelela, ni anakhotto ankiiwelela miyo. Kimmweerela mukina: ‘Orowe!’ ni onoorowa; ni mukina: ‘Owe!’ ni onimoowa. Kimmweerela murumeiyaaka: ‘Opake ela!’ ni onoopaka.”" 
Luke7:9 Woowiiwa seiye, Yeesu aatikhina ni yoowo, ni aarukunuwelaka atthu ancipale yaamutthara, aaweerela: “Miyo kinooleelani weera nkiphwannye hata oYixrayeli nroromelo ntoko nna.”" 
Luke7:10 Vano alopwana yaarumihiwe yaahokoleela owaani ni yaamphwanya murumeiyi alamihiweene. 
Luke7:11 Vahoolowaya Yeesu aarowa wa esidade yiitthaniwa Nayimi ni oohuseraawe, nitho atthu ancipale yaarowa vamoha ni Yoowo." 
Luke7:12 Ekhuveelaka mulako wa esidade, eera ateexiwaka mutthu ookhwa, mwanawe mmoharu naamukhweli. Atthu ancipale a esidade yaari ni naamukhweli ole." 
Luke7:13 Emoonaka, Apwiya yaammorela ikharari ni yaamweerela: “Muhiinle!”" 
Luke7:14 Vano aawaattamela ni aatava edyaneesa ya muttembo, ni yaawo yaateenxe yaaheemela. Yeesu aamweerela: “Mmiravo, Miyo kinooleela: ovenye!”" 
Luke7:15 Yoowo aakhwiiye aakilaathi ni aapacera otthekula, ni Yeesu aahaavaherera amayawe." 
Luke7:16 Ootheene yaasareya ni woova ni yaamuttottopela Muluku. Awo yaaheera: “Mprofeeti Mutokweene oonikhumelela variyariwahu. Muluku aaxekura muloko wa atthwaawe.” 
Luke7:17 Ihaali iye sa Yeesu saamwaramwareiya mweelaponi yootheene ya oYudeiya ni mweelaponi soowaattamanano. 
Luke7:18 Oohuseraawe Yohaane yaamuleela itthu sootheene iye. Awiitthanaka eeli a yaawo," 
Luke7:19 aahaarumihela Apwiya weera yaakohe: “Nyuwo ti Yoole eera awe, hoye hoye ningweherereke mukina?”" 
Luke7:20 Erowaka wa Yeesu, alopwana ale yaamweerela: “Yohaane mpatisa oonirumiha weera nookoheeni: ‘Nyuwo ti Yoole eera awe, hoye hoye ningweherereke mukina?’”" 
Luke7:21 Ehuhuweene yeele Yeesu eera aalamihaka atthu ancipale yaarino ikwerere, iretta sitokotoko ni minepa soonanara, nitho awoonihaka oohoona ancipale." 
Luke7:22 Vano Owo aawaakhula arummwa: “Muhokolowe ni mwamuleele Yohaane yeeyo moonnaanyu ni mwiiwalaanyu: oohoona annoona; oorakala anneetta; anamakokho annalamihiwa; oohiiwa anniiwa; akhwiiye annavenyererihiwa, ni masu ooreeraxa annalaleeriwa oohaawa;" 
Luke7:23 nitho ooreelihiwa ti yoowo ohinkihovela Miyo.” 
Luke7:24 Evenyaka oohuseraawe Yohaane, Yeesu aapacera wuuluma ni atthu ancipale mwaha wa Yohaane eeraka: “Eheeni mwaarongwaanyu woona munikareni? Ettheere entannyiwaka ni epheyo?" 
Luke7:25 Apaale mwaarongwe woona eheeni? Mulopwana awanreene ikuwo sooreeraxa? Moone, yaawo angwara ikuwo sooreeraxa ni antthara mihakhu, ankhala mpaani sitokotoko sa mamwene." 
Luke7:26 Vatthuva, mwaarongwe woona eheeni? Mprofeeti? Aani, Miyo kinooleelani, ompwahatho mprofeeti." 
Luke7:27 Owo ti yoole mwaha wa yoowo elempwe: “Miyo nkimurumihe murummwaaka ohoolowanyu; owo anaareherere ephirowaanyu ohoolowanyu.” 
Luke7:28 Miyo kinooleelani weera khaawo ongyariwa ni muthiyana ompwaha Yohaane mpatisa. Wa soothesene, ooyevaxa moomweneni wa Muluku ti mutokweene ompwaha yoowo.”" 
Luke7:29 Muloko wa atthu wootheene mpaka anamaliviha a musoko, yiiwaka masu a Yeesu, yaahaakhulela weera ephiro ya Muluku ti ya ekhaikhai, niwoko yaapatisiwa ni Yohaane." 
Luke7:30 Vaheera aFarisi* vamoha ni anamawera a nlamulo* yaakhootta otthuna Muluku aakhalannaawe ni yaawo, niwoko khayaapatisiwe ni Yohaane." 
Luke7:31 Yeesu aapwaherera wuuluma: “Vano, ni eheeni kineeraaka kilikanxe ekhapira ela? Eri ntoko eheeni?" 
Luke7:32 Eri ntoko anamwane ekilaantheene omerekadu, ekhuwelelanaka akina ni akwaaya yeeraka: ‘Hiyo noowiipelani mpetta, mene khamwiinale; naahiipa ecipo yoolalamika, mene khamwiinlale.’" 
Luke7:33 Vano, aahoowa Yohaane mpatisa ahicaaka epaawu, hata ahiwuraka eviinyu, ni muneera: ‘Owo ookhalano munepa woonanara.’" 
Luke7:34 Aahoowa Mwaana a mutthu acaaka ni awuraka, ni muneera: ‘Ori vawo Namaca ni Namawura, Nthamwenaaya anamaliviha a musoko ni anamattheka.’" 
Luke7:35 Miruku sinooniheriwa ntoko ekhaikhai ni anamwanaaya ootheene!” 
Luke7:36 Iitthaniwaka Yeesu ni muFarisi* mmoha weera ace ni yoowo, Yeesu aarowa owannyawe ni aakilaathi vameesa." 
Luke7:37 Asuwelaka weera Yeesu eera acaaka vaate wa muFarisi*, muthiyana mukina a esidade yeele, namattheka mmoha, aaruuha mukoomba wa alabastre ni makhura oowunkhelaxa ni" 
Luke7:38 aaheemela ottuli wa Yeesu vanaawoni. Iinlaka, aapacera onaaniha inaawo sa Yeesu ni maithoraawe. Vahoolowaya aahuukuttha ni mayihaawe inaawo sa Yeesu, anabeeca inaawo iye anattikitthela ni makhura oowunkhelaxa." 
Luke7:39 Oonaka yeeyo, muFarisi* aamwiitthanne Yeesu aahiixeerela: “Mulopwana Ola aari mprofeeti, aamusuwela taani onimutava ni muthiyana heeni yoola: namattheka!”" 
Luke7:40 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Simeyoni, kintthuna wooleelani etthu.” Owo aamwaakhula: “Mukileele, Muhusiha.”" 
Luke7:41 Yeesu aamweerela; “Atthu eeli yaamukopela namakopiha. Mmoha aamukopela idinaariyu* macira mathanu, ni mukina idinaariyu* miloko mithanu." 
Luke7:42 Khaawo ooweeli yaawera oliva, tivawo namakopiha aalevelenlaawe ooweeli ikoongorisaya. Taani a yaawo eeli aneera amusivele namakopiha ompwaha mukina?”" 
Luke7:43 Simeyoni aamwaakhula: “Kinuupuwela weera ti yoole oleveleliwe idinaariyu* macira mathanu.” Yeesu aaheera: “Ti hiiho paahi.” 
Luke7:44 Vahoolowaya, aamurukunuwela muthiyana ni aamweerela Simeyoni: “Moomoona muthiyana ola? Miyo koovolowa mpaanimwanyu, mene nyuwo khamukivanghe maahi weera kirapihe inaawosaka. Olatho oonaaniha inaawosaka ni maithoraawe ni ohuukuttha ni mayihaawe." 
Luke7:45 Nyuwo khamukuuluminghe ni ebeecu, mene muthiyana ola, kivolowakaru va, khahiyerenre obeeca inaawosaka." 
Luke7:46 Nyuwo khamukittikitthenle muruwaaka ni makhura, mene owo ohiitthela makhura oowunkhelaxa vanaawoniwaka." 
Luke7:47 Tivawo, Miyo kinooleelani: sootthekasawe sincipale sooleveleliwa, niwoko owo oosivela vancipale. Yooletho onleveleliwa vakhaani, onsivela vakhaanitho.”" 
Luke7:48 Vano Yeesu aamweerela muthiyana: “Sootthekasanyu sooleveleliwa.” 
Luke7:49 Oolattuliwa akina yaapacera weerelana yaworu: “Ola taani mpaka onlevelela soottheka?” 
Luke7:50 Yeesu aamweerela muthiyana: “Nroromelonanyu nohoovuluxani. Murowe mmuretteleni.” 
Luke8:1 Vahoolowaya Yeesu anneetteetta musidadeni ni mmittettheni sikina, alaleiyaka masu ooreeraxa a omwene wa Muluku. Vano oohusera muloko neeli yaari ni Yoowo," 
Luke8:2 nitho asithiyana akina yaalamihiwa ni minepa soonanara ni iretta. Aari Mariya iitthaniwa oMagadalene, mwa yoowo saakhumme minepa soonanara mithannamiili," 
Luke8:3 Yohana, mwaariye Kuza, mutokweene a empa ya Herodi, Susana ni akina ancipale. Asithiyana ala yannaakhavihera yaawo ni sooreelasaya." 
Luke8:4 Ethukumanaka atthu ancipale ni ewaaka wa Yeesu atthu a isidade soohiyanahiyana, Yeesu aahaathalihera yoolikanyiha ela:" 
Luke8:5 “Namwaala aavenya weera aale. Aalaka mmiso, mpatta mmoha waamorela mukerekhere wa ephiro. Waanyikaliwa, ni apalame a wiirimu yaahooca." 
Luke8:6 Mpatta mukina waamorela vamalukuni, ni waamenlaaya, waahuuma niwoko khayaariwo maahi." 
Luke8:7 Mpatta mukina waamorela vanyiiwani sunnungwe vamoha ni mmiso, ni mmiso ole waavuvuriwa." 
Luke8:8 Mukinatho waamorela vatthayani yooreera, waahunnuwa ni waahiima soohepha sooreera imaara ncira opwaha waaliwe.” Aahimaawe yeeyo, Yeesu aakhuwela: “Yoowo orino maaru oowiiwa, iiweke!”" 
Luke8:9 Oohuseraawe yaamukoha etaphulelo ya yoolikanyiha ele. 
Luke8:10 Owo aaweerela: “Wa nyuwo moovahiwa esuwelo ya ixiiri sa omwene wa Muluku, mene wa akina Miyo kinnaaleela ni soolikanyiha weera: “yoonaka, khaanoona, ni yiiwaka, khaaniiwexexa.”" 
Luke8:11 Etaphulelo ya yoolikanyiha ti ela: Mmiso ti nsu na Muluku. 
Luke8:12 Mmiso waamorenle mukerekhere wa ephiro ti yaawo aniiwa. Vano, ongwa Diyabu* ni omvenxa nsu mmirimanimwaya, weera ehiroromele, hata ehivuluxiwe." 
Luke8:13 Mmiso waamorenle vamalukuni ti yaawo yiiwaka masu anaakhelela ni ohakalala, mene khaanono mikwankhwaari. Anroromela ehuhu ya vakhaani, mene yaaphiyaka ehuhu yooweereriwa, anoohiya." 
Luke8:14 Mmiso waamorenle vanyiiwani ti yaawo aniiwa, mene epwahereraka, anoovuvuriwa ni sooweeteteela, mihakhu, ni soohaawela sa okumi. Vano khaaniitthwa." 
Luke8:15 Mmiso waamorenle vatthayani yooreera ti yaawo aniiwa nsu na Muluku ni murima wooreera ni wa nnene, ansunga nno mmirimanimwaya, ni anniima soowiima moovilelani." 
Luke8:16 Khaawo ompattiha onyaari ni ompopheela ni elaata, hoye hoye oniikaathi vathi vabeettini. Ohiyanawaya, oniikaathi vanipuroni nootthuneya, weera yaawo amvolowa yooneke." 
Luke8:17 Vano, itthu sootheene sa wiiphiini nsikhale soothupululiwa, nitho itthu soovithiwa nsikhale soosuwelihiwa ni soowiiheriwa ngwaarani." 
Luke8:18 Tivawo, muupuwele nnenesene moota woowiiwa nyuwo. Owo orino, onoovahiwatho. Vaheera owo ohikhalanne, mpaka yeeyo onuupuwelaawe weera ookhalano, onimwaakhiwa.”" 
Luke8:19 Amayawe Yeesu ni axunneiye yaarowa weera emoone, mene yaahooceela omwaattamela niwoko na atthu ancipale." 
Luke8:20 Vano mukina aamweerela Yeesu: “Amayinyu ni axunninyu ari vaate, ni antthuna wuuluma ni Nyuwo.”" 
Luke8:21 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Amayaka ni axunnaka ti yaale aniiwa masu a Muluku ni aniiwelela yaawo.” 
Luke8:22 Nihuku nimoha Yeesu aaweerela oohuseraawe: “Nrowe nilapuwele okhopela wa enyandya.” Awo yaavolowa munikulani ni yaapwaha. 
Luke8:23 Yeettihaka nikula, Yeesu aakona. Vano, yaakhumelela weera ettheku yaakhuruwela vanyandyani moota wooweera naapacera osareya nikula maahi, ni awo yaavalavelaxa." 
Luke8:24 Oohusera yaamvenxa Yeesu, ekhuwelaka: “Muhusiha, Muhusiha, nnooriheya!” Owo aavenya, anahiiha epheyo ni mitekuteku. Vano sootheene saamaala." 
Luke8:25 Aahaakoha oohuseraawe: “Nroromelonanyu nri woowi?” Etuthuwaka ni etikhiniheiyeene, awo yaakohana yaworu: “Taani Ola? Mpaka onlamulela epheyo ni mitekuteku, ni seiye simmwiiwelela?”" 
Luke8:26 Yaaheettiha erowaka mweelaponi ya oGeraseno, yaari okhopela wa oGalileiya." 
Luke8:27 Akhuruwakaru Yeesu, aamukumanano Yoowo mutthu a esidade aarino minepa soonanara. Okhuma khalayi owo khaawara, hata khaakhala vaate, mene variyari wa mahiye." 
Luke8:28 Amoonaka Yeesu, aakhuwela, anuuwela vanaawoni sa Yeesu, anamweerela akhuwelaka vancipale: “Muntthuna eheeni ni miyo, Yeesu, Mwaana a Muluku Musulusulu? Kinoodyoonttelelani weera muhikittaruxe.”" 
Luke8:29 Vano, Yeesu ahinaaye aalamulela weera munepa woonanara okhume wa mulopwana ole. Imaara sincipale munepa ole wannamvara. Hata ni inaawo ni matata ootthukiwa ni onyooro ni innyereriweene wa anamalipelela, owo annapasa onyooro ni annaronghiwa ni munepa woonanara vanipuroni na meekhaawe." 
Luke8:30 Yeesu aakoha: “Nsinanawo taani?” Munepa waamwaakhula: “Elexawu*.” Minepa soonanara sincipale saavolowa mwa mulopwana ole. 
Luke8:31 Minepa soonanara iye saamdyoonttelela Yeesu weera ahilamulele vanipuroni noowiixeraxa. 
Luke8:32 Nakupa mutokotoko a ikhumba eera acaaka vanttumuxani nne. Minepa soonanara saamdyoonttelela Yeesu weera atthunihere ovolowa munakupani mmwe, ni Yeesu aatthunihera." 
Luke8:33 Sikhumaka mwa mulopwana, minepa iye saavolowa munakupani mmwe, ni nakupa ootheene aatthimaka arowaka oxepani mpatta wa ephareiya, ni aamireiyamo." 
Luke8:34 Yoonaka itthu seereiye, awo yaakukhula ikhumba yaatthawa ni yaathaliha itthu iye musidadeni ni mmawaani," 
Luke8:35 ni muloko wa atthu waarowa weera woone yeeyo yeereiye. Omwaattamelaka Yeesu, waamoona mulopwana mwa yoowo saakhumme minepa soonanara, akilaantheene vanaawoni sa Yeesu, awanreene ni uupuwelaka nnenesene. Vano awo yaahoova." 
Luke8:36 Yaawo yoonne eyo yaathalihera muloko wa atthu moota mulopwana ole aalamihiwaawe. 
Luke8:37 Vano muloko wa atthu wootheene a elapo ya oGeraseno waamudyoonttelela Yeesu weera apwahe, niwoko waasareya woova. Owo aavolowa munikulani, anahokolowa." 
Luke8:38 Mulopwana mwa yoowo saakhumme minepa soonanara aamudyoonttelela Yeesu weera amutthunihere orowa ni Yoowo. Yeesutho aamulaxera, amweerelaka:" 
Luke8:39 “Muhokoleele owaani ni mwaathalihere atthu yeeyo Muluku oopakenlaaweni.” Hiiho mulopwana aarowa ni aahaathalihera atthu ootheene a esidade yeeyo Yeesu ampakenlaawe yoowo. 
Luke8:40 Aahokolowaawe Yeesu, atthu ancipale yaamwaakhelela, niwoko ootheene yaamungweherera." 
Luke8:41 Vano mulopwana iithaniwa Yairu, muhooleli a eSinagoga*, aahoowa ni aahuuramela vanaawoni sa Yeesu, amudyoonttelelaka weera arowe owannyawe," 
Luke8:42 niwoko mwanawe, muthiyana mmoharu, aahanle vakhaani okhwa. Mwaana ole aari wookwanaka iyaakha muloko ni piili. Yeesu areene mphironi, atthu ancipale yaamwaameleliha." 
Luke8:43 Vanonto, aari vaavaawo muthiyana mmoha aahaawa iyaakha muloko ni piili ni eretta ya okhuma ephome. Aamaliha muhakhwaawe wootheene ni mameediku, mene khaawo yaawera omulamiha." 
Luke8:44 Owo aaheemela ottuli wa Yeesu, aatava nleembe na soowarasawe, ni woowaakuveya ephome yaamaala okhuma." 
Luke8:45 Yeesu aahaakoha: “Taani okitamve?” Vano, ekhoottaka ootheene, Pedru aamweerela: “Muhusiha, atthu ancipale ala ammaraana variyariwanyu ni angwaamelelihani.”" 
Luke8:46 Yeesutho aaheera: “Ookhala okitamve. Koosuwela weera wa Miyo sookhuma ikuru.” 
Luke8:47 Muthiyana ole, oonaka weera khaawera opwaha akina ehinaaye omusuwela, aahoowa athukumelaka ni aahuuramela vanaawoniwawe. Vamaithoni wa ootheene, aamuthalihera Yeesu heeni aamutamvaawe, nitho weera aalamihiwa woowaakuveya." 
Luke8:48 Yeesu aamweerela: “Mwaana, nroromelonawo nohoolamiha. Orowe mmuretteleni.”" 
Luke8:49 Yeesu nlelo uulumaka, aaphiya mukina a owannyawe Yairu, muhooleli a eSinagoga*, ni aamweerela: “Mwaninyu ohookhwa. Muhimuxupetho Muhusiha.”" 
Luke8:50 Iiwalaawe yeeyo, Yeesu aamweerela Yairu: “Muhoove, muroromele paahi, ni owo onoolamihiwa.”" 
Luke8:51 Aphiyaka owannyawe Yairu, Owo khaamutthuninghe ovolowa mutthu mukina ni Yoowo, ahikhanle Pedru, Yohaane, Yakobe ni atithawe ni amayawe mwaana." 
Luke8:52 Ehuhu emoha yeeyo, muloko wootheene weera olalamikaka ni omwiinlelaka mwaana. Yeesu aaheerela: “Muhiinle, owo khakhwiiye, mene onookona.”" 
Luke8:53 Awo yaamutheiya, esuwelaka weera ohookhwa." 
Luke8:54 Vano Owo aamvara ntata, anamweerela: “Mwaamwali, ovenye!”" 
Luke8:55 Munepaawe waahokolowa ni aavenya woowaakuveya. Vano Yeesu aahaalamulela weera emvahe yooca. 
Luke8:56 Asinaangolowaawe yaatikhinaxa, mene Yeesu aahaalamulela weera ehaaleele akina yeeyo yeereiye." 
Luke9:1 Awiitthanaka Yeesu oohusera muloko neeli, Owo aahaavaha ikuru ni owera woomola minepa soonanara ni olamiha iretta." 
Luke9:2 Aahaarumiha weera elaleiye omwene wa Muluku ni yaalamihe aretta," 
Luke9:3 eeraka: “Muhikuxe naari etthu mphironi: hata ttootto, hata nrupa, hata yooca, hata musurukhu, naari mukaandyo mukina." 
Luke9:4 Empa muneeraanyu mwavolowe, mwakhale mwemmo mpaka opwaha." 
Luke9:5 Yakhala akina eneera ehiwaakheleni, mwavenye esidade ele, mwatathe ntthupi na inaawosanyu ntoko eneneero ya nthorihelonaya.”" 
Luke9:6 Hiiho awo yaavenya ni yaarowa mmittettheni, elaleiyaka masu ooreeraxa ni elamihaka mweelaponi yootheene." 
Luke9:7 Herodi tetrarkha* aahiiwa suulummwaka sa itthu sootheene seereiye ni aatikhina, niwoko akina yeera weera Yohaane oovenyerera mookhwaani." 
Luke9:8 Akina yeera weera Eliya aahiixoonihera, ni akinatho weera mmoha a maprofeeti a khalayi aahokoleela mookumini." 
Luke9:9 Heroditho aaheera: “Miyo koomuhita Yohaane. Vano, taani Ola mwa Yoowo kiniiwaaka itthu iya?” Ni aamwaasaasa weera amoone." 
Luke9:10 Ehokolowaka, arummwa yaamuthalihera yeeyo yaapankaaya. Vano Yeesu aahaarowano arummwa meekhaayaru ni yaarowa esidade yiitthaniwa Betsayida." 
Luke9:11 Atthu ancipaletho yaahoonelela nipuronawe ni yaamutthara. Vano Owo aawaakhelela ni aahaaleela mwaha wa omwene wa Muluku, ni aahaalamiha yaawo yaatthuna olama." 
Luke9:12 Wooxekuwani, oohusera muloko neeli yaamwaattamela Yoowo ni yaamweerela: “Mwaaleele atthu ancipale weera ettimule erowe mmamattani ni mmittettheni soowaattamana, weera yaphwanye yooca ni mapuro ookona, niwoko va nri nipuro noothowa itthu.”" 
Luke9:13 Wa soothesene, Owo aawaakhula: “Mwaavahe nyuwo etthu weera ece.” Awo yaamweerela: “Nrino va ipaawu ithanu ni ihopa piili paahi, ohikhanle weera nirowe naathumele sooca atthu ancipale ala.”" 
Luke9:14 Vano, yaari iwe waattamela macira miloko mithanu asilopwanaru. Vano Owo aaweerela oohuseraawe: “Mwaalamule weera ekilaathi wa mapuro-mapuro a miloko mithanu mithanu.”" 
Luke9:15 Oohusera yaapaka yeeyo, ni ootheene yaakilaathi." 
Luke9:16 Akuxaka ipaawu ithanu ni ihopa piili ni awehaka osulu, aareeliha ni aameyanyiha. Vahoolowaya aahaavaherera oohusera weera yaakawele atthu ancipale." 
Luke9:17 Ootheene yaahooca ni yaavona. Oohusera yaathukumanyiha mipapara muloko ni miili soosareya ni mivithe. 
Luke9:18 Emaara emoha Yeesu eera avekelaka meekhaawe. Vano, oohuseraawe yaari ni Yoowo, ni aahaakoha: “Atthu ankeerela Miyo taani?”" 
Luke9:19 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Akina aneera Yohaane mpatisa, akina Eliya ni akinatho weera mmoha a maprofeeti a khalayi oovenyerera.”" 
Luke9:20 “Ankha nyuwo,” aahaakoha, “Munkeerela Miyo taani?” Pedru aamwaakhula: “Kristu a Muluku.”" 
Luke9:21 Yeesu aawoopereraxa oohuseraawe weera ehaaleele akina yeeyo. 
Luke9:22 Aaweerela: “Ontthuneya weera Mwaana a mutthu ahaawe itthu sincipale, akhoottiwe ni asitokweene a muloko, ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni anamawera a nlamulo*, akhwe ni avenyerere nihuku nanaararu.”" 
Luke9:23 Yeesu aaweerela ootheene: “Akhala mukina ontthuna okitthara Miyo, iikhootte muneenaawe, akuxe muttandaawe khula nihuku ni akitthare." 
Luke9:24 Vano, yoowo ontthuna ovuluxa okumaawe, anaayeleele, mene yoowo ongyeleela okumaawe niwoko na Miyo, anaavuluxe." 
Luke9:25 Yooreera heeni ophwanya elapo ya vathi yootheene, aphwataka hoye hoye ayeleelaka muneenaawe?" 
Luke9:26 Akhala mukina aneera uuliwe muru niwoko na Miyo ni maswaaka, Mwaana a mutthu anuuliwetho muru wa yoowo aawaaka moovuwanimwawe ni moovuwani mwa Atithawe ni mwa andyelo ootteela." 
Luke9:27 Miyo kinoororomelihani weera akina ari va kheerwa ekhwa ehinaaye woona omwene wa Muluku.” 
Luke9:28 Eviraka mahuku mathannamararu vahoolo woohima itthu iye, Yeesu aamurowano Pedru, Yakobe ni Yohaane ni aawela vamwaakoni weera avekele." 
Luke9:29 Avekelaka hiihaale, ekhalelo ya ekhovaawe yaathatuwa, ni ikuwosawe saakhala sootteela ntoko waara wa overinya." 
Luke9:30 Atthu eeli, Moisesi ni Eliya, yaahiixoonihera ni yaapacera wuuluma ni Yeesu." 
Luke9:31 Yaahiixoonihera moovuwani ni yaahuuluma mwaha wa ovenyawawe Owo eeraawe akwanihere oYerusaleemu. 
Luke9:32 Pedru ni asikhwaawe yaamooseela, ni evenyaka, yaahoona ovuwa wa Yeesu ni atthu eeli yaari ni Yoowo." 
Luke9:33 Atthu eeli ale yeeraka epwahe, Pedru aamweerela Yeesu: “Muhusiha, ti wooreera okhala vaava hiyo. Nrowe nipake mikottha miraru: mmoha wa Nyuwo, mukina wa Moisesi ni mukina wa Eliya.” Owo khaasuwenle yeeyo aahimmaawe." 
Luke9:34 Owo uulumaawe, naahoowa nihutte ni naahaakhuneela, ni awo evolowaka munihutteni, yaahoova." 
Luke9:35 Naakhuma munihutteni nsu neenre: “Ola ti Mwanaka Oothanliwa, mmwiiwe Yoola!”" 
Luke9:36 Emalihaka wiiwa nsu, oohusera yaahoona weera aahanle Yeesu paahi. Awo yaathokorora yeeyo mmurimanimwaya. Wa mahuku ale khayaathalihera akina yeeyo yoonnaaya." 
Luke9:37 Oxaawaya, ekhuruwaka vamwaakoni, atthu ancipale yaahoowa okumana ni Yeesu." 
Luke9:38 Mulopwana mmoha variyari wa atthu ancipale aakhuwela: “Muhusiha, kinoodyoonttelelani weera mungwehe mwanaka, niwoko ori mmoharu kirinaaka." 
Luke9:39 Munepa onnamvara ni woowaakuveya onnakhuwela. Vano munepa onnamutatha ni onnamukhumiha nipheru. Munepa mahuku ootheene onnalekela omuhiya ni onnamuhaaxa. 
Luke9:40 Kohaadyoonttelela oohuseraanyu weera yoomole, mene khayaawenre.”" 
Luke9:41 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Ekhapira yoohiroromela ni yoonanara! Mpaka yaakhani kineeraaka kikhale ni koovileleni? Mukiwiihere va mwaninyu.” 
Luke9:42 Mmiravo awaaka, munepa waamvonyera vatthayani omthukumelihaka. Yeesutho aahiiha munepa woonanara, anamulamiha mmiravo, anamvaherera wa atithawe." 
Luke9:43 Ootheene yaatikhina niwoko na otokweenaawe Muluku. Ereene ootheene ootikhina mwaha wa sootheene Yeesu aapakaawe, Owo aaweerela oohuseraawe:" 
Luke9:44 “Mwiiwe nnenesene itthu kineeraaka kooleeleni: Mwaana a mutthu anaavarihiwe mmatatani mwa alopwana.” 
Luke9:45 Vaheera awo khayiiwexenxe etaphuleloweene yeele. Yaahiipithihiwa wa yaawo weera ehiiwexexe. Awo yaahoova omukoha mwaha wa yeeyo. 
Luke9:46 Oohusera yaapacera waakhulana mwaha wa mutokweene taani. 
Luke9:47 Yeesu, asuwelaka soowuupuwelasaya, aamukuxa mwaana ni aamweemexa mukhwipimwawe." 
Luke9:48 Vano aaweerela: “Mutthu ommwaakhela mwaana ola mwa Nsinanaka, onkaakhelatho Miyo. Ni yoowo onkaakhela Miyo, ommwaakhelatho Yoole okiruminghe. Vano, yoole oyevanxe variyariwanyu, anaakhale mutokweene.”" 
Luke9:49 Yohaane aamweerela: “Muhusiha, naamoona mulopwana oomolaka minepa soonanara mwa Nsinananyu ni naamooceeliha, niwoko owo khahiyono awihu.”" 
Luke9:50 Yeesu aamweerela: “Muhimooceelihe, niwoko yoole ohiinanne ni nyuwo, anaakhale ni nyuwo.”" 
Luke9:51 Ekhuveelaka ehuhu Yeesu eeraawe awelihiwe wiirimu, Owo aalakela ni murima wootheene orowa oYerusaleemu." 
Luke9:52 Aahaarumiha arumeiyi ohoolowawe. Arumeiyi yaarowa mmuttettheni wa oSamariya weera yamurehererele. 
Luke9:53 Mulokotho wa atthu ale, yoonaka weera Yeesu aatthuna orowa oYerusaleemu, khayaatthunne omwaakhela." 
Luke9:54 Yoonaka yeeyo, Yakobe ni Yohaane yaamukoha: “Apwiya, muntthuna weera hiyo niitthane mooro wa wiirimu weera waananarihe?”" 
Luke9:55 Yeesutho aarukunuwa anaahiiha," 
Luke9:56 anarowa mmuttettheni mukina. 
Luke9:57 Yeettaka mphironi, mutthu mmoha aamweerela: “Miyo kinimoottharani mapuro ootheene Nyuwo muntthunaanyu orowa.”" 
Luke9:58 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Akhwatte aakhalano inyattasaya, ni apalame a wiirimu aakhalano ipuurusaya, mene Mwaana a mutthu khanono nipuro noowiiyaathi muru.”" 
Luke9:59 Aamweerela mukina: “Mukitthare.” Mene mulopwana aamwaakhula: “Apwiya, mukihiye toko kaavithe atithaka.”" 
Luke9:60 Yeesu aamweerela: “Mwaahiye akhwiiye evithaneke yaaworu. Wa soothesene, nyuwo murowe ni mwalaleiye omwene wa Muluku.”" 
Luke9:61 Mukinatho aamweerela: “Kinimoottharani, Apwiya, mene mukihiye kihokolowe ni karaxele toko emusaaka.”" 
Luke9:62 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Yoole omvara ehipa awehaka ottuli, khamphwanela omwene wa Muluku.”" 
Luke10:1 Vahoolowaya, Yeesu aahaathanla oohusera miloko mithannamiili neeli ni aahaarumiha eeli-eeli vahoolowawe wa isidade sootheene ni mapuro ootheene Owo aatthunaawe orowa," 
Luke10:2 aweerelaka: “Soohepha siri sincipale, mene anamiteko ari vakhaani. Tivawo, mwaavekele Apwiya a soohepha weera Awo yaarumihe anamiteko akinatho wa soohephasaya." 
Luke10:3 Murowe! Miyo kinoorumihani ntoko ikhondoolo variyari wa miici. 
Luke10:4 Muhikuxe nihottha, hata murupa, hata ikwakwaatta, ni muhimuulumihe mutthu mphironi." 
Luke10:5 Mwaavolowaka mpaani, mweerele toko: ‘Murettele wa empa ela.’" 
Luke10:6 Akhala iwo mulopwana a murettele, murettelaanyu onuukhale ni yoowo; aahikhala, murettelaanyu ngwoohokoleeleni." 
Luke10:7 Mwakhale mpaani mmo, mucaaka ni muwuraka yeeyo eneeraaya yoovaheni, niwoko namuteko omphwanela nlivonawe. Muhaakakhanyihe empa ni empa." 
Luke10:8 Mwaavolowaka esidade emoha ni mwaakheliwaka nnenesene, mwaceeke yeeyo eneeraaya yawiikaathereni ohoolowanyu." 
Luke10:9 Mwaalamihe aretta ari weiwo ni mwaaleele yaawo: ‘Omwene wa Muluku wohookhuveelani.’ 
Luke10:10 Mwaavolowaka esidade emoha ni mwaahaakheliwaka nnenesene, mwakhumele mmisewenimwaya ni mweere:" 
Luke10:11 ‘Mpaka ntthupi na esidadaanyu nri nnaawonimwahu, nootatha ntoko yoowootheriwaanyu. Musuwele nnenesene yeela: omwene wa Muluku wookhuveela.’" 
Luke10:12 Miyo kinooleelani: Wa nihuku nno na othorihiwa nnikhale nootepaxa esidadeene yeeyo opwaha oSodoma. 
Luke10:13 Ii! Onoohaawa weyo, Korasini, Ii! Onoohaawa weyo, Betsayida, niwoko sootikhiniha sipakiwe mwa weyo saapakiwe oTiro ni oSidoni, saano khalayi isidade iye sirukunxaleene murima, siwanreene isaakho ni siihenleene ettuura!" 
Luke10:14 Wa nihuku na othorihiwa onuukhale woovileleya wa oTiro ni oSidoni opwaha wa weyo. 
Luke10:15 Ni weyo Kafarnawu, onuuwelihiwe wiirimu? Hoye! Weyo onuukhuruwele oHadesi*." 
Luke10:16 Yoole ongwiiwelelani, onkiiwelelatho Miyo. Yoole onookhoottani, onkikhoottatho Miyo. Vano, yoole onkikhootta, onimukhootta Yoowo okiruminghe.”" 
Luke10:17 Oohusera miloko mithannamiili neeli yaahokolowa ni ohakalalaxa yeeraka: “Apwiya, mpaka minepa soonanara sinniiwelela hiyo mwa Nsinananyu.”" 
Luke10:18 Owo aahaakhula: “Miyo koomoona Satana amoraka wiirimu ntoko overinya. 
Luke10:19 Kohoovahani ikuru weera munyikaleke inowa ni awalisi, aani, ikuru soopwaha sa sootheene seiyo sa amwiittana. Awo kheerwa yoonanarihani." 
Luke10:20 Wa soothesene, muhihakalale niwoko minepa soonanara sinoowiiwelelani, mene muhakalale niwoko masinaanyu aalempwa wiirimu.”" 
Luke10:21 Ehuhuweene yeele, Yeesu ahakalalaxaka mwa Munepa Wootteela aaheera: “Miyo kinoottottopelani Nyuwo, Atiithi, Apwiya a wiirimu ni vathi, niwoko moovitha itthu iya wa asuweli ni anamiruku, ni mohaathupululela iya asikhaani. Aani Atiithi, eyo yohoosivelihani." 
Luke10:22 Atithaka aakivaha itthu sootheene. Khaawo onsuwela weera Mwaana taani, ehikhanle Atiithi, ni khaawo onsuwela weera Atiithi taani, ahikhanle Mwaana ni yaale Mwaana ontthunaawe waathupululela.”" 
Luke10:23 Vano Owo aahaarukunuwela oohuseraawe ni aaweerela meekhaayaru: “Ooreelihiwa ti maitho anoona yeeyo munoonaanyu. 
Luke10:24 Vano, Miyo kinooleelani weera maprofeeti ni mamwene mancipale yaatthunaxa woona yeeyo nyuwo munoonaanyu, mene khayoonne, ni wiiwa yeeyo muniiwaanyu, mene khayiiwale.”" 
Luke10:25 Emaara emoha namawera a nlamulo* aaheemela weera amweerere Yeesu, ni aamukoha: “Muhusiha, kipake eheeni weera kiphwanye okumi woohimala?”" 
Luke10:26 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Eheeni elempwale munlamuloni? Munsoma hai?” 
Luke10:27 Owo aamwaakhula: “Mwaasivele Apwiya Mulukwaanyu ni murimaanyu wootheene, okumaanyu wootheene, ikurusanyu sootheene ni muupuwelowaanyu wootheene,” nitho “munsivele mukhwiinyu ntoko muniisivelaanyu muneenaanyu.”" 
Luke10:28 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Mohaakhula nnene. Mpake yeeyo, ni munookhala ni okumi.”" 
Luke10:29 Vano owo, atthunaka wiitaphula, aamukoha Yeesu: “Taani mukhwaaka?”" 
Luke10:30 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Mulopwana mmoha aarowa oYerusaleemu mpaka oYeriko. Mphironi aavariwa ni anamwiiya. Awo yaamurula ikuwosawe, enammana, enapwaha emuhiyaka owo ahanleene vakhaani okhwa." 
Luke10:31 Yaaheereiyatho weera aavira mphironi mmwe musaserdoti*. Amoonaka mulopwana ole, musaserdoti* aavira mpatta mukina." 
Luke10:32 Hiihotho muLeevi, aphiyaka vanipuroni nne ni amoonaka, aavira mpatta mukina." 
Luke10:33 Vano, muSamariya, areene ni mukwahaawe, aaphiya weiwe aamphwannyaawe mulopwana. Amoonaka, aammorela ikharari." 
Luke10:34 Aamwaattamela anamutthuka makhwatta, ahelaka eviinyu ni makhura. Aamwiikaathi mulopwana vasulu wa enamaawe, anamurongha wa empa ya aletto, anamwiikaathi nnenesene." 
Luke10:35 Wa oxaawaya, aakhumiha idinaariyu* piili ni aamvaha mwaneene a empa ya aletto amweerelaka: ‘Munkosoope. Kaahokolowaka, kinimoolivani sootheene muneeraanyu munanarihe.’" 
Luke10:36 Munuupuwela hai? Taani a atthu araru ale aari mukhwaawe mulopwana aavariwe ni anamwiiya?” 
Luke10:37 “Yoole aammorenle ikharari mulopwana ole,” aamwaakhula namawera a nlamulo*. Yeesu aamweerela: “Murowe ni mwapake mooteene yoowo.”" 
Luke10:38 Eettaka Yeesu ni oohuseraawe, yaaphiya mmuttettheni, weiwo muthiyana mmoha, iitthaniwa Marta, aamwaakhenlaawe owannyawe." 
Luke10:39 Mariya, munneiye Marta, aakilaathi vanaawoni sa Apwiya iiwaka masu a Yeesu." 
Luke10:40 Wa soothesene, Marta aari ni miteko sincipale saatthuneya oreherera. Owo, amwaattamelaka Yeesu, aamukoha: “Apwiya, khamumpwattha weera munnaka ookihiya meekhaaka ni miteko? Munleele weera akikhavihere!”" 
Luke10:41 Apwiya yaamwaakhula: “Marta, Marta, munimweeteteya ni munoocecewuka ni itthu sincipale." 
Luke10:42 Vanonto, entthuneya etthu emoha paahi. Mariya oothanla mpatta wooreera, ni owo khoowa ovenxiwa wa yoowo.”" 
Luke11:1 Nihuku nimoha Yeesu eera avekelaka vanipuroni nimoha. Amalihaka, mmoha a oohuseraawe aamweerela: “Apwiya, munixuttihe ovekela ntoko Yohaane aaxuttinghaawe oohuseraawe.”" 
Luke11:2 Owo aaweerela: “Nyuwo mwaavekelaka, mweereke: ‘Atiithi, Nsinananyu ntteelihiwe. Omwenaanyu orwe." 
Luke11:3 Munivahe yoocaahu ya khula nihuku. 
Luke11:4 Munilevelele sootthekasahu, niwoko hiyo nnaalevelela yaawo annitthekela. Muhinihiye neereriwaka.’”" 
Luke11:5 Vano aaweerela: “Noone ha weera mmoha a nyuwo akhalanneene nthamwene, ni onoorowa empaawe ohiyu eriyari amweerelaka: ‘Nthamwenaaka, mukoolihe ipaawu tthaaru," 
Luke11:6 niwoko nthamwenaaka mmoha oohoowa ni mukwahaawe, ni miyo nkinono etthu yoomvaha.’" 
Luke11:7 Vano owo ori mpaani ommwaakhula: ‘Muhikixupe. Nsele noowaliwa ni anamwanaaka anookona ni miyo. Nkingwera ovenya weera koovaheeni yeeyo mukivekenlaanyu.’ 
Luke11:8 Miyo kinooleelani: Naari ahivenyaka weera amvahe ipaawu niwoko ori nthamwenaawe, owo anaavenye ni anaamvahe sootheene ontthunaawe niwoko na ovilelawawe woohuuliwa muru." 
Luke11:9 Tivawo kinooleelani: Muvekele, ni munoovahiwa. Mwaasaase, ni munoophwanya; Mmane nsele, ni munoohuleliwa." 
Luke11:10 Ootheene amvekela, animwaakhela; yoole onaasaasa, onoophwanya; ni wa yoole ommana nsele, onoohuleliwa." 
Luke11:11 Tiithi heeni a nyuwo, mwaninyu oovekelani ehopa, onoomvaha enowa?" 
Luke11:12 Hoye hoye avekela nooce, onoomvaha walisi?" 
Luke11:13 Waari weera nyuwo murookhalaru atthu onanara murima munsuwela waavaha itthu sooreera anamwaniinyu, Atithinyu ari wiirimu anootepaxa waavaha Munepa Wootteela yaawo anaavekela!”" 
Luke11:14 Yeesu eera oomolaka munepa woonanara wa mutthu aari oohuuluma. Okhumakaru munepa woonanara, mutthu oohuuluma aahuuluma, ni muloko wa atthu ancipale waatikhina." 
Luke11:15 Akinatho a yaawo yaaheera: “Owo ongwera woomola minepa soonanara ni ekhavihero ya Beelzebuli, mwaneene a minepa soonanara.”" 
Luke11:16 Akinatho yaamweerera, emvekelaka eneneero ya wiirimu." 
Luke11:17 Asuwelaka soowuupuwelasaya, Yeesu aaweerela: “Omwene wootheene wookawanyeya muneenaayaru onoomalela mmilepeni, ni empa emoha yookawanyeya eneenaayaru, enoopittuwa." 
Luke11:18 Satana iikawanyiha muneenaawe, moota heeni omwenaawe oneeraaya okhale? Miyo kinghima yeeyo niwoko mweenraanyu weera Miyo kinoomola minepa soonanara ni ekhavihero ya Beelzebuli." 
Luke11:19 Miyo koomola minepa soonanara ni ekhavihero ya Beelzebuli, anamwaniinyu anoomola minepa soonanara ni nsina nawani? Tivawo, awo asineenaaya eniikhale aphukaanyu." 
Luke11:20 Waaritho weera Miyo kinoomola minepa soonanara ni ekatha ya Muluku, vano, omwene wa Muluku wohoorweelani." 
Luke11:21 Mulopwana mmoha a ikuru, ni awanreene ni iyuuma sa ekhotto, alipelelaka empaawe, itthusawe nsikhale soolipa." 
Luke11:22 Mukinatho oolipaxa angwanano ni angwina, onoomwaakha iyuuma iye owo aaroromelaawe, ni anaakawe mihakhusawe." 
Luke11:23 Yoole ohikhanle ni Miyo, onookiinanano, ni yoole ohintakansa vamoha ni Miyo, onoomwaramwaxa." 
Luke11:24 Munepa woonanara wakhuma wa mutthu, omvira mmapuroni a nikare, waasaasaka wiitthuuwa. Waahiphwanya, oneera: ‘Kinoohokoleela empa miyo kaakhumelenlaaka.’" 
Luke11:25 Waaphiyaka, onoophwanya empa yookwesiwa ni yoorehereriwa." 
Luke11:26 Vano munepa ole onrowa ni onruuha minepa mithannamiili siri sootepaxa onanara. Sivolowaka mmo, sinkhala mwemmo. Hiiho ehuhu yoomalihera ya mutthu ole eniikhale yoonanaraxa opwaha yoopacera.”" 
Luke11:27 Yeesu aahimaawe masu ale, muthiyana mmoha a atthu ancipale aakhuwela: “Ooreelihiwa ti muthiyana ooyanreni ni owaamwihaleni.”" 
Luke11:28 Owo aamwaakhula: “Ooreelihiwa oophwaha ti yaale aniiwa masu a Muluku ni aniiwelela.” 
Luke11:29 Yaandyeerereyaka atthu, Yeesu aapacera ohima: “Ekhapira ela ti ekhapira yoonanara. Ela ennavekela eneneero yootikhiniheiya, mene kheewowo eneneero eneeraaya evahiwe, ehikhanle eneneero ya Yoonasi." 
Luke11:30 Vano, ntoko Yoonasi aaraawe eneneero wa atthu a oNinive, hiihotho Mwaana a mutthu anaakhale eneneero wa ekhapira ela." 
Luke11:31 Apwiyamwene a ohitto eniivenye nihuku na othorihiwa vamoha ni atthu a ekhapira ela ni awo eniithorihele ela, niwoko awo yaaweenle ottaiwenexa weera yiiwe miruku sa Salomoni. Vano Yoowo ori va ti mutokweene ompwaha Salomoni." 
Luke11:32 Atthu a oNinive eniivenye nihuku na othorihiwa vamoha ni ekhapira ela ni eniithorihele ela, niwoko yiiwaka olaleiya wa Yoonasi, yaarukunxa murima. Vano Yoowo ori va ti mutokweene ompwaha Yoonasi." 
Luke11:33 Khaawo ompattiha onyaari ni oniikaathi nipuro noowiipitheya, naari vathi va laata. Ohiyanawaya, oniikaathi nipuro nootthuneya weera yaawo amvolowa, yooneke waara." 
Luke11:34 Maitho ari waara wa erutthu. Maithwaanyu yaakhalaka ooreera, erutthwaanyutho eniisareiye waara. Maithwaanyutho yaakhalaka oonanara, erutthwaanyutho eniisareiye epiphi." 
Luke11:35 Tivawo, mwiipasoope weera waara ori mpuwamwanyu ohikhale epiphi." 
Luke11:36 Erutthwaanyu yootheene yasareya waara, ehikhalanaka mpatta mukina mpiphini, munoomwaleeliwa nnenesene ntoko waara wa onyaari onoomwaleelani.”" 
Luke11:37 Yeesu amalihaka wuuluma, muFarisi* mmoha aamwiitthanela yooca. Vano Yeesu aarowa ni aakilaathi vameesa." 
Luke11:38 muFarisi*, oonaka weera Yeesu khaanyangwe ahinaaye oca, aatikhina." 
Luke11:39 Vano Apwiya yaamweerela: “Nyuwo aFarisi* munrapiha omokoni wa ekoomixi ni wa esasaani, mpuwatho moosareya ohaawela mihakhu ni onanara." 
Luke11:40 Alolo! Yoowo opanke omokoni, khapanketho mpuwa?" 
Luke11:41 Mwaavahetho yeeyo eri mpuwa wa esasaani oohaawa,ni mmoone weera sootheene moorapiheliwa." 
Luke11:42 Ii! Munoohaawa, nyuwo aFarisi*! Niwoko munimvaha Muluku anaamuloko a sooreerela sooreeraxa, aruda* ni a makukhu oohiyanahiyana a maphuwa ootheene a mutuphini, mene khamumpwatthela ekhaikhai ni osivela wa Muluku. Ontthuneya weera nyuwo mukwanihereke yeeyo, muhaahiyaka anaamuloko." 
Luke11:43 Ii! Munoohaawa, nyuwo aFarisi*, niwoko nyuwo munnasivela mapuro oopacera muSinagogani* ni wuulumihiwa mwaatthuni." 
Luke11:44 Ii! Munoohaawa nyuwo, niwoko muri ntoko mahiye ahinooneya, mwa yaawo atthu amviramo ehisuwelaka.”" 
Luke11:45 Namawera a nlamulo* mmoha aamwaakhula: “Muhusiha, mwaahimaka itthusene seiyo, munniruwanatho hiyo.”" 
Luke11:46 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Ii! Munoohaawa nyuwotho, anamawera a nlamulo*, niwoko munnaathateliha atthu ni soolemela awo ahingweraaya okuxa, ni nyuwo asineenaanyu khamunaakhavihera oteexa naari ni ekatha emoha." 
Luke11:47 Ii! Munoohaawa nyuwo, niwoko munootekela mahiye a maprofeeti, ereenetho makholowaanyu asineenaanyu yaawiivale." 
Luke11:48 Hiiho nyuwo munkhalela onamoona weera munaakhulela yeeyo makholowaanyu yaapankaaya. Awo yaawiiva maprofeeti ni nyuwo munaatekela mahiyaaya. 
Luke11:49 Tivawo Muluku eenraawe ni mirukusawe: ‘Miyo kinimoorumihelani maprofeeti ni arummwa. Vano awo eniiwiive akina ni eniyaasoonde akinatho.’ 
Luke11:50 Tivawo ekhapira ela eniikhalihiwe ni mulattu wa ephome ya maprofeeti ootheene eyeehiwe okhuma ompacereroni wa elapo ya vathi: 
Luke11:51 okhuma ephome ya Abeli mpaka ya Zakariya, iiviwe variyari wa altaari* ni Empa ya Muluku. Aani, Miyo kinooleelani weera ekhapira ela eniikhalihiwe ni mulattu wa sootheene seiye." 
Luke11:52 Ii! Munoohaawa, nyuwo anamawera a nlamulo*, niwoko moovenxa exaavi ya esuwelo. Nyuwo asineenaanyu khamvolongwe, ni mowooceeliha yaale yeera evolowe.”" 
Luke11:53 Avenyaka vaavaale Yeesu, aFarisi* ni anamawera a nlamulo* yaapacera wiinanano vancipale ni omukohakoha sincipale," 
Luke11:54 yeereraka weera emvare ni masu eeraawe uulume. 
Luke12:1 Ehuhuweene yeele, ethukumanneene atthu ancipale moota wooweera yaapacera okwattulana mukina ni mukhwaawe, Yeesu aapacera wuuluma toko ni oohuseraawe eeraka: “Mwiipasoope ni eferementu ya aFarisi* eyo tiiyo yoowiixeera." 
Luke12:2 Itthu sootheene siri wiiphini, nsooneleliwe, nitho itthu sootheene soovithiwa, nsisuwelihiwe." 
Luke12:3 Yeeyo muhimmaanyu mpiphini, eniyiiwiwe othana, ni seiyo nyuwo mwaapiyaanyu mpaani, nsilaleiwe vanipathoni." 
Luke12:4 Miyo kinooleelani, asinthamwenaaka, muhiwoove yaawo aniiva erutthu ni vahoolowaya kheewo angweraaya." 
Luke12:5 Vano Miyo kinoowooniherani taani ontthuneya omoova. Mmoove Yoole oneera iiva erutthu, onooweratho ovonyera mmooroni. Aani, Miyo kinooleelani: mmooveke Yoowo." 
Luke12:6 Khaanthumihiwa masiri mathanu wa makhoobiri meeli? Wa soothesene, khaniwowo naari nimoha a yaale ninttiwaliwa ni Muluku." 
Luke12:7 Mpaka mayihi ootheene a mmurumwanyu ari oowaalikeliwa. Muhoove, nyuwo mootthuneyaxa opwaha masiri mancipale." 
Luke12:8 Miyo kinooleelani: ootheene onkilapa vamaithoni wa atthu, Mwaana a mutthutho anaamuromole vamaithoni wa andyelo a Muluku." 
Luke12:9 Vaheera yoole onkikhootta vamaithoni wa atthu, anaakhoottiwe vamaithoni wa andyelo a Muluku." 
Luke12:10 Yoole ommuulumela Mwaana a mutthu, anaaleveleliwe, mene yoole omveiha Munepa Wootteela, kharwa aleveleliwa." 
Luke12:11 Mwaaronghiwaka muSinagogani* ni ohoolo wa asitokweene ni atthu anlamula, muheeteteiye ni moota heeni muneeraanyu mwiixaakihe, hoye hoye mweere," 
Luke12:12 niwoko ehuhuweene yeeyo Munepa Wootteela oniwooxuttiheni yeeyo entthuneya weera muhime.” 
Luke12:13 Mukina a atthu ancipale aamweerela: “Muhusiha, munleele munnaka weera akikawele yoohiyeriwa*.”" 
Luke12:14 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Mulopwana, taani okithanlale okhala Mphukaanyu, hoye hoye Namakawaanyu?”" 
Luke12:15 Vano aaweerela: “Mwiipasoope! Musembe wakhalaru moota wa wiinlela mihakhu, niwoko okumi wa mutthu ti woopwahaxa sooreelasawe.”" 
Luke12:16 Aahaathalihera yoolikanyiha ela: “Ematta ya namapuha mmoha yaaruwera vancipale. 
Luke12:17 Owo aahuupuwela muneenaawe: ‘Keereke hai? Nkinono woothokorora soohephasaka.’ 
Luke12:18 Vano aaheera: ‘Koosuwela kineeraaka kipake. Kinrowa okankhanyula matathaaka ni oteka makina matokweene, ni mmo kinoothokorora etriguwaaka ni sooreelasaka." 
Luke12:19 Miyo nkiixeerele: ‘Nyuwo mookhalano sooreela sincipale soothokororiwa wa iyaakha sincipale. Mwiitthuuwe, muce, ngwure ni muhakalale.’" 
Luke12:20 Wa sootheene, Muluku aamweerela: ‘Mulolo! Ohiyuweene yoola munimookhwa. Vano, anaahalane taani ni yeeyo mureherenraanyu?’" 
Luke12:21 Hiihaawo onimweereiya ni yoole onthokorora mihakhusawe, mene vamaithoni wa Muluku khahiyono namapuha a mmunepani.”" 
Luke12:22 Vano Yeesu aaweerela oohuseraawe: “Tivawo Miyo kinooleelani: muhiixeeteteele ni okumaanyu, mwa yeeyo muneeraanyu muce, hata ni erutthwaanyu yoowaraanyu." 
Luke12:23 Okumi ori wootthuneyaxa opwaha yooca, ni erutthu yoopwaha soowara." 
Luke12:24 Mwaawehe anakhuku – awo khaanaala, hata khaanghepha; khaanono empa yoothokorora itthu, hata matatha. Wa soothesene, Muluku onnaaciha. Nyuwo mootepa otthuneyaxa waapwaha apalame!" 
Luke12:25 Taani a nyuwo ongwera waandyeerera okumaawe ni ewoora emoha niwoko na weeteteiya? 
Luke12:26 Woonaka weera khamungwera opaka etthu ekhaaneene ela, heeni muneeteteelaanyu itthu sootheene sikina?" 
Luke12:27 Ngwehe moota heeni sinunnuwaaya ithutu: iyo khasimvara muteko, hata khasintthava. Wa sootheene, Miyo kinooleelani weera, hata Salomoni moovuwanimwawe wootheene, khaawanre ntoko emoha ya seiyo." 
Luke12:28 Muluku awariha hiiho malaxi a ntuphini olelo ariwo, omaalotho anoovonyeriwa mmooroni, wootepaxa anoowariheni nyuwo, atthu a nroromelo vakhaani?" 
Luke12:29 Muhaasaase eheeni muneeraanyu muce, hoye hoye ngwure. Muhiixeeteteele ni yeeyo." 
Luke12:30 Vano, ti amalapo antthara itthusene seiya. Atiithitho ansuwela weera nyuwo muntthuna seiya." 
Luke12:31 Ohiyanawaya, mwaasaase omwene wa Muluku, ni itthu seiya mmwaandyeerereliwe." 
Luke12:32 Muhoove, muhuwo mukhaaneene, niwoko waahaasiveliha Atiithi woovahani omwene." 
Luke12:33 Muthumihe murinaanyu ni mvahe samahala. Mwiipakele mahottha ahinrowa othaala yaaviraka ehuhu, aani muhakhu woohimala wiirimu, weiwo khaawo namwiiya onkhuveela, hata tthumpwiha ohintthumpwihaawemo." 
Luke12:34 Vano, onkhalaayawo muhakhwaanyu, weiwotho onuukhale murimaanyu." 
Luke12:35 Mukhale oolikaneene weera murumeele ni onyaaraanyu opwaherere ovarela," 
Luke12:36 ntoko onyaari wa yaale anaaweherera apwiyaaya ohokolowa ofestani ya othelana, weera yaaphiyakaru ni yamana nsele, awo ewere ohula woowaakuveya." 
Luke12:37 Ooreelihiwa ti arumeiyi awo apwiyaaya yaaphiyakaru eneeraaya yaaphwanye elipelelaka. Miyo kinoororomelihani weera apwiya ale eniiwarele yoorumeela, eniyaakilaathihe vameesa ni eniyaarumeele." 
Luke12:38 Hata awo ephiye ohiyu eriyari, hoye hoye oyaaka ni oxa, ooreelihiwa ti yaale Apwiya eneeraaya yaaphwanye yiireherenreene." 
Luke12:39 Tivawo, mwiiwexexe yeeyo: Muneene a empa aasuwenle ewoora heeni aneeraawe aphiye namwiiya, khaatthunihera weera yiiyiwe empa." 
Luke12:40 Nyuwotho mwiireherere, niwoko Mwaana a mutthu onimoowa ehuhu yoohiweherereya.”" 
Luke12:41 Pedru aahaakoha: “Apwiya, munnithalihera yoolikanyiha ela hiyo, hoye hoye wa atthu ootheene?”" 
Luke12:42 Apwiya yaamwaakhula: “Vanonto, murumeiyi taani oororomeleya ni a miruku, Apwiya amukhalinghaaya muhooleli a arumeiyi weera aavahe yoocaaya wa ehuhu yootthuneya?" 
Luke12:43 Ooreelihiwa ti murumeiyi mwa yoowo Apwiyaawe yaaphiyaka, eneeraaya emphwanye apakaka hiiho." 
Luke12:44 Miyo kinoororomelihani weera awo eniimukhalihe mutokweene a sooreelasaya sootheene. 
Luke12:45 Noone hatho weera murumeiyi owo oniixeerela muneenaawe: ‘Apwiyaaka anoopisa ohokolowa.’ Vano, onoopacera waamana arumeiyi alopwana ni arumeiyi athiyana, acaaka, awuraka ni ahapaliwaka." 
Luke12:46 Apwiya a murumeiyi owo animoowa ehuhu ohinaawehereraawe nitho ohisuwenlaawe. Awo eniimuthikile eriyariru ni eniimwiikaathi vanipuroni na atthu oohiroromeleya. 
Luke12:47 Murumeiyi owo onsuwela otthuna wa apwiyaawe ni ahinareherera, hata ahinapaka yeeyo antthunaaya, onoowaxuliwa moota woowoopiha." 
Luke12:48 Yooletho ohisuwenle otthunawaya ni ompaka itthu soophwanela ottaruxeliwa, anaawaxuliwe vakhaani. Mwa yoowo ovahiwe sincipale, anaanyesereriwe sincipale, ni mwa yoowo ovahereriwe sincipale, anaavekeliwe soopwahaxa." 
Luke12:49 Kirweenle oruuha mooro mweelaponimu, ni hapo kaatthunaxa weera mooro owo opattihiwe!" 
Luke12:50 Ontthuneyatho weera kipatisiwe, ni moota kihooxiwaaka murimaaka mpaka owo oneeraaya okwaniheriwe!" 
Luke12:51 Nyuwo munuupuwela weera kirweenle oruuha murettele mweelaponimu? Miyo kinooleelani: Hoye! Ohiyanawaya, kirweenle oruuha ohiiwanana." 
Luke12:52 Okhuma vaanaano vaava mpaka ohoolo eniikhale amusi athanu oohiiwanana mukina ni mukhwaawe: araru yiinanaka ni eeli, ni eeli yiinanaka ni araru." 
Luke12:53 Eniikhale oohiiwanana atiithi ni mwaana mulopwana ni mwaana owo ni atithawe; amaayi ni mwaana muthiyana ni mwaana owo ni amayawe; pwiyamwaana ni mwaara a mwanawe ni mwaara owo ni pwiyamwaanaawe.” 
Luke12:54 Owo aaweerela atthu ancipale: “Nyuwo moonaka nihutte nikhumaka ninkela nsuwa, muneera woowaakuveya: ‘Enoorupa!’ ni hiihaawo enimweereya." 
Luke12:55 Yoopaka epheyo ya ohitto, muneera: ‘onoovihaxa’ ni hiihaawo onimweereya." 
Luke12:56 Anamwiixeera! Moosuwela otaphulela mikhalelo sa elapo ni sa wiirimu. Muhinsuwela hai otaphulela ehuhu ya vaanaano? 
Luke12:57 Niwoko heeni muhinthorihaanyu muneenaanyu yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai? 
Luke12:58 Mukina a nyuwo, aarowaka ni mwiittanaawe wa mulipa oowuuluma milattu, mweerere weera mwiiraane ni yoowo mphironi weera owo ahoorongheni wa mphuki, ni mphuki ahiwinnyerereni wa mpilixa, ni mpilixa ahoovonyereni okaliposo." 
Luke12:59 Miyo kinooleelani weera khamunrowa okhuma muhinaaye oliva nikhoobiri noomalihera.” 
Luke13:1 Ehuhuweene yeele, akina yaari vaavaale yaamuthalihera Yeesu moota heeni Pilatu aatakansenraawe ephome ya aGalileiya akina ni sooveleelasaya." 
Luke13:2 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Munuupuwela weera aGalileiya awo yaari anamattheka waapwaha ootheene akina niwoko na ohaawa moota ola? 
Luke13:3 Miyo kinooleelani weera hoye! Mwaahirukunxatho murima, nyuwo ootheene munooriheya." 
Luke13:4 Munuupuwelatho weera atthu muloko ni athannaararu akhwiiye ehuhuweene yeele yaamorenle wa yaawo etoore* ya Silowami yaari ni milattu waapwaha ootheene akina a oYerusaleemu? 
Luke13:5 Miyo kinooleelani weera hoye! Mwaahirukunxatho murima, nyuwo ootheene munooriheya.”" 
Luke13:6 Vano aahaathalihera yoolikanyiha ela: “Mulopwana mmoha aakhalano mwiri wa efiigu waaphatteiwe mmattamwawe ya iwuuva*. Aarowa waasaasa soowiima mwemmwe, vaheera khaaphwannyeru naari emoha." 
Luke13:7 Tivawo aamweerenlaawe yoole aawehaweha ematta ya iwuuva*: ‘Sookwana iyaakha tthaaru miyo kaasaasaka soowiima muumu, ni nkimphwanya. Wuuhe! Niwoko na heeni nneeraahu nihiye owuwuraka etthaya ela siiyoweene?’" 
Luke13:8 Namawehaweha ole aamwaakhula: ‘Apwiya, muhiye ola mpaka mwaahiyu, ni miyo nkithipe mukerekheremwaya ni kinoohela ethaadyira." 
Luke13:9 Mwaahiyu wiima, onooreera. Waahiima, muuheke.’”" 
Luke13:10 eSaabadu emoha Yeesu eera axuttihaka muSinagogani* emoha," 
Luke13:11 ni vale aakhala muthiyana mmoha aarino munepa waamvoreiha wa iyaakha muloko niithanatthaaru. Owo anneetta oowuurameene, nitho khaawera wiinuwa." 
Luke13:12 Amoonaka, Yeesu aamwiitthana vahoolo ni aamweerela: “Muthiyana, nyuwo mohoopowa ni erettaanyu.”" 
Luke13:13 Vano aamwiiyaathera matataawe, ni woowaakuveya owo aahiinuwa ni aamuttottopela Muluku." 
Luke13:14 Mutokweene a eSinagoga*, anyoonyiweene niwoko Yeesu aalamihalaawe nihuku na eSaabadu, aaheerela muloko wa atthu: “Aakhala mahuku mathannamosa vasimanani antthuneya ovara muteko. Ngwe mahukweene yaawo weera mulamihiwe, ohikhanle eSaabadu!”" 
Luke13:15 Apwiya yaamwaakhula: “Anamwiixeera! Ootheene a nyuwo munnataphula eSaabadu emombe, hoye hoye buuru a munikhoolani ni munnakuxa muronghaka ovaha maahi." 
Luke13:16 Vano, khoontthuneya weera muthiyana ola, mwaana a Abrahaamu, aatthukiwe ni Satana wa iyaakha muloko niithanatthaaru, otaphuliwa eSaabadu mwa yeeyo aatthukeliwaawe?”" 
Luke13:17 Eerakaru hiiho, amwiittanaawe ootheene yaahuuliwa muru, mene muloko wa atthu wannahakalala niwoko na sootikhiniha sootheene Owo aapakaawe." 
Luke13:18 Vano Yeesu aakoha: “Omwene wa Muluku onlikana ni eheeni? Kilikanxeke ni eheeni? 
Luke13:19 Ori ntoko enuku ya emostarda* mutthu aakuxalaawe ni aanlaawe ottimbeniwawe. Ele yaahunnuwa ni yaathatuwa mwiri, ni apalame a wiirimu yaapaka ipuurusaya mphandinimwaya.”" 
Luke13:20 Owo aakohatho: “Kilikanxe ni eheeni omwene wa Muluku? 
Luke13:21 Ori ntoko eferementu aakuxalaawe muthiyana ni aatakansalaawe ni ephepa yincipale mpaka onyaruwa yootheene.” 
Luke13:22 Vano Yeesu aarowa axuttihaka musidadeni ni mmittettheni, apwahereraka mpatta wa oYerusaleemu." 
Luke13:23 Mukina aamukoha: “Apwiya, yaale eniivuluxiwe ari vakhaani?” Owo aamweerela:" 
Luke13:24 “Mwiilipihe vancipale ovolowa mulako woophureya, niwoko Miyo kinooleelani weera ancipale eniyeerere ovolowa, mene kheerwa ewera." 
Luke13:25 Vano, mwaneene a vaate aavenyaka ni aawalaka mulako, nyuwo mmwikhale vaate mmanaka nsele mwaavekelaka: ‘Apwiya, munihulele nsele!’ Wa sootheene awo eniyaakhule: ‘Nkoosuwenleni, hata nkisuwenle munkhumaanyuwo.’" 
Luke13:26 Vano nyuwo mmweere: ‘Naahooca ni naawura vamoha ni Nyuwo ni mwaaxuttiha mmisewenimwahu.’ 
Luke13:27 Mene awo eniyaakhule: ‘Nkoosuwenleni, hata nkisuwenle munkhumaanyuwo. Mususeke wa Miyo, ootheene nyuwo mumpaka soonanara!’" 
Luke13:28 Vale onuukhale wiinla, ni okhuuriha maino nyuwo muneeraanyu mmoone Abrahaamu, Isaaki ni Yakobe ni maprofeeti ootheene moomweneni wa Muluku, mureenetho nyuwo vaate." 
Luke13:29 Atthu eniiwe ninkhuma nsuwa, ninkela nsuwa, ottuthuwani ni ohitto, ni eniikilaathi vameesa moomweneni wa Muluku." 
Luke13:30 Mwa yeeyo, aakhala ookisera eniikhale oopacera, ni oopacera eniikhale ookisera.”" 
Luke13:31 Ehuhuweene yeele akina a aFarisi* yaamwaattamela Yeesu ni yaamweerela: “Mvenye va ni murowe elapo ekina, niwoko Herodi ontthuna owiivani.”" 
Luke13:32 Owo aawaakhula: “Mwamuleele khwatte owo: kinimoomola minepa soonanara ni kinoolamiha muloko wa atthu olelo ni omaalo, ni nihuku nanaararu kinookwanihera mutekwaaka." 
Luke13:33 Ontthuneyatho opwaherera olelo, omaalo ni omurotto, niwoko vekhaikhai khoongwereya wuupuwela weera naari mprofeeti mmoha akhwe vanipuroni nikina, ohikhanle oYerusaleemu." 
Luke13:34 Yerusaleemu, Yerusaleemu, weyo ongwiiva maprofeeti ni onaavonya maluku yaawo orumiheliwaawo: Imaara ihayi Miyo kaatthunaaka waathukumanya anamwaniinyu ntoko nttehi ninaathukumanyaaya axaanaaya mmapuphani, mene khoontthuna!" 
Luke13:35 Moone, empaawo yoohiiwa yoothaamiwa. Miyo kinooleela weera weyo khoorwa okoonatho mpaka ehuhu oneeraawo weere: ‘Ooreelihiwa ti Yoowo ongwa mwa Nsina na Apwiya.’”" 
Luke14:1 eSaabadu emoha, woovolowani mpaani mwa muFarisi* oottittimiheya weera ace, ootheene yannangwehexexa." 
Luke14:2 Ohoolowawe aakhala mulopwana mmoha oovoreiwa epuulu. 
Luke14:3 Yeesu aahaakoha aFarisi* ni anamawera a nlamulo*: “Onootthuniheya olamiha eSaabadu, naari hoye?”" 
Luke14:4 Mene awosa yaamaala. Hiiho Yeesu aamukuxa mulopwana, anamulamiha, anamweerela oroweke." 
Luke14:5 Vano Yeesu aahaakoha: “Mmoha a nyuwo akhalano mwaana, hoye hoye emombe, ni eyo yamorela muhimeni nihuku na eSaabadu, owo khanrowa oruula woowaakuveya?”" 
Luke14:6 Ni awo khayaawenre waakhula etthu. 
Luke14:7 Oonaka moota heeni yaalattuliwe yaathanlaaya ihice soopacera vameesa, Yeesu aahaathalihera yoolikanyiha ela:" 
Luke14:8 “Mukina oolattulani ofestani ya othelana, muhikilaathi nipuro noottittimiheyaxa, niwoko apaale oolattuliwa mukina oottittimiheyaxa woopwahani nyuwo." 
Luke14:9 Wakhala hiiho, yoowo oolattunleni nyuwo eeli, anaawe ni aweereleni: ‘Mwaavirihe awo.’ Vano, muyevihiweene, onootthuneya weera nyuwo mukilaathi nipuro nanaaveeli." 
Luke14:10 Nyuwotho mwalattuliwa, mukilaathi vanipuroni nanaaveeli weera awa yoole oolattunleni, owo anaaweereleni: ‘Nthamwene, mukilaathiki vanipuroni noottittimiheyaxa.’ Vano nyuwo munoottittimiheya vamaithoni wa atthu ootheene oolattuliwa." 
Luke14:11 Ootheene aniivuwiha, eniikhale ooyevihiwa, ni ootheene aniiyeviha, eniikhale oovuwihiwa.”" 
Luke14:12 Vano Yeesu aamweerela yoowo aamulattunle: “Nyuwo mwaarehereraka efesta, hoye hoye yooca ya oxekuwa, muhaalattule asinthamwenaanyu, axunninyu, hoye hoye asinaangolo, hata asikhwiinyu anamapuha. Mwaalattula, awotho emaaraaya anoowera woolattulani, ni hiiho mmwitthuveliwe." 
Luke14:13 Mwaarehereraka yooca ya efesta, mwaalattule oohaawa, oorakala, ootuthunya ni oohoona." 
Luke14:14 Nyuwo mmwikhale ooreelihiwa, niwoko awo khaanono moota woowootthuvelani. Ntthuvelonanyu nniwe moovenyererani wa oowaakhuleliwa ni Muluku.”" 
Luke14:15 Iiwaka yeeyo, mmoha a yaawo yaari vameesa vamoha ni Yeesu, aamweerela: “Ooreelihiwa yoole aneera ace yooca moomweneni wa Muluku.”" 
Luke14:16 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Mutthu mmoha aareherera yooca ya efesta etokotoko, ni aahaalattula atthu ancipale." 
Luke14:17 Ephiyaka ehuhu ya efesta, aamurumiha murumeiyi weera aaleele yaawo yaalattuliwe eeraka: ‘Ngweeke, niwoko sootheene soolikana.’" 
Luke14:18 Vano awo yaapacera mmoha-mmoha odyoonttelela weera khaningwa. Oopacera aaheera: ‘Koothuma vaanaano va ematta, ni kintthuna kirowe weera koone. Dyoontte, akilevelele.’" 
Luke14:19 Mukina aaheera: ‘Koothuma imombe muloko, ni kinoorowa weerera. Dyoontte, akilevelele.’" 
Luke14:20 Mukinatho aaheera: ‘Kithenle vaanaano va, tivawo nkingwera orowawo.’" 
Luke14:21 Murumeiyi aahokolowa ni aahaaleela apwiyaawe. Vano mwaneene a empa aanyoonyiwa ni aamulamulela murumeiyaawe eeraka: ‘Orowe woowaakuveya mmiseweni ni mmiseweni sikhaaneene, ni waaruuhe wenno oohaawa, oorakala, oohoona ni ootuthunya.’" 
Luke14:22 Murumeiyi aaheera: ‘Yeeyo Apwiya mulamulenlaanyu, yoopakiwa, ni noohalatho nipuro.’" 
Luke14:23 Vano Apwiya yaamweerela murumeiyi: ‘Orowe mphironi ni mmiphitoni, ni waanyesererihe atthu ovolowa weera empaaka esareye." 
Luke14:24 Miyo kinooleelani weera khaawo a yaawo oolattuliwa anaalawihe yooca ya efestaaka.’” 
Luke14:25 Atthu ancipale yeera emuhoolaka Yeesu. Vano, aarukunuwelaka atthu ancipale, Owo aaweerela:" 
Luke14:26 “Akhala mukina ongwa wa Miyo ni owo ahaathanya atithawe, amayawe, amwaarawe ni anamwanaawe, axunneiye ni axirokoriye, aani mpakatho okumaawe, khangwera okhala oohuseraaka." 
Luke14:27 Ni yoole ohinkuxa muttandaawe ni ohinkitthara, khangwera okhala oohuseraaka." 
Luke14:28 Noone ha, mmoha a nyuwo ontthuna oteka exiri yoorakama. Vano, onookilaathi toko weera uupuwele musurukhu mihayi ontthuneya. Eyo enootthuneya osuwela weera ookhalano musurukhu woowaatta woomalihera exiri ele." 
Luke14:29 Vano, apacera mathipelo ahiweraka omaliha, ootheene eneera yoone exiri yoohimalihiwa, anoomutheiya yeeraka:" 
Luke14:30 ‘Mulopwana ola aapacera oteka, mene khawenre omaliha.’" 
Luke14:31 Hoye hoye noone ha, mwene ontthuna owana ekhotto ni mwene mukina. Vano, onookilaathi toko uupuwelaka nnene weera owo ni anakhotto macira macireene muloko anoowera ongwina mwene mukina ni anakhotto macira macireene miloko miili." 
Luke14:32 Ahiweraka, mwene ole onrowa waalamulela atthu angwera ovaanela mwene mukina areene nlelo ottai, weera emvekele wiiwanana wa murettele." 
Luke14:33 Mooteene yoowo, akhalaru a nyuwo ohinghiya sootheene orinaawe, khangwera okhala oohuseraaka." 
Luke14:34 Maakha ti ooreera. Yoosivatho yamala, mmweeleeletho moota heeni?" 
Luke14:35 Khantthuneya wa etthaya, naari wa etthaadyira. Anooriheliwa vaate. Yoole orino maaru oowiiwa, iiweke!" 
Luke15:1 Anamaliviha a musoko ni anamattheka ootheene yeera ethukumanaka weera emwiiwe. 
Luke15:2 Mene aFarisi* ni anamawera a nlamulo* yaattaandawula yeeraka: “Mulopwana Ola ongwaakhela anamattheka ni onca ni yaawo.” 
Luke15:3 Vano Yeesu aahaathalihera yoolikanyiha ela: 
Luke15:4 “Taani a nyuwo akhalanaka ikhondoolo ncira ni emuriheyaka ekhondoolo emoha, khanghiya toko ikhondoolo sikina arowaka waasaasa ekhondoolo eriheiye mpaka ophwanya?" 
Luke15:5 Aaphwanyaka, onoothatela ni ohakalala" 
Luke15:6 ni onoorowa owaani. Woophiyani, onimwaathukumanyiha asinthamwenaawe ni asikhwaawe ni onooweerela: ‘Muhakalale ni miyo, niwoko koophwanya ekhondoolowaaka yaariheiye.’" 
Luke15:7 Miyo kinooleelani weera mooteene yoowo onuukhale ohakalalaxa wiirimu niwoko na namattheka mmoha onrukunxa murima, opwaha wa atthu oororomeleya miloko mithannamixexe ni athannaaxexe ahintthuneya orukunxa murima." 
Luke15:8 Hiihotho ni muthiyana akhalanaka indarama* muloko ni emuriheyaka emoha, owo onoopattiha onyaari, onookwesa empa ni onimwaasaasa nnene mpaka aphwanye." 
Luke15:9 Aaphwanyaka, onimwaathukumanyiha asinthamwenaawe ni asikhwaawe ni onooweerela: ‘Muhakalale ni miyo, niwoko koophwanya endaramaaka* yaariheiye.’" 
Luke15:10 Miyo kinooleelani weera mooteene yoowo wookhala ohakalala vamaithoni wa andyelo a Muluku niwoko na namattheka mmoha onrukunxa murima.” 
Luke15:11 Yeesu aapwaherera: “Mulopwana mmoha aakhalano anamwane eeli. 
Luke15:12 Mukhaani aaweerela atithawe: ‘Tiithi, mukivahe yoohiyeriwa* eri yawaka.’ Hiiho awo yaakawanya sooreela wa yaale ooweeli." 
Luke15:13 Vahoolo vakhaani, mwaana mukhaani aathukumanyiha sootheene aarinaawe, anarowa mweelaponi ya ottai. Weiwo aananariha sooreelasawe, ahipwatthaka mweettelowaawe." 
Luke15:14 Amalihaka onanariha sootheene, yaakhala etala etokotoko mweelaponi yeele yootheene, ni owo aapacera ohaawela itthu." 
Luke15:15 Tivawo aarongwaawe ovara muteko wa mutthu mmoha a elapo ele, aamulamulenle olipelela ikhumba mmattamwawe." 
Luke15:16 Owo aahaawela ovoniha erukuluwaawe ni mivithe saaciwa ni ikhumba, mene khaawo aamvaha naari etthu." 
Luke15:17 Uupuwelaka meekhaawe, aahiixeerela: ‘Atithaka aakhalano anamiteko ancipale arinaaya sooca soowaatta, ni miyo nno kihanle vakhaani okhwa ni etala." 
Luke15:18 Miyo kinoovenya ni kinoohokoleela wa atithaka ni kinkela oweerela: ‘Tiithi, kootthekela wiirimu ni kohootthekelani nyuwo." 
Luke15:19 Nkiphwanenle wiitthaniwa mwaninyu – mukireherereke ntoko namutekwaanyu.’ 
Luke15:20 Vahoolowaya, aavenya ni aarowa wa atithawe. Areene nlelo ottai, atiithi yaamoona ni yaasareya ni ikharari, enamutthimakela mwanaya, enamukhubaara, enamubeeca." 
Luke15:21 Mwaana aaweerela: ‘Tiithi, kootthekela wiirimu ni kohootthekelani nyuwo. Nkiphwanenle wiitthaniwa mwaninyu.’" 
Luke15:22 Atiithitho yaaweerela arumeiyaaya: ‘Mwaakuveke! Ngwiihe ekuwo yooreeraxa ni mungwarihe. Mungwarihe mukathanimwawe munela ni inaawosawe isapato. 
Luke15:23 Ngwiihe emombe exaana yooneneva ni mwiive. Nrowe nipake efesta ni nitthape. 
Luke15:24 Vano, mwanaka ola aahookhwa ni oovenyerera; aariheya, vano oophwanyeya.’ Hiiho yaapacera ni efesta." 
Luke15:25 Yeereiyaka yeeyo, mwaana mutokweene aari omatta. Aattamelaka vaate, aahiiwa icipo ni wiiniwa." 
Luke15:26 Vano aamwiitthana murumeiyi mmoha ni aamukoha eheeni yeereiya. 
Luke15:27 Owo aamwaakhula: ‘Munninyu oohokolowa, ni atithinyu ahiiva emombe exaana yooneneva, niwoko awo aamwaakhela munninyu areene ni okumi.’" 
Luke15:28 Mwaana mutokweene aanyoonyiwa ni khaatthuna ovolowa. Vano atithawe yaavenya ni yaamunyeserera. 
Luke15:29 Vaheera owo aawaakhula atithawe: ‘Khuu! Iyaakha sootheene seiya kinnavara muteko ntoko kireene epotthaanyu, ni nkinatoko ohiiwelela malamulowaanyu. Vano nyuwo khamunatoko okivaha hata epuri emoha weera kipake efesta ni asinthamwenaaka." 
Luke15:30 Vano, aholokoleelaka vaate mwaninyu owo aananaringhe sooreelasanyu ni mapuuta, nyuwo moomwiivela yoowo emombe exaana yooneneva!’" 
Luke15:31 Atiithi yaamweerela: ‘Mwanaka, weyo ori ni miyo mahuku ootheene. Sootheene kirinaaka ti sawawo." 
Luke15:32 Ontthuneyatho weera hiyo nimutthapeleke ni nimuhakalaleleke, niwoko munneiyo ole aahookhwa ni oovenyerera; aariheya ni vano oophwanyeya.’”" 
Luke16:1 Yeesu aaweerela oohuseraawe: “Aakhala mulopwana oopuha. Mutthu aawehaweha sooreelasawe namapuha, aahootheriwa weera aananariha sooreelasawe." 
Luke16:2 Vano namapuha aamwiitthana ni aamukoha: ‘Yeeyo kiniiwaaka mwaha wa weyo ekhaikhai? Okithalihere mukhalelo wa owehawehawawo, niwoko khoongwera opwaherera okhala namawehaweha.’" 
Luke16:3 Namawehaweha aahiixeerela: ‘Apwiyaaka anookiraxela. Keereke hai? Weera kithipe – nkingwera ni miyo okuuliha muru ovekela soovahiwa. 
Luke16:4 Koosuwela kineeraaka kipake weera kaakhumaka muteko va, atthu ekaakhele mmawannyaya.’" 
Luke16:5 Vano aawiitthana anamakopa ootheene a apwiyaawe. Aamukoha oopacera: ‘Weyo waakopenle hai apwiyaaka?’ 
Luke16:6 Owo amwaakhula: ‘Miphimo ncira sa makhura.’ Namawehaweha aamweerela: ‘Okuxe epaphelo ya yookopelaawo, okilaathi waakuveke ni olepe miloko mithanu.’" 
Luke16:7 Vahoolowaya aamukoha anaaveeli: ‘Ni weyo, okompe hai?’ Owo aamwaakhula: ‘Ilata ncira sa etrigu.’ Owo aamweerela: ‘Okuxe epaphelo ya yookopelaawo ni olepe miloko mithannamiraru.’" 
Luke16:8 Apwiya yaamuulumela nnene mwaha wa namawehaweha oolokottha niwoko na mirukusawe sa mweelaponi. Vano, anamwane a elapo ya vathi ammweetta nakoso mukina ni mukhwaawe ekhalanaka miruku sooratta waapwaha anamwane a waara." 
Luke16:9 Tivawo Miyo kinooleelani: muvarele mihakhu sa elapo ya vathi weera mukhalane asinthamwene, moota wooweera saamalaka mihakhu iyo, mwaakhuleliwe muheemani soohimala." 
Luke16:10 Yoole ori oororomeleya ni vakhaani ori oororomeleyatho ni vancipale. Yoole ori oolokottha ni vakhaani, ori oolokotthatho ni vancipale." 
Luke16:11 Nyuwo mwaahikhala oororomeleya ni mihakhu sa elapo ya vathi, eniyoororomeleni taani ni mihakhu sa ekhaikhai?" 
Luke16:12 Nyuwo mwaahikhala oororomeleya ni itthu sa akina, eniyoovaheeni taani itthu siri sawinyu?" 
Luke16:13 Khawowo murumeiyi naari mmoha ongwera waarumeela asipwiiya eeli, niwoko mmoha onoomuthanya ni mukina onoomusivela, naari oopacera onoomurumeela ni nthiti, mene anaaveeli onoomuramusa. Nyuwo khamungwera omurumeela Muluku nitho musurukhu.”" 
Luke16:14 aFarisi*, yaasiveliwa ni musurukhu, yaahiiwa sootheene iye ni yaamutheiya Yeesu." 
Luke16:15 Owo aaweerela: “Nyuwo ti yaale aniitaphula asineenaaya vamaithoni wa atthu, mene Muluku oosuwela mirimasanyu. Yeeyo eri yoottittimiheyaxa wa atthu, ti yoothanyeya vamaithoni wa Muluku." 
Luke16:16 Malamulo ni maprofeeti aakhala mpaka Yohaane. Evenyero vaavaale mpaka ohoolo, masu ooreeraxa a omwene wa Muluku anoolaleiwa, ni ootheene animweerera wiilipiha ovolowa moomweneni owo." 
Luke16:17 Wiirimu ni vathi onoolakaseya ehinaaye omora yoolempwa ekhaani ya malamulo. 
Luke16:18 Yoowo ommwalana ni mwaariye ni onimuthela muthiyana mukina, onooraruwa, ni mulopwana onimuthela muthiyana oohiiwa ni aiyawe, onooraruwatho."
