Luke16:19 Aakhala mulopwana oopuha aawara soowara sooxeera ni ikuwo soorikaxa, ni aakhala ni mihakhu mahuku ootheene." 
Luke16:20 Aakhalatho namahaawa iitthaniwa Lazaru, oosareya ni ithuku, aakhovelela okilaathi vaate vamulako wa namapuha." 
Luke16:21 Owo annahaawela oca seiye saamora vameesa ya namapuha. Mpaka alapwa yannawa omulata ithukusawe. 
Luke16:22 Naaphiya nihuku na okhwawawe namahaawa, ni andyelo yaamukuxa mpaka vakakasani wa Abrahaamu. Namapuha aahookhwatho ni aavithiwa." 
Luke16:23 oHadesi* weiwo aattaruxiwaawe, owo aaweha osulu ni aamoona Abrahaamu ottaiwene, ni Lazaru mukhwipimwawe." 
Luke16:24 Vano aawiitthana: ‘Tiithi Abrahaamu, mukimoreleke ikharari miyo, ni munrume Lazaru anaanihe okhwipi wa ekathaawe mmaahini weera ariirihe nluminaka, niwoko kinnahaawaxa mmooroni ola.’" 
Luke16:25 Abrahaamutho aamwaakhula: ‘Mwaana, muupuwelele weera mookuminimwanyu, nyuwo mwaahaakhela itthu sooreera, Lazarutho itthu soonanara. Wa soothesene, owo ori vaanaano oopepesiwa, ni nyuwo muri moohaawani." 
Luke16:26 Ohiya toko yeeyo, eriyari wa nyuwo ni hiyo wookhala wiixeraxa, moota wooweera yaale antthuna ovira erwaka wa hiyo mpaka nyuwo, hoye hoye wa nyuwo mpaka va, khaangwera.’" 
Luke16:27 Owo aamwaakhula: ‘Vano, miyo kinoodyoottelelani, tiithi: munrume Lazaru arowe vaate wa atithaka," 
Luke16:28 niwoko kookhalanowo axunna athanu. Munrume weera owo awooperere axunnaka, weera awo ehiwetho vanipuroni nna na ohaawaxa.’" 
Luke16:29 Abrahaamu aamwaakhula: ‘Awo aakhalano Moisesi ni maprofeeti – ewiiweleleke.’ 
Luke16:30 Owo aaheera: ‘Hoye, tiithi Abrahaamu, mmoha a akhwiiye arowa wa yaawo, awo yaamurukunxa murima.’" 
Luke16:31 Abrahaamu aamwaakhula: ‘Awo yaahimwiiwelela Moisesi ni maprofeeti, khaanrowatho omwiiwelela hata mmoha awaaka mookhwaani.’”" 
Luke17:1 Yeesu aaweerela oohuseraawe: “Ti woohisembeya weera sikhumelele itthu soowaatthekiha atthu, mene Ii! Onoohaawa yoowo ongwera iye!" 
Luke17:2 Waari fataari weera yoole avonyeriwe mphareiyani atthukeleliweene nxilo vaxiko, ahinaaye owo omtthekiha mmoha a asikhaani ala." 
Luke17:3 Mwiipasoope! Munninyu attheka, mmooperere, ni owo arukunxa murima, munlevelele." 
Luke17:4 Owo ootthekelani imaara ithannapiili vanihukuni, ni oohokoleelani imaara ithannapiili eeraka: ‘Miyo koorukunxa murima,’ munlevelele.”" 
Luke17:5 Arummwa yaaweerela Apwiya: “Mwaandyeerere nroromelonahu.” 
Luke17:6 Owo aawaakhula: “Nyuwo mwakhalano nroromelo ntoko enuku emoha ya emostarda*, munoowera weerela mwiri ola: ‘Wiiphele ni wiiphatteiye mphareiyani,’ ni ola onoowiiwelelani." 
Luke17:7 Noone ha mukina a nyuwo akhalanneene murumeiyi alimaka, naari mukukhuli awehawehaka ikhondoolo. Vano, owo aaphiyaka akhumaka omatta, anaamweerele: Oweke ni okilaathi weera oce?" 
Luke17:8 Hoye! Anaamweerele ha: ‘Opake yoocaaka, oolikanyihe ni okirumeele miyo kicaaka ni kiwuraka. Kaamalihaka, weyotho oceeke ni owureke.’" 
Luke17:9 Weeraka owo anaamutthapele murumeiyi niwoko na opaka yeeyo olamuleliwaawe? 
Luke17:10 Hiihotho nyuwo, mwaamalihaka sootheene mulamuleliwaanyu, mweereke: ‘Nri arumeiyi oohittittimiheya, nookwanihera paahi yeeyo yaatthuneya weeriwa.’”" 
Luke17:11 Eettaka woorowa oYerusaleemu, Yeesu aavira mmwiinanoni wa oSamariya ni oGalileiya." 
Luke17:12 Avolowaka mmuttettheni mmoha, anamakokho muloko yaamwaattamela Yoowo. Yaaheemela ottaiwene vakhaani" 
Luke17:13 ni yaakhuwela vancipale: “Yeesu, Muhusiha, munimorele ikharari.”" 
Luke17:14 Awoonaka, aaweerela: “Murowe mwiixoonihere wa asaserdoti*.” Erowaka hiihaale, awo yaalamihiwa." 
Luke17:15 Mmoha a yaawo, oonakaru weera oolama, aahokolowa amuttottopelaka Muluku, akhuwelaka vancipale." 
Luke17:16 Aamukokhorela ohoolowawe Yeesu ni aamutthapela. Vano, aari muSamariya." 
Luke17:17 Yeesu aamukoha: “Khaalamihiwe ootheene muloko? Ari woowi akina athannaaxexe? 
Luke17:18 Khaawo mukina aahokolongwe ni aamutthapenle Muluku, ahikhanle namarwa ola?”" 
Luke17:19 Vano aamweerela: “Mvenye ni murowe – nroromelonanyu nohoovuluxani.” 
Luke17:20 Emaara emoha Yeesu akohakohiwaka ni aFarisi* mwaha wa ehuhu, heeni oneeraaya ophiye omwene wa Muluku, aawaakhula: “Omwene wa Muluku khoongwa moota woowooneya," 
Luke17:21 hata atthu khaanrowa weera: ‘Ori va,’ naari ‘Ori iwe,’ niwoko omwene wa Muluku ori variyariwanyu.”" 
Luke17:22 Vano Owo aaweerela oohuseraawe: “Eniiphiye mahuku nyuwo muneeraanyu muhaaweleke woona nihuku nimoha na mahuku a Mwaana a mutthu, mene khamurwa moona." 
Luke17:23 Atthu eniiweereleni: ‘Ori iwe,’ hoye hoye ‘ori va.’ Muhaakuve waatthara." 
Luke17:24 Mwaana a mutthu, vanihukuninawe, anaakhale ntoko overinya ommwaleela erimu yootheene." 
Luke17:25 Ohinaayetho, ontthuneya weera Owo ahaawe itthu sincipale ni akhoottiwe ni ekhapira ela." 
Luke17:26 Ntoko yaakhumelenlaaya vamahukuni a Nowe, hiihotho eniikhumelele vamahukuni a Mwaana a mutthu." 
Luke17:27 Muloko wa atthu weera ocaaka, owuraka, othelanaka ni othelaniwaka, mpaka nihuku Nowe aavolongwaawe munikulani ntokotoko. Vano saaphiya mirupi ni saawiiva ootheene." 
Luke17:28 Yaaheereiyatho hiiho ehuhuweene yeele ya Looti. Muloko wa atthu weera ocaaka, owuraka, othumaka ni othumihaka, waalaka ni otekaka." 
Luke17:29 Nihukutho Looti aavenyaawe oSodoma, waakhuruwa mooro ni enxofre* ya wiirimu, ni waawiiva ootheene." 
Luke17:30 Eniikhumelele hiihotho nihuku Mwaana a mutthu aneeraawe iixoonihere. 
Luke17:31 Nihuku nno, yoowo anaakhale vanipathoni, akhalanaka sooreelasawe mpaani, ahikhuruwe weera akuxe. Hiihotho, yoowo anaakhale omatta, ahihokoleele ottuli niwoko na etthu emoha." 
Luke17:32 Mmuupuwelele mwaariye Looti. 
Luke17:33 Yoole ontthuna othokorora okumaawe, anaayeleele, ni yoowo ongyeleela okumaawe, anaathokorore." 
Luke17:34 Miyo kinooleelani: ohiyuweene yoowo, atthu eeli eniikone ebeetti emoha. Mmoha anaavenxiwe ni mukina anaahiiwe." 
Luke17:35 Asithiyana eeli eniixile etrigu vamoha. Mmoha anaavenxiwe ni mukina anaahiiwe.” 
Luke17:36  
Luke17:37 Awo yaamukoha: “Woowi Apwiya?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Weiwo oraayawo muttembo, eniithukumanewo mattawo.”" 
Luke18:1 Vano Yeesu aahaathalihera oohuseraawe yoolikanyiha emoha, atthunaka owoonihera weera ontthuneya ovekela mahuku ootheene ehikhulumuwaka." 
Luke18:2 Owo aaweerela: “Musidadeni emoha aakhala mphuki ahaamoova Muluku, hata khaahelelaxa atthu." 
Luke18:3 Aakhalatho musidadeni ele naamukhweli muthiyana mmoha annarowa imaara sincipale wa yoowo, amudyoonttelelaka: ‘Mukuulumele mulattwaaka ni mwiittanaka.’" 
Luke18:4 Owo aakhootta vamahukuni makina. Ommaleloni owo aahiixeerela: ‘Naari kihimoovaka Muluku, hata kihaapwatthaka atthu," 
Luke18:5 naamukhweli ole onnakiphweela. Vano, kinoomuulumela mulattwaawe weera ahitepaxe orwa wa miyo.’”" 
Luke18:6 Apwiya yaapwaherera: “Mwiiwe yeeyo mphuki oonanara oneeraawe. 
Luke18:7 Weeraka Muluku khanrowa owuulumela mulattwaaya oothanliwaawe, animdyoonttelela ohiyu ni othana? Anaapwaherere waawehereriha vancipale?" 
Luke18:8 Miyo kinooleelani: Owo anaawuulumele mulattwaaya woowaakuveya. Wa soothesene, aawaaka Mwaana a mutthu, anaaphwanye nroromelo mweelaponimu?”" 
Luke18:9 Yeesu aahaathalihera yoolikanyiha ela akina yaale aniixuupuwela weera ari oowaakhuleliwa ni Muluku, yaaramusaka akina:" 
Luke18:10 ‘Atthu eeli yaarowa Mpaani mwa Muluku weera yavekele. Mmoha aari muFarisi*, ni mukina namaliviha a musoko." 
Luke18:11 muFarisi*, eemenleene, aahiivekelela muneenaawe: ‘Muluku, kinootthapelani niwoko miyo nkihiyono ntoko atthu akina: anamwiiya, ootakhala, anamararuwa, hata ntoko namaliviha a musoko ola." 
Luke18:12 Miyo kinnatthuka imaara piili vasimanani, ni kinnavaha yanaamuloko wa sootheene kingwinaaka.’" 
Luke18:13 Namaliviha a musokotho aaheemela ottaiwene. Khaatthuna oweha osulu, mene amanaka ekakasa, aaheera: ‘Muluku, mukimorele ikharari, miyo kiri namattheka.’" 
Luke18:14 Miyo kinooleelani weera mulopwana ola, omuhiya muFarisi*, aarowa owaani aakhuleliweene ni Muluku. Vano, ootheene aniivuwiha, eniikhale ooyevihiwa, ni ootheene aniiyeviha, eniikhale oovuwihiwa." 
Luke18:15 Muloko wa atthu waamuruuhelatho Yeesu anamwane weera aatave. Yoonaka yeeyo, oohusera yaahaahiiha yaawo yaaruuhale anamwane." 
Luke18:16 Yeesutho aahiixiitthanela anamwane, eeraka: “Mwaahiyeke anamwane eweeke wa Miyo, ni muhiwooceelihe, niwoko omwene wa Muluku ori wa yaale anlikana ni yaawo." 
Luke18:17 Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: Yoowo ohinaakhela omwene wa Muluku ntoko mwaana mmoha, khanrowa ovolowa moomweneni.”" 
Luke18:18 Mutthu mmoha oottittimiheyaxa aamukoha: “Muhusiha ooreera, kipakeke eheeni weera kiphwanye okumi woohimala?”" 
Luke18:19 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Heeni munkiitthanaanyu ooreera? Khaawo ooreera, ahikhanle Muluku paahi." 
Luke18:20 Nyuwo moosuwela malamulo: ‘Muhiraruwe, muhiive, muhiiye, muhoothe, mwaattittimihe atithinyu ni amayinyu.’”" 
Luke18:21 Owo aaheera: “Sootheene iya kohiiwelela okhuma enamwanaaka.” 
Luke18:22 Iiwaka yeeyo, Yeesu aamweerela: “Yohoohaleelani etthu emoha. Mwathumihe sootheene murinaanyu ni mwaavahe musurukhu oohaawa, ni mmwikhaleno muhakhu wiirimu. Vahoolowaya, ngwe ni mukitthare.”" 
Luke18:23 Iiwalaawe yeeyo, aathanana, niwoko aakhalano mihakhu sincipale." 
Luke18:24 Amoonaka oothananeene, Yeesu aaheera: “Moota orikanxaaya ovolowa namapuha moomweneni wa Muluku!" 
Luke18:25 Mwa yeeyo, ti wookhweya ekamelu* ovira vamwiitheni wa singano, ohikhanle namapuha ovolowa moomweneni wa Muluku.”" 
Luke18:26 Yaawo yiiwale yeeyo yaakoha: “Vamwaheene ola, taani ongwera ovuluxiwa?”" 
Luke18:27 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Yeeyo eri yoohiwereya wa atthu, ti yoowereya wa Muluku.”" 
Luke18:28 Pedru aamweerela: “Hiyo noohiya sootheene naakhalannaahu weera nootthareni.” 
Luke18:29 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: Khula mutthu ohiyale empaawe, mwaariye, axunneiye, atithawe, hoye hoye anamwanaawe mwaha wa omwene wa Muluku," 
Luke18:30 anaakhele mweehuhuni ela imaara sincipale seiyo ohiyalaawe, ni mweehuhuni ya muhoolo anaakheletho okumi woohimala.”" 
Luke18:31 Yeesu aawiitthana oohusera muloko neeli vakhwipi ni aaweerela: “Ninrowa oYerusaleemu. Sootheene silempwale ni maprofeeti mwaha wa Mwaana a mutthu, sinookwaniheriwa." 
Luke18:32 Owo anaavahereriwe wa amalapo. Awo eniimutheiye, eniimuruwane, eniimusenyele," 
Luke18:33 eniimuwaxule ni eniimwiive. Vanihukuni nanaararu Owo anaavenyerere.” 
Luke18:34 Oohusera khayiiwexenxe hata etthu emoha ya seiyo. Etaphulelo ya masu ale yaahiipithiheiya wa yaawo, ni awo khayaasuwenle yeeyo Owo uulummaawe." 
Luke18:35 Akhuveelaka Yeesu oYeriko, mulopwana oohoona akilaantheene mukerekhere wa musewe eera avekelaka samahala." 
Luke18:36 Aawiiwalaawe atthu ancipale eviraka, owo aakoha etthu heeni yeereiya." 
Luke18:37 Awo yaamweerela: “Yeesu muNasarete onoovira.” 
Luke18:38 Vano owo aakhuwela: “Yeesu, mwaana a Davide, mukimoreleke ikharari!”" 
Luke18:39 Yaawo yaahoonle yaamuhiiha weera amaale, mene owo aatepa okhuwela: “Yeesu, mwaana a Davide, mukimoreleke ikharari!”" 
Luke18:40 Yeesu aaheemela ni aahaalamulela weera mutthu ole aruuheliwe. Owo amwaattamelaka, Yeesu aamukoha:" 
Luke18:41 “Muntthuna eheeni weera Miyo koopakeeni?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Apwiya, kintthuna woona.”" 
Luke18:42 Yeesu aamweerela: “Moone, nroromelonanyu nohoolamihani.”" 
Luke18:43 Woowaakuveya owo aahoona, ni aamutthara Yeesu amvuwihaka Muluku. Muloko wa atthu wootheene, woonaka yeeyo, waamuttottopela Muluku." 
Luke19:1 Aavolowaawe oYeriko, Yeesu aavira musidadeni." 
Luke19:2 Aakhala weiwo mutthu mmoha iitthaniwa Zakaiyo, aari namapuha, mutokweene a anamaliviha a musoko." 
Luke19:3 Owo aatthuna omoona taani Yeesu, mene areene ookhuveya, aahooceela niwoko na atthu ancipale." 
Luke19:4 Hiiho aatthimakela ohoolo ni aawela mmwirini wa efiigu weera amoone, niwoko Yeesu eera avire vaavaale." 
Luke19:5 Aaphiyalaawe Yeesu nipuro nne, aaweha musulu ni aamweerela: “Zakaiyo, mukhuruwe woowaakuveya. Ontthuneya weera olelo Miyo kikhale owannyinyu.”" 
Luke19:6 Vano, aakhuruwa woowaakuveya ni aamwaakhela Yeesu ni ohakalalaxa." 
Luke19:7 Muloko wa atthu wootheene waahoona yeeyo ni waapacera ottaandawula: “Owo onoophiyera vaate wa namattheka!” 
Luke19:8 Zakaiyo aavenya ni aaweerela Apwiya: “Moone, Apwiya, kinimwaavaha atthu oohaawa eriyari ya sooreelasaka, ni kaamwiiyenre mutthu etthu emoha, kinoomuhokoloxera imaara ixexetho.”" 
Luke19:9 Yeesu aamweerela: “Olelo woophiya ovuluwa wa empa ela, niwoko mulopwana ola oritho mwaana a Abrahaamu." 
Luke19:10 Vano, Mwaana a mutthu aaweenle owaasaasa ni waavuluxa yaale yaariheiye.”" 
Luke19:11 Awo emwiiwaka Yeesu, Owo aahaathalihera yoolikanyiha emoha, niwoko aari vakhiviru wa oYerusaleemu ni muloko wa atthu wuupuwela weera omwene wa Muluku waarowa wooniheriwa woowaakuveya." 
Luke19:12 Owo aaheera: “Mutthu mmoha oottittimiheya aarowa elapo yoorakamela weera avariwe omwene ni vahoolo ahokolowe. 
Luke19:13 Vano aawiitthana arumeiyaawe muloko ni aahaavaha makhoobiri muloko. Owo aaweerela: ‘Mumpakele nakoso musurukhu ola mpaka miyo kineeraaka kihokolowe.’ 
Luke19:14 Arumeiyaawetho yaamuthanya, ni yaahaarumiha atthu oovaanela ottuliwawe yeeraka: ‘Khanintthuna weera mulopwana ola akhale mwenaahu.’" 
Luke19:15 Wa soothesene, aavariwa omwene ni aahokolowa. Vano aarumiha owiitthana arumeiyi aavanghaawe musurukhu weera asuwele misurukhu mihayi yaawinnaaya." 
Luke19:16 Oopacera aahoowa ni aaweerela: ‘Apwiya, nikhoobirinanyu noowina makina muloko.’" 
Luke19:17 Apwiyaawe yaamwaakhula: ‘Ti wooreera, murumeiyaaka ooreera! Hapo waari oororomeleya wa vakhaani, olamuleke isidade muloko.’" 
Luke19:18 Anaaveeli aahoowa ni aaweerela: ‘Apwiya, nikhoobirinanyu noowina makina mathanu.’" 
Luke19:19 Apwiyaawe yaamwaakhula: ‘Weyotho, olamuleke isidade ithanu.’" 
Luke19:20 Vano aahoowa murumeiyi mukina ni aaweerela: ‘Apwiya, nikhoobirinanyu nri va. Miyo koothokorora kaatthunkaka vakuwoni." 
Luke19:21 Kaangwoovani, niwoko nyuwo muri oottaruxa. Mumvenxa yeeyo mwahiikaathiyaanyu ni munghepha yeeyo muhaanlaanyu.’" 
Luke19:22 Apwiyaawe yaamwaakhula: ‘Miyo kinimoothoriha ni maswaawo muneenaawo, murumeiyi oonanara! Waasuwela weera miyo oottaruxa, kivenxaka yeeyo kihihenlaaka ni kihephaka yeeyo kihaanlaaka." 
Luke19:23 Vano, heeni waahaavaherenraawo musurukhwaaka atthu oothokorora musurukhu? Hiiho, miyo kihokolowaka, saano kaakhenleene musurukhu ni owina vakhaani.’" 
Luke19:24 Vanonto, aaweerela yaawo yaari weiwe: ‘Mmwaakhe nikhoobirinawe, ni mumvahe yoowo orino muloko.’" 
Luke19:25 Awo yaamweerela: ‘Apwiya, owo ookhalano muloko!’" 
Luke19:26 Awo yaawaakhula: ‘Miyo kinooleelani weera wa yoowo okhalanne, anaavahiwetho, mene wa yoowo ohikhalanne, mpaka yeeyo vakhaani orinaawe, eniivenxiwe." 
Luke19:27 Mwaha wa amwiittanaaka, yaale yahaatthuna weera miyo kaalamule, mwaaruuhe va ni ngwiive vamaithoniwaka.’”" 
Luke19:28 Amalihaka wuuluma yeeyo, Yeesu aapwahera ohoolo, arowaka oYerusaleemu." 
Luke19:29 Yaakhuveelaaya oBetefage ni oBetaniya, vakhiviru wa mwaako oniitthaniwa Sooliveira, aahaarumiha eeli a oohuseraawe aweerelaka:" 
Luke19:30 “Murowe mmuttettheni ori ohoolowanyu. Mwaavolowakaru, munoomphwanya buuru mwaaxaana atthukiweene, mwa yoowo khaawo otonke ongwela. Mwamutaphule ni mukiwiihere va." 
Luke19:31 Mukina ookohani: ‘Munimutaphulela heeni?’ mwamuleele: ‘Apwiya anoomutthuna yoowo.’ 
Luke19:32 Yaarumihiwe yaarowa ni yaaphwanya enama ntoko aaleenlaawe. 
Luke19:33 Emutaphulaka buuru muxaana, asineene a buuru yaahaakoha: “Munimutaphulela heeni buuru?”" 
Luke19:34 Awo yaawaakhula:“Apwiya anoomutthuna ola.” 
Luke19:35 Yaamuronghela buuru Yeesu, yaamvonyera mikaandyosaya vabuuruni ni yaangweliha Yeesu." 
Luke19:36 Eettaka hiiho Yeesu, muloko wa atthu waahaatala mikaandyosaya mphironi." 
Luke19:37 Akhuveelaka omukhuruweloni wa mwaako wa Sooliveira, atthu ancipale ootheene a oohusera yaapacera omvuwiha Muluku, ekhuwelaka ni ohakalalaxa niwoko na sootikhiniha sootheene yoonaaya. Yaakhuwela:" 
Luke19:38 “Ooreelihiwa ti Mwene ongwa mwa Nsina na Apwiya! Murettele wiirimu ni ovuwa musulusulu.” 
Luke19:39 Akina a aFarisi* yaari variyari wa atthu ancipale yaamweerela Yeesu: “Muhusiha, mwaahiihe oohuseraanyu!”" 
Luke19:40 Owo aawaakhula: “Miyo kinooleelani: awo yamaala, maluku eniikhuwele.”" 
Luke19:41 Aakhuveelaawe ni oonaka esidade, Yeesu aahiinlela yeele" 
Luke19:42 eeraka: “Weera weyotho olelo wiiwexexe yeeyo entthuneya oruuha murettele! Eyotho ti yoovitheya vamaithoniwawo. 
Luke19:43 Eniiwe mahuku amwiittanaawo eniyoothipele malitti matokotoko, eniyoorukureere nitho eniiwaamelelihe weyo mipatta sootheene." 
Luke19:44 Eniyoovonyere vatthayani ni eniiwiive anamwanaawo ari mpuwa mwa exiraawo. Kheerwa ehiya nluku vanluku, niwoko weyo khawiisuwenle ehuhu Muluku aarwaawe wooxekurera.”" 
Luke19:45 Vano aavolowa Mpaani mwa Muluku ni aapacera owoomola yaawo yaathumiha. 
Luke19:46 Aaweerela: “Yoolempwa: ‘Empaaka eniikhale Empa ya mavekelo,’ mene nyuwo mootatuxa ela nikhuku na anamwiiya!”" 
Luke19:47 Mahuku ootheene owo annaxuttiha Mpaani mwa Muluku. Ahooleli a asaserdotitho* vamoha ni anamawera a nlamulo* ni asitokweene a muloko yannaasaasa moota woomwiiva. 
Luke19:48 Wa soothesene, khayaawera moota woopaka yeeyo, niwoko muloko wa atthu wootheene waatikhina ni maswaawe." 
Luke20:1 Nihuku nimoha, Yeesu axuttihaka muloko wa atthu Mpaani mwa Muluku ni alaleiyaka masu ooreeraxa, yaaphiya wa Yoowo ahooleli a asaserdoti* vamoha ni anamawera a nlamulo* ni asitokweene." 
Luke20:2 Awo yaamukoha: “Munileele, ni ikuru heeni mumpakaanyu itthu iya? Taani yoovangheni ikuru iya?”" 
Luke20:3 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Miyotho kinimookohani etthu: Mukileele: 
Luke20:4 Opatiso wa Yohaane waari wa wiirimu, hoye hoye wa atthu?”" 
Luke20:5 Awo yaakohana yaaworu, yeeraka: “Neera ‘wa wiirimu’ Owo onoonikoha: ‘Vano, niwoko heeni mwahaamuroromelaanyu yoowo?’" 
Luke20:6 Menetho neera: ‘wa atthu,’ muloko wa atthu wootheene onuunivonye maluku, niwoko owo wooviriyeliwa weera Yohaane aari mprofeeti.’" 
Luke20:7 Hiiho, yaamwaakhula: “Khanisuwenle waari wa woowi.”" 
Luke20:8 Vano Yeesu aaweerela: “Hata Miyotho nkinooleelani ni ikuru heeni kimpakelaaka itthu iya.” 
Luke20:9 Owo aathalihera muloko wa atthu yoolikanyiha ela: “Mulopwana mmoha aaphatteya ematta ya iwuuva*. Aawooliha anamalima akina ematta ele, ni aapwaha wa mahuku mancipale." 
Luke20:10 Mweehuhuni ya ohepha, aamurumiha murumeiyi mmoha wa anamalima weera emvaherere mpatta wa soowiima sa ematta ya iwuuva*. Anamalimatho yaammana ni yaamoomola woohikuxa etthu." 
Luke20:11 Owo aamurumihatho murumeiyi mukina, mene yaammanatho ni yaamveiha moota woowuuliha muru, emoomolaka woohikuxa etthu." 
Luke20:12 Aamurumiha anaararu, ni awo yaamvulaliha, enamoomola mmatta mwa iwuuva*." 
Luke20:13 Vano muneene a ematta ya iwuuva* aahiixeerela: ‘Keereke hai? Nkimurumihe mwanaka oosiveleya. Apaale eniimuttittimihe.’ 
Luke20:14 Emoonaka mwaana, anamalima yaavaanela yeeraka: ‘Ola ti ettuli ya mwaneene. Nrowe namwiive, ni emattaawe eniikhale yawihu.’" 
Luke20:15 Hiiho yaamvonyera mukerekhere wa ematta ya iwuuva* ni yaamwiiva. Anaapakele eheeni mwaneene a ematta ya iwuuva*? 
Luke20:16 Anaawe awiive anamalima ale, ni anaavahe akina ematta ya iwuuva*.” Wiiwaka yeeyo, muloko wa atthu waaheera: “Ela kheeneereye!”" 
Luke20:17 Yeesu aahaaweha nnenesene ni aahaakoha: “Vano, entaphulela eheeni yoolempwa ela: ‘Nluku anamateka yaakhoonttaaya, naathatuwa nluku noottittimiheyaxa.’" 
Luke20:18 Ootheene eneera emorele vanlukuni nna, eniinyakatteye. Ni yoole aneera amoreliwe ni nluku nna, anaaswanyeye.”" 
Luke20:19 Anamawera a nlamulo* ni ahooleli a asaserdoti* yaasaasa mukhalelo weera yaamvare khuluwi, niwoko yaasuwela weera yaari wa yaale Yeesu uulummaawe yoolikanyiha ela. Wa soothesene, yaahoova muloko wa atthu." 
Luke20:20 Emuthurumelaka Yeesu, awo yaahaarumiha anamahottela yiixeeraka okhala oororomeleya, weera emvare Yeesu ni masu onghimaawe. Yaapaka yeeyo weera emvaherere wa ikuru ni olamula wa guvernadori." 
Luke20:21 Hiiho anamahottela yaamukoha: “Muhusiha, noosuwela weera Nyuwo munuuluma ni munxuttiha yeeyo eri ya nnene, khamunthalu, mene munnaxuttiha ephiro ya Muluku ntoko eraaya ekhaikhai." 
Luke20:22 Ontthuneya omuliva musoko Seesari, hoye hoye naari?”" 
Luke20:23 Owo aasuwela soowiixeerasaya, ni aaweerela:" 
Luke20:24 “Mukoonihere edinaariyu* emoha. Ecaambulo ni yoolempwa ela ti yawani?” 
Luke20:25 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Ya Seesari.” Owo aaweerela: “Ya Seesari, mumvahe Seesari, ni ya Muluku, mumvahe Muluku.”" 
Luke20:26 Vano yaahooceela omvara Yeesu ni maswaawe vamaithoni wa muloko. Etikhinaka ni yoowaakhulaawe, yaamaala." 
Luke20:27 aSaduki* akina, aneera weera khoowowo ovenyerera, yaamwaattamela Yeesu ni yookoha ela:" 
Luke20:28 “Muhusiha,” awo yaaheera, “Moisesi oonilepela weera, munna a mulopwana mmoha akhwa aahiyaka amwaarawe oohikhalano anamwane alopwana, mulopwana ole amutheleke naamukhweli weera akhalane anamwane alopwana wa munneiye." 
Luke20:29 Vano yaakhala axunna athanneeli. Oopacera aathela anaakhwa, ahaahiyaka anamwane alopwana." 
Luke20:30 Anaaveeli 
Luke20:31 ni anaararu nitho akina yaathelana ni naamukhweli owo. Hiiho yaahookhwa mmoha-mmoha axunna athanneeli, ehaahiyaka anamwane alopwana." 
Luke20:32 Woomalihera aahookhwatho naamukhweli. 
Luke20:33 Moovenyererani, naamukhweli anaakhale mwaara awani, yeenre athanneeli yamuthelaka yoowo?”" 
Luke20:34 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Anamwane a ehuhuweene yeela annathela ni annatheliwa. 
Luke20:35 Vano yaawo anooniwa ophwanela okhala mpatta wa ehuhu eneera ewe ni wa ovenyerera wa akhwiiye, kheerwa ethela, naari etheliwa." 
Luke20:36 Awo khaangwera okhwatho niwoko ari ntoko andyelo. Ari anamwane a Muluku, ereene anamwane a ovenyerera." 
Luke20:37 Yeele yaamukhumelenle Moisesi vaniphuwani nivarelaka enoonihera weera akhwiiye amvenyerera, niwoko Moisesi aawiitthana Apwiya ‘Muluku a Abrahaamu, Muluku a Isaaki ni Muluku a Yakobe.’" 
Luke20:38 Owo khahiyono Muluku a akhwiiye, mene a akumi, niwoko ootheene annamukhalela Yoowo.”" 
Luke20:39 Akina a anamawera a nlamulo* yaamweerela: “Mohaakhula nnene, Muhusiha!”" 
Luke20:40 Khaawo yeerera omukoha sookoha sikina. 
Luke20:41 Vano Yeesu aahaakoha: “Heeni atthu aneeraaya weera Kristu ti mwaana a Davide? 
Luke20:42 Davide muneenaawe aahaakhulela nnene mulivuruni ya icipo: ‘Apwiya yaaweerela Apwiyaaka: Mukilaathi moonowaaka mulopwana 
Luke20:43 mpaka Miyo kineeraaka kiwiikaathi amwiittanaanyu vathi wa inaawosanyu.’ 
Luke20:44 Vano, Davide ongwiitthana ‘Apwiya.’ Ongwereya hai okhala mwanawe?”" 
Luke20:45 Wiiwaka muloko wa atthu wootheene, Yeesu aaweerela oohuseraawe:" 
Luke20:46 “Mwiipasoope ni anamawera a nlamulo*. Ti woottittimiheya wa yaawo weetta ni ikuwo sooreera ni wuulumihiwa mwaatthuni ni okilaathi mmapuroni oopacera muSinagogani* ni mmapuroni oottittimiheya a mufestani. 
Luke20:47 Awo annakhuura impa sa asinaamukhweli, ni annavekelaxa yiixeeraka. Awo eniittaruxiwe moota wootepaxa.”" 
Luke21:1 Awelihaka maitho, Yeesu aawoona anamapuha ehelaka soovahasaya mmaalani a soovaha." 
Luke21:2 Aamoonatho naamukhweli oohaawa ahelaka makhoobiri meeli ooyevaxa a eyuuma. 
Luke21:3 Vano aaheera: “Kinoororomelihani weera naamukhweli ola oohaawa oohela vancipale waapwaha akina ootheene. 
Luke21:4 Ootheene ale aahela wa yeeyo yaahalanaaya, mene owo, ni ohaawawawe, oovaha sootheene aarinaawe weera akhale.”" 
Luke21:5 Akina a oohuseraawe yeera yuulumaka sa moota Empa ya Muluku yaarehereriwaaya ni maluku ooreera ni soovahiwa sootteeliheriwa Muluku. Yeesutho aaweerela: 
Luke21:6 “Mwaha wa seiya nyuwo munoonaanyu, eniiwe mahuku nneeraaya nihikhale nluku vanluku. Sootheene sinoophwatiwa.”" 
Luke21:7 Awo yaamukoha: “Muhusiha, yaakhani sineeraaya seereiye itthu iyo? Ni eheeni eniikhale eneneero weera itthu iyo sihanle vakhaani weereiya?”" 
Luke21:8 Owo aawaakhula: “Mwiipasoope weera muhilokotthiwe. Vano, ancipale eniiwe mwa Nsinanaka yeeraka: ‘Ti miyo’ ni ‘ehuhu yookhuveela.’ Muhaatthare." 
Luke21:9 Mwiiwaka mwaha wa itkhotto ni owana, muhoove. Ontthuneya weera sikhumelele toko itthu iyo, mene khoonaaye okhuveelaxa ommaleloni.”" 
Luke21:10 Vano aaweerela: “Eniiwane elapo ni elapo nitho omwene ni omwene. 
Luke21:11 Onuukhale otetereya otokotoko, itala ni ikwerere mmapuroni oohiyanahiyana. Nsikhaletho sookhumelela soowoopiha ni ineneero sitokotoko siweelaka wiirimu." 
Luke21:12 Sihinaayetho sootheene iyo, animootthukani okaliposo ni animoottharattharani. Awo eniyoovaherereni muSinagogani* ni mukaliposo, ni mmwironghiwe ohoolo wa mamwene ni maguvernadori niwoko na Nsinanaka." 
Luke21:13 Eniikhale ehuhuwaanyu weera mukhalele onamoona. 
Luke21:14 Mulakele khuluwi ehinaaye, weera muhirwe mweeteteiya ni yeeyo muneeraanyu muhime weera mwiixaakihe." 
Luke21:15 Vano, Miyo nkoovaheeni masu ni miruku moota wooweera khaawo mmoha a amwiittanaanyu aneera awere otapanyiha, naari ovaanyiha." 
Luke21:16 Nyuwo mmwivarihiwe mpaka ni asitithi, axunna, asinaangolo ni asinthamwene, ni awo eniyaavaherere mookhwaani akina a nyuwo." 
Luke21:17 Ootheene eniyoothanyeeni niwoko na Nsinanaka. 
Luke21:18 Wa soothesene, hata niihi nimoha na muruwaanyu khanirwa niriheya." 
Luke21:19 Moovilelani, nyuwo mmwiwine okumi." 
Luke21:20 Moonaka oYerusaleemu orukureeriweene ni anakhotto, mmwisuwele weera othaamiwawaya wookhuveela." 
Luke21:21 Vano, awo eniikhale oYudeiya, etthawele nnyaakoni; awo eniikhale musidadeni, evenye; ni awo eniikhale omatta, ehivolowe musidadeni." 
Luke21:22 Awo eniikhale mahuku a ikuhu weera sikwaniheriwe sootheene silempwale. 
Luke21:23 Hapo eniikhale oowoopiha mahuku awo wa asimaayi oorupala ni wa yaale anaamwiha. Onuukhale ohooxa otokotoko mweelaponi, ni isara ni muloko wa atthu ola." 
Luke21:24 Akina eniyiiviwe ni ikatana, ni akina eniironghiwe okaliposo mweelaponi sootheene. oYerusaleemu onuunyikaliwe ni amalapo mpaka ihuhusaya sineeraaya sikwaniheriwe." 
Luke21:25 Nsikhale ineneero vansuwani, vamweerini ni vathinyeerini. Vathi miloko nsikhale ni woova ni otuthuwa niwoko na yooruma ni owali wa ephareiya." 
Luke21:26 Atthu eniikomoke, yoovaka yeeyo eneera ekhumelele ni elapo ya vathi yootheene. Ikuru sa wiirimu nsittikinyeye." 
Luke21:27 Vano eniimoone Mwaana a mutthu awaaka munihutteni ni ikuru ni ovuwa otokotoko. 
Luke21:28 Saapaceraka okhumelela itthu iyo, mweemele ni mweemexe nyurusanyu, niwoko ovuluxiwawanyu wookhuveela.”" 
Luke21:29 Owo aahaathalihera yoolikanyiha ela: “Ngwehe mwiri wa efiigu ni nyiri sootheene. 
Luke21:30 Saaphuwaka, nyuwo asineenaanyu munoosuwela weera elimwe yookhuveela." 
Luke21:31 Hiihotho, moonaka itthu iyo sikhumelelaka, musuwele weera omwene wa Muluku wookhuveela." 
Luke21:32 Kinooleelani ekhaikhai: Kheerwa evira ekhapira ela mpaka sootheene iyo seereye. 
Luke21:33 Wiirimu ni vathi onuuvire, maswaakatho kheerwa evira." 
Luke21:34 Mwiipasoope weera mirimasanyu sihilemeliwe ni wiipeliwa, ohapaliwa, naari ni sooweeteteela sa okumi, weeratho nihuku nno nihoophiyereni wootutuxereya," 
Luke21:35 niwoko nno nniwe wa atthu ootheene ankhala mweelaponi yootheene. 
Luke21:36 Mukhale oowehaweha mahuku ootheene, ni mvekele weera moopowe sootheene sineera sikhumelele, ni weera mweemele vamaithoni wa Mwaana a mutthu.”" 
Luke21:37 Yeesu annaxuttiha khula nihuku Mpaani mwa Muluku, ni wiilaka, aavenya arowaka vamwaakoni wiitthaniwa Sooliveira weera avirihewo ohiyu wootheene." 
Luke21:38 Muloko wa atthu wootheene waarowa oxeexelo Mpaani mwa Muluku weera yamwiiwe. 
Luke22:1 Yeera ekhuveelaka efesta ya ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu, yiitthaniwa mPaska*." 
Luke22:2 Ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni anamawera a nlamulo* yeera yaasaasaka mukhalelo woomwiiva Yeesu, yoovatho muloko wa atthu." 
Luke22:3 Vano, Satana aavolowa mwa Yudasi, iitthaniwa Iskariyoti, mmoha a oohusera muloko neeli." 
Luke22:4 Yudasi aarowa wa ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni asitokweene a anakhotto a Empa ya Muluku, ni aavaanelela vamoha ni yaawo moota heeni eeraawe amvarihe Yeesu." 
Luke22:5 Awo yaahakalalaxa ni yaahiiwanana omvaha musurukhu. 
Luke22:6 Owo aahaakhulela, ni aaweherera ehuhu entthuneya owinnyerera Yeesu, muloko wa atthu ohikhanlewo." 
Luke22:7 Ommaleloni naaphiya nihuku na ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu, mwa nenno waamutthuneya wiiva eputtiputthi ya mPaska*." 
Luke22:8 Yeesu aamurumiha Pedru ni Yohaane, aweerelaka: “Murowe ni mwareherere yooca ya mPaska*.”" 
Luke22:9 Awo yaamukoha: “Muntthuna woowi weera hiyo nareherere?” 
Luke22:10 Owo aawaakhula: “Mwaavolowaka musidadeni, munoomphwanya mulopwana mmoha iireyaka mwaapu wa maahi. Mwamutthare mpaka empa aneeraawe avolowe," 
Luke22:11 ni mwamuleele muneene a vaate vawo: ‘Muhusiha onookoha: eri woowi ekwartu ya aletto mwa yeeyo Miyo kineeraaka kimuce mPaska* vamoha ni oohuseraaka?’ 
Luke22:12 Owo anaawoonihereni ekwartu etokotoko ya musulu ereeneno meesa ni ihice, sootheene soolikana. Mwareherere sootheene weiwo.”" 
Luke22:13 Awo yaavenya ni yaaphwanya sootheene ntoko Yeesu aaleenlaawe. Vano yaamureherera mPaska*. 
Luke22:14 Ephiyaka ehuhu, Yeesu ni arummwaawe yaakilaathi vameesa" 
Luke22:15 ni aaweerela: “Koohaawelaxa ni murima wootheene omuca mPaska* ola vamoha ni nyuwo kihinaaye ohaawa. 
Luke22:16 Vano Miyo kinooleelani: nkinrowa omucatho mPaska* mpaka aneeraawe akwaniheriwe moomweneni wa Muluku.” 
Luke22:17 Aakuxalaawe ekoomixi, aatthapela ni aaheera: “Mukuxeke eyo ni mukawaneke." 
Luke22:18 Vano, Miyo kinooleelani weera nkinrowa owuratho wa soowiima sa ematta ya iwuuva* mpaka oneeraaya orwe omwene wa Muluku.”" 
Luke22:19 Akuxaka epaawu, aatthapela, aameyanya ni aahaavaha oohusera eeraka: “Ela ti erutthwaaka, yoovahereriwa wa nyuwo. Mpakeke yeeyo mukuupuwelelaka Miyo.”" 
Luke22:20 Mooteene yoowo, emalihaka oca, aakuxa ekoomixi eeraka: “Ekoomixi ela ti wiiraana onyowani mwa ephomaaka, evuuvihiwe wa nyuwo." 
Luke22:21 Moonetho, ntata na yoole anaakivarihe nri ni Ntatanaka vameesa." 
Luke22:22 Mwaana a mutthu onoorowa ntoko olamuliwaawe, mene Ii! Onoohaawa yoole anaamvarihe.”" 
Luke22:23 Awo yaapacera okohana taani a yaawo aneera apake yeeyo. 
Luke22:24 Waakhumatho onyakulihana variyariwaya mwaha wa taani a yaawo oophwanela okhala mutokweene. 
Luke22:25 Yeesu aaweerela: “Mamwene a ilapo annaalamula amalapo, ni yaawo anaalamula, aniixiitthana atthu ampaka sooreera." 
Luke22:26 Nyuwotho muhikhale hiiho. Ohiyanawaya, ontthuneya weera mutokweene a variyariwanyu akhale ntoko mukhaaneene, ni yoole onlamula, ntoko murumeiyi." 
Luke22:27 Vano, taani mutokweene: yoole ori vameesa, hoye hoye yoole onrumeela? Khahiyono yoole ori vameesa? Miyotho kiri variyariwanyu ntoko yoole onrumeela." 
Luke22:28 Nyuwo muri yaale avilenle vamoha ni Miyo mwa sooweereriwasaka. 
Luke22:29 Miyo kinoovahererani omwene, ntoko Atithaka akivaherenraaya omwene," 
Luke22:30 weera muceeke ni muwureke vameesaniwaka mureene moomwenenimwaka ni weera mukilaathi muhiceni, muthorihaka ipuumba* muloko ni piili sa aYixrayeli." 
Luke22:31 Simeyoni, Simeyoni, Satana onnavekelaxa weera ooveereni ntoko etrigu," 
Luke22:32 mene Miyo kohoovekelelani weera nroromelonanyu nihooceeleye. Vano nyuwo mwaarukunxaka murima, mwaalipihe axunninyu.”" 
Luke22:33 Vaheera Pedru aamwaakhula: “Apwiya, koolikana weera koohooleni okaliposo, nitho mpaka mookhwaani.”" 
Luke22:34 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Kinooleelani, Pedru, weera ohinaaye wiipa nthupi olelo, nyuwo munookiruna imaara tthaaru, mweeraka khamukisuwenle.”" 
Luke22:35 Yeesu aahaakoha: “Miyo koorumihalaakani woohikhalano nihottha, nrupa, hoye hoye ikwakwaatta, yaahoohaleelani etthu?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Hoye!”" 
Luke22:36 Owo aaweerela: “Vaanaano vaavatho, mwakhalano nihottha, mukuxe, hiihotho nrupa. Vanonto, mwaahikhalano ekatana, muthumiheke mukaandyowaanyu ni muthume ekatana." 
Luke22:37 Yoolempwa: ‘Aahaalikeleliwa vamoha ni atakhali.’ Miyo kinooleelani weera eyo entthuneya okwaniheriwa mwa Miyo. Aani, yeeyo elempwale mwaha wa Miyo ehanle vakhaani okhwaniheriwa.”" 
Luke22:38 Oohusera yaamweerela: Ngwehe, Muhusiha, sookhala va ikatana piili.” Owo aawaakhula: “Sookwana.”" 
Luke22:39 Yeesu aarowa vamwaakoni wa Sooliveira ntoko aakhovelelaawe, ni oohuseraawe yaamutthara." 
Luke22:40 Aphiyaka vanipuroni, Owo aaweerela: “Muvekele weera muheereriwe.”" 
Luke22:41 Owo aasusa vakhaani, anakokhora, anapacera ovekela eeraka:" 
Luke22:42 “Tiithi, mwatthuna, mususihe wa Miyo ekoomixi ela, wa soothesene, ohipakiwe otthunawaka, mene otthunawanyu.”" 
Luke22:43 Vano aahiixoonihera wa Yoowo ndyelo a wiirimu aamulipihenre. 
Luke22:44 Areene ni othananaxa, aatepaxa ovekela ni orettheelawawe waari ntoko mattonyo a ephome yaamorenle vatthayani." 
Luke22:45 Avenyaka moovekelani ni ahokoleelaka wa oohuseraawe, aahaaphwanya ekonaka, ekhulumungweene ni othananaxa." 
Luke22:46 Owo aahaakoha: “Heeni munkonaanyu? Mvenye ni muvekele weera muheereriwe.” 
Luke22:47 Yeesu nlelo alokololaka, yaahoowa atthu ancipale yaahooliwa ni Yudasi, mmoha a muloko neeli. Owo aamwaattamela Yeesu weera amuulumihe ni ebeecu." 
Luke22:48 Yeesutho aamukoha: “Yudasi, onoomvariha Mwaana a mutthu ni ebeecu?”" 
Luke22:49 Yoonaka yeeyo yeera yeereiye, awo yaari ni Yeesu yaamukoha: “Apwiya, niwaneke ni ikatana?”" 
Luke22:50 Mmoha a yaawo aamvulaliha murumeiyi a mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, amukwasaka naarunawe na moono mulopwana." 
Luke22:51 Yeesutho aawaakhula: “Wookwana!” Atavaka naaru na murumeiyi ole, aamulamiha." 
Luke22:52 Vano Yeesu aaweerela ahooleli a asaserdoti*, asitokweene a anakhotto a Empa ya Muluku ni asitokweene a muloko yaangweenle omwaasaasa: “Weeraka Miyo kinaalamula atthu weera ewane ni ebooma, nyuwo mungwaanyu ni ikatana ni ikopo?" 
Luke22:53 Mahuku ootheene Miyo kaari ni nyuwo Mpaani mwa Muluku, ni khamwaakitthunke. Mene ehuhuweene yeela ti yawinyu – elamulaka epiphi.”" 
Luke22:54 Vano, emutthukaka, yaamurongha wa empa ya mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*. Pedru aahaatthara ottaiwene." 
Luke22:55 Yiiseelakatho mooro eriyari ya nipuwa, ni ekilaantheene mukhwipi, Pedru aakilaathi ni yaawo." 
Luke22:56 Murumeiyi muthiyana mmoha aamoona akilaantheene vale ngwaarani wa mooro. Aangweha nnenesene ni aaheera: “Mulopwana ola aari ni Yoowo.” 
Luke22:57 Aarunatho eeraka: “Muthiyana, nkimusuwenle.”" 
Luke22:58 Vahoolo vakhaani, mutthu mukina aamoona ni aamweerela: “Nyuwotho muri mmoha a yaawo.” Pedru aamwaakhula: “Mulopwana, nkihiyono!”" 
Luke22:59 Yaaviralaaya ewoora emoha, mukina aahaakhulela eeraka: “Vekhaikhai, mulopwana ola aari vamoha ni Yoowo, niwoko ori muGalileiya.”" 
Luke22:60 Pedru aamwaakhula: “Mulopwana, nkisuwenle yeeyo munuulumaanyu!” Uulumaka hiihaale, nthupi waahiipa." 
Luke22:61 Apwiya yaarukunuwa ni yaangweha nnenesene Pedru. Vano Pedru aahuupuwelela yeeyo Apwiya yaamuleenlaaya: “Ohinaaye wiipa nthupi olelo, munookiruna imaara tthaaru.”" 
Luke22:62 Avenyaka vaavaale, aahiinla aripiweene murima." 
Luke22:63 Alopwana yaamutthunke Yeesu yaapacera omutheiya ni ommana. 
Luke22:64 Yaamukhuneela maitho ni yaamukoha: “Otthome, taani yoomanne?”" 
Luke22:65 Ni yannamuruwana ni masu makina mancipale. 
Luke22:66 Niwelaka nsuwa, eSineedriyu* yaathukumana – ahooleli a asaserdoti* nitho anamawera a nlamulo*, ni Yeesu aaronghiwa ohoolowaya." 
Luke22:67 Awo yaamweerela: “Nyuwo mwaari Kristu, munileele.” Yeesu aawaakhula: “Miyo kooleelani, nyuwo khamunrowa okiroromela," 
Luke22:68 ni Miyo kookohani, nyuwo khamunrowa okaakhula." 
Luke22:69 Okhumatho vaanaano vaava mpaka muhoolo Mwaana a mutthu anaakilaathi moono mulopwana wa Muluku a ikuru sootheene.” 
Luke22:70 Ootheene yaamukoha: “Vano, Nyuwo muri Mwaana a Muluku?” Owo aawaakhula: “Ti hiiho weera Miyo ti Mwaana a Muluku.”" 
Luke22:71 Awo yaaheera: “Khaninaatthuna anamoona akina! Noohiiwa nnene ni eyanowaawe muneenaawe.” 
Luke23:1 Vano, muthukumano wootheene waaheemela ni waamurongha wa Pilatu." 
Luke23:2 Yaapacera omoothera yeeraka: “Noomphwanya Mulopwana Ola ananarihaka mulokwaahu. Owo onkhoottiha oliva musoko wa Seesari ni oneera weera ori Kristu, Mwene mmoha.”" 
Luke23:3 Pilatu aamukoha Yeesu: “Nyuwo Mwene a aYuda?” Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Ti hiiho.” 
Luke23:4 Vano Pilatu aaweerela ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni atthu ancipale: “Nkimphwanya nthowa na omoothera Mulopwana Ola.” 
Luke23:5 Vano awosa yannatepa onyeserera yeeraka: “Owo onnasesera muloko wa oYudeiya wootheene ni mahusihowaawe. Aapacenre oGalileiya ni oophiya mpaka nno.” 
Luke23:6 Iiwaka yeeyo, Pilatu aakoha weera Yeesu aari muGalileiya." 
Luke23:7 Aasuwenlaawe weera Yeesu aari a elapo yaalamuliwa ni Herodi, aamurumiha wa Herodi aaritho oYerusaleemu mahukweene yaale." 
Luke23:8 Herodi amoonaka Yeesu, aahakalalaxa, niwoko okhuma khalayi aatthuna omoona. Niwoko na seiyo iiwalaawe suulummwaka sa Yoowo, Herodi aaweherera omoona apakaka yootikhiniha." 
Luke23:9 Aamukohakoha ni sookoha sincipale, mene Yeesu khamwaakhunle." 
Luke23:10 Ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni anamawera a nlamulo* yaari weiwo, emootheraxaka Yoowo." 
Luke23:11 Vano Herodi ni anakhottwaawe yaamveiha ni yaamutheiya. Engwarihaka mukaandyo wooreera, yaamuhokoloxera wa Pilatu." 
Luke23:12 Ahinaaye, Pilatu ni Herodi yaari oowiittana, vano nihuku nne yaapakana onthamwene." 
Luke23:13 Pilatu aahaathukumanyiha ahooleli a asaserdoti*, atthu anlamula nitho muloko," 
Luke23:14 aweerelaka: “Nyuwo mookiruuhela Mulopwana Ola ntoko mukina onsesera muloko wa atthu weera owane. Miyo koomukohakoha Yoowo vamaithoniwanyu, ni nkiphwannye nthowa na soowoothera munimpakelaanyu." 
Luke23:15 Hiihotho Herodi, niwoko owo oonihokoloxera hiyo. Ntoko munoonaanyu, khapanke etthu yoophwanela okhwa." 
Luke23:16 Tivawo, miyo kinoomuttaruxa, ni vahoolo kinoomutaphula." 
Luke23:17  
Luke23:18 Ni nsu nimoha awo yaakhuwela: “Mmwiive Owo! Munitaphulele Baraba.” 
Luke23:19 Baraba aawaleliwa mukaliposo niwoko aasesera muloko owana musidadeni, nitho niwoko na wiiva." 
Luke23:20 Ahaawelaka omtaphula Yeesu, Pilatu aahuulumatho ni muloko wa atthu." 
Luke23:21 Vano awosa yaapwaherera okhuwela: “Munkhomele! Munkhomele!” 
Luke23:22 Emaara yanaararu Pilatu aaweerela: “Niwoko heeni? Etthu yoonanara heeni Mulopwana Ola opankaawe? Nkiphwannye mwa Yoowo naari etthu yoophwanela okhwa. Kinoorumiha omuttaruxa, ni vahoolo kinoomutaphula.”" 
Luke23:23 Mene awosa yannatepa omvekela ni sookhuwela sitokotoko weera Yeesu akhomeliwe, ni okhuwelawaya waawina." 
Luke23:24 Vano Pilatu aalakela waapakela yeeyo yaatthunaaya. 
Luke23:25 Aamutaphula mulopwana aari okaliposo niwoko na osesera ni wiiva, yoole awo yaamvekenlaaya, ni yaamwinnyerera Yeesu wa otthunawaya." 
Luke23:26 Emuronghaka Yeesu, yaamvara Simeyoni oSireene ahokolowaka omatta ni yaamuthateliha muttanda, emunyesererihaka weera akuxe muttanda ottuli wa Yeesu." 
Luke23:27 Atthu ancipale yaamutthara, vamoha ni asithiyana yaalalaminke ni yaamwiinlenle Yoowo." 
Luke23:28 Yeesu aahaarukunuwela ni aaweerela: “Asithiyana a oYerusaleemu, muhikiinlele Miyo, mwiixiinleleketho asineenaanyu ni anamwaniinyu," 
Luke23:29 niwoko eniiphiye ehuhu muneeraanyu mweere: “Ooreelihiwa yaale oohiyara, maphwanya ahitonko oyara ni mapele ehinaamwiwe!" 
Luke23:30 Vano, mmweerele nyaako: ‘Munipittuwele’ ni wa mattumuxa: ‘Munikhuneele.’" 
Luke23:31 Awo yapaka yeeyo ni mwiri mukithi, eniikhumelele eheeni mwiri ole wuumaka?”" 
Luke23:32 Ni atakhali eeli akina yaakuxiwatho ni Yoowo weera yiiviwe. 
Luke23:33 Yaaphiyalaaya vanipuroni niitthaniwa Nikarakasa, yaamuthomeya vamoha ni atakhali ale – mmoha moono mulopwana ni mukina muthiyana." 
Luke23:34 Yeesu aaheera: “Tiithi, mwaalevelele, niwoko khaansuwela yeeyo ampakaaya.” Vano yaakawana ikuwosawe empakaka mwaathanle." 
Luke23:35 Muloko wa atthu waari vaavaale owehexexaka ni asitokweene anlamula yannamutheiya yeeraka: “Aahaavuluxa akina. Aari Kristu a Muluku, Oothanliwa, iivuluxe muneenaawe.”" 
Luke23:36 Anakhotto emwaattamelaka, yaamutheiyatho. Emvahaka eviinyu yoonyuunya," 
Luke23:37 yaamweerela: “Waari mwene a aYuda, wiivuluxe muneenaawo.”" 
Luke23:38 Vano, yaakhala yoolempwa vasuluwaawe: OLA MWENE A AYUDA." 
Luke23:39 Mmoha a atakhali aathomeiwe ni Yoowo, aamuruwana eeraka: “Weyo khoohiyono Kristu? Wiivuluxe muneenaawo, ni hiyotho.”" 
Luke23:40 Mutakhalitho mukina aamuhiiha mukhwaawe eeraka: “Weyo khoommoova Muluku, weenre waakhelaka nthorihelo nimoharu?" 
Luke23:41 Hiyo ninttaruxiwa ni ekhaikhai, niwoko nnaakhela yeeyo mitekosahu simphwanelaaya. Mene Mulopwana Ola, kheewo opankaawe yoonanara.”" 
Luke23:42 Vano aamweerela: “Yeesu, mukuupuwelele miyo mwaavolowaka moomwenenimwanyu.”" 
Luke23:43 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Miyo kinoororomelihani: Olelo mmwikhale ni Miyo mParadisu*.” 
Luke23:44 Yaari wookwanaka ewoora ya ophiya nsuwa vamuru, ni epiphi yaakhuneela elapo ya vathi yootheene wa iwoora tthaaru." 
Luke23:45 Nsuwa naahiya woopa, ni ekuwo etokotoko ya Empa ya Muluku yaahaahuwa variyari." 
Luke23:46 Yeesu aakhuwelaxa: “Tiithi, kinoovahererani munepaaka mmatatanimwanyu.” Eerakaru hiiho, aahookhwa." 
Luke23:47 Vano kenturiyoni*, oonaka seiyo seereiye, aamuttottopela Muluku eeraka: “Vekhaikhai, Mulopwana Ola aari a ekhaikhai.”" 
Luke23:48 Muloko wa atthu wootheene waathukumanne weera woone yookhumelela, woonaka yeeyo, waapacera omana ekakasa ni osusa." 
Luke23:49 Ootheenetho yaamusuwenle, mpaka asithiyanatho yaamutthara okhuma oGalileiya, yaari ottaiwene, ewehexexaka itthu iye." 
Luke23:50 Aakhala mulopwana mmoha iitthaniwa Yoseefe, mmoha a eSineedriyu*. Aari mulopwana ooreera murima ni oororomeleya," 
Luke23:51 ahaakupaleenle ni yoolakela ya akina a eSineedriyu*, naari ni yeeyo yaapankaaya. Aari a esidade yiitthaniwa Arimateiya oYudeiya, ni aaweherera omwene wa Muluku." 
Luke23:52 Arowaka wa Pilatu, aamvekela muttembo wa Yeesu." 
Luke23:53 Vano aakuruxa vamuttandani, aavitikelela ni esaanda ni aahiikaathi munihiyeni naathimpwe vamwala mwemmo nlelo khaatonke ovithiwa mutthu." 
Luke23:54 Naari nihuku na oreherera, ni naahanle vakhaani opacera nihuku na eSaabadu." 
Luke23:55 Asithiyana yaamutthara Yeesu okhuma oGalileiya, yaamutthara Yoseefe ni yaahoona nihiye ni moota yaavithiwaayamo erutthu ya Yeesu." 
Luke23:56 Vano yaarowa owaani ni yaareherera makhura ni itthu sikina soowunkhelaxa. Yaahiitthuuwa eSaabadu ntoko yaalamuliwaaya. 
Luke24:1 Vanihukuni noopacera na esimana, oyaaka ni oxa, asithiyana yaakuxa itthu iye soowunkhelaxa yaareherenraaya ni yaarowa onihiyeni." 
Luke24:2 Yaaphwanya nluku ntokotoko na nihiye nikakhiweene," 
Luke24:3 mene evolowaka, khayaaphwannye muttembo wa Yeesu." 
Luke24:4 Etikhinaka hiihaale, vano wootutuxereya asilopwana eeli ni ikuwo saanre ntoko nsuwa yaawaattamela yaawo." 
Luke24:5 Awo yaahuuramiha nyurusaya ni woova, ni asilopwana yaaweerela: “Heeni mummwaasaasaanyu variyari wa akhwiiye Yoole ori ni okumi?" 
Luke24:6 Owo khamomo! Oovenyerera! Muupuwelele yeeyo ooleenlaaweni nlelo areene ni nyuwo oGalileiya. 
Luke24:7 ‘Ontthuneya weera Mwaana a mutthu avahereriwe mmatatani a anamattheka, akhomeliwe ni avenyerere nihuku nanaararu.’”" 
Luke24:8 Vano yaahuupuwelela maswaawe. 
Luke24:9 Yaahokolowaaya onihiyeni, yaahaathalihera itthu sootheene seiye oohusera muloko nimmoha, nitho wa akina ootheene." 
Luke24:10 Yaathalihenre itthu seiya arummwa yaari Mariya oMagadalene, Yohana, Mariya amayawe Yakobe, ni akina yaari ni yaawo." 
Luke24:11 Awo khayaaroromenle asithiyana. Wa yaawo, maswaaya yaari ntoko masu a anepa." 
Luke24:12 Wa soothesene, Pedru aaheemela, anatthimakela onihiyeni. Uuramaka, oonne esaanda paahi. Aapwaha ni aahokolowa ootikhineene ni yeeyo yaakhumelenle." 
Luke24:13 Nihuku nenenenne, eeli a yaawo yeera erowaka wa muttetthe wiitthaniwa Emawusi, waarakamela ikilomeetru* muloko niimoha oYerusaleemu." 
Luke24:14 Mphironi, yaanuuluma mwaha wa sootheene saakhumelenle." 
Luke24:15 Yuulumaka ni etthekulaka hiihaale, Yeesu muneenaawe aawaattamela, anapacera weetta ni yaawo," 
Luke24:16 mene maithwaaya yaahooceelihiwa omusuwela. 
Luke24:17 Owo aahaakoha: “Muntthekulela eheeni mweettaka?” Awo yaaheemela ni ikhovesaya soothanana. 
Luke24:18 Mmoha a yaawo, iitthaniwa Kleyopa, aamukoha: “Nyuwo muri namarwa mmoharu oYerusaleemu, ahisuwelaka itthu sikhumelenlewo wa mahuku yaala?”" 
Luke24:19 “Itthu heeni?” Owo aamukoha. Awo yaamwaakhula: “Seiye simukhumelenle Yeesu muNasarete. Aari Mprofeeti oowera ni masu ni miteko ohoolo wa Muluku ni muloko wa atthu wootheene. 
Luke24:20 Ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni asitokweenaahu anlamula yaamvaherera weera athoriheliwe okhwa, ni yaamuthomeya." 
Luke24:21 Hiyo naaweherera weera eera akhale Yoowo aneera aruuhe ovuluwa wa oYixrayeli. Olelo nri nihuku nanaararu okhuma sootheene seiye seereiye. 
Luke24:22 Vano, asithiyana akina variyariwahu aanitutuxa olelo. Yaarowa onihiyeni oyaaka ni oxa," 
Luke24:23 ni khaaphwannye erutthwaawe. Yaahokolowa yeeraka weera yaahiixooniherawo andyelo eweerelaka weera Yeesu ori ni okumi. 
Luke24:24 Vanonto, asikhwiihu akina yaarowawo onihiyeni, ni yaaphwanya sootheene ntoko asithiyana yaahimalaaya, mene khaamoonne Yoowo.”" 
Luke24:25 Owo aaweerela: “Nyuwo onnoohaleelani wiiwexexa ni munnalekela ororomela sootheene seiyo yaalokolenlaaya maprofeeti. 
Luke24:26 Khawaatthuneya weera Kristu ahaawe itthusene seiyo ni avolowe moovuwanimwawe?” 
Luke24:27 Vano, okhuma Moisesi ni maprofeeti ootheene, aahaathalihera sootheene saalempwa sa Yooworu." 
Luke24:28 Yaattamelaka muttetthe yaarowaayawo, Yeesu aakhala ntoko aatthuna opwaherera muhoolo." 
Luke24:29 Vano awo yaamunyesereraxa yeeraka: “Mukhale ni hiyo va, niwoko oneera wiilaka, othana ohanle vakhaani omala.” Vano Owo aavolowa weera akhale ni yaawo." 
Luke24:30 Areene vameesa ni yaawo, aakuxa ipaawu, anatthapela, anameyanyiha, anaavaha." 
Luke24:31 Vano maithwaaya yaahuliwa ni yaamusuwela, ni Owo aalakaseya ohoolowaya." 
Luke24:32 Awo yaakohana: “Mirimasahu khasivinghe olelo mphironi Owo uulumaka ni hiyo, anithaliheraka Yoolempwa*?”" 
Luke24:33 Yaavenya ni yaahokoleela woowaakuveya oYerusaleemu. Weiwo yaahaaphwanya muloko nimmoha, ni awo yaathukumanne ni yaawo," 
Luke24:34 enaweerela: “Ekhaikhai! Apwiya aavenyerera ni ahiixoonihera wa Simeyoni!” 
Luke24:35 Eeli ale yaahaathalihera seiyo seereiye mphironi, ni moota yaamusuwenlaaya Yeesu Owo ameyanyihaka ipaawu." 
Luke24:36 Yuulumaka hiihaale, Yeesu muneenaawe aahiixoonihera wa yaawo ni aaweerela: “Murettele okhale ni nyuwo.”" 
Luke24:37 Awo yaatuthuwa ni yaahoova, yuupuwelaka weera yoona munepa." 
Luke24:38 Owo aaweerela: “Heeni muntuthuwaanyu ni munghovelaanyu mmurimanimwanyu? 
Luke24:39 Moone mmatatanimwaka ni inaawosaka. Ti Yoomi! Mukitave ni moone. Munepa khoonono erutthu, hata makhuva ntoko munoonaanyu Miyo kikhalannaaka.”" 
Luke24:40 Ahimakaru yeeyo, aawoonihera matata ni inaawo." 
Luke24:41 Ehiroromelaka nlelo niwoko na ohakalala ni otikhina, aahaakoha: “Nyuwo mookhalano etthu yooca weera kice?”" 
Luke24:42 Yaamvaha mpatta mmoha wa ehopa yoowooxiwa," 
Luke24:43 ni aakhuura awosa yoonaka. 
Luke24:44 Vano aaweerela: “Ti yeeyo kooleenlaakani kireene nlelo ni nyuwo: ‘Waatthuneya weera sikwaniheriwe sootheene silempwe mwaha wa Miyo mmalamuloni a Moisesi, mmaprofeetini ni mulivuruni ya icipo.’”" 
Luke24:45 Vano Owo aahaahulela soowuupuwelasaya weera awo ewere wiiwexexa Yoolempwa*. 
Luke24:46 Aaweerela: “Yoolempwa weera Kristu aarwa ohaawa ni ovenyerera mookhwaani nihuku nanaararu," 
Luke24:47 nitho weera mwa Nsinanawe waatthuneya olaleiwa orukunxa murima wa miloko sootheene, okhuma oYerusaleemu, weera yaakhele elevelelo ya soottheka." 
Luke24:48 Nyuwo muri anamoona a itthu seiya. 
Luke24:49 Miyo kinimoorumihelani Yoowo yoororomelihiwa ya Atithaka, mene mukhale musidadeni mpaka muneeraanyu mwaakhele ikuru sa musulusulu.”" 
Luke24:50 Aaronghiwaawe mpaka vakhiviru wa oBetaniya, Yeesu aaheemexa matata ni aahaareeliha." 
Luke24:51 Aareelihaka hiihaale, aahaahiya ni aawelihiwa wiirimu." 
Luke24:52 Vano awo yaamulapa ni yaahokoleela oYerusaleemu ni ohakalalaxa," 
Luke24:53 ni yannakhala Mpaani mwa Muluku ehuhu yootheene emuttottopelaka Muluku. 
John1:1 Ompacereroni naari Nsu, ni Nsu naari ni Muluku, ni Yooweene aari Muluku." 
John1:2 Nno naari ni Muluku ompacereroni. 
John1:3 Itthu sootheene saapattuxiwe ni Nsu nno. Kheewoworu etthu ekhanle nihipankaaya nenno. 
John1:4 Okumi waari mwa Nenno, ni Nno naari waara wa atthu." 
John1:5 Waara ommwaleela mpiphini ni epiphi kheewinne. 
John1:6 Aari mulopwana aarummwe ni Muluku, nsinanawe Yohaane." 
John1:7 Owo aahoowa ntoko namoona weera akhalele onamoona, ni hiiho atthu ootheene eroromele niwoko na yoowo." 
John1:8 Owo muneenaawe khaahiyono waara, aarweenletho okhalela onamoona mwaha wa waara." 
John1:9 Weera orwaaka mweelaponi Waara wa ekhaikhai, mwa Yoowo onaamwaleela atthu ootheene." 
John1:10 Owo aari mweelaponi, elapo epattuxiwe ni Yoowo, elapotho khayaamusuwenle." 
John1:11 Aarweenle yaawo yaari awawe, mene awawe khayaamwaakhenle." 
John1:12 Wa soothesene, wa yaale yaamwaakhenle, yaale anroromela mwa Nsinanawe, ohaavaha owera othatuwa anamwane a Muluku;" 
John1:13 yaale ahiyariwe ni ekhapira ya omutthu, hata ni otthuna wa erutthu, naari ni otthuna wa mulopwana, mene ayariwe wa Muluku." 
John1:14 Nsu noothatuwa erutthu ni naakhala variyariwahu. Nohoona ovuwawaya, aani ovuwa wa Mwaana mmoharu aawiiye wa Atiithi, oosareya mahala ni ekhaikhai." 
John1:15 Yohaane onnakhalela onamoona Nsu. Owo onnakhuwela, eeraka: “Owo ti Yoole kaamuhimmaaka: ‘Yoole ongwa ottuliwaka ti Mutokweenaaka, niwoko miyo kihinaaye okhala, Owo aakhala.’”" 
John1:16 Ootheene hiyo nohaakhela wa soowaattasawe mahala mwa mahala. 
John1:17 Vano, nlamulo nivahiwe ni Moisesi, mahala ni ekhakhai erwiiye ni Yeesu Kristu." 
John1:18 Khaawo omoonne Muluku, ahikhanle Mwanawe mmoharu ori vamoha ni Atiithi mwa Yoowo aasuwelihale." 
John1:19 aYuda oYerusaleemu yaarumaaya asaserdoti* ni aLeevi weera emukohe aari taani, onamoona Yohaane aakhalenlaawe ti ola:" 
John1:20 Owo aahima ni khaakhoontte, aani aahima mwaatthuni: “Nkihiyono Kristu.”" 
John1:21 Yaamukoha: “Vano, taani nyuwo? Eliya?” Owo aaheera: “Nkihiyono.” “Mprofeeti?” Owo aawaakhula: “Hoye.”" 
John1:22 Ommaleloni yaamukoha: “Nyuwo taani? Munaakhule weera naaleele yaawo anirumme. Munghima eheeni sa muneenaanyu?” 
John1:23 Yohaane aawaakhula ni masu a mprofeeti Yesaya: “Miyo nsu ninkhuwela munikareni: ngwookolele ephiro Apwiya.” 
John1:24 aFarisi* akina yaarummwale 
John1:25 yaamukohakoha: “Vano, heeni mumpatisaanyu muhikhanle Kristu, hata Eliya, hata mprofeeti?”" 
John1:26 Yohaane aawaakhula: “Miyo kimpatisa ni maahi; variyariwanyutho ookhala Mukina nyuwo muhimusuwenlaanyu. 
John1:27 Owo ti Yoowo onrwa ottuliwaka, ni miyo nkimphwanela otaphula miraamba sa ikwakwaattasawe.”" 
John1:28 Itthu sootheene seiye seereiye oBetaniya okhopela wa oYordanu, weiwo Yohaane eeraawewo opatisa." 
John1:29 Oxaawaya Yohaane aamoona Yeesu amwaattamelaka ni aaheera: “Moone – Eputtiputthi ya Muluku emvenxa soottheka sa elapo ya vathi. 
John1:30 Ola ti Yoole kaamuhimmaaka, keeraka: ‘Ottuliwaka onimoorwa Mulopwana Mmoha ookipwaha miyo, niwoko miyo kihinaaye okhala, Owo aakhala.’" 
John1:31 Miyo muneenaaka nkaamusuwenle, mene niwoko na yeeyo miyo kirwiiyaaka opatiso ni maahi weera Owo awe ni ooniheriwe wa aYixrayeli.”" 
John1:32 Vano Yohaane aakhalela onamoona ola: “Miyo kohoona Munepa okhuruwaka wiirimu ntoko ekhunda enamweemelela Yoowo. 
John1:33 Miyo nkaarwa omusuwela kahaaleeliwe ni Yoole okirumme opatiso ni maahi: ‘Yoole muneeraanyu mmoone omukhuruwelaka Munepa ni omweemelelaka – ti Yoowo ompatisa ni Munepa Wootteela.’ 
John1:34 Miyo kohoona ni kinnakhalela onamoona weera Ola Mwaana a Muluku.” 
John1:35 Oxaawaya Yohaane aaritho vaavaale vamoha ni eeli a oohuseraawe. 
John1:36 Amoonakaru Yeesu aviraka, aaheera: “Mmoone – Ola Eputtiputthi ya Muluku!”" 
John1:37 Emwiiwakaru uulumaka yeeyo, oohusera ooweeli ale yaamutthara Yeesu." 
John1:38 Arukunuwaka ni awoonaka Yeesu ooweeli emuttharaka, aahaakoha: “Muntthuna eheeni?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Rabi (entaphulela ‘Muhusiha’), muphiyenre woowi?”" 
John1:39 Owo aawaakhula: “Murweeke ni munimoona.” Vano yaarowa oxekuwa, yaahoona Owo aaphiyenraawewo ni yaakhala vamoha ni Yoowo nihuku nootheene nne." 
John1:40 Andreiya, munneiye Simeyoni Pedru, aari mmoha a eeli ale yiiwale seiye Yohaane aahimmaawe ni yaamutthanre Yeesu." 
John1:41 Oopacera aamphwannyaawe aari Simeyoni, munneiye ni aamweerela: “Noomphwanya Mesiya (eyo tiiyo Kristu).”" 
John1:42 Vano aamurongha wa Yeesu. Yeesu aangweha yoowo ni aamweerela: “Nyuwo ti Simeyoni, mwaana a Yohaane. Mmwiitthaniwe Kefasi, entaphulela Pedru.”" 
John1:43 Oxaawaya Yeesu aahuupuwela orowa oGalileiya. Aamphwannyaawe Filipe, aamweerela: “Mukitthareke.”" 
John1:44 Filipe, aari oBetisayida, hiiho ntoko Andreiya ni Pedru." 
John1:45 Owo aamphwanya Nataneyeli ni aamweerela: “Noomphwanya Yoole aamulempaawe Moisesi mmalamuloni, nitho mwa Yoowo maprofeeti yaamulempaaya: Yeesu muNasarete, Mwaana a Yoseefe.”" 
John1:46 Nataneyeli aamukoha: “Nasarete? Enoowereya orwawo etthu yooreera?” Filipe aamweerela: “Ngwe ni moone.” 
John1:47 Amoonaka Nataneyeli akhuveelaka, Yeesu aaheera: “Mmoone – muYixrayeli a ekhakhai ni oohilokottheya.”" 
John1:48 Nataneyeli aamukoha: “Mukisuwenle woowi?” Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Miyo kiwoonneni mwaaraanyu nlelo vathi wa mwiri wa efiigu, Filipe ahinaaye owiitthanani.”" 
John1:49 Vano Nataneyeli aahima: “Muhusiha, nyuwo Mwaana a Muluku, Mwene a aYixrayeli.”" 
John1:50 Yeesu aamweerela: “Munroromela niwoko keenraaka kiwoonneni vathi wa mwiri wa efiigu. Nyuwo mmoone itthu sitokotoko soopwahaxa seiya.” 
John1:51 Aapwahereratho: “Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: Nyuwo munimoona wiirimu woohuleya ni andyelo a Muluku ewelaka ni emukhuruwelaka Mwaana a mutthu.” 
John2:1 Vano, vanihukuni nanaararu waakhala okwatti oKana oGalileiya. Amayawe Yeesu yaari weiwe." 
John2:2 Yeesu ni oohuseraawe yaalattuliwatho wookwattini ole. 
John2:3 Yaamalaaya eviinyu, amayawe Yeesu yaamweerela: “Awo khaanono eviinyu ekina.”" 
John2:4 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Nri ni heeni Miyo ni nyuwo? Ehuhuwaaka kheenaaye ophiya.” 
John2:5 Amayawe yaaweerela arumeiyi: “Mpake sootheene Owo aneeraawe oorumeeni.” 
John2:6 Vano, vakhiviru vaavaale saakhala nyaapu mithannamosa sa maluku, moota yaavarelaaya muteko aYuda woorapihani, ettharaka ekhovelelowaaya. Mwaapu ti mwaapu waawera okhalano okhuma iliitru* miloko mithannamiili niithanu mpakatho sikina iliitru* ncira ni muloko niithanu." 
John2:7 Yeesu aaweerela arumeiyi: “Musarihe munyaapuni maahi.” Yaasariha nyaapu mpaka mukalani. 
John2:8 Vanotho aaweerela: “Mukuxe vakhaani ni muronghe wa mutokweene a efesta.” Yaapaka yeeyo 
John2:9 ni mutokweene a efesta aalawiha maahi yaathatungwe eviinyu. Owo khaasuwenle yaaweelaaya eviinyu ele, yaari mweeraru arumeiyi yaakunxe esuwenleene. Vano aamwiitthana aatthomenre" 
John2:10 ni aamweerela: “Ootheene amvaha woopacera eviinyu yoosiva ni ewuraka oolattuliwa nnene, amvahiwa eviinyu yoohisiva. Vaheera nyuwo moothokorora eviinyu yoosivaxa mpaka vaanaano.”" 
John2:11 Eneneero ele yootikhiniheya oKana oGalileiya yaari yoopacera Yeesu aapankaawe. Hiiho aathupulula ovuwawawe ni oohuseraawe yaamuroromela. 
John2:12 Vahoolowaya aarowa oKafaranawu vamoha ni amayawe, axunneiye ni oohuseraawe. Weiwo yaakhala mahuku makina." 
John2:13 Yaakhuveelaaya ehuhu ya mPaska* a aYuda, Yeesu aarowa oYerusaleemu." 
John2:14 Mpaani mwa Muluku aawoona akina ethumihaka imombe, ikhondoolo ni ikhunda ni akina ekilaantheene vameesa eceendyaka musurukhu." 
John2:15 Vano aapaka ekhwamba ya mikoyi ni aawoomola ootheene Mpaani mwa Muluku nitho ikhondoolo ni imombe. Aamwaraxa makhoobiri a anamaceendya ni aapittula meesaaya. 
John2:16 Aaweerela yaathumiha ikhunda: “Muvenxe itthu iya va. Muhipake Empa ya Atithaka emerekadu!” 
John2:17 Oohuseraawe yaahuupuwelela weera yaalempwa: “Okhalelawaka nthiti Empaanyu onnavarela ntoko mooro mmurimanimwaka.” 
John2:18 Vano aYuda yaamukoha: “Eneneero heeni yootikhiniheya mungweraanyu onoonihera weera yaakhuleliwe yeeyo mumpakaanyu vaanaano vaava?” 
John2:19 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Mukankhanyule Empa ya Muluku ela ni Miyo kinooteka wa mahuku mararu.” 
John2:20 aYuda yaamwaakhula: “Empa ya Muluku ela etekiwe wookwana iyaakha 46 ni Nyuwo munooteka wa mahuku mararu?” 
John2:21 Empatho aahimmaawe yaari erutthwaawe. 
John2:22 Avenyererakaru mookhwaani, oohuseraawe yaahuupuwelela yeeyo aahimmaawe. Vano yaaroromela mwa Yoolempwa* ni mwa masu Yeesu aahimmaawe." 
John2:23 Areene Yeesu oYerusaleemu, ofestani ya mPaska*, atthu ancipale yaahoona ineneero sootikhiniheya Owo aapakaawe ni yaaroromela mwa Nsinanawe." 
John2:24 Yeesutho khaaroromela yaawo niwoko aahaasuwela atthu ootheene. 
John2:25 Khawaatthuneya weera akhaleliwe onamoona mwaha wa mutthu niwoko aasuwela nnenesene yeeyo yaari mmurimani mwa atthu. 
John3:1 Aakhala muFarisi* mmoha iitthaniwa Nikodemu, mutokweene mmoha a aYuda." 
John3:2 Owo aahoowa wa Yeesu ohiyu eeraka: “Muhusiha, noosuwela weera Nyuwo Muhusiha ongwa wa Muluku, niwoko khaawo ongwera opaka ineneero sootikhiniheya Nyuwo mumpakaanyu, Muluku ahikhanle ni yoowo.”" 
John3:3 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Kinooleelani ekhakhai: khaawo ongwera woona omwene wa Muluku owo ahiyariwetho wa osulu.” 
John3:4 Nikodemu aamukoha: “Ongwereya hai mukina oyariwa areene namuuluvala? Vekhaikhai khangwera ovolowatho mmirimani mwa amayawe ni ayariwetho!” 
John3:5 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Kinooleelani ekhaikhai: khaawo ongwera ovolowa moomweneni wa Muluku owo ahiyariwe wa maahi ni wa Munepa. 
John3:6 Yaawo angyariwa wa erutthu ti a mweerutthuni, ni yaawo angyariwa wa Munepa ti a mmunepani." 
John3:7 Muhitikhine niwoko kooleenlaakani ontthuneya weera muyariwe veeli. 
John3:8 Epheyo enoopela weiwo entthunaayawo. Nyuwo munimwiiwa, mene khamungwera ohima enkhumaaya, naari enkelaaya. Hiihotho enkhumelela ni ootheene ooyariwa wa Munepa.”" 
John3:9 Nikodemu aamukoha: “Ongwereya hai hiiho?” 
John3:10 Yeesu aamweerela: “Nyuwo muhusiha a oYixrayeli ni khamuniiwexexa itthu iya? 
John3:11 Kinoororomelihani weera hiyo ninuuluma sa yeeyo ninsuwelaahu ni ninkhalela onamoona sa yeeyo nnoonaahu, hata hiihotho, mulokwaanyu khoonaakhulela onamoonaahu." 
John3:12 Miyo kohooleelani itthu sa vathi ni khamuroromenle. Mmwiroromele hai Miyo kooleelani itthu sa wiirimu? 
John3:13 Khaawo owenle wiirimu, ahikhanle Yoole owiiye wiirimu, eyo tiiyo Mwaana a mutthu." 
John3:14 Mooteene yoowo Moisesi eemenxaawe enowa munikareni, hiihotho ontthuneya weera Mwaana a mutthu akhale oowelihiwa" 
John3:15 weera ootheene animuroromela Yoowo, ekhalane okumi woohimala." 
John3:16 Vano Muluku aasivela elapo ya vathi moota wooweera aamvahalaawe Mwanawe mmoharu weera atthu ootheene animuroromela Yoowo kheeriheya, mene anookhalano okumi woohimala." 
John3:17 Muluku khaamurumihenle Mwanawe mweelaponi ya vathi weera athorihe, mene weera elapo evuluxiwe ni Yoowo." 
John3:18 Yoowo onimuroromela khanthorihiwa, mene yoowo ohinimuroromela, oothorihiwa niwoko na ohiroromela mwa Nsina na Mwaana mmoharu a Muluku." 
John3:19 Nthorihelo ti nna: waara wohoowa vathi, mene atthu yaasivela epiphi ohiya waara niwoko mitekosaya saari soonanara." 
John3:20 Yoowo ompaka soonanara, onthanya waara. Owo khanaattamela waara oovaka weera mitekosawe nsisuweliwe." 
John3:21 Vano yoowo ompaka ekhakhai, onimwaattamela waara weera mitekosawe sooneiye mwaatthuni ntoko soopakiwa ni Muluku.”" 
John3:22 Vahoolowaya, Yeesu aarowa ni oohuseraawe wa elapo ya oYudeiya ni weiwo aakhala ehuhu vakhaani vamoha ni yaawo nitho aapatisa." 
John3:23 Yohaanetho eera apatisaka wAinooni, vakhiviru wa oSalimi niwoko weiwo yaahaatta maahi ni muloko wa atthu wannarowa weera opatisiwe." 
John3:24 Eyo yaakhumelenle ahinaaye Yohaane otthukiwa. 
John3:25 Waahaakhulaniwa akina oohusera a Yohaane ni muYuda mukina mwaha wa ekhovelelo ya orapiha. 
John3:26 Awo yaarowa wa Yohaane ni yaamweerela: “Muhusiha, Mulopwana Owo aari ni nyuwo okhopela wa Yordanu, mwa Yoole mwaamukhalenlaanyu onamoona, ompatisa ni ootheene anrowa wa Yoowo.”" 
John3:27 Yohaane aawaakhula: “Mutthu ongwera waakhela paahi yeeyo omvahiwaawe wiirimu. 
John3:28 Nyuwo asineenaanyu muri anamoona a yeeyo kaahimmaaka: ‘Miyo nkihiyono Kristu, mene aani kiri yoole orumihiwe vahoolowawe.’" 
John3:29 Namatthomeriwa ori a namatthomera. Nthamwene onimurumeela namatthomera oningweherera ni onimwiiwelela ni iiwaka nsu na namatthomera onoohakalalaxa. Wu ti ohakalalawaka ni vano wookwaniheriwa. 
John3:30 Ontthuneya weera Owo akhale oottittimiheyaxa ni miyo ooyevaxa. 
John3:31 Yoole onrweela osulu ori Mutokweene a ootheene. Yoole onrweela wa vathi ori a vathi ni onuuluma ntoko mutthu a vathi. Yoole onrweela wiirimu ori Mutokweene a ootheene. 
John3:32 Owo onkhalela onamoona yeeyo oonnaawe ni iiwalaawe, mene khaawo anaakhulela onamoonaawe." 
John3:33 Yoole onaakhulela, onaakhuleliha weera Muluku ti a ekhaikhai." 
John3:34 Vano, Yoole Muluku omurummaawe, onuuluma masu a Muluku niwoko Owo onnavaha Munepa moota woohikhalano mwiinaano." 
John3:35 Atiithi animusivela Mwaana ni aamwinnyerera sootheene mmatatanimwawe. 
John3:36 Yoowo onimuroromela Mwaana, ookhalano okumi woohimala. Vaheera yoowo onimukhootta Mwaana, kharwa oona okumi, mene isara sa Muluku sinkhala ni yoowo.”" 
John4:1 aFarisi* yaahiiwa yeeriwaka weera Yeesu eera aapakaka ni aapatisaka oohusera ompwaha Yohaane," 
John4:2 aari mweeraru ahikhanle Yeesu aapatisa, mene oohuseraawe." 
John4:3 Vano, Apwiya yaasuwenlaaya yeeyo, yaavenya oYudeiya ni yaahokoleelatho oGalileiya." 
John4:4 Waatthuneya weera avire oSamariya. 
John4:5 Hiiho aaphiya esidade emoha ya oSamariya yiitthaniwa Sikari, vakhiviru wa elapo Yakobe aamvanghaawe mwanawe Yoseefe." 
John4:6 Yaakhala weiwo ehime ya Yakobe. Yeesu akhulumungweene ni mukwahaawe, aakilaathi mukerekhere wa ehime. Yeeyo yeereiye nsuwa vamuru." 
John4:7 Vano aahoowa muthiyana muSamariya orika maahi. Yeesu aamweerela: “Mukivahe maahi vakhaani.” 
John4:8 Oohuseraawe yeera erongweene musidadeni othuma yooca. 
John4:9 Muthiyana muSamariya aamukoha: “Heeni Nyuwo mureene muYuda munkivekelaanyu miyo, kireene muSamariya, maahi weera muwure?” Vano, aYuda khaaniiraana ni aSamariya." 
John4:10 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Nyuwo mwaasuwenle yamahala ya Muluku ni taani onoovekelani maahi, mwaamumvekela maahi ni Owo aamoovahani maahi a okumi.”" 
John4:11 Muthiyana aaweerela: “Apwiya khamunono yoorikela maahi ni ehime eri yoowiixera. Mmwiphwanye woowi maahi a okumi awo? 
John4:12 Weeraka Nyuwo mutokweene waapwaha atithihu Yakobe yaanivanghe ehime mwa yeeyo awo aneenaaya aawura nitho anamwanaaya ni muhuwaaya?” 
John4:13 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Yoole ongwura maahi ala onoovoliwatho ntthona. 
John4:14 Vaheera yoole ongwura maahi Miyo kinimvahaaka, kharwaru avoliwa ntthona. Ohiyanawaya, maahi kineeraaka kimvahe, eniithatuwe naattuuttu akhumiheraka maahi a okumi woohimala.”" 
John4:15 Muthiyana aamweerela: “Apwiya mukivahe maaheene yaawo weera miyo kihivoliwetho ntthona, hata kihihokoleele va orika maahi.”" 
John4:16 Owo aamweerela: “Murowe, mwawiitthane aiyinyu ni ngweke wenno.”" 
John4:17 Owo aamwaakhula: “Nkinono aiyaka.” Yeesu aamweerela: “Nyuwo moohima ekhaikhai mweeraka weera khamunono aiyinyu. 
John4:18 Vekhakhai, mwaakhalano athanu ni mulopwana murinaanyu vaanaano, khahiyono aiyinyu. Yeeyo muhimmaanyu ti ya ekhaikhai.”" 
John4:19 Muthiyana aaweerela: “Apwiya kinoona weera muri Mprofeeti.” 
John4:20 Makholowaahu yaalapela vamwaakoni ola, mene nyuwo aYuda muneera weera oYerusaleemu ti nipuro nintthuneya olapa.”" 
John4:21 Yeesu aahima: “Muroromele yeeyo kinooleelaakani muthiyana. Ehuhu yookhuveela nyuwo muneeraanyu muhaalapele Atiithi, hata vamwaakoni ola, hata oYerusaleemu." 
John4:22 Nyuwo aSamariya munlapela yeeyo muhisuwenlaanyu, hiyo noosuwela yeeyo ninlapelaahu niwoko ovuluxiwa ongweela wa aYuda." 
John4:23 Vanonto, eneera ephiyaka ehuhu, aani vekhaikhai yoophiya, eneeraaya anamalapela a ekhaikhai yaalapele Atiithi ni mMunepani Wootteela ni mweekhaikhaiyini. Ti anamalapa ntoko awo Atiithi angwaasaaya." 
John4:24 Muluku ti Munepa ni ontthuneya weera anamalapelaawe emulapele mMunepani Wootteela ni mweekhaikhaiyini.” 
John4:25 Muthiyana aamweerela: “Koosuwela weera Mesiya, iitthaniwa Kristu, aneera awaaka. Owo aawaaka, anaanithalihere hiyo sootheene.”" 
John4:26 Vano Yeesu aahima: “Miyo kinuuluma ni nyuwo ti Mesiya.” 
John4:27 Ehuhuweene yeele oohuseraawe yaahokolowa ni yaatikhina emphwanyaka Yeesu uulumaka ni muthiyana. Khaawotho aamukonghe: “Muntthuna osuwela eheeni?,” hoye hoye “Heeni onuulumaawe ni yoola?”" 
John4:28 Vano, ahiyaka mwaapwaawe, muthiyana aahokoleela osidade ni aaheerela muloko wa atthu:" 
John4:29 “Ngwe mmoone Mulopwana okileenle sootheene kipankaaka. Weeraka apaale ti Kristu?” 
John4:30 Yaavenya musidadeni ni yaarowa wa Yoowo. 
John4:31 Yeereiyaka hiiho, oohusera a Yeesu yannamunyeserera Yoowo yeeraka: “Muhusiha, muce etthu.”" 
John4:32 Mene Owo aaweerela: “Kookhalano yooca ekina nyuwo muhisuwenlaanyu.” 
John4:33 Vano oohuseraawe yaaheerelana: “Weeraka ookhala mukina ongwiihenre yooca?” 
John4:34 Yeesu aaweerela: “Yoocaaka ti opaka otthuna wa Yoowo okiruminghe ni omaliha mutekwaawe. 
John4:35 Nyuwo khamuneera: ‘Soohala nyeeri mixexe mpaka ophiyera ehuhu ya ohepha?’ Miyo kinooleelani: muhule maitho ni moone imatta. Iyo siri soolikanaxa weera sihephiwe. 
John4:36 Yoowo onghepha onaakhela ntthuvelonawe ni onghephela soowiima okumi woohimala moota wooweera yoole aanle nitho yoole onghepha anootteeliwa murima. 
John4:37 Hiiho ti ekhaikhai miruku singhimaaya: ‘Mukina onaala ni mukina onghepha.’ 
John4:38 Miyo koorumihaleni weera muhephe yeeyo muhilimmaanyu. Akina yannavaraxa muteko ni nyuwo munghepha soowiima sa mitekosaya.” 
John4:39 ASamariya ancipale a esidade ele yaamuroromela Yoowo niwoko na onamoona onttharelana wa muthiyana: “Owo ookileela sootheene kipankaaka.” 
John4:40 Hiiho emwaattamelaka Yeesu, aSamariya yaamunyesereriha weera akhale ni yaawo ni Owo aakhala mahuku meeli." 
John4:41 Niwoko na maswaawe, akina ancipale yaamuroromela." 
John4:42 Yaamweerela muthiyana: “Vano hiyo khaninroromela niwoko na maswaanyu paahi, mene niwoko noomwiiwa asineenaahu ni noosuwela weera Owo ti Mvuluxa a ekhaikhai a elapo ya vathi.”" 
John4:43 Woovira mahuku meeli ale, Yeesu aavenya arowaka oGalileiya." 
John4:44 Yeesu muneenaawe aahaaleelaxa weera khawoworu mprofeeti ori oottittimihiwa mweelaponimwawe. 
John4:45 Aphiyaka oGalileiya, aGalileiya yaamwaakhelela nnene. Awo yaahoona sootheene Owo aapankaawe oYerusaleemu wa ehuhu ya mPaska* niwoko yaaritho weiwo." 
John4:46 Emaara ekinatho Owo aaxekura oKana oGalileiya, weiwo aatatunxaawe maahi eviinyu. Vano aakhala weiwo namuteko mutokweene mmoha a mwene, mwanawe aavoreiwa oKafarnawu." 
John4:47 Iiwalaawe yeeriwaka weera Yeesu aari oGalileiya, awaaka oYudeiya, aamwaasa anamdyoonttelela weera arowe amulamihe mwanawe aahanle vakhaani okhwa." 
John4:48 Yeesu aamweerela: “Nyuwo mwaahoona ineneero ni sootikhiniha, khamunroromela!”" 
John4:49 Namuteko mutokweene a mwene aaweerela: “Apwiya, ngwe, mwanaka ahinaaye okhwa.”" 
John4:50 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Muroweke, mwaninyu onookhala ni okumi.” Mulopwana aaroromela masu a Yeesu ni aavenya." 
John4:51 Areene nlelo mphironi, arumeiyaawe yaamukumanano ni ihaali weera mwanawe aari ni okumi." 
John4:52 Aakohaka ewoora heeni mwanawe olammaawe, awo yaamwaakhula: “Eretta yaamvoreiya yaamuhiya osilo ewoora yanaathannapiili.”" 
John4:53 Vano atiithi yaasuwela weera yeeyo yaari ewoora emoharu aamuleenlaawe Yeesu: “Mwaninyu onookhala ni okumi.” Hiiho aamuroromela, nitho ootheene a vaatewawe." 
John4:54 Eyo yaari eneneero yanaaveeli yootikhiniha Yeesu aapankaawe arwaaka oYudeiya arowaka oGalileiya. 
John5:1 Eviraka ehuhu ekina, Yeesu aarowa oYerusaleemu ofestani emoha ya aYuda." 
John5:2 Vano naakhala oYerusaleemu, vakhiviru wa mulako wa ikhondoolo, ntthiya nniitthaniwa vaHeberi ‘Betzatha’ naarino milako mithanu." 
John5:3 Weiwo yaakhovelela okhalawo atthu ancipale oovoreiwa ni oorakala: oohoona, ootuthunya ni ooheetta." 
John5:4  
John5:5 Mmoha a yaale yaari weiwe aakhalawo aheettaka wa iyaakha miloko miraru niithannatthaaru. 
John5:6 Amoonaka iixaatalenleene ni asuwelaka weera owo aakhala ooheetta wa ehuhu eromoliwe, Yeesu aamukoha: “Nyuwo muntthuna olamihiwa?”" 
John5:7 Mutthu ooheetta aamweerela: “Apwiya, nkinono mutthu ookikhavihera ovolowa vatthiyani maahi etekumaka. Miyo keereraka ovolowa, mukina omvolova miyo kihinaaye.”" 
John5:8 Yeesu aamweerela: “Muvenye, mukuxe nrepananyu ni mweette!”" 
John5:9 Woowaakuveya mulopwana aalama, aakuxa nrepanawe ni aapacera weetta. Nihuku yeereiyaaya yeeyo naari eSaabadu," 
John5:10 tivawo aYuda yaamweerenlaaya mulopwana aalamihiwe: “Olelo eSaabadu! Khoontthuniheriwa okuxa nrepa.” 
John5:11 Mene owo aawaakhula: “Mulopwana ookilamihale ookeerela: ‘Mukuxe nrepananyu ni mweette.’” 
John5:12 Vano yaamukoha: “Mulopwana heeni ooweerenle weera okuxe nrepa ni weette?” 
John5:13 Mulopwana aalamihiwe khaamusuwenle niwoko Yeesu aalakaseya eriyari ya atthu ancipale. 
John5:14 Vahoolo vakhaani Yeesu aamuphwanya Mpaani mwa Muluku ni aamweerela: “Moone, nyuwo moolama. Muhihokoleele ottheka weera etthu yootepa ehookhumeleleni.”" 
John5:15 Mulopwana aarowa ni aahaathalihera aYuda weera ti Yeesu omulamihale. 
John5:16 Vano aYuda yaapacera omuttharatthara Yeesu niwoko Owo aapaka etthu ele eSaabadu. 
John5:17 Yeesu aaweerela: “Atithaka annavara muteko mpaka olelo ni Miyotho kinnavara muteko.” 
John5:18 Niwoko nenenenno, aYuda yannatepa otthuna omwiiva, khoohiyono niwoko na ohiiwelela nlamulo na eSaabadu paahi, mene aaheeratho weera Muluku ti Atithawe muneenaawe navetho iilikanxaka ni Muluku." 
John5:19 Yeesu aaweerela: “Miyo kinooleelani vekhaikai weera Mwaana khangwera opaka etthu muneenaawe. Paahi ongwera opaka yeeyo owoonenlaawe Atithawe epakaka niwoko yeeyo Atiithi ampakaaya, Mwaana onoopakatho." 
John5:20 Atiithi animusivela Mwaana ni animoonihera sootheene ampakaaya. Aani, Awo eniimoonihere miteko soopwaha iya weera mutikhine." 
John5:21 Vano, mooteene yoowo Atiithi anaavenyererihaaya akhwiiye ni anaavahaaya okumi, hiihotho Mwaana onaavaha okumi yaale Owo onaatthunaawe." 
John5:22 Atiithi khaawo animuthorihaaya, mene aamwinnyerera Mwaana nthorihelo nootheene" 
John5:23 weera ootheene emuttittimihe Mwaana ntoko anaattittimihaaya Atiithi. Yoole ohinimuttittimiha Mwaana, khanaattittimihatho Atiithi yaamurumihale." 
John5:24 Miyo kinoororomelihani: Yoowo oniiwa maswaaka ni anaaroromela Yaawo aakirumihale, ookhalano okumi woohimala ni kharwa athorihiwa, mene oolapuwa mookhwaani aphiyaka mpaka mookumini." 
John5:25 Miyo kinoororomelihani vekhaikhai weera enoophiya ehuhu, aani, yoophiya, akhwiiye eneeraaya yiiwe nsu na Mwaana a Muluku ni yaale aniiwa nsu, eniikhale ni okumi." 
John5:26 Vano, mooteene yoowo Atiithi ankhalanaaya okumi mwa aneenaaya, hiihotho aamvaha Mwaana weera akhalenotho okumi mwa muneenaawe." 
John5:27 Aamvahatho ikuru weera athorihe niwoko ori Mwaana a mutthu. 
John5:28 Muhitikhine yeeyo, niwoko enoophiya ehuhu ootheene ari mmahiyeni eneeraaya yiiwe nsunawe ni eniivenye." 
John5:29 Yaale yaapanke yooreera eniivenyerere wa okumi, ni yaale yaapanke yoonanara weera ethorihiwe." 
John5:30 Miyo nkingwera opaka naari etthu muneenaakaru. Kinthoriha paahi ntoko kiniiwaaka ni nthorihelonaka ti na ekhaikhai niwoko nkinaasaasa wiisiveliha, mene waasiveliha Yaale yaakirumihale." 
John5:31 Kiikhalelaka onamoona Miyo muneenaaka, onamoonaaka khoohiyono wa ekhaikhai." 
John5:32 Aakhala Akina ankikhalela onamoona ni koosuwela weera onamoonaaya mwaha wa Miyo ti wa ekhaikhai. 
John5:33 Nyuwo mwaamurumihela atthu Yohaane ni owo aakhalela onamoona mwaha wa ekhaikhai. 
John5:34 Nkinaakhulela onamoona wa atthu, mene kinghima yeeyo weera nyuwo muvuluxiwe." 
John5:35 Yohaane aari onyaari waavarela ni waamwaleela waara, ni mweehuhuni ekina nyuwo mwaatthuna ohakalala niwoko na waarawawe." 
John5:36 Miyo kookhalano onamoona woompwaha Yohaane. Mutekweene yoowo Atiithi akivanghaaya weera kikwanihere ni Miyo kineera kikwaniheraka, onkhalela onamoona weera Atiithi akirumihale." 
John5:37 Atiithi akirumihale, Awo aneenaaya yaakikhalela onamoona. Nyuwo khamunatoko wiiwa nsunaya, hata woona ekhalelowaaya." 
John5:38 Mpaka nsunaya khaninkhala mwa nyuwo niwoko khamunimuroromela Yoowo Atiithi amurumihalaaya. 
John5:39 Nyuwo munsoma Yoolempwa* nnenesene niwoko munuupuwela weera mmwiphwanyemo okumi woohimala. Ti Yoolempwa* enkikhalela onamoona. 
John5:40 Wa soothesene, nyuwo khamuntthuna orwa wa Miyo weera mphwanye okumi woohimala." 
John5:41 Miyo nkinaakhulela ovuwa wa atthu," 
John5:42 mene kohoosuwelani nyuwo. Koosuwela weera nyuwo khamunono osivela wa Muluku. 
John5:43 Miyo kirwiiye mwa Nsina na Atithaka ni nyuwo khamukaakhulenle, mukinatho awa mwa nsinanaweru, nyuwo mmwimwaakhulele." 
John5:44 Mmwiroromele hai mwaakhulelanaka mukina ni mukhwaawe ovuwa, mene khamunaasaasa ovuwa ongwa wa Muluku mmoharu." 
John5:45 Muhuupuwele weera Miyo nkiwoothereni ohoolo wa Atiithi. Ti Moisesi munimuroromelaanyu ori namootheraanyu. 
John5:46 Nyuwo mwaamuroromela Moisesi, saano mukiroromenleenetho Miyo niwoko owo aalepa mwaha wa Miyo." 
John5:47 Woonaka weera khamunroromela yeeyo aalempaawe, mmwiroromele hai yeeyo kinghimaaka?”" 
John6:1 Eviraka ehuhu ekina Yeesu aarowa okhopela okina wa ephareiya ya oGalileiya (eyo tiiyo ephareiya ya oTiberiyade). 
John6:2 Atthu ancipalexa yaamutthara niwoko yaahoona ineneero sootikhiniheya Owo aapakenlaawe aretta. 
John6:3 Vano Yeesu aawela vamwaakoni ni aakilaathi ni oohuseraawe. 
John6:4 Aakhuveela mPaska*, efesta ya aYuda." 
John6:5 Awelihaka maitho ni awoonaka atthu ancipalexa ekhuveelaka, Yeesu aamukoha Filipe: “Nnithumele woowi ipaawu muloko ola?”" 
John6:6 Aakoha yeeyo paahi weera amuyese, niwoko aasuwela nnene yeeyo eeraawe apake." 
John6:7 Filipe aamwaakhula: “Idinaariyu* macira meeli khasinaathumela ipaawu soowaatta weera khula mutthu aakhele yoomeyanyiwa!” 
John6:8 Andreiya, oohusera mmoha mukina, munneiye Simeyoni Pedru, aamweerela Yeesu:" 
John6:9 “Ookhala va mmiravo orino ipaawu ithanu sa esevada* ni ihopa piili sikhaanene, mene eheeni iya wa atthu ancipale ala?”" 
John6:10 Yeesu aaweerela: “Mweerele muloko wa atthu okilaathi.” Waakhala munyepu mwincipale nipuro nenne ni ootheene yaakilaathi. Asilopwanaru yaari wookwanaka macira miloko mithanu. 
John6:11 Yeesu aakuxa ipaawu, anatthapela, anaakawela yaawo yaakilaanthe mpaka yaatthunaaya. Aaheerihatho hiiho ihopa." 
John6:12 Ootheene evonaka, Yeesu aaweerela oohuseraawe: “Muthukumanye mivithe weera sihiriheye.”" 
John6:13 Vanonto, yaathukumanya ni yaasariha mipapara muloko ni miili sa mivithe sa ipaawu sa esevada* saahiiwe ni yaale yaaciiye." 
John6:14 Woonaka eneneero yootikhiniheya Yeesu aapankaawe, muloko wa atthu waapacera weera: “Vekhaikhai, Ola ti Mprofeeti eera awe mweelaponi ya vathi.”" 
John6:15 Yeesu asuwelaka weera awo yaatthuna omunyesereriha omvara omwene, aavenyatho arowaka omwaako meekhaawe." 
John6:16 Wiilaka, oohuseraawe yaarowa ophareiya" 
John6:17 weiwo yaavolongwaaya munikulani ni yaalapuwela oKafarnawu. Waahiila ni Yeesu eera ahinaaye orowa mpaka weiwo yaaraayawo. 
John6:18 Yaanoopa epheyo etokotoko ni ephareiya yaakhala ni mitekuteku. 
John6:19 Yeettihalaaya nikula ikilomeetru* ithanu, hoye hoye ithannamosa, yaamoona Yeesu akhuveelaka nikula eettaka vasulu vaphareiyani ni yaahoova vancipale." 
John6:20 Vano Owo aaweerela: “Ti Yoomi, muhoove!”" 
John6:21 Vano yaatthuna omwaakhelela munikulani ni woowaakuveya yaaphiya okhopela weiwo yaarowaaya. 
John6:22 Oxaawaya, atthu ancipale yaari okhopela okina yaahoona weera naakhalawo nikula nimoha paahi nitho weera Yeesu khaavolongwe mwemmo vamoha ni oohuseraawe, mene weera awo yaarongwe yaaworu." 
John6:23 Vano, makula makina ekhumaka oTiberiyade yaakhuveela nipuro weiwo atthu ancipale yaaciiyaaya ipaawu Apwiya emalingheene omtthapela Muluku." 
John6:24 Esuwelaka atthu ancipale weera, hata Yeesu, naari oohuseraawe, khayaakhanle weiwo, yaavolowa mmakulani enarowa oKafaranawu emwaasaka Yeesu." 
John6:25 Emphwanyaka Yeesu okhopela, yaamukoha: “Muhusiha, muphiyale yaakhani nno?”" 
John6:26 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Vekhaikhai, nyuwo munkaasaasa khoohiyono niwoko moonnaanyu ineneero sootikhiniheya, mene niwoko mwaahooca ipaawu ni mwaavona." 
John6:27 Muhivarele muteko yooca emmala, mene yooca enkhala mpaka mookumini woohimala, mwa yeeyo Mwaana a mutthu anoovaheeni. Muluku Atiithi aamvaha Yoowo eneneero ya waakhuleleya.”" 
John6:28 Vano yaamukoha: “Ontthuneya opaka eheeni weera nivare miteko seiyo Muluku ontthunaawe?” 
John6:29 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Muteko wa Muluku ti ola: omuroromela Yoole Muluku omurumihalaawe.” 
John6:30 Vanonto yaamukoha: “Eneneero heeni yootikhiniheya muneeraanyu moonihere weera noone ni noororomeleni? Mmwipake eheeni? 
John6:31 Makholowaahu yaahooca emana* munikareni, ntoko elempwalaaya: ‘Owo aahaavaha oca sooca sa wiirimu.’”" 
John6:32 Yeesu aaweerela: “Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: Khaahiyono Moisesi oovangheni sooca sa wiirimu, mene ti Atithaka anoovahani sooca sa ekhaikhai sa wiirimu." 
John6:33 Vano, Yooca ya Muluku ti Yoowo okhurungwe wiirimu ni omvaha okumi wa elapo ya vathi.”" 
John6:34 Awo yaaweerela: “Apwiya, munivahe yooceene yeeyo mahuku ootheene.”" 
John6:35 Vano Yeesu aahima: “Miyo ti Yooca ya okumi. Yoole ongwa wa Miyo khawa avoliwa etala ni yoole onkiroromela Miyo khawa avoliwa ntthona.” 
John6:36 Ntokotho kooleenlaakani: nyuwo mookoona nlelotho khamunroromela.” 
John6:37 Ootheene Atiithi ankivahaaya, eniiwe wa Miyo. Ni yoole anaawe wa Miyo, nkiwa kimoomola." 
John6:38 Vano, kookhuruwa wiirimu khoohiyono opaka otthunawaka, mene otthuna wa Yaawo akiruminghe." 
John6:39 Ni wu ti otthuna wa Yaale akirumihale: weera Miyo nkiwa kimuyeleela hata mmoha a yaawo Atiithi yaakivanghaaya, mene weera kaavenyererihe nihuku noomaliha." 
John6:40 Otthuna wa Atithaka ti weera ootheene aningweha Mwaana a mutthu ni animuroromela Yoowo, ekhalane okumi woohimala. Ni Miyo nkimvenyererihe nihuku noomaliha.”" 
John6:41 Wa yeeyo aYuda yaapacera omuttaandawula Yeesu niwoko Owo aaheera: “Miyo ti Yooca ekhurungwe wiirimu.” 
John6:42 Vano yaaheera: “Ola khahiyono Yeesu mwaana a Yoseefe, mwa Yoowo atithawe ni amayawe hiyo naasuwenlaahu? Ongwereya hai weera: ‘Kikhurungwe wiirimu’?”" 
John6:43 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Mmaale ni ottaandawulawanyu. 
John6:44 Khaawo ongwera owa wa Miyo, ehikhanle Atiithi akirumihale ampurunle mmunepani, ni Miyo nkimvenyererihe nihuku noomaliha." 
John6:45 Elempwale mmaprofeetini: Ootheene eniixuttihiwe ni Muluku.” Ootheene angwiiwa Atiithi ni anxuttihiwa ni Yaawo angwa wa Miyo. 
John6:46 Khaawo owoonne Atiithi, ahikhanle Yoole ongwa wa Muluku. Yoole paahi aawoona Atiithi." 
John6:47 Kinoororomelihani weera yoole onroromela, ookhalano okumi woohimala." 
John6:48 Miyo ti Yooca ya okumi. 
John6:49 Makholowaanyu yaahooca emana* munikareni ni ahookhwa. 
John6:50 Wa sootheene, va eri Yooca enkhuruwa wiirimu weera ahikhwe yoowo aneera ace." 
John6:51 Miyo ti Yooca ya okumi yaakhurungwe wiirimu. Mukina aneera ace Yooca ela, anaakhale ni okumi mahuku ootheene. Yooca ela ti erutthwaaka kineeraaka kivahe weera elapo ya vathi ekhale ni okumi.”" 
John6:52 Vano aYuda yaapacera waakhulanaxa yaaworu: “Ongwereya hai Mulopwana Ola onivaha erutthwaawe weera nikhuure?” 
John6:53 Yeesu aaweerela: “Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: Nyuwo mwaahikhuura erutthu ya Mwaana a mutthu, naari mwaahiwura ephomaawe, khamunkhalano okumi mwa nyuwo asineenaanyu." 
John6:54 Ootheene ankhuura erutthwaaka ni angwura ephomaaka, akhalano okumi woohimala ni nkaavenyererihe nihuku noomaliha." 
John6:55 Vano, erutthwaaka ti yooca ya ekhaikhai ni ephomaaka ti yoowura ya ekhaikhai." 
John6:56 Ootheene ankhuura erutthwaaka ni angwura ephomaaka, ankhala mwa Miyo ni Miyotho mwa yaawo." 
John6:57 Mooteene yoowo Atiithi ankhalaaya ni okumi akirumihalaaya ni Miyo kinkhala niwoko na Atiithi, hiihotho yoole onca erutthwaaka anaakhale niwoko na Miyo." 
John6:58 Ela ti Yooca yaakhuruwale wiirimu. Makholowaanyu yaahooca emana* ni yaahookhwa, yooletho onca Yooca ela, anaakhale ni okumi mahuku ootheene.”" 
John6:59 Aahima yeeyo axuttihaka muSinagogani* oKafaranawu. 
John6:60 Yiiwalaaya yeeyo, ancipale a oohuseraawe yaaheera: “Masu ala ti oorika. Taani ongwera wiiwa yaawo?”" 
John6:61 Asuwelaka nnene weera oohuseraawe yeera ettaandawulaka mwaha wa yeeyo, Yeesu aaweerela: “Maswaaka animookwattulani?" 
John6:62 Eniyeereiye eheeni nyuwo mwamoona Mwaana a mutthu awelaka arowaka weiwo aaraawe khalayi? 
John6:63 Munepa omvaha okumi; erutthu khemphwanela etthu. Masu kooleenlaakani ti munepa ni okumi. 
John6:64 Wa soothesene, aakhala akina a nyuwo ahinroromela.” Vano, Yeesu aasuwela okhuma ompacereroni taani a yaawo yaahaaroromela nitho taani eera amvarihe." 
John6:65 Owo aapwaherera eeraka: “Tivawo Miyo kooleenlaakani weera khaawo ongwera owa wa Miyo, ohikhanle weera eyo ovahiwe ni Atiithi.”" 
John6:66 Okhuma ehuhuweene yeele mpaka ohoolo, ancipale a oohuseraawe yaahokolowa ni yaahiya omutthara." 
John6:67 Yeesu aahaakoha oohuseraawe muloko neeli: “Nyuwotho khamuntthuna orowa?”
