John6:68 Simeyoni Pedru aamwaakhula: “Apwiya, wa taani nneeraahu nirowe? Nyuwo murino masu a okumi woohimala." 
John6:69 Hiyo ninroromela ni noosuwela weera Nyuwo muri Ootteela a Muluku.” 
John6:70 Vano Yeesu aawaakhula: “Nkihiyono Miyo koothanlaleni nyuwo muloko neeli? Mmohatho a nyuwo ti a Diyabu*.” 
John6:71 Owo aamuhima Yudasi, mwaana a Simeyoni Iskariyote, mwa yoowo aari mweeraru areene mmoha a oohusera muloko neeli, vahoolowaya eera amvarihe Yeesu." 
John7:1 Vahoolowaya, Yeesu anneetteetta oGalileiya akhalaka mwayiini ottaiwene wa oYudeiya niwoko iwe aYuda yaasaasa omwiiva." 
John7:2 Vano, yaattamelaka efesta ya aYuda, yeele ya mmikotthani," 
John7:3 axunneiye Yeesu yaamweerela: “Ontthuneya weera Nyuwo muvenye va ni murowe oYudeiya weera oohuseraanyu yoone miteko mumpakaanyu. 
John7:4 Khaawo ontthuna osuweliwa mwaatthuni oneetta muxiirini. Mweenre Nyuwo mpakaka itthu seiya, mwiixoonihere mweelaponi.”" 
John7:5 Vano, hata axunneiye khayaamuroromenle Yoowo." 
John7:6 Yeesu aaweerela: “Wa Miyo kheenaaye ophiya ehuhu yootthuneya, mene wa nyuwo yakhalaru ehuhu ti yootthuneya." 
John7:7 Amalapo khaangwera woothanyani, mene anookithanya Miyo, niwoko kinookhalela onamoona weera yeeyo ampakaaya ti yoonanara." 
John7:8 Murowe ofestani. Miyo va nlelo nkinrowa ofestani eyo, niwoko wa Miyo kheenaaye ophiya ehuhu yootthuneya.”" 
John7:9 Amalihaka ohima yeeyo, aakhala oGalileiya." 
John7:10 Wa soothesene, yaarowaaya axunneiye ofestani, Owo aarowatho ahiixooniheraka, mene muxiirini." 
John7:11 Ofestani, aYuda yannangweherera ni yannakoha: “Ori woowi Mulopwana Owo?”" 
John7:12 Waakhala waapa vancipale mwaha wa Yoowo variyari wa atthu ancipale. Akina yeera: “Ti Mulopwana ooreera.” Akina yaakhula: “Hoye, Owo onlokottha muloko wa atthu.”" 
John7:13 Khaawotho yuuluma mwaatthuni sa Yoowo niwoko na owoova aYuda. 
John7:14 Vano, yaaphiyalaaya efesta eriyaraaya, Yeesu aarowa Mpaani mwa Muluku ni aapacera oxuttiha." 
John7:15 aYuda yaatikhina ni yaakohana: “Owenre hai Mulopwana Ola okhalano nihusiho mooteene yoola ahinatoko oxuttera?” 
John7:16 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Nihusihonaka khanihiyono nawaka muneenaaka. Ningwa wa Yaale akirumihale. 
John7:17 Akhala mukina onlakela opaka otthuna wa Muluku, owo anoonelele nihusihonaka nawa wa Muluku, hoye hoye kinuuluma ni mirukusaka muneenaaka." 
John7:18 Yoole onuuluma sawawe, onnaasa ovuwawawe muneenaawe. Yooletho onaasa ovuwa wa Yaawo yaamurumihale, Owo ti a ekhaikhai. Kheewowo etthu yoowootha mwa Yoowo." 
John7:19 Moisesi khoovangheni nlamulo? Wa sootheene, khaawo a nyuwo oniiwelela. Heeni nyuwo munaasaanyu okiiva?”" 
John7:20 Atthu ancipale yaamwaakhula: “Nyuwo murino munepa woonanara! Taani onaasaasa owiivani?” 
John7:21 Yeesu aaweerela: “Kaapaka yootikhiniha emoha ni nyuwo ootheene mwaatikhina. 
John7:22 Wa soothesene, eenre Moisesi ahoovahakani wiineliwa, nyuwo muniinela eSaabadu, orookhalaru weera vekhaikhai wu khawaarwiiye wa Moisesi, mene wa atithinyu a khalayi." 
John7:23 Moone, wakhala woowaakhuleleya weera mwaana mmoha iineliwe eSaabadu weera nlamulo na Moisesi nihinanarihiwe, heeni nyuwo munkinyoonyeriwaanyu Miyo niwoko na olamiha erutthu yootheene ya mulopwana eSaabadu?" 
John7:24 Muhithorihe mukhalelo woowooneya paahi, mene muthorihe moota wa ekhaikhai.”" 
John7:25 Vano akina yaamanke oYerusaleemu yaapacera okoha: “Khahiyono Ola Mulopwana awo ammwaasaaya omwiiva? 
John7:26 Ori va Owo uulumaka mwaatthuni ni khaammweerela etthu. Weeraka asitokweene yaaphiya woovaanelani weera Owo vekhaikhai ti Kristu?” 
John7:27 Hiyo noosuwela onkhumelelaawe Mulopwana Ola. Kristu aawaaka, khaawo aneera asuwele onkhumelelaawe.”" 
John7:28 Yeesu eera axuttihaka Mpaani mwa Muluku, aakhuwela: “Aani nyuwo mookisuwela ni moosuwela kinkhumelelaaka. Miyo nkikhanle va niwoko na mwaneenaakaru, mene Yaawo akirumihale ti a ekhaikhai. Nyuwo khamwaasuwenle," 
John7:29 mene Miyo kohaasuwela, niwoko kingwa wa mpattaaya ni Awo akirumihale.”" 
John7:30 Vano yaaheerera omvara, mene khaawo yaamvanre niwoko ehuhuwaawe khayaaphiyale." 
John7:31 Wa soothesene, ancipale a muloko wa atthu ancipale yaamuroromela Yoowo. Awo yaaheera: “Krisu aawaaka, anaapake ineneero sootikhiniheya soompwaha Mulopwana Ola ompakaawe?”" 
John7:32 aFarisi* yaawiiwa atthu ancipale yuulumaka itthu seiye mwaha wa Yoowo. Vano ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni aFarisi* yaahaaruma anakhotto a Empa ya Muluku weera emutthuke. 
John7:33 Yeesu aaweerela: “Kiri ni nyuwo ehuhu vakhaani paahi ni vano nkirowe wa Yaawo akirumihale. 
John7:34 Nyuwo mmwikaasaase, mene khamurwa mukiphwanya. Weiwo kineeraaka kikhale, nyuwo khamungwera owa.”" 
John7:35 aYuda yaaheerelana: “Ontthuna orowa woowi Mulopwana Ola, hiyo nihingweraahu omuphwanya? Apaale weiwo onkhalaayawo muloko wa atthwaahu omwaramwareiye variyari wa aGrego weera axuttihewo?" 
John7:36 Eheeni aatthunaawe ohima eeraka: ‘Nyuwo mmwikaase, mene khamurwa mukiphwanya’ ni: ‘Weiwo kineeraaka kikhale, nyuwo khamungwera owa’?”" 
John7:37 Wa nihuku nookisera noottittimiheyaxa na efesta, Yeesu aavenya, anakhuwela: “Akhala mukina ori ni ntthona, awe wa Miyo ni awure!" 
John7:38 Ntoko Yoolempwa* yeenraaya: ‘Yoole onkiroromela Miyo, mmurimanimwawe nsikhume nyooloko sa maahi a okumi.”" 
John7:39 Owo aahima mwaha wa Munepa yeeraaya yaakhele yaawo animuroromela Yeesu. Mpaka ehuhuweene yeele Munepa nlelo weera ohinaaye ovahiwa, niwoko Yeesu khaanaaye ovuwihiwa." 
John7:40 Yiiwalaaya maswaawe, akina a muloko wa atthu yaaheera: “Vekhaikhai Mulopwana Ola ti Mprofeeti.”" 
John7:41 Akina yaaheera: “Owo ti Kristu.” Akinatho yaakoha: “Ongwereya hai Kristu orweela oGalileiya? 
John7:42 Yoolempwa* enghima nnenesene weera Kristu anaawe wa ekhapira ya Davide, wa esidade ya oBetelehemu weiwo Davide aakhalaawewo!”" 
John7:43 Hiiho muloko wa atthu waakawanyeiya niwoko na Yeesu. 
John7:44 Akina yaatthuna omtthuka, mene khaawo yaamvanre." 
John7:45 Vano anakhotto a Empa ya Muluku yaahaahokoleela ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni aFarisi*, mwa yaawo yaahaakoha: “Heeni nyuwo muhimurowenlaanyu?”" 
John7:46 Anakhotto yaahima: “Khaawo otonke wuuluma moota ntoko Mulopwana Ole onuulumaawe!” 
John7:47 aFarisi* yaahaakoha: “Weeraka nyuwotho moolokotthiwa? 
John7:48 Apaale mukina a asitokweene, hoye hoye aFarisi* aamuroromela Yoowo?" 
John7:49 Hoye! Mulokotho owo ohisuwenle nlamulo ori woolaphiwa!” 
John7:50 Nikodemu, mmoha a yaawo, yoowo eera ahinaaye omwaattamela Yeesu, aahaakoha:" 
John7:51 “Nlamulonahu nnimuthoriha mukina ohinaaye omwiiwa, naari osuwela yeeyo oneeraawe?”" 
John7:52 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Nyuwotho muri a oGalileiya? Musomele ni mmoonelele weera oGalileiya khawa akhumelela mprofeeti.” 
John7:53 Vano mutthu ti mutthu aarowa owannyawe. 
John8:1 Wa soothesene, Yeesu aarowa omwaako wa Sooliveira." 
John8:2 Oxaawaya, Owo aavolowatho Empa ya Muluku, mwa weiwo muloko wa atthu wootheene waathukumannaaya omurukureenreene. Vano Owo aakilaathi weera axuttihe." 
John8:3 Anamawera a nlamulo* ni aFarisi* yaamuruuhela muthiyana mmoha yaamvanraaya araruwaka. Yaamulamulela weemela ohoolo wa atthu ootheene," 
John8:4 enamweerela Yeesu: “Muhusiha, muthiyana ola oovariwa araruwaka." 
John8:5 Munlamuloni, Moisesi onnilamulela waavonya maluku asithiyana ntoko yoola. Vanonto, Apwiya – munghima eheeni?”" 
John8:6 Awo yaakoha hiiho ntoko ntapha weera ephwanye nthowa na omoothera. Yeesutho aahuurama ni aapacera olepa vatthayani ni ekatha. 
John8:7 Woonaka weera awo yannatepa omukohakoha, Yeesu aaheemela, anaweerela: “Akhala mmoha a nyuwo ohikhanleno yoottheka, akhale oopacera omvonya nluku.”" 
John8:8 Aahuuramatho ni aapwaherera alepaka vatthayani. 
John8:9 Yaawo yaamwiiwale yaapacera orowa, mmoha-mmoha, okhuma asitokweene. Yeesu aahanle paahi ni muthiyana eemenleene vahoolowawe." 
John8:10 Yeesu aaheemela, anamukoha: “Muthiyana, ale ari woowi? Khaawo oothorihaleni?”" 
John8:11 Owo aaheera: “Khaawo, Apwiya.” Yeesu aahima: “Miyotho nkinoothorihani. Vano, murowe ni muhiye okumaanyu wa wootthekeya.”" 
John8:12 Uulumakatho ni muloko wa atthu, Yeesu aaheera: “Miyo ti Waara wa elapo ya vathi. Yoowo onkitthara Miyo, kharwa eetta mpiphini, mene onookhalano waara wa okumi.”" 
John8:13 aFarisi* yaamweerela: “Nyuwo muniikhalela onamoona muneenaanyuru. Onamoonaanyu khoohiyono woowaakhuleleya.” 
John8:14 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Kiri mweeraru Miyo kiikhalelaka onamoona muneenaakaru, onamoonaaka ori wa ekhaikhai niwoko koosuwela kinkhumaaka ni kinkelaaka. Vaheera nyuwo khamusuwenle kinkhumaaka, hata kinkelaaka." 
John8:15 Nyuwo munthoriha ni mukhalelo wa omutthu. Miyo khaawo kinimuthorihaaka. 
John8:16 Hata Miyo kathoriha, olakelawaka ori wa ekhaikhai niwoko nkikhanle meekhaaka. Miyo kiri ni Atiithi akiruminghe." 
John8:17 Munlamulonimwanyu olempwe weera onamoona wa asilopwana eeli ti woowaakhuleleya. 
John8:18 Miyo kiniikhalela onamoona mwaha wawaka; onamoona mukina ori Atiithi akiruminghe.” 
John8:19 Vano yaamukoha: “Atithinyu ari woowi?”Yeesu aawaakhula: “Nyuwo khamukisuwenle Miyo, hata Atithakatho. Nyuwo mwaakisuwenle, mwaamwaasuwelatho Atithaka.”" 
John8:20 Owo aahima masu awo axuttihaka Mpaani mwa Muluku, vakhiviru wa nipuro weiwo atthu yaahelaaya soovahasaya. Wa soothesene, khaawo yaamutthunke niwoko ehuhuwaawe yeera ehinaaye ophiya." 
John8:21 Yeesu aaweerelatho: “Miyo kinoottimula ni nyuwo mmwikaasaase ni mmwikhwe mootthekanimwanyu. Weiwo kinrowaakawo, khamungwera orowa.”" 
John8:22 Niwoko na yeeyo aYuda yaakohana: “Weeraka Owo aneere wiixiiva? Niwoko eenre: ‘Kinrowaakawo, khamungwera orowa’?”" 
John8:23 Vano Owo aapwaherera wuuluma: “Nyuwo muri a vathi; Miyo kiri a wiirimu. Nyuwo muri a elapo ya vathi; Miyo nkihiyono a elapo ya vathi. 
John8:24 Miyo kohooleelani weera mmwikhwe mootthekanimwanyu. Nyuwo mwaahiroromela weera Miyo kiri, vekhaikhai mmwikhwe mootthekanimwanyu.”" 
John8:25 Awo yaamukoha: “Nyuwo taani?” Yeesu aawaakhula: “Miyo ti Yoowo kooleelaakani ehuhu yootheene! 
John8:26 Kookhalano masu mancipale weera kihime wa nthorihelonanyu, mene Yaawo akiruminghe amphwanela ororomeliwa, ni Miyo kinghima wa elapo ya vathi paahi yeeyo kiiwalaaka wa Yaawo.”" 
John8:27 Awo khayiiwexenxe weera aaleela mwaha wa Atiithi. 
John8:28 Vano Yeesu aaweerela: “Nyuwo mwaamuttukhulaka Mwaana a mutthu, mmwisuwele weera Miyo kiri, ni kheewo kimpakaaka ya muneenaakaru. Vekhaikhai, kinuuluma yeeyo paahi Atiithi akixuttinghaaya." 
John8:29 Yaale akiruminghe ari ni Miyo. Awo khaakihiyale meekhaaka niwoko mahuku ootheene kimpaka yeeyo enaasiveliha.” 
John8:30 Ahimaka itthu iye, atthu ancipale yaamuroromela Yoowo." 
John8:31 Yeesu aaweerela aYuda yaamuroromenle: “Nyuwo mwapwaherera ni nthiti mwa nsunaka, vekhaikhai munookhala oohuseraaka." 
John8:32 Vano mmwisuwele ekhaikhai ni ekhaikhai eniyootapuxeni.” 
John8:33 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Hiyo nri ekhapira ya Abrahaamu ni khanitonke okhala ipottha sa mukina. Heeni Nyuwo muneeraanyu weera nnikhale maneethi?” 
John8:34 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai: khula mutthu onkhala atthekaka ti epottha ya yoottheka. 
John8:35 Epottha kheenkhala mahuku ootheene ni emusaaya, mwaanatho ori a emusaawe mahuku ootheene." 
John8:36 Tivawo, Mwaana oovuluxani, nyuwo vekhaikhai mmwikhale maneethi." 
John8:37 Miyo koosuwela weera muri ekhapira ya Abrahaamu. Wa soothesene, munaasaasa okiiva niwoko khamuntthuna waakhela nsunaka." 
John8:38 Miyo kinooleelani yeeyo koonnaaka kaakhalaaka ni Atthiiti ni nyuwo mumpaka yeeyo mwiiwalaanyu wa atithinyu.” 
John8:39 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Abrahaamu ti atithihu.” Yeesu aaweerela: “Nyuwo mwaari anamwane a Abrahaamu, mwaamupaka miteko Abrahaamu aapakaawe." 
John8:40 Munaasaasatho okiiva, hata kireene Yoowo ooleenleni ekhaikhai kiiwalaaka wa Muluku. Abrahaamu khaapaka hiiho." 
John8:41 Nyuwo mumpaka miteko sa atithinyu.” Vano awo yaamweerela: “Hiyo khaniyariwe mooraruwani. Atithihu amoharu ti Muluku.” 
John8:42 Yeesu aaweerela: “Muluku aari atithinyu, nyuwo mwaamukisivela niwoko Miyo kaawiiye wa Muluku, ni vaanaano kiri va. Miyo nkiwiiye wa muneenaakaru, mene wa Awo akiruminghe." 
John8:43 Heeni muhiniiwexexaanyu nuulumonaka? Niwoko khamungwera wiiwa yeeyo kinghimaaka. 
John8:44 Nyuwo ti anamwane a Diyabu* ni muntthuna opaka ohaawelawawe. Owo aari namwiiva okhuma ompacereroni, ahittharaka ekhaikhai niwoko kheewowo ekhaikhai mwa yoowo. Owo oothaka, onuuluma nuulumonawe muneenaawe niwoko ti namootha ni ori atiithi a wootha." 
John8:45 Wa soothesene, nyuwo khamunkiroromela niwoko kinooleelani ekhaikhai." 
John8:46 Mukina a nyuwo onoowera okoothera wa yoottheka emoha? Miyo kuulumaka ekhaikhai, heeni muhinkiroromelaanyu?" 
John8:47 Yoole ori a Muluku oniiwa yeeyo Muluku onghimaawe. Nyuwo khamummwiiwa niwoko khamuhiyono a Muluku.” 
John8:48 aYuda yaamwaakhula: “Hiyo naahuuluma nnene neeraka weera Nyuwo ti muSamariya ni murino munepa woonarara.” 
John8:49 Yeesu aaweerela: “Nkinono munepa woonanara. Ohiyanawaya, kinaattittimiha Atithaka ni nyuwo khamunkittittimiha." 
John8:50 Miyo nkinaasa ovuwawaka. Ti Atiithi anaasa ovuwawaka ni Awo anthoriha. 
John8:51 Miyo kinoororomelihani weera akhala mukina oniiwelela maswaaka, kharwa akhwa mahuku ootheene.”" 
John8:52 Vahoolo wa yeeyo, aYuda yaamweerela: “Noosuwela vaanaano va weera murino munepa woonanara! Abrahaamu ahookhwa nitho maprofeeti. Vano Nyuwo muneera weera mukina iiwelela maswaanyu, kharwa akhwa mahuku ootheene!" 
John8:53 Nyuwo mohaapwaha atithihu Abrahaamu? Awo ahookhwa nitho maprofeeti. Nyuwo munuupuwela weera taani?” 
John8:54 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Kiivuwiha Miyo muneenaaka, ovuwawaka ori wa siiyo. Atithaka, mwa Yaawo nyuwo mungweerelaanyu ari Mulukwaanyu, ti Yaale ankivuwiha." 
John8:55 Nyuwo khamwaasuwenle, mene Miyo kohaasuwela. Miyo keenre weera nkaasuwenle, saano kikhanleene namootha ntoko nyuwo, vekhaikhaitho Miyo kohaasuwela ni kiniiwelela maswaaya." 
John8:56 Abrahaamu, atithinyu, yaahakalala niwoko yeera yoone nihukunaka. Awo yaahoona ni yaahakalalaxa.”" 
John8:57 aYuda yaamweerela: “Nyuwo nlelo khamunono iyaakha miloko mithanu ni moomoona Abrahaamu?” 
John8:58 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Miyo kinooleelani: Abrahaamu ahinaaye oyariwa, Miyo kaakhala!”" 
John8:59 Vano yaasaasa maluku weera emvonye, mene Yeesu aahiipitha ni aakhuma Mpaani mwa Muluku." 
John9:1 Aviraka, aamoona mutthu oohoona okhuma oyariwawawe." 
John9:2 Oohuseraawe yaamukoha: “Muhusiha, taani otthenke: mulopwana ola, hoye hoye asinaangolowaawe, eenre ayariwaka oohoona?”" 
John9:3 Yeesu aaweerela: “Khahiyono mulopwana ola, hata asinaangolowaawe atthenke. Eyo yeereiye weera muteko wa Muluku woonihereiye mookuminimwawe." 
John9:4 Oreene nlelo othana, onthuneya weera hiyo nipake muteko wa Yaale akiruminghe. Ohiyu onookhuveela aneeraawe ahikhale anaavare muteko." 
John9:5 Miyo kireene mweelaponi, ti Waara wa elapo ya vathi.”" 
John9:6 Uulumaka yeeyo, aasenyela vatthayani, anatakansera etthaya ni isenye, anattikitthela mmaithoni mwa mulopwana." 
John9:7 Vano aamweerela: “Murowe ni mwiirapihe vantthiyani wa Silowami.” (Eyo entaphulela: oorummwa). Mulopwana aarowa, aniirapiha, anahokolowa oonaka." 
John9:8 Amwaattamanaawe ni yaawo yaamoona okhuma khalayi avekaka yaakohana: “Khahiyono mulopwana ola yoole aakhovelela okilaathi avekaka?” 
John9:9 Akina yaaheera weera ti yoole. Akinatho yaaheera: “Hoye, onlikana ni yoole paahi.” Mene owo muneenaawe aaheera: “Ti yoomi.”" 
John9:10 Awo yaamukohakoha: “Vano, ahuleiye hai maithwaanyu?”" 
John9:11 Owo aawaakhula: “Mulopwana oniitthaniwa Yeesu aatakansa etthaya ni isenye, anakittikitthela mmaithonimwaka, anakeerela weera kirowe ni kiirapihe vantthiyani na oSilowami. Koorowa, kohiirapiha ni kinimoona!”" 
John9:12 Awo yaamukoha: “Ori woowi Mulopwana Owo?” Owo aaheera: “Nkisuwenle.” 
John9:13 Vano yaamuronghela aFarisi* mulopwana aari oohoona. 
John9:14 Nihuku Yeesu aatakansalaawe etthaya ni isenye ni aahunlaawe maitho a mulopwana ole naari eSaabadu. 
John9:15 aFarisi* yaamukohatho moota heeni owo aawenraawe woona. Mulopwana aawaakhula: “Owo aakittikitthela mmaithonimwaka etthaya yootakanseriwa isenye. Vano kiniirapiha ni kinoona.” 
John9:16 Akina a aFarisi* yaaheera: “Mulopwana Owo khahiyono a Muluku niwoko khanttittimiha eSaabadu.” Akinatho yaakoha: “Ongwereya hai namattheka opaka ineneero sootikhiniheya iya?” Vano, waakhala ohiiwanana variyariwaya." 
John9:17 Yaamukohatho oohoona: “Onghima eheeni weyo mwaha wa Yoowo? Ti maithwaawo Owo ohunlaawe.” Mulopwana aawaakhula: “Owo ti Mprofeeti!” 
John9:18 aYuda khayaakhulenle weera owo aari oohoona analamihiwa. Tivawo yaawiitthannaaya asinaangolowaawe 
John9:19 ni yaahaakoha: “Yoola mwaninyu mwa yoowo muneeraanyu aayariwe oohoona? Onoona hai vano?” 
John9:20 Asinaagolowaawe yaawaakhula: “Noosuwela weera owo ti mwanihu ni aayariwa oohoona. 
John9:21 Khanisuwenletho weera onoona hai, hata taani omuhunle maithwaawe. Munkohe ola. Ohunnuwa. Onoowera wuuluma muneenaawe.”" 
John9:22 Asinaangolowaawe yeenre yeeyo ewoovaka aYuda, niwoko ale yaalakela weera mukina alapa weera Yeesu ti Kristu, anoomoliwe muSinagogani*." 
John9:23 Tivawo asinaangolowaawe yeenraaya: “Ohunnuwa. Munkohe ola.” 
John9:24 Emaara yanaaveeli yaamwiitthana mulopwana aari oohoona, enamweerela: “Omvuwihe Muluku! Noosuwela weera Mulopwana Owo ti namattheka.”" 
John9:25 Owo aawaakhula: “Nkisuwenle weera Owo namattheka, naari hoye. Etthu emoha koosuwela: Miyo kaari oohoona ni vano kinimoona!”" 
John9:26 Vano yaamukoha: “Eheeni oopakenlaawe weyo? Oohunle hai maithwaawo?” 
John9:27 Owo awaakhula: “Miyo kohooleelani, mene nyuwo khamwiiwale. Heeni muntthunaanyu wiiwatho? Apaale nyuwotho muntthuna okhala oohuseraawe?”" 
John9:28 Vano yaamuruwana ni yaamweerela: “Oohuseraawe ti weyo! Hiyo nri oohusera a Moisesi! 
John9:29 Noosuwela weera Muluku aahuuluma ni Moisesi, mene mwaha wa Yoowo – khanisuwenle hata onkhumelelaawe.”" 
John9:30 Mulopwana aawaakhula: “Moone, eyo ti etthu yootikhiniheya! Nyuwo khamusuwenle onkhumelelaawe, wa soothesene Owo ookihula maithwaaka." 
John9:31 Noosuwela weera Muluku khammwiiwelela namattheka, mene ommwiiwelela yoowo onimuttittimiha Muluku ni ompaka otthunawawe." 
John9:32 Khaawo otonke wiiwa weera mutthu oohoona eyareliwaawe aahuliwa maithwaawe. 
John9:33 Mulopwana Owo ahaakhanle a Muluku khaawera opaka etthu.” 
John9:34 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Weyo waayariwe oosareya yoottheka! Ontthuna onihusiha?” Vano yaamoomola. 
John9:35 Yeesu aahiiwa weera aahoomoliwa ni amphwanyaka, aamukoha: “Nyuwo munoomuroromela Mwaana a mutthu?”" 
John9:36 Mulopwana aamukoha: “Apwiya, Yoowo taani weera miyo kinroromele?”" 
John9:37 Yeesu aamweerela: “Nyuwo moomoona. Ti Yoole onuuluma ni nyuwo.” 
John9:38 Vano mulopwana aamweerela: “Apwiya kinoomuroromela.” Ni aamulapa. 
John9:39 Yeesu aamweerela: “Miyo kirweenle mweelaponimu othoriha: weera ahinoona yoone ni anoona ekhale oohoona.” 
John9:40 aFarisi* akina yaari vamoha ni Yoowo yaamwiiwa ahimaka yeeyo ni yaamukoha: “Apaale hiyotho nri oohoona?” 
John9:41 Yeesu aaweerela: “Nyuwo mwaari oohoona, khamwaakhala ni nthowa na yoottheka. Vanonto mweenre mweeraka: ‘Ninnoona,’ nthowananyu ninoopwaherera." 
John10:1 Miyo kinoororomelihani weera yoole ohimvolowa munikhoolani na ikhondoolo aviraka vamulako, mene ongwela nipuro nikina, owo ti namwiiya ni mutakhali." 
John10:2 Yoole omvolowa vamulako ti mukukhuli a ikhondoolo. 
John10:3 Namalipelela a mulako onoomuhulela mukukhuli nsele ni ikhondoolo sinimwiiwa nsunawe. Owo onniitthanela masina a ikhondoolosawe ni onnakhumihera vaate. 
John10:4 Akhumiheraka vaate ikhondoolosawe, owo onoohoolela ni iyo sinoomutthara niwoko soosuwela nsunawe." 
John10:5 Khasirwatho simutthara oohisuwanyeya, vekhaikhai, nsimutthawe yoowo niwoko khasisuwenle nsu na mutthu oohisuwanyeya.”" 
John10:6 Yeesu aapaka niphwanaphwaniho nne, mene awo khayiiwexenxe yeeyo aaleenlaawe." 
John10:7 Vano Yeesu aahima veeli: “Kinooleelani ekhaikhai: Miyo ti mulako wa ikhondoolo. 
John10:8 Ootheene yaarwiiye kihinaaye Miyo, yaari anamwiiya ni anamatakhala, mene ikhondoolo khasaawiiwale." 
John10:9 Miyo ti mulako. Yoowo omvolowa wa Miyo anaavuluxiwe. Anaavolowe, anaakhume ni anaaphwanye sooca." 
John10:10 Namwiiya onrweela wiiya, wiiva ni ophwata paahi. Miyo kaarweenle weera atthu ekhalane okumi, aani okumi woowaattaxa." 
John10:11 Miyo ti Mukukhuli ooreera. Mukukhuli ooreera omvaherera ikhondoolo okumaawe. 
John10:12 Namuteko ooliveliwa khahiyono muneene a ikhondoolo. Hiiho, oonaka weera mwiici onimoowa, onoohiya ikhondoolo ni onootthawa. Vano mwiici onoovara ikhondoolo ni onoomwaraxa." 
John10:13 Owo ontthawa niwoko ti ooliviwa ni khampwattha ikhondoolo. 
John10:14 Miyo ti Mukukhuli ooreera. Koosuwela ikhondoolosaka ni iyo sookisuwela," 
John10:15 hiiho ntoko Atiithi akisuwenlaaya ni Miyotho kohaasuwela. Miyo kimvaherera ikhondoolo okumaaka. 
John10:16 Kookhalano ikhondoolo sikina sihikhanle sa nikhoola nna. Ontthuneya weera Miyo kikukhuletho iyo. Iyo nsiiwe nsunaka ni hiiho nsikhale nikhoola nimoha sikhalanaka Mukukhuli mmoha paahi. 
John10:17 Tivawo Atithaka ankisivelaaya, niwoko kimvaha okumaaka weera kikuxetho yoowo." 
John10:18 Khaawo onkaakha okumaaka, mene Miyo kimvaherera yoowo niwoko na olakelawaka. Kookhalano ikuru woovaha ni wookuxatho. Nlamulo nna kaakhenle wa Atithaka.”" 
John10:19 Waakhumelelatho onyakulihana variyari wa aYuda niwoko na masu ale. 
John10:20 Ancipale a yaawo yaaheera: “Owo orino munepa woonanara ni ti naanepa! Heeni nimmwiiwaahu?” 
John10:21 Akinatho yaaheera: “Masu ala khaahiyono a Mulopwana orino munepa woonanara. Munepa woonanara onoowera ohula maitho a mutthu oohoona?” 
John10:22 Vano, yaakhala efesta ya wuupuwelela otteelihiwa wa Empa ya Muluku oYerusaleemu. Waari mulaala" 
John10:23 ni Yeesu aari Mpaani mwa Muluku aviraka mpithela wa Salomoni. 
John10:24 aYuda yaathukumana emurukureenreene emweerelaka: “Mpaka yaakhani hiyo nneeraahu niweherere yoowaakhulaanyu? Nyuwo mwaari Kristu, munileele mwaatthuni.”" 
John10:25 Yeesu aaweerela: “Miyo kohooleelani, mene khamunroromela. Miteko Miyo kimpakaaka mwa Nsina na Atithaka, sinnakikhalela onamoona;" 
John10:26 nyuwotho khamunroromela niwoko khamuhiyono a ikhondoolosaka. 
John10:27 Ikhondoolosaka sinniiwa nsunaka; Miyo koosuwela iyo ni iyo sinnikitthara. 
John10:28 Miyo kimvaha okumi woohimala ni iyo khasirwa siriheya. Khaawo aneera awere okaakha mmatatanimwaka. 
John10:29 Atithaka akivanghe seiyo ti oowaapwaha ootheene. Khaawo aneera awere owaakha mmatatani mwa Atithaka. 
John10:30 Miyo ni Atiithi nri mmoharu.” 
John10:31 aYuda yaattottatho maluku weera emvonye," 
John10:32 mene Yeesu aaweerela: “Miyo koowooniherani miteko sincipale sooreera sinrweela wa Atiithi. Niwoko na muteko heeni wa seiye nyuwo muntthunaanyu okivonya maluku?” 
John10:33 aYuda yaamwaakhula: “Hiyo khannoovonyani maluku niwoko na muteko wooreera, mene niwoko na oveiha. Vano, murookhalaru mutthu paahi mohiixoonihera ntoko Muluku!”" 
John10:34 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Kheelempwe munlamulonimwanyu: ‘Miyo keenre weera nyuwo muri miluku’? 
John10:35 Hapo Muluku oowiitthana miluku yaale nnaarweela nsu na Muluku – ni Yoolempwa* kheenooceeleya – 
John10:36 ankha Yoole Atiithi amutteelinghaaya ni amuruminghaaya mweelaponimu? Vano, heeni nyuwo munkootheraanyu weera kinooveiha keeraka weera kiri Mwaana a Muluku?" 
John10:37 Miyo kaahipaka miteko sa Atithaka, muhikiroromele." 
John10:38 Kapakatho miteko sa Atithaka, orookhalaru weera khamuntthuna okiroromela, muroromele mwa miteko weera musuwele ni mwiiwexexe weera Atiithi ari mwa Miyo ni Miyotho mwa Yaawo.”" 
John10:39 Awo yaaheerera veeli omvara, mene Owo aahoopowa mmatatanimwaya." 
John10:40 Vano Yeesu aalapuwatho oYordanu ni aarowa vanipuroni nne Yohaane aapatisaawe mmahukuni oopacera a mutekwaawe. Aakhalawo 
John10:41 ni atthu ancipale yaarowa weiwo aaraawewo yeeraka: “Ori mweeraru Yohaane ahinatoke opaka eneneero yootikhiniheya, sootheene owo aahimaawe mwaha wa Mulopwana Ola saari sa ekhaikhai.”" 
John10:42 Ni weiwo ancipale yaamuroromela Yeesu. 
John11:1 Vano, mulopwana mmoha iitthaniwa Lazaru aamvoreiwa. Aakhala oBetaniya, muttetthe wa Mariya ni munneiye Marta." 
John11:2 Mariya mwa yoowo murokoriye Lazaru aavoreiwa, aari Mariya yoowo aattikitthenle Apwiya ni aawuukuntthe inaawosaya ni mayihaawe." 
John11:3 Vano axirokoriye yaamuruma omweerela Yeesu: “Apwiya, yoole munimusivelaanyu onoovoreiwa.”" 
John11:4 Iiwalaawe yeeyo, Yeesu aaheera: “Eretta eyo kheehiyono eneera emwiive. Ti wa ovuwa wa Muluku weera Mwaana a Muluku avuwihiwe niwoko na yeeyo.”" 
John11:5 Yeesu aamusivela Marta, munneiye ni Lazaru." 
John11:6 Vekhaikhai, iiwaka weera Lazaru aamvoreiwa, aakhala mahuku meelitho weiwo aaraawewo." 
John11:7 Vahoolowaya, aaweerela oohuseraawe: “Nrowe nihokoleele oYudeiya.”" 
John11:8 Awo yaamweerela: “Muhusiha, vanaanoweene aYuda yaaheerera woovonyani maluku. Hata hiiho, muntthuna ohokoleelawo?”" 
John11:9 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Nihuku khaninono iwoora muloko ni piili? Yoowo oneetta othana khankwattuliwa, niwoko onimoona ngwaarani mwa elapo ya vathi." 
John11:10 Eettaka ohiyu, onookwattuliwa niwoko mwa yoowo khoowowo waara.”" 
John11:11 Amalihaka ohima yeeyo, aapwaherera aweerelaka: “Nthamwenaahu Lazaru onookona, kinkelatho weiwo weera kamvenxe.”" 
John11:12 Oohuseraawe yaamwaakhula: “Apwiya owo akona, onoolama.”" 
John11:13 Yeesu uuluma mwaha wa okhwawawe, oohuseraawetho yuupuwela weera Owo aahima paahi sa ikhove." 
John11:14 Vano Owo aahaaleela nnenesene: “Lazaru ohookhwa," 
John11:15 ni niwoko na nyuwo koohakalala Miyo nkaakhanlewo weera nyuwo muroromele. Nrowe wa yoowo.” 
John11:16 Vano, Tomaxi, iitthaniwa Didimu, aaweerela oohusera akina: “Nrowetho weera nakhwe ni Yoowo.”" 
John11:17 Aphiyaka, Yeesu aahoona weera Lazaru aari munihiyeni wookwana mahuku maxexe." 
John11:18 Orakamelana oBetaniya ni oYerusaleemu waari ikilomeetru* sookwana ixexe 
John11:19 ni aYuda ancipale yaarowa omuxekura Marta ni Mariya weera yaapepese niwoko na oriheya wa murokoraya. 
John11:20 Iiwalaawe Marta weera Yeesu onoophiya, aavenya weera amukumanane, mene Mariya aahala owaani." 
John11:21 Marta aamweerela Yeesu: “Apwiya, mwaari wenno, murokoraka saano ahikhwiiye." 
John11:22 Koosuwelatho weera, hata vaanaano va, Muluku anoovaheeni sootheene muneeraanyu mumvekele.”" 
John11:23 Yeesu aamweerela: “Murokorinyu onoovenyerera.” 
John11:24 Marta aamwaakhula: “Koosuwela weera anaavenyerere moovenyererani wa nihuku nookisera.” 
John11:25 Yeesu aamweerela: “Miyo ti Ovenyerera ni Okumi. Yoole onkiroromela Miyo, hata akhwe, anaakhale ni okumi," 
John11:26 ni yoowo onkhala ni okumi ni onkiroromela Miyo, kharwa akhwa wa mahuku ootheene. Munroromela yeeyo?”" 
John11:27 Owo aamwaakhula: “Aani Apwiya, miyo koororomela weera Nyuwo Kristu, Mwaana a Muluku eera aweeke elapo ya vathi.”" 
John11:28 Amalihaka ohima yeeyo, aarowa owaani ni amwiitthanaka vakhwipi Mariya, aamweerela: “Muhusiha ori va ni onoowiitthanani.”" 
John11:29 Iiwaka yeeyo, Mariya aavenya woowaakuveya ni aarowa wa Yoowo." 
John11:30 Yeesu nlelo eera ahinaaye ovolowa mmuttettheni, mene aari vanipuroni aakumannaaweno Marta." 
John11:31 aYuda yaari ni Mariya mpaani empepesaka, yoonaka weera owo aavenya woowaakuveya ni aakhuma, yaamutthara yuupuwelaka weera owo aakela onihiyeni weera iinlewo." 
John11:32 Aphiyaka vanipuroni aaraawe Yeesu ni amoonaka Yoowo, Mariya ahuuramela inaawosawe ni aamweerela: “Apwiya, mwaari wenno, murokoraka saano ahikhwiiye.”" 
John11:33 Amoonaka Mariya ni aYuda yaamuhoonle yiinlaka, Yeesu aathananaxa ni aariipiwa murima." 
John11:34 Owo aamukoha: “Mmwiyaathiye woowi?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Ngwe ni moone, Apwiya.”" 
John11:35 Yeesu aahiinla. 
John11:36 Vano aYuda yaaheera: “Moone moota Owo aamusivelaawe.” 
John11:37 Akinatho a yaawo yaaheera: “Owo aahunle maitho a mutthu oohoona khaawera omooceeliha mulopwana owo okhwa?” 
John11:38 Yeesu, athanananxeene veeli, aarowa onihiyeni. Naari nikhuku ni nluku ntokotoko niikaathiwe vamulako." 
John11:39 Owo aaheera: “Mvenxe nluku.” Marta, murokoriye aakhwiiye aamweerela: “Apwiya owo onimunkhaxa niwoko aakwana mahuku maxexe.”" 
John11:40 Yeesu aamweerela: “Miyo nkooleenleni weera mwaroromela, munimoona ovuwa wa Muluku?”" 
John11:41 Vano yaavenxa nluku. Yeesu aaweha osulu ni aaheera: “Tiithi, Miyo kinootthapelani niwoko mookiiwa." 
John11:42 Koosuwela weera munkiiwa mahuku ootheene, mene kineera yeeyo mwaha wa muloko wa atthu ori va, weera ororomele weera Nyuwo mukirumihale.”" 
John11:43 Amalihaka ohima yeeyo, Yeesu aakhuwelaxa: “Lazaru, mukhumele vaate!”" 
John11:44 Ookhwa aakhuma ni matata ni inaawo sivitikeleliweene esaanda ni ekhovaawe ekhuneeliweene ekuwo. Yeesu aaweerela: “Mvenxe esaandaawe ni munghiye arowe.” 
John11:45 Ancipale a aYuda yaarwiiye omuxekura Mariya, yoonaka yeeyo Yeesu aapankaawe, yaamuroromela." 
John11:46 Akinatho a yaawo yaarowa wa aFarisi* ni yaahaaleela yeeyo Yeesu aapankaawe. 
John11:47 Vano ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni aFarisi* yaalattula muthukumano wa eSineedriyu*. Awo yaakohana: “Neereke hai? Iwo ori Mulopwana Owo apakaka ineneero sootikhiniheya. 
John11:48 Hiyo namuhiya hiiho, ootheene eniimuroromele, vano aRooma eniiwe ni eniinanarihe nipuronahu nitho mulokwaahu.”" 
John11:49 Mmoha a yaawo, iitthaniwa Kayafasi, wa eyaakha yeele aari mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, aaheera: “Nyuwo khamuniiwexexa etthu!" 
John11:50 Khamwiiwexenxe weera fataari akhwe mutthu mmoha wa muloko wa atthu, ohikhanle oriheya muloko wootheene?”" 
John11:51 Owo khaahima yeeyo iihimaka muneenaawe, mene areene mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* eyaakha yeele, aathalihera otthuna wa Muluku weera Yeesu eera akhwele muloko wa aYuda." 
John11:52 Ohikhanle paahi wa muloko wa aYuda, menetho wa anamwane a Muluku amwaramwareiye weera aathukumanyihe mmulokoni mmoha." 
John11:53 Hiiho evenyero vaavaale awo yaavaanela omwiiva. 
John11:54 Tivawo Yeesu eetteettaawe mwaatthuni eriyari ya aYuda. Ohiyanawaya aahiivenxa arowaka elapo emoha vakhiviru wa nikare, wa muttetthe mmoha wiitthaniwa Efrayimi aakhalaawewo ni oohuseraawe." 
John11:55 Ekhuveelaka ehuhu ya mPaska* a aYuda, atthu ancipale a elapo yeele yaarowa oYerusaleemu weera ekwanihere ikhovelelo sa orapiha ahinaaye mPaska*." 
John11:56 Atthu yaapwaherera omwaasaasa Yeesu ni Mpaani mwa Muluku yannakohana: “Munuupuwela hai? Weeraka Owo anaawe ofestani?” 
John11:57 Vano, ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni aFarisi* yaavaha malamulo weera mukina asuwela nipuro oraawe Yeesu, aaleele weera emvare." 
John12:1 Mahuku mathannamosa ahinaaye mPaska* Yeesu aaphiya oBetaniya aakhalaawe Lazaru, mwa yoowo aamvenyereringhaawe mookhwaani." 
John12:2 Weiwo yaamurehererela yooca Yeesu. Marta arumeelaka, Lazaru areene mmoha a yaale yaakilaathiye vameesa ni Yoowo." 
John12:3 Vano Mariya aakuxa mukoomba woosareya makhura ooreera a enardu* yaari makhura oorikaxa. Aattikitthela inaawo sa Yeesu ni aamuukuttha ni mayihaawe. Ni empa yaasareya ni wunkhela wa makhura ale. 
John12:4 Mmohatho a oohuseraawe, Yudasi Iskariyoti, mwa yoowo eera amvarihe Yeesu, aattaandawula:" 
John12:5 “Heeni makhura ala ahithumihiwaaya ni musurukhu enavahiwa atthu oohaawa? Saangwina idinaariyu 300.” 
John12:6 Owo khuulumme hiiho aapwatthaka atthu oohaawa, mene niwoko aari namwiiya. Ntoko namalipelela a nihottha na musurukhu, annakhovelela ovenxa yeeyo yaaheliwamo." 
John12:7 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Munghiye muthiyana mmuretteleni. Yeeyo opankaawe eri ya nihuku na ovithiwawaka. 
John12:8 Vano, atthu oohaawa eniikhale ni nyuwo mahuku ootheene, mene Miyo nkinrowa okhala ni nyuwo mahuku ootheene.”" 
John12:9 Yeereiyaka hiihaale, atthu ancipale a aYuda, yoonelelaka weera Yeesu aari vaavaale, yaahoowa khoohiyono paahi omoona Yeesu, menetho Lazaru, yoowo Yeesu aamvenyereringhaawe mookhwaani." 
John12:10 Hiiho ahooleli a asaserdoti* yaavaanela weera emwiivetho Lazaru," 
John12:11 woonaka weera niwoko na yoowo ancipale yaahaahiya aYuda emuroromelaka Yeesu. 
John12:12 Oxaawaya, atthu ancipale yaarwiiye ofestani yaahiiwa yeeriwaka weera Yeesu eera aphiyaka oYerusaleemu." 
John12:13 Yaakuxa iphandi sa nivare ni yaavenya weera yamukumanane ekhuwelaka: “Hosana*! Ooreelihiwa ti Yoowo ongwa mwa Nsina na Apwiya! Ooreelihiwa ti Mwene a aYixrayeli!” 
John12:14 Yeesu aamphwanya buuru mwaaxaana ni aangwela ntoko elempwaaya: 
John12:15 Ohoove mwaana muthiyana a Siyoni. Woone, Mwenaawo aneera awaaka angwenleene buuru mwaaxaana." 
John12:16 Ompacereroni oohuseraawe khayiiwexexa yeeyo. Paahi vahoolo wa ovuwihiwa wa Yeesu, awo yaahiiwexexa weera yeeyo yaalempwe yaari mwaha wa Yoowo ni weera itthu iye saamukhumelenle Yoowo." 
John12:17 Atthu ancipale yaari ni Yoowo aamulamulenlaawe Lazaru okhuma munihiyeni ni aamvenyererihale mookhwaani, yaapwaherera omwaramwaxa etthu yeereiye." 
John12:18 Atthu ancipale yaavenya erowaka omukumanano, niwoko yaahiiwa yeeriwaka weera Owo aapaka eneneero ele yootikhiniheya." 
John12:19 Hiiho aFarisi* yaaheerelana: “Ngwehe, khaniwenre etthu. Moone moota elapo yootheene enimuttharaaya Yoowo!”" 
John12:20 Wa yaawo yaarongwe ofestani weera yamulape Muluku, yaakhala aGrego akina." 
John12:21 Awo yaamwaattamela Filipe aari oBetisayida wa oGalileiya ni nivekelo nimoha: “Apwiya, nintthuna omoona Yeesu.”" 
John12:22 Filipe aarowa omuleela Andreiya, ni ooweeli vamoha yaamuleela Yeesu." 
John12:23 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Yoophiya ehuhu ya ovuwihiwa wa Mwaana a mutthu. 
John12:24 Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai weera enuku emoha ya etrigu yaahimorela vatthayani ni yaahikhwa, eniikhale emoha paahi. Yakhwatho, eniyiime soowiima sincipale." 
John12:25 Yoowo onsivela okumaawe anaayeleele, mene yoowo onthanya okumaawe mweelaponimu, anaasungere okumi woohimala." 
John12:26 Yoowo onkirumeela, ontthuneya okitthara, ni kiraakawo, murumeiyaaka anaakhalewotho. Atithaka eniimuttittimihe yoowo onkirumeela." 
John12:27 Vano munepaaka woothananaxa ni nkeere eheeni? Tiithi, mukivuluxe mwa ehuhu yeela! Hoye, kirweenle vekhaikhai wa yeeyo; wa ehuhu yeela." 
John12:28 Tiithi, mvuwihe Nsinananyu!” Vano naahoowa nsu na wiirimu: “Miyo koovuwiha ni nkivuwihetho.”" 
John12:29 Atthu ancipale yaari vaavaale ni yiiwale yaaheera weera waakukutteiya. Akina yaaheera weera ndyelo aamuulumela. 
John12:30 Yeesu aaweerela: “Nsu nno nohoowa niwoko na nyuwo, ohikhanle wa Miyo." 
John12:31 Yoophiya ehuhu ya nthorihelo na elapo ya vathi ela. Vano mutokweene a elapo ya vathi anoomoliwe. 
John12:32 Miyo, kaattukhuliwaka vatthayani, nkaapurulele ootheene wa Miyo.”" 
John12:33 Owo aahima yeeyo weera awoonihere moota wa okhwa eeraawe ahaawe. 
John12:34 Atthu ancipale yaamweerela: “Nohiiwa munlamuloni weera Kristu anaakhale mahuku ootheene. Mungwera hai weera: ‘Ontthuneya ottukhuliwa Mwaana a mutthu?’ Taani Yoowo Mwaana a mutthu?” 
John12:35 Vano Yeesu aaweerela: “Wa ehuhu vakhaani nlelo, waara onuukhale variyariwanyu. Mweette nlelo mureeneno waara weera epiphi ehoovareni niwoko yoole oneetta mpiphini khasuwenle onkelaawewo." 
John12:36 Muroromele mwa waara nlelo mureeneno weera muthatuwe anamwane a waara.” Amalihaka wuuluma, Yeesu aavenya ni aawiipitha yaawo." 
John12:37 Aari mweeraru apankeene Yeesu ineneero sootikhiniheya sootheene iye vamaithonimwaya, awo khayaamuroromenle." 
John12:38 Eyo yeereiye weera ekwaniheriwe masu a mprofeeti, Yesaya yeenre: Apwiya, taani ororomenle mutthengaahu ni wataani ooniheriwe moono wa Apwiya?" 
John12:39 Tivawo awo yahaaweraaya ororomela niwoko, ntoko Yesaya eenraawe nipuro nikina:" 
John12:40 Aatatuxa oohoona maithwaaya ni ahuumiha mirimasaya weera ehoone ni maithwaaya, hata ehiiwexexe ni murima, hata ehirukunxe mirimasaya, ni Miyo kihaalamihe." 
John12:41 Yesaya aahima yeeyo niwoko aahoona ovuwa wa Yeesu ni aahuuluma sa Yoowo. 
John12:42 Hata hiiho, asitokweene ancipale yaamuroromela Yoowo. Khayaalapatho nroromelonaya niwoko na aFarisi*, yoovaka woomoliwa muSinagogani*." 
John12:43 Vano yaasivela ovuwa wa atthu, ohikhanle ovuwa wa Muluku." 
John12:44 Yeesu aaheera akhuwelaka ni nsu ntokotoko: “Yoowo onkiroromela Miyo, khankiroromela Miyo paahi, menetho Yaale akiruminghe." 
John12:45 Yoowo onkoona, ongwoona Yaale akiruminghe." 
John12:46 Miyo kaarweenle mweelaponimu ntoko Waara weera atthu ootheene ankiroromela Miyo, ehipwaherere okhala mpiphini." 
John12:47 Akhala mukina oniiwa maswaaka ni ahineettela, Miyo nkinimuthoriha. Vano, nkirweenle othoriha elapo ya vathi, mene weera kivuluxe." 
John12:48 Ookhala mphuki wa yoowo onkhootta ni ohinaakhulela maswaaka. Masu maneenexa kinghimaaka, eniimuthorihe nihuku noomalihera." 
John12:49 Vano nkiixuulumenle muneenaaka, mene Atiithi akiruminghe yaakilamulela yoohima ni yoowuuluma." 
John12:50 Koosuwela weera nlamulonaya ti okumi woohimala. Tivawo, yeeyo kinghimaaka ti nnenesene yeeyo Atiithi akirummaaya ohima.”" 
John13:1 Yaahanle ehuhu vakhaani ahinaaye mPaska*. Yeesu aasuwela weera yoophiya ehuhu eeraawe ahiyeke elapo ya vathi ni arowe wa Atiithi. Owo aahaasivela awawe yaari mweelaponi, aani aahaasivela mpaka ommaleloni." 
John13:2 Yeera ereene vameesa ecaaka, ni Diyabu* aamusesera Yudasi Iskariyoti, mwaana a Simeyoni weera amvarihe Yeesu." 
John13:3 Yeesu aasuwela weera Atiithi yaahiikaathi itthu sootheene vathi wa ikurusawe ni weera aarwiiye wa Muluku ni anaamuhokoleeletho Yoowo. 
John13:4 Hiiho Yeesu aavenya vameesa, aakuxa mukaandyowaawe ni aahiitthukela etuwaaliya muyuununi." 
John13:5 Vahoolowaya aahela maahi mbasiyani, anapacera orapiha inaawo sa oohuseraawe uukutthaka ni etuwaaliya yaari muyuununi." 
John13:6 Aaphiya wa Simeyoni Pedru aamweerenle: “Apwiya mmwirapihe inaawosaka?” 
John13:7 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Nyuwo khamuniiwexexa vano yeeyo kingweerelaakani, mene ohoolowaya, mmwiiwexexe.”" 
John13:8 Pedru aaheera: “Hoye! Khamurwa murapiha inaawosaka!” Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Miyo kaahirapiha, nyuwo khamunkhala mpattaaka.”" 
John13:9 Simeyoni Pedru aamwaakhula: “Vano Apwiya, khasihiyono paahi inaawosaka, menetho matataaka nitho muruwaaka.”" 
John13:10 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Yoowo orampe, ontthuneya paahi orapiha inaawo. Erutthwaawe yootheene yooreera. Nyuwo muri oorapeene khamuhiyonotho ootheene." 
John13:11 Vano, Owo aasuwela nnenesene taani eera amvarihe ni tivawo eenraawe weera khaahiyono ootheene arampe." 
John13:12 Amalihaka orapiha inaawosaya, Yeesu aawara mukaandyowaawe ni aahokoleela vanipuroniwawe. Vano aahaakoha: “Nyuwo mohiiwexexa yeeyo Miyo koopakenlaakani?" 
John13:13 Nyuwo munkiitthana ‘Muhusiha’ ni ‘Apwiya’ ni vekhaikhai ti Yoomi. 
John13:14 Vano, Miyo kireene Apwiyaanyu ni Muhusihaanyu kohoorapihani inaawosanyu, ontthuneya weera nyuwotho murapihaneke inaawosanyu." 
John13:15 Miyo koowooniheraani ethoonyero weera mupake ntoko Miyo koopakenlaakani. 
John13:16 Miyo kinooleelani vekhaikhai weera kheewowo epottha enaapwaha Apwiyaaya ntokotho khaawo namutthenga onimpwaha yoole omurumihale. 
John13:17 Hapo nyuwo moosuwela itthu iya, mmwireelihiwe mwapaka seiya." 
John13:18 Nkinoohimani nyuwo ootheene. Kohaasuwela yaawo kaathanlalaaka. Yeeyotho eneereiya weera ekwaniheriwe Yoolempwa*: ‘Yoole onca epaawaaka, ookivaha munyeethaawe.’" 
John13:19 Kinooleelani ehinaaye weereiya weera, yeereiya, nyuwo muroromele weera Miyo ti Yoowo." 
John13:20 Miyo kinoororomelihani: yoowo ommwaakhela yoole Miyo kinimurumihaaka, anaakaakhele Miyo, ni yoowo onkaakhela Miyo, ongwaakhela Yaawo akiruminghe." 
John13:21 Uulumaka hiiho, Yeesu aathananaxa mmunepani ni aahima: “Kinooleelani weera vekhaikhai mmoha a nyuwo anaakivarihe.”" 
John13:22 Oohuseraawe yaawehana ehimusuwelaka taani Owo aamuhimaawe. 
John13:23 Mmoha a yaawo, oohusera Yeesu aamusivelaawe, eera akilaantheene mukhwipimwawe." 
John13:24 Simeyoni Pedru aamwiinihera muru yoowo weera amukohe Yeesu mulopwana heeni Owo aamuhimaawe. 
John13:25 Amususeerelaka Yeesu, aamukoha: “Apwiya, taani?”" 
John13:26 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Yoole kineeraaka kimvahe epaawu ela yoomeyanyiwa eruweiweene musasaanini.” Vano, aruweyaka epaawu, aamvaha Yudasi Iskariyoti, mwaana a Simeyoni." 
John13:27 Acaakaru Yudasi epaawu, Satana aavolowa mmurimanimwawe. Vanonto Yeesu aamweerela: “Etthu muntthunaanyu opaka, mpake woowaakuveya.”" 
John13:28 Khaawotho vameesa yiiwexenxe heeni Yeesu amweerenlaawe hiiho. 
John13:29 Woonaka weera Yudasi aari namalipelela a musurukhu, akina yuupuwela weera Yeesu aamweerela athume yeeyo entthuneya ofestani, hoye hoye aavahe etthu oohaawa." 
John13:30 Yudasi aahooca epaawu ni aavenya. Vano waari ohiyu. 
John13:31 Avenyakaru, Yeesu aaweerela: “Vano Mwaana a mutthu oovuwihiwa, ni Muluku oovuwihiwa mwa Yoowo." 
John13:32 Muluku avuwihiwa mwa Yoowo, Mulukutho anaamvuwihe Mwaana muneenaawe ni anaamvuwihe woowaakuveya." 
John13:33 Axinamwanaaka, kinookhala nlelo ehuhu vakhaani paahi ni nyuwo. Nyuwo mmwikaasaase ni ntoko kaaleenlaaka aYuda, Miyo kinooleelani nyuwotho: weiwo kinrowaakawo, khamungwera orowawo." 
John13:34 Kinoovahani nlamulo nnyowani: weera musivelaneke. Ntoko Miyo koosivelaakani nyuwo, ontthuneya weera mooteene yoowo nyuwotho musivelaneke." 
John13:35 Hiiho ootheene eniisuwele weera nyuwo muri oohuseraaka: nyuwo mwasivelana mukina ni mukhwaawe.” 
John13:36 Simeyoni Pedru aamukoha: “Apwiya, munrowa woowi?” Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Weiwo kineeraaka kirowe, nyuwo khamungwera okitthara vaanaano va, mene mmwikitthare vahoolo.”" 
John13:37 Pedru aamukoha: “Apwiya, heeni miyo kihingweraaka woottharani Nyuwo vaanaano vaava? Kinimoovahererani okumaaka!”" 
John13:38 Vano Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Nyuwo mmwikivaherere okumaanyu? Kinoororomelihani weera, ohinaaye wiipa muthupi, mmwikirune imaara tthaaru!”" 
John14:1 Mirimasanyu sihikacamiheye. Munroromele Muluku, mukiroromeletho Miyo." 
John14:2 Vaate wa Atithaka aakhala mapuro mancipale. Wahaakhanle hiiho, Miyo saano kooleenleeneni. Miyo kinkela woorehererelani nipuro." 
John14:3 Ni Miyo kaarowaka ni koorehererelakani nipuro, kinoohokolowa ni nkookuxeni vamoha ni Miyo weera nyuwo mwakhale weiwo Miyo kineeraaka kakhalewo." 
John14:4 Nyuwo moosuwela ephiro kineeraaka kirowe.” 
John14:5 Tomaxi aamweerela: “Apwiya, khanisuwenle munkelaanyu, vano nnisuwele hai ephiro?”" 
John14:6 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Miyo ti Ephiro, Ekhaikhai ni Okumi. Khaawo ongwa wa Atiithi, ohikhanle aviraka mwa Miyo." 
John14:7 Nyuwo mwaakisuwenle Miyo vekhaikhai, mwaamwaasuwelatho Atithaka. Okhuma vaanaano nyuwo mohaasuwela ni moowoona.”" 
John14:8 Filipe aamweerela: “Apwiya munoonihere Atiithi ni eyo enoonikwana.” 
John14:9 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Miyo kanneetta ni nyuwo ehuhu yincipale ni orookhalaru hiiho nyuwo khamukisuwenle Miyo, Filipe? Yoowo onkoona Miyo, ongwoonatho Atithaka. Heeni nyuwo muneeraanyu: ‘Munoonihere Atiithi’?" 
John14:10 Nyuwo khamunroromela weera Miyo kiri mwa Atiithi ni Atiithi mwa Miyo? Masu kinooleelaakani khaahiyono awaka. Ohiyanawaya, ti Atiithi ankhala mwa Miyo ankwanihera mutekwaaya." 
John14:11 Mukiroromele Miyo kooleelakani weera Miyo kiri mwa Atiithi ni Atiithi mwa Miyo. Hoye hoye mano muroromele niwoko na mitekosene seiye. 
John14:12 Kinooleelani ekhaikhai weera yoole onkiroromela Miyo anaapaketho miteko Miyo kimpakaaka. Anaapake miteko soopwahaxa iya, niwoko Miyo kinkela wa Atiithi." 
John14:13 Vano Miyo nkipake yeeyo nyuwo muneeraanyu mvekele mwa Nsinanaka weera Atiithi ekhale oovuwihiwa mwa Mwaana. 
John14:14 Yeeyo nyuwo muneeraanyu mvekele mwa Nsinanaka, Miyo nkipake.”" 
John14:15 Nyuwo mwakisivela Miyo, mmwiiwelele malamulowaaka." 
John14:16 Miyo nkaavekele Atiithi ni Awo eniyoovaheeni Namalaka mukina weera akhale ni nyuwo mahuku ootheene," 
John14:17 eyo tiiyo Munepa wa ekhaikhai. Amalapo khaangwera waakhela niwoko khaanoona, hata khaansuwela. Vaheera nyuwo moosuwela, niwoko Owo onkhala ni nyuwo ni onuukhale mwa nyuwo." 
John14:18 Miyo nkirwa koohiyaani akwaasuni; nkoohokoleeleni. 
John14:19 Vahoolo vakhaani amalapo kheerwa ekoonatho; vano nyuwo mmwikoone. Keenre Miyo kikhalaka ni okumi, nyuwotho mmwikhale ni okumi." 
John14:20 Nihuku nenenenno nyuwo mmwiiwexexe weera Miyo kiri mwa Atithaka, nyuwo mwa Miyo ni Miyo mwa nyuwo." 
John14:21 Yoowo okhalanne malamulowaaka ni oniiwelela, ti yoowo onkisivela. Yoowo onkisivela, anaasiveliwe ni Atithaka ni Miyotho nkimusivele ni nkiixoonihere wa yoowo.”" 
John14:22 Vano, Yudasi (omuhiya Iskariyoti) aamukoha: “Apwiya heeni muneeraanyu mwiixoonihere wa hiyo, ehikhanle amalapo?”" 
John14:23 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Mukina akisivela Miyo, oniiwelela maswaaka. Atithaka eniimusivele ni hiyo nnirwe wa yoowo ni nnikhale mwa yoowo." 
John14:24 Yoole ohinkisivela Miyo, khaniiwelela maswaaka. Masu ala nyuwo muniiwaanyu khaahiyono awaka; ari a Atithaka akiruminghe." 
John14:25 Sootheene iyo kooleenlaakani Miyo nlelo kireene ni nyuwo. 
John14:26 Namalakatho, Munepa Wootteela Atiithi eneeraaya erumihe mwa Nsinanaka, ngwooxuttiheni itthu sootheene ni onuuwuupuxereni sootheene kooleenlaakani." 
John14:27 Kinoohiyerani murettele; murettelaaka kinimoovahani. Miyo nkinoovahani ntoko elapo ya vathi emvahaaya. Sihituthuwe mirimasanyu, hata muhoove." 
John14:28 Nyuwo mookiiwa keeraka: ‘Kinoorowa, mene kinimoohokoleelani.’ Nyuwo mwaakisivela Miyo, mwaanghakalala niwoko kinkela wa Atiithi yeenre Atiithi ekipwahaka Miyo." 
John14:29 Eyo Miyo kooleenlaakani ehinaaye weereiya, weera yeereiyaka, nyuwo muroromele." 
John14:30 Miyo nkinooleelani vancipale niwoko mutokweene a elapo ya vathi aneera arwaaka. Owo khanono ikuru ni Miyo. 
John14:31 Wa soothesene, elapo ya vathi entthuneya osuwela weera kinaasivela Atiithi ni kimpaka nnenesene yeeyo Atithaka akilamulenlaaya. Muvenye ni nrowe." 
John15:1 Miyo kiri Evideira* ya ekhaikhai ni Atithaka ti Namalima. 
John15:2 Murai wootheene oreene mwa Miyo ohiimaka, Atiithi anoothikila ni wootheene oniima, Awo anooreherera weera wiimaxeke." 
John15:3 Nyuwo mootteelihiwa niwoko na masu kooleelaakani. 
John15:4 Mukhale mwa Miyo ni nkikhale mwa nyuwo. Khoowowo murai ongwera wiima mwaneenaayaru, ohikhanle muvideirani*. Nyuwotho khamungwera wiima, muhikhanle mwa Miyo." 
John15:5 Miyo ti Evideira*; nyuwo muri mirai. Akhala mukina onkhala mwa Miyo ni Miyo mwa yoowo, owo onimwiimaxa, niwoko kihikhanle Miyo, nyuwo khamungwera opaka naari etthu." 
John15:6 Akhala mukina ohinkhala mwa Miyo, anaakhale ntoko murai omvonyeriwa okerekhere ni onuuma. Miraisene seiyo sinoottottiwa, sivonyeriweke mmooroni ni sinoohisiwa." 
John15:7 Nyuwo mwakhala mwa Miyo ni maswaaka mwa nyuwo, mmwivekele yeeyo muntthunaanyu ni mmwivahiwe." 
John15:8 Atithaka amvuwihiwa nyuwo mwiimaxa, mooniheraka hiiho weera ti oohuseraaka." 
John15:9 Ntoko Atiithi akisivenlaaya, Miyotho kohoosivelani. Mukhale moosivelanimwaka." 
John15:10 Nyuwo mwiiwelela malamulowaaka, munookhala moosivelanimwaka ntoko Miyo kiniiwelelaaka malamulo a Atithaka ni kinkhala moosivelanimwaya." 
John15:11 Miyo kooleenleni yeeyo weera ohakalalawaka okhale mwa nyuwo ni weera ohakalalawanyu okhale wookwanela. 
John15:12 Nlamulonaka ti nna: musivelane ntoko koosivenlaakani. 
John15:13 Khaawo orino osivelaxa ompwaha yoowo onaavaherera okumaawe asinthamwenaawe. 
John15:14 Nyuwo mmwikhale asinthamwenaaka mwapaka yeeyo Miyo kinoolamulelaakani. 
John15:15 Nkingwiitthanani arumeiyi niwoko murumeiyi khansuwela yeeyo Apwiyaawe ampakaaya. Ohiyanawaya, Miyo kingwiitthanani asinthamwenaaka, niwoko sootheene kiiwalaaka wa Atithaka, Miyo kohoosuwelihani." 
John15:16 Nyuwo khamukithanlale Miyo, mene Miyo kohoothanlani nyuwo weera murowe ni mwiime soowiima soohimala weera Atiithi yoovaheeni yeeyo muneeraanyu muvekele mwa Nsinanaka." 
John15:17 Nlamulonaka ti nna: musivelane mukina ni mukhwaawe. 
John15:18 Amalapo yoothanyani, muupuwelele weera ehinaaye woothanyani, akipacenre toko Miyo." 
John15:19 Mwaari a amalapo, awo saano yoosivenleeneni ntoko awaya. Wa soothesene, khamuhiyono a amalapo, mene Miyo kohoothanlani koovenxakani wa amalapo. Tivawo amalapo anoothanyaayani." 
John15:20 Muupuwelele masu kooleenlaakani: kheewowo epottha yoowaapwaha apwiyaaya. Awo yaakittharatthanre Miyo, animoottharattharanitho. Yiiwelenle maswaaka, eniyiiweleletho maswaanyu." 
John15:21 Eniyoopakeleni hiiho niwoko na Nsinanaka yeenre ehaasuwelaka Yaawo akiruminghe. 
John15:22 Miyo kahaawiiye kuulumaka ni yaawo, awo saano ehikhanle ni milattu. Vanonto, awo aakhalano milattu sa sootthekasaya." 
John15:23 Yoole onkithanya, onaathanyatho Atithaka." 
John15:24 Miyo kahaapaka variyariwaya miteko mukina ohitonkwaawe owera, awo saano ehikhanle ni milattu. Vanonto, awo yaahoona miteko iye ni yaakithanya Miyo nitho Atithaka." 
John15:25 Eyo yeereenle weera ekwaniheriwe yeeyo elempwale munlamulonimwaya: ‘Yaakithanya kihikhalanne nthowa.’ 
John15:26 Namalaka awa, mwa Yoowo kineeraaka koorumiheleni wa Atiithi, Munepa wa ekhaikhai onrweela wa Atiithi, Owo onuukikhalele onamoona Miyo." 
John15:27 Ni nyuwotho mmwikhalele onamoona niwoko okhuma ompacereroni mpaka vano muri ni Miyo. 
John16:1 Kinooleelani sootheene iya weera nyuwo muhikwattuliwe. 
John16:2 Nyuwo mmoomoliwe muSinagogani*. Vekhaikhai, eniiphiye ehuhu yaawo eneera ewiiveeni, eniyuupuwele weera animurumeela Muluku epakaka yeeyo." 
John16:3 Eniipake itthu iyo niwoko khayaasuwenle Atiithi, hata Miyo." 
John16:4 Kinooleelani yeeyo weera, yaphiya ehuhu, muupuwelele yeeyo Miyo kooleenlaakani. Nkooleenleni yeeyo ompacereroni niwoko kaari ni nyuwo." 
John16:5 Vano, kinrowaaka wa Yaale akiruminghe, khaawo mmoha a nyuwo onkikoha: ‘Munkela woowi?’" 
John16:6 Niwoko kuulumale itthu iya, mirimasanyu soosareya othanana." 
John16:7 Vano Miyo kinooleelani ekhaikhai weera ti wa mpuhaanyu Miyo kinrowaaka. Miyo kaahirowa, Namalaka kharwa ooweelani. Vano Miyo karowa, nkoorumiheleni Namalaka." 
John16:8 Owo aarwaaka, anaaviriyele elapo ya vathi mwaha wa soottheka, moota woowaakhuleliwa ni Muluku ni wa nthorihelo." 
John16:9 Wa soottheka niwoko atthu khaankiroromela Miyo; 
John16:10 wa moota woowaakhuleliwa ni Muluku niwoko Miyo kinrowa wa Atiithi ni nyuwo khamurwa mukoonatho; 
John16:11 ni wa nthorihelo niwoko mutokweene a elapo ya vathi ela oothorihiwa. 
John16:12 Kookhalano sincipale sowooleelani, mene vaanaano vaava khamungwera ovilela seiyo." 
John16:13 Vano, waarwaaka Munepa wa ekhaikhai, Owo onuuweettiheni mweekhaikhaiyini yootheene. Khoorwa wuuluma yawayaru, oniwuulume paahi yeeyo oneeraaya wiiwe ni oniwoolaleereni seiyo sineera sirwe." 
John16:14 Owo onuukivuwihe niwoko oniwaakhele yeeyo eri yawaka ni oniwoosuweliheni yeeyo. 
John16:15 Sootheene siri sa Atiithi, siritho sawaka. Tivawo keenraaka weera Munepa oniwaakhele yeeyo eri yawaka ni oniwoosuweliheni." 
John16:16 Ehuhu vakhaani ni khamurwa mukoona, ni vahoolotho vakhaani mmwikoonetho.”" 
John16:17 Akina a oohuseraawe yaaheerelana: “Eheeni yeeyo Owo oneeraawe: ‘Ehuhu vakhaani ni khamurwa mukoona’ ni ‘vahoolowaya vakhaani mmwiikoonetho’ ni ‘niwoko kinrowaaka wa Atiithi?’” 
John16:18 Vano yannakohana: “Eheeni yeeyo oneeraawe: ‘vahoolowaya vakhaani’? Khanniiwexexa yeeyo Owo onghimaawe.” 
John16:19 Yeesu aasuwela weera yaahaawela omukohakoha mwaha wa yeeyo. Vano aaweerela: “Nyuwo munkohana mukina ni mukhwaawe yeeyo kaatthunaaka ohima kuulumaka: ‘Ehuhu vakhaani ni khamurwa mukoona, ni vahoolowaya vakhaani mmwikoonetho?’" 
John16:20 Kinooleelani vekhaikhai weera nyuwo mmwiinle ni mmwilalamike elapo ya vathitho eniihakalale. Nyuwo mmwithanane, mene othananawanyu onuutatuxiwe ohakalala." 
John16:21 Muthiyana aayaraka, onimoona ovoreiya niwoko ehuhuwaawe yoophiya, mene mwanawe ayariwa, owo onoottiwala ohaawa niwoko na ohakalala wa oyariwa mwaana mweelaponi ya vathi." 
John16:22 Enkhumelela hiihotho ni nyuwo: vano eri ehuhu yoothanana wa nyuwo, mene Miyo nkiwooneeni emaara ekina, ni nyuwo mmwihakalale ni khaawo aneera avenxe ohakalala iwo." 
John16:23 Nihuku nenenenno, nyuwo khamurwa mukikohatho naari etthu. Miyo kinoororomelihani weera Atithaka eniyoovaheeni sootheene muneeraanyu muvekele mwa Nsinanaka." 
John16:24 Mpaka vano nlelo khamunaaye ovekela etthu mwa Nsinanaka. Muvekele ni mmwaakhele weera ohakalalawanyu okhale wookwanela. 
John16:25 Kiri mweeraru kuulumaleene ni maphwanaphwaniho, enimoowa ehuhu Miyo kineeraaka kihuulume mooteene yoowo, mene nkuulume nnenesene mwaha wa Atithaka." 
John16:26 Nihuku nenenenno nyuwo mmwaavekele Atiithi mwa Nsinanaka. Nkinghima weera Miyo nkaavekele Atiithi mwaha wa nyuwo," 
John16:27 niwoko Atiithi aneenaaya animoosivelani, mweenre nyuwo mukisivelaka ni muroromela weera Miyo kirweenle wa Muluku." 
John16:28 Miyo kaarwiiye wa Atiithi, kinavolowa elapo ya vathi; vano kinoohiya elapo ya vathi ni kinoohokoleela wa Atiithi.”" 
John16:29 Oohuseraawe yaamweerela: “Vano munuuluma nnenesene, ohikhanle ni maphwanaphwaniho." 
John16:30 Vano ninoowera woona weera moosuwela itthu soothesene ni khoontthuneya weera nookohakoheni etthu. Tivawo ninroromelaahu weera Nyuwo murwiiye wa Muluku.” 
John16:31 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Vano nyuwo munoororomela? 
John16:32 Enkhuveela ehuhu, aani yoophiya, nyuwo muneeraanyu mmwaramwareiye khula mutthu wa owannyawe. Nyuwo mmwikihiye meekhaaka. Wa soothesene, Miyo nkikhanle meekhaaka niwoko Atithaka ari ni Miyo." 
John16:33 Miyo kooleenleni itthu iya weera mukhalane murettele mwa Miyo. Mweelaponimu mmwikhaleno soohooxa, wa soothesene, mulipihere murima. Miyo koowina elapo ya vathi.”" 
John17:1 Ahimaka yeeyo, Yeesu aaweha osulu ni aavekela: “Tiithi, ehuhu yoophiya. Mumvuwihe Mwaninyu weera Mwaninyu oovuwiheni." 
John17:2 Vano mwaamvaha Mwaana ikuru soolamula omutthu wootheene weera aavahe okumi woohimala ootheene Nyuwo mumvanghaanyu. 
John17:3 Okumi woohimala ti ola: weera awo yoosuweleni Nyuwo, Muluku mmoharu a ekhaikhai, ni emusuwele Yeesu Kristu mwaamurumihalaanyu." 
John17:4 Miyo kihoovuwihani mweelaponi ya vathi, kikwaniheraka muteko mwaakivanghaanyu opaka." 
John17:5 Vano Atiithi, mukivuwihe vamoha ni Nyuwo ni ovuwa iwe kaaraakano khalayi ni Nyuwo ehinaaye okhala elapo ya vathi." 
John17:6 Miyo kohaathupululela Nsinananyu yaale mukivanghaanyu mweelaponi ya vathi. Awo yaari awinyu ni mookivaha ni awo yaahiiwelela maswaanyu. 
John17:7 Vano awo ansuwela weera sootheene mukivanghaanyu singwa wa Nyuwo. 
John17:8 Miyo kohaaleela masu mukivanghaanyu ni awo ahaakhulela. Mwa yeeyo awo ansuwela vekhaikhai weera Miyo kirwiiye wa Nyuwo, ni yaaroromela weera mwaakiruma." 
John17:9 Miyo kinnadyoonttelela wa yaawo. Nkindyoonttelela wa amalapo, mene wa yaale mwaakivanghaanyu niwoko ti awinyu." 
John17:10 Ootheene kiraakano ti awinyu, ni ootheene muraanyuno ti awaka. Miyo kimvuwihiwa mwaha wa yaawo." 
John17:11 Miyo nkirwa kikhalatho mweelaponi, mene awo nlelo ari mweelaponi ni, Miyo kinrowa wa Nyuwo. Tiithi Ootteela, ngwaakihe awo mwa Nsinananyu, Nsina nno mwaakivanghaanyu weera ekhale mmoha ntoko Hiyo nraahu mmoha." 
John17:12 Kaaraaka ni yaawo, kaawaakiha ni kaahaalipelela mwa Nsina mwaakivanghaanyu. Khaawo mmoha a yaawo oriheiye, ahikhanle yoole mwaana a oriheya weera ekwaniheriwe Yoolempwa*." 
John17:13 Vano kinrowa wa Nyuwo, mene kinghima itthu iya Miyo nlelo kireene mweelaponi weera awo ekhalane ohakalalawaka woowaatta." 
John17:14 Kaahaavaha maswaanyu, ni amalapo yaahaathanya, niwoko awo khaahiyono a elapo ya vathi ntoko Miyo kihikhanlaakatho." 
John17:15 Nkindyoonttelela weera mwaavenxe mweelaponi ya vathi, mene weera ngwaakihe wa namatakhala." 
John17:16 Awo khaahiyono a mweelaponi ntoko Miyo kihikhanlaakatho. 
John17:17 Mwaatteelihe mwa ekhaikhai; maswaanyu ti ekhaikhai. 
John17:18 Ntoko mwaakiruminghaanyu mweelaponi, hiihotho Miyo kohaarumiha mweelaponi." 
John17:19 Miyo kinimwiitteeliha niwoko na yaawo, weera awotho ekhale ootteelihiwa mwa ekhaikhai." 
John17:20 Nivekelonaka khanihiyono paahi wa yaawo. Kindyoonttelelatho wa yaale eniikiroromele niwoko na mutthengaaya 
John17:21 weera ootheene ekhale mmoha, Tiithi, ntoko Nyuwo muraanyu mwa Miyo ni Miyo mwa Nyuwo, ni weera awo ekhaletho mwa Hiyo. Hiiho amalapo eniiroromele weera Nyuwo mwaakirumiha." 
John17:22 Kohaavaha ovuwa mwaakivanghaanyu weera awo ekhale mmoha ntoko Hiyo nraahu mmoha: 
John17:23 Miyo mwa yaawo ni Nyuwo mwa Miyo. Kimvekela weera omoharuwaaya okhale wookwanela weera amalapo esuwele weera Nyuwo mwaakirumiha ni mwaahaasivela, hiiho ntoko mwaakisivenlaanyu." 
John17:24 Tiithi, kintthuna weera awo mwaakivanghaanyu ekhale vamoha ni Miyo weiwo kiraakawo, ni weera yoone ovuwawaka, ovuwa mwaakivanghaanyu, niwoko mwaakisivela ehinaaye ephattuwelo ya elapo ya vathi." 
John17:25 Tiithi oororomeleya, orookhalaru weera amalapo khayoosuwenleni, Miyo kohoosuwelani, ni yaawo ari awaka aansuwela weera mwaakirumiha." 
John17:26 Miyo kohaasuweliha Nsinananyu, ni nkipwaherere opaka yeeyo weera osivelawene weiwo mwaakisivenlaanyu, okhale mwa yaawo ni Miyotho kikhale mwa yaawo.”" 
John18:1 Amalihaka ovekela, Yeesu aavenya vamoha ni oohuseraawe ni yaalapuwa vanxepani na Kedroni. Okhopela naakhalawo nttimbe na sooliveira* aavolongwaawe ni oohuseraawe." 
John18:2 Vano Yudasi, namavariha, aasuwela nnenesene nipuro nne niwoko imaara sincipale Yeesu annathukumanawo ni oohuseraawe." 
John18:3 Yudasi aarowa ottimbeni akuxaleene mukuttula wa anakhotto ni anamalipelela akina yaarumihiwe ni ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni aFarisi*, ekuxaka mithuko, onyaari ni iyuuma sa ekhotto." 
John18:4 Yeesu, asuwelaka sootheene seera simukhumelele, aavenya ni aahaakoha: “Taani nyuwo mummwaasaanyu?”" 
John18:5 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Yeesu a oNasarete.” Yeesu aaweerela: “Ti Miyo.” Vano Yudasi, namavariha, aari ni yaawo." 
John18:6 Eerakaru Yeesu ‘ti Miyo’ awo yaaheetta nttulinttuli enamorela vathi. 
John18:7 Yeesu aahaakoha veeli: “Taani mummwaasaanyu?” Awo yaamweerela: “Yeesu a oNasarete.” 
John18:8 Yeesu aawaakhula: “Kohooleelani weera ti Yoomi. Mwakaasa Miyo, mwaahiye atthu ala eroweke.”" 
John18:9 Iyo sikhumelenle weera ekwaniheriwe masu aahimmaawe: ‘Khakiriheiye naari mutthu mmoha a yaawo mwaakivanghaanyu.’ 
John18:10 Simeyoni Pedru akuxaka ekatana, aatholola, anamuvulaliha murumeiyi a mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, amukwasaka naaru na moonowaawe mulopwana. Nsina na murumeiyi owo naari Malko." 
John18:11 Vano Yeesu aamulamulela Pedru: “Musunge ekatanaanyu! Apaale nkinrowa owura ekoomixi ela Atiithi akivanghaaya?” 
John18:12 Hiiho mukuttula wa anakhotto vamoha ni mutokweenaaya ni anamalipelela a aYuda yaamvara Yeesu. Yaamutthuka 
John18:13 ni yaamuronghela toko Hana aari atatawe Kayafasi, mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* wa eyaakha ele." 
John18:14 Aari Kayafasi aaleenle aYuda weera waari wooreera akhwiyeene mutthu mmoha wa muloko wa atthu. 
John18:15 Simeyoni Pedru ni oohusera mukina yaamutthara Yeesu. Asuweliweene ni mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, oohusera mukina ole aavolowa vamoha ni Yeesu vaate wa mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*." 
John18:16 Pedrutho aahala awehereraka okhwipi wa vaate wa mulako. Oohusera mukina aasuweliwe ni mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* aahokolowa, aahuuluma ni namalipelela muthiyana a mulako, ni aamvolongha Pedru." 
John18:17 Muthiyana ole aamukoha Pedru: “Nyuwo khamuhiyono mmoha a oohusera a Mulopwana Ola?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Nkihiyono.” 
John18:18 Vano, weera oriiraka, ni arumeiyi ni anamalipelela yaari mukerekhere mooro waakukhiwe weera yoore. Pedru aaritho yeemelelo ni yaawo, ooraka." 
John18:19 Yeereiyaka hiiho, mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* aamukohakoha Yeesu mwaha wa oohuseraawe ni mahusihowaawe." 
John18:20 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Miyo kaahuuluma nnenesene mwaatthuni. Mahuku ootheene kannaxuttiha muSinagogani* ni Mpaani mwa Muluku weiwo aYuda ootheene anthukumanaayawo. Nkuulumme naari etthu muxiirini. 
John18:21 Munkikohakohera heeni? Mwaakohe yaakiiwale. Vekhaikhai awo ansuwela kaahimaaka.” 
John18:22 Yeesu ahimakaru yeeyo, namalipelela mmoha aari vakhiviru aammana owiitho amukohaka: “Ommwaakhula hiiho mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*?”" 
John18:23 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Miyo kaahimale yoonanara, mukoonihere, mene kuulumale ekhaikhai, heeni mukimannaanyu?”" 
John18:24 Vano, Yeesu areene nlelo ootthukiweene, Hana aamurumiha wa Kayafasi." 
John18:25 Simeyoni Pedru ooraka, awo yaamukoha: “Nyuwo khamuhiyono mmoha a oohuseraawe?” Owo aaruna eeraka: “Nkihiyono.”" 
John18:26 Mmoha a arumeiyi a mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, mmusaawe a mulopwana ole Pedru aamukwansaawe naaru aanyeserera: “Miyo nkiwoonneni ni Yoowo ottimbeni?”" 
John18:27 Emaara ekinatho Pedru aaruna ni ehuhuweene yeeyo muthupi waahiipa. 
John18:28 Woottharelana, aYuda yaamukuxa Yeesu wa Kayafasi emuronghaka empa etokotoko ya guvernadori a oRooma. Vano, oxaaka ni weera esembe ovalihiwa, aYuda khayaavolowa empa etokotoko ele niwoko yaatthuna omucano mPaska*." 
John18:29 Pilatu aarowa wa yaawo ni aahaakoha: “Yoowoothera heeni murinaanyu ni Mulopwana Ola?” 
John18:30 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Ola ahaakhanle mutakhali, khanooruuhelani.”" 
John18:31 Pilatu aaweerela: “Munkuxe ni munthorihe ntoko nlamulonanyu.” aYuda yaamuleela: “Hiyo khaninono ikuru soothorihela wookhwaani.” 
John18:32 Eyo yeereiye weera ekwaniheriwe masu Yeesu aahimmaawe, athoonyeraka ni mukhalelo heeni eeraawe akhwe." 
John18:33 Pilatu aavolowatho empa etokotoko, aamwiitthana Yeesu anamukoha: “Nyuwo Mwene a aYuda?”" 
John18:34 Yeesu aamukoha: “Yookoha ela ti yawinyu, hoye hoye atthu akina yoorumaleni weera mukikohe?”" 
John18:35 Pilatu amwaakhula: “Apaale miyo muYuda? Waari muloko wa atthwaanyu ni ahooleli a asaserdoti* akivaherenre Nyuwo. Eheeni mumpankaanyu?” 
John18:36 Yeesu aamweerela: “Omwenaaka khoohiyono wa elapo ya vathi ela. Waakhanle, arumeiyaaka yaangwana weera ewooceelihe aYuda okitthuka. Vanonto omwenaaka khoohiyono wa wenno.”" 
John18:37 Pilatu aamweerela: “Vano Nyuwo Mwene!” Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Muneera weera kiri Mwene. Vanonto, ti niwoko na yeeyo kiyariwaaka ni kirweenlaaka mweelaponimu: weera kikhalele onamoona ekhaikhai. Ootheene ari a ekhaikhai, anookiiwa.”" 
John18:38 Pilatu aamukoha: “Ti heeni ekhaikhai?” Uulumaka yeeyo, aavenya veeli arowaka yaaraayawo aYuda ni aaweerela: “Nkinoona nthowa mwa Yoowo." 
John18:39 Wa soothesene, ntoko eraaya ekhovelelowaanyu, ontthuneya miyo wootaphulelani namatthukiwa mmoha wa ehuhu ya mPaska*. Muntthuna weera miyo kimutaphule Mwene a aYuda?”" 
John18:40 Awo yaamwaakhula ekhuwelaka: “Hoye! Owo hoye! Nnimutthuna Baraba!” Vano, Baraba aari nasusuki." 
John19:1 Pilatu aamukuxa Yeesu ni aahaalamulela weera engwaxule. 
John19:2 Anakhotto yaatthava ecireemba ya nyiiwa ni yaangwariha mmurumwawe. Yaangwariha mukaandyo wooxeera 
John19:3 ni emwaattamelaka Yoowo yaamweerela: “Salaama, Mwene a aYuda!” Yannammana owiitho." 
John19:4 Emaara ekinatho Pilatu aavenya arowaka wa aYuda ni aaweerela: “Mmoone, miyo kinooruuhelani Yoowo weera musuwele weera miyo nkinoona hata nthowa nimoha na omoothera Yoowo.”" 
John19:5 Yeesu akhumelaka vaate awanreene ecireemba ya nyiiwa ni mukaandyo wooxeera, Pilatu aaweerela: “Mmoone, Mutthu Ola.”" 
John19:6 Emoonaka ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni anamalipelela, yaakhuwela: “Munkhomele, munkhomele!” Pilatutho aawaakhula: “Nyuwo munkuxeke ni munkhomele! Wa miyo, nkimphwanya nthowa na omoothera Yoowo.”" 
John19:7 aYuda yaanyeserera: “Nookhalano nlamulo ni nlamulo nna ninnyeserera weera Owo akhwe niwoko aahiixeerela: ‘Mwaana a Muluku.’” 
John19:8 Iiwaka hiiho, Pilatu aatepa woova" 
John19:9 ni aavolowatho mpaani etokotoko. Vano aamukoha Yeesu: “Nyuwo munkhumelela woowi?” Mene Yeesu khaamwaakhunle. 
John19:10 Pilatu aamweerela: “Nyuwo munkhootta wuuluma ni miyo? Khamusuwenle weera kookhalano ikuru soowootaphulani, hoye hoye soowookhomelani?”" 
John19:11 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Nyuwo khamwaakhalano hata vakhaani ikuru ni Miyo mwahaavahiwe ikuru iyo wa wiirimu. Tivawo yoole okivaherenre wa nyuwo ookhalano nthowa na yoottheka yoowoopwahani nyuwo.” 
John19:12 Evenyero vaavaale Pilatu aatthuna omtaphula Yeesu, mene aYuda yannakhuwela: “Mwamutaphula Mulopwana Ola, khamuhiyono nthamwenaawe Seesari. Yoowo oniixeerela Mwene, ori mwiittana a Seesari.”" 
John19:13 Iiwalaawe yeeyo, Pilatu aamukhumihera Yeesu vaate ni aakilaathi vahiceni ya othoriha, vanipuroni noosuwanyeya ntoko ‘noothatiwa maluku’ ni niitthaniwa vaHeberi ‘Gabata.’" 
John19:14 Naari nihuku na oreherera wa esimana ya mPaska* niphiyeraka nsuwa vamuru. Pilatu aaweerela aYuda: “Mmoone, Mwenaanyu!”" 
John19:15 Vano awosa yannakhuwela: “Mmwiive, mmwiive, munkhomele!” Pilatu aahaakoha: “Kinkhomeleke mwenaanyu?” Ahooleli a asaserdoti* yaamwaakhula: “Khaninono mwene, ahikhanle Seesari.”" 
John19:16 Ommaleloni Pilatu aahaavaherera Yeesu weera emukhomele. Vano anakhotto yaamukuxa Yeesu. 
John19:17 Athatelaka muttandaawe Owo aarowa vanipuroni niitthaniwa Nikarakasa (nneeriwa vaHeberi Gologota). 
John19:18 Vaavaale yaamukhomela ni vamoha ni Yoowo eeli akina, mmoha moono mulopwana, mukina muthiyana, ni Yeesu eriyari." 
John19:19 Pilatu aarumiha oreherera etthaabwa ekhaaneene weera eheliwe vasulu wa muttanda ni yoolempwa ela: “YEESU A ONASARETE, MWENE A AYUDA.”" 
John19:20 aYuda ancipale yaasoma yoolempwa ele neenre nipuro aakhomeliwaawe Yeesu nakhalaka vakhiviru wa esidade ni yoolempwa yaalempwale ni vaHeberi, vaRooma ni vaGrego." 
John19:21 Ahooleli a asaserdoti* a aYuda yaamvaanyiha Pilatu yeeraka: “Muhilepe ‘Mwene a aYuda,’ mene weera Mulopwana Ola iixeerela ‘Mwene a aYuda.’”" 
John19:22 Pilatu aawaakhula: “Yeeyo kilempaaka, koolepa.”" 
John19:23 Emukhomelaka Yeesu, anakhotto yaakuxa ikuwosawe ni yaakawana mipatta mixexe, mpatta mmoha wa khula mutthu. Yaakuxatho mukaandyo. Ole waari woohittotthiwa, waamalela otthaviwa okhuma vasulu mpaka vathi ni ekuwo emoha paahi." 
John19:24 Awo yaaheerelana: “Nihaahule. Nrowe nipake macitta weera nimoone mutthu taani onrowa ovahiwa.” Eyo yeereenle weera ekwaniheriwe yoolempwa eneera: ‘Yaakawana ikuwosaka yaaworu ni yaapakela macitta wa soowarasaka.’ Eyo anakhotto ti yaapanke. 
John19:25 Vakhiviru wa muttanda wa Yeesu yaari amayawe, munnaya, Mariya mwaariye Keloopa ni Mariya oMagadalene." 
John19:26 Awoonaka Yeesu amayawe vaavaale ni vakhiviruwaya oohusera aamusivelaawe, aaweerela amayawe: “Mwaninyu ori vawo”" 
John19:27 ni wa oohusera: “Ari vawo amayinyu.” Evenyero vaavaale, oohusera ole aawaakhela owannyawe." 
John19:28 Vahoolowaya, asuwelaka weera sootheene saamaliheriwa ni weera ekwaniheriwe Yoolempwa*, Yeesu aaheera: “Okivola ntthona.”" 
John19:29 Waakhala vaavaale mwaapu woosareya eviinyu yoonyuunya. Vano yaaruweya nttapwatta mwemmo, enatthukelela okhwipi wa mutathi wa hisopo* enamuronghela mpaka owanoniwawe." 
John19:30 Awurakaru, Yeesu aaheera: “Sookwaniheriwa.” Wa yeeyo, ahuuramiha muru ni aaveleela munepaawe." 
John19:31 Nne naari nihuku nooreherera ni oxaawaya waarowa okhala eSaabadu, nihuku nimoha noottittimiheyaxa. aYuda khayaatthuna weera mittembo sikhale vamittandani eSaabadu. Tivawo, yaamvekenlaaya Pilatu weera aalamulele anakhotto owiintaka nyettosaya ni sivenxiwe mittembo vamittandani." 
John19:32 Yaahoowa anakhotto ni yaahiintaka nyetto sa mulopwana oopacera aakhomeliwe ni Yeesu ni vahoolowaya sa mukinatho. 
John19:33 Ephiyakarutho wa Yeesu ni yoonaka weera aahookhwa, awo khayiintanke nyettosawe." 
John19:34 Ohiya yeeyo, nakhotto mmoha aamuhoma mpararinimwawe ni nivakanawe ni woowaakuveya yaakhuma ephome ni maahi." 
John19:35 Yoole oonne yeeyo, aakhalela onamoona ni onamoonaawe ti wa ekhaikhai. Owo onsuwela weera onghima ya ekhaihai ni onkhalela onamoona weera nyuwotho muroromele." 
John19:36 Itthu iye seereenle weera ekwaniheriwe Yoolempwa*: “Khaniwowo naari nikhuvanawe nimoha nneera nintakiwe.” 
John19:37 Ni ntoko ehimmaaya Yoolempwa* nipuro nikina: “Awo eniimoone Yoole yaamuhommaaya.” 
John19:38 Vahoolowaya Yoseefe a wAramiteiya aamvekela Pilatu muttembo wa Yeesu. Yoseefe aari oohusera a Yeesu, mene a muxiirini niwoko aangwoova aYuda. Aahoowa ni etthunihero ya Pilatu, anakuxa muttembo, anarowano." 
John19:39 Owo aahooliwa ni Nikodemu, yoole aamuxekunre Yeesu ohiyu. Nikodemu aakuxa sookwanaka ikiilu* miloko miraru niixexe sa makhura ootakanseriwa emira* ni alowe*." 
John19:40 Ekuxaka muttembo wa Yeesu, ooweeli yaavitikelela esaanda ettikitthelaka makhura oowunkhelaxa ntoko yaaraaya ekhovelelowaaya ya mariro a aYuda." 
John19:41 Vanipuroni aathomeiwaawe Yeesu naakhala nttimbe ni munttimbeni mmwe naakhalatho nikhuku nnyowani weiwo ahaatonkwaawe ovithiwaawo mutthu. 
John19:42 Woonaka weera naari nihuku nooreherera wa aYuda ni weera nikhuku naari vakhiviru, yaamvitha mwemmo." 
John20:1 Wa nihuku noopacera na esimana, oyaaka ni oxa, nlelo ereene epiphi, Mariya oMagadalene aaphiya onikhukuni ni aahoona weera nluku ntokotoko na vamulako naakakhiwa." 
John20:2 Vano, aamutthimakela Simeyoni Pedru ni oohusera mukina, yoole Yeesu aamusivelaawe, anaweerela: “Ahaakhumiha Apwiya munikhukuni ni khanisuwenle awiikaathiyaayawo.”" 
John20:3 Pedru ni oohusera mukina yaavenya erowaka onikhukuni. 
John20:4 Ooweeli yaatthimaka, mene oohusera mukina aatepa otthimaka ni aapacera ophiya onikhukuni." 
John20:5 Owo aahuurama ni aawehexexa munikhukuni. Aahoona esaanda mwemmwe, mene khaavolongwe." 
John20:6 Vattuliwawe Simeyoni Pedru aamutthara, anaphiya, anavolowa munikhukuni ni ahoona esaanda" 
John20:7 nitho ekuwo yaatthukiwaaya mmuru mwa Yeesu. Eyo yaari yoopindiwa mpattaaya emwalamwalihiweene esaanda. 
John20:8 Vahoolowaya oohusera mukina aapacenre ophiya onikhukuni aavolowatho. Owo aahoona ni aaroromela. 
John20:9 Awo nlelo khayiiwexexa weera, ntoko yeenraaya Yoolempwa*, waatthuneya Yeesu ovenyerera mookhwaani." 
John20:10 Hiiho oohusera yaahokoleela owaani," 
John20:11 mene Mariya aahala vamulako wa nikhuku, iinlaka. Iinlaka hiihaale, aahuurama weera awehexexe mpuwa" 
John20:12 ni aawoona andyelo eeli ewanreene sootteela ni ekilaantheene vaavaawo waaraayawo muttembo wa Yeesu, mmoha waamuru ni mukina waametto." 
John20:13 Awo yaamukoha: “Muthiyana, heeni muniinlaanyu?” Owo aawaakhula: “Ahaakuxa Apwiyaaka ni nkisuwenle awiikaathiyaayawo.”" 
John20:14 Wa yeeyo, aarukunuwa ni aamoona Yeesu vaavaale, mene khaamusuwenle." 
John20:15 Yeesu aamweerela: “Muthiyana, heeni nyuwo muniinlaanyu?” Mummwaasa taani?” Uupuwelaka weera aari mwaneene a nttimbe, owo aamweerela: “Nyuwo mwaakuxaleene, mukileele nipuro mwiikaathiyaanyu ni miyo kinookuxa.”" 
John20:16 Yeesu aamweerela: “Mariya!” Vano, amurukunuwelaka, owo aakhuwela vaHeberi: “Rabuni!’” entaphulela: ‘Muhusiha.’" 
John20:17 Yeesu aamweerela: “Muhikivarele niwoko nlelo nkinaaye waahokoleela Atithaka. Murowe toko wa axunnaka ni mwaaleele weera Miyo kinghokoleela wa Atithaka ni Atithinyu ni wa Mulukwaaka ni Mulukwaanyu.” 
John20:18 Mariya oMagadalene aarowa ni aahaalaleera oohusera: “Koowoona Apwiya!” Ni aahaathalihera yeeyo Owo aamuleenlaawe. 
John20:19 Wiilaka nihuku nenne noopacera na esimana ni ethukumanneene oohusera mpaani ni milako soowaliweene niwoko na owoova aYuda, Yeesu aavolowa, aakhala eriyaraaya, anaweerela: “Murettele okhale ni nyuwo.”" 
John20:20 Ahimaka yeeyo, aawoonihera matataawe ni nipararinawe. Oohusera yaahakalalaxa ewoonakaru Apwiya." 
John20:21 Yeesu aaweerela veeli: “Murettele okhale ni nyuwo. Ntoko Atiithi akirumihale, hiihotho Miyo kinimoorumihani.”" 
John20:22 Wa yeeyo, aawiiseelela yaawo, anaweerela: “Mwaakhele Munepa Wootteela." 
John20:23 Nyuwo mwalevelela soottheka sa mukina, anaaleveleliwe; mwaahilevelela soottheka sa mukina, khanleveleliwa sootthekasawe.”" 
John20:24 Tomaxi, iitthaniwa maphapo, mmoha a muloko neeli, khaakhanle vamoha ni oohusera aaphiyalaawe Yeesu." 
John20:25 Oohusera akina yaamweerela: “Nowoona Apwiya!” Mene owo aaweerela: “Miyo kaahoona ineneero sa misomaari mmatatanimwaya, kaahivoleiha ekathaaka mwemmo saaraaya misomaari ni kaahivoleiha ntatanaka mpararinimwaya, nkinroromela.”" 
John20:26 Yaaviralaaya esimana emoha, oohuseraawe yaaritho vaavaale ni Tomaxi vamoha ni yaawo. Saarookhalaru milako soowaliwasene, Yeesu aavolowa, aaheemela eriyaraaya, anaweerela: “Murettele okhale ni nyuwo.”" 
John20:27 Vano aamweerela Tomaxi: “Muvoleihe ekathaanyu; moone matataaka. Mookole moonowaanyu ni muvoleihe ntata mpararinimwaka. Muhihovele – muroromele!” 
John20:28 Tomaxi aamweerela: “Apwiyaaka ni Mulukwaaka!” 
John20:29 Vano Yeesu aamweerela: “Munroromela niwoko mukoonnaanyu? Ooreelihiwa ti yaawo ahikoonne enaroromelatho.” 
John20:30 Yeesu aapaka variyari wa oohuseraawe ineneero sikina sootikhiniheya sincipale sihilempwe mulivuruni ela. 
John20:31 Iyatho silempwe weera nyuwo muroromele weera Yeesu ti Kristu, Mwaana a Muluku ni muroromelaka mukhalane okumi mwa Nsinanawe." 
John21:1 Vahoolowaya Yeesu aahiixooniheratho wa oohuseraawe mukerekhere wa ephareiya ya oTiberiyade. 
John21:2 Yaakhumelenle ha: Aari weiwe Simeyoni Pedru, Tomaxi (iitthaniwa maphapo), Nathaneyeli a oKaana oGalileiya, anamwane a Zebedeyo ni oohusera eeli akina." 
John21:3 Simeyoni Pedru aaweerela: “Kinkela okoka.” Awo yaaheera: “Hiyo ninrowa ni weyo.” Vano yaavenya, enavolowa munikulani, mene ohiyuweene yoole, khayaaphwannye etthu." 
John21:4 Oxaaka, Yeesu aari mukerekhere wa ephareiya, oohuseratho khayaamusuwenle." 
John21:5 Owo aahaakoha: “Anamwane, nyuwo mookhalano etthu ya oca?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Hoye”" 
John21:6 Owo aaweerela: “Muvonyere ntthavi moonowaanyu mulopwana ni mmwiphwanye.” Yaapaka hiiho, ni khayaawenre opurula ntthavi niwoko na ihopa soowaatta." 
John21:7 Oohusera aamusivelaawe Yeesu aamweerela Pedru: “Ti Apwiya!” Simeyoni Pedru, amwiiwaka ahimaka yeeyo, aawara mukaandyowawe, niwoko aaroorula, anakhumbwela mphareiyani." 
John21:8 Oohusera akina yaatthara ni nikula epurulaka ntthavi noosareya ni ihopa niwoko yaari vakhiviru wa mukerekhere, wookwanaka imeetru* miloko mithanniixexe." 
John21:9 Ekhuruwaka yaahoona mooro ni makhala ooviha ni ihopa vayikho vaavaale nitho ipaawu sikina. 
John21:10 Yeesu aaweerela: “Mukiruuheleke ihopa sikina mphwannyaanyu vaanaano va.” 
John21:11 Simeyoni Pedru aavolowa munikulani, anapurulela ntthavi mukerekhere wa ephareiya. Nne naasareya ni ihopa sitokweene 153. Saarookhalaru ihopa sincipale ntthavi khanaahungwe." 
John21:12 Yeesu aaweerela: “Ngweeke, muceeke.” Khaawo oohusera mmoha uumihale murima weera amukohe: ‘Nyuwo taani?’ Awo yaasuwela weera ti Apwiya." 
John21:13 Yeesu aawaattamela, anakuxa ipaawu, anaavaha, apakaka hiihotho ni ihopa." 
John21:14 Eyo yaari emaara yanaararu Yeesu iixoonihenraawe wa oohuseraawe vahoolo wa ovenyerera mookhwaani. 
John21:15 Emalihaka oca, Yeesu aamukoha Pedru: “Simeyoni, mwaana a Yohaane, munookisivela waapwaha ala?” Owo aamweerela: “Aani Apwiya, moosuwela weera kinnoosivelani.” Yeesu aamweerela: “Muciheke iputtiputthisaka." 
John21:16 Yeesu aamukoha veeli: “Simeyoni, mwaana a Yohaane, munookisivela?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Aani Apwiya, moosuwela weera kinnoosivelani.” Yeesu aamweerela: “Mukukhule ikhondoolosaka.”" 
John21:17 Emaara yanaararu Yeesu aamukoha: “Simeyoni, mwaana a Yohaane, munookisivela?” Pedru aathanana niwoko na omukoha Yeesu emaara yanaararu:‘nyuwo munookisivela?’ ni aamwaakhula: “Apwiya, moosuwela itthu sootheene ni moosuwela weera kinnoosivelani.” Yeesu aamweerela: “Muciheke ikhondoolosaka." 
John21:18 Kinooleelani ekhaikhai: Mwaaraanyu mmiravo, mwaangwarela ni mwaanrowa weiwo mwaatthunaanyu, mene muuluvalaka, mmweemexe matataanyu ni mutthu mukina anoowariheni ni anookuxeeni ooronghakani weiwo muhinghaawelaanyu.”" 
John21:19 Yeesu aahima yeeyo weera amoonihere ni moota heeni wa okhwa Pedru eeraawe amvuwihe Muluku. Vano aamweerela: “Mukitthare!” 
John21:20 Pedru aarukunuwa ni aamoona weera oohusera Yeesu aamusivelaawe eera aattharaka. Owo aari yoole aamuuramenle Yeesu wa ehuhu yaacaaya efesta ya mPaska* amukohaka: ‘Apwiya taani aneera oovariheni.’ 
John21:21 Amoonaka yoowo, Pedru aamukoha Yeesu: “Apwiya ankha ola?”" 
John21:22 Yeesu aamwaakhula: “Miyo kaatthuna weera owo akhale ni okumi mpaka kineeraaka kihokolowe, eheeni mumpwatthaanyu? Mukitthareke nyuwo.”" 
John21:23 Tivawo yiiwanyeyaaya masu weera oohusera owo kharwa akhwa. Yeesutho kheenre weera owo kharwa akhwa. Eenre paahi: “Miyo kaatthuna weera owo akhale ni okumi mpaka kineeraaka kihokolowe, eheeni mumpwatthaanyu?”" 
John21:24 Owo oohusera onkhalela onamoona itthu iya ni olempe seiya. Noosuwela weera onamoonaawe ti wa ekhaikhai. 
John21:25 Ohiya toko yeeyo, Yeesu aapaka itthu sikina sincipale. Sootheene sa seiyo saalempwale, kinuupuwela weera hata mweelaponi ya vathi yootheene saano ehikhanle mapuro oowaatta wa ilivuru seera silempwe." 
Acts1:1 Mulivurunimwaka yoopacera, Teyofilo, kaalepa mwaha wa sootheene Yeesu aapacenraawe opaka ni oxuttiha" 
Acts1:2 mpaka nihuku aawelihingwaawe wiirimu, vahoolo wa waalamulela itthu mwa Munepa Wootteela arummwa aathanlalaawe." 
Acts1:3 Vahoolo wa ohaawawawe, Owo aahiixoonihera wa atthweene yaale ni aahaaviriyela ni mikhalelo soowaatta weera ori ni okumi. Anniixoonihera wa yaawo ehuhu ya mahuku miloko mixexe, aaleelaka mwaha wa omwene wa Muluku." 
Acts1:4 Ehuhu emoha, acaaka vamoha ni yaawo, aahaavaha nlamulo nna: “Muhivenye oYerusaleemu, mene muweherereke yoororomelihiwa ya Atithaka mwa yeeyo kooleenlaakani." 
Acts1:5 Vano, Yohaane aapatisa ni maahi, mene eviraka mahuku vakhaani, nyuwo mmwipatisiwe ni Munepa Wootteela.”" 
Acts1:6 Yaawo yaathukumanne yaamukoha: “Apwiya, ti vaanaano vaava muneeraanyu mukhalihetho omwene wa aYixrayeli?”" 
Acts1:7 Owo aaweerela: “Khoontthuneya nyuwo osuwela ehuhu, hata nihuku Atiithi alakenlaaya ni ikurusaya aneenaaya," 
Acts1:8 mene mmwaakhele ikuru Munepa Wootteela wookhuruwelakani nyuwo ni mmwikhale anamoonaaka oYerusaleemu, oYudeiya wootheene, oSamariya ni mpaka ekotenle elapo.”" 
Acts1:9 Amalihaka ohima yeeyo, aawelihiwa osulu awosa engwehaka, ni nihutte nimoha naamukhuneela Yoowo moota wooweera khayaamoonnetho." 
Acts1:10 Awo yaahala ewehexexaka nnenesene wiirimu Owo awelaka, ni woowaakuveya yaakhumelela variyariwaya axilopwana eeli ewanreene sootteela," 
Acts1:11 yaaweerenle: “aGalileiya, heeni nyuwo mungwehexexaanyu wiirimu? Yeesweene Yoowo owelihiwe variyariwanyu wiirimu, anaahokolowe mooteene yoowo ntoko mmoonnaanyu awelaka.”" 
Acts1:12 Vano awo yaahokoleela oYerusaleemu, erweelaka omwaako wiitthaniwa Sooliveira, waari vakhiviru wa esidade, wookwanaka ekwaha emoha* ya vaSaabaduni*." 
Acts1:13 Ephiyakaru, yaawela empa ya osulu mwemmwe yaakhovelelaaya okhalamo. Aakhalawo Pedru, Yohaane, Yakobe, Andreiya, Filipe, Tomaxi, Bartolomeyo ni Matheyo, Yakobe, mwaana a Alfeyu, Simeyoni nanthiti ni Yudasi, mwaana a Yakobe." 
Acts1:14 Ootheene awo yannathukumana ni murima mmoharu mmavekeloni, vamoha ni asithiyana ni Mariya, amayawe Yeesu, ni axunneiye." 
Acts1:15 Mahukweene yaale, Pedru aaheemela variyari wa axunna yaari wookwanaka atthu ncira ni miloko miili," 
Acts1:16 aweerelaka: “Axunna, waatthuneya weera ekwaniheriwe Yoolempwa* Munepa Wootteela waahimalaaya khalayi ni eyano ya Davide mwaha wa Yudasi, yoowo aahoolenle yaale yaamvanre Yeesu." 
Acts1:17 Owo aahooneya ntoko mmoha a hiyo ni aavahiwa mpatta wa muteko ola.” 
Acts1:18 Ni ntthuvelo aakhenlaawe wa sootakhalasawe, Yudasi aathuma ematta emoha. Weiwo aamorela vathi ahoolihaka muruwaawe, erutthwaawe yaameyanyeya eriyari, ni marupowaawe yaakhuma." 
Acts1:19 Ootheene a oYerusaleemu yaasuwela yeeyo, moota wooweera ni nuulumonaya ematta ele yaahiitthaniwa Akeldama, eyo tiiyo ematta ya ephome." 
Acts1:20 Pedru aapwaherera: “Vekhaikhai, elempwale mulivuruni ya icipo: ‘Nipuronawe nikhale mathala, ni ahikhale mutthu aneera amakewo’ nitho: ‘Mukina amorele mutekwaawe.’" 
Acts1:21 Tivawo ontthuneyaaya weera nimuthanle mmoha a asilopwana yaari vamoha ni hiyo ehuhu yootheene Apwiya Yeesu yaakhalaaya variyariwahu," 
Acts1:22 okhuma opatiso wa Yohaane mpaka nihuku Yeesu aawelihingwaawe osulu variyariwahu. Ontthuneya weera mmoha a yaawo akhale namoona a ovenyererawawe vamoha ni hiyo.” 
Acts1:23 Vano yaaweemexa asilopwana eeli: Yoseefe, iithaniwa Barsaba, aasuweliwetho ni nsina na Yustu, ni Matiya." 
Acts1:24 Vahoolowaya yaavekela: “Apwiya nyuwo munsuwela mirima sa ootheene. Munoonihere taani a eeli ala munthanlalaanyu," 
Acts1:25 weera apwaherere muteko ola wa orummwa, mwa yoowo Yudasi ohiyalaawe arowaka nipuronawe.”" 
Acts1:26 Yaampaka mwaathanle, ni Matiya aathanliwa. Hiiho owo aahaandyeereriwa wa arummwa muloko nimmoha." 
Acts2:1 Niphiyaka nihuku na Pentekoste*, ootheene yaathukumana vanipuroni nimoha." 
Acts2:2 Wootutuxereya waarweela wiirimu oruma ntoko wa ettheku, ni waasareya empa yootheene ale yaakilaathiyaaya." 
Acts2:3 Yaahoona itthu soolikana ntoko malumi a mooro, ekawanyeyaka ni nlumi ti nlumi naammorela mmurumwawe mutthu ti mutthu a yaawo." 
Acts2:4 Ootheene yaasareya ni Munepa Wootteela ni yaapacera wuuluma muulumo makina ntoko Munepa waavanghaaya wuuluma. 
Acts2:5 Vano, yaakhalawo oYerusaleemu aYuda, atthu emoovaka Muluku, erweelaka wa miloko sootheene sa elapo ya vathi." 
Acts2:6 Yiiwaka oruma iwe, yaathukumanawo atthu ancipale ni yaatikhina niwoko khula mutthu aahiiwa uulumaka nuulumonaweru mwaneenaawe." 
Acts2:7 Etutuxiweene ni etikhinihiweene, yaakohana: “Moone, khaahiyono aGalileiya ootheene ala anuuluma?" 
Acts2:8 Vano, ongwereya hai khula mutthu a hiyo oniiwa yaawo yuulumaka nuulumonahu niyariwaahuno?"
