Acts2:9 Hiyo aParti, aMedi, awElamiti ni yaale ankhala oMesopotamiya, oYudeiya, oKapadosiya, oPonto ni wAsiya," 
Acts2:10 oFrisiya, oPanfiliya, wExipitu ni mipatta sa oLibiya, waattamela oKireene, aletto erweelaka wa oRooma," 
Acts2:11 aYuda nitho yaale antthara ediinaaya, aKreti ni awaRabiya. Hiyo ningwiiwa elaleiyaka miteko sitokotoko sa Muluku ni nuulumonahu asineenaahu!”" 
Acts2:12 Etutuxiweene ni etikhinihiweene, ootheene yaakohana mukina ni mukhwaawe: “Entaphulela eheeni ela?”" 
Acts2:13 Wa soothesene, akina a yaawo yaahaatheiya, yeeraka: “Awo aawuraxa eviinyu.”" 
Acts2:14 Vano Pedru aaheemela vamoha ni muloko nimmoha, ni aaweerela atthu ancipale, akhuwelaka: “Atthu a oYudeiya ni ootheene ankhala oYerusaleemu, mukihiye koothalihereni yeeyo! Mwiiwe nnenesene!" 
Acts2:15 Asilopwana ala khaahapaliwe ntoko nyuwo munuupuwelaanyu. Nlelo ela ehuhu yooxeexelo! 
Acts2:16 Ohiyanawaya, ela ti yeeyo yaahimmwale ni mprofeeti Yoweli:" 
Acts2:17 ‘Mahuku ookisera, Muluku eenre, nkihelele Munepaaka miloko sootheene. Anamwanaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana eniithalihe otthuna wa Muluku; amiravo eniyoone nyoonelo ni asitokweene eniilohe sooloha." 
Acts2:18 Mahukweene yaawo nkaahelele Munepaaka arumeiyaaka asilopwana ni asithiyana, ni awo eniithalihe otthuna wa Muluku." 
Acts2:19 Nkoonihere sootikhiniha wiirimu ni ineneero vathi va, ephome, mooro ni mahutte a mwiixi." 
Acts2:20 Nsuwa nnithatuwe epiphi, ni mweeri onuuthatuwe ephome nihinaaye ophiya nihuku ntokweene ni noovuwaxa na Apwiya." 
Acts2:21 Ni khula mutthu aniitthane Nsina na Apwiya, anaavuluxiwe.’" 
Acts2:22 aYixrayeli, mwiiwe masu ala: Muluku aamwaakhulela Yeesu a oNasarete vamaithoniwanyu niwoko na sootikhiniha, ikuru ni ineneero Muluku aapakaawe variyariwanyu mwaha wa Yeesu, ntoko nyuwo munsuwenlaanyu." 
Acts2:23 Muluku aalakela ni aalamulela khalayi weera Mulopwana Owo muvahereriwaanyu nyuwo ni ekhavihero ya atthu ootakhala. Vano mwaamwiiva, munkhomelaka vamuttandani." 
Acts2:24 Vaheera Muluku oomuvenyereriha mookhwaani, amutaphulaka wa ovoreiya wa okhwa, niwoko khawaawereya weera okhwa omvare." 
Acts2:25 Davide eenre mwaha wa Yoowo: ‘Miyo kingwoona mahuku ootheene Apwiya ohoolowaka. Awo ari moonowaaka mulopwana, tivawo miyo kihinttikinyiwaaka." 
Acts2:26 Tivawo murimaaka woohakalala ni nluminaka nootthapa; erutthwaakatho eniikhale ni oweherera," 
Acts2:27 niwoko nyuwo khamukihiya kirowaka oHadesi*, hata khamutthunihera weera Ootteelaanyu untte." 
Acts2:28 Nyuwo mookisuweliha iphiro sa okumi ni mmwikisarihe ni ohakalala vamaithoniwanyu.’ 
Acts2:29 Axunnaka, kinoowera wooleelani ni ekhaikhai weera mutokweene Davide aahookhwa, ni aavithiwa ni nihiyenawe nri variyariwahu mpaka nihuku na olelo." 
Acts2:30 Vano owo aari mprofeeti ni aasuwela weera Muluku aamuroromeliha ni nlipelo weera eera aamwiikaathi mmoha a ekhapiraawe vahiceniwawe. 
Acts2:31 Asuwelaka yeeyo ehinaaye okhumelela, owo aahuuluma sa ovenyerera wa Kristu, Yoowo ohihiiwe munihiyeni ni erutthwaawe kheehaangwe ni wunnta." 
Acts2:32 Muluku oomuvenyereriha Yeesu Owo, ni hiyo ootheene nri anamoona a etthweene yeeyo." 
Acts2:33 Avuwihiweene moono mulopwana wa Muluku, Owo aahaakhela wa Atiithi Munepa Wootteela woororomelihiwa, ni ooyeeha Yoowo ntoko nyuwo vano munoonaanyu ni muniiwaanyu." 
Acts2:34 Vano, Davide khaawenle wiirimu, mene owo mwaneenaawe aahima: ‘Apwiya yaaweerenle Apwiyaaka: Mukilaathiki moonowaaka mulopwana" 
Acts2:35 mpaka miyo kineeraaka kiwiikaathi amwiittanaanyu vathi wa inaawosanyu.’ 
Acts2:36 Tivawo aYixrayeli ootheene esuwele nnenesene yeeyo: Yeesu Owo nyuwo mwaamuthomeiyaanyu, Muluku oompaka Apwiya ni Kristu.”" 
Acts2:37 Yiiwakaru yeeyo, awo yaahoopopiheya ni yaamukoha Pedru ni arummwa akina: “Axunna, nneereke hayi?”" 
Acts2:38 Pedru aawaakhula: “Murukunxeke mirimasanyu, ni mutthu ti mutthi a nyuwo apatisiweke mwa Nsina na Yeesu Kristu wa elevelelo ya sootthekasanyu, ni mmwaakhele mahala a Munepa Wootteela." 
Acts2:39 Vano, yoororomelihiwa ela ti yawinyu, ya anamwanaanyu ni ya ootheene ari ottaiwene, ya ootheene yaawo Apwiya Mulukwaahu eneeraaya ewiitthane.”" 
Acts2:40 Ni masu mancipale makina owo aawooperera ni aahaanyeserera awo: “Mwiivuluxe wa ekhapira ela yootakhala.” 
Acts2:41 Yaawo yaakhulenle mutthengaawe, yaapatisiwa, ni nihuku nne yaahaandyeerereya wookwanaka atthu macira miloko miraru." 
Acts2:42 Awo yaakhala ni nthiti mwaha wa nihusiho na arummwa, wiiwanana, omeyanya wa epaawu ni mmavekeloni." 
Acts2:43 Ootheene yaasareya ni woova ni sootikhiniha, ni ineneero sincipale saapakiwa ni arummwa." 
Acts2:44 Ootheene yaawo yaaroromela yanniiwanana, ni yaarino sootheene vamoha." 
Acts2:45 Ethumihaka imatta ni itthusaya, awo yaakawana mutthu ti mutthu ntoko aahaawelaawe." 
Acts2:46 Mahuku ootheene yannapwaherera othukumana Mpaani mwa Muluku. Yannakawana sooca mmawannyaya ni yannaca vamoha ni ohakalala ni murima wootheene," 
Acts2:47 emuttottopelaka Muluku ni yaakhuleliwaka ni muloko wa atthu wootheene. Ni nihuku ti nihuku Apwiya yannawaandyeerera yaawo Muluku aavuluxaawe. 
Acts3:1 Nihuku nimoha Pedru ni Yohaane yaarowa Empa ya Muluku ehuhu ya nivekelo, eyo tiiyo ehuhu ya oxekuwa." 
Acts3:2 Vano, aakhala mutthu mmoha aarakanle eyareliwaawe, aaronghiwa vaavaale khula nihuku ni iikaathiwaka vamulako wa Empa ya Muluku wiitthaniwa Wooreeraxa, weera aavekele sooveka yaawo yaavolowamo." 
Acts3:3 Oonaka weera Pedru ni Yohaane yeera evolowe, aahaavekela sooveka." 
Acts3:4 Pedru ni Yohaane yaangwehexexa nnenesene, ni vano Pedru aamweerela: “Muniwehe hiyo.”" 
Acts3:5 Mulopwana ole aahaawehexexa nnenesene, awehereraka wa yaawo waakhela etthu." 
Acts3:6 Pedru aamweerela: “Nkinono musurukhu, mene yeeyo kiraakano, kinimoovahani. Mwa Nsina na Yeesu Kristu oNasarete, mweette.”" 
Acts3:7 Amvarelaka ni ntata na moono mulopwana, aamukhavihera weemela, ni woowaakuveya inaawo ni itthottopwasawe saalipa." 
Acts3:8 Vano aaheemela, anatupha, anapacera weetta. Vahoolowaya aavolowa ni yaawo Mpaani mwa Muluku, eettaka, atuphaka ni amuttottopelaka Muluku." 
Acts3:9 Omoonaka muloko wootheene owo eettaka ni amuttottopelaka Muluku," 
Acts3:10 waasuwela weera ti yoole mulopwana aakhovelela ovekela sooveka, akilaatheene vamulako wa Empa ya Muluku wiitthaniwa Wooreeraxa. Ootheene yaatikhinaxa vancipale wa yeeyo yaamukhumelenle." 
Acts3:11 Amvaraka namavekela Pedru ni Yohaane, muloko wootheene waatikhina ni waahaatthimakela yaawo mpaka nipuro niitthaniwa mulako wa Salomoni." 
Acts3:12 Oonaka yeeyo, Pedru aaweerela: “aYixrayeli, heeni ela enootikhinihaayani? Heeni nyuwo munniwehexexaanyu hiyo ntoko hiyo niwenre omweettiha mulopwana ola ni ikurusahu asineenaahu, naari ni murimaahu wa omuluku?" 
Acts3:13 Muluku a Abrahaamu, Isaaki ni Yakobe, Muluku a makholowaahu, aamvuwiha murumeiyaawe Yeesu. Ti nyuwo mwaamvaherenre weera akhwe ni ti nyuwo mwaamukhoontte vamaithoni wa Pilatu, naamwi owo alakelaka omutaphula Yeesu." 
Acts3:14 Nyuwo mwaamukhootta Ootteela ni Oororomeleya, ni mwaamvekela weera mutaphuleliwe namwiiva." 
Acts3:15 Nyuwo mwaamwiiva Mwaneene a okumi, mene Muluku aamvenyereriha mookhwaani. Hiyo nri anamoona a yeeyo." 
Acts3:16 Ti niwoko na nroromelo mwa Nsina na Yeesu, Owo omulamihalaawe mulopwana ola nyuwo mummoonaanyu ni munsuwenlaanyu. Nroromelo ninrwa wa Yoowo noomvaha ola mpuha wookwanela, ntoko ootheene mungweraanyu woona." 
Acts3:17 Axunnaka, koosuwela weera nyuwo vamoha ni asitokweenaanyu mwaapanke yeeyo niwoko na ohisuwelawanyu." 
Acts3:18 Waaritho hiiho Muluku okwanihenraawe yeeyo aahimalaawe khalayi ni iyano sa maprofeeti ootheene, yeeraka weera Kristwaawe eera ahaawe." 
Acts3:19 Vano, murukunxe mirimasanyu ni muhokoleele wa Muluku weera sootthekasanyu sikhale soomalihiwa," 
Acts3:20 weera ephiye ehuhu ya wiitthuuwa, nitho weera Owo amurumihe Yoowo mukhaliheriwaanyu Kristu, eyo tiiyo Yeesu." 
Acts3:21 Ontthuneya weera Owo akhale wiirimu, mpaka ophiya ehuhu Muluku aneeraawe areherere itthu sootheene, ntoko aahimalaawe khalayi ni iyano sa maprofeeti ootteela." 
Acts3:22 Vano Moisesi aaheera: ‘Apwiya Mulukwaanyu animookhaliherani variyariwanyu mprofeeti ntoko miyo. Mmwiiwe sootheene seiyo Owo aneeraawe ooleeleni. 
Acts3:23 Yoowo aneera ahimwiiwe Mprofeeti Owo, anaavenxiwe variyari wa mulokwaawe.’" 
Acts3:24 Mwa yeeyo maprofeeti ootheene okhuma Samuweli mpaka ohoolo, khula mutthu a yaawo, yaahima sa mahuku ala." 
Acts3:25 Ni nyuwo muri anamwane a maprofeeti ni a wiiraana Muluku aapankaawe ni makholowaanyu. Owo aamweerela Abrahaamu: ‘Niwoko na ekhapiraanyu miloko sootheene sa elapo ya vathi nsireelihiwe.’ 
Acts3:26 Muluku amvenyererihaleene murumeiyaawe, ohoorumihelani toko nyuwo weera ooreeliheni oorukunxakani nyuwo ootheene wa sootakhalasanyu.”" 
Acts4:1 Asaserdoti*, muhooleli a anakhotto a Empa ya Muluku ni aSaduki* yaamwaattamelaaya Pedru ni Yohaane, awo yeera yuulumaka ni muloko wa atthu." 
Acts4:2 Awo yaanyoonyiwa vancipale niwoko arummwa yaaxuttiha muloko wa atthu ni yaalaleiya weera mwa Yeesu wookhala ovenyererihiwa wa akhwiiye. 
Acts4:3 Yaamvara Pedru ni Yohaane ni, weenre wiilaka, yaahaawalela okaliposo mpaka oxaawaya." 
Acts4:4 Ancipale a yaawo yiiwale mutthenga yaaroromela. Vano asilopwana oororomela ootheene yaari macira miloko mithanu. 
Acts4:5 Oxaawaya ahooleli a aYuda, asitokweene ni anamawera a nlamulo* yaathukumana oYerusaleemu." 
Acts4:6 Yaari iwe Hana, mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, nitho Kayafasi, Yohaane, Alesandere ni ootheene akina yaari a emusi ya mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*." 
Acts4:7 Aalamulelakaru eeli awo weemela, awo yaapacera waakohakoha eeli ale yeeraka: “Ni ikuru heeni, hoye hoye mwa nsina nawani nyuwo mumpakaanyu yeeyo?”" 
Acts4:8 Vano Pedru, asareiyeene Munepa Wootteela, aaweerela: “Ahooleli a aYuda ni asitokweene a muloko!" 
Acts4:9 Woonaka weera olelo hiyo nohiitthaniwa weera naakhule mwaha wa muteko wooreera woonihereiye wa oorakala, nikohakohiwaka mwaha wa moota owo olamihingwaawe," 
Acts4:10 musuwele nnenesene yeeyo, asipwiiya ni muloko wootheene wa oYixrayeli: Mulopwana owo ori vawo oolamihiwa ohoolo wa asipwiiya niwoko na Nsina na Yeesu Kristu a oNasarete, mwa Yoowo nyuwo mwaamuthomeiyaanyu, mene Muluku omvenyereringhaawe mookhwaani." 
Acts4:11 Yeesu Owo ti ‘nluku nyuwo anamateka mwaakhoonttaanyu, ni naathatungwe nluku nootthuneyaxa.’" 
Acts4:12 Khoowowo ovuluxiwa mwa mukina. Khaniwowo nsina nikina nivahiwe wa atthu mwa nenno ontthuneya weera ninivuluxe.” 
Acts4:13 Yoonaka olipa murima wa Pedru ni Yohaane, ni esuwelaka weera khayaahiyono atthu oolepiweene, mene oohixuttihiwa, yaatikhina, ni yaasuwela weera awo yaakhala vamoha ni Yeesu." 
Acts4:14 Ni emoonaka iwe ni yaawo mulopwana oolamihiwa, khayaawenre ohima etthu yoowoothera." 
Acts4:15 Hiiho yaahaalamulela okhumela vaate wa eSineedriyu*, ni awo yaapacera wiiwanana yaaworu," 
Acts4:16 yeeraka: “Nneereke hai ni asilopwana awo? Ootheene ankhala oYerusaleemu ansuwela weera awo aapaka yootikhiniha yoowooneya, ni hiyo khaningwera okhootta." 
Acts4:17 Wa soothesene, weera ohiweereiye wiiwanyeyaxa variyari wa muloko, ontthuneya weera niwooperere asilopwana awo weera ehaaleele akina mwa Nsina nna.”" 
Acts4:18 Vano, ewiitthanaka veeli, yaahaalamulela weera ehileele, naari ehixuttihe mwa Nsina na Yeesu." 
Acts4:19 Pedrutho ni Yohaane yaawaakhula: “Muupuwele nnenesene asineenaanyu, asipwiiya, weera waari wooreera vamaithoni wa Muluku wiiwelela yeeyo nyuwo muntthunaanyu, ohikhanle omwiiwelela Muluku." 
Acts4:20 Khaningwera ohiya wuuluma sa seiyo noonnaahu ni niiwalaahu.” 
Acts4:21 Vahoolo wa soowoopopiha sikina, awo yaahaahiya erowaka. Khayaaphwannye moota woowaattaruxa, niwoko atthu ootheene yaamutthapela Muluku wa yeeyo yaakhumelenle." 
Acts4:22 Vano, mulopwana aalamihiwe moota wootikhiniheya, aarino iyaakha soopwaha miloko mixexe." 
Acts4:23 Ataphuliwakaru, Pedru ni Yohaane yaahokoleela wa asikhwaaya ni yaahaathalihera sootheene ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni asitokweene yaaleenlaaya." 
Acts4:24 Yiiwaka yeeyo, ootheene yaamvekela Muluku yeeraka: “Muluku onlamula soothesene, Nyuwo moopaka wiirimu, elapo ya vathi, ephareiya ni sootheene siri mwemmo!" 
Acts4:25 Nyuwo mwaahuuluma mwa Munepa Wootteela ni eyano ya murumeiyaanyu, atithihu Davide, mweeraka: ‘Heeni anyoonyiwaaya amalapo ni simvaanelaaya sa siiyo miloko sa atthu?" 
Acts4:26 Mamwene a elapo ya vathi animweemela, ni asitokweene anoothukumana weera yiittane ni Apwiya ni Kristwaaya.’" 
Acts4:27 Mwa yeeyo, Herodi ni Ponto Pilatu yaathukumana vamoha ni amalapo ni muloko wa aYixrayeli musidadeni yeela, weera emvaanelele Yeesu, mwa Yoowo munttikitthenlaanyu." 
Acts4:28 Awo yaapaka yeeyo Nyuwo mwaalakenlaanyu mwa ikurusanyu ni otthunawanyu khalayi weera ekhumelele. 
Acts4:29 Vano, Apwiya, muupuwele soowoopopihasaya, ni mwaawerihe arumeiyaanyu weera elaleiye maswaanyu ni murima woolipa." 
Acts4:30 Mookole ntatananyu weera mulamihe ni mupake ineneero ni sootikhiniha muNsinani na Murumeiyaanyu Ootteela, Yeesu.”" 
Acts4:31 Amalihaka ovekela, naathukumela nipuru nne yaathukumannaaya. Ootheene yaasareya ni Munepa Wootteela ni yaalaleiya masu a Muluku ni murima woolipa." 
Acts4:32 Ootheene a atthu ancipale yaaroromenle, yaakhala oowiiwananeene, ni yaarino muupuwelo mmoha ni murima mmoha. Khaawo aarino sooreelasawe mwaneenaawe yoowo paahi, mene yaakawana sootheene yaarinaaya." 
Acts4:33 Arummwa yannapwaherera ni ikuru sitokotoko okhalela onamoona mwaha wa ovenyerera wa Apwiya Yeesu, ni mahala matokweene yaari ni yaawo ootheene." 
Acts4:34 Khayaawowo atthu oohaawa variyariwaya, niwoko yaawo yaarino imatta, hoye hoye impa yaathumiha, yaaruuha musurukhu wa yoothumiha" 
Acts4:35 ni yaahiikaathi vanaawoni sa arummwa, enakawana ntoko yeeyo mutthu aahaawelaawe." 
Acts4:36 Yoseefe, muLeevi aayariwe oKipro, yoowo arummwa, yaamvanghaaya nsinanawe Barnaba (eyo tiiyo mwaana a nipempeso)," 
Acts4:37 aathumiha ematta emoha aarinaawe, anaruuha musurukhu ni aahiikaathi vanaawoni sa arummwa." 
Acts5:1 Mulopwana mmoha iitthaniwa Ananiya, vamoha ni amwaarawe Safira, yaathumihatho ematta." 
Acts5:2 Owo aahalano mpatta wa musurukhu, ni mpatta mukina aakuxa ni aahiikaathi vanaawoni sa arummwa. Vano amwaariye yaasuwelatho sa mpatteene yoowo." 
Acts5:3 Pedru aamukoha: “Ananiya, heeni Satana osareiyaawe mmurimanimwanyu weera mulokotthe Munepa Wootteela, mwiithokororelaka mpatta wa musurukhu mwaakhenlaanyu wa ematta?" 
Acts5:4 Eyo khayaahiyono yawinyu? Ni muthumihakaru yeeyo, musurukhutho waari wawinyu. Ewuupuwelingheni eheeni opaka etthuweene yeeyo? Nyuwo khamwaalokontthe atthu, mene Muluku." 
Acts5:5 Iiwakaru yeeyo, Ananiya aamorela vathi ni aahookhwa. Woova otokotoko wahaamorela yaawo ootheene yiiwale yeeyo yaakhumelenle." 
Acts5:6 Vano amiravo akina yaarowa, enawariha erutthwaawe, enakhumihera vaate ni yaavitha." 
Acts5:7 Siviraka iwoora tthaaru, amwaariye yaavolowa, ehisuwelaka yeeyo yaakhumelenle." 
Acts5:8 Pedru aamukoha: “Mukileele, mwaathumihale ematta ni mutteengweene yoola?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Aani, ti yoola.”" 
Acts5:9 Pedru aamweerela: “Heeni nyuwo mwaavaanelaanyu weerera Munepa wa Apwiya? Moone, inaawo sa yaawo yaavithale aiyinyu siri vamulako, ni awo animookuxanitho.”" 
Acts5:10 Ehuhuweene yeele emoharu owo aamorela vathi ni aahookhwa. Vano amiravo yaavolowa, ni ephwanyaka muttembo, yaakuxa ni yaavitha mukerekhere wa aiyawe." 
Acts5:11 Woova otokotoko waasareya ekerexa yootheene ni wa yaawo ootheene yiiwale wuulummwa wa sookhumelela iye. 
Acts5:12 Arummwa yaapaka ineneero ni sootikhiniha sincipale variyari wa muloko wa atthu. Ootheene yaaroromenle, yannakhovelela othukumana muntthekoni wa Salomoni." 
Acts5:13 Wa akina, khaawo eerenre wiitakansa ni yaawo, naamwi muloko wa atthu wootheene waahima sooreera sa yaawo." 
Acts5:14 Asilopwana ni asithiyana Yaawo yaaroromela mwa Apwiya yannaandyeerereya," 
Acts5:15 moota wooweera muloko waakuxa aretta mmuseweni ni waawiikaathi mmabeettini ni mmarepani weera aaviraka Pedru, mano erungwaawe yaakhuneele akina a yaale." 
Acts5:16 Yaahoorwa atthu ancipale a isidade saattamenle oYerusaleemu, yaaruuhaka arettaaya ni yaawo yaahooxiwa ni minepa soonanara, ni ootheene yaalamihiwa." 
Acts5:17 Vano mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* ni ootheene yaawo yaamuhoola, yaale yaari mpatta wa aSaduki*, yaasareya nrima." 
Acts5:18 Yaahaavara arummwa ni yaahaawalela mukaliposo mwa ebooma. 
Acts5:19 Ehuhutho ya ohiyu, ndyelo mmoha a Apwiya aahula masele a okaliposo ni aahaakhumihera vaate," 
Acts5:20 aweerelaka: “Murowe, mwiixoonihere Mpaani mwa Muluku, ni mwathalihere muloko mutthenga wootheene wa okumi ola.”" 
Acts5:21 Oxaawaya, yaavolowa Mpaani mwa Muluku ntoko yaalamuleliwaaya, ni yaapacera oxuttiha muloko wa atthu. Aphiyakaru mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* ni yaawo yaamuhoola, awo yaahiitthana eSineedriyu*, eyo tiiyo muthukumano wootheene wa asitokweene a aYixrayeli, ni yaalamulela waarowela arummwa okaliposo." 
Acts5:22 Wa soothesene, ephiyakaru mukaliposo, anamalipelela khayaaphwannyemo. Vano yaahokolowa ni yaathaliha:" 
Acts5:23 “Noophwanya okaliposo olipihiweene nnenesene ni anamalipelela ohoolo wa milako, mene nihulakaru, khaawowo mutthu.”" 
Acts5:24 Yiiwalaaya ethalihero yeeyo, mutokweene a anakhotto a Empa ya Muluku ni ahooleli a asaserdoti* yaatikhina, yuupuwelaka yaari eheeni yeele." 
Acts5:25 Wa yeeyo, aaphiya mukina ni aaheera: “Asilopwana nyuwo mwaawalenlaanyu okaliposo ari Mpaani mwa Muluku, exuttihaka muloko wa atthu.”" 
Acts5:26 Arowaka weiwo ni asitokweene akina a anakhotto, mutokweene a anakhotto aahaakuxa arummwa aaronghaka oSineedriyuni*, mene khayaakuxera ikuru, niwoko yoova weera muloko wa atthu oniwaavonye maluku." 
Acts5:27 Yaakuxaka arummwa, yaahaarongha oSineedriyuni* weera ekohakohiwe ni mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*," 
Acts5:28 mwa yoowo aaweerenle: “Nohoolamulelani nnenesene weera muhixuttihe mwa Nsina nne. Wa soothesene, nyuwo moosariha oYerusaleemu ni nihusihonanyu, ni muntthuna onoothera ephome ya Mulopwana Owo.”" 
Acts5:29 Pedru ni arummwa akina yaamwaakhula: “Ontthuneya omwiiwelela toko Muluku, ohikhanle wa atthu." 
Acts5:30 Muluku a makholowaahu aamuvenyereriha Yeesu, mwa Yoowo nyuwo mwaamwiivalaanyu, munthomeyaka vamuttandani." 
Acts5:31 Muluku aamvuwiha, amwiikaathiki moonowaawe mulopwana ntoko Mutokweene ni Mvuluxa, weera aavahe aYixrayeli orukunxa murima ni elevelelo ya soottheka." 
Acts5:32 Hiyo nri anamoona a itthusene seiya, nitho Munepa Wootteela Muluku aavanghaawe yaale ammwiiwelela.”" 
Acts5:33 Yiiwaka yeeyo, awo yaanyoonyiwa vancipale ni yaatthuna owiiva." 
Acts5:34 Vano muFarisi* mmoha iitthaniwa Gamaliyeli, namawera a nlamulo* ni oottittimihiwa ni muloko wootheene, aaheemela muSineedriyuni* ni aavekela weera arummwa ekhumihiwe wa ehuhu vakhaani." 
Acts5:35 Vano aaweerela: “aYixrayeli, muupuwele nnenesene yeeyo nyuwo muntthunaanyu waapakela atthu awo." 
Acts5:36 Wa ehuhu ya khalayi vakhaani, aahoorwa Theuda eeraka weera ti mutokweene mukina, ni wookwanaka asilopwana macira maxexe yaathukumana vamoha ni yoowo. Owo aahiiviwa, ni ootheene yaamutthara yaamwareiya, ni sootheene saamala siiyoweene." 
Acts5:37 Vahoolowawe, wa mahukuni a namalepela aahoorwa Yudasi muGalileiya, aahoolenle atthu akina weera ewane. Owo aahiiviwatho, ni ootheene yaamutthara yaamwareiya." 
Acts5:38 Tivawo, mwaha wa atthu awo ari vaate, miyo kinimoolakani: Mwaahiye ni murettele asilopwana awo, ni mwaataphule. Waari weera otthunawaya ni mitekosaya siri sa omutthu, sinoomala," 
Acts5:39 mene sakhumelela wa Muluku, nyuwo khamungwera owooceeliha, ni munookhala ngwoopihani owana ni Muluku.”" 
Acts5:40 Awo yaaviriyeliwa ni masu a Gamaliyeli. Yaawiitthana arummwa ni yaalamulela weera ewaaxuliwe. Vahoolowaya yaahaalamulela weera ehuulume mwa Nsina na Yeesu, ni yaahaahiya erowaka." 
Acts5:41 Arummwa yaavenya oSineedriyuni*, ehakalanleene yaaphwanelihiwa oyevihiwa niwoko na Nsina na Yeesu." 
Acts5:42 Mahuku ootheene Mpaani mwa Muluku ni empa ti empa, awo khayaahiya oxuttiha ni olaleiya weera Yeesu ti Kristu." 
Acts6:1 Mahukweene yaale, waandyeerereyaka waatta wa oohusera, aYuda yuulumale vaGrego variyariwaya yaahaattaandawula yaale yuulumale vaHeberi, niwoko asinaamukhwelaaya yannattiwaliwa mwa sookhaviherana sa khula nihuku." 
Acts6:2 Tivawo muloko neeli yaathukumanyinghaaya oohusera ootheene eweerelaka: “Kheehiyono etthu yooreera weera hiyo nihiye masu a Muluku weera nirumeele vameesani. 
Acts6:3 Axunna, mwaathanle variyariwanyu asilopwana athanneeli a onamoona wooreera, oosareya ni Munepa ni a miruku. Hiyo ninrowa waakhalihera muteko ola," 
Acts6:4 ni hiyo nniivaherera ni nthiti mmavekeloni ni mmutekoni wa masu.” 
Acts6:5 Vano maswaaya yaahaasiveliha atthu ootheene, ni yaamuthanla Stefano, mulopwana oosareya nroromelo ni Munepa Wootteela, ni Filipe, Prokoro, Nikanori, Timoni, Parmena ni Nikolawu, oohusera mmoha a ediini ya aYuda arweelaka wAntiyokiya." 
Acts6:6 Yaawoonihera asilopwana ale arummwa, mwa yaawo yaahaavekelela ni yaawiikaathera matata." 
Acts6:7 Hiiho masu a Muluku yaamwareela. Wannasareya woowaakuveya waatta wa oohusera oYerusaleemu, nitho asaserdoti* ancipale yaahiiwelela nroromelo." 
Acts6:8 Stefano, mulopwana oosareya mahala ni ikuru sa Muluku, annapaka sootikhiniha sitokotoko ni ineneero variyari wa muloko." 
Acts6:9 Wa soothesene, yaavenya akina a eSinagoga* yiitthaniwa ya Oneethi, eyo tiiyo aYuda a oKireene ni wAlesandriya, vamoha ni aYuda a oSilisiya ni wAsiya. Asilopwaneene yaawo yaapacera ovaanyihana ni Stefano," 
Acts6:10 mene khayaawenre otapanyiha miruku ni Munepa mwa Yoowo owo uulumaawe. 
Acts6:11 Vano yaahaasesera akina muxiirini weera ehime: “Noomwiiwa Stefano uulumaka masu oomuveiha Moisesi ni Muluku.” 
Acts6:12 Ni yeeyo yaasesera muloko, asitokweene ni anamawera a nlamulo*. Emuvaraka Stefano, yaamukuxa emuronghaka oSineedriyuni*." 
Acts6:13 Weiwo yaahiixoonihera anamoona oolokottha yeeraka: “Mulopwana ola khammaala wuulumela Nipuro Nootteela* nna ni nlamulo. 
Acts6:14 Noomwiiwa eeraka weera Yeesu Owo oNasarete anaaphwate nipuro nna ni anaaceendye ikhovelelo Moisesi aanivanghaawe.” 
Acts6:15 Engwehaka ole, ootheene yaakilaathiye muSineedriyuni* yaahoona weera ekhovaawe yaalikana ni ekhove ya ndyelo." 
Acts7:1 Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* aamukoha: “Soowoothera iya ti sa ekhaikhai?” 
Acts7:2 Mwa yeeyo owo aahaakhula: “Axunna ni asitiithi, mukiiwe: Muluku oovuwaxa aahiixoonihera wa atithihu Abrahaamu awo ereene nlelo oMesopotamiya, ehinaaye omaka oHara, ni aaweerela:" 
Acts7:3 ‘Muhiye elapwaanyu ni emusaanyu, ni murowe wa elapo Miyo kineeraaka kiwoonihereni.’" 
Acts7:4 Hiiho awo yaavenya elapo ya oKaldeiya ni yaamaka oHara. Vahoolo wa okhwa wa atithaya, Muluku aahaaruuha wa elapo ela mwa yeeyo nyuwo mummakaanyu vaanaano vaava." 
Acts7:5 Khaavanghe yoohiyeriwa* hata vakhaani mweelaponi ela. Mulukutho aaroromeliha weera Abrahaamu, ni vahoolowawe ekhapiraawetho, eniiphwanye elapo ela, naamwi ehuhuweene yeele ahaakhanleno anamwane." 
Acts7:6 Vano Muluku aamuleela moota ola: “Ekhapiraanyu eniikhale anamarwa mweelaponi mwa amalapo, ni eniikhalihiwe ipottha ni eniihooxiwe wa iyaakha miloko mixexe." 
Acts7:7 Kinoottaruxa muloko mwa yoowo ikhapira iyo sineeraaya sirumeele ntoko ipottha, ni vahoolowaya awo eniivenye weiwo ni eniikilape mweelaponimu." 
Acts7:8 Aamvaha Abrahaamu wiiraana wa wiineliwa. Hiiho aamuyara Isaaki, ni Abrahaamu aamwiinela eviraka mahuku mathannamararu a oyariwawawe. Vahoolowaya Isaaki aamuyara Yakobe ni Yakobe aahaayara asitokweene muloko neeli." 
Acts7:9 Asitokweene awo emukhalelaka nrima Yoseefe, yaamuthumiha ntoko epottha ya wExipitu. Mulukutho aari ni yoowo," 
Acts7:10 ni aamoopola wa soohooxasawe sootheene, amvahaka Yoseefe mahala ni miruku vamaithoni wa Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu. Hiiho owo aamukhaliha ntoko guvernadori a wExipitu ni a empaawe etokotoko yootheene ya mwene." 
Acts7:11 Vahoolowaya yaakhumelela etala wExipitu wootheene ni oKanaani, eruuhaka ohaawa otokotoko, ni makholowaahu khayaaphwanya yooca." 
Acts7:12 Iiwaka weera yaakhala etrigu wExipitu, Yakobe aahaarumiha makholowaahu wa mukwahaawe woopacera." 
Acts7:13 Wa mukwaha wanaaveeli, Yoseefe aahaasuweliha weera owo aari munnaya, ni Farawu* aasuwelihiwatho emusaawe Yoseefe." 
Acts7:14 Vahoolowaya, Yoseefe, aahaarumiha omuruuhela atithawe Yakobe ni amusaawe ootheene, woophiya atthu 75." 
Acts7:15 Vano Yakobe aarowa wExipitu, weiwo okhwenlaawewo nitho vahoolowaya makholowaahu." 
Acts7:16 Makhuvaaya yaahokoloxeriwa oSikhemi ni yaavithiwa mmahiyeni Abrahaamu aathumalaawe weiwo ni mutteengo mukina wa anamwane a Emoori oSikhemi. 
Acts7:17 Ekhuveelaka ehuhu Muluku eeraawe akwanihere yoororomelihaawe wa Abrahaamu, aahaandyeerera vancipale, waatta wa mulokwaahu wExipitu." 
Acts7:18 Vano, mwene mukina ahaasuwenle mwaha wa Yoseefe aapacera olamula wExipitu." 
Acts7:19 Owo aavaanelela moota woolokottha mulokwaahu ni aahooxa makholowaahu, anyesererihaka waahiya anamwanaaya ooyariwa vaanaano weera ehikhale ni okumi." 
Acts7:20 Ehuhuweene yeele aayariwa Moisesi, mwa yoowo aari ooreeraxa vamaithoni wa Muluku. Wa nyeeri miraru owo aahuwiwa vaate wa atithawe." 
Acts7:21 Ahiiwakaru, mwaana muthiyana a Farawu* aamukuxa ni aamuhuwa ntoko mwanawe mwaneenaawe." 
Acts7:22 Moisesi aaxuttihiwa ni miruku sootheene sa atthu a wExipitu, ni aari oowera mmasuni ni mmitekonimwawe." 
Acts7:23 Akwanihaka iyaakha miloko mixexe, Moisesi aalakela orowa waaxekura axunneiye aYixrayeli." 
Acts7:24 Amoonaka mmoha a yaawo ahasuliwaka ni ngwExipitu mukina, aamwaakiha oohasuliwa ni aamwiinlela ikuhu, amwiivaka ngwExipitu." 
Acts7:25 Moisesi aahuupuwela weera axunneiye yeera yiiwexexe weera Muluku eera amvarelaka muteko weera aavuluxe, mene awo khayiiwexenxe." 
Acts7:26 Oxaawaya, Moisesi aarowa wa aYixrayeli eeli yaawana, ni aaheerera owiiraaniha, eeraka: ‘Asilopwana, nyuwo muri axunna. Heeni mumvulalihanaanyu?’" 
Acts7:27 Vano mulopwana aamuhasula mukhwaawe, aamukakha Moisesi ni aamweerela: ‘Taani ookhalihale muhooleli ni mphukaahu?" 
Acts7:28 Ontthuna okiive ntoko omwiivalaawo ngwExipitu osilo?’ 
Acts7:29 Iiwaka yeeyo, Moisesi aatthawela oMidiya, weiwo aamakaawe, akhalaka ntoko namarwa, ni aakhalanawo anamwane asilopwana eeli." 
Acts7:30 Siviraka iyaakha miloko mixexe, areene owo munikareni vakhiviru wa mwaako Sinayi, aahiixoonihera wa Moisesi ndyelo mmoha mmalumini a niphuwa nivarelaka." 
Acts7:31 Oonaka yeeyo, aatikhinaxa. Vano, aattamelaka weera awehexexe, aahiiwa nsu na Apwiya neeraka:" 
Acts7:32 ‘Miyo ti Muluku a makholowaanyu, Muluku a Abrahaamu, Isaaki ni Yakobe.’ Moisesi, athukumelaka ni woova, kheerera oweha." 
Acts7:33 Apwiya yaamweerela: ‘Murule ikwakwaattasanyu, niwoko nipuro nna muraanyu ti nootteela." 
Acts7:34 Kaahoona ohaawa wa mulokwaaka wExipitu. Kaahiiwa wiikhupanyerawaya ni kaakhuruwela weera kivuluxe. Ngwe vaanaano va, ni kinimoorumihani ohokoleela wExipitu.’" 
Acts7:35 Ola ti Moiseseene yoowo aYixrayeli yaamukhoonttaaya ni masu ala: ‘Taani ookhalihale muhooleli ni mphuki?’ Owo aarumihiwa ni Muluku muneenaawe weera akhale muhooleli ni mvuluxaaya niwoko na ndyelo iixoonihenre wa yoowo muniphuwani. 
Acts7:36 Owo aahaakhumiha weiwo, apakaka sootikhiniha ni ineneero wExipitu, mphareiyani yooxeera ni munikareni wa iyaakha miloko mixexe." 
Acts7:37 Owo ti Moiseseene yoowo aaweerenle aYixrayeli: ‘Muluku anaamukhalihe variyari wa axunninyu mprofeeti ntoko miyo.’ 
Acts7:38 Owo aakhala mmuthukumanoni munikareni vamoha ni ndyelo aamuulumenlaawe vamwaakoni oSinayi ni vamoha ni makholowaahu. Vano aakhenle masu makumi weera anileele hiyo. 
Acts7:39 Makholowaahutho yaakhootta omwiiwelela. Ohiyanawaya, yaamukhootta, ni mmirimanimwaya yaahokoleela wExipitu." 
Acts7:40 Awo yaamweerela Aharoni: ‘Munipakele miluku sineera sinihoole. Wa Moisesi owo aanikhumihale wExipitu, khanisuwenle emukhumelenle.’" 
Acts7:41 Ehuhuweene yeele yaapaka muluku mukina ni ekhalelo ya emombe ekhaaneene. Yaaruuhela soovaha ni yaahakalalela yeeyo matataaya yaapankaaya. 
Acts7:42 Mulukutho aasusa wa yaawo ni aahaaveleela olapela ithenyeeri sa wiirimu ntoko elempwalaaya mulivuruni ya maprofeeti: ‘aYixrayeli, apaale mwaaruuhela soovaha ni sooveleela wa Miyo wa iyaakha miloko mixexe munikareni?" 
Acts7:43 Hoye! Ohiyanawaya, mwaamutekela eheema Molokhi ni ethenyeeri ya muluku Refani, miluku mwaapankaanyu weera mulape. Tivawo, Miyo nkoothaamihereni mpaka mpatta mukina wa oBabiloniya.’" 
Acts7:44 Munikareni makholowaahu yaarino etabernaakulu* ya onamoona, yaapakiwe ntoko ekhalelo Moisesi oonnaawe mwaha wa nlamulo Muluku aamvanghaawe." 
Acts7:45 Yaavolowaaya elapo ya miloko Muluku oomonlaawe ohoolo wa aYixrayeli, makholowaahu yaakuxa etabernaakulu* emuttharaka muhooleli Yoxuwa. Etabernaakulu* ele yaakhala weiwo mpaka ehuhu ya Davide," 
Acts7:46 mwa yoowo aaphwanya mahala vamaithoni wa Muluku, ni aamvekela Muluku weera amutthunihere oteka woomaka wa Muluku a Yakobe." 
Acts7:47 Vaheera aari Salomoni aamupakenle empa. 
Acts7:48 Wa soothesene, Musulusulu khammaka impa soopakiwa ni atthu. Ntoko ohimalaawe mprofeeti:" 
Acts7:49 ‘Wiirimu ti ehicaaka, ni elapo nipuro na inaawosaka. Moota heeni wa empa nyuwo muneeraanyu mukipakele, aneera Apwiya, hoye hoye woowi nneeraaya nikhale nipuronaka noowiitthuuwa?" 
Acts7:50 Khanihiyono ntatanaka nipanke itthusene seiya sootheene?’ 
Acts7:51 Muloko woohiiwelela, woohiineliwa mmirimanimwanyu ni mmaarunimwanyu! Nyuwo munoolikana ni makholowaanyu – mahuku ootheene munnakhootta Munepa Wootteela!" 
Acts7:52 Mprofeeti heeni makholowaanyu ahimusoondalaaya? Yaawiiva yaale yaahima sa orwa wa Oororomeleya, mwa Yoowo nyuwo vano mootatuxiwa anamavarihaawe ni anamwiivaawe." 
Acts7:53 Nyuwo mwaakhenle nlamulo wa andyelo, mene khamuniiwelela.”" 
Acts7:54 Yiiwaka yeeyo, yaanyoonyiwa ni yaamukhuurihela maino Stefano." 
Acts7:55 Stefanotho, oosareya Munepa Wootteela, aaweha osulu ni aahoona ovuwa wa Muluku, ni Yeesu eemenleene moono mulopwana wa Muluku," 
Acts7:56 ni aaheera: “Moone, kinoona wiirimu woohuleya ni Mwaana a mutthu eemenleene moono mulopwana wa Muluku.”" 
Acts7:57 Vano awo yaattiyela maaru ni, ekhuwelaka ni nsu ntokotoko, ootheene yaamutuphela yoowo." 
Acts7:58 Yaamupurulela okerekhere wa esidade, enapacera omvonya maluku. Anamoona yaahiya mikaandyosaya vamanaawoni a mmiravo iitthaniwa Sawuli." 
Acts7:59 Emvonyaka maluku Stefano, owo aavekela eeraka: “Apwiya Yeesu, mwaakhele munepaaka.”" 
Acts7:60 Vano aakokhora ni aakhuwela: “Ohaalikeleiye mulattu wa yaawo mwaha wa yoottheka ela.” Ni ahimaka yeeyo, aahookhwa." 
Acts8:1 Ni Sawulitho aahaakhulela wiiviwa wa Stefano. Vanihukuni nne waakhumelela osoondiwa otokotoko ni ekerexa ya oYerusaleemu. Ootheene ehikhanle arummwa yaamwaramwareya mweelaponi ya oYudeiya ni oSamariya. 
Acts8:2 Atthu akina a murima wa omuluku yaamvitha Stefano ni yaamulalamikela vancipale. 
Acts8:3 Vano Sawuli aapacera ophwata ekerexa. Arowaka empa ti empa, aahaatthuka alopwana ni athiyana ni aahaavonyera mukaliposo." 
Acts8:4 Yaawo yaamwalamwanle, yannalaleiya masu a Muluku weiwo yaatthunaaya orowa." 
Acts8:5 Aphiyaka Filipe esidade emoha, iwe aahaalaleera sa Kristu." 
Acts8:6 Atthu ancipale emwiiwaka Filipe, ni yoonaka ineneero sootikhiniheya owo aapakaawe, awo yaahiiwa nnenesene yeeyo Filipe aahimaawe." 
Acts8:7 Minepa soonanara saavenya wa atthu ancipale sikhuwelaka, ni ooheetta ni ootuthunya ancipale yaalamihiwa." 
Acts8:8 Hiiho waakhala ohakalala otokotoko wa esidade ele. 
Acts8:9 Vano, aakhala mulopwana mmoha musidadeni mmwe iitthaniwa Simeyoni. Apakaka sa okhwiri wa ehuhu ekina, aatikhiniha muloko wootheene wa oSamariya. Owo iixeera oottittimiheyaxa," 
Acts8:10 ni muloko wootheene, okhuma asikhaani mpaka asitokweene, yaahiiwa yeeriwaka: “Mulopwana ola ti ikuru sa Muluku, oosuweliwa ntoko ikuru sitokotoko.”" 
Acts8:11 Awo yaamutthara, niwoko owo ahaatikhiniha ni macittaawe wa ehuhu yincipale." 
Acts8:12 Vanonto, aalaleeraka Filipe masu ooreeraxa a omwene wa Muluku ni a Nsina na Yeesu Kristu, awo yaamuroromela ni yaapatisiwa – alopwana nitho athiyana." 
Acts8:13 Simeyoneene yoowo aaroromelatho ni aapatisiwa. Aamutthara Filipe woohimuhiyerera, awehaka ootikhinihiweene ineneero sitokotoko ni sootikhiniha saapakiwa." 
Acts8:14 Yiiwaka arummwa a oYerusaleemu weera aSamariya yaahaakhulela masu a Muluku, yaamurumiha weiwo Pedru ni Yohaane." 
Acts8:15 Awo ephiyaka, yaahaavekelela aSamariya a nroromelo weera yaakhele Munepa Wootteela," 
Acts8:16 niwoko Munepa nlelo khawaamukhuruwenle naari mutthu mmoha a yaale. Awo yaapatisiwa mwa Nsina na Apwiya Yeesu paahi. 
Acts8:17 Vano Pedru ni Yohaane yaawiikaathera matata, ni awo yaahaakhela Munepa Wootteela." 
Acts8:18 Oonaka Simeyoni weera Munepa waavahiwa ni wiikaatheriwa matata a arummwa, aakhumiha musurukhu weera aavahe," 
Acts8:19 ni aaweerela: “Mukivahetho ikuru iya weera mutthu kineeraaka kimwiikaathere matata, aakhele Munepa Wootteela.”" 
Acts8:20 Pedru aamwaakhula: “Muriheye vamoha ni musurukhwaanyu! Munuupuwela weera munoowera othuma yamahala ya Muluku ni musurukhu? 
Acts8:21 Khamunono mpatta naari ikuru mmutekonimu, niwoko murimaanyu khooreenre ohoolo wa Muluku." 
Acts8:22 Murukunxe murimaanyu wa yoonarara ela ni mwaavekele Apwiya. Apaale awo eniyooleveleleni wuupuwela wu mmurimanimwanyu," 
Acts8:23 niwoko kinoona weera nyuwo moosareyaxa nrima ni ootthukiweene ni soottheka.” 
Acts8:24 Vano Simeyoni aamwaakhula: “Mukivekelele miyo wa Apwiya weera ehikikhumelele naari etthu emoha ya seiyo munuulumaanyu.” 
Acts8:25 Emalihaka okhalela onamoona ni olaleiya masu a Apwiya, Pedru ni Yohaane yaahokoleela oYerusaleemu, elaleiyaka masu ooreeraxa mmittettheni sincipale sa aSamariya." 
Acts8:26 Ndyelo mmoha a Apwiya aamweerela Filipe: “Murowe ohitto wa ephiro yoothowa atthu enrowa oYerusaleemu mpaka oGaza.” 
Acts8:27 Hiiho owo aavenya, ni eettaka mphironi, aamoona enoko* wEtiyopiya, mutokweene oottittimiheyaxa a Kandasi*, eyo tiiyo pwiyamwene a wEtiyopiya, namalamula a mihakhusawe sootheene. Mulopwana owo aarweenle oYerusaleemu weera alape," 
Acts8:28 ni vano aahokoleela owaani, akilaathiyeene mukaaronimwawe asomaka elivuru ya mprofeeti Yesaya." 
Acts8:29 Munepa waamweerela Filipe: “Mwaattamele ekaaro ele ni mweette ni yeeyo.” 
Acts8:30 Vano Filipe aatthimakela ekaaro, aamwiiwa mulopwana asomaka elivuru ya mprofeeti Yesaya, ni aamukoha: “Nyuwo munimwiiwexexa yeeyo munsomaanyu?”" 
Acts8:31 Owo aamwaakhula: “Nkiiwexexe hai, ahikhanle mukina onkithalihera?” Hiiho aamwiitthana Filipe weera awele ni weera akilaathi mukerekheremwawe." 
Acts8:32 Mulopwana owo aamweera osoma mpatta ola wa Yoolempwa*: “Aakuxiwa ntoko ekhondoolo enronghiwa vanipuroni na wiiviwa, ni ntoko eputtiputthi yoomaala vamaithoni wa namamettha, Owo khaahunle eyanowaawe." 
Acts8:33 Mooyevihiwanimwawe aakhoottihiwa ekhaikhai. Taani ongwera wuuluma sa ekhapiraawe, niwoko okumaawe ovenxiwe mweelaponi.”" 
Acts8:34 Vano enoko* ole aamukoha Filipe: “Dyoontte, mukileele, mprofeeti onuuluma sa taani – onuuluma sa muneenaawe, naari sa mukina?”" 
Acts8:35 Filipe, apaceraka ni mpatta ole wa Yoolempwa*, aamulaleera masu ooreeraxa a Yeesu." 
Acts8:36 Yeettaka mphironi, yaaphiya vanipuroni yaaraayawo maahi. Enoko* aamweerela: “Moone, va aakhala maahi. Enkooceeliha eheeni weera kipatisiwe?”" 
Acts8:37  
Acts8:38 Hiiho aalamulela weera yeemele ekaaro. Vano Filipe ni enoko* yaakhuruwela mmaahini ni Filipe aamupatisa. 
Acts8:39 Ekhumaka mmaahini, Munepa wa Apwiya waamukuxa Filipe woowaakuveya, ni mulopwana ole khaamoonnetho. Wa soothesene, aapwaherera mukwahaawe asareiyeene ni ohakalala." 
Acts8:40 Filipe aaphwanyiwa wAzoto, ni eetteettaka, aalaleiya masu ooreeraxa mmittettheni sootheene, mpaka ophiya oSesareya." 
Acts9:1 Yeereiyaka yeeyo, Sawuli aatepaxa owoopopihera okhwa oohuseraaya Apwiya. Aarowa wa mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*" 
Acts9:2 amvekelaka ikaratta wa iSinagoga sa oDamasku, sineera weera aaphwanya weiwo alopwana, hoye hoye athiyana ari a Ephiro, awere waakuxa ootthukiweene, aaronghaka oYerusaleemu." 
Acts9:3 Eettaka hiihaale, akhuveelaka oDamasku, vaanaanoru waahaara waara mukhwipimwawe okhumelelaka wiirimu." 
Acts9:4 Owo aamorela vathi ni aahiiwa nsu naamweerela: “Sawuli, Sawuli, heeni nyuwo munkisoondaanyu?”" 
Acts9:5 Sawuli aakoha: “Nyuwo taani Apwiya?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Miyo Yeesu, mwa Yoowo nyuwo munimusoondaanyu." 
Acts9:6 Muvenye ni mwavolowe musidade, vano mukina anooleeleni yeeyo entthuneya weera mupakeke nyuwo.”" 
Acts9:7 Alopwana yeentte vamoha ni Sawuli yaaheemela ootikhineene, niwoko yaahiiwa nsu, mene khayaamoonne mutthu." 
Acts9:8 Sawuli aavenya vathi, ni ahulaka maitho, khaawenre woona etthu. Hiiho yaamukuxa emvarelaka matata mpaka oDamasku." 
Acts9:9 Wookwana mahuku mararu owo aari oohoona, ni khaaciiye, naari khaawunre." 
Acts9:10 oDamasku aakhala oohusera mmoha iitthaniwa Ananiya. Apwiya yaamwiitthana mmooneloni, yeeraka: “Ananiya.” Owo aawaakhula: “Kiri va, Apwiya.”" 
Acts9:11 Apwiya yaamweerela: “Murowe owannyawe Yudasi, mmuseweni oniitthaniwa Woowookowa, ni mwakohakohe weiwo sa mulopwana mmoha a oTarso oniitthaniwa Sawuli. Owo onoovekela," 
Acts9:12 ni mmooneloni aamoona mulopwana mmoha iitthaniwa Ananiya aphiyaka ni amwiiyaatheraka matata weera oonetho.” 
Acts9:13 Ananiya aawaakhula: “Apwiya kohiiwa itthu sincipale sa mulopwana owo ni sa soonanara sootheene owo onaapakelaawe ootteelaanyu ari oYerusaleemu. 
Acts9:14 Owo aaphiya va ni ikuru sa ahooleli a asaserdoti* weera aatthuke ootheene aniitthana Nsinananyu.” 
Acts9:15 Apwiyatho yaamweerela Ananiya: “Muroweke, mulopwana owo ti exaavaaka yoothanliwa weera ekuxe Nsinanaka wa amalapo, mamwenaaya ni wa muloko wa aYixrayeli." 
Acts9:16 Miyo nkimoonihere sootheene owo aneeraawe ahaawe niwoko na Nsinanaka.” 
Acts9:17 Vano Ananiya aarowa, anavolowa mpaani, anamwiikaathera matata, anamweerela: “Munna Sawuli, Apwiya Yeesu yiixoonihenre wa nyuwo mphironi mwaarwaanyuwo, aakirumiha weera nyuwo moonetho ni musareye Munepa Wootteela.”" 
Acts9:18 Woowaakuveya itthu sinlikana ntoko makamba saamora mmaithoni mwa Sawuli ni owo aahoonatho. Aavenya, aapatisiwa," 
Acts9:19 ni acaakaru, aalipa mmakhuvani. Sawuli aalekela mahuku makina ni oohusera a oDamasku." 
Acts9:20 Khuluwi aapacera olaleiya muSinagogani* weera Yeesu ti Mwaana a Muluku. 
Acts9:21 Ootheene yaale yaamwiiwa, yaatikhina ni yaakoha: “Khahiyono owo mulopwana ole aasaasa waaphwata oYerusaleemu yaale aniitthana Nsina nna? Ni khaarweenletho va weera aaronghe ootthukiweene wa ahooleli a asaserdoti*?”" 
Acts9:22 Wa soothesene, Sawuli annatepa wiilipihera, ni annaavaanya aYuda yaakhala oDamasku, awooniheraka weera Yeesu ti Kristu." 
Acts9:23 Eviraka mahuku mancipale, aYuda yaavaanela omwiiva Sawuli," 
Acts9:24 mene owo aasuwelihiwa yoovaanelaaya. Ohiyu ni othana awo yaawehaweha milako sa esidade weera emwiive. 
Acts9:25 Oohuseratho yaamukuxa ohiyu omoha ni yaamukuruxela mmuttaankani emvirihaka vanlakani na exiri. 
Acts9:26 Aphiyaka oYerusaleemu, aaheerera wiithukumanyiha ni oohusera, mene ootheene yaamoova, ehiroromelaka weera aari oohusera a ekhaikhai." 
Acts9:27 Vano Barnaba aamukuxa amuronghaka wa arummwa. Owo aahaathalihera moota owo aawoonnaawe Apwiya mphironi, mwa yaawo yaamuleela, ni moota owo aalaleiyaawe ni murima woolipa oDamasku mwa Nsina na Yeesu." 
Acts9:28 Hiiho Sawuli aakhala ni yaawo, ni eetta oohooceelihiwa uulumaka ni murima woolipa mwa Nsina na Apwiya." 
Acts9:29 Uulumano aGrego ni annavaanyihana ni yaawo, mene awo yaaheerera omwiiva." 
Acts9:30 Asuwelaka yeeyo, axunna yaamukuxa mpaka oSesareya ni yaamurumiha oTarso." 
Acts9:31 Ekerexa yaakhalano ehuhu ekina ya murettele oYudeiya, oGalileiya ni oSamariya wootheene. Eyo yaamwiipuhiha ni, elipihiweene ni Munepa Wootteela, yaandyeerereya atthu oororomela, yeettaka mowoovani Apwiya." 
Acts9:32 Eetteettaka ilapo sootheene, Pedru aarowa waaxekura ootteela yaakhala oLida." 
Acts9:33 Iwe aamuphwanya mulopwana mmoha ooheetta, iitthaniwa Aneya, aakhala vabeettini wa iyaakha ithannatthaaru." 
Acts9:34 Pedru aamweerela: “Aneya, Yeesu Kristu onimoolamihani. Muvenye ni mureherere ebeettaanyu.” Owo aavenya woowaakuveya." 
Acts9:35 Ootheene yaakhala oLida ni elapo ya oSarona yaamoona, ni yaahaarukunxela mirimasaya Apwiya." 
Acts9:36 Vano, aakhala oYope oohusera muthiyana mmoha iithaniwa Tabita (eyo tiiyo yootaphuleliwa Dorka), mwa yoowo aakhala ni nthiti opaka miteko sooreera ni ovaha soovaha." 
Acts9:37 Wa mahuku ale owo aavoreiwa ni aahookhwa, ni erapihakaru erutthwaawe, yaahiikaathiwa mukwartuni mwa empa ya musulu." 
Acts9:38 Esidade ya oLida yaari vakhiviru wa oYope, ni oohusera yiiwalaaya yeeriwaka weera Pedru aari oLida, yaamurumihela asilopwana eeli weera emweerele: “Muhipise orwa wa hiyo.”" 
Acts9:39 Pedru aahaahoolela ni aphiyakaru, aaronghiwa mukwartuni mwa empa ya musulu. Asinaamukhweli ootheene yaamurukureera, yiinlaka ni emooniheraka soowara ni ikuwo sikina Dorka aapankaawe nlelo areene vamoha ni yaawo." 
Acts9:40 Pedru aalamula weera ootheene ekhume mukwartuni mmwe. Vano aakokhora ni aavekela. Vahoolowaya, arukunuwelaka wa muthiyana ookhwa, aamweerela: “Tabita, muvenye!” Owo aahula maitho, ni amoonaka Pedru, aakilaathi." 
Acts9:41 Amvarelaka ntata, aamukhavihera weemela. Vano, awiitthanaka ootteela ni asinaamukhweli, aawoonihera muthiyana areene ni okumi." 
Acts9:42 Eyo yaasuweliwa oYope wootheene ni ancipale yaaroromela mwa Apwiya. 
Acts9:43 Pedru aakhala oYope ehuhu ekina, mpaani mwa naxapala iitthaniwa Simeyoni." 
Acts10:1 Aakhala oSesareya mulopwana mmoha iitthaniwa Korneliyu, kenturiyoni* a mpatta wa anakhotto oosuweliwa ntoko a wItaliya." 
Acts10:2 Owo ni amusaawe ootheene yaari a murima wa omuluku ni yannamoova Muluku. Owo annavaha soovaha sincipale wa muloko wa atthu, ni annavekela wa Muluku." 
Acts10:3 Nihuku nimoha, wooxekuwani, owo aahoona moonelo mmoha. Aamoona nnenesene ndyelo a Muluku aamwaattamenle amweerelaka: “Korneliyu!”" 
Acts10:4 Oowoopihiweene owo aangweha, anamukoha: “Eheeni, Apwiya?” Ndyelo aamwaakhula: “Mavekelowaanyu ni sooveleelasanyu soowela ntoko yooveleela yoowuupuxera ohoolo wa Muluku." 
Acts10:5 Vano mwaarumihe alopwana akina a oYope weera emurowele Simeyoni mmoha, oosuweliwatho ntoko Pedru," 
Acts10:6 mwa yoowo ophiyenre vaate wa naxapala Simeyoni onkhala vakhiviru wa ephareiya.” 
Acts10:7 Apwahaka ndyelo aamuulumenle, Korneliyu aawiitthana eeli a arumeiyaawe ni nakhotto mmoha a murima wa omuluku, mmoha a yaale yaamurumeela," 
Acts10:8 ni aathaliheraka sootheene saakhumelenle, aahaarumiha oYope." 
Acts10:9 Oxaawaya, nsuwa vamuru, awo yeettaka ni ekhuveelaka esidade, Pedru aawela osulu wa empa weera avekele." 
Acts10:10 Avoliweene etala, aatthuna oca. Erehereriwaka yooca, aatthukeliwa ni okomoka." 
Acts10:11 Aahoona wiirimu woohuleya, ni etthu yoolikana ntoko ekuwo etokotoko yaakhuruwela vathi etthukiweene maleembe maxexe," 
Acts10:12 ereeneno inama sootheene sa nyetto mixexe, soowiipurula sa vathi nitho apalame a wiirimu." 
Acts10:13 Vano nsu nimoha naamweerela: “Muvenye, Pedru, mwiive ni mukhuure.”" 
Acts10:14 Pedrutho aahaakhula: “Hata vakhaani Apwiya! Nkinatoko okhuura etthu yoohitteela, naari yoonanara!”" 
Acts10:15 Nsu naamweerela emaara yanaaveeli: “Muhiitthane yoohitteela yeeyo Muluku otteelihalaawe.” 
Acts10:16 Eyo yaaheereiya imaara tthaaru, ni wootutuxereya ekuwo ele yaahokoloxeriwa wiirimu." 
Acts10:17 Pedru atikhinaka etaphulelo ya moonelo ole, alopwana yaarumihiwe ni Korneliyu yaaphwanya empa ya Simeyoni, ni yaaheemela vamulako." 
Acts10:18 Yiitthanaka, yaakoha aari weiwo muletto Simeyoni, oosuweliwa ntoko Pedru." 
Acts10:19 Pedru nlelo atthokelelaka sa moonelo, Munepa waamweerela: “Simeyoni, asilopwana araru anoowaasani nyuwo." 
Acts10:20 Tivawo, muvenye ni mukhuruwe. Muhihovele orowa ni yaawo, niwoko Miyo kaarumihale.”" 
Acts10:21 Pedru aakhuruwa ni aaweerela asilopwana: “Ti miyo yoowo mummwaasaanyu. Murweenle heeni?” 
Acts10:22 Asilopwana yaamwaakhula: “Nirweenle mpatta wa kenturiyoni* Korneliyu. Owo mulopwana oororomeleya ni oomoova Muluku, oottittimihiwa ni muloko wootheene wa aYuda. Ndyelo ootteela aamweerela weera onoowiitthanani owannyawe weera owo iiwe maswaanyu.”" 
Acts10:23 Pedru aawiitthana weera evolowe, ni aahaavaha nipuro noophiyera. Oxaawaya Pedru aarowa ni yaawo, ni axunna akina a oYope yaamuhoolela." 
Acts10:24 Oxaawaya yaaphiya oSesareya. Korneliyu eera aawehereraka, ni aahaalattula amusaawe ni asinthamwenaawe oosiveleyaxa." 
Acts10:25 Pedru avolowaka mpaani, Korneliyu aamukumanano ni aamukokhorela vamanaawoniwawe amulapaka." 
Acts10:26 Pedrutho, aamweemexa, eeraka: “Mweemele, miyotho kiri mutthu paahi.”" 
Acts10:27 Amutthekulakano yoowo, Pedru aavolowa ni aahaaphwanya mwemmwe ethukumanneene atthu ancipale," 
Acts10:28 ni aaweerela: “Nyuwo moosuwela nnenesene weera nlamulonahu ninkhoottiha weera muYuda athukumane ni mmalapo, naari omuxekura, mene Muluku ookoonihera weera miyo khawaatthuneya omwiitthana naari mutthu mmoha oohitteela, hoye hoye oonanara." 
Acts10:29 Tivawo, kaasaasiwaaka, kirwiiye woohikhootta. Vano, heeni nyuwo muruminghaanyu weera kirweeliwe nno?”" 
Acts10:30 Korneliyu aamwaakhula: “Wa mahuku maxexe avirale, miyo kaari owaani kivekelaka ehuhuweene yeela ya oxekuwa. Woowaakuveya aakhala ohoolowaka mulopwana mmoha awanreene ikuwo soowaara," 
Acts10:31 ni aakeerela: ‘Korneliyu, Muluku ohiiwa nivekelonanyu ni ohuupuwelela soovahasanyu." 
Acts10:32 Murumihe weera aroweliwe oYope Simeyoni iitthaniwa Pedru. Owo ophiyenre vaate wa naxapala Simeyoni, onkhala vakhiviru wa ephareiya.’" 
Acts10:33 Hiiho kaarumiha oroweliwa woowaakuveya, ni ti wooreera weera nyuwo mohoorwa. Ootheene hiyo nri vamaithoni wa Muluku weera niiwe sootheene Apwiya yoorumalaayani onileela.”" 
Acts10:34 Vano Pedru aapacera wuuluma: “Vano kinoowera woona weera Muluku khanono nthalu," 
Acts10:35 mene Owo oniwaakhulela yaale a miloko sootheene ammoova ni ampaka yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai. 
Acts10:36 Nyuwo moosuwela mutthenga orumihiwe ni Muluku wa muloko wa aYixrayeli, onuuluma sa masu ooreeraxa a murettele mwa Yeesu Kristu, Apwiya a ootheene." 
Acts10:37 Moosuwelatho weera masu aalaleiwa oYudeiya wootheene epaceraka oGalileiya vahoolo wa opatiso Yohaane aalaleiyaawe. 
Acts10:38 Moosuwela moota Muluku aamuttikitthenlaawe Yeesu ni Munepa Wootteela, ni ni ikuru, ni moota Owo eettaawe ilapo sootheene apakaka itthu sooreera ni aalamihaka ootheene yaale yaalamuliwe ni Diyabu*, niwoko Muluku aari ni Yoowo." 
Acts10:39 Hiyo nri anamoona a sootheene Owo aapakaawe mweelaponi mwa aYuda ni oYerusaleemu. Ti Yoowo yaamwiivalaaya, emuthomeyaka vamuttandani." 
Acts10:40 Wa soothesene, Muluku aamvenyereriha vanihukuni nanaaraaru, ni aamuweriha weera ooneye," 
Acts10:41 ohikhanle wa muloko wa atthu wootheene, mene wa anamoona Muluku aathanlalaawe khalayi, aani aahooniwa ni hiyo, naaciiye ni naawunre vamoha ni Yoowo Owo aavenyerenraawe mookhwaani." 
Acts10:42 Owo aanirumihale olaleera muloko wa atthu ni okhalela onamoona weera Owo ti Yoowo Muluku aamukhalihalaawe Mphuki a akumi ni akhwiiye. 
Acts10:43 Maprofeeti ootheene animukhalela onamoona Yoowo weera ootheene animuroromela Yoowo, animwaakhela elevelelo ya soottheka mwa Nsinanawe.”" 
Acts10:44 Pedru nlelo uulumaka masu ala, Munepa Wootteela waahaakhuruwela ootheene yaawo yiiwale mutthenga." 
Acts10:45 aYuda aKristu yaarwiiye ni Pedru yaatikhina weera yamahala ya Munepa Wootteela yiittheliwe mpaka wa amalapo," 
Acts10:46 niwoko yaawiiwa yuulumaka muulumo ni emuttottopelaka Muluku. Vahoolowaya Pedru aaweerela: 
Acts10:47 “Awo ahaakhela Munepa Wootteela ntoko hiyo! Vano, khaawo ongwera owooceeliha weera epatisiwe ni maahi.”" 
Acts10:48 Aalamulela weera epatisiwe mwa Nsina na Yeesu Kristu. Vahoolowaya yaamvekela Pedru weera akhale ni yaawo mahuku makina. 
Acts11:1 Arummwa ni axunna a oYudeiya wootheene yaahiiwa yuulummwaka weera amalapotho yaahaakhela masu a Muluku. 
Acts11:2 Hiiho, Pedru arowaka oYerusaleemu, yaawo yaari oowiineliwa yaamoothera yeeraka:" 
Acts11:3 “Nyuwo mwaavolowa mpaani mwa atthu oohiineliwa, ni mwaahooca vamoha ni yaawo.”" 
Acts11:4 Pedru aapacera waathalihera nnenesene yeeyo yaakhumelenle, eeraka:" 
Acts11:5 “Kaari musidadeni ya oYope kivekelaka, ni kikomokaka mmunepani, kaahoona moonelo. Kaahoona etthu yoolikana ni ekuwo etokotoko yaakuruxiwa wiirimu, etthukiweene mmaleembeni maxexe, yaarwa mpaka vaavaale miyo kaaraakawo." 
Acts11:6 Kaathurumela mpuwa ni kaahoona weera yaakhalamo axinama a nyetto mixexe, axinama a ntuphini, oowiipurula, ni apalame a wiirimu." 
Acts11:7 Vano kaahiiwa nsu nimoha naakeerenle: ‘Muvenye Pedru, mwiive ni mukhuure.’" 
Acts11:8 Miyo kaahaakhula: ‘Hata vakhaani, Apwiya! Kheenatoko ovolowa mmwaanomwaka etthu yoohitteela, naari yoonanara.’" 
Acts11:9 Nsu naahuuluma wiirimu emaara yanaaveeli neeraka: “Muhiitthane yoohitteela yeeyo Muluku otteelihalaawe.’ 
Acts11:10 Eyo yaaheereiya imaara tthaaru ni vahoolowaya sootheene saahokoloxeriwa wiirimu. 
Acts11:11 Ehuhuweene yeele emoharu, yaaphiya vaate miyo kaaphiyenraaka asilopwana araru kaarumiheliwaaka miyo oSesareya." 
Acts11:12 Munepa waakeerela weera kihihovele orowa ni yaawo. Asilopwana athannammosa ala yaakihoolatho, ni naavolowa mpaani mwa mulopwana ole." 
Acts11:13 Owo aanithalihera moota ndyelo iixoonihenraawe vaatewawe ni aamweerenlaawe: ‘Murumihe oroweliwa oYope Simeyoni iitthaniwa Pedru. 
Acts11:14 Owo anooruuheleni mutthenga oneera woovuluxeni nyuwo ni ootheene a vaatewanyu.’ 
Acts11:15 Miyo kipacerakaru wuuluma, Munepa Wootteela waahaakhuruwela yaawo ntoko waanikhuruwenlaaya hiyo ompacereroni." 
Acts11:16 Vano kaahuupuwelela yeeyo Apwiya yaahimalaaya yeeraka: “Yohaane aapatisa ni maahi, mene nyuwo mmwipatisiwe ni Munepa Wootteela.”" 
Acts11:17 Muluku aavanghe yamahaleene yeeyo Owo onivanghaawe hiyo naaroromenlaahu Apwiya Yeesu Kristu, miyo taani oowera omukhoottela Muluku?”" 
Acts11:18 Yiiwaka yeeyo, yaahiya omukohakoha, ni yaamvuwiha Muluku yeeraka: “Vano Muluku ohaavaha orukunxa murima wa okumi mpaka amalapo asineenaaya!”" 
Acts11:19 Yaawo yaamwaramwareiye niwoko na osoondiwa waapacenre ni okhwa wa Stefano, yaaphiya oFenisiya, oKipro ni wAntiyokiya, yaalaleeraka mutthenga aYuda paahi." 
Acts11:20 Wa soothesene, akina a yaawo, yaari atthu a oKipro ni a oKireene, yaarowa wAntiyokiya ni yaapacera wuuluma ni aGregotho, yaathaliheraka masu ooreeraxa mwaha wa Apwiya Yeesu." 
Acts11:21 Ntata na Apwiya naari ni yaawo, ni ancipale yaaroromela ni yaarukunxela mirimasaya wa Apwiya." 
Acts11:22 Ihaali sa etthweene yeeyo saahiiwanyeiya ni ekerexa ya oYerusaleemu, ni atthu a ekerexa ele yaamurumiha Barnaba wAntiyokiya." 
Acts11:23 Owo aphiyaka weiwo ni oonaka mahala a Muluku, aahakalala ni aahaalipihera weera ekhaleke oororomeleya wa Apwiya ni murima wootheene." 
Acts11:24 Owo aari mulopwana a murima wooreera, oosareya Munepa Wootteela ni nroromelo, ni atthu ancipale yaarukunxela mirimasaya wa Apwiya." 
Acts11:25 Vano Barnaba aarowa oTarso omwaasaasa Sawuli," 
Acts11:26 ni amphwanyaka, aamukuxa amuronghaka wAntiyokiya. Hiiho Barnaba ni Sawuli yannathukumana ni ekerexa ya wAntiyokiya, woomalaka eyaakha emoha ni yaahaaxuttiha atthu ancipale. Ti wAntiyokiya oohusera yaapacenraayawo wiitthaniwa aKristu." 
Acts11:27 Mahukweene yaale, maprofeeti makina yaarowa ekhumaka oYerusaleemu mpaka wAntiyokiya." 
Acts11:28 Mmoha a yaawo iitthaniwa Agabo, aaheemela ni aahima mwa Munepa weera eniikhale etala etokoko mweelaponi yootheene ya oRooma, ni eyo yaakhumelenle ehuhu ya olamula wa Klawudiyu." 
Acts11:29 Oohusera yaalakela waakhavihera axunna yaakhala oYudeiya, mutthu ti mutthu yeeyo owo aaweraawe." 
Acts11:30 Yaapaka hiiho yaarumihelaka soovahasaya asitokweene a ekerexa mmatatani mwa Barnaba ni Sawuli. 
Acts12:1 Ehuhuweene yeele, mwene Herodi aahaatthuka akina yaari a ekerexa, atthunaka waahasula." 
Acts12:2 Aalamulela omwiiva ni ekatana Yakobe, munneiye Yohaane." 
Acts12:3 Oonaka weera eyo yaahaasiveliha aYuda, aapwaherera amutthukakatho Pedru mweehuhuni mwa efesta ya ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu." 
Acts12:4 Amutthukaka, aangwalela okaliposo, amwinnyereraka yoowo weera awehawehiwe ni mipatta mixexe, khula mpatta anakhotto axexe. Herodi aatthuna weera amuthorihe mwaatthuni emalaka ehuhu ya mPaska*." 
Acts12:5 Pedru aahiikaathiwa okaliposo, mene ekerexa yannamvekelela vancipale wa Muluku." 
Acts12:6 Ohiyuweene yoowo, nihinaaye nihuku Herodi eeraawe amuthorihe yoowo mwaatthuni, Pedru eera akonaka eriyari ya anakhotto eeli, atthukiweene ni onyooro miili, ni anamalipelela yaalipelela mulako wa mukaliposo." 
Acts12:7 Wootutuxereya aahoorwa ndyelo a Apwiya, ni waara waahaara mukwartuni ele. Owo aamutava Pedru mpararini ni aamvenxa, eeraka: “Mwaakuveke, muvenye!” Vano onyooro waapaseiya mmatatanimwawe." 
Acts12:8 Ndyelo aamweerela: “Ngware ni muwaretho ikwakwaatta.” Pedru aapaka hiiho. Ndyelo aamweerelatho: “Muwareke mukaandyo ni mukitthare.” 
Acts12:9 Ni akhumaka, Pedru aamutthara ahisuwelaka weera yaari ekhaikhai yeeyo yaapakeya ni ndyelo, niwoko uupuwela weera waari moonelo." 
Acts12:10 Yaavira wa anamalipelela oopacera ni anaaveeli, ni yaaphiya vamulakoni mutokotoko wa eyuuma waakeliha musidadeni. Owo waahuleya mwaneenaaya, ni yaavira. Ekhumakaru, yaaheetta mmuseweni mmoha, ni woowaakuveya ndyelo aamuhiya." 
Acts12:11 Vanonto Pedru aasuwela nnenesene ni aahiixeerela: “Vano koosuwela kihihovelaka weera Apwiya yaamurumiha ndyelowaaya ni ookivuluxa mmatatani mwa Herodi, ni mwa sootheene seiyo muloko wa aYuda waawehereraaya.”" 
Acts12:12 Asuwelaka yeeyo, aarowa vaate wa Mariya, amayawe Yohaane iitthaniwatho Marku, yaathukumannaayamo atthu ancipale evekelaka." 
Acts12:12 Asuwelaka yeeyo, aarowa vaate wa Mariya, amayawe Yohaane iitthaniwatho Marku, yaathukumannaayamo atthu ancipale evekelaka." 
Acts12:13 Pedru aamana nsele na muttheko ni murumeiyi muthiyana, nsinanawe Roode, aahoorwa wiiwelela." 
Acts12:14 Iiwaka nsu na Pedru, aahakalala ni aahaatthimakela atthu yaari mpaani attiwalaka ohula nsele ni aaweerela: “Pedru ori vamulako!”" 
Acts12:15 Wa soothesene, yaamweerela: “Weyo onkhwa anepa!” Alipiheraka weera aari yoowo, awo yaamweerela: “Apaale ori ndyelowaawe.”" 
Acts12:16 Pedrutho aapwaherera omana nsele, ni ehulakaru nsele ni emoonakaru, yaatikhina." 
Acts12:17 Pedru, aavahaka eneneero ni ntata weera emaale, aahaathalihera moota Apwiya yaamukhumihalaaya mukaliposo ni aaweerela: “Mwamuleele yeeyo Yakobe ni axunna.” Vano aakhuma ni aarowa nipuro nikina." 
Acts12:18 Oxeexelo, waakhala onyakulihana otokotoko variyari wa anakhotto wa yeeyo yeereiye ni Pedru." 
Acts12:19 Alamulaka omwaasaasa nnenesenene Pedru, mene ehimphwanyaka, Herodi aahaakohakohaxa anamalipelela ni aahaalamula weera yiiviwe. Vahoolowaya, Herodi aarowa akhumaka oYudeiya mpaka oSesareya, ni aamaka weiwo ehuhu ekina." 
Acts12:20 Owo aahaanyoonyeriwa atthu a oTiro ni a oSidoni. Wa soothesene, awo yaathukumana ni yaaheerera wuuluma ni yoowo. Eweraka toko ekhavihero ya Blastu, murumeiyi oororomeleya a mwene, yaamvekela Herodi murettele niwoko elapwaaya yaacihiwa ni elapo ya mwene." 
Acts12:21 Nihuku naalanghaniwe Herodi awanreene ikuwo sa emwene, aakilaathi vahiceniwawe ni aahuuluma ni muloko wa atthu." 
Acts12:22 Awo yaapacera okhuwela, yeeraka: “Ti nsu na muluku, nihikhanle na mutthu.”" 
Acts12:23 Woonaka weera Herodi khaamvuwiha Muluku, woowaakuveya ndyelo a Apwiya aamuvulaliha, ni owo aahookhwa akhuuriweene ni nyuungu." 
Acts12:24 Ehuhu emoha yeeyo, masu a Muluku yaapwaherera wunnuwa ni omwaramwaxeya." 
Acts12:25 Emalihaka mutekwaaya, Barnaba ni Sawuli yaahokolowa ekhumaka oYerusaleemu, emukuxaleene Yohaane iitthaniwatho Marku." 
Acts12:25 Emalihaka mutekwaaya, Barnaba ni Sawuli yaahokolowa ekhumaka oYerusaleemu, emukuxaleene Yohaane iitthaniwatho Marku." 
Acts13:1 Mukerexani ya wAntiyokiya yaakhalawo maprofeeti ni anamahusiha: Barnaba, Simeyoni iithaniwa Nigeri, Lusiyo oKireene, Manayeni aahuwiwe vamoha ni namalamula Herodi, ni Sawuli." 
Acts13:2 Yaalapaka Apwiya ni etthukaka, Munepa Wootteela waaweerela: “Mukimwalamwalihere Barnaba ni Sawuli wa muteko Miyo kiwiitthanenlaaka.”" 
Acts13:3 Hiiho, emalihaka otthuka ni ovekela, yaawiikaathera matata ni yaahaarumiha." 
Acts13:4 Erumihiweene ni Munepa Wootteela, awo yaarowa oSeleusiya, ni evenyaka vaavaale, yaalapuwa munikulani erowaka oKipro." 
Acts13:5 Ephiyaka oSalamina, yaalaleiya masu a Muluku muSinagogani* mwa aYuda. Yohaane aari ni yaawo ntoko oowaakhavihera." 
Acts13:6 Yaaheetta eviraka ecirumba yootheene mpaka yaaphiya oPafo. Weiwo yaamuphwanya muYuda namacitta ni mprofeeti oolokottha iitthaniwa Baryesu. 
Acts13:7 Aakhala ni guvernadori Sergiyu Pawulo, mulopwana a miruku. Guvernadori aarumiha wiitthaniwa Barnaba ni Sawuli, niwoko aatthuna wiiwa masu a Muluku." 
Acts13:8 Elimasitho, namacitta (ntoko nintaphulelaaya nsinanawe) ahiixiittaniha, ni aaheerera omooceeliha guvernadori weera ahiroromele." 
Acts13:9 Vano Sawuli, iitthaniwatho Pawulo, oosareya Munepa Wootteela, aamuwehexexa nnenesene Elimasi, ni aamweerela:" 
Acts13:10 “Mwaana a Diyabu* ni mwiittana a sootheene seiyo siri sa ekhaikhai! Nyuwo moosareya mikhalelo sootheene sa olokottha ni otakhala. Mmuhiye yaakhani onanariha iphiro soowookowa sa Apwiya? 
Acts13:11 Musuwele vano weera Apwiya ti mwiittanaanyu, ni nyuwo mmwikhale oohoona, muhiweraka woona waara wa nsuwa wa ehuhu ekina.” Woowaakuveya yaamukhuruwela ewiriphi, ni owo, aapapelaka, aamwaasa mukina weera amuhoole ni ntata." 
Acts13:12 Guvernadori oonaka yeeyo, aaroromela ni aatikhinaxa ni nihusiho na Apwiya." 
Acts13:13 Pawulo ni yaawo yaamuhoonle, yaavenya oPafo ni yaalapuwa munikulani erowaka oPerge oPanfiliya. Weiwo, Yohaane aahaahiya yaawo ni aahokoleela oYerusaleemu." 
Acts13:14 Ekhumaka oPerge, yaapwaherera mpaka wAntiyokiya oPisidiya. Nihuku na eSaabadu yaavolowa muSinagogani* ni yaakilaathi." 
Acts13:15 Emalihaka osoma wa nlamulo ni wa maprofeeti, asitokweene a eSinagoga* yaahaarumiha atthu weera emweerele Barnaba ni Sawuli: “Axunna, mwaarino masu oolipiha murima wa muloko wa atthu, muulume.”" 
Acts13:16 Eemelaka, Pawulo aahaathoonyihera ni ntata ni aaweerela: “aYixrayeli ni nyuwo mummoova Muluku, mukiiwe miyo!" 
Acts13:17 Muluku a muloko wa aYixrayeli aathanla makholowaahu, ni aareeliha muloko wa atthu ehuhu yootheene waamankaaya wExipitu. Ni ikuru sitokotoko aavenxa wa elapo ele," 
Acts13:18 ni aavilela munikareni woophiyera ehuhu ya iyaakha miloko mixexe. 
Acts13:19 Owo aaphwata miloko sa atthu mithannamiili oKanaani, ni aavaha elapwaaya wa mulokwaawe ntoko yoohiyeriwa*." 
Acts13:20 Sootheene iye saakhumelela woomalaka ehuhu ya iyaakha 450. Vahoolowaya, owo aahaavaha aphuki mpaka ehuhu ya Samuweli." 
Acts13:21 Vano muloko wa atthu waamvekela Muluku mwene, ni Muluku aavaha muloko Sawuli, mwaana a Kixi, a epuumba ya Benyamini aalamula iyaakha miloko mixexe." 
Acts13:22 Vahoolo wa omukhootta Sawuli, aamukhaliha Davide ntoko mwene, mwa yoowo Muluku aamukhalenlaawe onamoona eeraka: ‘Koompwhanya Davide, mwaana a Yixai, mulopwana a vamurimaniwaka. Owo anaapake sootheene seiyo siri sa otthunawaka.’" 
Acts13:23 Muluku aahaaruuhela aYixrayeli Mvuluxa Yeesu, akhumaka ekhapira ya Davide, ntoko aaroromelihalaawe." 
Acts13:24 Ahinaaye ophiya Yeesu, Yohaane aalaleera muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli opatiso wa orukunxa murima." 
Acts13:25 Aakwanihaawe mutekwaawe, Yohaane aaheera: ‘Munuupuwela weera miyo taani? Nkihiyono Yoowo mummuupuwelaanyu. Moonetho, anaarwe ottuliwaka Yoole ikwakwaattasawe kihiphwanenlaaka otaphula.’" 
Acts13:26 Axunna, anamwane a Abrahaamu ni nyuwo mummoova Muluku, wa hiyo noorumiheliwa mutthenga ola wa ovuluxiwa," 
Acts13:27 muloko wa atthu a oYerusaleemu ni asitokweenaaya khayaamusuwenle Yeesu ntoko Mvuluxa, mene emuttaruxaka Yoowo, yaakwanihera masu a maprofeeti ansommwa iSaabadu sootheene." 
Acts13:28 Naamwi ehiphwanyaka mulattu woomwiivela, yaamvekelatho Pilatu weera alamule omwiiva." 
Acts13:29 Ekwaniheraka sootheene saalempwale mwaha wa Yoowo, yaamvenxa vamuttandani ni yaamvitha mmahiyeni." 
Acts13:30 Mulukutho aamvenyereriha mookhwaani," 
Acts13:31 ni wa mahuku mancipale aahooniwa ni yaale yaarongwe vamoha ni Yoowo oYerusaleemu ekhumaka oGalileiya. Vano awo ari anamoonaawe wa muloko wa atthu. 
Acts13:32 Hiyo ninoolaleerani nyuwo masu ooreeraxa ala: yeeyo Muluku aaroromelihalaawe makholowaahu," 
Acts13:33 oonikwaniherela hiyo, anamwanaawe, amvenyererihaka Yeesu ntoko elempwalaaya ecipo yanaaveeli: ‘Weyo ti Mwanaka. Olelo kohooyara.’" 
Acts13:34 Muluku aamvenyereriha mookhwaani weera Owo ahihokoleeletho muyuntteloni. Eyo Muluku aahima ni masu ala: ‘Miyo kinoovahani mareeliho ootteela ni oororomeleya yaaroromelihiwe wa Davide.’ 
Acts13:35 Tivawo yoolempwa mpatta mukina: ‘Khamurwa muntthunihera Ootteelaanyu weera untte.’ 
Acts13:36 Amalihaka waarumeela atthu a ekhapiraawe ntoko Muluku aatthunaawe, Davide aahookhwa. Owo aavithiwa ni makholowaawe ni erutthwaawe yaahuntta." 
Acts13:37 Yooletho Muluku omvenyererihalaawe, khunttale." 
Acts13:38 Tivawo, axunna, kintthuna woosuwelihani weera ti mwa Yeesu munlaleeriwaanyu elevelelo ya soottheka." 
Acts13:39 Niwoko na Yoowo, khula mutthu onroromela, ohooniwa weera khanono nthowa wa sootheene seiyo nlamulo na Moisesi nahaaweraaya onilevelela." 
Acts13:40 Mwiipasoope weera ehookhumeleleni yeeyo maprofeeti yaahimalaaya, yeeraka:" 
Acts13:41 ‘Moone, nyuwo mumveiha, mutikhine ni muriheye, niwoko nkipake etthu mmahukunimwanyu nyuwo mwahaaroromelaanyu mukina ooleelani.’" 
Acts13:42 Pawulo ni Barnaba evenyaka muSinagogani*, muloko wa atthu waahaalattula weera yuulumetho sa itthusene seiyo eSaabadu enrwa." 
Acts13:43 Woomwareyani wa mmuthukumanoni, aYuda ancipale ni anamarwa a murima wa omuluku antthara ediini ya aYuda, yaamutthara Pawulo ni Barnaba. Awo yaatthekula ni yaawo, yaalipiheraka weera epwaherere mwa mahala a Muluku." 
Acts13:44 eSaabadu yaattharelanne, wookwanaka atthu ootheene a esidade yaathukumana weera yiiwe masu a Apwiya." 
Acts13:45 aYuda, ewoonaka atthu ancipale, yaasareya nrima ni eveihaka, yaavaanyiha yeeyo Pawulo aahimaawe." 
Acts13:46 Vano Pawulo ni Barnaba yaawaakhula ni murima woolipa, yeeraka: “Waatthuneya woolaleerani toko nyuwo masu a Muluku, mene mweenre mukhoottaka masu ala, ni hiiho munoonihera weera khamuphwanenle okumi woohimala, vano hiyo ninoohokoleela wa amalapo." 
Acts13:47 Vano, hiiho Apwiya aanilamulela yeeraka: ‘Miyo kohookhalihani waara wa amalapo, weera mukuxe ovuluwa mpaka ekotenle elapo.’”" 
Acts13:48 Yiiwaka yeeyo amalapo yaahakalala ni yaavuwiha masu a Apwiya, ni ootheene yaawo yaathanliwe ophwanya okumi woohimala, yaaroromela." 
Acts13:49 Masu a Apwiya yaamwaramwaxeya wa elapo yootheene. 
Acts13:50 aYudatho yaahaasesera asithiyana oosuwanyeya oomoova Muluku ni asitokweene a esidade. Etannyeraka omttharatthara Pawulo ni Barnaba, awo yaawoomola mweelaponimwaya." 
Acts13:51 Awo ooweeli yaatatha ntthupi na inaawosaya ntoko eneneero ya waakhootta yaale, ni yaapwaha erowaka wIkoniyo." 
Acts13:52 Oohusera yaapwaherera esareiyeene ohakalala ni Munepa Wootteela. 
Acts14:1 wIkoniyo yaaheereiyatho etthu emoharu. Pawulo ni Barnaba yaarowa oSinagogani*. Weiwo yaahuuluma moota wooweera atthu ancipale a aYuda ni a amalapo yaaroromela. 
Acts14:2 aYudatho yaakhoontte ororomela yaahaasesera amalapo, yaatatuxaka amwiittana a oororomela." 
Acts14:3 Pawulo ni Barnaba yaakhalawo ehuhu yincipale, yuulumaka ni murima woolipa sa Apwiya, mwa Yaawo yaahaakhavihera epakaka ineneero ni sootikhiniha." 
Acts14:4 Muloko wa esidade waakawanyeya: akina yaawaakhulela aYuda ni akinatho arummwa. 
Acts14:5 Vano, amalapo ni aYuda akina vamoha ni asitokweenaaya, yaavaanela weera yaahasule ni yaavonye maluku arummwa." 
Acts14:6 Vaheera awo yaahiiwa sa seiyo, ni yaatthawela isidade sa elapo ya oLikawoniya siniitthaniwa oListra ni oDerbe ni wa ilapo soowaattamana," 
Acts14:7 weiwo yaapwahereraaya olaleiya masu ooreeraxa. 
Acts14:8 oListra aakhala mulopwana mmoha oorakala inaawosawe okhuma oyariwawawe. Vano, aakhala weiwo ekilaathelo ni khanatoko weetta." 
Acts14:9 Owo aamwiiwa Pawulo uulumaka, ni Pawulo, angwehaka nnenesene ni oonaka weera owo aakhalano nroromelo weera alamihiwe," 
Acts14:10 aamweerela, akhuwelaka: “Muvenye, mweemele!” Mwa yeeyo, mulopwana aatupha, aneemela, anapacera weetta." 
Acts14:11 Yoonaka yeeyo Pawulo aapankaawe, atthu ancipale yaapacera okhuwela ni nuulumo na oLikawoniya yeeraka: “Miluku soonikhuruwela ni ekhalelo ya omutthu!”" 
Acts14:12 Vano yaamwiitthana Barnaba Zeyu*, ni Pawulo Herme*, niwoko aari yoowo aaruuha masu." 
Acts14:13 Musaserdoti* a Zeyu*, mwa yoowo empaawe yaari vaate wa esidade, aaruuha imombe ni ikhara sa ithutu wa mulako wa esidade niwoko owo ni atthu ancipale yaatthuna waavaha sooveleela." 
Acts14:14 Yiiwaka yeeyo, Pawulo ni Barnaba yaahaahula ikuwosaya ni yaatthimakela eriyari ya atthu ancipale ekhuwelaka:" 
Acts14:15 “Alopwana, heeni nyuwo mumpakaanyu yeeyo? Hiyotho nri atthu ntoko nyuwo. Ninooruuhelani masu ooreeraxa niweerelakani mususe mwa itthusene seiyo sa siiyo, ni muhokoleele wa Muluku mukumi opanke erimu, elapo ni ephareiya ni sootheene siri mwemmo." 
Acts14:16 Khalayi Owo aahiya miloko sa atthu sootheene weettela iphirosaya asineenaaya. 
Acts14:17 Wa soothesene, Owo khaakhanle woohikhala onamoona: ohoonihera oreerawawe oovahakani epula, soohepha wa ehuhu yootthuneya, oovahakanitho yooca yoowaatta ni mirima soosareya ohakalala.”" 
Acts14:18 Yaari mweeraru ehimaleene masu ala, arummwa waahaarika owooceeliha atthu ancipale weera ehaavahe sooveleela yaawo." 
Acts14:19 Vano aYuda akina yaaphiya wAntiyokiya ni wIkoniyo, yaaviriyenlaaya atthu ancipale. Yaamvonya maluku Pawulo ni yaampurulela vaate wa esidade, yuupuwelaka weera aahookhwa." 
Acts14:20 Oohuseratho yaamurukurenraaya mukhwipimwawe, owo aavenya ni aahokoleela musidadeni. Oxaawaya, owo ni Barnaba yaapwaha erowaka oDerbe." 
Acts14:21 Awo yaalaleiya masu ooreeraxa esidadeene yeele, ni yaahaakhaliha oohusera ancipale. Vano yaahokoleela oListra, wAntiyokiya ni wIkoniyo," 
Acts14:22 elipiheraka mirima sa oohusera ni ewoopereraka weera epwaherere munroromeloni, yeeraka: “Ontthuneya weera nivire mmahooxoni mancipale weera nivolowe moomweneni wa Muluku.”" 
Acts14:23 Pawulo ni Barnaba yaahaathanla asitokweenaaya khula ekerexa. Emalihaka otthuka ni ovekela, yaahaavaherera mookosoopani wa Apwiya, mwa Yaawo awo yaaroromelaaya." 
Acts14:24 Eviraka oPisidiya, yaaphiya oPanfiliya" 
Acts14:25 ni emalihaka olaleiya masu oPerge, yaarowa wAtaliya." 
Acts14:26 wAtaliya yaalapuwa munikulani ehokoleelaka wAntiyokiya, weiwo yaavahereriwaaya mwa mahala a Muluku wa orummwa yaakwanihenraaya vano." 
Acts14:27 Ephiyaka weiwo, yaathukumana vamoha ni ekerexa, ni yaahaathalihera sootheene Muluku aapakaawe mmatatanimwaya, ni moota aahulenlaawe amalapo mulako wa nroromelo." 
Acts14:28 Vano, yaakhala weiwo ehuhu yincipale ni oohusera." 
Acts15:1 Alopwana akina yaahoorwa ekhumaka oYudeiya mpaka wAntiyokiya, ni yaahaahusiha axunna yeeraka: “Nyuwo mwaahiineliwe ntoko ekhovelelo yaaxuttihiwe ni Moisesi, khamungwera ovuluxiwa.”" 
Acts15:2 Pawulo ni Baranaba khayaakhulenle tivawo yaapacenraaya onyakulihanaxa ni yaawo. Hiiho Pawulo ni Baranaba yaathanliwa vamoha ni akina orowa oYerusaleemu, weera yiiwanane ni arummwa ni asitokweene mwaha wa mulattu ole." 
Acts15:3 Ekerexa yaahaarumiha ni eviraka oFenisiya ni oSamariya, yaahaathalihera akristu a weiwo moota amalapo yaarukunxalaaya mirimasaya. Ihaali iye saahaahakalaliha vancipale axunna ootheene." 
Acts15:4 Ephiyaka oYerusaleemu, yaahaakheleliwa nnenesene ni ekerexa, arummwa ni asitokweene, ni yaahaathalihera sootheene Muluku aapakaawe mmatatanimwaya." 
Acts15:5 Vano yaaheemela akina a yaawo yaaroromenle yaari aFarisi*, yeeraka: “Ontthuneya owiinela amalapo ni waanyesereriha weera yiiwelele malamulo a Moisesi.”" 
Acts15:6 Arummwa ni asitokweene a ekerexa yaathukumana weera yiiwanane mwaha wa mulattu ole. 
Acts15:7 Vahoolo wa masu mancipale, Pedru aaheemela ni aaweerela: “Axunna, nyuwo moosuwela weera okhuma khalayi, Muluku ookithanla variyariwanyu weera amalapo yiiwe mmwaanomwaka masu ooreeraxa ni weera eroromele." 
Acts15:8 Muluku onsuwela murima aahoonihera weera Owo aawaakhulela amalapo, aavahaka Munepa Wootteela ntoko aanivanghaawe khalayi." 
Acts15:9 Owo khanipakenle nthalu hiyo ni yaawo, woonaka weera ootteeliha mirimasaya ni nroromelo." 
Acts15:10 Vano, heeni nyuwo muntthunaanyu omweerera Muluku, mwaathatelihaka yoolemela oohusera, mwa yeeyo hata hiyo, naari makholowaahu, khayaawenre ovilela?" 
Acts15:11 Ohiyanawaya, ninroromela weera noovuluxiwa mwa mahala a Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu, ni hiihaawotho awo.”" 
Acts15:12 Muthukumano wootheene waamaala omwiiwaka Pawulo ni Baranaba yuulumaka sa ineneero ni sootikhiniha sootheene Muluku aapakaawe mmatatanimwaya variyari wa amalapo. 
Acts15:13 Emalihaka wuuluma, Yakobe aaweerela: “Axunna, mukiiwe." 
Acts15:14 Simeyoni oonithalihera moota Muluku uupuwenlaawe okhuma ompacereroni, othukumanya muloko eriyari ya amalapo mwa Nsinanawe." 
Acts15:15 Masu a maprofeeti anaakhulela yeeyo, ntoko elempwalaaya:" 
Acts15:16 ‘Vahoolowaya, nkihokolowe ni nkiteketho eheema ya Davide emonre. Nkiteketho milepesaya ni nkireherere," 
Acts15:17 weera yaawo atthu ahanle ewaasaase Apwiya, nitho amalapo ootheene mwa yaawo Nsinanaka niitthaniwaaya, aneera Apwiya ampaka itthu iya" 
Acts15:18 soosuwanyeya okhuma khalayi.’ 
Acts15:19 Tivawo kinuupuwelaaka weera khoontthuneya weera hiyo naaxupe amalapo anrukunxela murimaaya wa Muluku. 
Acts15:20 Ohiyanawaya, ontthuneya weera hiyo naalepele, naaleelaka weera ehikhuure inama soonanarihiwa ni miluku sikina, ehiraruwe, ehikhuure inama soonyopotoliwa mmilo, naari ehiwure ephomaaya." 
Acts15:21 Vano, okhuma khalayi malamulo a Moisesi aalaleiwa isidade sootheene, esommwaka muSinagogani* khula eSaabadu.”" 
Acts15:22 Arummwa ni asitokweene vamoha ni ekerexa yootheene yaalakela waathanla akina variyariwaya ni waarumiha wAntiyokiya, vamoha ni Pawulo ni Baranaba. Yaamuthanla Yudasi iitthaniwa Barsaba ni Sila, ahooleli eeli variyari wa axunna." 
Acts15:23 Ni yaawo yaarumiha ekaratta enttharelana: ‘Ya axunninyu, arummwa ni asitokweene a ekerexa, wa aKristu amalapo ari wAntiyokiya, oSiriya ni oSilisiya: Salaama." 
Acts15:24 Noosuwela weera akina aakhuma variyariwahu nihaalamulenle, ni yaahookacamihani yootutuxakani mmuupuwelonimwanyu ni yeeyo yaahimalaaya." 
Acts15:25 Hiiho, nohiiwanana ootheene hiyo waathanla asilopwana akina ni woorumihelani nyuwo vamoha ni axunnihu oosiveleya, Pawulo ni Baranaba," 
Acts15:26 mwa yaawo yaalenve okumaaya niwoko na Nsina na Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu. 
Acts15:27 Tivawo, nnimurumihaahutho Yudasi ni Sila weera yaakhulele ni iyaanosaya yeeyo hiyo ninlepaahu." 
Acts15:28 Munepa Wootteela ni hiyo naahiiwanana ohoonyesererani nyuwo ni yoonyesereriha ekina, sihikhanle paahi iyo sootthuneyaxa sinttharelana:" 
Acts15:29 Muhikhuure inama sooveleeliwa wa miluku sikina; muhiwure ephomaaya; muhikhuure enama ya asinama oonyopotoliwa mmilo, ni muhiraruwe. Mwasemba itthusene seiya, munoopaka nnene. Weera sootheene siweetteleni nnene!”" 
Acts15:30 Yaaraxenlaaya, asilopwana yaarowa wAntiyokiya weiwo yaathukumannaayawo ekerexa ni awo yaavaherera ekaratta." 
Acts15:31 Axunna yaasoma ni yaahakalalela ni maswaaya a olipiha murima. 
Acts15:32 Yudasi ni Sila, yaaritho maprofeeti, yaalipihera mirimasaya ni yaahaahakalaliha axunna ni masu mancipale." 
Acts15:33 Eviraka ehuhu ekina weiwo, yaaraxeliwa ni axunna ni mareeliho a murettele, weera ehokoleele wa yaawo yaarumihale." 
Acts15:34  
Acts15:35 Pawulotho ni Baranaba yaakhala wAntiyokiya weiwo vamoha ni ancipale akina yaaxuttihaaya ni yaalaleiyaaya masu a Apwiya. 
Acts15:36 Eviraka ehuhu ekina, Pawulo aamweerela Barnaba: “Nihokolowe weera naaxekure axunna a isidade sootheene hiyo naalaleiyaahu masu a Apwiya, weera noone moota itthu sineettaaya.”" 
Acts15:37 Barnaba aatthuna omukuxa Yohaane iitthaniwatho Marku. 
Acts15:37 Barnaba aatthuna omukuxa Yohaane iitthaniwatho Marku. 
Acts15:38 Pawulotho aahuupuwela weera khawaatthuneya omukuxa ntoko mukhwiinyu, mulopwana owo aahiyale elapo ya oPanfiliya ni ahaapwaherenre okhala ni yaawo mmutekoni." 
Acts15:39 Yaakhalano ohiiwanana vancipale moota wooweera yaamwalamwala. Barnaba, amurowanaka Marku, aalapuwa munikulani arowaka oKipro," 
Acts15:39 Yaakhalano ohiiwanana vancipale moota wooweera yaamwalamwala. Barnaba, amurowanaka Marku, aalapuwa munikulani arowaka oKipro," 
Acts15:40 mene Pawulo aamuthanla Sila ni, yaavahereriwa wa mahala a Apwiya ni mavekelo a axunna, enapwaha." 
Acts15:41 Vano yaavira oSiriya ni oSilisiya elipiheraka ikerexa. 
Acts16:1 Yaaphiya oDerbe ni vahoolowaya oListra, weiwo aakhalaawewo oohusera iitthaniwa Timootheyo, mwa yoowo amayawe yaari muYuda muKristu ni atithawe yaari muGrego." 
Acts16:2 Axunna a oListra ni a wIkoniyo yaamukhalela onamoona wooreera. 
Acts16:3 Pawulo atthunaka omurowano, aamwiinela niwoko na aYuda yaakhala elapo ele, woonaka weera ootheene yaasuwela weera atithawe yaari muGrego." 
Acts16:4 Wa isidade iye yaaviraaya, yaaleela soolakela sa arummwa ni asitokweene a oYerusaleemu weera aKristu yiiwelele." 
Acts16:5 Hiiho ikerexa saalipiheriwa munroromeloni, ni khula nihuku yannaandyeerereya atthu." 
Acts16:6 Pawulo ni asikhwaawe yaaheetta elapo ya oFrisiya ni oGalasiya, yooceelihiweene ni Munepa Wootteela olaleiya masu a Muluku elapo ya wAsiya." 
Acts16:7 Ephiyaka mmwiinaanoni wa oMisiya, yaaheerera ovolowa oBitiniya, mene Munepa wa Yeesu khawaatthunihenre." 
Acts16:8 Vano, yaaviralaaya oMisiya, yaarowa oTrowade." 
Acts16:9 Ehuhu ya ohiyu Pawulo aamoona mmooneloni mulopwana mmoha a oMasedoniya eemenleene, amudyoonttelelaka: “Ngwe oMasedoniya ni munikhavihere.”" 
Acts16:10 Vahoolo wa moonelo ole, naahiireherera woowaakuveya weera nipwahe nirowaka oMasedoniya, nuupuwelaka weera Muluku aaniitthana weera naalaleerewo masu ooreeraxa." 
Acts16:11 Nivenyaka oTrowade, naalapuwa munikulani, nirowaka oSamotrasiya, ni oxaawaya oNeyapoli." 
Acts16:12 Wa vaavaale naapwaha nirowaka oFilipi, eri esidade etokweene ya elapo ya oMasedoniya yaari yoolamuliwa ni aRooma. Iwe naakhala mahuku makina." 
Acts16:13 Wa eSaabadu naavenya osidade nirowaka mukerekhere mooloko, weiwo naawehereraahu ophwanya nipuro na nivekelo. Naakilaathi ni naapacera wuuluma ni asithiyana yaathukumanne weiwe." 
Acts16:14 Mmoha a yaawo yiiwale aari muthiyana oomoova Muluku iitthaniwa Lidiya, namathumiha a ekuwo yooxeera a esidade ya oThiyatira. Apwiya yaahula murimaawe weera iiwexexe mutthenga wa Pawulo." 
Acts16:15 Apatisiweene vamoha ni yaawo a vaatewawe, owo aanilattula eeraka: “Nyuwo muupuwela weera miyo kiri muKristu, ngwe ni mukhale owannyaka.” Ni hiiho owo aaniviriyela." 
Acts16:16 Nihuku nimoha, nirowaka vanipuroni na nivekelo, naakumanano epottha emoha yaarino munepa mwa yoowo yaatthoma sa ohoolo. Eyo yaawina musurukhu mwincipale wa asineenaaya ni sootthoma." 
Acts16:17 Muthiyana owo annamutthara Pawulo ni hiyo, akhuwelaka: “Asilopwana ala ti arumeiyi a Muluku musulusulu ni anoolaleerani ephiro yoovuluxa.”" 
Acts16:18 Owo aapwaherera opaka yeeyo mahuku mancipale. Ommaleloni Pawulo aanyoonyiwa moota wooweera aarukunuwa, ni aaheerela munepa: “Mwa Nsina na Yeesu Kristu miyo kinoolamulela weera okhume mwa yoowo!” Ehuhuweene yeeyo munepa waamuhiya." 
Acts16:19 Esuwelaka weera mootaaya woowina waamala, asineene a epottha yaamvara Pawulo ni Sila ni yaahaapurulela mmuttettheni mutokweene wa esidade mpaka ohoolo wa asitokweene." 
Acts16:20 Vano, yaaronghaka wa asitokweene yaaweerela: “Asilopwana ala ti aYuda ni annasesera esidadaahu," 
Acts16:21 elaleiyaka ikhovelelo soohitthuniheriwa wa hiyo aRooma waakhulela, naari opaka.”" 
Acts16:22 Atthu ancipale yaahiithukumanyiha ni soomoothera Pawulo ni Sila, ni asitokweene yaahaalamulela weera eruliwe ikuwosaya ni ewaxuliwe." 
Acts16:23 Yaawaxuliwaaya vancipale, yaawaleliwa okaliposo. Namalipelela aahaakhela nlamulo weera aawehawehe nnenesene." 
Acts16:24 Aakhelaka nlamulo nne, owo aahaavonyera mpatta wa okaliposo mpuwaxa, ni aahaatthukelela inaawosaya vamukhukuluni." 
Acts16:25 Woophiyera ehuhu ya ohiyu eriyari, Pawulo ni Sila yeera evekelaka ni emwiipelaka icipo Muluku. Akina yaatthukiwe yaawiiwa." 
Acts16:26 Wootutuxereya waakhala otetereya otokotoko wa elapo, moota wooweera mathipelo a ekaliposo yaattikinyiwa. Woowaakuveya milako sootheene saahuleya, ni onyooro wa ootthukiwa ootheene waakwaseya." 
Acts16:27 Namalipelela aavenya, ni oonaka milako sa ekaliposo soohuleya, aatholola ekatana weera iixiive, uupuwelaka weera anamatthukiwa yaatthawa." 
Acts16:28 Pawulotho aakhuwela: “Muhipake yeeyo, hiyo ootheene nri muumu!”" 
Acts16:29 Namalipelela aavekela yoomwaleela, anavolowa atthimakaka ni athukumelaka, anakokhora ohoolo wa Pawulo ni Sila." 
Acts16:30 Vano aahaakhumihera vaate ni aahaakoha: “Asitokweene, ontthuneya opaka eheeni weera kivuluxiwe?”" 
Acts16:31 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Mwaaroromele Apwiya Yeesu ni mmwivuluxiwe, nyuwo ni yaawo a vaatewanyu.”" 
Acts16:32 Awo yaamulaleera masu a Muluku yoowo ni wa ootheene a vaatewawe. 
Acts16:33 Ehuhuweene yeele ya ohiyu ole, namalipelela aahaakuxa ni aarapiha makhwattaaya. Vahoolowaya owo ni awawe ootheene yaapatisiwa." 
Acts16:34 Vano aahaakuxa mpaka vaatewawe, aahaarumeela yooca ni aahakalala vancipale vamoha ni ootheene a vaatewawe mwaha wa omuroromela Muluku." 
Acts16:35 Oxaawaya, asitokweene yaahaarumiha anakhottwaaya wa namalipelela ni nlamulo nna: “Mwaataphule asilopwana awo.”" 
Acts16:36 Namalipelela aamweerela Pawulo: “Asitokweene aalamulela weera nyuwo ni Sila mutaphuliwe. Vano munoowera okhuma. Murowe ni murettele.” 
Acts16:37 Pawulotho aaweerela anakhotto: “Nri mweeraru nireene hiyo aRooma, awo aaniwaxula mwaatthuni, nihithorihiwe moota wootthuneya, ni yaaniwalela okaliposo. Ni vano antthuna onitaphula hiyo muxiirini? Hoye! Eweeke awo asineenaaya enikhumiheke!”" 
Acts16:38 Anakhotto yaahaathalihera yeeyo asitokweene, ni awo, yiiwaka weera Pawulo ni Sila yaari aRooma, yaahoopihiwa." 
Acts16:39 Yaahoorwa waavarela mwetto ni yaakhumiheraka vaate wa ekaliposo, yaahaavekela weera evenye esidade ele." 
Acts16:40 Aakhumalaawe Pawulo ni Sila mukaliposo, yaarowa vaate wa Lidiya, weiwo yaakumannaayawo ni axunna, ni yaahaalipihera mirima. Vano yaapwaha." 
Acts17:1 Eviraka wAnfipoli ni wApoloniya, yaaphiya oTesalonika weiwo yaaraayawo eSinagoga* ya aYuda." 
Acts17:2 Ntoko yaakhovelelaaya, Pawulo aarowa muSinagogani*, ni wa iSaabadu tthaaru aahuuluma ni yaawo sa Yoolempwa*," 
Acts17:3 aathaliheraka ni awooniheraka weera waatthuneya Kristu ohaawa ni ovenyerera mookhwaani, eeraka: “Yeesweene Yoowo kinoolaleeraakani, ti Kristu.”" 
Acts17:4 Akina a aYuda yaaviriyeliwa ni yaamutthara Pawulo ni Sila. Ancipale a aGrego yaamoova Muluku nitho athiyana atokweene ancipale yaamuttharatho. 
Acts17:5 aYudatho yaakhala ni nrima. Awo yaahaathukumanyiha akina ootakhala murima variyari wa oohivara muteko, ni ethukumanaka atthu ancipale, yaapacera onyakulihana otokotoko musidadeni. Yaaphiya vaate wa Yasoni emwaasaka Pawulo ni Sila weera yaapurulele eriyari ya atthu ancipale." 
Acts17:6 Wa soothesene, ehaaphwanyaka, yaampurula Yasoni ni axunna akina ohoolo wa asitokweene a esidade ekhuwelaka: “Asilopwana awo antannya munyakunyaku elapo yootheene vano aaphiya wenno," 
Acts17:7 ni Yasoni oowaakhelela owannyawe. Ootheene awo annavirikanyiha ikano sa Seesari, yeeraka weera ookhala mwene mukina oniitthaniwa Yeesu.”" 
Acts17:8 Yiiwaka yeeyo, atthu ancipale ni asitokweene a esidade yaakhala ni owali." 
Acts17:9 Vano yaalivihiwaaya musurukhu ni Yasoni ni axunna akina, yaahaataphula." 
Acts17:10 Moohiyuni, axunna yaamurumiha Pawulo ni Sila oBereya. Ephiyaka iwe, yaarowa muSinagogani* mwa aYuda." 
Acts17:11 Atthu a oBereya yaari maneethixa waapwaha atthu a oTesalonika. Yaahaakhela mutthenga ni otthuna otokotoko, esomelaka mahuku ootheene Yoolempwa* weera yoone sootheene saari hiiho." 
Acts17:12 Vano, ancipale variyari wa aYuda, athiyana aGrego atokweene ni alopwana, yaaroromela." 
Acts17:13 Esuwelaka aYuda a oTesalonika weera Pawulo eera alaleiyaka masu a Muluku oBereya, yaarowa iwe, enaasesera ni enaanyakuliha atthu ancipale." 
Acts17:14 Woowaakuveya axunna yaamurumiha Pawulo wa elapo ya ephareiya, mene Sila ni Timootheyo yaahala oBereya." 
Acts17:15 Atthu yaarongwe ni Pawulo, yaamuhoola mpaka wAtheena, epwahaka ni malamulo a Pawulo weera Sila ni Timootheyo ekumane ni yoowo, wawereya okhale woowaakuveya." 
Acts17:16 Aawehereraka awo wAtheena, Pawulo aanyoonyiwa vancipale mmunepanimwawe woowoona weera esidade yaasareya miluku sikina." 
Acts17:17 Tivawo mahuku ootheene annuuluma muSinagogani* ni aYuda, ni ni aGrego yaamoova Muluku, nitho aahuuluma mmuttettheni mutokweene wa esidade ni yaale yaaphwanyaneya weiwe."
