Acts17:18 Asuweli akina a Epikuro ni a mahusiho a Estoyika yannatthekula ni Pawulo. Akina yaakoha yeeraka: “Eheeni ontthunaawe ohima, namatipura ola?” Akina yaaheera: “Nnoona ntoko owo onlaleiya miluku sa anamarwa,” niwoko Pawulo aalaleiya masu ooreeraxa mwaha wa Yeesu ni wa ovenyerera." 
Acts17:19 Yaamukuxa ni yaamurongha omuthukumanoni wAreyopago*, yaamukonghaaya: “Nihusiho heeni nnyowani nyuwo munlaleiyaanyu?" 
Acts17:20 Nyuwo munoonihera miruku sikina soohisuwanyeya, ni nintthuna osuwela sintaphulelaaya iyo.”" 
Acts17:21 Vano, atthu a wAtheena ni anamarwa yaakhala weiwo, yaavira ehuhuwaaya yiiwaka ni ethalihaka mahuku ootheene miruku sinyowani soopwahaxa." 
Acts17:22 Vano Pawulo aaheemela vamuthukumanoni wAreyopagu* ni aaweerela: “Atthu a wAtheena! Kinoona weera nyuwo munnasivela vancipale ottittimiha miluku," 
Acts17:23 niwoko keettaka musidadenimwanyu kooweha nnenesene icaambulosanyu sa ediini, ni koophwanyatho nipuro na ecaambulo ekina ni yoolempwa ela: WA MULUKU OOHISUWANYEYA. Moone miyo kinoolaleerani Yoowo nyuwo munimulapaanyu muhimusuwelaka." 
Acts17:24 Muluku opanke elapo ya vathi ni sootheene siri mwemmo, ti Apwiya a wiirimu ni a elapo ya vathi, ni Owo khammaka impa soopakiwa ni atthu." 
Acts17:25 Owo khanrumeeliwa ni matata a atthu ntoko ahaawelaka etthu, niwoko Owo muneenaawe omvaha okumi, omumula ni sootheene wa ootheene." 
Acts17:26 Muluku aampanke mutthu mmoha paahi, ni wa yoowo sookhumelela miloko sootheene sa atthu sinkhala mweelaponi yootheene. Aari Yoowo akhalihale ihuhu ni mapuro miloko saatthuneyaaya omaka." 
Acts17:27 Aapaka yeeyo weera emwaasaase naamwi waatthuneya omwaapaapela, hata ahirakamenle wa khula mutthu a hiyo." 
Acts17:28 Vano, mwa Yoowo hiyo nri ni okumi, nineetta ni ninkhala, ntoko yeenraaya akina a anamaswaanyu ooreera: “Hiyotho nri a ekhapiraawe.”" 
Acts17:29 Nireene hiyo a ekhapira ya Muluku, nihuupuwele weera Muluku onlikana ni icaambulo sa iyuuma soorikaxa, naari sa maluku, soopakiwa ni eruso, naari soowuupuwela sa mutthu." 
Acts17:30 Ehuhu evinre Muluku khaalikelenle ohisuwela iwo, mene vano onlamulela weera mmapuroni moothemwene, ootheene erukunxe mirimasaya." 
Acts17:31 Aakhaliha nihuku nimoha Owo aneeraawe athorihe elapo ni ekhaikhai mwa Mulopwana omuthanlalaawe. Ni ohoonihera yeeyo wa omutthu wootheene, woomuvenyereriha Mulopwana Owo.”" 
Acts17:32 Yiiwaka sa ovenyerera wa anamakhwa akina yaamveiha, ni akinatho yaaheera: “Mwaha wa yeeyo, nnimwiiwe ehuhu ekina.”" 
Acts17:33 Mwa yeeyo Pawulo aahiivenxa variyariwaya. 
Acts17:34 Alopwana akina yaathukumana ni yoowo ni yaaroromela. Variyariwaya aari Diyonisiyo, a wAreyopagu*, nitho muthiyana mmoha iitthaniwa Damari, ni akina vamoha ni yaawo." 
Acts18:1 Vahoolowaya, Pawulo aavenya wAtheena arowaka oKorinto." 
Acts18:2 Weiwo aamukumanano muYuda mmoha iitthaniwa Akila, aayariwe oPonto, aaphiyale vaanaanoru akhumaka wItaliya ni amwaarawe Prisila, niwoko Klawudiyu aalamula weera aYuda ootheene evenye oRooma. Pawulo aarowa" 
Acts18:3 othukumanano yaawo, ni woonaka weera yaarino muteko mmoharu yoowo wa Akila, aakhala ni yaawo avaraka muteko niwoko yaari anamapaka a iheema." 
Acts18:4 eSaabadu ti eSaabadu owo annaavaanyiha muSinagogani* ni annaaviriyela aYuda ni aGrego. 
Acts18:5 Aaphiyalaawe Sila ni Timootheyo oMasedoniya, Pawulo aahiixinnyerera ni nthiti weera alaleiye, aakhalelaka onamoona aYuda weera Yeesu aari Kristu." 
Acts18:6 Emuvirikanyihaka ni emuruwanaka woohihiyerera, aatatha soowarasawe ni aaweerela: “Ephomaanyu emorele mmurumwanyu! Kohoonyawani. Okhuma vaanaano va mpaka ohoolo, kinkela wa amalapo.”" 
Acts18:7 Vano Pawulo aavenya muSinagogani* ni aarowa vaate wa Tisiyu Yustu, aamoova Muluku ni aamanke mukerekhere wa eSinagoga*." 
Acts18:8 Krispo, mutokweene a eSinagoga*, aahaaroromela Apwiya vamoha ni ootheene yaawo a vaatewawe. Ancipale a aKorinto yaamwiiwa yaaroromela ni yaapatisiwa." 
Acts18:9 Ohiyu mmoha Apwiya yaahuuluma ni Pawulo mmooneloni, yeeraka: “Muhoove, mupwaherere wuuluma ni muhiitthuuwe," 
Acts18:10 niwoko kiri ni nyuwo ni khaawo aneera oopakeeni yoonanara, naari oovulaliheni, niwoko kookhalano atthu ancipale musidadeni ela.”" 
Acts18:11 Hiiho Pawulo aakhala weiwe ehuhu ya eyaakha emoha ni eriyari ya eyaakha, axuttihaka masu a Muluku." 
Acts18:12 Areene Galiyo guvernadori a wAkhaya, aYuda ootheene ni murima mmoha yaamvaanelela Pawulo ni yaamukuxa emuronghaka nipuro noowuuluma milattu, emootheraka moota ola:" 
Acts18:13 “Mulopwana ola omviriyela muloko wa atthu omulapa Muluku moota woovirikana ni nlamulonahu.” 
Acts18:14 Pawulo eeraka uulume, Galiyo aaweerela aYuda: “Nyuwo aYuda mwaamoothera sa etthu yootakhala, naari yoonanaraxa, kaamuwiiwani," 
Acts18:15 vaheera yeenre ekhalaka etthu ya masu ni masina a nlamulonanyu asineenaanyu, muulume mulattu nyuwo asineenaanyu. Nkinkhala mphuki a itthusene seiya.”" 
Acts18:16 Aalamulela weera yoomoliwe vanipuroni noowuuluma milattu nne. 
Acts18:17 Vano ootheene yaamvara Sostene, mutokweene a eSinagoga*, ni yaammana ohoolo wa nipuro nne. Vaheera Galiyo khaapwatthenle etthu." 
Acts18:18 Pawulo aakhala oKorinto ehuhu ekina, ni vahoolowaya, aahaalaxera axunna ni aalapuwa munikulani arowaka oSiriya ahooliwaka ni Prisila ni Akila. Ahinaaye ovolowa munikulani, aamettha toko mayihaawe oKenkhreya niwoko na nlipelo aapankaawe." 
Acts18:19 Yaaphiya wEfeso weiwo Pawulo aamuhiyalaawe Prisila ni Akila. Wa soothesene, owo avolowaka muSinagogani*, aapacera wuuluma ni aYuda." 
Acts18:20 Awo yaamvekela weera nlelo akhale, mene khaatthunne." 
Acts18:21 Vano, apwahaka, aahaaroromeliha eeraka: “Muluku atthuna, nkihokoleele.” Vahoolo wa yeeyo, aavolowa munikulani ni aavenya wEfeso." 
Acts18:22 Aphiyaka oSesareya, aarowa okerexa weera uulumihe ni vahoolowaya aarowa wAntiyokiya." 
Acts18:23 Eviraka ehuhu ekina wAntiyokiya, Pawulo aavenya iwe ni aaheetteetta elapo yootheene ya oGalasiya ni ya oFrisiya, aalipiheraka oohusera ootheene." 
Acts18:24 Yeereiyaka hiiho, muYuda mmoha iitthaniwa Apolo aayariwe wAlesandriya aaphiya wEfeso. Owo aari namalaleiya a nnene ni oowera mwa Yoolempwa*." 
Acts18:25 Aaxuttihiwa mwa ephiro ya Apwiya, ni aahuuluma ni aaxuttiha ni nthiti ntokotoko moota wa nnenesene sa Yeesu, naamwi asuwelaka paahi opatiso wa Yohaane." 
Acts18:26 Aapacera wuuluma muSinagogani* ni murima woolipa. Prisila ni Akila emwiiwakaru, yaamulattula weera arowe owannyaya, ni yaamuthalihera ephiro ya Muluku moota wooreerela." 
Acts18:27 Atthunaka orowa wAkhaya, axunna yaamulipihera ni yaahaalepela oohusera weera emwaakhelele. Aphiyakaru, aahaakhavihera vancipale yaawo yaaroromenle niwoko na mahala a Muluku," 
Acts18:28 niwoko aahaavirikanyiha nnenesene aYuda mwaatthuni, ooniheraxaka ni Yoolempwa* weera Yeesu ti Kristu." 
Acts19:1 Apolo areene oKorinto, Pawulo aavira ilapo sa ottuttuwani ni aaphiya wEfeso. Iwe aahaaphwanya oohusera akina" 
Acts19:2 ni aahaakoha: “Nyuwo mohaakhela Munepa Wootteela mwaaroromenlaanyu?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Hoye, hata khaniiwale weera wookhala Munepa Wootteela.”" 
Acts19:3 Pawulo aahaakoha: “Vano, ni opatiso heeni nyuwo mwaapatisiwaanyu?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Opatiso wa Yohaane.”" 
Acts19:4 Pawulo aaweerela: “Opatiso wa Yohaane waari opatiso wa orukunxa murima. Owo aaleela muloko wa atthu weera omuroromele Yoowo eera arwe vahoolowawe, eyo tiiyo omuroromele Yeesu.”" 
Acts19:5 Yiiwaka yeeyo, awo yaapatisiwa mwa Nsina na Apwiya Yeesu." 
Acts19:6 Pawulo awiikaatheraka matata, waahaakhuruwela Munepa Wootteela, ni yaapacera wuuluma ni muulumo ni othalihera otthuna wa Muluku." 
Acts19:7 Yaariwo wookwanaka asilopwana muloko neeli. 
Acts19:8 Pawulo aavolowa muSinagogani*, ni mwemmo annuuluma ahoovaka etthu wa nyeeri miraru, avaanyihanaka nnenesene sa omwene wa Muluku." 
Acts19:9 Akinatho a yaawo yaahuumiha mirimasaya, enakhootta ororomela, enapacera wuuluma soonanara sa Ephiro mwaatthuni. Vano Pawulo aasusa wa yaawo. Aakuxaka oohusera, annaaxuttiha khula nihuku muxikolani ya Tiranu." 
Acts19:10 Eyo yaapwaherera wa iyaakha piili, moota wooweera aYuda ni aGrego ootheene yaamanke elapo ya wAsiya yaahiiwa masu a Apwiya." 
Acts19:11 Muluku aapaka sootikhiniha sitokotoko ni matata a Pawulo," 
Acts19:12 moota wooweera mpaka misako ni ikuwo sa namatterekha Pawulo aatamvaawe saakuxiwa, eniikaatheriwa aretta, vano yaalamihiwa iretta ni minepa soonanara saavenya wa yaawo." 
Acts19:13 Akina a aYuda yoomola minepa soonanara, yaaheerera oromola Nsina na Apwiya Yeesu wa yaale yaarino minepa soonanara yeeraka: “Mwa Nsina na Yeesu mwa Yoowo Pawulo onimulaleiyaawe, kinoolamulela weera ovenye!”" 
Acts19:14 Yaawo yaapaka yeeyo yaari anamwane athanneeli a Skewa, muYuda mutokweene mmoha a asaserdoti*." 
Acts19:15 Nihuku nimoha munepa woonanara mmoha waawaakhula: “Yeesu koomusuwela, Pawulo koosuwela weera ori taani, mene nyuwo taani?”" 
Acts19:16 Vano mutthu aarino munepa woonanara aahaatuphela yaawo ni aahaavara, aamanaka moota wootepaxa, ni awo yaatthawa mpaani ehiwanre ni evulanleene." 
Acts19:17 Esuweliwakaru yeeyo ni aYuda ni aGrego ootheene yaamanke wEfeso, ootheene yaawo yaavariwa ni woova, ni Nsina na Apwiya Yeesu naahunnuwihiwa." 
Acts19:18 Ancipale a yaawo yaaroromenle, yaahoowa ni yaalapa ehimaka mwaatthuni mitekosaya soonanara." 
Acts19:19 Ancipale a yaawo yaapanke miteko sa wiiphini yaathukumanya ilivurusaya ni yaahisa. Waalikeliwaka mutteengo wa ilivuru iye, yaahoona weera saari idrakema* 50 000." 
Acts19:20 Mooteene yoola masu a Apwiya yannamwaramwareya ni yaatepa olipaxa. 
Acts19:21 Vahoolowaya, Pawulo aalakela mMunepani orowa oYerusaleemu, aviraka oMasedoniya ni wAkhaya. Owo aaheera: “Vahoolo wa okhala weiwo, ontthuneyatho weera kirowe kaxekure oRooma.”" 
Acts19:22 Vano aahaarumiha oMasedoniya eeli a anamakhaviheraawe, Timootheyo ni Erasto, mene owo aakhala ehuhu ekina elapo ya wAsiya." 
Acts19:23 Ehuhuweene yeele waakhala onyakulihana otokotoko niwoko na Ephiro. 
Acts19:24 Vano, aakhala weiwe namahana a iyuuma soorikaxa mmoha iitthaniwa Demetriyo. Owo aapaka icaambulo sikhaaneene sa iyuuma sa empa ya muluku Artemide, ni aahaavaha owina vancipale wa yaale anaruso yaavara muteko ni yoowo." 
Acts19:25 Aahaathukumanyiha yaawo ni akina a eruswaaya ni aaweerela: “Asikhwaaka, nyuwo moosuwela weera ninnaakhela owina otokotoko ni muteko ola," 
Acts19:26 ni munoona ni muniiwa moota mulopwana owo Pawulo onaaviriyelaawe ni onaahapuxaawe atthu ancipale a wenno wEfeso nitho a elapo yootheene ya wAsiya. Owo oneera weera miluku soopakiwa ni matata a atthu khasihiyono miluku. 
Acts19:27 Vano, woopiha khoohiyono paahi weera eruswaahu enooyelela epilaaya, menetho weera empa ya muluku mutokweene Artemide enoowera oyeleela epilaaya. Hiiho, wunnuwawawe muluku owo osuweliwe elapo yootheene ya wAsiya ni elapo ya vathi yootheene, onuuramusiwe.”" 
Acts19:28 Yiiwaka yeeyo, awo yaanyoonyiwa ni yaapacera okhuwela: “Artemide a wEfeso ti mutokweene!”" 
Acts19:29 Woowaakuveya esidade yootheene yaanyakuleleya. Atthu a wEfeso yaahaavara ooweeli a oMasedoniya Gaiyu, ni Aristarko, asikhwaawe Pawulo, etthimakaka ni murima mmoha wa nipuro anthukumanaayawo atthu." 
Acts19:30 Pawulo aatthuna wiixoonihera ohoolo wa atthu ancipale, vaheera oohusera khaayaamutthunihale." 
Acts19:31 Asitokweene akina a elapo ele, asinthamenaawe Pawulo, yaaphiyatho weera emooperere emvekelaka weera ahirowe vanipuroni na othukumana nne." 
Acts19:32 Muthukumano khawaareherereiye: akina yaakhuwela etthu emoha, ni akina etthu ekinatho. Atthu ancipale a muloko khayaasuwenle eheeni yaarowenlaayawo." 
Acts19:33 aYuda yaamukakhela Alesandre ohoolo wa muthukumano, ni akina a atthu ancipale yaamuleela yeeyo yaatthuneya ohima yoowo. Alesandre aahaathoonyera ni ntata, atthunaka wiixaakiha ohoolo wa muloko wa atthu." 
Acts19:34 Vaheera esuwelakaru weera owo aari muYuda, ootheene yannakhuwela ni nsu nimoha wa iwoora piili yeeraka: “Artemide a wEfeso ti mutokweene!”" 
Acts19:35 Namalepa a esidade ahaamaaliha atthu ancipale ni aaweerela: “Atthu a wEfeso, ootheene ansuwela weera esidade ya wEfeso ti namathokorora a empa ya Artemide mutokweene ni a yoocaambulaaya yaamonre wiirimu." 
Acts19:36 Tivawo, yeenre eyo ekhalaka yoohikhootteya, mmaale ni muhipake etthu ya mvai." 
Acts19:37 Nyuwo mohaaruuha va asilopwana ala, naamwi awo ehiiyale empa ya muluku, naari ehimveihaka mulukwaahu." 
Acts19:38 Demetriyo ni asikhwaawe yaarino yoowoothera emoha wa mukina, sookhala impa soowuuluma milattu soohuleya, ni aakhalatho aphuki. Awo anoowera waathalihera soowootherasaya." 
Acts19:39 Yaariwotho etthu nyuwo muntthunaanyu ohima, eyo enoolakeliwa mmuthukumanoni wa milattu." 
Acts19:40 Moota eraaya, nihanle vakhaani wootheriwa niwoko na onyakulihana wu wa olelo. Eyo yakhumelela, khanaawera waakiha onyakulihana wu, woonaka weera khaninkhala nthowa wa wu.”" 
Acts19:41 Ni eerakaru hiiho, aamaliha muthukumano." 
Acts20:1 Omalaka onyakulihana, Pawulo aarumiha owiithana oohusera, ni vahoolo wa olipiha mirimasaya, aahaalaxera ni aarowa mpaka oMasedoniya." 
Acts20:2 Aaheetteetta elapo ele alipihaka mirima sa axunna ni masu mancipale, ni ommaleloni aaphiya oGresiya," 
Acts20:3 aakhanlaawewo nyeeri miraru. Owo eeraka avolowe munikulani weera arowe oSiriya, aYuda yaamvaanelela yoowo, tivawo aalakenlaawe ohokoleela oMasedoniya," 
Acts20:4 ahooliwaka ni Sopatro, mwaana a Piro a oBereya; Aristarko ni Sekunda ooweeli a oTesalonika; Gaiyu a oDerbe; Timootheyo nitho Tikhiko ni Trofimo a elapo ya wAsiya." 
Acts20:5 Asilopwana awo yaahoolela ni yaaniweherera oTrowade. 
Acts20:6 Naapwaha munikulani oFilipi vahoolo wa efesta ya ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu, ni eviraka mahuku mathanu, naathukumana ni yaawo oTrowade, naaraahuwo mahuku mathannameeli." 
Acts20:7 Nihuku noopacera na esimana, naathukumana weera ece, ni Pawulo aahuuluma ni atthu. Atthunaka opwaha oxaawaya, owo aapwaherera wuuluma mpaka ohiyu eriyari." 
Acts20:8 Waakhala onyaari mwincipale mukwartuni musulu naathukumannaahu. 
Acts20:9 Mmiravo mmoha, iitthaniwa Eutiko, aakilaathiye vaxanelani, aakona vancipale ehuhu ya masu mancipale a Pawulo. Awiniweene ni ikhove, aamorela vathi okhuma mpatta wanaararu wa vasulu. Yaamvenxalaaya, aari ookhweene." 
Acts20:10 Pawulo aakhuruwa, anamuuramela mmiravo ni anamukhubaara eeraka: “Muhituthuwe, niwoko ori ni okumi.”" 
Acts20:11 Vano aawelatho, anakawanya epaawu ni anakhuura. Vahoolowaya aapwaherera wuuluma mpaka oxa, ni aapwaha." 
Acts20:12 Yaamukuxa mmiravo mukumi ni yaalipiheriwa murima vancipale. 
Acts20:13 Wa hiyo, naavolowa munikulani ni naalapuwa nirowaka wAso, weiwo neeraahu namwaakhelele Pawulo munikulani. Owo aalamula hiiho, atthunaka weetta vathi." 
Acts20:14 Aniphwanyakaru, hiyo naamwaakhelela munikulani ni naapwaherera mpaka oMitilene." 
Acts20:15 Naalapuwa, ni oxaawaya naaphiya vakhiviru wa oKhiyo, oxaawaya naalapuwa nirowaka oSamos, ni oxaawayatho naaphiya oMileto." 
Acts20:16 Vano Pawulo aalakela osemba wEfeso weera ahilekele elapo ya wAsiya, niwoko aakuveelaxa ophiya oYerusaleemu wawereya nihinaaye ophiyera nihuku na Pentekoste*." 
Acts20:17 Areene oMileto, Pawulo aarumiha owiitthana asitokweene a ekerexa ya wEfeso." 
Acts20:18 Ephiyakaru, owo aaweerela: “Moosuwela moota kaakhalaaka ehuhu yootheene miyo kaaraaka vamoha ni nyuwo, okhuma nihuku noopacera miyo kaaphiyalaaka elapo ya wAsiya." 
Acts20:19 Kaahaarumeela Apwiya ngwiiyevihani ni maithori, naamwi keereriwaka vancipale ni soovaanela sa aYuda." 
Acts20:20 Moosuwela weera nkaahovela woolaleerani yootheene yeeyo yaari ya mpuhaanyu, kaahooxuttihanitho sootheene mwaatthuni ni empa empa." 
Acts20:21 Kaahaakhalela onamoona aYuda nitho aGrego weera ontthuneya awo erukunxele murimaaya wa Muluku ni eroromele mwa Apwiyaahu Yeesu. 
Acts20:22 Vano, keettihiwa ni Munepa, miyo kinrowa oYerusaleemu, kihisuwelaka etthu eneera yakikhumelele weiwo," 
Acts20:23 ohikhanle paahi weera musidadeni sootheene, Munepa Wootteela onnakooperera weera otthukiwa ni soohooxa sinookiweherera." 
Acts20:24 Wa soothesene, nkimpwatthela, naari nkinoonelamo okumaaka etthu yoottittimeheyaxa wa miyo mwaneenaaka. Yoohaawelaaka emoharu eri omaliha otthimakawaka ni okwanihera muteko kaakhenlaaka wa Apwiya Yeesu, eyo tiiyo okhalela onamoona sa masu ooreeraxa a mahala a Muluku." 
Acts20:25 Vano koosuwela weera khaawo a nyuwo miyo koolaleeraakani omwene wa Muluku onrowa woona ekhovaaka emaara ekina. 
Acts20:26 Tivawo miyo kinooleelaakani olelo vaava weera nkinkhala ni milattu mukina a nyuwo ariheya," 
Acts20:27 niwoko kohoolaleerani otthuna wootheene wa Muluku. 
Acts20:28 Mwiipasoope nyuwo asineenaanyu ni muhuwo mwa yoowo Munepa Wootteela owiikaathenraayani ntoko asitokweene ankosoopa*, weera mukukhulele ekerexa ya Muluku Owo othumalaawe ni ephomaawe muneenaawe." 
Acts20:29 Koosuwela weera vahoolo wa opwahawaka, nyiici soolumaxa nsivolowe variyariwanyu ni khasirwa suurela muhuwo." 
Acts20:30 Variyariwanyu eniikhumelele alopwana eneera ekhune ekhaikhai weera yaalokotthe oohusera ni yaatthare yaawo. 
Acts20:31 Tivawo, ngwehawehe. Muupuwelele weera wa iyaakha tthaaru nkinahiyerere omooperera ni maithori ohiyu ni othana khula mutthu a nyuwo." 
Acts20:32 Vano miyo kinoovahererani wa Muluku ni wa masu a mahalaawe. Masu ala anoowera woopuhihani ni woovahani yoohiyeriwa* vamoha ni ootheene yaawo ari ootteelihiwa. 
Acts20:33 Nkaahaawela iyuuma soorikaxa, naari ikuwo sa mutthu mmoha." 
Acts20:34 Nyuwo asineenaanyu moosuwela weera matataaka ala yaawina soohaawelasaka ni soohaawela sa asikhwaaka. 
Acts20:35 Moovaranimwaka muteko woovihaxa, kaawooniherani weera ontthuneya waakhavihera oohilipa ni muteko woovihaxa, nuupuwelelaka masu a Apwiya Yeesu mwaneenaaya yeenre: ‘Fataari ovaha, ohikhanle waakhela.’”" 
Acts20:36 Amalihaka ohima yeeyo, aakokhora vamoha ni ootheene ni aavekela." 
Acts20:37 Ootheene yaahiinla vancipale, ni emukhubaaraka, yaamubeeca." 
Acts20:38 Yaathananihale vancipale yaari masu eenraawe weera khamurwa moonatho ekhovaaka. Vano yaamuhoola mpaka munikulani. 
Acts21:1 Naalaxerakaru, naavolowa munikulani ni naalapuwa nirowaka oKosi. Oxaawaya naarowa oRodi ni evenyero vaavaale mpaka oPatara." 
Acts21:2 Niphwanyaka nikula neera nilapuwele oFenisiya, naavolowa ni naapwaha." 
Acts21:3 Noonakaru oKipro ni niviraka mpattaaya ohitto, naalapuwela oSiriya. Naakhuruwa oTiro, weiwo nikulanahu neeraaya nakuruxe murindaaya." 
Acts21:4 Naaphwanyaka oohusera weiwo, naakhala ni yaawo mahuku mathannameeli. Awo, mMunepani, yaamooperera Pawulo weera ahirowe oYerusaleemu." 
Acts21:5 Nimalihakatho ehuhuwaahu weiwe, naapwaha ni naapwaherera mukwahaahu. Oohusera ootheene ni axaaraya ni anamwanaaya yaanihoola mpaka okhwipi wa esidade, ni iwe, mukerekhere wa ephareiya, naakokhora ni naavekela." 
Acts21:6 Nilaxeranaka, naavolowa munikulani, ni awo yaahokoleela owannyaya." 
Acts21:7 Okhuma oTiro naapwaherera mukwahaahu ni naaphiya oPitolemaide weiwo naawuulumihalaahu axunna ni naakhanlaahu nihuku nimoha. 
Acts21:8 Nipwahaka oxaawaya, naaphiya oSesareya ni naakhala vaate wa Filipe, namasu ooreeraxa*, mmoha a athanneeli." 
Acts21:9 Owo aakhalano aximwali axexe yaari maprofeeti* a Muluku. 
Acts21:10 Nimalaka weiwo mahuku makina, aahoorwa mprofeeti mmoha iitthaniwa Agabo, akhumaka oYudeiya." 
Acts21:11 Akumanaka ni hiyo, aamukuxa laamba a Pawulo, ni atthukaka matataawe ni inaawosawe, aaheera: “Munepa Wootteela weenre hiiho: ‘Mooteene yoola, aYuda eniimutthuke muneene a laamba ola oYerusaleemu ni eniimvaherere wa amalapo.’”" 
Acts21:12 Niiwakaru yeeyo, hiyo ni atthu a weiwe naamudyoonttelela Pawulo weera ahirowe oYerusaleemu." 
Acts21:13 Vano Pawulo aawaakhula: “Heeni nyuwo muniinlaanyu ni munthananihaanyu murimaaka? Koolikana khoohiyono otthukiwa paahi, menetho weera kikhwe oYerusaleemu niwoko na Nsina na Apwiya Yeesu.”" 
Acts21:14 Woonaka weera khanaawera omviriyela, naamuhiya ni naaheera: “Otthuna wa Muluku opakiwe.”" 
Acts21:15 Vahoolowaya, naahiireherera ni naarowa oYerusaleemu." 
Acts21:16 Akina a oohusera a oSesareya yaanihoola ni yaanikuxa, enironghaka vaate wa Munasoni, weiwo waatthuneyaaya weera nikhale. Owo aari mutthu a oKipro ni mmoha a oohusera oopacera." 
Acts21:17 Naphiyalaahu oYerusaleemu, axunna yaanaakhelela ni ohakalala." 
Acts21:18 Oxaawaya Pawulo aarowa ni hiyo weera nimukumanane Yakobe ni asitokweene a ekerexa ootheene yaari weiwe. 
Acts21:19 Pawulo aawuulumiha ni aahaathalihera nnenesene yeeyo Muluku aapakaawe variyari wa amalapo niwoko na mutekwaawe. 
Acts21:20 Yiiwaka yeeyo, yaamuttottopela Muluku ni yaamweerela Pawulo: “Ntoko munoonaanyu, munna, aakhala aYuda ancipale aroromenle ni ootheene awo ari ni nthiti munlamuloni." 
Acts21:21 Awo yaaleeliwa weera nyuwo munaaxuttiha aYuda ootheene ankhala variyari wa amalapo weera esuse wa mahusiho a Moisesi, ngweerelaka weera ehiwiinele anamwanaaya, naari ehitthare ikhovelelosahu." 
Acts21:22 Nneereke hai? Vekhaikhai awo anoosuwela weera moophiya," 
Acts21:23 tivawo mupake yeeyo hiyo nnooleelaahuni. Ari ni hiyo asilopwana axexe yaalipenle. 
Acts21:24 Mwaakuxe asilopwana ala ni mwiirapihe vamoha ni yaawo ni mwaalivele weera emetthe mayihi. Hiiho ootheene anoosuwela weera kheehiyono ekhaikhai yeeyo enghimmwa ya nyuwo, mene weera mumpwaherera wiiwelela nlamulo." 
Acts21:25 Mwaha wa amalapo arukunxale murima, nohaalepela yoolakelaahu weera ehiyeke inama sooveleeliwa wa miluku sikina, ehiwure ephome ya inama sinnyopotoliwa, ni ehiraruwe.”" 
Acts21:26 Oxaawaya Pawulo aahaakuxa asilopwana ale ni aahiirapiha vamoha ni yaale. Vahoolowaya aarowa Empa ya Muluku weera aaleele ehuhu orapiha eneeraaya ekwanihere ni nihuku nlivo nneeraaya nipakiwe wa mutthu ti mutthu. 
Acts21:27 Ekhuveelaka omaliha mahuku mathannameeli, aYuda akina a elapo ya wAsiya, emoonaka Pawulo Mpaani mwa Muluku, yaahaasesera atthu ancipale ni yaamvara" 
Acts21:28 ekhuwelaka: “aYixrayeli, munikhavihere! Ola ti mulopwana onaaxuttiha ootheene a ilapo sootheene itthu siniittana ni mulokwaahu, nlamulonahu ni nipuro nna. Ohiya toko yeeyo, owo aahaavoleiha aGrego Mpaani mwa Muluku ni aananariha Nipuro Nootteela* nna.”" 
Acts21:29 Khalayi yaamoona muwEfeso Trofimo vamoha ni Pawulo musidadeni ni yaahuupuwela weera Pawulo aamuvoleiha Mpaani mwa Muluku. 
Acts21:30 Esidade yootheene yaanyakuleleya ni atthu ancipale yaathukumana. Emvaraka Pawulo, yaampurulela vaate wa Empa ya Muluku, ni woowaakuveya milako saawaliwa." 
Acts21:31 Yeereraka omwiiva, muhooleli a anakhotto a aRooma aahaakhela ihaali weera esidade yootheene ya oYerusaleemu eri ni owali." 
Acts21:32 Woowaakuveya owo aahaakuxa asitokweene ni anakhotto akina ni aatthimakela variyari wa atthu ancipale. Emoonaka muhooleli ni anakhottwaawe, yaahiya ommana Pawulo." 
Acts21:33 Muhooleli aaphiya, anamutthuka ni analamulela weera owo atthukiwe ni onyooro miili. Vano aakoha weera owo aari taani ni aapanke eheeni." 
Acts21:34 Akina a atthu ancipale yaakhuwela etthu emoha, ni akinatho etthu ekina. Ahiweraka osuwela nnenesene yeeyo yaakhumelenle niwoko na onyakuleleya, muhooleli ole aahaalamulela weera Pawulo aronghiwe okwarteli." 
Acts21:35 Aphiyakaru vaskadani, onyakuleleya wa atthu ancipale waatepaxa moota wooweera waatthuneya owo oteexiwa ni anakhotto." 
Acts21:36 Atthu ancipale yaamutthanre yannapwaherera okhuwela: “Mmviive!” 
Acts21:37 Anakhotto yeeraka emvoleihe Pawulo mukwarteli, owo aamvekela muhooleli a anakhotto: “Kooleelekeni etthu?” Owo aamukoha Pawulo: “Nyuwo munuuluma eGrego?" 
Acts21:38 Nyuwo khamuhiyono ngwExipitu khalayeene vakhaani aapacenre onyakulihana, ni aakunxe munikareni anamwiiva macira miloko mixexe?”" 
Acts21:39 Pawulo aamwaakhula: “Kiri muYuda a oTarso, esidade yoottittimiheyaxa ya elapo ya oSilisiya. Mukihiye kuulume ni muloko wa atthu.”" 
Acts21:40 Atthuniheriwaka ni muhooleli, Pawulo eemenleene vaskadani, aahaamaaliha aathoonyeraka ni matata. Emaalakaru ootheene, aaweerela ni nuulumo na eHeberi:" 
Acts22:1 “Axunna ni asitiithi, mwiiwe vano wiixaakihawaka.”" 
Acts22:2 Yiiwaka weera uuluma ni nuulumo na eHeberi, yaamaala vancipale. Vano Pawulo aaweerela:" 
Acts22:3 “Kiri muYuda kiyariwe oTarso, elapo ya oSilisiya, mene kihuwiwe musidadeni yeela. Kaaxuttihiwa nnenesene ni Gamaliyeli munlamuloni noolipaxa na makholowaahu, kimukhalelaka nthiti Muluku ntoko muraanyu nyuwo ootheene olelo." 
Acts22:4 Kaahaattharatthara anamatthara a Ephiro ela mpaka okhwa kaatthukaka alopwana ni athiyana, kaavonyeraka mukaliposo." 
Acts22:5 Mwa yeeyo mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* ni muthukumano wootheene wa asitokweene onoowera okhalela onamoona. Wa yaawo kaaphwanya ikaratta wa axunna a oDamasku, ni kaarowa mpaka wu weera kaaruuhe atthu awo ntoko ootthukiwa oYerusaleemu weera ettaruxiwe." 
Acts22:6 Vano, wookwana nsuwa vamuru, keera kaattamelaka oDamasku, ni woowaakuveya, waara otokotoko waarweenle wiirimu waamwaleela mukhwipimwaka." 
Acts22:7 Kaamorela vatthayani ni kaahiiwa nsu nimoha naakeerenle: ‘Sawuli, Sawuli, heeni munkisoondaanyu?’" 
Acts22:8 Vano kaakoha: ‘Apwiya, Nyuwo taani?’ Ni Awo yaakaakhula: ‘Miyo ti Yeesu a oNasarete, mwa Yoowo nyuwo munimusoondaanyu.’" 
Acts22:9 Yaawo yaakihoolale yaahoona waara iwe, mene khayiiwexenxe nsu na Yaale yuulumale ni miyo." 
Acts22:10 Hiiho kaahaakoha: ‘Keereke hai, Apwiya?’ Vano Apwiya yaaheera: ‘Muvenye ni mwavolowe oDamasku, ni weiwo mmuleeliwe yeeyo entthuneya opaka.’" 
Acts22:11 Yaawo yaari vamoha ni miyo yaakeettiha ekivarenleene moono mpaka oDamasku, niwoko nkaawera woona mwaha wa otutha wa waara." 
Acts22:12 Mulopwana mmoha iitthaniwa Ananiya, mulopwana oneetta moota woororomeleya mwaha wa nlamulo ni oottittimihiwa ni aYuda ootheene ankhala weiwe," 
Acts22:13 aahoorwa wa miyo, ni akaattamelaka, aakeerela: ‘Munna Sawuli, moonetho.’ Ehuhuweene yeele kaawera woona." 
Acts22:14 Vano owo aakeerela: ‘Muluku a makholowaahu aahoothanlani nyuwo weera musuwele otthunawawe, mmoone Oororomeleya ni mwiiwe masu a eyanowaawe." 
Acts22:15 Nyuwo mmwikhale namoonaawe wa atthu ootheene, mukhalelaka onamoona sa itthu seiya moonnaanyu ni mwiiwalaanyu." 
Acts22:16 Vano, heeni mumpisaanyu? Muvenye, mupatisiwe ni murapihe sootthekasanyu, mwiitthanaka Nsinanawe.’" 
Acts22:17 Ni yaakikhumelela miyo kihokolowaka oYerusaleemu ni keera kivekelaka Mpaani mwa Muluku, kaakomoka mMunepani," 
Acts22:18 ni kaawoona Apwiya yaakeerenle: ‘Mwaakuveke! Mukhume oYerusaleemu woowaakuveya, niwoko atthu a wenno kheerwa yaakhulela onamoonaanyu mwaha wa Miyo.’" 
Acts22:19 Kaaweerela: ‘Apwiya, alopwana awo ansuwela weera kaakhovelela orowa muSinagogani* sootheene weera kaatthuke ni kaawaxule ootheene yaaroromenle mwa Nyuwo." 
Acts22:20 Nitho yaariheyaaya ephome ya namoonaanyu Stefano, miyo kaari weiwe kaakhulelaka wiiva iwe, kithokororaka ikuwo sa yaale yaamwiivale.’" 
Acts22:21 Vano Apwiya yaakeerela: ‘Murowe, Miyo nkoorumiheni ottaiwene, wa amalapo.’”" 
Acts22:22 Atthu ancipale yaamwiiwa Pawulo mpaka aahimmaawe yeeyo. Vano yaakhuwela: “Mumvenxe mulopwana ola wa elapo ya vathi! Khaphwanenle okhala ni okumi!” 
Acts22:23 Ekhuwelaka, yaarula soowarasaya evonyeraka ntthupi osulu," 
Acts22:24 ni mutokweene a anakhotto aalamulela weera Pawulo aronghiwe mukwarteli, awaxuliwe ni akohakohiwe weera amusuwelihe niwoko na heeni atthu yaamukhuwelelaaya moota ole." 
Acts22:25 Emutthukaka yoowo weera awaxuliwe, Pawulo aamweerela kenturiyoni* aari weiwe: “Munnatthuniheriwa ongwaxula muRooma ahinaaye owo othorihiwa?”" 
Acts22:26 Iiwaka yeeyo, aarowa ni aamuleela mutokweene a anakhotto eeraka: “Mmweere hai? Mulopwana ola ti muRooma.”" 
Acts22:27 Vano aarowa wa Pawulo, anamukoha: “Mukileele nyuwo muRooma?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Aani, ti miyo.”" 
Acts22:28 Mutokweene aamweerela: “Miyo kaaliva musurukhu mwincipale weera kikhale muRooma.” Pawulo aamwaakhula: “Kaakhenle okhalawaka muRooma okhuma oyariwawaka.” 
Acts22:29 Yaawo yeera emukohakohe, yaamuhiya woowaakuveya. Mutokweene yoole aahoopihiwa aasuwenlaawe weera aamutthuka muRooma." 
Acts22:30 Oxaawaya, woonaka weera mutokweene a anakhotto aatthuna osuwela nnenesene nthowa Pawulo ootheriwaawe ni aYuda, aamutaphula ni aalamulela waathukumanyiha ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni eSineedriyu* yootheene. Vano, amuruuhaka Pawulo, aamoonihera wa yaawo." 
Acts23:1 Pawulo, awehexexaka eSineedriyu*, aaheera: “Axunnaka, mpaka olelo koheetta vamaithoni wa Muluku ni murima wooreera wootheene.”" 
Acts23:2 Vahoolowaya, mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* Ananiya aahaalamulela yaawo yaamwaattamenle Pawulo weera emane eyanowaawe." 
Acts23:3 Vano Pawulo aamweerela: “Muluku anoovulaliheni, exiri yootteelihiwa! Mukilaathiye vawo weera mukithorihe ni malamulo, mene mulamulelaka weera kivulalihiwe, munkhootta malamulo.”" 
Acts23:4 Yaawo yaamwaattamenle Pawulo yaamweerela: “Nyuwo muntthuna omuruwana mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*?” 
Acts23:5 Pawulo aawaakhula: “Axunna, nkaasuwenle weera owo ti mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, niwoko yoolempwa: ‘Muhimuulumele yoonanara mutokweene a mulokwaanyu.’”" 
Acts23:6 Vano Pawulo, asuwelaka weera akina a yaawo yaari aSaduki* ni akinatho aFarisi*, aakhuwela eriyari ya eSineedriyu*: “Axunna, miyo ti muFarisi*, mwaana a muFarisi*. Miyo kinthorihiwa niwoko kinroromelaaka mwa ovenyerera wa akhwiiye!”" 
Acts23:7 Eeraka hiiho, waakhuma onyakulihana otokotoko variyari wa aFarisi* ni aSaduki*, ni muthukumano waakawanyeya." 
Acts23:8 Vano, aSaduki* anxuttiha weera khoowowo ovenyerera, hata andyelo, hata minepa, mene aFarisi* annaakhulela itthusene seiya sootheene." 
Acts23:9 Waakhala onyakuleleya otokotoko, ni akina a anamawera a nlamulo* yaari aFarisi* yaaheemela ni yaapacera waakhulana: “Khanimphwanya etthu yoonanara mwa mulopwana ola. Taani asuwenle – apaale munepa, hoye hoye ndyelo uuluma ni yoowo?”" 
Acts23:10 Waakhulana waatepaxa, moota wooweera mutokweene a anakhotto aahoova weera Pawulo aarowa omeyanyiwa ni yaale. Aalamulela weera anakhotto erowe ni emuvenxe ni ikuru variyariwaya ni emuronghe mukwarteli." 
Acts23:11 Ohiyu wa oxaawaya Apwiya emwaattamelaka yoowo yaamweerela: “Mulipihe murimaanyu! Ntoko mwaakhalenlaanyu onamoona mwaha wa Miyo oYerusaleemu, hiihotho ontthuneya okhalela onamoona oRooma.”" 
Acts23:12 Oxawaaya, aYuda yaamvaanelela Pawulo ni yaalipelaxa weera khayaarwa eca, naari ewura, ehinaaye omwiiva Pawulo." 
Acts23:13 Yaari woopwaha asilopwana miloko mixexe yaavaanenle yeeyo. 
Acts23:14 Vano, erowaka wa ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni asitokweene a aYuda, yaaweerela: “Noolipelaxa weera khaninrowa oca nihimwiivale Pawulo." 
Acts23:15 Vanonto, nyuwo ni eSineedriyu* mumvekele mutokweene a anakhotto weera owo aruuhiwetho ohoolowanyu, munleelaka weera muntthuna wiiwa nnenesene itthu sootheene sa makhalelowaawe. Hiyo nnikhale oolikaneene weera nimwiive ahinaaye ophiya va.”" 
Acts23:16 Vano musuluwaawe Pawulo, mwaana a murokoriye, iiwalaawe sa ovaanela iwe, aarowa mukwarteli ni aamuthalihera sootheene iye Pawulo." 
Acts23:17 Owo aamwiitthana mmoha a kenturiyoni* ni aamweerela: “Munronghe mmiravo ola wa mutokweene a anakhotto, owo ookhalano etthu yoomuleela.”" 
Acts23:18 Hiiho owo aamurongha wa mutokweene a anakhotto, ni kenturiyoni* aamweerela: “Pawulo namatthukiwa ookiitthana ni ookivekela weera kooruuheleni mmiravo ola niwoko ola ookhalano etthu yoowooleelani.”" 
Acts23:19 Mutokweene a anakhotto aamvara mmiravo ni ntata, aamurowano wiiphiini ni aamukoha: “Ontthuna okileela eheeni?”" 
Acts23:20 Owo aamwaakhula: “aYuda aavaanela weera yoovekeleni waaronghela Pawulo, awo yiixeeraka antthuna waasaasa osuwela nnenesene nthowa na makhalelowaawe." 
Acts23:21 Muhiviriyeliwe, niwoko woopwaha asilopwana miloko mixexe aniireherera weera emwiipithele Pawulo. Awo aalipela weera khaanrowa oca, hata owura ehinaaye omwiiva Pawulo. Vano awo ahiireherera, ewehereraka weera mwaakhulele nivekelonaya.”" 
Acts23:22 Mutokweene a anakhotto aamulaxera mmiravo ni aamweerela: “Ohimuleele mukina weera weyo wookileela yeeyo.” 
Acts23:23 Owo aawiitthana eeli a kenturiyoonaawe* ni aahaalamulela: “Mwaareherere anakhotto macira meeli ni anamweettiha ikavalu* miloko mithannamiili ni anakhotto a mavaka macira meeli, weera erowe oSesareya ohiyuweene yoola epiphi ekumanneene." 
Acts23:24 Mureherere ikavalu* weera Pawulo awele ni akuxiwe ari mukumi aronghiwaka wa guvernadori Felisi.” 
Acts23:25 Mutokweene a anakhotto aalepa ekaratta ni masu ala: 
Acts23:26 ‘Klawudiyu Lisiya wa guvernadori oosuwanyeyaxa Felisi: Salaama. 
Acts23:27 Mulopwana owo aavariwa ni aYuda ni yeera emwiive, miyo ni anakhottwaaka naatthimakenlaahuwo, nnamvuluxa, niwoko kaasuwela weera owo ti muRooma." 
Acts23:28 Kitthunaka osuwela heeni yaamootheraaya, kaamurongha oSineedriyuniwaya*." 
Acts23:29 Kaahoona weera owo aahootheriwa mwaha wa malamulowaaya, mene khayaakhanle etthu yooreera omoothera yoophwanela okhwa, naari okaliposo." 
Acts23:30 Kileeliwaka weera aYuda akina yaavaanela omwiipithela, kohoorumihelani woowaakuveya nyuwo oottittimiheyaxa. Koolamulelatho weera anamootheraawe yooleeleni yeeyo araayano ni yoowo.’" 
Acts23:31 Anakhotto, ekwaniheraka otthunawawe, yaamurongha Pawulo ohiyuweene yoole, ni yaaphiya wAntipatride." 
Acts23:32 Oxaawaya, yaahaahiya anamweettiha a ikavalu* emuhoolaka ni yaawo, akina yaahokoleela mukwarteli." 
Acts23:33 Ephiyaka oSesareya anamweettiha a ikavalu*, yaamvaha ekaratta guvernadori ni yaamvahereratho Pawulo." 
Acts23:34 Guvernadori aasoma ekaratta ni aamukoha weera aari a elapo heeni. Aleeliwaka weera aari a oSilisiya," 
Acts23:35 aamweerela: “Etthweene yeela nkireherere anamootheraanyu yaarwaaka.” Vano aalamulela weera Pawulo alipeleliwe empa etokotoko ya Herodi. 
Acts24:1 Eviraka mahuku mathanu, mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* Ananiya, vamoha ni asitokweene akina a aYuda ni namwaakiha mmoha Tertulo, yaahoorwa oSesareya ni yaamuleela guvernadori soomootherasaya Pawulo." 
Acts24:2 Pawulo iitthaniwaka, Tertulo aamuthalihera Felisi makhalelo a aYuda, eeraka: “Hiyo nookhala mwa murettele ehuhu yincipale niwoko na nyuwo, ni malamulelowaanyu aaruuha ehuhu yooreeraxa wa mulokwaahu." 
Acts24:3 Aani, mwa itthu sootheene ni mipatta sootheene, Felisi oottittimiheyaxa, ninnaakhela yeeyo ni otthapela wincipale." 
Acts24:4 Wa soothesene, nihilekelaka, kinoovekelani weera muniiwe vakhaani." 
Acts24:5 Nohoona weera mulopwana ola ooxupaxupa, niwoko onruuha onyakulihana variyari wa aYuda a ilapo sootheene. Owo ti muhooleli a nihusiho noolokottha na aNasarete," 
Acts24:6 ni mpaka aaheerera oveiha Empa ya Muluku, tivawo nimutthukalaahu." 
Acts24:7  
Acts24:8 Nyuwo mwamukohakoha, munimoonelela weera soowoothera iya sootheene nnimpakelaahu, ti sa ekhaikhai.”" 
Acts24:9 aYuda yaahaakhulela yoowoothera, eroromelihaka weera seiya saathalihiwe saari sa ekhaikhai." 
Acts24:10 Guvernadori amuthoonyeraka eneneero weera uulume, Pawulo aahima: “Koosuwela weera okhuma khalayi mpaka olelo, nyuwo muri mphuki a muloko ola, tivawo kiniixaakiha ni oweherera." 
Acts24:11 Wookhweya munoowera woona weera ehivinre mahuku muloko ni meeli, miyo kaarowa oYerusaleemu olapa." 
Acts24:12 Anamootheraaka khayaakiphwannye kaakhulanaka ni mutthu Mpaani mwa Muluku, hata kaaseseraka atthu ancipale muSinagogani*, naari nipuro nikina na musidade." 
Acts24:13 Hata vakhaani khaangwera owaakhulelani nyuwo soowoothera ankipakelaaya miyo. 
Acts24:14 Wa soothesene, kinooleelani weera kinimulapa Muluku a makholowaahu ntoko namatthara a Ephiro mwa yeeyo awo aniitthanaaya nihusiho noolokottha. Kinroromela sootheene sinaakhulela ni nlamulo ni yeeyo elempwale mmaprofeetani." 
Acts24:15 Vano, mwa Muluku kookhalano owehererawene weiwo ntoko wa atthu ala, weera onuukhale ovenyerera wa oororomela ni oohiroromela." 
Acts24:16 Tivawo kinaasaasaaka mahuku ootheene weera kikhale ni murima wooreera vamaithoni wa Muluku ni wa atthu. 
Acts24:17 Siviraka iyaakha sikina, kaahoorwatho oYerusaleemu weera kivahe soovaha wa mulokwaaka, ni koonihere sooveleela." 
Acts24:18 Kaapakaaka yeeyo, kirapihiweene, awo yaakiphwanya Mpaani mwa Muluku. Khaayaariwo atthu ancipale vamoha ni miyo, naari nkaapanke etthu yoonyakulihana." 
Acts24:19 Aakhalatho aYuda akina a elapo ya wAsiya yaatthuneya weera ekhale ohoolowanyu ni yoonihere soowootherasaya, awo yaari yaakhalanne etthu ni miyo." 
Acts24:20 Hoye hoye awo ari va, antthuneya othaliha etthu yoonanara heeni yaaphwannyaaya wa miyo kaaronghiwaaka oSineedriyuni*," 
Acts24:21 ohikhanle etthweene ela: Kuulumalaaka ni yaawo, kaakhuwela keeraka: ‘Ti mwaha wa ovenyerera wa akhwiiye miyo kinthorihiwaaka olelo ohoolowanyu.’”" 
Acts24:22 Vano Felisi, mwa yoowo aasuwenle nnenesene Ephiro, aamaliha mwaha ole ni aaheera: “Aphiya mutokweene a anakhotto Lisiya, nkilakele mwahaanyu.”" 
Acts24:23 Vano aamulamulela kenturiyoni* weera amuthokorore Pawulo, mene weera amutaphule vakhaani ni weera aatthunihere asinthamwenaawe omurumeela." 
Acts24:24 Eviraka mahuku makina, Felisi ni amwaariye Drusila, aari muYuda, aarumiha omwiitthana Pawulo, ni aamwiiwa uulumaka sa nroromelo mwa Kristu Yeesu." 
Acts24:25 Uulumaka Pawulo sa waakhuleliwa ni Muluku, sa wiisuumaaliha ni sa othorihiwa oneera orwe, Felisi aahoova ni aamweerela:“Waatta! Vaanaano va, mpwaheke. Kaphwanya ehuhu, nkiwiitthanenitho.”" 
Acts24:26 Ehuhuweene yeele aatthuna mmurimanimwawe weera Pawulo amvahe musurukhu. Tivawo annarumiha omwiitthana imaara sincipale ni uuluma ni yoowo. 
Acts24:27 Siviraka iyaakha piili, Felisi aamwaakhela Porsiyo Festo ntoko namukalambaawe. Wa soothesene, atthunaka waasiveliha aYuda, Felisi aamuhiya Pawulo okaliposo." 
Acts25:1 Eviraka mahuku mararu woophiya elapo ele, Festo aarowa oSesareya mpaka oYerusaleemu," 
Acts25:2 yaarwiyaaya ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni aYuda oottittimiheyaxa vahoolowawe, emooniheraka soomootherasaya Pawulo." 
Acts25:3 Yaamvekelaxa Festo weera athaamiheriwe Pawulo oYerusaleemu evaanelaka omwiipithela Pawulo mphironi weera emwiive. 
Acts25:4 Festo aawaakhula: “Pawulo ootthukiwa oSesareya, ni miyo muneenaaka kihanle vakhaani orowawo." 
Acts25:5 Erowe vamoha ni miyo asitokweene akina a nyuwo ni weiwo yathalihe soomoothera mulopwana owo, waari weera vekhaikhai aapaka etthu yootapanyiha.”" 
Acts25:6 Areene ni yaawo mahuku mathannamararu, naari mahuku muloko, aarowa oSesareya ni oxaawaya aathukumanyiha muthukumano ni aalamulela weera Pawulo aruuhiwe vahoolowawe." 
Acts25:7 Pawulo iixooniheraka, aYuda yaarwiiye oYerusaleemu yaamurukureera, emootheraka soowoothera soowoopiha, awo, yahaawenraaya waakhulela." 
Acts25:8 Vano Pawulo aahiixaakiha eeraka: “Kheewowo etthu kaatapanyihenraaka aYuda ni nlamulonaya, naari ni Empa ya Muluku, hoye hoye Seesari.”" 
Acts25:9 Festo, atthunaka waasiveliha aYuda, aamukoha Pawulo: “Nyuwo moolikana weera murowe oYerusaleemu ni weiwo mwathorihiwe ohoolowaka mwaha wa soowoothera iya?”" 
Acts25:10 Pawulo aamwaakhula: “Vano miyo kiri ohoolo wa muthukumano wa nipuro noowuuluma milattu na Seesari, wenno ontthuneya weera kithorihiweke vaava. Kheewo etthu yoonanara kaapakenlaaka aYuda, ntoko musuwenlaanyu nnenesene." 
Acts25:11 Kaarino nthowa noopaka etthu yoophwanela okhwa, nkinkhootta okhwa. Vaheera soowoothera kinootheriwaaka ni aYuda saahikhanle sa ekhaikhai, khaawo ophwanenle weera akivaherere wa yaawo. Kintthuna woonihera wa Seesari!”" 
Acts25:12 Awiiwelelaka anamalakaawe, Festo aaheera: “Nyuwo mootthuna wa Seesari; wa yoowo mmwirowe!”" 
Acts25:13 Eviraka mahuku makina, mwene Agripa ni Berenisi yaaphiya oSesareya weera emuulumihe Festo." 
Acts25:14 Woonaka weera awo yaakhalawo mahuku mancipale, Festo aamuthalihera mwene makhalelo a Pawulo, eeraka: “Ookhala va mulopwana mmoha Felisi aamuhingyaawe ootthukiweene." 
Acts25:15 Kaarongwaka oYerusaleemu, ahooleli a asaserdoti* ni asitokweene a aYuda yaamoothera, yoowo, ekivekelaka weera athorihiwe." 
Acts25:16 Miyo kaaweerela weera kheehiyono ekhovelelo ya aRooma omttaruxa mutthu ahinaaye owo wiixoonihera mwaneenaawe ohoolo wa anamootheraawe, ni ahinaaye okhalano ehuhu yoowiixaakiha sa soowoothera animpakelaaya." 
Acts25:17 Erwaaka va awo vamoha ni miyo, nkaalekelihale mwaha ola. Kaathukumanyiha muthukumano oxaawaya ni kaalamulela weera mulopwana owo ooniheriwe." 
Acts25:18 Anamootheraawe yeemelaka weera yuulume, khayaamoothenre naari yoonanara emoha miyo kaawehereraaka." 
Acts25:19 Ohiyanawaya, yaavirikanyiha ni yoowo sa mipatta sikina sa ediinaaya, ni sa Yeesu mmoha okhwiiye, mwa Yoowo Pawulo aanyesereraawe weera ori ni okumi." 
Acts25:20 Nkaasuwenle moota woowehaweha nyaha iye, tivawo kaamukonghaaka owo aari aalikanne orowa oYerusaleemu weera athorihiwewo mwaha wa soowoothera iya." 
Acts25:21 Atthunaka Pawulo weera akhale ootthukiweene mpaka mwaha ola olakeliwa ni Seesari, kaalamulela weera akhale mukaliposo mpaka miyo kineeraaka kimurumihele Seesari.”" 
Acts25:22 Vano Agripa aamweerela Festo: “Miyotho kaatthuna omwiiwa mulopwana owo.” Owo aamwaakhula: “Munoomwiiwa omaalo.” 
Acts25:23 Oxaawaya Agripa ni Berenisi yaahoorwa ni ovuwawaya otokotoko, ni yaavolowa mpaani mwa nyaha sa othorihiwa vamoha ni asitokweene a anakhotto ni atthu oosuwanyeyaxa a esidade. Munlamuloni na Festo, Pawulo aaruuhiwa." 
Acts25:24 Vano Festo aaheera: “Mwene Agripa ni atthu ootheene ari va ni hiyo, mmoone mulopwana ola! aYuda ootheene a wenno ni a oYerusaleemu yannakivekela mwaha wa ola, ekhuwelaka weera owo khaphwanenletho okhala ni okumi." 
Acts25:25 Kaahoonatho weera khaapanke naari etthu emoha yaaphwanela okhwa. Wa soothesene, niwoko owo aatthuna woonihera wa Seesari, kaalakela omurumiha oRooma." 
Acts25:26 Vanonto, nkinono etthu ya ekhaikhai yoowaalepela atokweene a oRooma. Tivawo, miyo kimuruuhalaaka ohoolowanyu, woopwahaxa ohoolowanyu, mwene Agripa, weera kimalihaka okohakoha, miyo kinoowera olepa etthu." 
Acts25:27 Khoonreera omurumiha namatthukiwa kihithalihaka nnenesene soowootheriwasawe.” 
Acts26:1 Vano Agripa aamweerela Pawulo:“Nyuwo munootthuniheriwa wuuluma ni wiixaakihawanyu.” Vahoolowaya Pawulo aapaka eneneero ni ntata, anapacera wixaakihawawe eeraka:" 
Acts26:2 “Mwene Agripa, koohakalala weera ti ohoolowanyu kingweraaka wiixaakiha olelo soowootheriwasaka sootheene sa aYuda." 
Acts26:3 Koohakalalatho weera nyuwo moosuwela nnenesene ikhovelelo sa aYuda ni milattusaya. Tivawo kinoovekelani weera mukiiwe ni ovilela. 
Acts26:4 aYuda ootheene ansuwela moota kikhanlaaka okhuma enamwanaaka, elapo kiyariwaaka nitho oYerusaleemu." 
Acts26:5 Awo aakisuwela okhuma khalayi ni yatthuna, anoowera okhalela onamoona weera, ntoko muFarisi*, kaatthara makhalelo a mpatta wa ediinaahu orino malamulo oolipaxa." 
Acts26:6 Vano kinthorihiwa niwoko na nroromelonaka mwa yeeyo Muluku aaroromelihalaawe makholowaahu. 
Acts26:7 Ela ti yoororomelihiwa singwehereraaya ipuumbasahu muloko ni piili weera ekwaniheriwe, simulapaka ni nthiti Muluku ohiyu ni othana. Ti niwoko na nroromelo nna, amwene, kinootheriwaaka ni aYuda." 
Acts26:8 Heeni nyuwo muhingweraanyu ororomela weera Muluku onaavenyereriha akhwiiye? 
Acts26:9 Miyotho kaaviriyeliwa weera waatthuneya opaka sootheene singwereya weera kiphwate Nsina na Yeesu a oNasarete. 
Acts26:10 Ti yeeyo kaapankaaka nnenesene oYerusaleemu. Kaahaavonyera mukaliposo ootteela ancipale ni ikuru sa ahooleli a asaserdoti*, ni yaathoriheliwaaya okhwa, miyotho kaahaakhulela yeeyo." 
Acts26:11 Imaara sincipale kannarowa muSinagogani* weera kaattaruxe, ni keerera waanyesereriha oveiha. Waakhalelawaka isara yaawo, kannarowa isidade sa ilapo sikina weera kaattharatthare." 
Acts26:12 Mukwaha mmoha keera kirowaka oDamasku ni ikuru ni otthuniheriwa wa ahooleli a asaserdoti*. 
Acts26:13 Wookwanaka nsuwa vamuru, amwene, kireene mphironi, kaahoona mukhwipimwaka ni mukhwipi wa asikhwaaka waara omoha wa wiirimu, waanre woopwaha nsuwa." 
Acts26:14 Ootheene yaamorela vathi ni kaahiiwa nsu naakeerela vaHeberi: ‘Sawuli, Sawuli, heeni nyuwo munkisoondaanyu? Mungwana vasiiyoniwene ni eniyoorweeleni yoovoreiya paahi.’" 
Acts26:15 Vano kaakoha: ‘Taani Nyuwo, Apwiya?’ Apwiya yaakaakhula: ‘Ti Miyo, Yeesu, mwa Yoowo munimuttharattharaanyu." 
Acts26:16 Vano muvenye ni mweemele. Miyo kohiixoonihera wa nyuwo weera kookhaliheni murumeiyi ni namoona a seiyo nyuwo moonnaanyu sa Miyo ni seiyo kineeraaka kiwoonihereni. 
Acts26:17 Miyo nkoovuluxeni wa mulokwaanyu muneenaanyu ni wa amalapo, wa yaawo Miyo kinimoorumihani" 
Acts26:18 weera mwahule maithwaaya ni mwaatatuxe wa epiphi, waara. Aani, kinimoorumihani wa yaawo weera mwaavuluxe wa ikuru sa Satana ni weera emutthare Muluku, ni hiiho yaakhele elevelelo ya sootthekasaya ni nipuro vamoha ni yaawo atteelihiwe niwoko na nroromelo mwa Miyo.’" 
Acts26:19 Hiiho, mwene Agripa, nkaakhanle oohiiwelela moonelo wa wiirimu." 
Acts26:20 Woopacera kaahaalaleera yaawo yaari oDamasku; vahoolowaya yaawo yaari oYerusaleemu ni oYudeiya woothewene, nitho wa amalapo, kiweerelaka weera erukunxe murima ni ehokoleele wa Muluku epakaka miteko sinoonihera orukunxawaya murima wa ekhaikhai." 
Acts26:21 Tivawo aYuda yaakitthunkaaya Mpaani mwa Muluku ni yaaheerera okiiva. 
Acts26:22 Koheetta ni ekhavihero ya Muluku mpaka nihuku na olelo, ni mwaha wa yeeyo kiri va, ni kinnaakhalela onamoona asitokweene nitho asikhaani. Miyo nkinghima etthu ekina, ehikhanle yeeyo maprofeeti ni Moisesi yaahimmaaya weera yaarwa okhumelela:" 
Acts26:23 weera Kristu aarwa ohaawa ni areene oopacera ovenyerera mookhwaani, aarwa olaleiya waara wa mulokwaawe muneenaawe ni wa amalapo.”" 
Acts26:24 Ehuhuweene yeele, Festo aahooceeliha wiixaakiha wa Pawulo, eeraka ni nsu ntokotoko: “Nyuwo Pawulo, munkhwa anepa. Oxutterawanyu wincipale wohooruuhelani anepa!”" 
Acts26:25 Pawulo aamwaakhula: “Atokweene Festo, miyo nkinkhwa anepa, ni yeeyo kinghimaaka ti ya ekhaikhai ni ya miruku sooreera." 
Acts26:26 Amwene ala ansuwela nnenesene itthusene seiya, ni kinoowera waaleela nnenesene. Vekhaikhai, miyo kinuupuwela weera aasuwela soothesene seiya kinghimaaka, niwoko khasikhumelenle wiiphiini." 
Acts26:27 Amwene Agripa, munaaroromela maprofeeti? Koosuwela weera aani.”" 
Acts26:28 Vano Agripa aamweerela Pawulo:“Nyuwo munuupuwela weera mwa ehuhu ekhaani munoowera okiviriyela othatuwa muKristu?” 
Acts26:29 Pawulo aamwaakhula: “Hata mwa ehuhu ekhaani, naari yincipale, kinimuvekela Muluku weera khamuhiyono nyuwo paahi, menetho ootheene ankiiwa olelo ethatuwe ntoko miyo, ohiya onyooro ola.”" 
Acts26:30 Aaheemela mwene, ni guvernadori ni Berenisi vamoha ni yoowo, nitho yaawo yaakilaathiye ni yaawo." 
Acts26:31 Evenyaka munthukumanoni mwa othoriha, yaaheerelana yaaworu: “Mulopwana ola kheewo opankaawe yoophwanela okhwa, naari okaliposo.”" 
Acts26:32 Agripa aamweerela Festo: “Owo ahaamutthunne Seesari, saano ataphuliweene.”" 
Acts27:1 Waalakeliwaaya weera naarowa olapuwa wookela wItaliya, Pawulo ni ootthukiwa akina yaavahereriwa wa kenturiyoni* mmoha iithaniwa Yuliyo, aari a anakhotto a Seesari." 
Acts27:2 Naavolowa munikulani na wAdramito neera nirowe mapuro makina a elapo ya wAsiya, ni naapacera mukwaha areene ni hiyo Aristarko, mutthu a oTesalonika, a elapo ya oMasedoniya." 
Acts27:3 Oxaawaya naaphiya oSidoni, ni Yuliyo, amooniheraka Pawulo murima wooreera, aamutthunihera weera akumane ni asinthamwenaawe weera awo emvahe soohaawelasawe." 
Acts27:4 Nivenyaka iwe, naavira ottuttuwani wa oKipro, niwoko epheyo yaanivirikanyiha." 
Acts27:5 Nilapuwaka ephareiya ya oSilisiya ni ya oPanfiliya, naaheemexa oMira, elapo ya oLisiya." 
Acts27:6 Weiwo kenturiyoni* aaphwanya nikula ntokotoko na wAlesandriya neera nipwahe nirowaka wItaliya, ni mwa nenno aaniwelihamo." 
Acts27:7 Naalapuwa vakhaani vakhaani, eviraka mahuku mancipale, ni naaphiya ni ohaawa oKnido. Woonaka weera epheyo yaanooceeliha opwaherera mpattaahu, naavira ohitto wa oKreta, okhopela wa oSalmona." 
Acts27:8 Naalapuwa okerekherewaya ni ohaawa, ni naaphiya nipuro niitthaniwa Mixelo Sooreera, vakhiviru wa esidade yiitthaniwa oLaseya." 
Acts27:9 Naayeleela ehuhu yincipale, ni weettawahu waathatuwa woopiha niwoko yaaviratho ehuhu ya otthuka. Tivawo Pawulo aawooperenraawe:" 
Acts27:10 “Atthu nyuwo, kinoona weera mukwahaahu eniikhumelele yoothananiha, khoohiyono paahi wa nikula ni mirindi, mene wa okumaahutho.”" 
Acts27:11 Vaheera Kenturiyoni* aahiiwelela olaka wa namweettiha ni wa mwaneene a nikula, akhoottaka olaka wa Pawulo." 
Acts27:12 Woonaka weera khawaawereya ovira mulaala vamuxeloni vale, atthu ancipale yaalakela weera waatthuneya opwaherera, eroromelaka ophiya oFeniki, weera nakhale weiwe ehuhu ya mulaala wootheene. Owo waari muxelo wa oKreta, waaweha ninkela nsuwa osulu vakhaani ni ohitto vakhaani." 
Acts27:13 Epaceraka woopa vakhaani epheyo okhuma ohitto, awo yaahuupuwela weera yoophiya ehuhu yaahaawelaaya; tivawo yaataphunlaaya soolipano nikula ni yaapacera weettiha erowaka mukerekhere wa oKreta." 
Acts27:14 Vahoolo vakhaani, epheyo etokotoko yiitthaniwa Eurokloni, ekhumaka mpatta wa ecirumba, yaamana nikula." 
Acts27:15 Nikula naavariwa ni ettheku ele, nihiweraka weettiha mpatta naarowaahu, ni hiiho naahiya weerera ni naapacera okakheliwa okerekhere." 
Acts27:16 Niviraka ohitto wa ecirumba ekhaani yiitthaniwa Kawuda, naawera otthukelela ni ohaawa nikula noowoopola*." 
Acts27:17 Evoleihaka munikulani, yaalipihera nikula ntokotoko, evitikelelaka ni mikoyi. Vano, yoovaka weera nikula nnikhitte muhaava wa oSirti, yaakuruxa iveela sa nikula, ni hiiho naaheettihiwa ni epheyo." 
Acts27:18 Oxaawaya, nimaniweene vancipale ni ettheku, yaapacera ovonyera mirindi mphareiyani." 
Acts27:19 Nihuku nanaararu yaapacera ovonyera ni matataaya itthu soolemelaxa sikina saari munikulani. 
Acts27:20 Nihooneyaka nsuwa, hata ithenyeeri wa mahuku mancipale ni epwahereraka onimana ettheku etokotoko, ommaleloni waanimalela ororomela wa ovuluxiwa." 
Acts27:21 Hapo asilopwana yaaviriha ehuhu yincipale ehicaaka, Pawulo aaheemela ohoolowaya ni aaweerela: “Atthu, nyuwo waatthuneya weera mwiiwelele olakawaka weera nihivenye oKreta, niwoko hiiho saano musembeene onanariheya ni ohoononeya wu." 
Acts27:22 Mene vano kinoolakani weera mulipihe murima, niwoko khaawo mmoha a nyuwo aneera akhwe; nikula paahi nniphwateiye." 
Acts27:23 Ohiyu wa osilo, aakirweela ndyelo mmoha a Muluku mwa Yoowo miyo kiraaka awawe ni mwa Yoowo kinimulapaka, ni ndyelo owo aakeerela:" 
Acts27:24 ‘Pawulo, muhoove. Ontthuneya weera nyuwo muphiye ohoolo wa Seesari. Muluku aahoovahani mmahalanimwawe okumi wa ootheene anlapuwa ni nyuwo.’" 
Acts27:25 Hiiho mukhale ni murima woolipa! Kinimuroromela Muluku weera eniikhumelele mooteene yoowo kileeliwaaka. 
Acts27:26 Ontthuneya weera hiyo nikakheliwe ecirumba ekina.” 
Acts27:27 Siviraka isimana piili okhuma ovenyawahu, ohiyu owo hiyo nikuxiwaka nlelo mpatta mukina ni mukina mphareiyani ya wAdriya, oreene ohiyu eriyari anamiteko a nikula yaahuupuwela weera naahaattamela vakhiviru wa etthaya." 
Acts27:28 Evonyeraka mmaahini eyuuma yooringa wiixa, yaahoona weera wiixawaya waari imeetru* miloko miraru niithannapiili. Vahoolo vakhaani, yaavonyera veeli eyuuma ni yaaphwanya wiixawaya wa imeetru* miloko miili niithannapiili." 
Acts27:29 Noovaka weera nnikakheliwe vamalukuni, yaavonyera ottuli wa nikula iyuuma ixexe sooweemexa* nikula, ni naahaawela weera waaxiiye." 
Acts27:30 Anamiteko a nikula yaatthuna otthawa munikulani ntokotoko, ni yaakuruxela nikula noowoopola* mphareiyani, yiixeeraka weera yaatthuna ovonyera ohoolo wa nikula iyuuma sooweemexa* nikula." 
Acts27:31 Vano Pawulo aamweerela kenturiyoni* ni anakhotto: “Alopwana ala yaahikhala munikulani, nyuwo khamungwera ovuluwa.”" 
Acts27:32 Tivawo anakhotto yaapansaaya mikhoyi saatthukeleliwe nikula noowoopola* ni yaahiya nimoraka. 
Acts27:33 Ohanleene vakhaani oxa, Pawulo aahaanyesereriha weera ootheene ece, eeraka: “Olelo nimmala mahuku muloko ni maxexe nyuwo mureene munnaweherera muhicaaka etthu." 
Acts27:34 Vano miyo kinoolakani oca etthu, niwoko hiiho, munoowera okhala ni okumi. Khaawo mmoha a nyuwo aneera ayeleele naari niihi nimoha na muruwaawe.”" 
Acts27:35 Ahimaka yeeyo, aakuxa epaawu ni aamutthapela Muluku ohoolo wa ootheene. Aameyanya ni aapacera okhuura." 
Acts27:36 Ootheene yaalipa murima ni yaakhuuratho etthu. 
Acts27:37 Yaari munikulani atthu macira meeli ni miloko mithannamiili niithannamosa. 
Acts27:38 Emalihaka oca mpaka ovona, yaavukula olemela wa nikula, evonyeraka etrigu yootheene mphareiyani." 
Acts27:39 Oxaakaru, khayaasuwenle elapo ele, mene yaahoona muxelo ni mukerekheremwaya weiwo yaalakenlaaya weettiha nikula wawereya." 
Acts27:40 Ethikilaka iyuuma sooweemexa nikula, yaahiya mphareiyani, ni ehuhuweene yeele yaataphula mikhoyi sa etthaabwa eneettiha mpatta wa nikula*. Yaaheemexa ohoolo wa nikula ekuwo etokotoko opheyoni ni yaaheettiha wookela mukerekhere wa ephareiya." 
Acts27:41 Nikulatho naakhitta nipuro na muhaava ni naakhalawo niheettaka. Mpatta wa ohoolo wa nikula waavara wa muhaavani, weemelakawo, ni mpatta wa ottuli waaphweeya niwoko na ikuru sa mitekuteku." 
Acts27:42 Anakhotto yaalakela owiiva ootthukiwa weera ahitthawe naari mmoha a yaale, iivonyeraka mphareiyani." 
Acts27:43 Vaheera kenturiyoni* aatthuna wuurela okumi wa Pawulo ni aawooceeliha opaka ovaanelawaya. Vano aahaalamulela yaawo yaawera orapela weera ekhumbwele toko mphareiyani mpatta wa mukerekhere. 
Acts27:44 Akina waatthuneya wiixoopola evarelaka itthaabwa, naari itthu sikina sa nikula. Moota ole, ootheene yaavuluwa, ephiyaka mukerekhere." 
Acts28:1 Niphiyakaru vatthayani, naahoona weera ecirumba ele yiitthaniwa oMalta." 
Acts28:2 Atthu yamanke ecirumbeene yeele yaanaakhelela hiyo ni murima wooreeraxa. Yaakukha mooro ni yaanaakhelela nnene hiyo ootheene, niwoko yeera erupaka epula ni oriiraka." 
Acts28:3 Pawulo aathukumanya nivisi nimoha na ikhuuni ni iikaathiki vayikho, enowa emoha, etthawaka oviha, yaamuluma ntatanawe." 
Acts28:4 Yoonaka atthu yamanke vacirumbani enowa elumaka ntata na Pawulo, yaaheerelana: “Vekhaikhai, mulopwana ola ti namwiiva, niwoko oopowakaru mphareiyani, nthorihelo khannimutthunihera okhala ni okumi.”" 
Acts28:5 Pawulotho, atathelaka enowa vayikho, khaahaangwe naari vakhaani." 
Acts28:6 Wa soothesene, awo yaaweherera weera ntatanawe ninoopacera wiipa, naari onoomora woowaakuveya ookhweene. Ewehererakatho vancipale, ni yoonaka weera kheewo etthu yoonanara yaamukhumelela, yaahuupuwelatho weera owo aari muluku mmoha." 
Acts28:7 Vakhiviru wa vale waari vaate wa mutokweene a ecirumba, nsinanawe Publiyo. Owo aaniitthana weera nikhale owannyawe, ni wa mahuku mararu aanaakhelela ni murima wooreera ni aanivaha nipuro." 
Acts28:8 Atithawe yaamvoreiwa yuummaathiki, ehaawaka ni oviha wa erutthu ni eretta ya mmirimani. Pawulo aavolowa weera awoone, ni amalihaka ovekela, aawiikaathera matata ni aahaalamiha." 
Acts28:9 Ekhumelelaka yeeyo, aretta akina a ecirumba yaahoorwa ni yaalamihiwa." 
Acts28:10 Awo yaanittittimiha vancipale, ni neeraka nipwahe, yaanivaha seiyo naahaawelaahu." 
Acts28:11 Siviraka nyeeri miraru, naawela nikula naakhala ehuhu yootheene ya mulaala vacirumbani ele. Naari nikula na wAlesandriya, naarino eneneero ya Diyoskuri." 
Acts28:12 Neemelaka oSirakusa, naakhalawo mahuku mararu." 
Acts28:13 Vaavaale naapwaha ni naaphiya oRegiyo. Oxaawaya, yoopaka epheyo okhuma ohitto, naapwaherera niphiyaka oPotiyoli nihuku nanaaveeli." 
Acts28:14 Weiwo naahaaphwanya axunna akina yaaniitthanne weera nikhale vamoha ni yaawo esimaana emoha. Ni hiiho naaphiya oRooma. 
Acts28:15 Axunna a weiwe yaahiiwa yeeriwaka weera neera niphiyaka, ni yaahoowa ekhumaka mpaka omerekadu wa Apiyo ni mpaka Impa Tthaaru sa Aletto weera enikumanane. Awoonaka yaawo Pawulo, aamutthapela Muluku ni aakhala ni murima woolipa." 
Acts28:16 Niphiyakaru oRooma, Pawulo aatthuniheriwa omaka empaawe meekhaawe, alipeleliwaka ni nakhotto mmoha." 
Acts28:17 Eviraka mahuku mararu, owo aawiitthana ahooleli a aYuda. Awo yaathukumanaaya, Pawulo aaweerela: “Axunnaka, kaari mweeraru kihipanke etthu yoonanara ni mulokwaahu, naari ni ikhovelelo sa makholowaahu, kaatthukiwa oYerusaleemu ni kaavahereriwa wa aRooma." 
Acts28:18 Awo yaakikohakoha ni yaatthuna okitaphula, niwoko nkaarino nthowa na etthu yoonanara yaaphwanela okhwa." 
Acts28:19 Wa soothesene, aYuda, ehitthunaka okitaphula, kaanyesereriwa otthuna ophiya ohoolo wa Seesari, kaari mweeraru kihikhalanne yoowootheriwa ekina ni mulokwaaka." 
Acts28:20 Niwoko na yeeyo kaavekela weera kiwooneeni ni kuulume ni nyuwo. Miyo kootthukiwa ni onyooro ola niwoko na nroromelo na aYixrayeli. 
Acts28:21 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Khanaakhenle naari ekaratta emoha ya oYudeiya, ni khaawo munna mmoha aarwiiye akhumakawo aahimale, hoye hoye aathalihale etthu yoonanara ya nyuwo." 
Acts28:22 Wa soothesene, nintthuna wiiwa wa nyuwo yeeyo munuupuwelaanyu, niwoko noosuwela weera mmapuroni moothemwene aakhala atthu anuulumela nihusiho nna.”" 
Acts28:23 Hiiho yaahiiwanana omukumanano Pawulo nihuku naalaihaniwe, ni nihuku nne yaaphiya aYuda ancipale nipuro nenne owo aaraawe. Okhuma ohinaxe mpaka ohiyu owo aahaathalihera ni aahaakhalela onamoona wa omwene wa Muluku, atthunaka waaviriyela mwaha wa Yeesu avarelaka muteko nlamulo na Moisesi ni maprofeeti." 
Acts28:24 Akina yaaviriyeliwa ni yeeyo owo aahimmaawe, mene akinatho khayaaroromenle." 
Acts28:25 Waakhumelela ohiiwanana ni yaalaxera niwoko na masu ookisera ala Pawulo aahimalaawe: “Munepa Wootteela waawuulumela ekhaikhai makholowaanyu wuulumaka ni eyano ya mprofeeti Yesaya: 
Acts28:26 ‘Murowe wa muloko ola ni mweere: ‘Hata mwiiwaka, khamurwa mwiiwexexa; hata moonaka, khamurwa musuwela etthu." 
Acts28:27 Vekhaikhai, murima wa muloko ola woothatuwa woowuuma. Waattiyela maaruwaaya ni waaputiha maithwaaya weera ohoone, naari ohiiwe, hata ohiiwexexe, hata ohirukunxe murima weera Miyo kaalamihe.’" 
Acts28:28 Tivawo kintthunaaka weera musuwele nnenesene weera ovuluxa wu wa Muluku woorumiheliwa wa amalapo; awo eniyiiwe!” 
Acts28:29  
Acts28:30 Wa iyaakha piili sookwanelasene Pawulo aakhala vaate owo aalivelaawe khula mweeri, ni aawaakhela ootheene yaarowa omoona." 
Acts28:31 Annalaleiya omwene wa Muluku ni annaxuttiha sa Apwiya Yeesu Kristu ni murima woolipa, ahooceelihiwaka naari ni etthu emoha." 
Romans1:1 Wa Pawulo, murumeiyi a Kristu Yeesu, iitthaniwe weera akhale murummwa, aathanliwe weera alaleiye masu ooreeraxa." 
Romans1:2 Masu ooreeraxa ala yaaroromelihiwe khalayeene ni maprofeeti a Muluku mwa Yoolempwa* Yootteela," 
Romans1:3 ni ala yaari mwaha wa Mwanawe, aari ntoko erutthwaawe a ekhapira ya Davide." 
Romans1:4 Owo aakhalihiwa Mwaana a Muluku ni ikuru sa Munepa wa ntteeliho niwoko na ovenyererawawe mookhwaani: Yeesu Kristu, Apwiyaahu." 
Romans1:5 Niwoko na Yoowo ni na Nsinanawe nohaakhela mahala ni muteko okhala arummwa, weera niweettihe atthu a miloko sootheene weera eroromele ni yiiwelele." 
Romans1:6 Ni nyuwotho muri a oowiitthaniwa weera mukhale a Yeesu Kristu. 
Romans1:7 Wa ootheene oRooma ari oosiveleya a Muluku ni aniitthaniwa weera ekhale ootteela: Wa nyuwo, mahala ni murettele onrweela wa Muluku Atithihu ni Apwiya Yeesu Kristu." 
Romans1:8 Woopacerani, kinnamuttottopela Mulukwaaka mwa Yeesu Kristu niwoko na nyuwo ootheene, seenre mweelaponi moothemwene suulummwaka sa nroromelonanyu." 
Romans1:9 Muluku, mwa Yoowo kinimurumeelaaka ni murima wootheene kilaleiyaka masu ooreeraxa a Mwanawe, ti namoonaaka moota miyo kingwuupuwelelaakani mahuku ootheene" 
Romans1:10 mmavekelonimwaka ehuhu yootheene. Kimveka weera, waari otthuna wa Muluku, ommaleloniwaya kihuleliwe ephiro weera kooxekureni." 
Romans1:11 Onkunkhelaxa owoonani weera koovaheeni yoovaha emoha ya mMunepani weera koolipihereni," 
Romans1:12 eyo tiiyo weera miyo ni nyuwo nilipihereyeke niwoko na nroromelonahu. 
Romans1:13 Kintthuna weera nyuwo, axunnaka, musuwele nnenesene weera imaara sincipale kuupuwelaaka wooxekurani. Kaatthuna ohepha yoowiima emoha variyariwanyu ntoko kihemphaaka variyari wa amalapo akina, mene kohooceelihiwa wooxekurani mpaka olelo." 
Romans1:14 Miyo kohaakoongorela anamiruku ni oohikhalano miruku, asuweli ni oohisuwela." 
Romans1:15 Tivawo koolikana woolaleerani masu ooreeraxa nyuwotho muri oRooma. 
Romans1:16 Nkinuulihiwa muru niwoko na masu ooreeraxa, niwoko ti ikuru sa Muluku singwera waavuluxa ootheene anroromela, woopacera aYuda ni wanaaveeli aGrego." 
Romans1:17 Vano, mwa masu ooreeraxa onimooniheriwa waakhuleleya wa Muluku. Okhuma ompacereroni mpaka ommaleloni, waakhuleleya wu ti niwoko na nroromelo, ntoko elempwaaya: “Yoole onaakhuleliwa ni Muluku niwoko na nroromelo, anaakhale ni okumi.”" 
Romans1:18 Isara sa Muluku sinoonihereya wiirimu ni ohitteela wootheene ni yoonanara yootheene ya atthu enooceeliha ekhaikhai. 
Romans1:19 Vano, yeeyo engwereya osuwanyeya wa Muluku enooniheriwa variyariwaya, niwoko Muluku oowoonihera." 
Romans1:20 Okhuma ephattuwelo ya elapo ya vathi, mikhalelo soohooneya sa Muluku, ntoko ikurusawe, soohimala, ni omulukwaawe, saahooniwa nnenesene. Iyo siiwexexiwa mwa itthu soopattuxiwa, moota wooweera atthweene yaawo ari oohileveleleya." 
Romans1:21 Vano, emusuwelaka Muluku, khayaamvuwihale ntoko Muluku, hata khayaamutthapenle, mene soowuupuwelasaya saathatuwa sa siiyo, ni mirimasaya sa ololo saathatuwa epiphi." 
Romans1:22 Yaari mwiixeerelaru asuweli, yaathatuwa alolo." 
Romans1:23 Awo yaahaakakhanyiha ovuwa wa Muluku oohimala ni icaambulo soopakiwa soolikana ntoko mutthu onkhwa, hiiho ntoko ipalame, inama ni axiitthu aniipurula." 
Romans1:24 Tivawo Muluku aavaherenraawe ohitteela, weera moohaawani woonanara wa murimaaya epakelane itthu soowuuliha muru mukina ni mukhwaawe." 
Romans1:25 Yaahaakakhanyiha ekhaikhai ya Muluku ni wootha, ni yaalapa ni yaarumeela itthu soopattuxiwa, omuhiya Mpattuxa ori ooreelihiwa mahuku ootheene, Ame*." 
Romans1:26 Tivawo Muluku aavaherenraawe soohaawela soowuuliha muru. Mpaka axaaraya yaahaakakhanyiha okona ni alopwana, ekonaka ni asithiyana akhwaaya, ehiyaka ikhalelosaya ntoko athiyana." 
Romans1:27 Mooteene yoowo alopwanatho yaahiya okona ni athiyana, ni yaahaawelaxa okona ni akhwaaya. Yaapacera opaka miteko soowuuliha muru, alopwana ni alopwana, ni yaahaakhela asineenaaya yoottaruxa yoophwanela niwoko na mitekosaya." 
Romans1:28 Woonaka weera awo yaaramusa osuwela wa Muluku, Owo muneenaawe ohaahiya ni soowuupuwelasaya soonanara, weera epake yeeyo yahaatthuneya opaka." 
Romans1:29 Yaasareya mikhalelo sootheene sa soohookowa, otakhala, milili ni onarara. Aasareya nrima, wiiva, ohiiwanana, olokottha, ni murima woonanara. Ari anamwaapanana," 
Romans1:30 anamootherana, amwiittana a Muluku, oowiikuxerera, oowiixoona, oowiihima; anoopakelela mikhalelo soopaka soonanara, khaangwiiwelela asitithaya," 
Romans1:31 alolo, oohiroromeleya, a murima woowuuma, oohimoriwa ikharari." 
Romans1:32 Hata esuwelaka nlamulo na Muluku, weera atthu ampaka itthu iyo amphwanela okhwa, khoohiyono ampwaherera opaka yeeyo paahi, menetho angwaakhulela yaale akina ampaka seiyo." 
Romans2:1 Tivawo, nyuwo munaathoriha akina muri oohileveleleya, niwoko muniittaruxa mwaneenaanyu mwa yeeyo munthorihaanyu, woonaka weera nyuwo munthoriha, mumpakatho itthusene seiyo." 
Romans2:2 Noosuwela weera nthorihelo na Muluku wa yaawo ampaka itthusene seiyo nri na ekhaikhai. 
Romans2:3 Hiiho, nyuwo muri mutthu, mwathoriha mpakakatho itthusene seiyo, munuupuwela weera mmoopowe nthorihelo na Muluku?" 
Romans2:4 Weeraka nyuwo munramusa mihakhu sa murimaawe wooreera Muluku, opixa murima, ni oweherera ni ovilela wa Muluku, muhisuwelaka weera murima wooreera wa Muluku onooronghani woorukunxani murima?" 
Romans2:5 Wa soothesene, niwoko na murimaanyu woowuuma woohirukunxeya, nyuwo muniixaandyeerera isara mwaneenaanyu wa nihuku na isara sa Muluku, nneeraaya nooniheriwe nthorihelonawe na ekhaikhai." 
Romans2:6 Muluku anaamutthuvele mutthu ti mutthu ntoko mweettelowaawe. 
Romans2:7 Owo anaavahe okumi woohimala wa yaawo ampwaherera opaka nnene ni anaasaasa ovuwa, nttittimiho, ni okumi woohimala." 
Romans2:8 Nsikhaletho isara ni ottaruxiwa wa yaawo ari oowiipwattha asineenaaya paahi, yaawo ankhootta ekhaikhai ni antthara soonanara." 
Romans2:9 Onuukhale ohaawa ni othanana murima wa atthu ootheene ampaka yoonanara, woopacera wa aYuda, ni wanaaveeli wa aGrego;" 
Romans2:10 ovuwatho, nttittimiho, ni murettele wa ootheene ampaka yooreera: woopacera wa aYuda ni wanaaveeli, wa aGrego." 
Romans2:11 Vano, mwa Muluku khaniwowo nthalu." 
Romans2:12 Khula mutthu onttheka ahikhalanaka nlamulo, anaariheyetho oohikhalano nlamulo, ni khula mutthu onttheka asuwelaka nlamulo, anaathorihiwe ni nlamulo." 
Romans2:13 Khaahiyono yaawo aniiwa nlamulo ari oowaakhuleleya vamaithoni wa Muluku, mene yaawo aniiwelela nlamulo. Awo eniyaakhuleliwe ni Muluku." 
Romans2:14 Mwa yeeyo, wa amalapo ahinono nlamulo epakaka yeeyo nlamulo ninlamulelaaya, awo anthatuwa nlamulo wa asineenaaya, hata ehikhalanaka nlamulo," 
Romans2:15 niwoko anoonihera weera yeeyo nlamulo ninnyesereraaya, yoolempwa mmirimanimwaya. Wa yeeyo soosuwelasaya ni soowuupuwelasaya sinkhalela onamoona, hata siwootheraka, naari siwaakihaka." 
Romans2:16 Eyo eniikhumelele vanihukuni Muluku aneeraawe athorihe ixiiri sa atthu mwa Yeesu Kristu, ntoko anthalihaaya masu ooreeraxa miyo kinlaleiyaaka." 
Romans2:17 Moone, nyuwo muniixeerela muYuda, nyuwo munroromela munlamuloni ni muniixoona weera moomusuwela Muluku." 
Romans2:18 Nyuwo muneera weera munsuwela otthuna wa Muluku, ni munaakhulela yeeyo eri yooreera niwoko moolamuliwa ni nlamulo;" 
Romans2:19 nyuwo mooviriyeliwa weera muri muhooleli wa oohoona, waara wa yaawo ari mpiphini," 
Romans2:20 muhusiha wa oohisuwela ni wa anamwane, niwoko mookhalano munlamuloni mphimo wa osuwela ni wa ekhaikhai –" 
Romans2:21 vano nyuwo munaahusiha akina, khamuniihusiha muneenaanyu? Nyuwo munlaleiya weera muhiiye, munimwiiya?" 
Romans2:22 Nyuwo muneera weera muhiraruwe, munooraruwa? Nyuwo munramusa miluku sikina, munimwiiya itthu siri mpaanimwaya?" 
Romans2:23 Nyuwo muniixoona munlamuloni, khamunimuttittimiha Muluku muhiiwelelaka nlamulo?" 
Romans2:24 Ntoko elempwalaaya: “Nsina na Muluku nri nooveiheya variyari wa amalapo niwoko na nyuwo.” 
Romans2:25 Wiineliwa onkhala wootthuneya nyuwo mwiiwelelaka nlamulo, mene nyuwo mwaahiiwelela nlamulo, wiineliwawanyu woothatuwa ohiineliwa." 
Romans2:26 Vano, awo ari oohiineliwa yiiwelelaka soonyesereriha sa nlamulo, kheerwa yaalikeliwa ntoko oowiineliwa?" 
Romans2:27 Yoowo ori oohiineliwa mweerutthunimwawe, mene oniiwelela nlamulo, anoothoriheni nyuwo muhiniiwelela nlamulo, hata mureeneno nlamulo noolempwa nitho wiineliwa mweerutthunimwanyu." 
Romans2:28 Mutthu khahiyono muYuda yoowo areene omokoniwawe paahi, ni wiineliwa khoohiyono etthu ya mmokonimwawe ni mweerutthuni paahi." 
Romans2:29 Hoye! muYuda ti yoowo ori mpuwamwawe, ni wiineliwa ti wiineliwa wa murima, ompakiwa ni Munepa, ohiya nlamulo noolempwa. Mutthweene yoowo khanaakhela nttittimiho wa atthu, mene wa Muluku." 
Romans3:1 Yooreera heeni okhala muYuda, hoye hoye muteko heeni omvaraaya wiineliwa?" 
Romans3:2 Vancipale, mwa mikhalelo sootheene. Woopacera niwoko masu a Muluku yaaroromeliwa wa aYuda." 
Romans3:3 Ankha akina a yaawo yaahiroromeleya? Ohiroromeleyawaya onuumalihe ororomeleya wa Muluku? 
Romans3:4 Hata vakhaani! Muluku akhaleke a ekhaikhai, ni atthu ootheene anamootha. Ntoko elempwalaaya: “Weera yaakhuleliwe maswaanyu ntoko ekhaikhai nyuwo muulumaka, ni mmwiwine nyuwo mwaathorihiwaka.”" 
Romans3:5 Vano, soohitteelasahu sooniheraka moota wa nnenesene ekhaikhai ya Muluku, nneere hai? Weeraka Muluku ti oohireera woonihela isarasawe? Kinuuluma moota wa omutthu." 
Romans3:6 Vekhaikhai hoye! Waari hiiho, moota heeni Muluku eeraawe athorihe elapo ya vathi?" 
Romans3:7 Woothawaka wooniheraka ekhaikhai ya Muluku, ni hiiho waandyeereraka ovuwawawe, heeni nlelo kinthorihiwaaka ntoko namattheka?" 
Romans3:8 Heeni muhineeraanyu yeeyo anamwaapa akina annootheraaya ninghimaahu: “Nipakeke yoonanara weera ekhumemo yooreera?” Othorihiwa wa atthweene yaawo ti woophwanela. 
Romans3:9 Eheeni nneeraahu nimalihe? Hiyo nohaapwaha yaawo? Hoye! Noothaliha nnene weera aYuda ni aGrego anlamuliwa ni soottheka. 
Romans3:10 Ntoko elempwalaaya: “Khaawo mutthu a ekhaikhai, naari mmoha;" 
Romans3:11 khaawo mukina oniiwexexa, khaawo ommwaasa Muluku." 
Romans3:12 Ootheene aahapuwa ni aathatuwa a siiyo. Khaawo ompaka yooreera, hata mmoha." 
Romans3:13 Mimilosaya siri mahiye oohuleya; ni malumaaya annalokottha. Yoohapala ya inowa eri mmwaanomwaya. 
Romans3:14 Iyanosaya soosareya sa olapha ni owaawa. 
Romans3:15 Inaawosaya sineetta woowaakuveya weera sivuuvihe ephome; 
Romans3:16 milepe ni ohaawa simphwanyiwa mphironimwaya," 
Romans3:17 ni khaasuwenle ephiro ya murettele. 
Romans3:18 Atthweene yaawo khaammoovaru Muluku.” 
Romans3:19 Noosuwela weera sootheene nlamulo ninghimaaya, ninaaleela yaale alamuliwe ni nne, weera iyano sootheene simaale, ni elapo ya vathi yootheene ekhale yoothorihiwa ni Muluku." 
Romans3:20 Tivawo khaawo anaakheleliwe ni Muluku niwoko na wiiwelela nlamulo, weenre okhalaka mwaha wa nlamulo hiyo noosuwela nnenesene soottheka." 
Romans3:21 Vanonto wohoonihereya waakhuleliwa ni Muluku, onrweela wa Yoowo, ohikhanle mwaha wa nlamulo. Nlamulo ni maprofeeti ankhalela onamoona mwaha wa waakhuleliwa iwo." 
Romans3:22 Vano, waakhuleliwa ni Muluku iwo onrweela niwoko na nroromelo mwa Yeesu Kristu wa ootheene animuroromela. Khaniwowo nthalu," 
Romans3:23 niwoko ootheene aattheka ni ari ottaiwene wa ovuwa wa Muluku," 
Romans3:24 yaakhuleliweenetho ni Muluku mahaleene, eyo tiiyo mwa mahalaawe niwoko na ovuluxiwa ori mwa Kristu Yeesu." 
Romans3:25 Muluku oomwiiyaathi Yoowo ntoko yoowiiveleela weera awere wiiraaniha ni ephomaawe niwoko na nroromelo. Owo aapaka yeeyo weera oonihere ororomeleyawawe, niwoko moovilelanimwawe aahiya soohittaruxiwa soottheka saapakiwe khalayi." 
Romans3:26 Aapaka iye weera oonihere ororomeleyawawe wa vaanaano, weera akhale namaroromeleya ni namwaakhulela wa yaale animuroromela Yeesu." 
Romans3:27 Vano, nri woowi nthowa na wiivuwiha? Khanaalikeliwe. Niwoko heeni nihaalikeliwaaya? Niwoko na wiiwelela nlamulo? Hoye. Niwoko na nroromelo paahi." 
Romans3:28 Hiyo nlelo ninnanyeserera weera mutthu onaakhuleliwa ni Muluku niwoko na nroromelo, ohiya wiiwelela nlamulo." 
Romans3:29 Muluku ti Muluku a aYuda paahi? Owo khahiyonotho Muluku a amalapo? Aani, a amalapotho," 
Romans3:30 woonaka weera Muluku ori mmoha paahi, anaawaakhulele oowiineliwa nitho oohiineliwa niwoko na nroromelo nenenenno." 
Romans3:31 Hiyo noomaliha nlamulo niwoko na nroromelo nenenenno? Hata vakhaani! Ohiyanawaya, ninnalipiha nlamulo." 
Romans4:1 Vanonto, nneere hai sa nikholonahu Abrahaamu? Yaamweereenle eheeni owo?" 
Romans4:2 Waari weera Abrahaamu aahaakhuleliwa niwoko na miteko, owo aamukhalano etthu yoowiivuwihera, ohikhanletho vamaithoni wa Muluku." 
Romans4:3 Enghima eheeni Yoolempwa*? Abrahaamu aamuroromela Muluku, ni niwoko na yeeyo, owo aahaakhuleliwa." 
Romans4:4 Moone, nlivo na namuteko khanooneliwa ntoko yamahala, mene ntoko yoonyesereriwa." 
Romans4:5 Wa soothesene, yoole ohimvara muteko, mene anroromelaka Muluku ommwaakhulela namattheka, nroromelonawe ningwera weera owo onaakhuleliwa ni Muluku." 
Romans4:6 Davide aahima etthweene yeeyo, uulumaka sa yooreelihiwa ya yoowo Muluku ommwaakhulelaawe, ohikhanle wa miteko:" 
Romans4:7 “Ooreelihiwa yaawo sootakhalasaya siri sooleveleliwa, sootthekasaya siri sookhuneeliwa." 
Romans4:8 Ooreelihiwa mutthu sootthekasawe Apwiya ahinaalikelaaya.” 
Romans4:9 Yooreelihiwa eyo eri paahi ya oowiineliwa, hoye hoye ya oohiineliwatho? Noohima weera mwaha wa Abrahaamu aahaakhuleliwa niwoko na nroromelonawe." 
Romans4:10 Vano, yaakhani aakhuleliwaawe Abrahaamu? Ahinaaye, hoye hoye vahoolo wa wiineliwawawe? Khoohiyono iinelingweene, mene ahinaaye!" 
Romans4:11 Hiiho owo aahaakhela wiineliwa ntoko eneneero, ethoonyero weera owo aakhuleliwaawe niwoko na nroromelo, ahinaaye nlelo wiineliwa. Tivawo awo ari atiithi a ootheene yaawo anroromela ehiineliwe, weera awotho ekhale oowaakhuleliwa." 
Romans4:12 Awo aritho atiithi a oowiineliwa, ehikhanle paahi oowiineliwa, menetho a yaawo aneetta mphironi ya nroromelo yeettaaya atithihu Abrahaamu ehinaaye wiineliwa." 
Romans4:13 Abrahaamu ni anamwanaaya yaahaakhela yoororomelihiwa weera awo yaarwa waakhela elapo ya vathi ntoko yoohiyeriwa*. Khayaakhenle yeeyo niwoko na nlamulo, mene niwoko yaahaakhuleliwa mwaha wa nroromelonaya." 
Romans4:14 Vano, yaawo ankhala munlamuloni yaari anamwaakhela, nroromelo nri na siiyo ni yoororomelihiwa eri yoohivareleya muteko." 
Romans4:15 Nlamulo ninruwera isara, ni weiwo nihikhanlaayawo nlamulo, khoowowo otakhaliwa." 
Romans4:16 Tivawo, yoororomelihiwa enrwa niwoko na nroromelo, weera evahiwe mahaleene, ni hiiho ekhale oororomelihiwa wa anamwane ootheene a Abrahaamu, ehikhanle paahi wa yaawo ari vathi wa nlamulo, mene wa yaawotho arino nroromelo nenenenno Abrahaamu aarinaawe. Awo ari atiithi a hiyo ootheene." 
Romans4:17 Ntoko elempwalaaya: “Miyo koohookhaliha tiithi a miloko sincipale,” aani, vamaithoni wa Muluku mwa Yoowo aamuroromenlaawe, Muluku owo omvaha okumi wa akhwiiye ni onkhaliha itthu sahaakhanle weera sikhale." 
Romans4:18 Waarookhalaru woorika ororomela, Abrahaamu aaroromela, ni hiiho aakhala atiithi a miloko sincipale, ntoko yaahimmwalaaya mwaha wa yoowo: “Hiiho eniikhale anamwanaanyu.”" 
Romans4:19 Ahikhulumuwaka munroromeloni, owo aahoona weera erutthwaawe yaahuuluvala, niwoko saaphiyera iyaakha wookwanaka ncira, nitho weera niphwanya na Saara khanaawera." 
Romans4:20 Hata hiiho owo khaahovenle ni ohiroromela mwaha wa yoororomelihiwa ya Muluku, mene aalipiheriwa munroromeloni ni aamvuwiha Muluku," 
Romans4:21 areene ooviriyeliwa ni murima wootheene weera Muluku aari a ikuru okwanihera yeeyo aaroromelinghaawe. 
Romans4:22 Tivawo Muluku aamwaakhulenlaawe niwoko na nroromelo. 
Romans4:23 Masweene yaale weera “aahaakhuleliwa ni Muluku” khayaalempwale paahi wa yoowo," 
Romans4:24 menetho wa hiyo Muluku aneeraawe anaakhulele, wa hiyo ninroromela mwa Yoowo omvenyererihale mookhwaani Yeesu, Apwiyaahu." 
Romans4:25 Owo aavahereriwa okhwa niwoko na sootthekasahu, ni aavenyererihiwa weera hiyo naakhuleliwe ni Muluku." 
Romans5:1 Vano, naakhuleliweene ni Muluku niwoko na nroromelo, nookhalano murettele ni Yoowo mwa Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu." 
Romans5:2 Mwa Yoowo noophwanya ovolowa wa mahala ala niwoko na nroromelo, mahaleene yaale mwa yaawo hiyo nri oolipeene. Hiyo ninnahakalala moowehererani wa ovuwa wa Muluku." 
Romans5:3 Khoohiyono mwa yeeyo paahi, mene ninnahakalalatho moohaawani, niwoko noosuwela weera ohaawa onruwera ovilela;" 
Romans5:4 ovilela onruwera ekhalelo yooreera; ni ekhalelo ela enruwera oweherera. 
Romans5:5 Ni oweherera wu khaninrowa wooceela, niwoko Muluku ooniyeehera osivelawawe mmurimanimwahu ni Munepa Wootteela Owo onivanghaawe." 
Romans5:6 Mwa yeeyo, ehuhu yootthuneya, hiyo naaraahu nlelo oohiwereene, Kristu aahaakhwela oohitteela." 
Romans5:7 Ti woorikarika okhala mukina anaamukhwele mutthu oororomeleya. Apaale onoolipiha murima omukhwela mukina ooreera. 
Romans5:8 Vaheera Muluku onoonihera onisivelawawe moota ola: Kristu aanikhwenle, hiyo naaraahu nlelo anamattheka." 
Romans5:9 Woonaka weera vaanaano hiyo naakhuleliwe ni ephomaawe, wootepaxa nnikhale oovuluxiwa wa isara sa Muluku niwoko na Yeesu!" 
Romans5:10 Naaraahu nlelo amwiittana a Muluku, niiraanyihiwe ni Yoowo niwoko na okhwa wa Mwanawe, wootepaxa vano, nireene oowiiraanyihiweene, nnivuluxiwe ni okumaawe!" 
Romans5:11 Kheehiyono paahi yeeyo, menetho ninnamuhakalalela Muluku niwoko na Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu, mwa Yoowo hiyo nohaakhela vaanaano wiiraana." 
Romans5:12 Tivawo, mooteene yoowo yoottheka yaavolongwaaya mweelaponi niwoko na mulopwana mmoha, ni vahoolowaya okhwa niwoko na yoottheka ele, hiihotho okhwa waaweenle atthu ootheene, niwoko ootheene aattheka." 
Romans5:13 Vano, nihinaaye ovahiwa nlamulo, yoottheka yeera ekhanleene mweelaponi. Yootthekatho kheenaalikeliwa nihinaaye okhala nlamulo." 
Romans5:14 Wa soothesene, okhwa wannalamula okhuma ehuhu ya Adamu mpaka ya Moisesi, hiihotho wa yaale yahaakhanleno yoottheka yoolikana ntoko Adamu, mwa yoowo aari eneneero ya yoole eera awe." 
Romans5:15 Mukhalelo wa mahala khoonlikanxereya ni mukhalelo wa yoottheka. Waari weera vekhaikhai atthu ancipale akhwiiye niwoko na yoottheka ya mutthu mmoha paahi, ekhaikhaitho weera mahala a Muluku ti oopwahaxa. Mahaleene yaawo anrweela wa Muluku wa ancipale niwoko na mutthu mmoha paahi, Yeesu Kristu, ti matokweenexa." 
Romans5:16 Mahala a Muluku khaanlikana ni yookhumelela ya yoottheka ya mutthu mmoha paahi. Othorihiwa otthanre yoottheka emoha oruuhaka ottaruxa, mene mahala atthanre soottheka sincipale aaruuha waakhuleliwa ni Muluku." 
Romans5:17 Vano, waari weera okhwa waalamula niwoko na yoottheka ya mutthu mmoha paahi, wootepaxa eniilamule mookumini wa yaale anaakhela wa Muluku waatta wa mahala ala ni yamahala ya waakhuleliwa niwoko na mutthu mmoha paahi, Yeesu Kristu." 
Romans5:18 Tivawo, hiiho ntoko yoottheka emoha paahi eruuhalaaya ottaruxa wa atthu ootheene, hiihotho yoopaka emoha paahi yoovuluxa yaaruuha waakhuleliwa, onruuha okumi wa atthu ootheene." 
Romans5:19 Hiiho ntoko atthu ancipale apakiwaaya anamattheka niwoko na ettiyamaaru ya mutthu mmoha paahi, hiihotho niwoko na wiiwelela wa mutthu mmoharu paahi ancipale eniyaakhuleliwe ni Muluku." 
Romans5:20 Nlamulo nivaheriwe weera yoottheka yaandyeerereye. Weiwotho yaattiyaayawo yoottheka, ahaattatho mahala," 
Romans5:21 mooteene yoowo weera, hiiho ntoko yoottheka elamunlaaya mookhwaani, hiihotho mahala elamule niwoko na waakhuleliwa ni Muluku, eruuhaka okumi woohimala mwa Yeesu Kristu Apwiyaahu." 
Romans6:1 Nneereke hai? Hiyo nnipwaherere ottheka weera mahala yaandyeerereye? 
Romans6:2 Hata vakhaani! Hiyo ninkhwela yoottheka, nnipwaherere hai okhala mwa yeeyo?" 
Romans6:3 Apaale khamusuwenle weera hiyo ootheene nipatisiwe mwa Kristu Yeesu, nipatisiwe mwa okhwawawe?" 
Romans6:4 Tivawo, nivithiwe ni Yoowo mookhwaani niwoko na opatiso, weera hiyo nikhale ni okumi onyowani, hiiho ntoko Kristu ovenyererihiwaawe mookhwaani niwoko na ovuwa wa Atiithi." 
Romans6:5 Waari weera hiyo nithukumanyihiwe mooteene yoowo ni Yeesu mookhwaanimwawe, vekhaikhai nnithukumanyihiwetho ni Yoowo moovenyereranimwawe." 
Romans6:6 Vano, noosuwela weera mutthwaahu a khalayi oothomeiwa ni Yoowo, weera erutthu ya yoottheka ephwatiwe, ni weera nihikhaletho ipottha sa yoottheka," 
Romans6:7 niwoko yoowo okhwiiye, oovuluwa mwa yoottheka." 
Romans6:8 Moone, hiyo naakhwaaka ni Kristu, nnoororomela weera nnikhaletho ni Yoowo." 
Romans6:9 Vano, noosuwela weera avenyererihiweene mookhwaani, Kristu khangwera okhwatho. Okhwa khoongwera omulamulatho." 
Romans6:10 Ni okhwawawe, Kristu okhwenle yoottheka khuluwi, ni okumi onyowani onkhalaawe, onimukhalela Muluku." 
Romans6:11 Mooteene yoowo, mwiixuupuwelele weera mukhwiiyeene wa yoottheka, mene munoomukhalela Muluku mwa Kristu Yeesu." 
Romans6:12 Tivawo, muhihiye yoottheka elamulaka irutthusanyu sinkhwa, mwiiwelelaka soohaawelasaya." 
Romans6:13 Muhiveleele mipatta sa irutthusanyu wa yoottheka ntoko mipatta sa soonanara. Ohiyanawaya, mwiivaherere wa Muluku, ntoko atthu aruuhiwe wa okhwa mpaka okumi. Mveleele mipatta sa irutthusanyu wa Yoowo, ntoko mipatta sa ekhaikhai." 
Romans6:14 Yoottheka kheerwa yoolamulani, niwoko khamukhanle vathi wa nlamulo, mene wa mahala." 
Romans6:15 Vano, nnittheke niwoko khanikhanle vathi wa nlamulo, mene wa mahala? Hata vakhaani!" 
Romans6:16 Khamusuwenle weera nyuwo mwiivahereraka wa mukina weera mmwiiwelele ntoko ipottha, nyuwo munkhala ipottha sa yoowo mumwiiwelelaanyu – hata sikhale ipottha sa yoottheka, enooronghani wa okhwa, hata sikhale ipottha sa wiiwelela, onooronghani wa waakhuleliwa ni Muluku?" 
Romans6:17 Asanttetho wa Muluku niwoko, mwaarookhalaru ipottha sa yoottheka, nyuwo mohaakhulela ni murima wootheene moota wa nihusiho muvahiwaanyu." 
Romans6:18 Nyuwo moovuluxiwa mwa yoottheka, ni mookhala ipottha sa ekhaikhai." 
Romans6:19 Kinuuluma yeeyo ni mikhalelo sa omutthu, niwoko khamuniiwexexa itthu sootheene. Hiiho ntoko nyuwo mwaavahereraanyu mipatta sa irutthusanyu weera sikhale ipottha sa ohitteela ni onanara onrongha wootepa onanara, vano mvaherere iyo weera sikhale ipottha sa ekhaikhai enrongha wa ntteeliho." 
Romans6:20 Mwaaraanyu ipottha sa yoottheka, khamwaakhanle vathi wa ekhaikhai." 
Romans6:21 Soowiima heeni nyuwo muhemphaanyu wa itthu iye sa khalayi singwuulihihani muru vaanaano? Ommaleloniwaya ti okhwa! 
Romans6:22 Vanonto, mweenre nyuwo mvuluxiwaka mwa yoottheka ni mukhala ipottha sa Muluku, soowiima munghephaanyu sinooronghani wa ntteeliho, ni ommaleloniwaya ti okumi woohimala." 
Romans6:23 Ntthuvelo na yoottheka ti okhwa, mene mahala a Muluku ti okumi woohimala mwa Kristu Yeesu Apwiyaahu." 
Romans7:1 Nyuwo khamusuwenle, axunnaka – kinuuluma ni atthu ansuwela nlamulo – weera nlamulo nri ni ikuru mutthu paahi areene ni okumi?"
