Romans7:2 Ori ntoko ha: muthiyana ootheliwa ori ni aiyawe munlamuloni awo ereene ni okumi. Aiyawetho yakhwa, muthiyana ole khankhala vathi wa nlamulo na othelana." 
Romans7:3 Tivawo, owo atheliwa ni mulopwana mukina aiyawe nlelo ereene ni okumi, owo aniitthaniwe namararuwa. Aiyawetho yakhwa, owo khankhala vathi wa nlamulo nne, ni hata atheliwaka ni mulopwana mukina, owo khakhala namararuwa." 
Romans7:4 Hiiho, axunnaka, nyuwotho mookhwela nlamulo niwoko na erutthu ya Kristu, weera mukhale a mukina, a Yoole ovenyerenre mookhwaani, weera nimwiimihere Muluku yoowiima." 
Romans7:5 Vano, naalamuliwaahu ni mukhalelo wa erutthu, soohaawela sootthekiha saakhumme munlamuloni saavara muteko mweerutthunimwahu, weera siime soowiima sa okhwa." 
Romans7:6 Mene vano, nihiyaka ottuli yeele yaanitthunke, noovuluxiwa wa nlamulo weera nirumeele munkhaleloni munyowani wa Munepa, ohikhanle munkhaleloni wa khalayi wa nlamulo noolempwa." 
Romans7:7 Nneereke hai? Nlamulo ti yoottheka? Hata vakhaani! Mwa yeeyo, miyo nkaasuwela ti heeni yoottheka, ohikhanle niwoko na nlamulo. Vekhaikhai, miyo nkaasuwela ti heeni ohaawela woonanara, nlamulo nahaahimale: “muhihaawele yoonanara.”" 
Romans7:8 Yootthekatho, evarelaka muteko ehuhu evahiwe ni nlamulo, yookiruwerela soohaawela soohiyanahiyana sootheene soonanara. Vano, nihikhanle nlamulo, yoottheka yohookhwa." 
Romans7:9 Khalayi miyo kaakhala woohikhala nlamulo, mene nlamulo niwaakaru, yoottheka yoohihimuwa, ni miyo kohookhwa." 
Romans7:10 Kohoonelela weera nlamulo nenne, nivaheriwe oruwera okumi, vekhaikhai nooruwera okhwa." 
Romans7:11 Yoottheka, evarelaka muteko ehuhu evahiwe ni nlamulo, yookilokottha ni yookiiva niwoko na nlamulo." 
Romans7:12 Tivawo nlamulo ti nootteela, aani, malamulo ti ootteela, oowookowa ni ooreera." 
Romans7:13 Ni vano, yeeyo eri yooreera yoothatuwa okhwa wa miyo? Hata vakhaani! Yootthekatho yooruwera okhwa mwa miyo niwoko na yeeyo yaari yooreera, weera yoonihere weera eri yoottheka moota wooweera niwoko na nlamulo, yoottheka yoothatuwa yoolipaxa opwaha khalayi." 
Romans7:14 Noosuwela weera nlamulo ti na mmunepani. Wa soothesene, miyo nkihiyono, niwoko kaathumihiwe wa yoottheka ntoko epottha." 
Romans7:15 Nkinsuwela kineeraaka, niwoko nkimpaka yeeyo kintthunaaka, mene yeeyo kinthanyaaka." 
Romans7:16 Miyo kaapakaka yeeyo kihintthunaaka, miyo kinaakhulela weera nlamulo ti nooreera." 
Romans7:17 Mwa yeeyo, nkihiyono ti miyo kimpaka yeeyo, mene yoottheka enkhala mwa miyo." 
Romans7:18 Koosuwela weera kheewo yooreera enkhala mwa miyo, eyo tiiyo mweerutthunimwaka, niwoko kintthuna opaka yeeyo eri yooreera, mene nkingwera opaka." 
Romans7:19 Vano, yeeyo kimpakaaka kheehiyono yooreera kintthunaaka opaka, mene yoonanara kihintthunaaka opaka, ti yeeyo kimpwahereraaka opaka." 
Romans7:20 Moone, kaapakaka yeeyo kihintthunaaka, nkihiyonotho miyo kimpaka yeeyo, mene yoottheka enkhala mwa miyo." 
Romans7:21 Hiiho, kimphwanya nlamulo nna nivaraka muteko mwa miyo: Kaatthunaka opaka yooreera, yoonanara eri vamoha ni miyo." 
Romans7:22 Vano mpuwa mwa mmurimanimwaka koohakalalela nlamulo na Muluku," 
Romans7:23 mene kinoona nlamulo nikina nivaraka muteko mwa mmweettelonimwaka, niwanaka ni nlamulo na soowuupuwelasaka, nikitatuxaka ootthukiwa a nlamulo na yoottheka nimvara muteko mmweettelonimwaka." 
Romans7:24 Moota kihaawiyaaka! Taani anaakivuluxe wa mweettelo ola wa okhwa? 
Romans7:25 Asantte wa Muluku niwoko na Yeesu Kristu Apwiyaahu! Vano, ni soowuupuwelasaka miyo kiri epottha ya nlamulo na Muluku, mene mmweettelonimwaka, epottha ya nlamulo na yoottheka." 
Romans8:1 Tivawo, khaniwowo nttaruxo wa yaawo ari mwa Kristu Yeesu." 
Romans8:2 Vano, niwoko na Kristu Yeesu, nlamulo na Munepa wa okumi nookivuluxa wa nlamulo na yoottheka ni na okhwa." 
Romans8:3 Yeeyo nlamulo nahaaweraaya opaka niwoko naaraaya nookhulumuliweene ni erutthu, Muluku oopaka, amurumihaka Mwanawe muneenaawe ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka alikanaka ni namattheka. Ni hiiho aathoriha yoottheka mweerutthuni," 
Romans8:4 weera soonyesereriha sa ekhaikhai sa nlamulo sikwaniheraxeke mwa hiyo nihinkhala munkhaleloni wa erutthu, mene wa Munepa." 
Romans8:5 Yaawo ankhala munkhaleloni wa erutthu anuupuwela itthu iye erutthu enghaawelaaya, mene yaawo ankhala munkhaleloni wa Munepa, anuupuwela yeeyo Munepa onghaawelaaya." 
Romans8:6 Muupuwelo wa erutthu yootthekeya onruuha okhwa, mene muupuwelo oneettihiwa ni Munepa onruuha okumi ni murettele." 
Romans8:7 Muupuwelo wa erutthu yootthekeya ti mwiittana a Muluku, niwoko khooniiwelela nlamulo na Yoowo, hata khoongwera opaka yeeyo." 
Romans8:8 Yaawo anlamuliwa ni erutthu yootthekeiya khaangwera omusiveliha Muluku. 
Romans8:9 Wa soothesene, nyuwo khamukhanle munlamuloni na erutthu yootthekeya, Munepa wa Muluku wakhala vekhaikhai mwa nyuwo. Ni akhala mukina ohinono Munepa wa Kristu, owo khahiyono a Yoowo." 
Romans8:10 Kristutho akhala mwa nyuwo, erutthwaanyu enkhala yookhwa niwoko na yoottheka, mene munepa onkhala ni okumi niwoko na waakhuleliwa ni Muluku." 
Romans8:11 Vano, wakhala mwa nyuwo Munepa wa Yoole omvenyererihale Yeesu mookhwaani, Yoowo omvenyererihale Kristu mookhwaani anaavahetho okumi wa irutthusanyu sookhwa niwoko na Munepaawe onkhala mwa nyuwo." 
Romans8:12 Tivawo, axunnaka, nri ni ikoongori, ohikhanle wa erutthu nikhalaka oolamuliweene ni eyo." 
Romans8:13 Nyuwo mwakhala munkhaleloni wa erutthu yootthekeya, mmwikhwe, mene mwiiva miteko sa erutthu ni Munepa, mmwikhale ni okumi." 
Romans8:14 Ootheene yaawo aneettihiwa ni Munepa wa Muluku ari anamwane a Muluku. 
Romans8:15 Nyuwo khamwaakhenle munepa wa okaporo weera moove veeli, mene mohaakhela Munepa onookhalihani ntoko anamwane. Vano, hiyo ninkhuwela ni Munepa Owo: “Aba,” entaphulela “Tiithi.”" 
Romans8:16 Munepeene Yoowo onnakhalela onamoona mwa munepaahu weera nri anamwane a Muluku. 
Romans8:17 Nakhala anamwane, nri vano anamwaakhela a mahala a Muluku vamoha ni Kristu, hiyo nahaawa vekhaikhai vamoha ni Kristu weera nivuwihiwe vamohatho." 
Romans8:18 Kinoona weera soohaawaxasahu sa vaanaanova khasingwereya olikanxiwa ni ovuwa oneera othupululiwe mwa hiyo. 
Romans8:19 Soopattuxiwa sinnaweherera ni ohaawelaxa weera anamwane a Muluku ethupululiwe. 
Romans8:20 Vano soopattuxiwa saapakiwe sa siiyo, khasihiyono niwoko na othanlawaya, mene niwoko na otthuna wa Muluku iikaathiyemo" 
Romans8:21 munroromeloni weera soopattuxiwasene iye nsivuluxiwe wa okaporo wa yunttelo, ni hiiho sinoowera waakhela oneethi woovuwaxa wa anamwane a Muluku." 
Romans8:22 Noosuwela weera soopattuxiwa sootheene sinniipulela mpaka vaanaanova ntoko sireene moovoreiyani wa oyara. 
Romans8:23 Ni khasihiyono paahi seiyo, mene hiyo asineenaahu nookhalano soowiima soopacera sa Munepa, nniipulela mpuwamwahu, niwehereraka ni murima wootheene waakhulelawahu ntoko anamwane ni ovuluxiwa wa erutthwaahu." 
Romans8:24 Vano munroromeloni nna noovuluxiwa. Mene nroromelo nnooneya, khanihiyono nroromelo. Taani onroromela yeeyo onoonaawe?" 
Romans8:25 Vaheera naroromela yeeyo nlelo nihoonnaahu, ningweherera ni ovilela." 
Romans8:26 Mooteene yoowo Munepa onnikhavihera ohilipawahu, niwoko kanisuwenle nnenesene ovekela, mene Munepeene Yoowo onnanivekelela wa Muluku ni soowiipulela soohiwereya ohimeya." 
Romans8:27 Ni Muluku onoona mpaka mpuwa mwa mirima, onsuwela yeeyo Munepa onghaawelaaya, niwoko Munepa onnaavekelela ootteela ntoko Muluku ontthunaawe." 
Romans8:28 Noosuwela weera Muluku onneettiha soothesene wa mpuha wa yaale animusivela, yaale yiitthaniwe niwoko na yeeyo Owo aatthunaawe weera yaareye." 
Romans8:29 Vano, yaawo Muluku aasuwenlaawe okhuma khalayi, aahaathanlatho weera ekhale oolikana ni Mwanawe, weera Owo akhale Ntthaara variyari wa axunneiye ancipale." 
Romans8:30 Yaawo Owo aathanlalaawe okhuma khalayi, oowiitthanatho, ni yaawo aawiitthannaawe, oowaakhulelatho, ni yaawo owaakhulenlaawe, oohaavuwihatho." 
Romans8:31 Nneereke hai sa itthusene seiya? Muluku aari ni hiyo, taani aniittane ni hiyo?" 
Romans8:32 Yoole ohimuurenle Mwanawe mmoharu, mene omvaherenre Yeesu wa hiyo ootheene, vekhaikhai anaanivahe vamoha ni Yoowo itthu sootheenetho." 
Romans8:33 Taani eniiwoothere oothanliwa a Muluku? Ti Muluku ongwaakhulela. 
Romans8:34 Taani anaathorihe? Aari Kristu Yeesu okhwiiye. Wootepaxa, Owo oovenyerera ni ori moono mulopwana wa Muluku anivekelelakatho hiyo." 
Romans8:35 Taani anaanimwalanyihe wa osivela wa Muluku? Apaale ohaawa, naari sookacamiha, naari ottharatthariwa, naari etala, naari osiwa, naari woopiha, hata ekatana?" 
Romans8:36 Ntoko elempwalaaya: “Niwoko na nyuwo, nri ngwoopihani mwa okhwa wa mahuku ootheene, ntoko ikhondoolo simvahereriwa wa namwiiva.”" 
Romans8:37 Mwa itthu sootheene seiyatho, nri anamawina oopwahaxa niwoko na Yoole onisivenle." 
Romans8:38 Vano, kooviriyeliwa weera hata okhwa, naari okumi, hata ndyelo, naari munepa woonanara, hata ehuhu ya vaanaano, naari ya muhoolo, hata ikuru sikina," 
Romans8:39 hata orakama, naari wiixera, hata yakhalaru etthu ekina epattuxingwe kheerwa ewera onimwalanyiha ni osivela wa Muluku ori mwa Kristu Yeesu, Apwiyaahu." 
Romans9:1 Kinghima ekhaikhai mwa Kristu, nkinootha. Soosuwelasaka sinkikhalela onamoona mwa Munepa Wootteela:" 
Romans9:2 Koothananaxa, ni kookhalano murima woolemela woohihiyerera." 
Romans9:3 Vano miyo koolikana, mpaka kaahaawela weera kilaphiwe ni kimwalanyihiwe ni Kristu niwoko na osivela wa axunnaka, yaawo a mulokwaaka," 
Romans9:4 muloko wa oYixrayeli. Waakhuleliwa ntoko anamwane ti wawaya; ovuwa wa wiirimu ti wawaya. Soowiiraanyiha, waakhuleliwa wa nlamulo, olapa Mpaani mwa Muluku, ni soororomelihiwa – sootheene siri sawaya." 
Romans9:5 Anamwane a asitokweene oopacera a oYixrayeli ti awaya, ni mweerutthuni Kristu aari a ekhapiraaya. Muluku oopwaha itthu sootheene ooreelihiwa mahuku ootheene. Ame*." 
Romans9:6 Nihuupuwele weera masu a Muluku yaakusanyiheya. Khaahiyono anamwane ootheene a oYixrayeli weera ti vekhaikhai muloko wa oYixrayeli. 
Romans9:7 Hata khoohiyono weera ekhapira yootheene ya Abrahaamu eri anamwanaaya a ekhaikhai. Ohiyanawaya: “Ti niwoko na Isaaki ekhapiraanyu eneeraaya yaalikeliwe.” 
Romans9:8 Eyo tiyo: khaahiyono anamwane a erutthu ari anamwane a Muluku, mene ti anamwane a yoororomelihiwa ari oowaalikeliwa ntoko ekhapira ya ekhaikhai ya Abrahaamu." 
Romans9:9 Vano ti hiihaawo yoororomelihiwa epakiwaaya: “Ehuhu yootthuneya nkirwe veeli, ni Sara anaakhale ni mwaana.”" 
Romans9:10 Ni eyo khayeereiye paahi ni Sara, menetho ni Rebeka, aarino maphapo yaakhalano atithaya amoharu, atithihu Isaaki." 
Romans9:11 Ni nlelotho, ehinaaye oyariwa maphapo, awo ehinaaye opaka yooreera, hata yoonanara, Muluku aamweerela Rebeka:" 
Romans9:12 “Mutokweene anaamurumeele mukhaani,” ntoko elempwalaaya: “Koomusivela Yakobe, mene koomuthanya Esawu.”" 
Romans9:13 Hiihaawo, Muluku oniixoonihera weera ethanlelo eri ya Yoowo oniitthana, ehikhanle ya miteko sa omutthu." 
Romans9:14 Vano, nneereke hai? Apaale Muluku khankhala ni ekhaikhai? Hata vakhaani!" 
Romans9:15 Owo aamweerela Moisesi: “Kinoommorela ikharari yoowo kintthunaaka ommorela ikharari, ni nkimoonele ehaaya yoowo kintthunaaka omoonela ehaaya.”" 
Romans9:16 Tivawo eyo kheehiyono ya ohaawela, naari ya miteko sa omutthu, mene ya ikharari sa Muluku." 
Romans9:17 Vano Yoolempwa* eneera sa Farawu*: “Miyo kooweemexa niwoko na nthowa nna paahi: weera kiwoonihere mwa weyo ikurusaka, ni weera Nsinanaka nilaleiwe elapo yootheene.”" 
Romans9:18 Tivawo Muluku onimmorenlaawe ikharari yoowo onimutthunaawe ni ommuumihera murima yoowo onimutthunaawe. 
Romans9:19 Apaale mukina a nyuwo anaakeerele: “Waari hiiho, vano niwoko heeni Muluku nlelo onihimahimmaawe hiyo: Taani ongwera okhootta otthunawawe?”" 
Romans9:20 Mutthu, weyo taani oomukohakoha Muluku? Apaale yeeyo epakiwe enoowera omweerela yoowo opanke: “Heeni mukipankaanyu hiiha?”" 
Romans9:21 Namoopa a nyaapu khanono ikuru soopaka wa olokweene yoowo mwaapu mmoha wa soovarela soottittimiheyaxa, ni mwaapu mukina wa soovarela sa khula nihuku?" 
Romans9:22 Nnihime eheeni hiyo, Muluku atthuna woonihera isarasawe ni asuweliha ikurusawe? Owo oovilela ni oweherera otokotoko nyaapu sa isarasawe sipakeliwe ophwata." 
Romans9:23 Nihimeke eheeni Owo aapankaawe yeeyo weera sisuweliwe mihakhu sa ovuwawawe wa nyaapu sa ikhararisawe Owo orehererenlaawe khalayi ovuwa? 
Romans9:24 Vano hiyo nri a nyaapu iya, hiyo Muluku oniitthannaawe, ohikhanle paahi wa aYuda, menetho wa amalapo." 
Romans9:25 Ntoko mprofeeti Hoxeya eenraawe: “Nkiitthane mulokwaaka yoowo wahaakhanle, ni oosiveleya yoowo ahaakhanle.”" 
Romans9:26 Ni: “Nipuro naahimmwalaaya: ‘Nyuwo khamuhiyono mulokwaaka,’ vaavaawo nyuwo mmwiitthaniwe ‘anamwane a Muluku mukumi.’”" 
Romans9:27 Mprofeeti Yesayatho onghima mwaha wa aYixrayeli: “Naamwi aYixrayeli yaantteene ntoko ehaava ya mphareiya, eniivuluxiwe atthu vakhaani paahi," 
Romans9:28 niwoko Apwiya eniikwanihere nthorihelo vathi moota woowaakuveya ni wookwanela.” 
Romans9:29 Ntoko Yesaya eenraawetho khalayi: “Apwiya a anakhotto yahaanikhalinghe ekhapira, naamuthatuwa ntoko oSodoma, ni naamulikanyihiwa ni oGomora.”" 
Romans9:30 Vano, nneereke hai? Amalapo yahaasaanse waakhuleliwa ni Muluku, yaaphwanya iwo – waakhuleliwa onrweela niwoko na nroromelo." 
Romans9:31 aYixrayelitho yaasaasa nlamulo weera yaakhuleliwe ni Muluku, khayaawenre." 
Romans9:32 Heeni yahaawenraaya? Niwoko khayaasaasa ni nroromelo, mene ni miteko. Awo yaakwattuliwa ni nluku nookwattula." 
Romans9:33 Ntoko elempwalaaya: “Moone, Miyo kohiiyaathi oSiyoni nluku nookwattula ni noowuuwiha, mene yoowo onroromela, nenno kharwa uuliwa muru.”" 
Romans10:1 Axunnaka, ohaawela wa murimaaka ni nivekelonaka wa Muluku mwaha wa aYixrayeli, ti weera awo evuluxiwe." 
Romans10:2 Vano kinoowera okhalela onamoona weera awo arino nthiti wa itthu sa Muluku, mene nthitinaya khanihiyono mwaha wa esuwelo." 
Romans10:3 Hapo ehisuwelaka waakhuleliwa onrweela wa Muluku ni yaasaasaka ekhaikhaiyaaya asineenaaya, awo khayaakhulenle waakhuleliwa wa Muluku." 
Romans10:4 Moone, Kristu ti ommaleloni wa nlamulo, akwaniheraka waakhuleliwa ni Muluku wa ootheene anroromela." 
Romans10:5 Vano, Moisesi olempe moota ola mwaha wa waakhuleliwa onrweela wa nlamulo: “Mutthu ompaka itthusene seiya anaakhale niwoko na iya.”" 
Romans10:6 Mwahatho wa waakhuleliwa onrweela niwoko na nroromelo, elempwe: “Muheere mmurimanimwanyu: ‘taani anaawele wiirimu’” (eyo tiiyo omukuruxa Kristu)." 
Romans10:7 Hoye hoye: ‘taani anaakhuruwele moowiixera’” (eyo tiiyo omvenyereriha Kristu mwa akhwiiye). 
Romans10:8 Vano, Yoolempwa* enghima eheeni? “Nsu nri vakhiviruwanyu; nri mmwaano ni mmurimanimwanyu.” Nsu nenenenno na nroromelo ninlaleiyaahu ti nna:" 
Romans10:9 Nyuwo mwalapa ni eyanowaanyu weera Yeesu ti Apwiya ni mwaroromela ni murimaanyu weera Muluku aamvenyereriha mookhwaani, nyuwo munoovuluxiwa," 
Romans10:10 niwoko ni murima munroromela weera mwaakhuleliwe ni Muluku, nitho ni eyano munlapa weera mvuluxiwe." 
Romans10:11 Ntoko Yoolempwa* yeenraaya: “Yoowo onimuroromela, kharwa uulihiwa muru.”" 
Romans10:12 Khoohiyanne variyari wa aYuda ni amalapo, niwoko Apwiyeene yaawo ti Apwiya a ooweeli, ni Awo annaareelihaxa ootheene yaawo angwiitthana Yaawo," 
Romans10:13 hapo “ootheene yaawo aniitthana Nsina na Apwiya eniivuluxiwe.” 
Romans10:14 Vano, eniwiitthane hai Yaale yahaaroromenlaaya? Ni eniyaaroromele hai Yaale awo yahiiwalaaya suulummwaka sa Yaawo? Ni eniyiiwe hai, ahikhanle mutthu onlaleiya?" 
Romans10:15 Ni eniilaleiye hai ehirumihiwe? Ntoko elempwalaaya: “Ti sooreeraxa inaawo sa yaale anlaleiya masu ooreeraxa!” 
Romans10:16 Wa soothesene, khaahiyono aYixrayeli ootheene yaakhulenle masu ooreeraxa. Vano Yesaya eenre: “Apwiya, taani ororomenle mutthengaahu?”" 
Romans10:17 Hiiho, nroromelo ninrwa niwoko na wiiwa mutthenga, ni mutthenga oniiwiwa niwoko na masu a Kristu." 
Romans10:18 Vano miyo kinookoha: Awo khayiiwale masu ale? Vekhaikhai yaahiiwa! Yoolempweene yeeyo yeenre: “Nsunaya nohiiwanyeya elapo yootheene, ni maswaaya mpaka ekotenle elapo yootheene.”" 
Romans10:19 Kinookoha veeli: Weeraka aYixrayeli khayiiwexenxe? Woopacera, Moisesi eenre: “Miyo kinimookhalihani atthu a ehace wa yaawo ahikhanle muloko, ni Miyo nkitannye isarasanyu niwoko na muloko ohisuwenle.”" 
Romans10:20 Ni Yesaya eenre ni murima woolipa: “Koophwanyiwa ni yaale yahaakaasa, ni kohiixoonihera wa yaale yahaakikoha.”" 
Romans10:21 Mwahatho wa aYixrayeli Owo eenre: “Kohookola matataaka mahuku ootheene wa muloko mmoha wohiiwelela ni onkiwanano.” 
Romans11:1 Vano kinookoha: Apaale Muluku ookhootta mulokwaawe? Hata vakhaani! Miyo mwaneenaaka ti muYixrayeli, ekhapira ya Abrahaamu, epuumba ya Benyamini." 
Romans11:2 Muluku khaakhoontte mulokwaawe Owo khalayi aasuwenlaawe. Apaale nyuwo khamusuwenle moota Eliya omukhuwelenlaawe Muluku niwoko na Yixrayeli ntoko Yoolempwa yeenraaya: 
Romans11:3 “Apwiya, yaawiiva maprofeetaanyu, aaphwata mapurowaanyu a olapa. Kihanle miyo paahi, ni anaasaasa okiiva.”" 
Romans11:4 Vano, yaari yoowaakhula heeni ya wiirimu? “Kohiisungera atthu macira miloko mathannameeli ahimulampe Bahali*.”" 
Romans11:5 Hiihotho, olelo anghala aYixrayeli vakhaani, oothanliwa ni mahala." 
Romans11:6 Waari ni mahala paahi, khoohiyonotho ni miteko. Waari ni miteko, mahala khayaakhalatho mahala." 
Romans11:7 Nneereke hai? aYixrayeli khayaawenre yeeyo yaasaasaaya vancipale, mene oothanliwa yaawera. Akina ancipale yaatatuxiwa oowuuma murima," 
Romans11:8 ntoko elempwalaaya: “Muluku ohaavaha munepa wa wooseela, maitho weera ehoone ni maaru weera ehiiwe, mpaka olelo vaava.”" 
Romans11:9 Ni Davide eenre: “Weera meesaaya ethatuwe ntthavi ni muraakho, nluku nookwattula ni noottaruxa." 
Romans11:10 Maithwaaya eriipiwe weera ehoone, ni ittulisaya sikhoromane mahuku ootheene.”" 
Romans11:11 Kinookoha veeli: Apaale akwattuliwe weera yuuwe? Hata vakhaani! Ohiyanawaya, niwoko na wuuwawaya wohoorwa ovuluwa wa amalapo weera ekhale ehace mwa aYixrayeli." 
Romans11:12 Vano, waari weera wuuwa wa aYixrayeli ontaphulela oreela wa elapo ya vathi, ni oyeleelawaya ontaphulela mihakhu wa amalapo, wootepaxa onuutaphulele waattawaya!" 
Romans11:13 Kinuuluma ni nyuwo amalapo. Keenre kikhalaka murummwa wa amalapo, kookhalano nttittimiho nincipale mmutekonimwaka," 
Romans11:14 munroromeloni weera ni moota mukina kiwere otannya ehace mmulokonimwakeene yoowo weera naari mano akina a yaawo evuluxiwe. 
Romans11:15 Vano, okhoottawaya waawenre wiiraanyiha wa elapo ya vathi, eniikhumelele eheeni awo yaakhuleliwa veeli? Onuutaphulele okumi wa yaawo akhwiiye." 
Romans11:16 Soowiima soopacera soovahiwa saari sootteela, soowiima sootheene sinookhalatho sootteela. Waari weera mukwankhwaari ori wootteela, vano hiihotho iphandisaya." 
Romans11:17 Iphandi sikina soothikiliwa, mene nyuwo, mureene ya oliveira ya ntuphini, moolumbaanyiwa ni iphandi sikina ni vano nyuwo mungwura ebwanyaasi enrweela munkwankhwaarini wa sooliveira* sa ekhaikhai." 
Romans11:18 Tivawo, muhiixunnuwihe ni iphandi soothikiliwa. Nyuwo mwapaka yeeyo, musuwele nnene weera khamuhiyono nyuwo mumvaha okumi wa mukwankhwaari, mene owo wa nyuwo." 
Romans11:19 Nyuwo mmweere: “Iphandi soothikiliwa weera miyo kilumbaanyiwe.” 
Romans11:20 Ti ekhaikhai. Wa soothesene, iyo soothikiliwa niwoko na ohiroromela, ni nyuwo munkhala munroromeloni. Muhiixunnuwihe, mene moove," 
Romans11:21 niwoko Muluku ahuurenle iphandi sa ekhaikhai, khaawuurelanitho nyuwo." 
Romans11:22 Tivawo, mutthokelele oreera murima ni ottaruxa wa Muluku: ottaruxiwa wa yaale yuuwale, mene oreera murima wa nyuwo, mwapwaherera mooreerani murimaawe. Mwaahipwaherera, mmwithikiliwetho." 
Romans11:23 Vano, mwaha wa yaawo, yaahipwaherera moohiroromelani, eniilumbaanyiwetho, niwoko Muluku onoowera waalumbaanyiha veeli." 
Romans11:24 Ohiya toko yeeyo, nyuwo mwaathikiliwe wa sooliveira* sa ntuphini, ni yaavirikana ni ekhalelowaaya, mwaalumbaanyiwa ni sooliveira* sa ekhaikhai, wootepaxa nsilumbaanyiwe iphandi sa ekhaikhai ni yooliveireene yeeyo ya ekhaikhai?" 
Romans11:25 Axunnaka, kintthuna weera musuwele nnenesene ntikhinelo nna weera muhiixoone: Wookhumelela wuuma murima wa akina a aYixrayeli mpaka okwanela waatta wa amalapo." 
Romans11:26 Ni hiihaawo aYixrayeli ootheene eniivuluxiwe, ntoko elempwalaaya: “Anaarweele oSiyoni Mvuluxa anaasusihe soonanara sa ekhapira ya Yakobe." 
Romans11:27 Ni wu onuukhale owiiraananawaka yaawo, kaavenxaka sootthekasaya.”" 
Romans11:28 Wa masu ooreeraxa, awo ari amwiittana niwoko na nyuwo, mene wa ethanlelo, awo ari oosiveleya niwoko na asitokweenaaya oopacera." 
Romans11:29 Samahala ni wiitthana wa Muluku ti woohivirikanyiheya. 
Romans11:30 Hiiho ntoko nyuwo khalayi mwahaamwiiwelela Muluku, vano moomoreliwa ikharari niwoko na ohiiwelelawaya aYixrayeli," 
Romans11:31 hiihotho awo aakhala oohiiwelela weera yaakheletho ikharari niwoko na woomorelani ikharari Muluku. 
Romans11:32 Muluku oowiiyaathi atthu ootheene vathi wa ettiyamaaru weera aamorele ikharari atthu ootheene. 
Romans11:33 Ii! Wiixera wa mihakhu ni miruku ni esuwelo ya Muluku! Taani ongwera ophima soothorihasawe ni wiiwexexa iphirosawe? 
Romans11:34 Taani onsuwela soowuupuwela sa Apwiya, naari taani ori namalakaaya?" 
Romans11:35 Taani aamuvanghe toko etthu Muluku, weera vahoolowaya Muluku amutthuvele?" 
Romans11:36 Vano, sootheene sinrweela wa Muluku, sinkhala niwoko na Yoowo ni sinimukhalela Yoowo. Wa Yoowo okhale ovuwa wa mahuku ootheene! Ame*." 
Romans12:1 Tivawo axunnaka, kinoodyoonttelelani niwoko na ikharari sa Muluku, weera mwiileve ntoko yooveleela ya okumi, yootteela ni yoomusiveliha Muluku, niwoko wu ti omurumeelawanyu Muluku woowaakhuleleya." 
Romans12:2 Muhitthareke mweettelo wa elapo ela, mene mutatuxiwe ni oreherera wa soowuupuwelasanyu. Hiiho nyuwo mmwiiwexexe ti heeni otthuna wa Muluku, eyo tiiyo, ti heeni yooreera, yoomusiveliha ni yookwanela." 
Romans12:3 Vano, ni mahala kivahiwaaka, kinooleelani ootheene nyuwo weera muhiixooneke woopwaha ontthuneyaaya. Ohiyanawaya, mukhale oohiixoona. Khula mutthu iiwehaweheke ni muringo wa nroromelo Muluku oovanghaaweni." 
Romans12:4 Hiiho ntoko khula mutthu a hiyo okhalannaawe erutthu emoha ni mipatta sincipale, ni mipattasene seiyo khasimvara muteko mmoharu," 
Romans12:5 hiihotho hiyo nri ancipale, nimpaka erutthu emoharu mwa Kristu, ni mpatta ti mpatta ontthukiwa vamoha ni mipatta sootheene sikina." 
Romans12:6 Nookhalano sa mahala soohiyanahiyana ntoko mahala nivahiwaahu. Akhala mukina ongwera othalihera otthuna wa Muluku, ontthuneya ovarela muteko mahaleene yaawo munroromelonimwawe." 
Romans12:7 Mahalaanyu yakhala orumeela, murumeele, yakhala ohusiha, muhusihe," 
Romans12:8 yakhala oowaalipiha mirima akina, mupake hiiho, yakhala ovaha, muvahe ni murima wootheene, yakhala ohoolela, muhoolele ni nthiti, yakhala omorela ikharari, mupakeke ni ohakalala." 
Romans12:9 Osivela okhale wa ekhaikhai. Muthanye yeeyo eri yoonanara, ni muvarexexe yeeyo eri yooreera." 
Romans12:10 Musivelaneke mukina ni mukhwaawe ntoko axunna. Fataari mwaattittimihe akhwiinyu muhinaaye asineenaanyu. 
Romans12:11 Nihoohaleelekeni nthiti, mwiiminyaalele mmunepani, mwaarumeeleke Apwiya." 
Romans12:12 Muhakalaleke munroromeloni, mukhale ni ovilela moothananani, mpwaherereke mmavekeloni." 
Romans12:13 Mwaakawele ootteela seiyo awo anghaawelaaya, ni ngwaakheleke nnene yaawo anoophiyerelani." 
Romans12:14 Mwaareeliheke yaawo anoosoondani, mwaareeliheke ni muhaalapheke." 
Romans12:15 Muhakalaleke ni yaawo anghakalala, ni mwiinleke ni yaawo aniinla." 
Romans12:16 Mukhaleke ni murima mmoharu mukina ni mukhwaawe. Muhikhale oowiixoona, mene mukhale oolikaneene mwiiwananaka ni atthu oohittittimiheyaxa. Muhiisuwele weera muri asuweli." 
Romans12:17 Muhaakakhane wa mukina yoonanara ni yoonanara. Mwaasaase opaka yeeyo eri yooreera vamaithoni wa ootheene. 
Romans12:18 Wawereya, mukhaleke ni murettele ni atthu ootheene." 
Romans12:19 Oosiveleya, muheettele isikula, mene muhiyere yeeyo wa isara sa Muluku, niwoko yoolempwa: “Apwiya yeenre: ‘Isikula ti sawaka. Miyo nkittaruxe.’”" 
Romans12:20 Ohiyanawaya: “Mwiittanaanyu avoliwa etala, mumvaheke yooca, avoliwa ntthona, mumvaheke yoowura. Mwapaka yeeyo, nyuwo mmwimwaandyeerere wuuliwawawe muru.”" 
Romans12:21 Muhiwiniwe ni yoonanara, mene ngwine yoonanara ni yooreera." 
Romans13:1 Atthu ootheene ewiiwelele yaawo anlamula, niwoko khasiwowo ikuru sikina, sihikhanle iya sinrweela wa Muluku. Vano ikuru sootheene sinkhala, sookhalihiwa ni Muluku." 
Romans13:2 Tivawo yoowo ohiniiwelela ikuru iyo, khaniiwelela yeeyo Muluku okhalinghaawe. Yaale ampwaherera hiiho, aniiruuhela nthorihelo asineenaaya." 
Romans13:3 Khoontthuneya weera atthu a ikuru yooviweke, ohikhanle ni yaale ampaka yoonanara. Muntthuna okhala muhiwoovaka atthu a ikuru? Mpakeke yooreera, ni nyuwo mmwittottopeliwe ni yaawo." 
Romans13:4 Atthu a ikuru ari arumeiyi a Muluku wa mpuhaanyu. Mwapakatho yoonanara, ngwoove, niwoko awo khaankuxa ekatana woohikhala nthowa. Ari arumeiyi a Muluku, atthu ankwanihera nttaruxo weera emuttaruxe yoowo ompaka yoonanara." 
Romans13:5 Tivawo, ontthuneya niwiiwelele atthu anlamula, ohikhanle paahi noovaka nttaruxo, menetho niwoko na murima." 
Romans13:6 Ti niwoko na yeeyotho nyuwo munlivaanyu musoko, niwoko ari arumeiyi a Muluku, evaraka ni nthiti ehuhu yootheene muteko ola." 
Romans13:7 Mumvahe khula mutthu yeeyo entthuneya. Wakhala musoko, muliveke, nakhala ntthuvelo, mutthuveke, wakhala woova, mooveke, ni nakhala nttittimiho, muttittimiheke." 
Romans13:8 Muhimukopele mutthu naari etthu emoha, ohikhanle osivelana mukina ni mukhwaawe, niwoko yoowo onimusivela mukhwaawe, ookwanihera nlamulo." 
Romans13:9 Vano, malamulo ala: “muhiraruwe, muhiive, muhiiye, muhiinlele itthu sa mukhwiinyu” ni malamulo ootheene makina, athukumanyiwe munlamuloni mu: “mmusivele mukhwiinyu ntoko muniisivelaanyu mwaneenaanyu.”" 
Romans13:10 Osivela khoompakiha yoonanara ni mukhwiinyu. Tivawo, osivela ti ekwanihero ya nlamulo." 
Romans13:11 Mupakeke yeeyo mwiiwexexaka ehuhu hiyo ninkhalaahu. Yoophiya ehuhu weera muvenyeke mukhovenimwanyu niwoko vano ovuluwawahu ori vakhiviru opwaha ehuhuweene yeele hiyo naapacenraahu ororomela. 
Romans13:12 Ohiyu ohanle vakhaani omala, othana woonikhuveela. Tivawo, nihiye miteko sa mpiphini, ni niiwariheke ikuwo soowiixaakiha sa waara." 
Romans13:13 Neetteleke mukhalelo wa nnene, ntoko atthu aneettela waara wa othana, ohikhanle ngwiipeliwani, moohapaliwani, naari mooraruwani ni moohuureyani, hata moonyakulihanani, hoye hoye munrimani." 
Romans13:14 Ohiyanawaya, mwiiwarihe Apwiya Yeesu Kristu, ni muhuupuwele moota heeni woomaaliha soohaawela sa erutthu." 
Romans14:1 Mmwaakhele yoole ori oohilipa munroromeloni, muhimvaanyaka soowuupuwelasawe." 
Romans14:2 Mukina onroromela weera onoowera oca soothesene, vano mukina ori oohilipa munroromeloni onca paahi yooca yoolimmwa." 
Romans14:3 Yoole onca soothesene ahimuramuseke yoole ohinca, ni yoole ohinca soothesene ahimuthoriheke yoole onca, niwoko Muluku ommwaakhelela." 
Romans14:4 Nyuwo taani oomuthoriha murumeiyi a mukina? Ti Apwiyaawe anlakela owo awera weemela naari wuuwa. Ni aneemele, niwoko Apwiya angwera omweemexa." 
Romans14:5 Ookhala yoowo onttittimiha nihuku nimoha nootteelaxa noopwaha makina, ni ookhala mukina onttittimiha mahuku ootheene weera ti oolikana. Ontthuneya weera khula mutthu akhaleke ooviriyeliwa ni soowuupuwelasawe." 
Romans14:6 Yoowo onttittimiha nihuku nimoha ntoko noottittimiheyaxa, ompaka yeeyo wa Apwiya. Yoowo onkhuura enama, onkhuura wa Apwiya, niwoko onnaavaha asantte Apwiya; ni yoowo onghiya, onghiya wa Apwiya, ni onnaavaha asantte Yaawo." 
Romans14:7 Vano, khaawo a hiyo onkhala wa yoowo mwaneenaawe paahi, ni khaawo a hiyo onkhwa wa yoowo mwaneenaawe paahi." 
Romans14:8 Naakhalaka, nnaakhalela Apwiya, ni naakhwaaka, nnaakhwela Apwiya. Hiiho, naakhalaka, naari naakhwaaka, nri a Apwiya." 
Romans14:9 Ti niwoko nna Kristu aakhwenlaawe ni aavenyerenraawe: weera akhale Apwiya a akumi ni akhwiiye. 
Romans14:10 Vanonto, heeni munimuthorihaanyu munninyu? Naari heeni munimuramusaanyu munninyu? Ootheene hiyo nneemele ohoolo wa ehice ya nthorihelo ya Muluku," 
Romans14:11 niwoko yoolempwa: “Apwiya yeenre: ‘Vekhaikhai, kinoororomelihani weera atthu ootheene eniikokhore ohoolowaka, ni malumi ootheene eniilape weera Miyo ti Muluku.’”" 
Romans14:12 Hiiho, khula mutthu a hiyo anaamuthalihere mikhalelosawe Muluku." 
Romans14:13 Tivawo, nihiyeke othorihana mukina ni mukhwaawe. Mulakele toko weera muhiikaathi nluku nookwattula, naari etthu enooceeliha mphironi ya munninyu." 
Romans14:14 Ntoko mukina ori mwa Apwiya, kooviriyeliwaxa weera kheewo yooca eri yoohitteela mwaneenaayaru, ohikhanle wa mukina onuupuwela weera ti yoohitteela. Vano wa yoowo ti yoohitteela." 
Romans14:15 Wakhala weera munninyu oniithananihera niwoko na yeeyo muncaanyu, nyuwo khamuneetta moosivelani. Muhimphwate munninyu niwoko na yoocaanyu, yoowo Kristu omukhwenlaawe." 
Romans14:16 Muhitthunihere weera akina yooveiheni niwoko na yeeyo nyuwo munoonelaanyu okhala yooreera. 
Romans14:17 Omwene wa Muluku khoohiyono yooca, naari yoowura, mene waakhuleliwa, murettele ni ohakalala mMunepani Wootteela," 
Romans14:18 niwoko yoole onimurumeela Kristu moota hiiho, ti oomusiveliha Muluku ni oottittimihiwa ni atthu." 
Romans14:19 Tivawo, naasaase itthusene seiyo sinruwera murettele ni sinkhavihera opuhihana." 
Romans14:20 Muhiphwate muteko wa Muluku niwoko na yooca. Yooca yootheene ti yootteela, mene ti yoonanara oca yakhalaru etthu enaakwattuliha akina." 
Romans14:21 Fataari ohikhuura enama, naari ohiwura eviinyu, hata opaka yakhalaru etthu enimukwattuliha munninyu." 
Romans14:22 Yeeyo munroromelaanyu mwaha wa itthusene seiya, eyo ekhaleke variyari wa nyuwo ni Muluku paahi. Ooreelihiwa yoowo ohiniithoriha mwaneenaawe ni yeeyo owo onaakhulelaawe." 
Romans14:23 Yooletho onghovela, onoothoriheliwa aca, niwoko khanca ni nroromelo, ni sootheene sihinrweela wa nroromelo ti soottheka." 
Romans15:1 Hiyo nri oolipa, ontthuneya ovilela soohilipa sa oohilipa, ni nihaasaasaka yeeyo ennisiveliha." 
Romans15:2 Khula mutthu a hiyo ontthuneya weera amusiveliheke mukhwaawe wa mpuhaawe weera ampuhihe. 
Romans15:3 Vano Kristu khiisivelinghe mwaneenaawe, mene ntoko elempwalaaya: “Sooruwana sa yaale anooruwanani, sookimorela Miyo.”" 
Romans15:4 Sootheene silempwe khalayi, silempwe weera sinixuttihe, mooteene yoowo weera niwoko na ovilela ni olipihiwa onrweela wa Yoolempwa*, nikhaleke ni oweherera." 
Romans15:5 Muluku omvaha ovilela ni yoolipihera, oovaheeni munepa wa wiiwanana nyuwo munttharaka Kristu Yeesu," 
Romans15:6 weera nyuwo mumvuwihe Muluku Atiithi a Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu ni murima mmoharu ni eyano emoharu paahi. 
Romans15:7 Tivawo, mwaakhulelaneke mukina ni mukhwaawe mooteene yoowo ntoko Kristu owaakhulenlaaweni, weera Muluku avuwihiwe." 
Romans15:8 Vano miyo kinooleelani weera Kristu oothatuwa murumeiyi a aYuda niwoko na ekhaikhai ya Muluku, weera alipihere seiye yaaroromelihiwaaya asitokweene a khalayi." 
Romans15:9 Hiiho amalapo emvuwihe Muluku niwoko na ikhararisawe, ntoko elempwalaaya: “Tivawo, miyo nkoottottopeleni variyari wa amalapo, ni nkiipe icipo wa Nsinananyu.”" 
Romans15:10 Nitho yeenre: “Nyuwo amalapo, muhakalaleke vamoha ni mulokwaawe.”" 
Romans15:11 Yoopwaherera: “Mwaattottopeleke Apwiya, nyuwo amalapo ootheene, ngwiipeleke soottottopela Yaawo, miloko sootheene.”" 
Romans15:12 Vano Yesaya eenretho: “Onuumele wa mukwankhwaarini wa Yixai Yoowo oniweemele weera waalamule amalapo, ni awo eniimuroromele Yoowo.”" 
Romans15:13 Muluku a nroromelo oosariheni ni ohakalala ni murettele wootheene nyuwo munroromelaka Yoowo, weera mwaatte munroromeloni niwoko na ikuru sa Munepa Wootteela." 
Romans15:14 Axunnaka, miyo kooviriyeliwa weera nyuwo moosareya ni murima wooreera ni mooxuttihiwa nnenesene, ngweraka olakana mukina ni mukhwaawe." 
Romans15:15 Mwaha wa nyaha sikina miyo kohoolepelani ni masu oowookoleleya, weera kiwuupuxereni veeli yaawo niwoko na mahala Muluku okivanghaawe" 
Romans15:16 okhala murummwa a Kristu Yeesu wa amalapo, eyo tiiyo kookhalano muteko wa musaserdoti* olaleiya masu ooreeraxa a Muluku weera amalapo ethatuwe yooveleela yoowaakhuleleya wa Muluku, atteelihiwe ni Munepa Wootteela." 
Romans15:17 Tivawo, kiniivuwiha mwa Kristu Yeesu, mwa mutekwaaka wa Muluku." 
Romans15:18 Nkinuuluma masu makina, ohikhanle othalihera yeeyo Kristu owenraawe aweettihaka amalapo omwiiwelela Muluku niwoko na maswaaka ni mutekwaaka." 
Romans15:19 Eyo eweriwe ni ikuru sa ineneero ni sootikhiniha, nitho niwoko na ikuru sa Munepa Wootteela. Hiiho, okhuma oYerusaleemu ni mukhwipimwaya mpaka wIliriku, koolaleiya nnenesene masu ooreeraxa a Kristu." 
Romans15:20 Mahuku ootheene kaatthuna olaleiya masu ooreeraxa weiwo Kristu nlelo ahaasuweliwaawe, moota wooweera kihiteke vasulu wa mathipelo a mukina." 
Romans15:21 Ntokotho elempwalaaya: “Yaale yahiiwale suulummwaka sa Yoowo, eniimoone, ni yaale yahaamwiiwale, enimwiiwexexe.”" 
Romans15:22 Ti niwoko na yeeyo imaara sincipale miyo kooceelihiwaaka woophiyerani nyuwo. 
Romans15:23 Vanonto, neenre kihikhalaka nipuro mweelaponi iya weera kivare muteko, ni weenre okunkhelaka wooxekurani nyuwo," 
Romans15:24 kimvaanela wooxekurani miyo kaarwaaka wEspanya. Kinroromela wooxekurani kaaviraka ni woovahani ehuhu yookikhavihera ni mukwahaaka wa wu, kimalihaleene wooxekuraniwaka." 
Romans15:25 Wa soothesene, vano kinoorowa oYerusaleemu weera kaakhaviherewo ootteela," 
Romans15:26 niwoko oMasedoniya ni wAkhaya yaalakela waavaha ekhavihero oohaawa variyari wa ootteela a oYerusaleemu. 
Romans15:27 Awo yaatthunaxa opaka yeeyo, ni mwa yeeyo ari anamakoongora a ootteela yaawo. Vano, amalapo yaakhenle mareeliho a Munepa mwa yaawo yaari a aYuda, ontthuneyatho weera yaakhavihere aYuda ni sooreelasaya." 
Romans15:28 Hiiho, kaamalihaka muteko owo ni kaawinnyereraka yoowiima ela, nkirowe wEspanya, ni nkooxekureni kaaviraka." 
Romans15:29 Koosuwela weera karowa wooxekurani, nkirowe mwa waatta wa mareeliho a Kristu." 
Romans15:30 Kinoodyoonttelelani nyuwo, axunnaka, mwa Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu ni mwa osivela wa Munepa, weera mukhale vamoha ni miyo mukhottonimwaka, mumvekelaka Muluku niwoko na miyo." 
Romans15:31 Mukivekeleleke miyo weera kivuluxiwe wa oohiroromela a oYudeiya, ni weera mutekwaaka wa oYerusaleemu okhale woowaakhuleleya wa ootteela," 
Romans15:32 moota wooweera Muluku atthuna, miyo kooxekureni ni ohakalala ni vamoha ni nyuwo ninookhalano ehuhu yoowiitthuuwa." 
Romans15:33 Muluku a murettele akhale ni nyuwo ootheene. Ame*. 
Romans16:1 Kinoolangherani Febe, murokorihu, murumeiyi a ekerexa eri oKhenkreya." 
Romans16:2 Kimvekela weera mmwaakhele mwa Apwiya moota woophwanela omwaakhela ootteela, ni mwankhavihere yeeyo entthuneya wa yoowo, niwoko owo aahaakhavihera atthu ancipale, ni miyotho." 
Romans16:3 Mmuulumihe Prisila ni Akila, yaawo amvara muteko vamoha ni miyo mwa Kristu Yeesu." 
Romans16:4 Awo yaaleva okumaaya niwoko na miyo. Kinaavaha asantte yaawo, nkihiyono miyo paahi, mene ikerexa sootheene sa amalapo." 
Romans16:5 Muulumihetho ekerexa enthukumana vaatewaya. Mmuulumihe munnaka oosiveleya Epeneto, yoowo aari muKristu oopacera a wAsiya." 
Romans16:6 Mmuulumihe Mariya, oovarenleni nyuwo muteko woovihaxa." 
Romans16:7 Mmuulumihe Adroniko ni Yuniya, amusaaka yaari mukaliposo vamoha ni miyo. Ari oosuwanyeya variyari wa arummwa, ni yaari mwa Kristu kihinaaye miyo." 
Romans16:8 Mmuulumihe Ampliyato, munnaka oosiveleya mwa Apwiya." 
Romans16:9 Mmuulumihe Urbano, ori namuteko vamoha ni miyo mwa Apwiya, ni munnaka oosiveleya Staki." 
Romans16:10 Mmuulumihe Apele, aakhuleliwe mwa Kristu. Ngwuulumihe yaawo ari a vaate wa Aristabulo." 
Romans16:11 Mmuulumihe Herodiyoni, mmusaaka. Ngwuulumihe yaawo ari a vaate wa Narsiso ari mwa Apwiya." 
Romans16:12 Mmuulumihe Trifana ni Trifosa, asithiyana amvara muteko woovihaxa mwa Apwiya. Mmuulumihe Persida oosiveleya, mukina ovanre muteko woovihaxa mwa Apwiya." 
Romans16:13 Mmuulumihe Rufo, oothanliwa mwa Apwiya, ni amayawe ari amayakatho miyo." 
Romans16:14 Mmuulumihe Asinkrito, Flegonte, Herme, Patroba, Herma ni axunna ari ni yaawo." 
Romans16:15 Mmuulumihe Filologo, Yuliya, Nereyo ni murokoriye, Olimpa ni ootteela ootheene ari ni yaawo." 
Romans16:16 Muulumihaneke mukina ni mukhwaawe ni ebeecu yootteela. Ikerexa sootheene sa Kristu sinoovahani isalaama. 
Romans16:17 Kingwoopererani nyuwo, axunna, weera mwiipasoope wa yaale anruuhela ohiiwanana ni angwooceelihani mwa nihusiho nyuwo mwaakhenlaanyu. Mususe wa yaawo." 
Romans16:18 Vano atthweene yaawo khaanimurumeela Kristu Apwiyaahu, mene soohaawelasaya asineenaaya. Ni masu oosiva ni ooreera omokoni awo anlokottha mirima sa atthu oohisuwela." 
Romans16:19 Ootheene aniiwa suulummwaka sa wiiwelelawanyu, tivawo kihakalalaxiyaaka, mene kintthuna weera mukhale asuweli mwaha wa yooreera, ni oohisuwela mwaha wa yoonanara." 
Romans16:20 Muluku a murettele anaamuttikitthe woowaakuveya Satana vathi wa inaawosanyu. Mahala a Apwiyaahu Yeesu ekhale ni nyuwo. 
Romans16:21 Timootheyo, ori namuteko vamoha ni miyo, onoovahani isalaamu nitho Lusiyo, Yasoni ni Sosipatro, amusaaka." 
Romans16:22 Miyo, Tersiyo, kilempe ekaratta ela, kinoowuulumihani nyuwo mwa Apwiya." 
Romans16:23 Gaiyu, yoowo aanaakhelenle nnenesene miyo ni ekerexa yootheene, onoovahani isalaama. Erasto, namawehaweha milattu sa esidade, ni munnihu Kwarto, anoovahani isalaama." 
Romans16:24  
Romans16:25 Ti Muluku ongwera wookhalihani nyuwo munroromeloni niwoko na maswaaka ooreeraxa ni olaleiyawaka wa Yeesu Kristu. Vano, olaleiya wu ti mwaha wa othupulula wa ntikhinelo naavithiwe khalayi." 
Romans16:26 Mene vano ntikhinelo nna nohooniheriwa niwoko na Soolempwa sa maprofeeti ni mwa malamulo a Muluku oohimala, weera miloko soothesene simuroromele Yoowo ni simwiiwelele." 
Romans16:27 Wa Muluku mmoharu musuweli Owo okhale ovuwa mahuku ootheene mwa Yeesu Kristu. Ame*. 
1Corinthians1:1 Ya Pawulo, iitthaniwe ni otthuna wa Muluku weera akhale murummwa a Kristu Yeesu, ni wa munna Sostene." 
1Corinthians1:2 Wa ekerexa ya Muluku eri oKorinto; wa ootteelihiwa mwa Kristu, ni oowiitthaniwa weera ekhale ootteela, vamoha ni ootheene yaale aniitthana mipatta sootheene Nsina na Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu, Apwiyaaya ni awihu." 
1Corinthians1:3 Wa nyuwo, mahala ni murettele wa Muluku Atithihu ni wa Apwiya Yeesu Kristu." 
1Corinthians1:4 Miyo kinnamvaha asantte wa Mulukwaaka mahuku ootheene niwoko na nyuwo, mwaha wa mahala muvahiwaanyu ni Muluku mwa Kristu Yeesu." 
1Corinthians1:5 Mwa Yoowo nyuwo moopuhihiwa mwa sootheene, mwa masu ootheene ni miruku sootheene," 
1Corinthians1:6 niwoko onamoona wa Kristu wookhalihiwa variyariwanyu," 
1Corinthians1:7 moota wooweera ehoohaleeleni naari vakhaani yamahala ya Munepa nyuwo muwehereraka weera Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu ethupululiwe. 
1Corinthians1:8 Owo anoolipiheni mpaka ommaleloni, moota wooweera nyuwo mukhale oohootheriwa vanihukuni na Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu." 
1Corinthians1:9 Muluku ti oororomeleya, Yoowo owiitthanneni weera mukhale ngwiiwananani ni Mwanawe Yeesu Kristu." 
1Corinthians1:10 Axunnaka, kinoodyoonttelelani nyuwo ootheene mwa Nsina na Apwiya Yeesu Kristu, weera mwiiwanane mukina ni mukhwaawe yeeyo munuulumaanyu, weera ohikhale ohiiwanana variyariwanyu. Aani, weera ootheene mukhaleno wiiwanana omoharu ni wuupuwela omoharutho." 
1Corinthians1:11 Axunnaka, kileeliwe ni akina a vaate wa Klowe weera wookhala ohiiwanana variyariwanyu." 
1Corinthians1:12 Mwa yeeyo, kinghima weera mutthu ti mutthu a nyuwo oneera: “Miyo ti a Pawulo”; “Miyo ti a Apolo”; “Miyo ti a Kefasi” ni “Miyo ti a Kristu.”" 
1Corinthians1:13 Weeraka Kristu ookawanyeya? Ti Pawulo okhomeliwe niwoko na nyuwo? Ti nyuwo mpatisiwe mwa nsina na Pawulo? 
1Corinthians1:14 Kinimutthapela Muluku niwoko na ohimpatisa naari mmoha a nyuwo, ahikhanle Krispo ni Gaiyu," 
1Corinthians1:15 moota wooweera ahikhale mukina a nyuwo aneera eere weera opatisiwe mwa nsinanaka. 
1Corinthians1:16 Kaahaapatisatho atthu a empa ya Stefana; ehikhanle yaawo, nkingwuupuwelela akina miyo kaapatinsaaka." 
1Corinthians1:17 Vano, Kristu khakirumme weera kipatise, mene weera kilaleiye masu ooreeraxa. Miyo nkinlaleiya masu ooreeraxa ni masu a miruku sa atthu, weera muttanda wa Kristu ohikhale wa siiyo." 
1Corinthians1:18 Vano, mutthenga wa muttanda ti anepa wa ariheiye, mene wa hiyo nimvuluxiwa, mutthenga ole ti ikuru sa Muluku," 
1Corinthians1:19 niwoko yoolempwa: “Miyo nkiphwate miruku sa anamiruku, ni nkikhootte osuwela wa asuweli.”" 
1Corinthians1:20 Ori woowi namiruku? Ori woowi namalepa? Ori woowi namakohakoha a ehuhu ela? Muluku aatatuxa anepa osuwela wa elapo ya vathi. 
1Corinthians1:21 Muluku aalakela weera amalapo khaangwera omusuwela ni mirukusaya asineenaaya, mwa yeeyo waamusiveliha Muluku waavuluxa yaale anroromela mwaha wa anepa wa olaleiya." 
1Corinthians1:22 aYuda amvekela ineneero sootikhiniheya, ni aGrego anaasaasa miruku;" 
1Corinthians1:23 wa soothesene, hiyo ninimulaleiya Kristu oothomeiwa. Eyo ti nluku nookwattula wa aYuda ni ya anepa wa amalapo." 
1Corinthians1:24 Wa oowiitthaniwatho, ntoko aYuda hiihotho aGrego, Kristu ti ikuru ni miruku sa Muluku." 
1Corinthians1:25 Vano, anepa a Muluku ti osuwela woopwahaxa miruku sa omutthu, ni ohilipa wa Muluku ti woolipaxa opwaha ikuru sa omutthu." 
1Corinthians1:26 Axunnaka, muupuwele yeeyo mwaaraanyu mwiitthaniwaanyu. Vakhaani a nyuwo yaari amiruku vamaithoni wa atthu; vakhaani yaari a ikuru; vakhaani yaayariwa mweemusini sa omwene." 
1Corinthians1:27 Mulukutho aathanla itthu sa anepa sa elapo weera awuulihihe muru asuweli, ni aathanla itthu soohilipa sa elapo weera awuulihihe muru oolipa." 
1Corinthians1:28 Aathanla itthu soohithoonyera etthu sa elapo, soohipwatthiwa ni iye sihikhanle, weera amalihe seiye sinkhala," 
1Corinthians1:29 weera ahikhale mutthu aneera iivuwihe ohoolo wa Muluku. 
1Corinthians1:30 Mwa yeeyo, ti niwoko na Muluku nyuwo muraanyu mwa Kristu Yeesu, Yoowo othatungwe wa hiyo miruku sa Muluku, eyo tiiyo, waakhuleliwawahu, ntteelihonahu ni ovuluxiwawahu," 
1Corinthians1:31 weera, ntoko elempwaaya: “Yoole omvuwiha, avuwiheke mwa Apwiya.”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Axunnaka, wa miyo, kaarwiiyaaka wa nyuwo koolaleerakani ntikhinelo na Muluku, nkaarwiiye ni masu oowaatta, hata ni miruku soowaatta." 
1Corinthians2:2 Vano kaaraaka eriyaraanyu, kaalakela weera nkimpwatthelaru etthu ekina, ahikhanle Yeesu Kristu, ni Owo oothomeiwa." 
1Corinthians2:3 Kaari oohilipa variyariwanyu, koovaka ni kithukumelaka." 
1Corinthians2:4 Mmutthenganimwaka ni moolaleiyanimwaka nkeerenre woowinani ni masu a miruku sa atthu, mene maswaaka ni olaleiyawaka waari woonihera wa ikuru sa Munepa," 
1Corinthians2:5 weera nroromelonanyu nihikhalihiwe mmirukuni sa atthu, mene mukuruni sa Muluku." 
1Corinthians2:6 Vano nnuuluma miruku variyari wa asitokweene. Miruku iya khasihiyono sa ehuhu ela, naari sa anamalamula a ehuhu ela, niwoko mirukusaya iyo sinoophiya sa siiyo." 
1Corinthians2:7 Ohiyanawaya, nnuuluma sa miruku sa Muluku, eyo tiiyo, ntikhinelo naari noowiipithiheya. Nno Muluku oolamulela wa ovuwawahu ehinaaye epacerero ya ehuhu." 
1Corinthians2:8 Khaawo naari namalamula mmoha a ehuhu ela iiwexenxe miruku iye, niwoko yiiwexenxe, saano ehaathomeiye Apwiya a ovuwa." 
1Corinthians2:9 Wa soothesene, ntoko elempwalaaya: “Itthu niitho nihoonalaaya, ni naaru nihiiwalaaya, ni ohuupuwenlaawe mutthu, ti seiyo Muluku aarehererenlaawe yaawo animusivela.”" 
1Corinthians2:10 Muluku oonithupululela yeeyo niwoko na Munepa Wootteela. Munepa Wootteela omphima itthu sootheene mpaka itthu soowiixeraxa sa Muluku. 
1Corinthians2:11 Vano, eriyari ya atthu, taani osuwenle itthu sa mutthu, ohikhanle munepa ori mwa yoowo? Ni hiihaawotho, khaawo osuwenle itthu sa Muluku, ohikhanle Munepa Wootteela." 
1Corinthians2:12 Wa soothesene, hiyo khannaakhela munepa wa elapo ya vathi, mene Munepa ongwa wa Muluku. Hiiho ninniiwexexa itthu Muluku onivanghaawe sa mahala." 
1Corinthians2:13 Mwa seiyotho ninnuuluma ni masu ooxuttihiwa ni Munepa Wootteela, ohiya toko masu a miruku sa mutthu. Hiiho ninnathalihera ikhaikhai sa mmunepani wa yaawo ari a mmunepani." 
1Corinthians2:14 Mutthu ohikhanleno Munepa Wootteela, khanaakhulela itthu singwa wa Munepa wa Muluku, niwoko siri sa anepa wa yoowo. Owo khangwera wiiwexexa itthu iyo, niwoko ontthuneya ophima iyo ni ekhalelo ya mmunepani." 
1Corinthians2:15 Mutthu a mmunepani onthoriha itthu sootheene, mene owo muneenaawe khaawo onimuthoriha, niwoko:" 
1Corinthians2:16 “Taani asuwenle soowuupuwela sa Apwiya weera aaxuttihe?” Vano, hiyo nookhalano soowuupuwela sa Kristu." 
1Corinthians3:1 Axunnaka, nkiwenre wuuluma ni nyuwo ntoko atthu a mmunepani, mene ntoko atthu a erutthuru, ntoko anamwane mwa Kristu." 
1Corinthians3:2 Nkiwenre woovahani yooca yoolipa, niwoko nyuwo mwannawera owura mukaka paahi. Mwa yeeyo mpaka vaanaano vaava khamungwera," 
1Corinthians3:3 niwoko muri atthu a erutthuru. Vano, woonaka weera nookhala nrima ni ohiiwanana variyariwanyu, khamuhiyono atthu a erutthuru, mupakaka ntoko amalapo?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Akhala mukina oneera: “Miyo ti a Pawulo,” ni mukina oneera: “Miyo ti a Apolo,” khamuhiyono a erutthuru?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Woomaleloni, nneereke Apolo taani? Pawulo taani? Ari arumeiyi paahi, yookhavihenreni ororomela. Ni awo ooweeli aapaka yeeyo Apwiya yaarumalaaya paahi." 
1Corinthians3:6 Miyo kaaphatteiya, Apolo aahelela, mene ti Muluku unnuwihale," 
1Corinthians3:7 moota wooweera hata yoowo omphatteiya, naari yoowo onghelela ori oottittimiheya, mene Muluku mmoharu paahi unnuwihale." 
1Corinthians3:8 Yoowo omphatteiya ni yoowo onghelela ankhalano otthuna omoharu paahi, ni ooweeli eniiphwanye ntthuvelonaya, ntoko muteko ovanraawe." 
1Corinthians3:9 Vano, hiyo nri anamiteko a Muluku. Nyuwo muri ematta nitho yootekiwa ya Muluku." 
1Corinthians3:10 Mwa mahala a Muluku okivanghaawe, miyo kaapaka mathipelo ntoko namateka oosuwela, ni mukina onteka vasulu wa yaawo, mene khula mutthu awehexexeke nnenesene matekelo oneeraawe." 
1Corinthians3:11 Khaawo ongwera othipa mathipelo makina, ehikhanle yaale apacereriwe, eyo tiiyo Yesu Kristu." 
1Corinthians3:12 Vasulu wa yeeyo khula mutthu onoowera oteka ni iyuuma sooreeraxa, hoye hoye maluku ootthuneyaxa, hoye hoye miri, hoye hoye malaxi, hoye hoye mitathi," 
1Corinthians3:13 mene muteko wa khula mutthu oniwoonihereye, niwoko nihuku nno muteko owo ngwiruuheliwe waara. Ngwithupululiwe ni mooro, ni mooro owo oniweerere mikhalelo sa miteko sa atthu ootheene." 
1Corinthians3:14 Yeeyo mukina otenkaawe yalekela, owo onimwaakhela ntthuvelonawe." 
1Corinthians3:15 Yeeyo mukina otenkaawe yasa, anaahaawe mooyeleelani iwo, wa soothesene anaavuluxiwe ntoko mukina onoopowa avinreene mmooroni." 
1Corinthians3:16 Nyuwo khamusuwenle weera muri Empa ya Muluku, ni weera Munepa wa Muluku onkhala mwa nyuwo?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Akhala mukina omphwata Empa ya Muluku, owo anaaphwatiwe ni Muluku, niwoko Empa ya Muluku ti yootteelihiwa, ni nyuwo muri Empeene yeeyo." 
1Corinthians3:18 Muhiilokotthe. Mmoha a nyuwo uupuwela weera ti oosuwela ophimiwa ni ekhalelo ya ehuhu ela, ontthuneya wiitatuxa nsikini weera atatuxiwe musuweli," 
1Corinthians3:19 niwoko miruku sa amalapo ti osikineya vamaithoni wa Muluku. Vano yoolempwa: “Muluku onnaavara asuweli moolokotthanimwaaya.” 
1Corinthians3:20 Nitho: “Apwiya ansuwela weera soowuupuwela sa asuweli siri sa ethiru.” 
1Corinthians3:21 Tivawo, ahikhale mukina aneera avuwihe mwa atthu. Itthu sootheene ti sawinyu –" 
1Corinthians3:22 hata akhalaka Pawulo, Apolo, Kefasi, elapo, okumi, okhwa, sa vaanaano, hoye hoye sa muhoolo – sootheene ti sawinyu," 
1Corinthians3:23 ni nyuwo muri a Kristu, ni Kristu a Muluku." 
1Corinthians4:1 Vanonto, atthu yuupuweleke weera nri arumeiyi a Kristu ni noovahereriwa matikhinelo a Muluku." 
1Corinthians4:2 Ontthuneya weera ootheene oovahereriwa ohoolela ekhale oororomeleya. 
1Corinthians4:3 Nkimpwattha othorihiwa ni nyuwo, hoye hoye ni akhalaru a alipa oowuuluma milattu. Mwa yeeyo, hata miyo nkiniithoriha mwaneenaakaru." 
1Corinthians4:4 Hata soowuupuwelasakatho khasinkoothera naari etthu, nkiniixeerela oowaakhuleliwa ni Muluku, niwoko Yoowo onkithoriha ti Muluku." 
1Corinthians4:5 Tivawo muhithorihe etthu ehinaaye ehuhu yootthuneyaxa. Muweherereke mpaka Apwiya eneeraaya ewe. Awo eniimwaleele yeeyo eri yoowiipitheya mpiphini, ni eniyoonihere soowuupuwela sa mirima. Ehuhuweene yeeyo khula mutthu anaakhale ottottopeliwawawe wa Muluku." 
1Corinthians4:6 Axunnaka, ti niwoko na nyuwo miyo kooleenlaakani yeeyo mwaha wa miyo ni Apolo, weera nyuwo muxuttere wa hiyo yoolempwa ela: “Muhipwahe yeeyo elempwale.” Hiiho khamunrowa omunnuwiha mutthu mmoha ni omuramusa mukina." 
1Corinthians4:7 Vano, taani ongweerelani weera nyuwo moovirikana ni akina? Eheeni muraanyuno muhaakhenlaanyu? Ni mwaakhenleene, heeni muniixooniheraanyu ntoko khamwaakhenle?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Nyuwo mookhalano sootheene muntthunaanyu! Mooreela! Moovariwa omwene nihikhanle hiyo. Keenre miyo katthuna weera mwaakhanle mamwene a ekhaikhai, weera hiyo nilamuletho ni nyuwo!" 
1Corinthians4:9 Vano, kinoona ntoko Muluku oniiyaathiye hiyo arummwa nipuro nookisera ntoko oothoriheliwa okhwa, niwoko nooniheriwe wa elapo ya vathi yootheene, hiiho wa ndyelo, hiihotho wa atthu." 
1Corinthians4:10 Hiyo anaanepa niwoko na Kristu, vaheera nyuwo muri asuweli mwa Kristu! Hiyo nri oohilipa, vaheera nyuwo oolipa. Nyuwo muri oottittimihiwa, vaheera nri ooramusiwa." 
1Corinthians4:11 Mpaka vaanaano vaava ninnahaawa ni etala, ntthona ni soowara. Ninnihasuliwa, khaninono nipuro nookilaathi, ni" 
1Corinthians4:12 nimvara muteko woovihaxa ni matataahu. Akina yaanilaphaka, hiyo ninnaareeliha. Naattharatthariwaka, ninnavilela." 
1Corinthians4:13 Naapiwaka, ninnaakhula ni masu ooreera. Mpaka vaanaano va ninooniwa ntoko nimpheeru, aani, ntoko ikokhola sa elapo ya vathi." 
1Corinthians4:14 Nkineerera owuulihihani muru kaalepaka itthu iya, mene kinoolakani ntoko anamwanaaka oosiveleya." 
1Corinthians4:15 Mwaari mweeraru mukhalanneene ahusiha macira macireene muloko mwa Kristu, khamunonotho asitiithi ancipale, niwoko miyo kooyanreni mwa Yeesu Kristu ni masu ooreeraxa." 
1Corinthians4:16 Tivawo kinoodyoonttelelaakani weera mukitakiheke. 
1Corinthians4:17 Niwoko nenenenna kinoorumihelani Timootheyo, mwanaka oosiveleya ni oororomeleya mwa Apwiya. Owo anaawuupuxereni mweettelowaaka mwa Kristu, ntoko miyo kinxuttihaaka wa ilapo ni ikerexa sootheene." 
1Corinthians4:18 Akina a nyuwo aathatuwa oowiixoona, ntoko miyo kihooxekurenitho." 
1Corinthians4:19 Vano, nkirowe woowaakuveya, Apwiya yakitthunihera. Ehuhuweene yeeyo, nkisuwele khoohiyono paahi yeeyo anuulumaaya anamwiixoona ale, menetho ikurusaya," 
1Corinthians4:20 niwoko omwene wa Muluku khoohiyono wa masu, mene wa ikuru." 
1Corinthians4:21 Muntthuna eheeni? Miyo kiroweke wa nyuwo ni ekwamba, hoye hoye ni osivela ni munepa woomaala?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Oniiwanyeya weera variyariwanyu wookhala oraruwa, moota ohikhanle hata mpaka variyari wa amalapo. Vekhaikhai ookhala mukina a nyuwo onraruwa ni amwaaraaya atithawe." 
1Corinthians5:2 Ni nyuwo munniixoona! Khoontthuneya osareya othanana ni omoomola variyariwanyu yoole opanke yeeyo? 
1Corinthians5:3 Hata kihikhalakawo mweerutthuni, kiri ni nyuwo mmunepani. Miyo koomuthoriha yoole opanke yeeyo ntoko kaari vaavaawo." 
1Corinthians5:4 Nyuwo mwathukumana mwa Nsina na Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu, miyo kireene ni nyuwo mmunepani, ni ikuru sa Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu sireenewotho," 
1Corinthians5:5 mumvaherere mulopwana owo wa Satana weera erutthwaawe ephwatiwe, ni muneepaawe ovuluxiwe nihuku na Apwiya." 
1Corinthians5:6 Wiixoonawanyu khoohiyono wooreera. Khamusuwenle weera eferementu vakhaani ennyarula ephepa eri yootheene? 
1Corinthians5:7 Mwiixoopole wa eferementu ya khalayi weera mukhale ephepa enyowani ehikhalanne eferementu, ntoko muraanyu vekhaikhai. Vano Kristu eputtiputthaahu ya mPaska* yaahiiviwa." 
1Corinthians5:8 Tivawo, nipake efesta khoohiyono ni eferementu ya khalayi, hata ni eferementu ya soonanara, naari oraruwa, mene ni ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu soohootha, ni sa ekhaikhai." 
1Corinthians5:9 Kaahoolepelani ekaratta weera muhiithukumanyihe ni atthu oolavilavi. 
1Corinthians5:10 Wa yeeyo, nkinaahima alavilavi, naari anamilili, naari anamwiiya, naari anamalapela miluku sikina a mweelaponi ela. Kaahima yaawo, waatthuneya nyuwo otthawa elapo ya vathi ela." 
1Corinthians5:11 Menetho kinoolepelani weera muhiithukumanyihe ni yaale aneera weera ari aKristu ereene alavilavi, anamilili, anamalapela miluku sikina, anamwaapa, anamawura, naari anamwiiya. Ni atthweene yaawo, hata khoontthuneya ocano vamoha." 
1Corinthians5:12 Vano, ti mutekwaaka waathoriha yaawo ari omokoni wa ekerexa? Khoontthuneya nyuwo waathoriha yaawo ari mpuwa?" 
1Corinthians5:13 Muluku anaathorihe yaawo ari omokoni. “Mmoomole mulavilavi variyariwanyu.” 
1Corinthians6:1 Akhala mmoha a nyuwo otapanyanne ni munneiye mwa Kristu, ongwereya hai wuulummwa ni atthu oohiroromela, ohiya omuronghela ootteela?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Khamusuwenle weera ootteela eniithorihe elapo? Mwathoriha elapo, muhingwera hai wuuluma milattu soottittimiheya vakhaani?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Khamusuwenle weera nnaathorihe andyelo? Ankhatho itthu iye sa okumi ola! 
1Corinthians6:4 Tivawo, mwaarino milattu soolikana sa okumi ola, mwaakhalihe ntoko aphuki yaawo ari a ekerexa, hata ekhalaka oottittimiheya vakhaani." 
1Corinthians6:5 Kinghima yeeyo weera kiwuulihiheni muru. Weeraka khawowo mmoha variyariwanyu ori oosuwelaxa weera athorihe mulattu variyari wa axunneiye? 
1Corinthians6:6 Ongwereya hai muKristu mmoha omuronghela munneiye alipa oowuuluma milattu, ni yeeyo vamaithoni wa oohiroromela?" 
1Corinthians6:7 Vano, wootherana mulattu variyariwanyu ti ethoonyero ya otapanya otokotoko. Ti wookupaleeleya ohaawa ohiroromeleya. Ti wookupaleeleya ohaawa moolokotthani." 
1Corinthians6:8 Ohiya yeeyo, ti nyuwo asineenaanyu mungwoothera milattu ni mwimpaka soonanara, ni eyo wa axunninyu!" 
1Corinthians6:9 Nyuwo khamusuwenle weera atakhali kheerwa yaakhela omwene wa Muluku? Muhiilokotthe! Hata alavilavi, hata anamalapela a miluku sikina, hata anamararuwa, hata yaawo ankonihana alopwanaru, hoye hoye athiyanaru, hata puuta mulopwana," 
1Corinthians6:10 hata anamwiiya, hata anamilili, hata anamawura, hata anamwaapa, naari alipa angwaakha itthu asikhwaaya kheerwa yaakhela omwene wa Muluku." 
1Corinthians6:11 Hiiho yaari akina a nyuwo. Mene nyuwo moorapihiwa, mootteelihiwa, mohaakhuleliwa ni Muluku mwa Nsina na Apwiya Yeesu Kristu ni mwa Munepa wa Mulukwaahu." 
1Corinthians6:12 “Sootheene kootthuniheriwa,” mene khasihiyono sootheene weera siri sookireera. “Sootheene kootthuniheriwa,” mene nkinrowa olamuliwa ni yakhalaru etthu." 
1Corinthians6:13 “Sooca sipakeliwe nipwiipwi ni nipwiipwi wa sooca,” mene Muluku anaaphwate soopiili. Vano, erutthu kheehiyono wa olavilavi, mene wa Apwiya, ni Apwiya wa erutthu." 
1Corinthians6:14 Muluku aahaavenyereriha Apwiya ni ikurusawe, ni Owo anaanivenyererihetho hiyo." 
1Corinthians6:15 Nyuwo khamusuwenle weera irutthusanyu siri mipatta sa erutthu ya Kristu? Vano, miyo nkikuxe mipatta sa Kristu weera kipake mipatta sa mapuuta? Hata vakhaani!" 
1Corinthians6:16 Khamusuwenle weera yoole onkona ni mapuuta ti erutthu emoha ni yoowo? Vano, ntoko eneeriwaaya: “Ooweeli eniikhale erutthu emoha paahi.”" 
1Corinthians6:17 Mene yoowo onkhala mwa Apwiya, ti munepa mmoha ni Yaawo." 
1Corinthians6:18 Mutthawe wa oraruwa. Soottheka sootheene mukina opankaawe, ompakiwa omokoni wa erutthu, mene yoowo onttheka mooraruwani, onttheka mweerutthunimwawe." 
1Corinthians6:19 Khamusuwenle weera erutthwaanyu ti empa ya Munepa Wootteela? Mohaakhela Owo wa Muluku, ni onkhala mwa nyuwo. Tivawo nyuwo khamuhiyono a nyuworu." 
1Corinthians6:20 Nyuwo moothummwa ni mutteengo. Tivawo, mumvuwihe Muluku ni erutthwaanyu." 
1Corinthians7:1 Mwaha wa milattu nyuwo mukilepenlaanyu, ti wooreera weera mulopwana ahithelane ni muthiyana," 
1Corinthians7:2 mene niwoko na oraruwa, ontthuneya weera khula mulopwana amutheleke mwaarawe, ni khula muthiyana ni iyawe." 
1Corinthians7:3 Mulopwana akwanihereke yeeyo entthuneya ni mwaariye moothelanani, ni muthiyana akwanihereke yeeyo entthuneya ni iyawe moothelanani." 
1Corinthians7:4 Muthiyana khanono ikuru ni erutthwaawe muneenaawe, mene aani, iyawe. Ni hiihaawotho, iyawe khanono ikuru ni erutthwaawe muneenaawe, mene aani, mwaariye." 
1Corinthians7:5 Muhikhoottelane okona vamoha, ohikhanle wa ehuhu vakhaani ni mwiiwanane, weera ehuhuweene yeeyo muvilele mmavekeloni. Vahoolowaya, mupwaherere okona vamoha weera ahiweerereni Satana niwoko na ohiisuumaalihawanyu." 
1Corinthians7:6 Eyo miyo kinooleelaakani ti yootthuniheriwa, mene kheehiyono nlamulo." 
1Corinthians7:7 Kaatthuna weera atthu ootheene ekhaleke ntoko miyo, mene khula mutthu orino mahalaawe muneenaawe wa Muluku – mmoha moota hiiho, mukina mootaawe." 
1Corinthians7:8 Kinaaleela athupa ni asinaamukhweli: ti wooreera okhala mahuku ootheene ntoko miyo. 
1Corinthians7:9 Yaahiweratho wiisumaaliha, ethelaneke, niwoko fataari othelana, ohikhanle ohaawelaxa okonano." 
1Corinthians7:10 Wa oothelana kinaavaha nlamulo nna, hoye, nkihiyono miyo, mene ti Muluku onaavaha: mwaariye ahimwalaneke ni iyawe." 
1Corinthians7:11 Amwalanatho, akhaleke oohithelana, hoye hoye iiraaneke ni iyawe. Iyawetho ahimwalaneke ni mwaariye." 
1Corinthians7:12 Wa akina ti miyo kinaaleela yeeyo, khaahiyono Apwiya: Akhala munna orino mwaariye oohiroromela, ni yoole atthuna okhala vamoha ni iyawe, ahimwalaneke." 
1Corinthians7:13 Vano, akhala muthiyana orino iyawe oohiroromela, ni yoole atthuna okhala vamoha ni mwaariye, ahimwalaneke," 
1Corinthians7:14 niwoko iyawe oohiroromela ti ootteelihiwa niwoko na mwaariye, ni mwaariye oohiroromela ti ootteelihiwa niwoko na iyawe. Wahaakhanle hiiho, anamwaniinyu yaakhala oohitteela, mene vano ootteela." 
1Corinthians7:15 Wa soothesene, mutthu oohiroromela amwalana, amwalaneke. Weereya hiiho, munna, naari murokora muKristu, khahiyono ootthukiwa, niwoko Muluku onniitthana weera nikhale ni murettele." 
1Corinthians7:16 Nyuwo mwaara, taani ansuwela – apaale mmwimvuluxe iyinyu? Hoye hoye nyuwo iya, taani ansuwela – apaale mmwimvuluxe mwaarinyu?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Vanonto, khula mutthu apwaherere okhala moota Muluku onithoonyenraawe ntoko Owo onniitthanaawe. Nna ti nlamulonaka wa ikerexa sootheene." 
1Corinthians7:18 Mukina iitthaniwa areene oowiineliwa? Iineliwe. Mukinatho iitthaniwa ohiineliwa? Ahiineliwe. 
1Corinthians7:19 Hata wiineliwa, naari ohiineliwa khoonthoonyera etthu. Yootthuneya ti wiiwelela malamulo a Muluku." 
1Corinthians7:20 Khula mutthu apwaherereke ntoko aaraawe oowiitthaniweene ni Muluku. 
1Corinthians7:21 Nyuwo mwiitthaniwa mureene epottha? Muhixupeye ni yeeyo. Vano nyuwo mwawera ophwanya oneethi, ngwereke." 
1Corinthians7:22 Vano, yoole oniitthaniwa mwa Apwiya, areene epottha, ti neethi a Apwiya, onlikana ntoko yoole aari neethi iitthaniwaawe mwa Apwiya, ori epottha ya Kristu." 
1Corinthians7:23 Nyuwo moothummwa ni mutteengo. Muhithatuwe ipottha sa atthu. 
1Corinthians7:24 Axunnaka, khula mutthu akhaleke ohoolo wa Muluku moota yoowo iitthaniwaawe." 
1Corinthians7:25 Mwaha wa aximwali oowiikosoopa, nkinono nlamulo na Apwiya, mene kimvaha mirukusaka ntoko mukina ori oororomeleya niwoko na ikharari sa Muluku." 
1Corinthians7:26 Niwoko na milattu sa vaanaano, kinuupuwela weera fataari mulopwana akhale ntoko oraawe." 
1Corinthians7:27 Nyuwo muri oothelana? Muhaasaase omwalana. Nyuwo muri muthupa? Muhimwaase mwaara. 
1Corinthians7:28 Vaheera mwathela, khamunono yoottheka, ni mwaamwali oowiikosoopa atheliwa, khanonotho yoottheka. Vano yaawo athelanne eniikhalane sookacamiha sincipale mookuminimwaya ni kintthuna owoopolani mwa yeeyo." 
1Corinthians7:29 Mwaakiiwaka hiiho, kinghima weera ehuhu eri vakhaani. Okhuma vaanaano vaava, yaale ari ni axaaraya, ekhaleke ntoko khaanono;" 
1Corinthians7:30 yaale aniinla, ntoko khaaniinla; yaale anghakalala, ntoko khaanghakalala; yaale anthuma etthu, ntoko khaanono etthu;" 
1Corinthians7:31 yaale amvarela itthu sa elapo, ntoko khaamvarela, niwoko mukhalelo wa vaanaano oneera oviraka." 
1Corinthians7:32 Kaatthuna owoonani muhikhanleno sookacamiha. Mulopwana ohithenle oneeteteya ni itthu sa Apwiya, aasaasaka moota heeni aneeraawe aasivelihe Apwiya." 
1Corinthians7:33 Vano mulopwana oothela oneeteteya ni itthu sa elapo ela, aasaasaka moota heeni aneeraawe amusivelihe mwaariye," 
1Corinthians7:34 ni ookawanyeya. Hiihotho muthiyana ohitheliwe ni mwaamwali oowiikosoopa oneeteteya ni itthu sa Apwiya, weera ekhaleke ootteela mweerutthuni ni mmunepani. Ootheliwatho oneeteteya ni itthu sa elapo ela – moota heeni aneeraawe amusivelihe iyawe." 
1Corinthians7:35 Kinooleelani yeeyo wa oreelawanyu khoohiyono weera kiwooceeliheni, mene weera mukhale moota wooreera ni mwaarumeele Apwiya ni murima wootheene." 
1Corinthians7:36 Akhala mukina onoona wuuliha muru niwoko noowoona weera muthiyana omutthomenraawe onoopwaha masusa ooreera omuthela, ni uupuwelaka weera fataari othelana, apakeke ontthunaawe. Owo khanttheka ni yeeyo." 
1Corinthians7:37 Wa soothesene, yoole onlipiha mmurimanimwawe ahittharaka soohaawelasawe, mene oniisuumaaliha ni otthunawawe, nitho alakela ohithelana ni omutthomenraawe, yoowo ompakatho nnene." 
1Corinthians7:38 Moota hiiho, yoole onthelana ni muthiyana omutthomenraawe, ompaka nnene, mene yoole ohinthelana ni yoowo, ontepaxa opaka nnene." 
1Corinthians7:39 Muthiyana ori vamoha ni iyawe owo areene ni okumi. Vano, iyawe akhwa, owo anaawere otheliwa ni mulopwana aneeraawe amutthune, mene ontthuneyaxa weera owo akhaleke muKristu." 
1Corinthians7:40 Woonawaka, muthiyana owo anaakhale oohakalalaxa aakhalaka oohitheliwa. Kinuupuwela weera kookhalanotho Munepa wa Muluku." 
1Corinthians8:1 Mwaha wa yooca yootteeliheriwa miluku soowootha, noosuwela weera ootheene hiyo nookhalano esuwelo. Vano, esuwelo enruuha wiixoona, mene osivela ompuhiha nnene." 
1Corinthians8:2 Mulopwana onuupuwela weera oosuwela etthu, khanaaye osuwela otthuneyaxawaya." 
1Corinthians8:3 Vaheera mulopwana onimusivela Muluku, owo oosuweliwa ni Muluku." 
1Corinthians8:4 Tivawo, mwaha wa yooca yootteeliheriwa miluku soowootha, noosuwela weera muluku oowootha khahiyono etthu mweelaponi, ni ookhala Muluku mmoha paahi." 
1Corinthians8:5 Vano, hata sikhalaka itthu siniitthaniwa miluku, sa wiirimu, hoye hoye mweelaponi, (mwa yeeyo siri sincipale siniitthaniwa miluku, ni ancipale aniitthaniwa apwiya)," 
1Corinthians8:6 mene wa hiyo ookhala Muluku mmoharu paahi, Atiithi, mwa Yaawo sinkhumelela itthu sootheene, nitho wa Yaawo hiyo nnaakhalelaahu. Aritho Apwiya Yeesu Kristu amoharu paahi, mwa Yaawo saakhumelenle itthu sootheene, ni niwoko na Yaawo hiyo ninkhalaahu." 
1Corinthians8:7 Wa soothesene, khaahiyono atthu ootheene asuwenle yeeyo. Akina nlelo ekhovelenleene miluku soolokottha moota wooweera ancaaya yooca eyo ntoko ereene yooca yootteeliheriwa miluku soolokottha seiyo. Ni seenre soowuupuwelasaya sikhalaka soohilipa, yooca eyo enoovaliheya." 
1Corinthians8:8 Vanonto, yooca kheennitatuxa oowaakhuleleya ohoolo wa Muluku. Khaninkhala ootepaxa hiyo naahica, hata ooreeraxa hiyo naca." 
1Corinthians8:9 Wa soothesene, mwiipasoope weera oneethaanyu owo ohithatuwe etthu yoowaakwattula atthu oohilipa." 
1Corinthians8:10 Akhala mukina ni soowuupuwela soohilipa ongwoonani nyuwo murino soosuwela iyo mucaaka mpaani mwa miluku soolokottha, soowuupuwelasawe khasinlipihereiya weera acetho yooca yootteeliheriwa miluku soolokottha?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Hiiho, munna owo oohilipa, mwa yoowo Kristu omukhwenlaawe, onoophwateya niwoko na soosuwelasanyu." 
1Corinthians8:12 Nyuwo mwaatthekela axunninyu mooteene yoowo, mwaavulalihaka soowuupuwelasaya soohilipa, munoomutthekelatho Kristu." 
1Corinthians8:13 Tivawo, yeeyo miyo kincaaka yamutthekiha munnaka, nkirwa kikhuuratho enama weera kihinkwattulihe munnaka." 
1Corinthians9:1 Nkihiyono neethi? Nkihiyono murummwa? Nkimoonne Yeesu Apwiyaahu? Khamuhiyono nyuwo soowiima sa mutekwaaka mwa Apwiya? 
1Corinthians9:2 Hata miyo kihikhalaka murummwa wa akina, vekhaikhai kiri wa nyuwo! Vano, nyuwo muri ethoonyero ya orummwawaka mwa Apwiya." 
1Corinthians9:3 Wu ti wiixaakihawaka ohoolo wa yaale ankithoriha. 
1Corinthians9:4 Khaninono hiyo ikuru sa oca ni owura? 
1Corinthians9:5 Khaninono hiyo ikuru sa omukuxa vamoha ni hiyo mwaara ori muKristu, ntoko ampakaaya arummwa akina, axunna a Apwiya ni Kefasi?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Weeraka miyo ni Barnaba paahi nintthuneya ovara muteko weera nikhale? 
1Corinthians9:7 Taani ori nakhotto iilivaka mwaneenaawe? Taani omphatteiya ematta ya iwuuva* ni ohinca soowiimasaya? Taani onciha muhuwo ni ohingwura mukakaaya? 
1Corinthians9:8 Seiyo kinghimaaka khasihiyono soowuupuwelasaka paahi. Nlamulo khaninghima etthweene yeeyo? 
1Corinthians9:9 Vano, yoolempwa munlamuloni na Moisesi: “Ohitthuke eyano ya emombe elopwana enyikalaka inuku.” Weeraka Muluku oneeteteya va ni imombe?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Khoohiyono vekhaikhai niwoko na hiyo Owo ohimmaawe yeeyo? Aani, yeeyo elempwe niwoko na hiyo. Niwoko yoowo onlima, alimeke ni nroromelo, ni yoowo onghepha, ahepheke ni nroromelo, weera eniyaakhele soohepha." 
1Corinthians9:11 Hiyo naala variyariwanyu mimiso sa mmunepani, waari wootepaxa oweherera weera niwaakheleni itthu sa vathi sawinyu?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Yakhalano akina ikuru sa okhaviheriwa ni nyuwo, wootepaxa hiyo? Vano hiyo khanimvarela muteko ikuru iyo. Ohiyanawaya, ninnavilela sootheene weera nihooceelihe masu ooreeraxa." 
1Corinthians9:13 Khamusuwenle weera yaawo anrumeela Mpaani mwa Muluku anca itthu sa Empa ya Muluku, ni yaawo anrumeela valtaarini* anca mpatta yoowo amvahiwaaya valtaarini*?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Moota hiiho, Apwiya ahaalamulela yaale anlaleiya masu ooreeraxa weera ekhale mwa masu ooreeraxa." 
1Corinthians9:15 Vano miyo nkivarenle muteko hata emoha ya ikurusene seiya. Hata nkinoolepelani kiwehereraka weera nyuwo munookivaha etthu. Niwoko fataari kikhwe ahinaaye mukina ocipiha ovuwawaka wu. 
1Corinthians9:16 Wa soothesene, miyo kaalaleiyaka masu ooreeraxa, nkintthuna wiivuwiha, niwoko koolamuliwa olaleiya masu ooreeraxa. Ii! Wa miyo kaahilaleiya masu ooreeraxa!" 
1Corinthians9:17 Kaalaleiyaka ni otthunawaka, kookhalano ntthuvelo. Wa soothesene, woonaka weera koonyesererihiwa olaleiya, miyo kinkwanihera paahi ikuru seiyo kiroromelihiwaaka." 
1Corinthians9:18 Vano, ntthuvelonaka tinni? Paahi yeeyo: Olaleiya masu ooreeraxa wa mahalani, hiiho kihivarelaka muteko ikurusaka woolaleiyani." 
1Corinthians9:19 Kirookhalaru neethi wa ootheene, kohiipaka epottha ya ootheene weera kaawine atthu ancipale." 
1Corinthians9:20 Variyari wa aYuda kohiipaka ntoko muYuda weera kaawine aYuda. Kiri mweeraru miyo kihikhanle vathi wa nlamulo, wa yaawo ari vathi wa nlamulo kohiipaka ntoko kaakhanle vathitho, weera kaawine yaawo ari vathi wa nlamulo." 
1Corinthians9:21 Kiri mweeraru miyo kihikhanle neethi a nlamulo na Muluku, mene kiri vathi wa nlamulo na Kristu, kohiipaka ntoko oohikhala ni nlamulo wa yaawo ahikhanle ni nlamulo, weera kaawine yaawo." 
1Corinthians9:22 Wa yaawo oohilipa, kohiipaka ntoko oohilipa weera kaawine oohilipa. Kohiipaka sootheene wa ootheene weera ni mikhalelo sootheene mano kaavuluxe akina." 
1Corinthians9:23 Kimpaka sootheene seiyo niwoko na masu ooreeraxa, weera kaakhele mareeliho a masu ooreeraxa." 
1Corinthians9:24 Khamusuwenle weera ori mmoha paahi wa yaawo antthimaka mumpikisaanoni anaakhele ntthuvelo? Mutthimake mooteene yoowo weera muwine ntthuvelo. 
1Corinthians9:25 Ootheene yaawo ampaka mpikisaano, anniireherera vancipale weera ephwanye ecireemba yoowaakuva oriheya, mene hiyo ecireemba yoohimala." 
1Corinthians9:26 Wa hiihaawo, miyo nkintthimaka ntoko mutthu ohinsuwela onkelaawewo, ni nkingwana ntoko mutthu ommana epheyo." 
1Corinthians9:27 Kinuumaaliha erutthwaaka ni yeeyo kimpaka epotthaaka, weera kaalaleeraka akina, miyo mwaneenaka kihootheriwe etthu." 
1Corinthians10:1 Axunnaka, muhittiwale weera makholowaahu ootheene yaari vathi vanihutteni, ni ootheene yaalapuwa mphareiyani." 
1Corinthians10:2 Mwa Moisesi, ootheene yaawo yaapatisiwa munihutteni ni mphareiyani." 
1Corinthians10:3 Ootheene yaaca yooca emoha ya mmunepani," 
1Corinthians10:4 ni yaawura maahi a mmunepani niwoko yaawura wa mwala wa mmunepani waahoola. Vano mwala ole waari Kristu. 
1Corinthians10:5 Wa soothesene, Muluku khaasiveliwa ni atthu ancipale a yaawo, tivawo mittembosaya saamwaramwareiyaaya munikareni." 
1Corinthians10:6 Itthu iye seereiye ntoko ethoonyerowaahu, weera nihihaawele itthu soonanara ntoko awo." 
1Corinthians10:7 Muhikhale atthu oolapa miluku soolokottha ntoko akina a yaawo. Vano yoolempwa: “Muloko waakilaathi weera oce ni owure, ni waaheemela weera wiine.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Nihiraruweke ntoko akina a yaawo, vano wa nihuku nimoha yaahookhwa atthu 23 000." 
1Corinthians10:9 Nihaatannyeke Apwiya ntoko akina a yaawo, vano yaahiiviwa ni inowa." 
1Corinthians10:10 Nitho nihittaandawule ntoko akina a yaawo, vano yaahiiviwa ni ndyelo oophwata." 
1Corinthians10:11 Itthu iye saaweereenle yaawo ntoko ethoonyero, ni saalempwa ntoko woopereriwawahu, mwa hiyo oniphiyenre ommaleloni wa ehuhu." 
1Corinthians10:12 Tivawo, yoole onuupuwela weera oolipa, iipasoope weera ahimore!" 
1Corinthians10:13 Khamweereriwe nyuwo ohikhanle ni sooweereriwa sa omutthu. Muluku ti oororomeleya. Owo khantthunihera weera nyuwo mweereriwe opwaha yeeyo mungweraanyu ovilela. Vano, mweereriwa, Owo onimoovahani moota woowoopowa, weera muwere ovilela yooweereriwa." 
1Corinthians10:14 Tivawo, axunnaka oosiveleya, mutthawe wa olapa miluku soolokottha." 
1Corinthians10:15 Miyo kinuuluma ni atthu a miruku. Muupuwele nyuwo asineenaanyu yeeyo kinghimaaka. 
1Corinthians10:16 Ekoomixi ya nreeliho hiyo ninreelihaahu, kheehiyono wiiwanana ni ephome ya Kristu? Ni epaawu hiyo nimmeyanyaahu, kheehiyono wiiwanana ni erutthu ya Kristu?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Woonaka weera eri epaawu emoharu, hiyo nri ancipale nri erutthu emoha, niwoko hiyo ootheene ninca epaawu emoharu yeeyo." 
1Corinthians10:18 Muupuwelele muloko wa aYixrayeli: Yaawo ankhuura ya enama yootteelihiwa valtaarini*, khaaniiwanana ni altaari*?" 
1Corinthians10:19 Vano, kintthuna wooleelani eheeni? Enama yootteeliheriwa miluku soolokottha enoonihera etthu? Hoye hoye miluku soolokottha siri soottittimiheya?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Hoye! Kintthuna ohima weera yeeyo amalapo antteelihaaya, ti yoovahiwa wa minepa soonanara, ohikhanle wa Muluku. Nkintthuna weera nyuwo mwiiwanane ni minepa soonanara." 
1Corinthians10:21 Nyuwo khamungwera owura ekoomixi ya Apwiya nitho ya minepa soonanara. Khamungwera wiiwanana vameesa a Apwiya nitho a minepa soonanara. 
1Corinthians10:22 Apaale hiyo nintthuna otannya nrima na Apwiya? Hiyo nri oolipa waapwaha Awo? 
1Corinthians10:23 Sootheene kootthuniheriwa,” mene khasihiyono sootheene weera siri sookireera. “Sootheene kootthuniheriwa,” mene khasihiyono sootheene weera siri soowaapuhiha atthu." 
1Corinthians10:24 Ootheene anaase mpuha wa mukina, khoohiyono wawaweru." 
1Corinthians10:25 Muceeke sootheene sinthumihiwa omerekadu, muhihovelaka etthu niwoko na ohovela wa mmurimanimwanyu," 
1Corinthians10:26 niwoko elapo ya vathi ni waattawaya wootheene ti wa Apwiya. 
1Corinthians10:27 Awiitthanelani yooca mutthu oohiroromela ni nyuwo mwatthuna orowa, muceeke sootheene mumvahiwaanyu, muhikohaka etthu niwoko na ohovela wa mmurimanimwanyu." 
1Corinthians10:28 Vano, mukina aweerelani: “Ela yoovahiwa wa miluku,” muhice, hiiho niwoko na mutthu ooleenleni, hiihotho niwoko na murima," 
1Corinthians10:29 eyo tiiyo murima wa mukina, ohikhanle wawinyu. Vano, heeni oneethaaka onthorihiwaaya ni mirima sa atthu akina?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Miyo kaacaaka kixukuraka, heeni kinthorihiwaaka mwaha wa etthu wa yeeyo kixukurenlaaka?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Tivawo, hata mucaaka, hata muwuraka, hata mupakaka sakhalaru itthu sikina, mupakeke soothesene mumvuwihaka Muluku." 
1Corinthians10:32 Mweette mooteene yoowo weera muhikwakwathuwe, hata aYuda, hata aGrego, hata ekerexa ya Muluku." 
1Corinthians10:33 Miyotho kinimweerera waasiveliha ootheene ni mikhalelo sootheene, niwoko nkinaasa mpuhaaka, mene mpuha wa atthu ancipale, weera evuluwe." 
1Corinthians11:1 Muthatuwe anamatakihaaka ntoko miyo kinimutakihaaka Kristu. 
1Corinthians11:2 Miyo kinoottottopelani niwoko na okuupuwela miyo mwa soothesene, nitho niwoko munnavarexexa nihusiho nnenesene ntoko miyo kooxuttihalaakani." 
1Corinthians11:3 Vano, kintthuna musuwele weera Kristu ti muru wa mutthu ootheene, ni mulopwana ti muru wa muthiyana, nitho muru wa Kristu ti Muluku." 
1Corinthians11:4 Khula mulopwana omvekela, hoye hoye onthaliha otthuna wa Muluku akhuneenleene muruwaawe, khanttittimiha muruwaawe." 
1Corinthians11:5 Khula muthiyana omvekela, hoye hoye onthaliha otthuna wa Muluku ahikhuneenle muruwaawe, khanttittimiha muruwaawe, niwoko onkhala ntoko oomettha." 
1Corinthians11:6 Muthiyana aahikhuneela muruwaawe, amettheke mayihi. Wakhala weera ti woowuuliha muru wa muthiyana omettha, naari ohama mayihi, akhuneeleke muruwaawe." 
1Corinthians11:7 Mulopwana khantthuneya okhuneela muru, niwoko ori ekhalelo ni ovuwa wa Muluku, mene muthiyana ori ovuwa wa mulopwana." 
1Corinthians11:8 Vano, mulopwana khaakhumale wa muthiyana, mene muthiyana wa mulopwana." 
1Corinthians11:9 Mooteene yoowo mulopwana khaapattuxeriwe muthiyana, mene muthiyana niwoko na mulopwana." 
1Corinthians11:10 Tivawo, ni niwoko na andyelo, ontthuneya weera ekhale eneneero ya ikuru mmurumwawe muthiyana." 
1Corinthians11:11 Wa soothesene, mwa Apwiya, muthiyana khankhala ahikhanlewo mulopwana, hata mulopwana ahikhanlewo muthiyana." 
1Corinthians11:12 Vano, ntoko muthiyana okhumelenle wa mulopwana, hiihotho mulopwana ongyariwa wa muthiyana. Sootheenetho sinrweela wa Muluku." 
1Corinthians11:13 Muthorihe: onootthuneya wa muthiyana omvekela Muluku ni muru woohikhuneeliwa? 
1Corinthians11:14 Ikhovelelo sa itthu khasinoohusihani weera akhalano mulopwana mayihi oorakama, nno khanihiyono nttittimiho," 
1Corinthians11:15 mene akhalano muthiyana mayihi oorakama, iwo ti ovuwawawe? Vano mayihi oorakama ovahiwe weera akhuneelekeno muruwaawe." 
1Corinthians11:16 Akhala mukina ontthuna ovaanya mwaha wa yeeyo, hata hiyo, hata ikerexa sa Muluku khasinono ekhovelelo ekina." 
1Corinthians11:17 Vano, yeeyo kineeraaka kooleeleni, nkingwera woottottopelani, niwoko moothukumananimwanyu sineereiya itthu soonanara opwaha sooreera." 
1Corinthians11:18 Woopacera kiniiwa weera, mwaathukumanaka ntoko ekerexa, wookhala ohiiwanana variyariwanyu, ni vano miyo kinroromela yeeyo vakhaani." 
1Corinthians11:19 Ontthuneya weera okhale ohiiwanana variyariwanyu, weera esuweliwe taani a nyuwo ari oowaakhuleleya." 
1Corinthians11:20 Nyuwo mwaathukumanaka, khoohiyono weera muce yooca ya Apwiya," 
1Corinthians11:21 niwoko khula mutthu onca yoocaawe muneenaawe ahaawehereraka akina. Hiiho, mukina onoovoliwa etala ni mukina onoohapaliwa." 
1Corinthians11:22 Weeraka nyuwo khamunono empa weiwo mungweraanyu oca ni owura? Hoye hoye munramusa ekerexa ya Muluku ni mungwuulihiha muru yaawo ahikhanle ni etthu? Nkooleeleni eheeni? Miyo nkoottottopeleni mwa yeeyo? Vekhaikhai hoye! 
1Corinthians11:23 Vano, kohaakhela wa Apwiya yeeyo koovanghaakanitho: Apwiya Yeesu, ohiyu yaavarihiwaaya, yaakuxa epaawu," 
1Corinthians11:24 ni emalihaka omuxukuru Muluku, yaameyanya ni yaaheera: “Ela ti erutthwaaka emvahiwa mwaha wa nyuwo; mpakeke yeeyo mukuupuwelelaka Miyo." 
1Corinthians11:25 Mooteene yoowo, emalihaka oca, yaakuxa ekoomixi ni yaaheera: “Ekoomixi ela ti wiiraana onyowani mwa ephomaaka. Mpakeke yeeyo, mahuku ootheene muneeraanyu muwureke, mukuupuwelelaka Miyo." 
1Corinthians11:26 Vano, mahuku ootheene muneeraanyu muceeke epaawu ela ni muwureke ekoomixi ela, munlaleiya okhwa wa Apwiya mpaka eneeraaya ewe." 
1Corinthians11:27 Tivawo, khula mutthu onca epaawu ni ongwura ekoomixi ya Apwiya moota woohiphwanela, anaakhalane nthowa na otthekela erutthu ni ephome ya Apwiya." 
1Corinthians11:28 Ontthuneya wiiwehaweha toko khula mutthu ahinaaye oca epaawu, hoye hoye owura ekoomixi," 
1Corinthians11:29 niwoko yoole onca ni ongwura ahittittimihaka erutthu ya Apwiya, onca ni ongwura nttaruxonawe muneenaawe." 
1Corinthians11:30 Tivawo, variyariwanyu aakhala oohilipa ni aretta ancipale, ni akinatho ahookhwa." 
1Corinthians11:31 Vano, hiyo nahiithoriha, khanaathorihiwe." 
1Corinthians11:32 Hiyo ninthorihiwaahu ni Apwiya, ninttaruxiwa weera nihithorihiwe vamoha ni amalapo." 
1Corinthians11:33 Tivawo axunnaka, mwaathukumanaka weera muce, muwehereraneke." 
1Corinthians11:34 Mukina avoliwa etala, aceeke owaani weera mwaathukumanaka, eyo kheemmalela nthorihelo. Wa itthu sikina, kaaphiyakaru, kinooreherera." 
1Corinthians12:1 Axunnaka, nkintthuna weera nyuwo mukhale oohisuwela mwaha wa samahala sa Munepa Wootteela." 
1Corinthians12:2 Moosuwela weera, muhinaaye okhala aKristu, nyuwo mwaaronghiwa moota woohiyanahiyana weera mutthare miluku soohuuluma." 
1Corinthians12:3 Tivawo miyo kinoororomelihani weera khaawo onuuluma ni Munepa wa Muluku ongwera weera: “Yeesu alamphwe,” ni khaawo ongwera ohima: “Yeesu ti Apwiya,” ahikhanle mwa Munepa Wootteela." 
1Corinthians12:4 Sookhala samahala soohiyanahiyana, mene Munepa ori mmoharu." 
1Corinthians12:5 Sookhala miteko soohiyanahiyana, mene Apwiya ari amoharu." 
1Corinthians12:6 Sookhala soopakiwa soohiyanahiyana, mene ori Muluku mmoharu ongwera sootheene mwa ootheene." 
1Corinthians12:7 Munepa Wootteela onimvaha khula mutthu yoowiixoonihera emoha eerelaka mpuha wa atthu ootheene. 
1Corinthians12:8 Mukina omvahiwa ni Munepa nsu na miruku, ni wa mukina nsu na yoosuweliha ni Munepeene Yoowo mmoharu." 
1Corinthians12:9 Wa mukina, nroromelo ni Munepeene Yoowo, ni wa mukinatho, yamahala yoolamiha ni Munepa mmoharu." 
1Corinthians12:10 Wa mukina omvahiwa ikuru sa opaka sootikhiniha, wa mukina onthaliha otthuna wa Muluku, wa mukina ongwera omwalamwaxa ekhaikhai ni yoolokottha, wa mukina muulumo oohiyanahiyana, wa mukinatho ongwera otaphulela muulumo." 
1Corinthians12:11 Itthusene seiya sootheene simpakiwa ni Munepeene Yoowo mmoharu. Ni Owo onkawa samahalasaya wa mutthu ti mutthu, ntoko ontthunaaya." 
1Corinthians12:12 Vano, hiiho ntoko erutthu eraaya emoha, eri okhalanaru mipatta sincipale, ni mipatta sootheene siri mwaattaru simpaka erutthu emoha, hiihotho ni Kristu." 
1Corinthians12:13 Ootheene hiyo noopatisiwa mwa Munepa mmoharu nipakaka erutthu emoha – hata aYuda, hata aGrego, hata ipottha, hata maneethi. Ni wa ootheene hiyo noovahiwa owura wa Munepa mmoharu." 
1Corinthians12:14 Erutthu kheenono mpatta mmoha paahi, mene mipatta sincipale." 
1Corinthians12:15 Nnaawo neera: “Keenre kihikhalaka ntata, miyo nkimpakatho mpatta wa erutthu,” mwa yeeyo khaninkhala mpatta wa erutthu?" 
1Corinthians12:16 Naaru neera: “Keenre kihikhalaka niitho, miyo nkimpakatho mpatta wa erutthu,” mwa yeeyo khaninkhala mpatta wa erutthu?" 
1Corinthians12:17 Erutthu yootheene yaari niitho, naakhala woowi naaru? Erutthu yootheene yaari naaru, naahiimureke hai?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Mwa yeeyo Muluku ohiikaathi khula mpatta mweerutthuni ntoko ontthunaawe. 
1Corinthians12:19 Vano, sootheene saari mpatta mmoha, yaakhala woowi erutthu?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Hiiho sookhala mipatta sincipale, mene erutthu emoha paahi." 
1Corinthians12:21 Niitho khaningwera weerela ntata: “Nkinootthuna weyo.” Hata muru khoongwera weerela inaawo: “Nkinootthuna weyo!” 
1Corinthians12:22 Ohiyanawaya, mipatta sa erutthu sinkhala ntoko soohilipa, ti sootthuneyaxa." 
1Corinthians12:23 Vano, mipatta nnuupuwelaahu weera soohittittimiheyaxa, hiyo ninttittimihaxaahu, ni mipatta sa erutthwaahu siri soowuuliheya muru, sinrehereriwa ni nttittimiho ntokotoko," 
1Corinthians12:24 niwoko mipatta sikina khasintthuneya nenno. Mulukutho oopaka erutthu avahaka nttittimiho ntokotoko wa mipatta seiye saahaleenle yeeyo," 
1Corinthians12:25 weera ohikhale ohiiwanana mweerutthuni, mene weera mipatta sootheene sikhale soolikana, sipasoopanaka mikina ni mikhwaaya." 
1Corinthians12:26 Mpatta mmoha wahaawa, mipatta sootheene sikina sinoohaawa ni yoowo; mpatta mukina wattittimihiwa, sootheene sikina sinoohakalalela yoowo." 
1Corinthians12:27 Vano, nyuwo muri erutthu ya Kristu ni mpatta wa erutthweene yeeyo." 
1Corinthians12:28 Hiiho Muluku ohaakhaliha mukerexani vanipuroni noopacera arummwa, nanaaveeli maprofeeti, nanaararu ahusiha, vahoolowaya yaawo ampaka sootikhiniha nitho yaawo arino yamahala yoolamiha, vahoolowaya yaawo arino yamahala yookhavihera, yaawo arino yamahala yoolamula, ni yaawo anuuluma muulumo makina."
