1Corinthians12:29 Apaale ootheene arummwa? Apaale ootheene maprofeeti? Apaale ootheene ahusiha? Apaale ootheene aakhalano yamahala yoopaka sootikhiniha? 
1Corinthians12:30 Apaale ootheene aakhalano yamahala yoolamiha? Apaale ootheene anuuluma muulumo makina? Apaale ootheene angwera otaphulela? 
1Corinthians12:31 Tivawo, mwaasaase ni nthiti samahala seiyo siri soottittimiheyaxa. Vano kinoowooniherani ephiro yooreeraxa opwaha sootheene." 
1Corinthians13:1 Hata miyo kuulumaka muulumo a atthu ni a andyelo, mene kaahikhalano osivela, nkikhale ntoko eyuuma ennyakula, hoye hoye esiimbi enruma." 
1Corinthians13:2 Hata miyo kikhalanaka yamahala yoothaliha otthuna wa Muluku, ni kisuwelaka matikhinelo ni soosuwela sootheene, nitho kikhalanaka nroromelo noowera osusiha nyaako, mene kaahikhalano osivela, nkinkhala etthu." 
1Corinthians13:3 Hata miyo kivahaka sootheene kiraakano, ni kinnyereraka erutthwaaka weera ehisiwe, mene kaahikhalano osivela, sootheene seiyo nsikhale sa siiyo." 
1Corinthians13:4 Osivela ongweherera ni ovilela, osivela ti wooreera, khoonono nrima, khooniixoona, khooniixunnuwiha" 
1Corinthians13:5 khoonghasula, khooniisaasa sawayaru, khoonnyoonyiwa woowaakuveya, khoonuupuwelela yoonanara." 
1Corinthians13:6 Osivela khoonghakalalela yootakhala, mene onghakalalela ekhaikhai." 
1Corinthians13:7 Osivela onghaawa sootheene, onroromela sootheene, ongweherera sootheene, omvilela sootheene." 
1Corinthians13:8 Osivela khoonriheya, mene soothaliha sa otthuna wa Muluku nsimale, muulumo eniimaale, ni osuwela onuumale." 
1Corinthians13:9 Vano osuwelawahu khoonkwanela, ni othaliherawahu otthuna wa Muluku khoonkwanelatho." 
1Corinthians13:10 Wa soothesene, yaarwaaka yeeyo eri yookwanela, yoohikwanela eniimale." 
1Corinthians13:11 Miyo kaaraaka mmiravo, kuuluma ntoko mmiravo, kuupuwela ntoko mmiravo ni kaataphulela itthu ntoko mmiravo. Vano, kithatuwakaru mulopwana, kaahiya ottuli itthu sa enamwane." 
1Corinthians13:12 Vekhaihai, vaanaano nnoona ntoko muloolani ni mmaxiripuloni, mene ohoolowaya, nnoone ekhove ni ekhove. Vaanaano va kinsuwela vakhaani, mene ohoolowaya nkisuwele nnenesene, ntoko kiraaka oosuweliwa nnenesene." 
1Corinthians13:13 Hiiho singhala vaanaano iya tthaaru: nroromelo, oweherera, ni osivela. Vaheera yootthuneyaxa wa itthu seiya, ti osivela." 
1Corinthians14:1 Mutthareke osivela ni mwaasaase ni nthiti samahala sa Munepa, vancipalexa yamahala ya othalihera otthuna wa Muluku," 
1Corinthians14:2 niwoko yoowo onuuluma nuulumo nikina, khanuuluma ni atthu, mene ni Muluku. Wa yeeyo, khaawo oniiwexexa; owo onuuluma matikhinelo mmunepani." 
1Corinthians14:3 Vaheera owo onthalihera otthuna wa Muluku onuuluma ni atthu weera aapuhihe, alipihere mirimasaya ni aapepese." 
1Corinthians14:4 Yoowo onuuluma ni nuulumo nikina, oniipuhiha muneenaawe paahi, mene yoowo onthalihera otthuna wa Muluku, ompuhiha ekerexa." 
1Corinthians14:5 Kaatthuna weera ootheene nyuwo muulume muulumo makina, mene kintthunaxa weera nyuwo muthalihere otthuna wa Muluku. Yoowo onthalihera otthuna wa Muluku ti oompwahaxa yoowo onuuluma ni muulumo makina, ohikhanle weera mukina onootaphulela muulumo awo weera epuhihiwe ekerexa." 
1Corinthians14:6 Vano axunnaka, miyo kawa wooxekurani ni kuulumawo ni muulumo makina, eheeni kineeraaka koovareleni? Fataari weera miyo kooleeleni yoothupulula emoha, hoye hoye yoosuwela emoha, naari yoothalihera otthuna wa Muluku emoha, naari nihusiho nimoha." 
1Corinthians14:7 Moota hiiho, wa itthu siniipiwa sinruma seiyo sihikhanle ni okumi, hata akhalaka mpetta, hoye hoye makita, saahivirikana orumawaya, eniisuwanyeye hai eniipiwa ni mpetta, hoye hoye ni makita?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Ohiya toko yeeyo, nipalapatta naahiruma nnenesene, taani aneera iireherere weera arowe okhottoni?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Hiihotho ni nyuwo. Mwaahuuluma masu oowiiwanyeya ni nlumi, anaasuwele hai mukina etthu onleeliwaawe? Nyuwo mmuulume vasiiyoniwene paahi." 
1Corinthians14:10 Woohihovela, mweelaponi aakhala muulumo oohiyanahiyana, wa soothesene ootheene aakhalano etaphulelowaaya." 
1Corinthians14:11 Tivawo, miyo kaahiiwexexa etaphulelo ya yeeyo mukina onuulumaawe, miyo nkikhale namarwaawe yoowo onuuluma, ni owo namarwaaka." 
1Corinthians14:12 Hiihotho eneereiya wa nyuwo. Mweenre nyuwo mutthunaxaka okhalano samahala sa Munepa, mwaasaase wiikhaliha mmahalani seiyo simpuhiha ekerexa." 
1Corinthians14:13 Tivawo, yoowo onuuluma ni nuulumo nikina, avekele weera awere otaphulela nuulumo nno." 
1Corinthians14:14 Miyo kavekela ni nuulumo nikina, munepaaka onoovekela, mene soosuwelasaka sinimweemela." 
1Corinthians14:15 Vano, nkeereke hai? Nkivekele ni munepa, mene nkivekeletho ni soosuwela; nkiipe ni munepa, mene nkiipetho ni soosuwela." 
1Corinthians14:16 Nyuwo mwaamuttottopelaka Muluku mmunepani, ongwereya hai yoole ori a yaale ahiniiwexexa weera “Ame*” wa otthapelawanyu, woonaka weera owo khasuwenle yeeyo nyuwo munghimaanyu?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Vekhaikhai nyuwo munttottopelaka nnenesene, mene mukina khampuhihiwa." 
1Corinthians14:18 Miyo kinnamutthapela Muluku niwoko kinuuluma mmuulumoni woopwahani nyuwo ootheene. 
1Corinthians14:19 Wa soothesene, mukerexani kintthunaxa wuuluma masu mathanu oowiiwanyeya weera kaahusihe akina, ohiya wuuluma masu mancipale mmuulumoni." 
1Corinthians14:20 Axunnaka, muhuupuwele ntoko anamwane. Mukhale anamwane mwa soonanara, mene oowunnuwa mwa wuupuwelawanyu." 
1Corinthians14:21 Vano, yoolempwa munlamuloni: “Nkuulume ni muloko wa atthu ola ni atthu a muulumo makina ni mwa iyano sa anamarwa, mene orookhalaru hiiho, awo kheerwa ekiiwa, aneera Apwiya.”" 
1Corinthians14:22 Tivawo, muulumo ari eneneero, kheehiyono wa yaawo anroromela, mene wa ahinroromela. Wa soothesene, othaliha otthuna wa Muluku ti wa yaawo anroromela, khoohiyono wa ahinroromela." 
1Corinthians14:23 Hiiho, ekerexa yootheene yathukumana ni ootheene yuuluma ni muulumo makina, enavolowa akina oohisuwela, naari oohiroromela, awo kheerwa yeera weera muri ni anepa?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Avolowatho oohiroromela, naari oohisuwela ootheene yeeraka othaliha otthuna wa Muluku, owo anaaviriyeliwe ni masu a ootheene, ni anaathorihiwe ni masu a ootheene," 
1Corinthians14:25 nitho ixiiri sa murimaawe nsikhale soowooneya. Hiiho owo anaamorele vathi ni anaamulape Muluku, akhuwelaka: “Vekhaikhai, Muluku ori variyariwanyu!”" 
1Corinthians14:26 Tivawo, axunnaka, nnihime eheeni? Mwaathukumanaka, khula mutthu a nyuwo onkhalano ecipo, hoye hoye masu a nihusiho, yoothupulula emoha, masu mmuulumoni, hoye hoye yootaphulela emoha. Mupakeke soothesene weera mpuhihe ekerexa." 
1Corinthians14:27 Wa soothesene, yakhala akina anuuluma ni muulumo makina, yuulumeke meeli woohipwaha mararu, mutthu ti mutthu emaaraawe, ni ontthuneya weera mukina ataphuleleke." 
1Corinthians14:28 Aahikhala mutthu ootaphulela, amaaleke mukerexani, uulumaka mwaneenaawe, ni ni Muluku." 
1Corinthians14:29 Mwaha wa maprofeeti – eeli, hoye hoye araru ethalihereke, ni akina ephimeke nnenesene yeeyo aleelingwaaya." 
1Corinthians14:30 Wakhala weera mukina okilaathiye ohooniheriwa etthu, oopacera amaaleke." 
1Corinthians14:31 Vano, ootheene nyuwo ngwereke othaliha otthuna wa Muluku, mutthu ti mutthu emaaraawe, weera ootheene ehusihiwe ni elipiheriwe." 
1Corinthians14:32 Yaawo anthaliha otthuna wa Muluku anoowera olamula minepasaya. 
1Corinthians14:33 Muluku khahiyono Muluku a ohiiwanana, mene a murettele. Ntoko mukerexani sikina sootheene sa ootteela," 
1Corinthians14:34 asithiyana ontthuneya weera ekhaleke oomaala mukerexani, niwoko khaatthuniheriwe wuuluma, mene yiiweleleke ntoko nlamulo nihimalaaya." 
1Corinthians14:35 Yatthuna ohusihiwa etthu, yaakoheke asiiyaya owaani, niwoko ti yoowuuliha muru wa muthiyana wuuluma mukerexani." 
1Corinthians14:36 Weeraka masu a Muluku akhumelenle eriyaraanyu? Hoye hoye awo awiiye wa nyuwo paahi? 
1Corinthians14:37 Akhala mukina onuupuwela weera ori mprofeeti, hoye hoye orino samahala sa Munepa, asuweleke weera yeeyo kinlepaaka ti nlamulo na Apwiya." 
1Corinthians14:38 Aahisuwela yeeyo, owotho kharwa asuweliwa." 
1Corinthians14:39 Tivawo axunnaka, mwaasaase ni nthiti othaliha otthuna wa Muluku, ni muhimukhoottihe yoowo wuuluma ni muulumo." 
1Corinthians14:40 Sootheenetho iyo sintthuneya sipakiweke ni ophwanelawaya ni wiiwananawaya. 
1Corinthians15:1 Axunnaka, kintthuna owuupuxerani masu ooreeraxa miyo koolaleenraakani, mwa yaawo nyuwo mwaakhenlaanyu, ni mwa yaawo nyuwo mukhalihiwaanyu." 
1Corinthians15:2 Niwoko na masu ooreeraxa awo, nyuwo moovuluxiwa, mwalipihera ovarexexa masu koolaleenraakani. Mwaahipaka yeeyo, muroromenle vasiiyoni." 
1Corinthians15:3 Vano yeeyo kaakhenlaaka, miyotho kohooleelani ntoko etthu yoopacera ottittimiheya: weera Kristu okhwenle sootthekasahu ntoko Yoolempwa ehimalaaya," 
1Corinthians15:4 aavithiwa, ni aavenyerera nihuku nanaararu ntoko Yoolempwa ehimalaaya," 
1Corinthians15:5 ni aahiixoonihera wa Pedru, ni vahoolowaya wa muloko neeli." 
1Corinthians15:6 Vahoolowaya aahiixoonihera wa axunna oomalaka macira miloko mithanu vamaarani emoharu; ancipale a yaawo nlelo akumi, ari mweeraru akina a yaawo ekhwiiyeene." 
1Corinthians15:7 Woottharelana aahiixoonihera wa Yakobe, ni vano wa arummwa ootheene." 
1Corinthians15:8 Vahoolo wa yaale, aahiixoonihera wa miyo ntoko wa mwaana ohiyariwe ehuhu yootthuneya." 
1Corinthians15:9 Miyo kiri mukhaanene a arummwa ootheene, ni hata vakhaani nkiphwanenle wiitthaniwa murummwa, niwoko koottharatthara ekerexa ya Muluku." 
1Corinthians15:10 Vano, niwoko na mahala a Muluku miyo kiri yeeyo kiraaka, ni mahalaawe wa miyo khayaahiyono a siiyo. Mwa yeeyo koovara muteko waapwaha yaawo ootheene, wa soothesene nkihiyono miyo, mene mahala a Muluku yaari ni miyo." 
1Corinthians15:11 Tivawo, hata kikhalaka miyo, hata ekhalaka awo, ti yeeyo ninlaleiyaahu ni ti yeeyo mwaaroromenlaanyu." 
1Corinthians15:12 Moone, waalaleiwaka weera Kristu oovenyerera mookhwaani, heeni akina a nyuwo aneeraaya weera khoowowo ovenyerera mookhwaani?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Waahikhanle ovenyerera mookhwaani, vano hata Kristu khavenyerenre," 
1Corinthians15:14 ni Kristu aahivenyerenre, olaleiyawahu ti woohikhala etthu, nitho nroromelonanyu ti na siiyo." 
1Corinthians15:15 Waari weera ookhwa khaamvenyerera, Kristutho khavenyerenre. Hiiho, nniitthaniwe anamoona oolokottha a Muluku, niwoko naakhalenle onamoona weera Muluku aamvenyereriha Yeesu." 
1Corinthians15:16 Vano, ookhwa yaahivenyerera mookhwaani, hata Kristu khavenyerenre." 
1Corinthians15:17 Kristu aahivenyerenre, nroromelonanyu ti na siiyo, ni nlelo muri mootthekanimwanyu." 
1Corinthians15:18 Wa yeeyo, yaawotho akhwiiye mwa Kristu, aariheya." 
1Corinthians15:19 Waari weera hiyo naaroromenle mwa Kristu wa okumi wa vathi ola paahi, nimphwanela ikharari waapwaha ootheene." 
1Corinthians15:20 Mwa yeeyo Kristu oovenyerera mookhwaani, akhalaka oopacera variyari wa yaale akhwiiye." 
1Corinthians15:21 Woonaka weera okhwa orwiiye niwoko na mulopwana mmoha paahi, ovenyerera mookhwaanitho orwiiye niwoko na Mulopwana mmoha paahi." 
1Corinthians15:22 Vano, ntoko ootheene ankhwa mwa Adamu, hiihotho mwa Kristu ootheene eniikhalihiwe ni okumi." 
1Corinthians15:23 Mene mutthu ti mutthu emaaraawe: oopacera Kristu, vahoolowaya, Owo awa, yaawo ari awawe." 
1Corinthians15:24 Vano onuuphiye ommaleloni, Owo aavahereraka omwene wa Muluku Atiithi vahoolo wa ophwata elamulelo yootheene, otokweene wootheene, ni ikuru sootheene." 
1Corinthians15:25 Ontthuneya weera Owo alamule mpaka ehuhuweene yeeyo amwiittana ootheene eneeraaya yiikaathiwe vathi wa inaawosawe. 
1Corinthians15:26 Mwiittana ookisera aneera aphwatiwe, ti okhwa," 
1Corinthians15:27 niwoko Owo “ohiikaathi soothesene vathi wa inaawosawe.” Moone, yeeriwaka weera “soothesene” sohiikaathiwa wa Yoowo, onooneya weera eyo kheenimutakansa Muluku muneenaawe, Yoowo omwiiyaathenre soothesene vathi wa Kristu." 
1Corinthians15:28 Wa soothesene, iikaatheriwa soothesene Kristu, vano Mwaana muneenaawe aniikaathi mwa Yoowo iikaathiye soothesene wa Mwaana, weera Muluku akhale soothesene mwa ootheene." 
1Corinthians15:29 Waahikhanle ovenyerera, eniyeere hai yaawo aniipatisa mwa ookhwa? Vekhaikhai waari weera akhwiiye khamvenyerera, aniipatisera heeni mwa yaawo?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Hiyotho, heeni ninkhalaahu hiyo ehuhu yootheene ngwoopihani?" 
1Corinthians15:31 Axunnaka, kinnakhwa mahuku ootheene. Yeeyo kinghima mwa ovuwa kiraakano wa nyuwo mwa Kristu Yeesu Apwiyaahu." 
1Corinthians15:32 Miyo kaawana ni axinama a ntuphini wEfeso niwoko na mathowa a mutthu paahi, kiwinne eheeni? Akhwiiye yaahivenyerera, “nnimooca ni ninoowura, niwoko omaalo nnikhwe.”" 
1Corinthians15:33 Muhilokotthiwe, “wiiraana ni atthu oonanara ompahula ikhovelelo sooreera.”" 
1Corinthians15:34 Muupuwelele nnenesene, muhiyerere ottheka, niwoko aakhala akina ahimusuwenle Muluku. Kinghima yeeyo weera kiwuulihiheni muru." 
1Corinthians15:35 Vano mukina onoowera okoha: “Eniivenyerere hai akhwiiye? Ni moota heeni wa erutthu eneeraaya erwaaneke? 
1Corinthians15:36 Mulolo! Yeeyo nyuwo munaalaanyu kheemmela, ohikhanle weera yaahookhwa toko." 
1Corinthians15:37 Nyuwo mwaalaka, khamunaala erutthu eneera ekhaleke, mene paahi enuku ntoko ya etrigu, hoye hoye ya etthu ekina." 
1Corinthians15:38 Mulukutho omvaha erutthu ntoko ontthunaawe, ni wa enuku ti enuku erutthwaaya yootthuneya." 
1Corinthians15:39 Hata erutthu yootheene kheehiyono yoolikana. Atthu arino erutthwaaya, asinama arino erutthwaaya ekina, ipalame sirino erutthwaaya ekina ni ihopa sirino erutthwaaya ekinatho." 
1Corinthians15:40 Sookhala irutthu sa wiirimu, ni sikina sa vathi. Vano ovuwa wa seiyo sa wiirimu ori mootaaya, ni seiyo sa vathi ori moota mukina." 
1Corinthians15:41 Mukina ori waara wa nsuwa, mukina wa mweeri, ni mukinatho wa ithenyeeri, ni mpaka ithenyeeri singhiyana waarawaya ekina ni ekhwaaya." 
1Corinthians15:42 Hiiho nseereye ni ovenyerera wa ookhwa. Erutthu yooriheya yaaliwe, ni emvenyerera yoohiriheya." 
1Corinthians15:43 Enaaliwa yoohittittimiheya, ni emvenyerera moovuwani; enaaliwa yoohilipa, ni emvenyerera ni ikuru." 
1Corinthians15:44 Enaaliwa erutthu ya mutthu, emvenyerera erutthu ya mmunepani. Yakhala erutthu ya mutthu, enookhalatho erutthu ya mmunepani." 
1Corinthians15:45 Hiiho yoolempwa: “Mulopwana oopacera, Adamu, aathatuwa erutthu ya okumi”; Adamu ookisera aathatuwa munepa omvaha okumi." 
1Corinthians15:46 Kheehiyono erutthu ya mmunepani epacenre, mene ya mutthu; ni vahoolowaya ya mmunepani." 
1Corinthians15:47 Mulopwana oopacera aari a ntthupi na etthaya; anaaveeli a wiirimu. 
1Corinthians15:48 Ntoko aaraawe yoowo a etthaya, hiihotho yaawo ari a etthaya; ni ntoko aaraawe Yoowo a wiirimu, hiihotho yaawo ari a wiirimu." 
1Corinthians15:49 Ntoko nikuxalaahu olikana wa mulopwana a etthaya, hiihotho nnikuxe olikana wa mulopwana a wiirimu." 
1Corinthians15:50 Axunnaka, miyo kinoothaliherani weera erutthu ni ephome kheengwera waakhela omwene wa Muluku, hata yeeyo eri yooriheya kheengwera waakhela yoohiriheya." 
1Corinthians15:51 Mwiiwe, miyo kinooleelani ntikhinelo nimoha: khanihiyono ootheene hiyo nneera nikhwe, mene ootheene hiyo nnitatuxiwe" 
1Corinthians15:52 wa ehuhu emoha, ngwaaphilani wa maitho, woorumani nipenka nookisera. Vano, nipenka nnirume, akhwiiye eniivenyerere oohiriheya, ni hiyo nnitatuxiwe," 
1Corinthians15:53 niwoko ontthuneya weera yeeyo eri yoowuntta eware yoohuntta, ni yeeyo yookhwa eware yoohikhwa." 
1Corinthians15:54 Yeeyo eri yoowuntta yaawaraka yoohunta, ni yeeyo yookhwa yaawaraka yoohikhwa, hiiho eniikwaniheriwe masu oolempwa: “Okhwa woomiriwa ni owina wookwanela.”" 
1Corinthians15:55 “Okhwa, ori woowi owinawanyu? Okhwa, ori woowi mpuulaanyu?”" 
1Corinthians15:56 Mpuule wa okhwa ti yoottheka ni nlamulo ti ikuru sa yoottheka. 
1Corinthians15:57 Atthapeliwe Muluku onnivaha owina niwoko na Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu! 
1Corinthians15:58 Tivawo, axunnaka oosiveleya, mwiilipihe ni muhittikinyeye. Mahuku ootheene mupakeke miteko sa Muluku ni murima wootheene, niwoko moosuwela weera mwa Apwiya, mutekwaanyu khoohiyono wa siiyo." 
1Corinthians16:1 Vano, mwaha wa musurukhu wa muloko wa Muluku, mupakeke yeeyo miyo kaalamulenlaaka ikerexa sa oGalata." 
1Corinthians16:2 Nihuku noopacera na isimana soothesene, khula mutthu a nyuwo athokororeke mpatta wa musurukhu yoowo mungweraanyu, muthokororaka yoowo weera miyo kaaphiyaka, khoontthuneya othukumanya musurukhu wa ehuhuweene yeeyo." 
1Corinthians16:3 Vano, miyo kaaphiyaka, nkaavahe ikaratta sa olaihera yaawo muneeraanyu mwaathanle, ni nkaarume oYerusaleemu ni yoovahaanyu." 
1Corinthians16:4 Ni koona weera onootthuneya miyo orowatho, awo eniikihoole." 
1Corinthians16:5 Nkirwe kooxekureni kavira oMasedoniya, niwoko ontthuneya ovira oMasedoniya." 
1Corinthians16:6 Apaale nkikhale ni nyuwo wa ehuhu ekina, hoye hoye mpaka mulaala wootheene, weera mukikhavihere mukwahaaka wa mapuro ootheene kineeraaka kirowe." 
1Corinthians16:7 Emaareene yeeyo nkintthuna owoonani woowaakuveya paahi, kinroromela weera nkikhale ni nyuwo ehuhu yincipale, Apwiya yakitthunihera." 
1Corinthians16:8 Nkikhaletho wEfeso mpaka Pentekoste*," 
1Corinthians16:9 niwoko koohuleliwa nsele ntokotoko na miteko sooreera, ni aakhala amwiittana ancipale." 
1Corinthians16:10 Vano, awa Timootheyo, mweeteteyeke weera akhale oohoova areene ni nyuwo, niwoko owo onaavarela muteko Apwiya ntoko miyo." 
1Corinthians16:11 Tivawo, khaawo aneera amuramuseke. Munkhavihereke opwaherera mukwahaawe ni murettele, weera owo ahokoleele wa miyo. Miyo kinoongweherera vamoha ni axunna." 
1Corinthians16:12 Mwaha wa munna Apolo, kannamunyeserera weera arowe ooxekureni vamoha ni axunna. Owo khaatthunne hata vakhaani, mene anaarowe akhalano ehuhu yootthuneya." 
1Corinthians16:13 Mukhale oowehaweha, mukhaleke oowiilipiha munroromeloni, mukhale alopwana oolipiha murima, mukhale oolipa." 
1Corinthians16:14 Mupakeke sootheene moosivelani. 
1Corinthians16:15 Nyuwo moosuwela weera yaawo a vaate wa Stefana yaari aKristu oopacera a wAkhaya, ni weera awo yaahiiveleela waarumeela atthu ootteela. Kinoovekelani axunna" 
1Corinthians16:16 weera ngwiiwelele atthu ntoko awo, ni ootheene yaawo amvara muteko vamoha ni hiyo." 
1Corinthians16:17 Koohakalalela orwa wa Stefana, Fortunato ni Akhaiko, niwoko yaawo yaakiruuhela yeeyo yaakihaleela wa nyuwo." 
1Corinthians16:18 Awo aakurunuxa munepaaka nitho munepaanyu. Ngwoonelemo asilopwana ntoko awo. 
1Corinthians16:19 Ikerexa sa wAsiya sinoovahani isalaama. Akila ni Priska anoovahani isalaama sincipale mwa Apwiya, nitho ekerexa enthukumana mpaanimwaya." 
1Corinthians16:20 Axunna ootheene anoovahani isalaama. Muulumihane ni ebeecu yootteela. 
1Corinthians16:21 Miyo, Pawulo, koolepa isalaama iya ni ntatanaka." 
1Corinthians16:22 Akhala mukina ohinaasivela Apwiya, akhaleke oolamphwa. Ewe Apwiya!" 
1Corinthians16:23 Mahala a Apwiya Yeesu ekhale ni nyuwo. 
1Corinthians16:24 Osivelawaka okhale ni nyuwo ootheene mwa Kristu Yeesu. 
2Corinthians1:1 Ya Pawulo, murummwa a Kristu Yeesu ntoko otthuna wa Muluku, ni munna Timootheyo. Wa ekerexa ya Muluku eri oKorinto, vamoha ni ootteela ootheene ankhala elapo yootheene ya wAkhaya." 
2Corinthians1:2 Wa nyuwo, mahala ni murettele onrweela wa Muluku Atithihu ni wa Apwiya Yeesu Kristu." 
2Corinthians1:3 Oottottopeliwa akhale Muluku ni Atiithi a Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu, Atiithi a ikharari ni a opepesa wootheene." 
2Corinthians1:4 Owo onnipepesa mmahooxonimwahu mootheene, weera hiyo niwere waapepesa yaawo ari mmahooxoni ni opepesa naakhenlaahu wa Muluku." 
2Corinthians1:5 Vano hiiho ntoko soohaawela sa Kristu sinnaattelaaya hiyo, hiihotho onnaattela opepesawahu niwoko na Kristu." 
2Corinthians1:6 Hiyo naahaawihiwaka, iwo ori wa opepesiwawanyu ni ovuluxiwawanyu. Hiyo napepesiwa, ori wa opepesiwawanyu, ni iwo onoovahani opixa murima weera muvilele ohaawawene weiwo hiyo ninghaawaahu." 
2Corinthians1:7 Vano owehererawahu mwaha wa nyuwo ti woolipa, niwoko noosuwela weera nyuwo murino opepesiwawene weiwo nraahuno, mooteene yoowo muraanyuno ohaawawene weiwo hiyo nraahuno." 
2Corinthians1:8 Axunna, hiyo khanintthuna weera nyuwo muhisuwele ohaawa naahaawaahu elapo ya wAsiya. Ohaawawene weiwe waari woopwahaxa ovilela, mpaka ophiyera ehuhu hiyo yoowooceela ororomela weera nnikhale ni okumi." 
2Corinthians1:9 Mwa yeeyo hiyo asineenaahu naakhalano othoriheliwa okhwa, weera nihiiroromele asineenaahu, mene mwa Muluku onaavenyereriha akhwiiye." 
2Corinthians1:10 Owo oonoopola wa woopiha otokotoko wa okhwa, ni anaapwaherere onoopola. Ninnimuroromela Yoowo weera anaapwaherere onoopola," 
2Corinthians1:11 nyuwo munikhaviherakatho ni mavekelowaanyu. Hiiho ancipale eniimutthapele Muluku mwaha wa hiyo niwoko na mahala hiyo nivahiwaahu mwa waakhula wa mavekelo a ancipale. 
2Corinthians1:12 Vano, ovuwawahu ti wu: Mirimasahu sinkhalela onamoona weera hiyo nanneetta mweelaponimu, vancipalexa variyariwanyu, moota wa murima woowookowa, mwa ekhaikhai enrweela wa Muluku, mwa mahala a Muluku, ni khanneetta mwa miruku sa elapo ya vathi." 
2Corinthians1:13 Kheewo nnoolepelaahuni muhingweraanyu osoma, hoye hoye wiiwexexa. Koororomela weera," 
2Corinthians1:14 ntoko nyuwo munniiwexexaanyu vakhaani, mmwiiwexexetho vancipale weera munoowera wiivuwiha niwoko na hiyo, hiiho ntoko hiyo nniivuwihe niwoko na nyuwo vanihukuni na Apwiya Yeesu." 
2Corinthians1:15 Kiroromelaka mwa yeeyo, ni weera nyuwo mukhale ooreelihiwaxa, kaavaanela wooxekurani toko" 
2Corinthians1:16 kirowaka oMasedoniya ni koohokoleeleni kikhumakawo, weera nyuwo mukikhavihere mukwahaaka wa oYudeiya." 
2Corinthians1:17 Vano, kaavaanenlaaka yeeyo, weeraka miyo kipanke yeeyo ntoko namaceendyaceendya? Hoye hoye weeraka soovaanelasaka kimpaka ntoko mikhalelo sa amalapo, keeraka “aani” ni “hoye” ehuhu emoha yeeyo?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Wa soothesene, ntoko Muluku oraawe oororomeleya, mutthengaahu wa nyuwo khoohiyono “aani” ni “hoye,”" 
2Corinthians1:19 niwoko Mwaana a Muluku, Yeesu Kristu, Owo onlaleiwa variyariwanyu ni miyo, Silvano ni Timootheyo, khaahiyono “aani” ni “hoye,” mene mwa Yoowo mahuku ootheene wookhala “aani.”" 
2Corinthians1:20 Soororomelihiwa sootheene sipakiwe ni Muluku siri “aani” paahi mwa Kristu. Tivawo, ti niwoko na Yoowo nneeraahu “Ame*” wa ovuwa wa Muluku." 
2Corinthians1:21 Ti Muluku onnilipiha hiyo vamoha ni nyuwo mwa Kristu. Owo oonittikitthela," 
2Corinthians1:22 ni oniyaathenre eneneero enoonihera weera nri a Yoowo, ni onihenle Munepaawe mmirimanimwahu ntoko yoororomelihiwa ya yeeyo eneera ewe." 
2Corinthians1:23 Kinimwiitthana Muluku ntoko namoona weera nkaahokoleenle oKorinto weera kiwuureleni nyuwo. 
2Corinthians1:24 Khoohiyono weera ninoolamulani nroromelonanyu, mene nimvara muteko vamoha ni nyuwo weera muhakalale, niwoko ti munroromeloni nyuwo munkhalaanyu oolipa." 
2Corinthians2:1 Koolakela weera kihooxekurenitho iwo ohoothananiheni. 
2Corinthians2:2 Vano, miyo koothananihani, taani aneera akihakalalihe, muhikhanle nyuwo miyo koothananinghaakani?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Miyo koolepa ela weera miyo kaarowaka, kihikhale oothananihiweene ni yaawo yeera ekihakalaliheke. Miyo kaahoororomelani nyuwo weera ohakalalawaka ti wawinyutho." 
2Corinthians2:4 Tivawo, kohoolepelani ni othanana vancipale mmurimanimwaka, ni ni maithori mancipale, khoohiyono weera kihoothananiheni, mene weera nyuwo musuwele woosivelaxaniwaka." 
2Corinthians2:5 Akhala mukina onthananiha, khakithananinghe miyo paahi, mene moota mukina nyuwo ootheene, hoye hoye weera kihaatepihe, wa akina a nyuwo." 
2Corinthians2:6 Vano ottaruxiwa aakhenlaawe wa ancipale a nyuwo ti wookwana. 
2Corinthians2:7 Ohiyanawaya, ontthuneya weera nyuwo munlevelele ni mumpepese weera owo ahithananaxe." 
2Corinthians2:8 Tivawo miyo kinoolakaakani weera mmwaakhulele omusivelawanyu yoowo. 
2Corinthians2:9 Miyo koolepenleni niwoko kaatthuna osuwela mukhalelowaanyu, nyuwo mwiiwelenle mwa sootheene." 
2Corinthians2:10 Nyuwo mwamulevelela mukina, miyotho kinoomulevelela. Waari weera yaakhala etthu yootthuneya olevelela, koolevelela ohoolo wa Kristu niwoko na woosivelaniwaka," 
2Corinthians2:11 weera Satana ahinihapuxe, niwoko noosuwela nnenesene soovaanelasawe." 
2Corinthians2:12 Miyo kiphiyakaru oTrowada weera kilaleiyewo masu ooreeraxa a Kristu, ni koonaka weera Apwiya yaakihulela mulako," 
2Corinthians2:13 hata hiiho, nkaanono wiitthuuwa mmunepanimwaka niwoko iwe nkaamphwannye munnaka Titu. Tivawo, kaaraxenlaaka ni kaarongwaaka oMasedoniya." 
2Corinthians2:14 Vano atthapeliwe Muluku, Yoowo onneettiha moowinani mwa Kristu, ni onnivarela muteko hiyo omwaramwaxa wunkhela wa osuwelawawe mmapuroni mootheene." 
2Corinthians2:15 Wa Muluku, hiyo nri wunkhela wa Kristu variyari wa yaawo amvuluxiwa ni yaawo anriheya." 
2Corinthians2:16 Wa oopacera, nri wunkhela wa okumi, wa anaaveeli, wunkha wookhwa. Vano, taani owenre yeeyo?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Ovirikanawaya hiyo ni akina ancipale, hiyo khaninthumiha masu a Muluku weera niwine. Hoye! Ohiyanawaya, mwa Kristu hiyo ninlaleiya ni ekhaikhai ohoolo wa Muluku, ntoko asilopwana oorummwa ni Muluku." 
2Corinthians3:1 Weeraka hiyo nimpacera veeli wiivuwiha asineenaahu? Weeraka hiyo nintthuna, ntoko akina, ikaratta sa olaihera wa nyuwo, hoye hoye sa nyuwo?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Nyuwo asineenaanyu muri ekarattaahu, elempwe mmurimanimwahu, esuweliwe ni esommwe ni ootheene." 
2Corinthians3:3 Nyuwo munoonihera weera muri ekaratta ya Kristu, emalihero ya mitekosahu, ehilempwale ni owiini, mene ni Munepa wa Muluku mukumi, kheelempwale vatthaabwani wa nluku, mene vatthaabwani wa mirima sa atthu." 
2Corinthians3:4 Ti nna nroromelo hiyo ninkhalaahuno ohoolo wa Muluku niwoko na Kristu. 
2Corinthians3:5 Eyo kheenoonihera weera hiyo ningwera opaka etthu ni owerawahu asineenaahu, ohiyanawaya, owerawahu onrweela wa Muluku." 
2Corinthians3:6 Owo ooniweriha weera nikhale arumeiyi a wiiraana onyowani, khoohiyono wa soolempwa, mene wa Munepa, niwoko soolempwa siniiva, mene Munepa omvaha okumi." 
2Corinthians3:7 Vano muteko oruuhale okhwa owiiye ni ovuwa, ni olempwe ni soolempwa vanlukuni, moota wooweera aYixrayeli khayaawenre owehexexa ekhove ya Moisesi niwoko na otutha wa ekhovaawe, hata oreene otutha woovireya." 
2Corinthians3:8 Waari hiiho, wootepa ovuwaxa ti muteko wa Munepa!" 
2Corinthians3:9 Waari woovuwa muteko onruuhela othoriha, ovuwa heeni wootepaxa onuukhale muteko onruuhela waakhuleliwa ni Muluku?" 
2Corinthians3:10 Vano, yeeyo yaari yoovuwa khalayi, kheehiyono ovuwa woolikanxera ni ovuwa wu woohilikanxereya." 
2Corinthians3:11 Ni yeeyo yaavira yaari yoonihenre ovuwa, otepaxa heeni onuukhale ovuwa onkhala mahuku ootheene?" 
2Corinthians3:12 Tivawo, woonaka weera nookhalano oweherera wu, hiyo nri oolipa murima." 
2Corinthians3:13 Hiyo khanihiyono ntoko Moisesi, iiyaathi ecireemba owiithowawe weera aYixrayeli ehoone otutha woovira." 
2Corinthians3:14 Vekhaikhai, soowuupuwelasaya soowaliwa, niwoko mpaka olelo ecireemba eyo enkhala waasommwaka Wiiraana wa Khalayi. Kheevenxiwe, niwoko emvenxiwa mwa Kristu paahi." 
2Corinthians3:15 Mwa yeeyo mpaka olelo, saasommwaka ilivuru sa Moisesi, ecireemba enkhuneela mirimasaya." 
2Corinthians3:16 Mukinatho aarukunxelaka murimaawe Apwiya, ecireemba enoovenxiwa." 
2Corinthians3:17 Moone, Apwiya ti Munepa, ni weiwo oraaya Munepa wa Apwiya, iwo wookhalawo oneethi." 
2Corinthians3:18 Hiyo ootheene nri ni ekhove yookhunuliwa, ninoonihera ovuwa wa Muluku. Ni hiiho nintatuxiwa moovuwani woowunnuwa onrweela wa Apwiya ori Munepa, weera nilikanyihiwe ntoko mukhalelo wa Yoowo." 
2Corinthians4:1 Tivawo, neenre nikhalakano muteko ola wa ikharari nivahiwaahu, hiyo khanimporora." 
2Corinthians4:2 Ohiyanawaya, hiyo ninnyanyala itthu soovithiwa ni soowuulihiha muru. Khanimvarela muteko soolokottha, hata khanimpiritula masu a Muluku. Hoye! Nithaliheraka ekhaikhai nnenesene, hiyo nniixoonihera wa mirima sa atthu ootheene ohoolo wa Muluku." 
2Corinthians4:3 Maswaahutho ooreeraxa yaari ookhuneeliwa, ti ookhuneeliwa wa yaawo anriheya." 
2Corinthians4:4 Muluku a ehuhu ela ohuumiha sowiiwexexa sa atthu oohiroromela, weera ehoone waara wa masu ooreeraxa a ovuwa wa Kristu, mwa Yoowo ori mukhalelo wa Muluku." 
2Corinthians4:5 Vano, khanniilaleiya hiyo asineenaahu, mene ninnimulaleiya Yeesu Kristu weera ti Apwiya, vaheera hiyo nri ipotthasanyu niwoko na Yeesu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Muluku eenre “Mpiphini waare omwaleela,” Owo muneenaawe ohaara mmurimanimwahu weera onimwaleele waara wa osuwela wa ovuwa wa Muluku, onaara mukhoveni mwa Kristu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Nookhalanotho muhakhu owo nnyaapuni sa oloko, weera woonihere weera ikuru soopwahaxa sinrweela wa Muluku, khasihiyono wa hiyo." 
2Corinthians4:8 Ninnahooxiwa mwa soothesene, mene khaninswanyiwa, ninnattikinyiwa, mene khanimporora." 
2Corinthians4:9 Nri oottharatthariwa, mene khanihiiwe, ninnamaniwa, mene khanimphwatiwa." 
2Corinthians4:10 Hiyo ninnateexa mahuku ootheene mweerutthunimwahu okhwa wa Yeesu, weeratho okumi wa Yeesu wooniheriwe mweerutthunimwahu." 
2Corinthians4:11 Vano, hiyo nri ni okumi ninnavahereriwa mahuku ootheene wa okhwa niwoko na Yeesu, weeratho okumaawe wooniheriwe mweerutthunimwahu yookhwa," 
2Corinthians4:12 moota wooweera mwa hiyo omvara muteko okhwa, mene mwa nyuwo okumi." 
2Corinthians4:13 Yoolempwa*: “Koororomela, tivawo kuulummaaka.” Hiyotho ninroromela ni nroromelo nna, tivawo nnuulumaahu" 
2Corinthians4:14 niwoko noosuwela weera Owo omvenyererihale Yeesu mookhwaani, anaanivenyererihetho hiyo vamoha ni Yeesu ni anaanoonihere vamoha ni nyuwo." 
2Corinthians4:15 Sootheene iyo ti wa mpuhaanyu, weera mahala anaatava atthu ancipale ewere osariha otthapela wa ovuwa wa Muluku." 
2Corinthians4:16 Tivawo khanimporora. Naamwi omokoniwahu otepaka onanariheya, mpuwamwahu ninnakhalihiwa onyowani khula nihuku." 
2Corinthians4:17 Ohaawawahu wooveruwa ni woovireya onniruwerela hiyo ovuwa woottittimiheyaxa woopwaha wootheene iwo. 
2Corinthians4:18 Hiiho ningwehexexa, ohiya yeeyo enooneya, mene mwa yeeyo ehinooneya, niwoko yeeyo enooneya ti yoovira, ehinooneyatho yoohimala." 
2Corinthians5:1 Noosuwela weera yaphwatiwa empaahu yoovira ninkhalaahu vathi, nookhalano mpatta wa Muluku empa ekina yoohimala wiirimu, ehitekiwe ni matata a atthu." 
2Corinthians5:2 Tivawo nniipulela nihaawelaka owarihiwa ni empaahu ya wiirimu," 
2Corinthians5:3 niwoko niwarihiweene, khanimphwanyiwa pwitipwiti." 
2Corinthians5:4 Tivawo, nireene empeene yeela, nniipulela ni murima woolemeliwa, niwoko khanintthuna oruliwa, mene owarihiwa ni empeene yeeyo ya wiirimu, weera yeeyo eri yookhwa emiriwe ni okumi." 
2Corinthians5:5 Ti Muluku onirehererenle wa nthowa nna, anivahaka Munepa ntoko yoororomelihiwa ya yeeyo eneera ewe." 
2Corinthians5:6 Tivawo ninroromelaahu mahuku ootheene ni noosuwela weera, nireene mweerutthuni, nri ottaiwene wa Apwiya." 
2Corinthians5:7 Niwoko ninkhala munroromeloni, ohiya wa yeeyo nnoonaahu." 
2Corinthians5:8 Hiiho ninroromela, ni nintthunaxa okhala ottaiwene wa erutthu, nikhalaka ni Apwiya." 
2Corinthians5:9 Tivawo, hata nikhalaka mweerutthuni, hata ottaiwene wa yeeyo, nintthunaxa waasiveliha Apwiya." 
2Corinthians5:10 Vano nintthuneya weera ootheene hiyo niixoonihere ohoolo wa ehice yoothoriha ya Kristu, weera khula mutthu aakhele yeeyo emphwanenle niwoko na seiyo aavarelaawe muteko mweerutthunimwawe – hata sikhalaka sooreera, naari soonanara." 
2Corinthians5:11 Hiiho, woonaka weera noosuwela owoova Apwiya, nnaasa waaviriyela atthu. Yeeyo nraahu, yohooniheriwa ohoolo wa Muluku, ni noororomela weera eyo yohooniheriwatho mmirimanimwanyu." 
2Corinthians5:12 Khanneerera veeli noolaiherakani nyuwo. Mwa yeeyo nnoovahani ehuhu nyuwo munnivuwiha, weera muwere owaakhula yaawo aniivuwiha ni itthu sa omokoni, ehikhanle yeeyo eri mmurimani." 
2Corinthians5:13 Naari anaanepa, ti niwoko na omusivelawahu Muluku, ni naarino miruku sooreera, ti niwoko na woosivelaniwahu nyuwo." 
2Corinthians5:14 Vano osivela wa Muluku onninyesereriha, niwoko nooviriyeliwa weera mmoha okhwiiye wa ootheene, tivawo ootheene ahookhwa." 
2Corinthians5:15 Owo aakhwenle ootheene, weera yaawo ankhala ni okumi ehikhale wa asineenaaya, mene wa Yoole aakhwenle yaawo ni ovenyerenre." 
2Corinthians5:16 Okhuma vaanaano mpaka ohoolo, ahikhale nneeraahu nimuthorihe moota wa omutthu. Naamwi naamusuwenle Kristu moota ola khalayi, vano khannimusuwela hiiha." 
2Corinthians5:17 Tivawo, mukina akhala mwa Kristu, ti opattuxiwa onyowani. Itthu sa khalayi soovira; sinyowani sohoorwa." 
2Corinthians5:18 Soothesene iyo sinrweela wa Muluku, oniiraanyinghe ni Yoowo mwaneenaawe niwoko na Kristu ni oonivaha muteko wa wiiraana:" 
2Corinthians5:19 weera Muluku mwa Kristu iiraanyiha elapo ya vathi ni mwaneenaaweru, ahaalikelaka soottheka sa atthu. Owo aanivaherera hiyo masu a wiiraana." 
2Corinthians5:20 Tivawo nri anamitthenga a Kristu, ntoko waari weera Muluku onuuluma ni eyanowaahu. Niwoko na Kristu ninoodyoonttelelani nyuwo: mwiiraaneke ni Muluku." 
2Corinthians5:21 Niwoko na hiyo Muluku oomutatuxa yoottheka Yoowo ahaasuwenle yoottheka, weera mwa Yoowo hiyo nikhale oowaakheleliwa ni Muluku." 
2Corinthians6:1 Ntoko anamiteko a Muluku, hiyo ninniwoopererani weera muhaakhele siiyo mahala a Muluku." 
2Corinthians6:2 Niwoko Owo eenre: “Miyo kaawiiwelela weyo ehuhu yootthuneya, ni kaahookhavihera nihuku na ovuluxiwa.” Moone, ehuhu yootthuneya ti ela; vano ti nihuku na ovuluxiwa." 
2Corinthians6:3 Khanimukwattuliha akhalaru mutthu mwa yakhalaru etthu, weera mutekwaahu ohiramusiwe." 
2Corinthians6:4 Ohiyanawaya, ntoko arumeiyi a Muluku, hiyo ninniilaihera mwa soothesene: moovilelani otokotoko, mmakacamihoni, moohaawani, moothananani," 
2Corinthians6:5 moowaxuliwani, mootthukiwani, moovanyihanani atthu ancipale, mmitekoni sooviha, moohiyuni woohikona, ni mootthukani." 
2Corinthians6:6 Aani, ninniilaihera mootteelani, moosuwelani, moovilelani, mooreerani, mMunepani Wootteela, moosivelani wa ekhaikhai," 
2Corinthians6:7 mmasuni a ekhaikhai, mukuruni sa Muluku, ni ikapwitthi sa ekhaikhai sikhaleke sa owana, naari wiixaakiha," 
2Corinthians6:8 munttittimihoni ni mooveihiwani, ngwaapiwani ni mpilini, ntoko anamalokottha nireenetho a ekhaikhai," 
2Corinthians6:9 ntoko oohisuweliwa nireenetho oosuwanyeyaxa, ntoko akhwiiye nireenetho ni okumi, ntoko oottaruxiwa, mene nihikhwiiye," 
2Corinthians6:10 oothananihiwa, mene mahuku ootheene nihakalalaka, oohaawa, mene naapuhihaka ancipale, nihikhalanaka etthu, mene nikhalanaka sootheene." 
2Corinthians6:11 Nuulumme nnenesene ni nyuwo aKorinto, ni nohoohulelani murimaahu wootheene." 
2Corinthians6:12 Woosivelaniwahu nyuwo ori woohikota, mene onisivelawanyu hiyo ti wookota." 
2Corinthians6:13 Vano, munipwatthe hiyo ntoko noopwantthaahuni: munihuleletho murimaanyu. Kingwuulumelani ntoko anamwanaaka." 
2Corinthians6:14 Muhitthukeleliwe vamoha ni mukhwiinyu oohiroromela. Vano, wiiwananawaya heeni waakheliwa ni Muluku ni sootakhala? Hoye hoye wiiwanana heeni oraayano waara ni epiphi?" 
2Corinthians6:15 Wiiwanana heeni oraaweno Kristu ni Beliyali? Etthu heeni araayano oororomela ni oohiroromela? 
2Corinthians6:16 Wiiwanana heeni eraayano Empa ya Muluku ni sa miluku soolokottha? Vano hiyo nri Empa ya Muluku mukumi. Ntoko Muluku eenraawe: “Nkikhale vamoha ni yaawo, ni nkeette variyariwaya. Nkikhale Mulukwaaya, ni awosa eniikhale mulokwaaka.”" 
2Corinthians6:17 Tivawo: “muvenye wa yaawo ni mususeke,” aneera Apwiya. “Muhitave itthu soohitteela, ni Miyo nkiwaakheleni." 
2Corinthians6:18 Nkikhale Atithinyu, ni nyuwo mmwikhale anamwanaaka alopwana ni athiyana, aneera Apwiya a ikuru sootheene.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Oosiveleya, woonaka weera nookhalano soororomelihiwa iya, niirapihe mwa sootheene simvaliha erutthu ni munepa, nikwaniheraka ntteelihonahu niwoko na omoova Muluku." 
2Corinthians7:2 Munivahe nipuro mmurimanimwanyu. Khaawo nimpahunlaahu, khaawo nimunanarihalaahu, khaawo nimpuhenraahu." 
2Corinthians7:3 Nkinghima yeeyo weera koothoriheni. Kohooleelani weera muri mmurimanimwahu moota wooweera noolikana okhwa, hoye hoye okhala vamoha ni nyuwo." 
2Corinthians7:4 Kohoororomelani vancipale. Wiivuwihawahu mwaha wa nyuwo ti otokotoko. Kinniixoona olipihiwa vancipale murimaaka, ohakalalawaka woosareya mwa soohooxa sootheene." 
2Corinthians7:5 Vano, naaphiyalaahu oMasedoniya, khaniitthuuwale, mene naahaaxiwa ni moota wootheene, eyo tiiyo soohooxa sa omokoni, ni woova wa mpuwa." 
2Corinthians7:6 Wa soothesene, Muluku onaapepesa oomaniwa, aanipepesa ni ophiya wa Titu." 
2Corinthians7:7 Khoohiyono paahi ni ophiyawawe, menetho ni opepesa nyuwo mwaampepesaanyu yoowo. Owo aanithalihera sa wunkheliwawanyu ni miyo, othananawanyu ni okeeteteelawanyu, moota wooweera ohakalalawaka kohaandyeereriwa vancipale." 
2Corinthians7:8 Hata ekarattaaka yoothananihani, nkinrukunxa murima. Kaaroorukunxaru murima – niwoko kinoona weera ekarattaaka yohoothananihani, hata wa ehuhu vakhaani –" 
2Corinthians7:9 vano kinghakalala, khoohiyono niwoko nyuwo moothananihiwa, mene niwoko othananawanyu wohoorukunxani mirima. Vano, nyuwo moothanana ntoko Muluku aatthunaawe, tivawo nyuwo muhinanarihiwaanyu ni hiyo hata vakhaani." 
2Corinthians7:10 Othanana ntoko otthuna wa Muluku onruwera orukunxa murima onkeliha moovuluwani, ni othanana iwo woovira, mene othanana wa elapo ya vathi onruwera okhwa." 
2Corinthians7:11 Moone othanana wu ntoko otthuna wa Muluku onruweraaya mwa nyuwo: nthiti heeni, ohaawela heeni okhala oohikhala ni milattu, onyoonyiwa heeni, woova heeni, munkhela heeni, weeteteya heeni, olipiha murima heeni woomuttaruxa yoowo ori ni nthowa! Mwa sootheene nyuwo mohoonihera weera khamunono milattu mwaha wa yeeyo." 
2Corinthians7:12 Hiiho nkoolepenleni niwoko na yoowo opanke yoonanara, hata niwoko na yoowo onanaringhe, mene weera ohoolo wa Muluku nyuwo muwere woona asineenaanyu moota heeni munikhalenlaanyu nthiti." 
2Corinthians7:13 Noohakalalihiwa niwoko na sootheene iya. Ohiya olipihiwa murima, noohakalalaxa womoona Titu, ahakalalaka niwoko munepaawe wiitthuuwihiwe ni nyuwo ootheene." 
2Corinthians7:14 Miyo kaamuleela weera kiniivuwiha mwaha wa nyuwo, ni nkuuliwe muru. Ntoko sootheene nooleenlaahuni saaraaya sa ekhaikhai, ovuwa nraahuno mwaha wa nyuwo ohoolo wa Titu wohooniheratho ekhaikhai." 
2Corinthians7:15 Vano, woosivelaniwawe ori wootepaxa, uupuwelaka weera nyuwo ootheene mwaari oowiiwelela, mmwaakhelaka ni woova ni othukumela." 
2Corinthians7:16 Kinoohakalala niwoko kinoowera woororomelani mwa soothesene. 
2Corinthians8:1 Axunnaka, nintthuna weera musuwele wa mahala Muluku ovanghaawe ikerexa sa oMasedoniya." 
2Corinthians8:2 Mwa soohooxa sitokotoko, ohakalalawaya otokotoko ni ohaawaxawaya wookhumiha ovaha woowaattaxa." 
2Corinthians8:3 Vano, kinkhalela onamoona weera yaavaha sootheene yaaweraaya, ni mpakatho yahaaweraaya. Wa otthunawaya asineenaaya," 
2Corinthians8:4 awo yaanidyoonttelela, eninyesereraka weera ekhale vamoha mmutekoni owo woowaakhavihera ootteela." 
2Corinthians8:5 Ni khayaapanke paahi yeeyo naaweherenraahu, mene yaahiixinnyerera toko wa Apwiya, ni vahoolowaya wa hiyotho ntoko Muluku ontthunaawe." 
2Corinthians8:6 Hiiho, woonaka weera Titu aapacera, naamulaihera weera akwanihere muteko ola wa mahala variyariwanyu." 
2Corinthians8:7 Hiiho ntoko nyuwo munaattano mwa soothesene: mwa nroromelo, mwa masu, mwa osuwela, mwa nthiti nookwanela, ni mwa onisivelawanyu, hiihotho mwaatteno mwa muteko ola wa ovaha." 
2Corinthians8:8 Miyo nkinoolamulani, mene kintthuna owehexexa ekhaikhai ya osivelawanyu, kilikanxaka iwo ni nthiti na akina." 
2Corinthians8:9 Nyuwo moosuwela mahala a Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu, weera arookhalaru oopuha, yaahiipaka oohaawa weera, niwoko na ohaawawaya, nyuwo muthatuwe oopuha." 
2Corinthians8:10 Wu ti olakawaka mwaha wa yeeyo eri wa mpuhaanyu. Okhuma mwaisana nyuwo mwaari oopacera, ohikhanle paahi ovaha musurukhu, menetho ohaawela opaka yeeyo." 
2Corinthians8:11 Vano, mmaliheke muteko ola, weera otthunawanyu otokotoko opaka yeeyo olikanxiwe ni nthiti noomaliha ntoko yeeyo muraanyuno." 
2Corinthians8:12 Wakhala otthuna, ovaha ti woowaakheleya ntoko yeeyo mutthu orinaawe, ehikhanle ntoko yeeyo ohikhalannaawe." 
2Corinthians8:13 Otthunawahu khoohiyono weera akina epuhe vaheera nyuwo muhaawe, mene weera olikane." 
2Corinthians8:14 Wa ehuhu ela, waattawanyu onuukhavihere sohaawasaya, weera ehuhu ekina waattawaya okhavihere sohaawasanyu. Vano, onuukhale woolikana," 
2Corinthians8:15 ntoko elempwalaaya: “yoole ohemphe vancipale khaarino yoowaattaxa, ni yoole ohemphe vakhaani khaathoiwe.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Kinimutthapela Muluku, ohenle mmurimani mwa Titu opwatthawene weiwo miyo kookhalenlaakani nyuwo." 
2Corinthians8:17 Titu khaakhelenle paahi nivekelonahu, mene aalakela ni otthunawawe ni munthitini ntokotoko orowa mpaka wa nyuwo." 
2Corinthians8:18 Vamoha ni yoowo nnimuruma munna owo olaiheriwe ni ikerexa sootheene niwoko na muteko wa masu ooreeraxa. 
2Corinthians8:19 Kheehiyono paahi yeeyo, mene owo oothanliwatho ni ikerexa weera anihoole naarowaka ovara muteko ola wa ikharari, nimpakaahu weera naavuwihe Apwiya aneenaaya ni weera niwoonihere otthunawahu okhavihera." 
2Corinthians8:20 Nintthuna nisembe weera ahinoothere akhalaru mutthu mwaha wa mavarelowaahu miteko samahala sitokotoko iya. 
2Corinthians8:21 Vano, ninniipasoopa woopaka yeeyo eri yooreera, khoohiyono paahi ohoolo wa Apwiya, menetho ohoolo wa atthu." 
2Corinthians8:22 Ohiya toko yeeyo, ninoomuruma ni yaawo munnihu, yoowo imaara sincipale ni wa mikhalelo sincipale oonoonihera weera ori ni nthiti, ni vano nootepaxa niwoko na woororomelani otokotoko owo oraaweno." 
2Corinthians8:23 Vano, wa Titu, owo mukhwaaka, ni omvara muteko vamoha ni miyo. Wa axunnihu, awo ari arummwa a ikerexa ni nttittimiho wa Kristu." 
2Corinthians8:24 Tivawo, ohoolo wa ikerexa, ngwoonihere axunna awo osivelawanyu woowooneya ni nthowa na ovuwa nraahuno." 
2Corinthians9:1 Khoontthuneya miyo woolepelani mwaha wa ekhavihero ela wa ootteela. 
2Corinthians9:2 Koosuwela otthunawanyu okhavihera, ni kohiivuwiha vamaithoni wa aMasedoniya niwoko na nyuwo. Kaahaaleela weera, okhuma mwaisana, nyuwo a wAkhaiya moolikana okhavihera, ni nthitinanyu noowaalipiha ancipale." 
2Corinthians9:3 Wa soothesene, kinaarumiha axunna weera ovuwawahu nraahuno wa nyuwo mwaha wa yeeyo, ohikhale wa siiyo, mene weera nyuwo mukhale oolikana, ntoko miyo kaaleenlaaka weera mweeraanyu mukhale." 
2Corinthians9:4 Miyo kimpaka yeeyo weera aMasedoniya akina yarowa ni miyo, ni awo yoophwanyani muhilikanne, hiyo woohiyani toko nyuwo – nihuuliwe muru wa nroromelo nne naarinaahu." 
2Corinthians9:5 Hiiho kohoona weera ontthuneya waavekela axunna weera yooxekureni ehinaaye, ni emalihe sooreherera sa soovaha nyuwo mwaaroromelinghaanyu. Vano, iyo nsikhale soolikana, ntoko mahala a murima ehikhanle onyesereriwa." 
2Corinthians9:6 Muupuwelele: Yoole onaala vakhaani, anaahephetho vakhaani, ni yoole onaala yoowaatta, anaahephetho yoowaatta." 
2Corinthians9:7 Khula mutthu avahe ntoko olakenlaawe mmurimanimwawe, ahivahe ni ohovela, naari onyesereriwa, niwoko Muluku onimusivela yoowo omvaha ni ohakalala." 
2Corinthians9:8 Vano, Muluku ongwera owaandyeererani mahala ootheene, weera mwa itthu sootheene ni mwa ehuhu yootheene, mukhalanaka sootthuneya sootheene, nyuwo mukhale oowaatta mmutekoni wooreera wootheene." 
2Corinthians9:9 Ntoko elempwalaaya: “Owo aahaakawela sooreelasawe atthu oohaawa; ororomeleyawawe okhale mahuku ootheene.” 
2Corinthians9:10 Yoole onimvaha mmiso yoowo onaala ni yooca wa yoowo onca, Owo anoovaheeni ni anaandyeerere mmiso, ni anunnuwihe soowiima sa waakhuleliwawanyu ni Muluku." 
2Corinthians9:11 Nyuwo mmwipuhihiwe moota wootheene weera mvahe ni murima wootheene mwa ehuhu yootheene, ni niwoko na hiyo ovahawanyu onuuphiyere omttottopela Muluku." 
2Corinthians9:12 Muteko wa Muluku ola nyuwo mumvaraanyu, khoonkhavihera paahi soohaawela sa ootteela, menetho ti nthowa na omttottopela vancipale Muluku." 
2Corinthians9:13 Niwoko na wooneya muteko ola, akina eniimvuwihe Muluku mwaha wa wiiwelela munlapaanyu mwaha wa masu ooreeraxa, ni niwoko na ekhaviherowaanyu etokotoko mwaavahaka yaawo ni akina ootheene." 
2Corinthians9:14 Ni yoovekelelakani, awo eniyoosivelaxeni niwoko na mahala matokotoko Muluku oovanghaaweni." 
2Corinthians9:15 Atthapeliwe Muluku niwoko na mahalaawe ootikhiniheya! 
2Corinthians10:1 Akina aneera weera, miyo kireene ni nyuwo, ‘kinkhala oowiiyeviha,’ mene kireene ottaiwene, ‘kinnoolipiherani.’ Vano, niwoko na murima woomaaleleya ni murima wooreera wa Kristu, miyo, Pawulo, kinoovekelani etthu." 
2Corinthians10:2 Kinoodyoonttelelani weera, kireene vamoha ni nyuwo, khawaatthuneya miyo waahiiha akina anuupuwela weera hiyo nimpwaherera ntoko ekhalelo ya omutthu." 
2Corinthians10:3 Naamwi nikhalaka ntoko atthu, khaningwana mweekhaleloni ya omutthu." 
2Corinthians10:4 Wa ikapwitthi hiyo ningwananaahu, khasihiyono sa omutthu, ohiyanawaya, siri sa ikuru mwa Muluku weera siphwate mmapuroni oolipaxa a amwiittana." 
2Corinthians10:5 Nimphwata owana ni masu, ni wiixoona wootheene oniikhumelelihera osuwela wa Muluku. Hiyo nimvara soowuupuwela sootheene weera sithatuwe soomwiiwelela Kristu." 
2Corinthians10:6 Hiyo nnikhale oolikaneene ottaruxa mukhalelo wa ohiiwelela wootheene, omwiiwelelawanyu Kristu waakwaniheriwaka." 
2Corinthians10:7 Nyuwo mungwehexexa omokoni wa itthu paahi. Akhala mukina oviriyeliwe weera ori a Kristu, ontthuneya weera owo asuweletho mwaneenaawe weera hiyo nri a Kristu, hiiho ntoko yoowo." 
2Corinthians10:8 Vano, hata miyo kiivuwihaka vakhaani niwoko na ikuru Apwiya anivanghaaya weera noopuhiheni ohikhanle woophwatani, nkirwa kuulihiwa muru." 
2Corinthians10:9 Nkintthuna weera kikhale ntoko kineerera owoopopihani ni ikarattasaka. 
2Corinthians10:10 Vano akina aneera: “Ikarattasawe siri soolipa ni soowali, mene ekhalelo ya erutthwaawe kheemvolowa mmurimani mwa atthu, ni maswaawe ari a siiyo.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Esuwele nnenesene atthweene yaawo weera yeeyo nilempaahu mwa ikaratta nireene ottaiwene, nnikhaletho mmitekonimwahu nireene vamoha ni nyuwo." 
2Corinthians10:12 Khaningwera wiilikanxa, naari wiiphwanaphwaniha ni akina aniilaihera asineenaaya. Awo yiiphimaka ni yiilikanxaka asineenaaya, ampaka yeeyo ehisuwelaka etthu." 
2Corinthians10:13 Wa soothesene, hiyo khaniivuwiha woopwaha mwiinano wootthuneya, mene nnikotihe ovuwawahu mmwiinanoni wa muteko Muluku onivaherenraawe, mwa yoowo oniwoophiyereni mpaka nyuwo." 
2Corinthians10:14 Khanintupha mwiinaano wa ovuwawahu, ntoko weeraaya okhaleke hiyo nahoophiyenreni mpaka nyuwo, niwoko vekhaikhai nohoophiyerani nyuwo ni masu ooreeraxa." 
2Corinthians10:15 Mooteene yoowo, khanintupha mwiinanowaahu niivuwihaka mwa miteko akina apankaaya. Ororomelawahu ti wu: munnuwaka munroromeloni, mitekosahu nsithanuwe variyariwanyu," 
2Corinthians10:16 weera nilaleiye masu ooreeraxa wa ilapo siri wiithelawanyu, niwoko khanintthuna wiivuwiha wa muteko ovariwe mweelaponi sa mukina." 
2Corinthians10:17 Wa soothesene, “yoowo omvuwa, amvuwihe Muluku,”" 
2Corinthians10:18 niwoko khanaakhuleliwa yoowo oniilaihera muneenaawe, mene yoowo Apwiya animlangheraaya." 
2Corinthians11:1 Koororomela weera nyuwo mmukivilele vakhaani, hata miyo mukoonaka ntoko naanepa. Vekhaikhai munookivilela!" 
2Corinthians11:2 Nthiti kookhalenlaakani, ti nthiti ninrweela wa Muluku. Miyo kohootthomerihani nyuwo wa mulopwana mmoharu ori Kristu, kitthunaka owooniherani wa Yoowo ntoko ootthomeriwa ootteelaxa." 
2Corinthians11:3 Yeeyo miyo kinoovaaka ti ela: ntoko enowa yaamulokontthaaya Eva ni mirukusaya soonanara, nkintthuna weera soowuupuwelasanyu sihapuxiwe mwa nthitinanyu wa Kristu na ekhaikhai ni nootteela." 
2Corinthians11:4 Vano, akhala mukina onoolaleerani Yeesu mukina, ahikhanle Yoowo nnimulaleiyaahu, hoye hoye mwaakhelela munepa mukina, ohikhanle Yoowo mwaakhenlaanyu, naari masu ooreeraxa makina, ehikhanle mwaakhulenlaanyu, nyuwo munoovilela yeeyo wookhweyaxa." 
2Corinthians11:5 Wa soothesene, nkinroromela okhala mwaamukhaani a arummwa yaala oottittimiheyaxa." 
2Corinthians11:6 Apaale miyo nkinuuluma masu nnenesene, wa soothesene nkihiyono oohilipa moosuwelani. Mwa yeeyo, noowooniherani yeeyo mwa itthu sootheene." 
2Corinthians11:7 Weeraka yookhala etthu kitthenkaaka, miyo kiiyevihaka weera koottukhuleni, koolaleerakani ya mahala masu ooreeraxa wa Muluku?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Kohiiyera ikerexa sikina, kaakhelaka mwa seiyo ekhavihero weera koorumeeleni." 
2Corinthians11:9 Kaaraaka variyariwanyu kihaawelaka etthu, khaawo kaamulemenlaaka, niwoko axunna yaawiiyaaya ekhumaka oMasedoniya yaakivaha yeeyo kaahaawelaaka. Kaapaka yeeyo weera kihoolemeleni nyuwo, ni nkipwaherere moota ola." 
2Corinthians11:10 Hiihotho, ntoko ekhaikhai ya Kristu eraaya mwa miyo, khaawo a elapo ya wAkhaya anaawere okiiyera ovuwa wu." 
2Corinthians11:11 Niwoko heeni? Niwoko miyo nkinoosivelani? Muluku oosuwela weera kinnoosivelani! 
2Corinthians11:12 Vano, nkipwaherere opaka yeeyo kimpakaaka, weera kiwiiyere ehuhu yaale anghaawela wiitthaniwa woolikana hiyo mwa itthu aniivuwiheraaya." 
2Corinthians11:13 Atthweene yaawo ari arummwa oowootha, anamiteko oolokottha, yiixeeraka ntoko arummwa a Kristu." 
2Corinthians11:14 Ni kheehiyono yootikhiniha, niwoko Satana muneenaawe oniixeera ntoko ndyelo a waara." 
2Corinthians11:15 Tivawo, kheehiyono etthu yootikhiniheya arumeiyaawe yiixeeraka weera ari arumeiyi a ekhaikhai. Ommaleloniwaya onuukhale yeeyo mitekosaya simphwanelaaya." 
2Corinthians11:16 Kineera emaara yanaaveeli: ahikhale mutthu onuupuwela weera miyo kiri naanepa. Mene muupuwelaka hiiho, mukaakhelele ntoko muneeraanyu mmwaakhelele naanepa, weera miyo kiivuwihetho vakhaani." 
2Corinthians11:17 Wiivuwiha wu kineeraka kihime, nkirwa kihima ya mpatta wa Apwiya, mene ntoko naanepa." 
2Corinthians11:18 Woonaka weera ancipale aniivuwiha moota wa omutthu, miyotho nkiivuwihe." 
2Corinthians11:19 Nyuwo mureene atthu oosuwelaxa, munaavilela ni ohakalala anaanepa!" 
2Corinthians11:20 Mwa yeeyo, nyuwo munaavilela mpaka yaawo anoopakani ipottha, hoye hoye yaawo anoopuherani, naari yaawo angwiiyerani, naari yaawo aniixoona wa nyuwo, hoye hoye anoomanani owiitho." 
2Corinthians11:21 Wuuliwawaka muru kinaakhulela weera naari ookhulumuwaxa wa yeeyo! Mwa yeeyo akina ootheene antthunaaya wiivuwihera, miyo kinootthunatho. Kinuuluma ntoko naanepa!" 
2Corinthians11:22 Awo ari aHeberi? Miyotho! Ari aYixrayeli? Miyotho! Ari anamwane a Abrahaamu? Miyotho! 
2Corinthians11:23 Yakhala arumeiyi a Kristu (miyo kinuulumaxa ntoko naanepa!), miyo kohaapwahaxa! Miyo kootepa ovaraxa muteko, koowalelaxiwa mukaliposo imaara sincipale, kootepaxa owaxuliwa ni ekwamba, ni imaara sincipale kaari ngwoopihani wa okhwa." 
2Corinthians11:24 Imaara ithanu koowaxuliwa ni aYuda, kimaniwaka ikwaha imaara miloko miraru niithanniixexe ni ekwamba." 
2Corinthians11:25 Koowaxuliwa ni ekopo imaara tthaaru, koovonyiwa maluku emaara emoha, imaara tthaaru nikula miyo kaawenlaaka naattatta mphareiyani, kaavira othana omoha ni ohiyu omoha mphareiyani moowiixa." 
2Corinthians11:26 Kaapwaherera keettaka mipatta sincipale, kihaawaka soowoopiha sa mmoolokoni, sa anamwiiya, sa mulokwaaka, sa amalapo, musidadeni, munikareni, mphareiyani ni sa axunna oolokottha." 
2Corinthians11:27 Kannavara miteko soovihaxa, imaara sincipale woohikona, kannavoliwa etala ni ntthona, imaara sincipale nkaakhalanne sooca, kannavilela oriira ni pwitipwiti." 
2Corinthians11:28 Ohiya toko iyo, khula nihuku kinnateexa olemela wooweeteteela ikerexa soothesene." 
2Corinthians11:29 Taani omvoreiwa, miyotho kihivoreiwaka? Taani onttheka, miyotho kihihaawaka?" 
2Corinthians11:30 Waatthuneyaka wiivuwiha, okhaleke niwoko na itthu sinoonihera ohilipawaka." 
2Corinthians11:31 Muluku ni Atiithi a Apwiya Yeesu ori ooreelihiwa mahuku ootheene, onsuwela weera nkinootha." 
2Corinthians11:32 oDamasku, guvernadori aathanliwe ni mwene Areta aahaarumiha weera atthu ewehawehe esidade weera kivariwe." 
2Corinthians11:33 Kaakuruxeliwatho munttaangani vaxanelani ya exiri, ni kaahoopowa mmatatanimwaya." 
2Corinthians12:1 Ontthuneya weera miyo kipwaherereke wiivuwiha, hata kihiwinaka etthu ni seiyo. Kinoopwaherera ni nyoonelo ni soothupulula sa Apwiya." 
2Corinthians12:2 Koomusuwela mutthu mmoha mwa Kristu, wa iyaakha muloko niixexe aacopholiwe wa wiirimu wanaararu. Nkisuwenle aari mweerutthuni, naari mmunepani – Muluku onsuwela." 
2Corinthians12:3 Koosuwela weera mulopwana ole – hata mweerutthuni, hata mmunepani, nkisuwenle, mene Muluku onsuwela," 
2Corinthians12:4 aacopholiwe wa oparadiso*, ni aahiiwa itthu sootikhiniheyaxa moota wooweera khaawo ontthuniheriwa othaliha." 
2Corinthians12:5 Mwa mulopwana owo nkiivuwihe, ohikhanle mwa miyo muneenaaka, sihikhanle mwa soohilipasaka." 
2Corinthians12:6 Hata miyo kaatthuna wiivuwiha, nkaarwa kikhala naanepa, niwoko kaarwa wuuluma ekhaikhai. Kinsemba opaka yeeyo weera ahikhale mutthu aneera uupuwele mwaha wa miyo oopwahaxa yeeyo owo onkoona ni onkiiwa." 
2Corinthians12:7 Koovahiwa mwiiwa mweerutthunimwaka, aani murummwa a Satana, weera okihasule, nitho okooceelihe wiivuwihaxa niwoko na wunnuwa wa soothupulula iye." 
2Corinthians12:8 Kaahaadyoonttelela Apwiya imaara tthaaru weera ekivenxe mwiiwa ole," 
2Corinthians12:9 mene Awo yannakeerela: “Mahalaaka anookwanelani, niwoko ikurusaka sookwaniheriwa mwa ohilipawanyu. Tivawo nkiivuwihe ni ohakalalaxa mwa ohilipawaka, weera ikuru sa Kristu sikhale mwa miyo." 
2Corinthians12:10 Tivawo, niwoko na osivela wa Kristu, kinghakalalela moohilipanimwaka, mooruwaniwani, moohaawani, moottharatthariwani, ngweeteteyani, niwoko kaahilipaka, miyo koolipa." 
2Corinthians12:11 Kaari ntoko naanepa, mene nyuwo mwaakinnyesereriha yeeyo. Waatthuneya miyo olangheriwa ni nyuwo, keenre kihikhalaka ooyevaxa wa arummwa “oottittimiheyaxa,” naamwi kihikhalaka etthu." 
2Corinthians12:12 Ineneero sa arummwa – ineneero, sootikhiniha ni soowera – saahooniheriwa variyariwanyu ni ovilela otokotoko." 
2Corinthians12:13 Moota heeni nyuwo mwaaraanyu ooyevaxa wa ikerexa sikina, ohikhanle mwa yeeyo weera miyo kahaatonkwaaka woolemelani? Mukilevelele wa yoohiloka eyo!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Vano, koolikana weera kooxekureni emaara yanaararu, ni nkirwa koolemelani, niwoko nkintthuna sooreelasanyu, mene nyuwo asineenaanyu. Ohiya toko yeeyo, khoontthuneya weera anamwane ethukumanyihe sooreela wa asinaangolo, mene asinaangolo wa anamwane." 
2Corinthians12:15 Hiiho, niwoko na otthunawaka, nkileve sootheene kiraakano nitho nkiileve miyo muneenaaka. Woonaka weera kinoosivelaxani, nkisiveleiye vakhaani ni nyuwo?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Khamwaha, nkinatoko woolemelani. Vano, kireene oocendyera, kohoopharihani munraakhoni!" 
2Corinthians12:17 Apaale miyo koowootothani mwaha wa mukina wa yaawo miyo koorumihenlaakani? 
2Corinthians12:18 Kaamulaihera Titu weera ooxekureni ni kaamuruma munna vamoha ni yoowo. Apaale Titu oowootothani? Khaneettenle hiyo mmunepani mmoharu ni mphironi emoharu? 
2Corinthians12:19 Nyuwo munuupuwela weera ehuhu yootheene ela hiyo nniixaakiha ohoolowanyu? Ninuuluma ntoko atthu ari mwa Kristu vamaithoni wa Muluku, ni sootheene nimpakaahu, ti weera noolipihereni." 
2Corinthians12:20 Vano, kinoova weera kooxekurakani, kihoophwanyeni ntoko kinroromelaaka, ni muhikiphwanye ntoko munroromelaanyu. Kinoova weera nkiphwanye variyariwanyu waakhulana, nrima, woonihera wa isara, ohiiwanana, waapa, wootherana, wiixoona, ni onyakulihana." 
2Corinthians12:21 Kinoovatho weera kooxekurakani veeli, Mulukwaaka anaakiyevihe ohoolowanyu, ni nkikhupanye niwoko na ancipale yaatthenke khalayi ni ahirukunxale mirimasaya wa ohitteela, oraruwa, ni ohuureya yaapankaaya." 
2Corinthians13:1 Ela eniikhale emaara yanaararu kineeraaka kooxekureni. “Milattu sootheene ontthuneya weera sikhaviheriweke ni anamoona eeli, naari araru.”" 
2Corinthians13:2 Miyo kaawoopererani kaaraaka ni nyuwo emaara yanaaveeli. Vano, kihikhanlewo, kinaalepela yaawo yaatthenke khalayi ni wa akina ootheene: kaahokolowaka, nkiwuurela," 
2Corinthians13:3 woonaka weera nyuwo munaasa woonihera weera Kristu onuuluma mwa miyo. Owo khahiyono oohilipa ooreherakani, mene a ikuruxa variyariwanyu." 
2Corinthians13:4 Vekhaikhai, aathomeiwa moohilipani, mene onkhala ni ikuru sa Muluku. Mooteene yoowo, nri oohilipa mwa Yoowo, mene ni ikuru sa Muluku nnikhale ni Yoowo, noorehererelakani nyuwo." 
2Corinthians13:5 Mmwiwehawehe nnenesene weera moone nyuwo mwaari munroromeloni. Mooneke asineenaanyu! Khamusuwenle weera Kristu Yeesu ori mwa nyuwo, ohikhanle weera apaale khamwaakhuleliwe?" 
2Corinthians13:6 Koororomela weera moosuwela weera hiyo ti oowaakhuleleya. 
2Corinthians13:7 Vano, nnimvekela Muluku weera nyuwo muhipake etthu yoonanara. Khoohiyono weera akina yoone weera hiyo nohaakheleliwa, mene weera nyuwo mpake yeeyo eri yooreera, naamwi okhalaka ntoko hiyo nohooceela." 
2Corinthians13:8 Vano khaningwera ovaanya ekhaikhai, mene waakhulela yeeyo paahi." 
2Corinthians13:9 Ninnahakalala imaara sootheene nihinlipaahu ni nyuwo munlipaanyu. Nivekelonahu ti weera nyuwo mukhale ookwanelihiwa. 
2Corinthians13:10 Tivawo kinlepaaka itthu iya kihikhanlewo weera, miyo kaarwaaka, khoontthuneya woohiihani, kivarelaka muteko ikuru Apwiya akivanghaaya. Aakivaha ikuru iya weera koopuhiheni, ohikhanle woophwatani." 
2Corinthians13:11 Kihipwahereraka axunna, miyo kinoolaxerani. Mwaase wiikwanihera, ni mwiiwe nivekelonaka. Muupuweleke etthu emoharu, mukhaleke ni murettele. Ni Muluku a osivela ni a murettele anaakhale ni nyuwo." 
2Corinthians13:12 Muulumihaneke ni ebeecu yootteela. 
2Corinthians13:13 Ootteela ootheene anoovahani isalaama. 
2Corinthians13:14 Mahala a Apwiya Yeesu Kristu, osivela wa Muluku, ni wiiwanana wa Munepa Wootteela okhale ni nyuwo ootheene." 
Galatians1:1 Ya Pawulo, murummwa ahirumihiwe ni alopwana, naari mutthu mmoha, mene aani, ni Yeesu Kristu ni Muluku Atithi, amvenyererihale Yeesu mookhwaani." 
Galatians1:2 Ni ya axunna ootheene ari ni miyo. Wa ikerexa sa elapo ya oGalata: 
Galatians1:3 Wa nyuwo mahala ni murettele onrweela wa Muluku Atithihu ni Apwiya Yeesu Kristu," 
Galatians1:4 yinnyerenre okumaaya wa sootthekasahu weera enoopole hiyo wa ehuhu ela yoonanara. Yaapaka yeeyo niwoko na otthuna wa Muluku Atithihu. 
Galatians1:5 Wa Yoowo okhale ovuwa woohimala. Ame*. 
Galatians1:6 Kiniitikhina weera nyuwo munimuhiya woowaakuveya Yoole aawiitthanneni ni mahala a Kristu weera mutthare masu makina. 
Galatians1:7 Vekhaikhai masu ale khaahiyono masu ooreeraxa. Kinoona ntoko aakhala atthu akina anookacamihani etthunaka opiritula masu ooreeraxa a Kristu. 
Galatians1:8 Hata hiyo, hata ndyelo a wiirimu alaleiya masu oovirikana wa masu ooreeraxa hiyo nnoolaleeraahuni, akhale oolamphwa!" 
Galatians1:9 Ntoko hiyo neenraahu, miyo kinoophitela: akhala mukina onooleelani masu makina oovirikana mwaakhenlaanyu, akhale oolamphwa!" 
Galatians1:10 Apaale miyo kinaasaasa waakhuleliwa wa atthu, naari wa Muluku? Hoye hoye miyo kineerera waasiveliha atthu? Kaasaasa waasiveliha atthu, nkaakhala murumeiyi a Kristu." 
Galatians1:11 Axunnaka, kintthuna weera nyuwo musuwele weera masu ooreeraxa miyo kooleenlaakani, khaahiyono a omutthu." 
Galatians1:12 Miyo nkaakhenle masu ooreeraxa wa mutthu mukina, naari nkihusihiwe ni atthu. Wa soothesene, kaakhenle yaawo wa Yeesu Kristu moothupululani." 
Galatians1:13 Nyuwo mohiiwa sa mweettelowaaka, miyo kaaraaka mudiinini ya aYuda, ni moota kaattharattharaxaaka ekerexa ya Muluku kaasaasaka ophwata yeeyo." 
Galatians1:14 Kaaraaka mudiinini ya aYuda, kaapwaha nthiti na aYuda akina ancipale yaari akhwaaka. Vekhaikhai, nthitinaka wa ikhovelelo sa makholowaaka naari ntokotoko." 
Galatians1:15 Waamusivenlaaya Muluku okimwalanyinghe okhuma mweerutthuni ya amayaka ni okiitthanne ni mahalaawe, weera" 
Galatians1:16 akoonihere Mwanawe mwa miyo weera kaalaleere Yeesu amalapo, miyo nkaavekenle olaka wa mutthu." 
Galatians1:17 Nkaarongwetho oYerusaleemu weera kawoone yaawo yaari arummwa kihinaaye miyo. Vano miyo kaapwaha kirowaka wArabiya, kihokolowaka emaara ekina wa oDamasku." 
Galatians1:18 Simalakaru iyaakha tthaaru, kaarowa oYerusaleemu weera kamusuwele Pedru muneenaawe. Miyo kaari ni yoowo mahuku muloko ni mathanu." 
Galatians1:19 Nkaawoonalewo arummwa akina, ahikhanle Yakobe, munnaya Apwiya." 
Galatians1:20 Seiyo miyo kinoolepelaakani khasihiyono soowootha vamaithoni wa Muluku. 
Galatians1:21 Vahoolowaya kaarowa wa ilapo sa oSiriya ni oSilisiya. 
Galatians1:22 Ikerexa sa Kristu sa oYudeiya khasaakisuwenle miyo muneenaaka. 
Galatians1:23 Atthweene yaawo yiiwa paahi yeeriwaka: “Yoole aanittharatthara khalayeene, vaanaano onlaleiya nroromelo aatthunaawe ophwata.”" 
Galatians1:24 Tivawo yaamvuwiha Muluku niwoko na miyo. 
Galatians2:1 Saaviralaaya iyaakha muloko niixexe, kaarowatho oYerusaleemu. Mukwaheene yoole aakihoola Barnaba ni kaamukuxatho Titu." 
Galatians2:2 Miyo kaarowa niwoko na othupululeliwa, ni kaahaaleela vamaithoniwaya masu ooreeraxa kinaalaleeraaka amalapo. Kaapaka yeeyo wa asitokweene meekhaayaru weera kisuwele miyo kihitthimake, naari kinootthimaka siiyo." 
Galatians2:3 Awotho khayaamunyesereringhe Titu aaraawe ni miyo weera iineliwe, aarookhalaru muGrego." 
Galatians2:4 Mwaheene yoola okhumelenle, niwoko axunna akina oowootha yaavolowa variyariwahu weera yoone woopoliwawahu nikhalannaahu mwa Kristu, weera eniphuretho hiyo mookaporoni." 
Galatians2:5 Khaniwiiwelenle yaawo hata vakhaani weera ekhaikhai ya masu ooreeraxa ekhale ni nyuwo. 
Galatians2:6 Wa yaale yooniwa ntoko asitokweene – moota yaattharaaya khalayi, miyo nkimpwattha, niwoko Muluku khanthoriha omokoni wa mutthu – asitokweeneene yaawo khayaakaandyeereringhe etthu." 
Galatians2:7 Ohiyanawaya awo yaahaakhulela weera miyo koovahereriwa muteko woowaalaleera masu ooreeraxa amalapo, ntoko Pedru ovahereriwaawe muteko woowaalaleera masu ooreeraxa aYuda." 
Galatians2:8 Vano, Muluku aamulipihenraawe Pedru weera akhale murummwa wa atthu oowiineliwa, aakilipiheratho weera kikhale murummwa wa atthu oohiineliwa." 
Galatians2:9 Yakobe, Pedru ni Yohaane, yaasuweliwe ntoko amarimbu a ekerexa, yaakookolela moono mulopwana miyo ni Barnaba ntoko eneneero ya wiiwanana. Yaapakenle yeeyo niwoko yaahaakhulela mahala Muluku okivanghaawe. Awo yaahiiwanana weera ontthuneya hiyo nirowe wa amalapo ni awo wa atthu oowiineliwa." 
Galatians2:10 Awo yaanivekela paahi weera niwuupuwelele oohaawa, seiyo kaatthunaaka ni murima wootheene." 
Galatians2:11 Awaaka Pedru wAntiyokhiya, kaamooperera ekhove ni ekhove, niwoko aaphwanela yeeyo." 
Galatians2:12 Vano, ehinaaye ophiya akina wa Yakobe, owo aaca ni atthu oohikhala aYuda. Yaaphiyalaaya, aasusa ni aamwalamwala ni atthu oohikhala aYuda, awoovaka atthu oowiineliwa." 
Galatians2:13 aYuda akina yamuthukumanela yoowo munlokotthoni, moota wooweera mpaka Barnaba aakuxiwa ni olokotthawaya." 
Galatians2:14 Koonaka weera awo khayeentte ntoko ekhaikhai ya masu ooreeraxa, kaamooperera Pedru variyari wa atthu ootheene: “Nyuwo muYuda, vano khamunkhala ntoko muYuda, mene ntoko oohikhala aYuda. Tivawo, ongwereya hai waanyeserera atthu oohikhala aYuda otthara ekhalelo ya aYuda?”" 
Galatians2:15 Hiyo nri aYuda mooyariwani ni khanihiyono amalapo, anamattheka," 
Galatians2:16 noosuwela weera mutthu khanaakhuleliwa ni Muluku niwoko na miteko sa nlamulo, mene ni nroromelo mwa Yeesu Kristu. Hiihaawo hiyotho noororomela mwa Kristu Yeesu weera nikhale oowaakhuleliwa ni Muluku niwoko na nroromelonahu mwa Kristu. Khanaakhuleliwe niwoko na miteko sa nlamulo. Mwa yeeyo ni miteko sa nlamulo khaawo anaakhuleliwe ni Muluku." 
Galatians2:17 Naasaasaka waakhuleliwa ni Muluku niwoko na Kristu, ni hiyo noonelela weera nri anamattheka, weeraka Kristu Murumeiyi a soottheka? Hoye, hata vakhaani!" 
Galatians2:18 Miyo kaatenke yeele kiphwantaaka, eyo enoonihera weera miyo kootupha malamulo a Muluku." 
Galatians2:19 Niwoko na nlamulo kohookhwa wa nlamulo weera kimukhalele Muluku. 
Galatians2:20 Kookhomeliwa vamoha ni Kristu. Hiiho nkihiyono miyo kinkhala, mene aani Kristu okhanle mwa miyo. Okumi kinkhalaaka vaanaano mweerutthuni, kinkhala kimuroromelaka Mwaana a Muluku okisivenlaawe ni iixinnyerenraawe wa miyo." 
Galatians2:21 Miyo nkinkhootta mahala a Muluku niwoko mutthu aakhuleliwaka ni Muluku niwoko na malamulo, Yeesu okhwiiye siiyo." 
Galatians3:1 aGalata alolo! Yoolongweni taani? Mwaahooniheriwa Yeesu Kristu ntoko othomeiwalaawe vamuttandani. 
Galatians3:2 Miyo kaatthuna osuwela etthu emoha paahi: Nyuwo mohaakhela Munepa ni miteko sa malamulo, hoye hoye niwoko mohaakhulela yeeyo mwiiwalaanyu?" 
Galatians3:3 Weeraka muri alolo moota wooweera mwaapacenraanyu ni Munepa Wootteela, vano muntthuna omalihera ni ikurusanyu asineenaanyu?" 
Galatians3:4 Weeraka moohaawa ni itthu sincipale wa siiyo? Waari vekhaikhai wa siiyo! 
Galatians3:5 Yoowo onoovahani Munepa ni ompaka sootikhiniha variyari wa nyuwo, ompaka iyo niwoko muniiwelela malamulo, hoye hoye niwoko moororomela yeeyo mwiiwalaanyu?" 
Galatians3:6 Mmuupuwelele Abrahaamu: Owo aamuroromela Muluku, ni niwoko na yeeyo aahaakhuleliwa ni Muluku." 
Galatians3:7 Mwiiwexexe nnene weera yaale anroromela ari anamwane a Abrahaamu. 
Galatians3:8 Yoolempwa* ya khalayi, yoonaka ehinaaye weera Muluku onoowaakhulela amalapo niwoko na nroromelonaya mwa Kristu, yaalaleiya toko wa Abrahaamu masu ooreeraxa: “Niwoko na nyuwo miloko sootheene nsireelihiwe.”" 
Galatians3:9 Hiiho, yaale anroromela ari ooreelihiwa vamoha ni Abrahaamu, mulopwana a nroromelo." 
Galatians3:10 Yaawo ootheene anroromela miteko sa malamulo alaphiwa, niwoko yoolempwa: “Oolaphiwa ootheene yaale ahinkwanihera itthu sootheene silempwe mulivuruni ya malamulo.”" 
Galatians3:11 Yoosuwanyeya weera Muluku khaniwaakhulela atthu eroromelaka malamulo, niwoko mutthu oowaakhuleleya onkhala munroromeloni." 
Galatians3:12 Malamulo khaankhuma wa nroromelo, ohiyanawaya, “Yoowo ompaka itthu iya, onkhala niwoko na seiyo.”" 
Galatians3:13 Kristu oonivuluxa munlaphoni na malamulo, athatuwaka nlapho vanipuroniwahu, niwoko yoolempwa: “Oolaphiwa ti ootheene yaale athomeiwale vamuttandani.”" 
Galatians3:14 Aapakenle yeeyo weera, niwoko na Yoowo, nreeliho na Abrahaamu niphiyetho wa amalapo nitho weera hiyo naakhele munroromeloni yoororomelihiwa ya Munepa." 
Galatians3:15 Axunnaka, kinooleelani ni niphwanaphwaniho: mutthu areherenreene yoohiyeraawe*, khaawo anaamalihe, naari anaandyeerere." 
Galatians3:16 Hiihotho ni soororomelihiwa saapakeliwe Abrahaamu ni ekhapiraawe. Yoolempwa* kheeneera: ‘ni wa ikhapirasawe’ ntoko ancipale, mene ‘wa ekhapiraawe,’ weera enoonihere weera enuuluma sa mutthu mmoha paahi, eyo tiiyo Kristu." 
Galatians3:17 Kinghimaaka ti ela: malamulo awiiye iyaakha 430 vahoolo wa wiiwanana aapankaawe ni Muluku khaammaliha wiiwanana iwe Muluku aakhalinghaawe ahinaaye, moota wooweera malamulo ampakiha soororomeliha sa siiyo." 
Galatians3:18 Vano, yoohiyeriwa* yaarwiiye niwoko na nlamulo, kheerwiiye niwoko na yoororomelihiwa. Muluku aamuhiyera Abrahaamu ni yoororomelihiwa yoohiyeriwa* mahaleene." 
Galatians3:19 Vano, malamulo yaarweela heeni? Malamulo yaarweela woonihera seiyo siri soohitthuna sa Muluku mpaka ophiya Yoole yoororomelihiwa yaamuhimaaya. Malamulo ale avahiwe ni andyelo mmatatani a mulopwana aari ntoko namitthenga." 
Galatians3:20 Wa soothesene, namitthenga khanimukhaliha mmoha paahi. Mene Muluku ori mmoha." 
Galatians3:21 Malamulo anniittana ni soororomelihiwa sa Muluku? Hoye! Vano, waari weera yaavahiwa malamulo angwera ovaha okumi, vekhaikhai hiyo naamwaakhuleliwa ni Muluku niwoko na malamulo." 
Galatians3:22 Yoolempwatho enghima weera elapo yootheene eri yootthukeya ni soottheka, weera yoororomelihiwa ya Muluku yaavahiwe aKristu niwoko na nroromelo mwa Yeesu Kristu." 
Galatians3:23 Nihinaaye ophiya nroromelo, malamulo yaanikhaliha ootthukeya mpaka nroromelo neera nirwe nooniheriwe." 
Galatians3:24 Hiiho malamulo yaari muhusihaahu weera enironghe wa Kristu, weera hiyo naakhuleliwe ni Muluku niwoko na nroromelo." 
Galatians3:25 Vanonto, niphiyalaaya nroromelo, khaninlamuliwatho ni malamulo." 
Galatians3:26 Nyuwo ootheene muri anamwane a Muluku niwoko na nroromelo mwa Kristu Yeesu. 
Galatians3:27 Vano, yaale apatisiwe mwa Kristu, angwanre Kristu." 
Galatians3:28 Khawowo muYuda, hata muGrego, epottha, hata neethi, mulopwana, hata muthiyana, niwoko ootheene ti mmoha mwa Kristu Yeesu." 
Galatians3:29 Ni nyuwo mwaari a Kristu, vano ti ekhapira ya Abrahaamu, ni muri anamwaakhela ntoko yoororomelihiwa enghimaaya." 
Galatians4:1 Kinghima: owo onrowa waakhela itthu sa asinaangolowaawe areene mukhaaneene, khavirikanne ni epottha, orookhalaru muneene a sootheene." 
Galatians4:2 Owo onlamuliwa ni yaale animukhapelela ni anthokorora itthusawe mpaka ehuhuweene yeeyo atithawe yaathanlalaaya. 
Galatians4:3 Ntokotho hiyo naaraahu akhaaneene, naalamuleliwa ni mikhalelo sa mweelaponimu." 
Galatians4:4 Yaaphiyalaaya ehuhu eneeneene, Muluku aamuruma Mwanawe, aayariwa mwa muthiyana, munlamuloni," 
Galatians4:5 weera awoopole yaale yaari munlamuloni weera naakhele waakhuleliwa okhala anamwane a Muluku. 
Galatians4:6 Hapo muri anamwane a Muluku, Owo aaruma Munepa Wootteela wa Mwanawe wa mirimasanyu, mwa Yoowo oneera: ‘Aba, Tiithi!’" 
Galatians4:7 Hiiho nyuwo khamuhiyono epottha, mene mwaana ni, mweenre mukhalaka mwaana, Muluku ohootatuxani namwaakhela a itthusawe." 
Galatians4:8 Muhinaaye omusuwela Muluku, mwaari ipottha sa miluku seiyo, sihikhanle miluku sa ekhaikhai." 
Galatians4:9 Vanonto, nyuwo munsuwenleene Muluku, hoye hoye fataari, musuweliweene ni Yoowo, mungwera hai nyuwo ohokoleela mikhalelo iyo, soolosowa ni sa siiyo? Muntthuna okhalatho ipotthasaya?" 
Galatians4:10 Wa nyuwo mumpwattha mahuku makina, nyeeri, ihuhu sikina ni iyaakha." 
Galatians4:11 Miyo kinoova weera mitekosaka variyariwanyu nsikhale sa siiyo. 
Galatians4:12 Kinoodyoonttelelani axunna, mwiikhalihe ntoko miyo, niwoko miyo kohiikhaliha ntoko nyuwo. Kheewowo etthu mukiveihalaanyuno." 
Galatians4:13 Ntoko musuwenlaanyu, waari mwaha wa ovoreiwa miyo koolaleenraakani masu ooreeraxa emaara yoopacera." 
Galatians4:14 Waarookhalaru weera erettaaka mwaaheerereliwa nyuwo, nyuwo khamwaakithannye, hata khaamwaakikhoontte. Ohiyanawaya, mwaakaakhela ntoko miyo kaari ndyelo a Muluku, ntoko Kristu Yeesu muneenaawe." 
Galatians4:15 Yaakhumelenle eheeni ni ohakalalawanyu? Koosuwela vekhaikhai weera waawereya, nyuwo saano muzoonleene maithwaanyu weera mukivahe." 
Galatians4:16 Koothatuwa mwiittanaanyu niwoko kooleenlaakani ekhaikhai? 
Galatians4:17 Yaawo aniilipiheraxa weera yoosiveliheni khaampaka nnene. Antthuna woomwalamwalihani ni miyo, weera nyuwotho mwaatthuneke yaawo." 
Galatians4:18 Ti wooreera okhala ni nthiti mwaha wa yooreera mahuku ootheene, khoohiyono paahi miyo kaakhalaka vaavaawo." 
Galatians4:19 Anamwanaaka, miyo kinnahaawatho ovoreiya wa oyara niwoko na nyuwo mpaka Kristu aneeraawe apakeye mwa nyuwo." 
Galatians4:20 Kaatthuna okhala ni nyuwo vaanaano vaava ni oceendya muulumelowaaka, niwoko kinnatikhina mwaha wa nyuwo." 
Galatians4:21 Mukileele: nyuwo muntthuna wiiwelela malamulo, apaale khamuniiwa malamulo?" 
Galatians4:22 Vano yoolempwa weera Abrahaamu aakhalano anamwane eeli, mmoha a epottha ni mukina a neethi." 
Galatians4:23 Mwaana a epottha aayariwe munkhaleloni wa erutthu, mene mwaana a neethi aayariwe niwoko na yoororomelihiwa." 
Galatians4:24 Eyo ti niphwanaphwaniho ntokotoko. Asithiyana eeli awo anthoonyihera wiiraana miili: wiiraana omoha waapacenre vamwaako Sinayi, ni onaayara anamwane a okaporo. Wu ti Hagari." 
Galatians4:25 Hagari ori mwaako ole Sinayi wArabiya ni onthoonyihera esidade ya Yerusaleemu ya vaanaano, eri mpotthani ni anamwanaaya." 
Galatians4:26 Vano, Yerusaleemu ya osulu ti neethi, ni eyo ti amayihu." 
Galatians4:27 Vano yoolempwa: “Muhakalale nyuwo oohiyara, nyuwo muhimukhalanne mwaana; mukhuwele ni ohakalala, nyuwo muhikhalanne ovoreiya wa oyara, niwoko muthiyana oohiiwa anaakhalane anamwane ancipale, ompwaha muthiyana ootheliwa.”" 
Galatians4:28 Nyuwo, axunna, muri anamwane a yoororomelihiwa ntoko Isaaki." 
Galatians4:29 Ehuhuweene yeele mwaana aayariwe munkhaleloni wa erutthu aamulupattha mwaana aayariwe ni ikuru sa Munepa. Hiihotho olelo. 
Galatians4:30 Yoolempwa* enghima eheeni? “Moomole epottha ni mwanaya niwoko mwaana a epottha kharwa aakhela vamoha ni mwaana a neethi.” 
Galatians4:31 Tivawo axunna, khanihiyono anamwane a epottha, mene aani, a neethi." 
Galatians5:1 Kristu oonitaphula hiyo weera nikhale vekhaikhai maneethi. Tivawo, mpwaherere oolipeene ni muhiihiye muvolowakatho moolemelani wa okaporo." 
Galatians5:2 Mwiiwe nnene yeeyo miyo, Pawulo, kinooleelaakani: Nyuwo mwiinelihiwa, Kristu khamuteko wa nyuwo." 
Galatians5:3 Kinghimatho wa ootheene yaawo aniihiya yiineliwaka, weera awo annyesereriwa okwanihera malamulo ootheene." 
Galatians5:4 Nyuwo munaasa waakhuleliwa ni Muluku niwoko na malamulo, moomwalamwalihiwa ni Kristu; moothaama mmahalani." 
Galatians5:5 Hiyo ningweherera munroromeloni ninrweela wa Munepa Wootteela waakhuleliwa ni Muluku ori owehererawahu. 
Galatians5:6 Vano, mwa Kristu hata wiineliwa, hata ohiineliwa wookhala mureerelo, mene aani nroromelo nniixoonihera moosivelani." 
Galatians5:7 Nyuwo mwanneetta nnene. Taani owooceelihaleni weera muhipwaherereke ni ekhaikhai? 
Galatians5:8 Mutthweene yoowo kharwiiye wa Yoole ongwiitthanani. 
Galatians5:9 Eferementu vakhaani ennyarula etrigu yincipale. 
Galatians5:10 Miyo koosuwela mwa Apwiya weera nyuwo khamurwa muupuwela moota mukina. Yoole onookacamihani, hata akhale akhalaru mutthu, onoohaawa othorihiwa." 
Galatians5:11 Axunnaka, miyo nlelo kalaleiya wiineliwa, heeni nlelo kinttharatthariwaaka? Mooteene hiiho, wuuliha muru wa muttanda woovenxiwawo." 
Galatians5:12 Mwaha wa yaawo anookacamihani, fataari othikila elopwanaaya yootheene!" 
Galatians5:13 Axunna, nyuwo mwiitthaneliwe weera mukhale maneethi. Oneetheene yoowo ohikhale nthowa na otthara otthuna wa erutthu. Ohiyanawaya, murumeelaneke mukina ni mukhwaawe moosivelani." 
Galatians5:14 Malamulo ootheene athukumanyiwe mwa nlamulo nimoha: Munsivele mukhwiinyu ntoko muneenaanyu. 
Galatians5:15 Nyuwotho mwalumana ni mwakhuurana mukina ni mukhwaawe, mwiipasoope weera muhiphwatane." 
Galatians5:16 Tivawo kineera: Mweetteke mwa Munepa Wootteela, ni vano khamurwa mukwanihera sootthuna sa erutthu." 
Galatians5:17 Vano, erutthu entthuna yeeyo eniittana ni Munepa, ni Munepa yeeyo eniittana ni erutthu. Iyo sinnawana, moota wooweera nyuwo muhiwere opaka yeeyo muntthunaanyu." 
Galatians5:18 Nyuwotho mweettihiwaka ni Munepa Wootteela, khamuhiyono oolamuliwa ni malamulo." 
Galatians5:19 Moone, miteko sa erutthu siri soosuwanyeya: oraruwa, ohitteela, olavilavi," 
Galatians5:20 olapela miluku sikina, okhwiri, wiittana, waakhulana, ehace, isara, wiixoona, ohiiwanana, omwalamwala," 
Galatians5:21 nrima, ohapaliwa, wiipeliwa ni itthu soolikana. Miyo kingwoopererani, ntoko kaawooperenraakani khalayeene, weera yaawo ampaka itthusene seiyo kheerwa yaakhela omwene wa Muluku." 
Galatians5:22 Vaheera yoowiima ya Munepa ti osivela, ohakalala, murettele, opixa murima, waahelela akina, murima wooreera, ororomeleya," 
Galatians5:23 wiiyeviha ni wiisuumaaliha. Mwa itthusene seiyo, khaniwowo nlamulo." 
Galatians5:24 Yaale ari a Kristu Yeesu aathomeya soohaawela ni soowiinlela sa erutthu. 
Galatians5:25 Hapo ninkhala ni okumi mwa Munepa, neetteketho ni Munepa." 
Galatians5:26 Nihikhale oowiivuwiha, nitannyanaka mukina ni mukhwaawe, naari nihikhalelanaka nrima." 
Galatians6:1 Axunna, mukina amorela mootthekani, nyuwo muneetta ni Munepa Wootteela, munghokoloxere moota woowiiyeviha mphironi yooreera. Mwiipasoope weera muheereriwe." 
Galatians6:2 Mwaakhelaneke mirindi soolemela, ni hiiho mukwanihere nlamulo na Kristu." 
Galatians6:3 Mukina iixuupuwela weera ti ootthuneyaxa ahikhanle, oniilokottha muneenaawe." 
Galatians6:4 Khula mutthu iiwehaweheke mmitekonimwawe, ni vano nakhala nthowa na wiivuwiha, nikhaleke ni muneenaawe paahi ahiilikanxeraka ni akina." 
Galatians6:5 Khula mutthu ateexeke yooleemelaawe. 
Galatians6:6 Yoole onghusihiwa masu ooreeraxa akawane itthu sootheene sooreera orinaawe ni muhusihaawe. 
Galatians6:7 Muhilokottheye – ti woowoopiha omutheya Muluku. Vano yeeyo mutthu onaalaawe, onoohephatho." 
Galatians6:8 Yoowo onaala sootthuna sa erutthu, anaahephe ophwatiwa, mene yoole onaala mwa Munepa Wooteela, anaahephe okumi woohimala." 
Galatians6:9 Nihikhulumuwe opaka yooreera, niwoko ehuhu eneeneene nnihephe, hiyo naahiporora." 
Galatians6:10 Tivawo, ehuhu yootheene naapakeleke yooreera atthu ootheene, otepaxa wa amusi a munroromeloni." 
Galatians6:11 Ngwehe malepa matokotoko kinoolepelaakani ni ntatanaka! 
Galatians6:12 Yaale antthuna waasiveliha atthu yeereraka woonyesererani weera mwiineliwe, ampaka yeeyo weera ehittharatthariwe niwoko na muttanda wa Kristu." 
Galatians6:13 Yaawo aniineliwa khaankwanihera nlamulo. Awo antthuna weera nyuwo mwiineliwe, weera awo yiivuwihe mweerutthunimwanyu." 
Galatians6:14 Wa miyo, nkinono yoowiivuwihera, ohikhanle mwa muttanda wa Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu. Vano ti niwoko na muttanda ola elapo ethomeiwalaaya wa miyo, ni miyo wa elapo." 
Galatians6:15 Vano, etthu entthuneya kheehiyono wiineliwa, hoye hoye ohiineliwa, mene aani, okhala ephattuwelo enyowani." 
Galatians6:16 Murettele ni ikharari sikhale ni ootheene aneetta ekwaniheraka nlamulo nna, nitho ni aYixrayeli a Muluku." 
Galatians6:17 Evenyero vaava, ahikhale anaakixupe, niwoko kookhalano mweerutthunimwaka makhwatta a Yeesu." 
Galatians6:18 Axunna, mahala a Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu ekhale ni munepaanyu. Ame*." 
Ephesians1:1 Ya Pawulo, murummwa a Kristu Yeesu, ntoko Muluku aatthunaawe, wa ootteela ni oororomeleya mwa Kristu Yeesu ari wEfeso:" 
Ephesians1:2 wa nyuwo mahala ni murettele onrweela wa Muluku Atithihu, ni wa Apwiya Yeesu Kristu." 
Ephesians1:3 Oottottopeliwa akhale Muluku ni Atiithi a Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu! Vano, mwa Kristu, Owo oonireeliha ni mareeliho ootheene a Munepa ari wiirimu." 
Ephesians1:4 Muluku onithanlale mwa Kristu ehinaaye ephattuwelo ya elapo ya vathi, weera nikhale ootteela ni oohootheriwa vamaithoniwawe. Moosivelanimwawe," 
Ephesians1:5 Owo oonithanla ehinaaye ehuhu weera naakhuleliwe okhala anamwanaawe niwoko na Yeesu Kristu, niwoko wu waari ohakalalawawe ni otthunawawe." 
Ephesians1:6 Nnimuttottopele niwoko na ovuwa wa mahalaawe, mwa yaawo Owo onivanghaawe mwa Oosiveleya." 
Ephesians1:7 Mwa Yoowo nookhalano ovuluxiwa niwoko na ephomaawe, nitho elevelelo ya sootthekasahu. Ti hiiho mihakhu sa mahala a Muluku," 
Ephesians1:8 mwa yaawo Owo oniyeehenraawe ni miruku sootheene ni wiiwexexa wootheene! 
Ephesians1:9 Aanisuweliha ntikhinelo na otthunawawe niwoko na oreerawawe murima Owo oonihenraawe mwa Kristu," 
Ephesians1:10 weera athukumanyihe mwa Yoowo itthu sootheene siri wiirimu, naari sa vathi, yaaphiyaka ekwanihero ya ehuhu." 
Ephesians1:11 Mwa Yoowo nithanliwe ehinaaye ehuhu mwaha wa soovaanela sa Yoowo ompaka itthu sootheene ntoko otthuna wa murimaawe 
Ephesians1:12 weera hiyo nri oopacera omuroromela Kristu, nikhale ottottopela wa ovuwawawe." 
Ephesians1:13 Nyuwo mookhalatho mwa Yoowo vahoolo woowiiwa ni woororomela masu a ekhaikhai, masu ooreeraxa awo yoovulunxeni, ni nyuwo mohiiyaatheriwa ni Munepa Wootteela woororomelihiwa." 
Ephesians1:14 Owo ti ekhaikhai ya yeeyo nneeraahu naakhele mpaka ovuluxiwa wa yaale ari a Muluku, wa ovuwawawe ottottopeliwe." 
Ephesians1:15 Tivawo, okhuma kiiwalaaka wuulummwa sa ororomelawanyu mwa Apwiya Yeesu, ni sa osivela nyuwo mungwooniheraanyu ootteela ootheene," 
Ephesians1:16 nkinghiya omtthapela Muluku niwoko na nyuwo, kiwuupuwelelakani mmavekelonimwaka." 
Ephesians1:17 Kimvekela weera Muluku a Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu, Atiithi oovuwaxa, yoovaheeni munepa wa miruku ni wa eyoonihero weera munsuwele nnenesene." 
Ephesians1:18 Kimvekelatho weera maitho a murimaanyu ekhale oomwaleeleya weera musuwele oweherera mwa weiwo Owo owiitthanenlaaweni ni mihakhu sa yoohiyeraawe* yoovuwaxa Owo oovahenraaweni nyuwo ootteela," 
Ephesians1:19 ni musuweletho ikurusawe sitokotoko soohilikanxereiya wa hiyo ninroromela. Ikuru iyo sootepaxa 
Ephesians1:20 ti ikurusene seiye Owo oonihenraawe mwa Kristu, amvenyererihaka mookhwaani ni amukilaathihaka moonowaawe mulopwana mmapuroni a wiirimu," 
Ephesians1:21 vasuluxa wa ibooma, ikuru, owera, olamula wootheene ni nsina nootheene ningwereya oromola, kheehiyono paahi wa ehuhu ela, mene yeeyotho eneera erwe." 
Ephesians1:22 Muluku iiyaathiye itthu sootheene vathi wa inaawosawe ni oomuthanla ntoko muru wa itthu sootheene wa ekerexa 
Ephesians1:23 eri erutthwaawe, ekwanihero ya Yoole onkwaniha itthu sootheene mwa soothesene." 
Ephesians2:1 Nyuwo mwaari ookhweene mwa sootakhalasanyu ni sootthekasanyu,"
