Ephesians2:2 mwa seiyo mweettelaanyu, muttharihaka mukhalelo wa elapo ya vathi ela, aani mwaamuttharaanyu mutokweene a ikuru sa opheyoni, munepa owo omvara muteko vaanaano mwa yaawo ankhala ni ettiyamaaru." 
Ephesians2:3 Khalayeene hiyo ootheene naakhalatho variyari wa yaawo, nimaalihaka sootthuna sa erutthwaahu, nittharaka soohaawelasaya ni soowuupuwelasaya. Ntoko ootheene akina, naaritho wa eyareliwaahu oophwanela isara." 
Ephesians2:4 Wa soothesene, Muluku areene oosareya ni ikharari, oonivaha okumi vamoha ni Kristu" 
Ephesians2:5 niwoko na osivelaxawawe onisivenlaawe hiyo naaraahu nlelo ookhweene mwa sootakhala. Nyuwo moovuluxiwa niwoko na mahala! 
Ephesians2:6 Muluku oonivenyereriha vamoha ni Kristu ni oonikilaathiha ni Yoowo mmapuroni a wiirimu mwa Kristu Yeesu," 
Ephesians2:7 weera oonihere mihakhu soohilikanxereya sa mahalaawe mwa ihuhu sineera sirwe, mahala awo yooniheriwe wa hiyo mwa Kristu niwoko na oreerawawe murima." 
Ephesians2:8 Nyuwo moovuluxiwa niwoko na mahala, munroromeloni, ni iwo khoongwa wa nyuwo, ti yamahala ya Muluku," 
Ephesians2:9 aani khoongwa niwoko na miteko, weera ahikhale mukina aneera iivuwihe." 
Ephesians2:10 Vano, nri ephattuwelo ya Muluku, epakiwe mwa Kristu Yeesu weera nipake miteko sooreera, mwa seiyo Muluku onirehererenlaawe toko weera hiyo nivareke." 
Ephesians2:11 Tivawo, muupuweleke weera khalayeene mwaari amalapo a eyareliwaanyu, ni mwiitthaniwa ‘oohiineliwa’ ni yaawo aniixiitthana ‘oowiineliwa,’ etthu epakiwe mweerutthuni ni matata a atthu." 
Ephesians2:12 Muupuweleketho weera ehuhuweene yeele khamwaakhanleno Kristu, mmwalamwalihiweene ni muloko wa aYixrayeli, mureene anamarwa mwaha wa wiiraana wa yoororomelihiwa, khamwaakhanlenotho oweherera etthu, naari Muluku mweelaponimu." 
Ephesians2:13 Vanonto, mwa Kristu Yeesu nyuwo khalayeene mwaari ottaiwene, mohaattamiheriwa niwoko na ephome ya Kristu." 
Ephesians2:14 Owo ti murettelaahu, atatuxaka miloko miili iye mmoharu. Owo oophwata exiri ya wiittana yoomwalamwaxa," 
Ephesians2:15 ananarihaka mweerutthunimwawe malamulo a soonyesereriwa ni ikano. Otthunawawe waari owera mwa Yoowo mwaneenaawe wa miloko miili mutthu munyowani mmoha, apakaka murettele," 
Ephesians2:16 ni wiiraanyiha miloko miili iye ni Muluku mwa erutthu emoha. Eyo owenre niwoko na muttanda, mwa yoowo Owo oophwata wiittana iwe." 
Ephesians2:17 Owo aaweenle olaleiya murettele wa nyuwo mwaari ottaiwene ni wa yaawo yaari vakhiviru. 
Ephesians2:18 Vano, niwoko na Yoowo, ooweeli hiyo nookhalano evolowelo wa Atiithi mwa Munepa mmoharu." 
Ephesians2:19 Tivawo, nyuwo khamuhiyonotho anamarwa ni amalapo, mene muri maneethi vamoha ni ootteela ni mipatta sa emusi ya Muluku," 
Ephesians2:20 mutekiweene vasulu wa mathipelo a arummwa ni maprofeeti, Yeesu Kristu areene nluku noottittimiheyaxa na empa ela." 
Ephesians2:21 Vasulu wa Yoowo empa yootheene yootekiwa ni enunnuwa, weera ethatuwe empa yootteela mwa Apwiya." 
Ephesians2:22 Mwa Yoowo nyuwotho muntekiwa vamoha weera muthatuwe vaate wa Muluku mwa Munepaawe. 
Ephesians3:1 Mwaha wa yeeyo, miyo Pawulo kiri ootthukiwa a Kristu Yeesu niwoko na woosivelani nyuwo amalapo." 
Ephesians3:2 Vekhaihai nyuwo mohiiwa yuulummwaka ya ikuru miyo kivahiwaaka mwaha wa nyuwo niwoko na mahala a Muluku. 
Ephesians3:3 Eyo tiiyo ntikhinelo kisuwelihiwaaka moothupululani, ntoko koolepenlaakani woowaakuveya." 
Ephesians3:4 Vano, mwaasomaka, munoowera wiiwexexa osuwelawaka wa ntikhinelo na Kristu." 
Ephesians3:5 Nna khaasuwelihiwe atthu a ikhapira sikina. Mene vano, noosuweliheriwa ni Munepa arummwa ootteela ni maprofeeti a Muluku." 
Ephesians3:6 Ntikhinelo ti nna: niwoko na masu ooreeraxa, amalapo anoowera waakhela yoohiyeriwa* vamoha ni aYixrayeli. Amalapo aritho mipatta sa erutthweene yeeyo, ni mwa Kristu Yeesu aakhalano yoororomelihiweene yeeyo ntoko aYixrayeli." 
Ephesians3:7 Koothatuwa murumeiyi a masu ooreeraxa ala niwoko na mahala a Muluku kivahiwaaka, ni owera wa ikurusawe." 
Ephesians3:8 Kiri mweeraru kireene ooyevaxa variyari wa ootteela, koovahiwa mahala ala oowaalaleera amalapo mihakhu soohaalikeleya sa Kristu," 
Ephesians3:9 ni waathalihera ootheene mutekwaaya wa ntikhinelo nna, mwa nenno okhuma khalayi naahiipithihiwa mwa Muluku, mwa Yoowo opanke itthu sootheene." 
Ephesians3:10 Yootthuneya ya mahala ala yaari weera ni ekhavihero ya ikerexa, miruku siri soopwahaxa sa Muluku sisuwelihiwe vaanaano vaava wa owera ni ikuru siri wiirimu," 
Ephesians3:11 ntoko soovaanelasawe sa khalayi Owo okwanihenre mwa Kristu Yeesu, Apwiyaahu." 
Ephesians3:12 Niwoko na omuroromelawahu Kristu, ninoowera omwaattamela Muluku ni murima woolipa ni oneethi." 
Ephesians3:13 Tivawo, kinoovekelani weera muhiporore niwoko na sohaawasaka wa nyuwo, niwoko iyo siri ovuwawanyu." 
Ephesians3:14 Tivawo kinnakokhorela ohoolo wa Atiithi," 
Ephesians3:15 mwa Yaawo emusi yootheene eri wiirimu ni vathi enimwaakhela Nsinanaya. 
Ephesians3:16 Kimvekela weera mwaha wa mihakhu soovuwaxa, Awo anoolipihani ni ikuru niwoko na Munepa onkhala mmirimanimwanyu," 
Ephesians3:17 weera Kristu akhale mmurimanimwanyu niwoko na nroromelo. Kimvekelatho weera nyuwo, mureene oothipeliwa ni oolipihiwa moosivelani," 
Ephesians3:18 muwere wiiwexexa vamoha ni ootteela ootheene mweekhuveeloni, mweerakameloni, orakamawaya ni wiixerawaya wa osivela iwo." 
Ephesians3:19 Aani, kimvekela weera musuwele osivela wa Kristu ompwahaxa osuwela wootheene, weera nyuwo musareiye ni ekwanihero yootheene ya Muluku." 
Ephesians3:20 Wa Yoowo ongwera opaka woopwahaxa yeeyo yootheene hiyo nimvekelaahu, naari nnuupuwelaahu mwaha wa ikurusaya sinnivarela muteko mwa hiyo," 
Ephesians3:21 wa Yoowo okhale ovuwa woohimala wa ekhapira ti ekhapira mukerexani ni mwa Kristu Yeesu. 
Ephesians4:1 Ntoko ootthukiwa mwa Apwiya, kinoodyoonttelelani weera mweettele mukhalelo woophwanelela wiitthaniwa mwaakhenlaanyu." 
Ephesians4:2 Mukhale oowiiyevihaxa, oomaala murima, oopixa murima, muvilelanaka moosivelani." 
Ephesians4:3 Mwiilipihere weera muthokorore omoharu wa Munepa ni yookumanela ya murettele. 
Ephesians4:4 Yookhala erutthu emoharu ni ori Munepa mmoharu paahi, mooteene yoowo ntoko nyuwo mwiitthaniwaanyu mwa nroromelo nimoha paahi," 
Ephesians4:5 ari Apwiya amoharu paahi, nroromelo nimoharu paahi, opatiso omoharu paahi," 
Ephesians4:6 Muluku mmoharu paahi ori Atiithi a ootheene, wa ootheene, ni mwa ootheene." 
Ephesians4:7 Vano, wa khula mutthu a hiyo oovahiwa mahala mwaha wa muringo ovahiwe ni Kristu." 
Ephesians4:8 Tivawo ehimmwalaaya: “Awelakaru wiirimu, yaakuxiwa ootthukiwa ottuliwawe ni aahaavaha atthu samahala.”" 
Ephesians4:9 Nsu neenre “Awelakaru” nintaphulela ni ekhaikhai weera, ehinaaye yeeyo, Owo aakhuruwelatho moowiixera wa etthaya." 
Ephesians4:10 Owo aakhurungwe ti Yoowo aawenle osulu erimu yootheene weera asarihe itthu sootheene. 
Ephesians4:11 Vano Owo ohaathanla akina weera ekhale arummwa, akina maprofeeti, akina anamalaleiya a masu ooreeraxa, akina akukhuli, ni akinatho ahusiha." 
Ephesians4:12 Hiiho aatthuna waarehererela ootteela mutekwaaya, weera erutthu ya Kristu ekhale yoowunnuwihiwa," 
Ephesians4:13 mpaka hiyo ootheene niphiye wa omoharu wa nroromelo ni wa omusuwela Mwaana a Muluku, ni mpaka niphiyetho wootokweeneni nikwaniheraka muringo wookwanela wa Kristu." 
Ephesians4:14 Hiiho hiyo khanikhalatho anamwane, nikuxiwe wa mpatta mukina ni mukhwaaya ni mitekuteku, hata khannoopeliwa wa nno ni iwe ni epheyo yootheene ya mahusiho makina, naari niwoko na soovaanela soolokottha soowootha sa atthu anaathweeleliha akina mphironi ya ekhaikhai." 
Ephesians4:15 Ohiyanawaya, nittharaka ekhaikhai mwa osivela, hiyo ninunnuwa mwa sootheene mwa Yoole ori muru, eyo tiiyo Kristu." 
Ephesians4:16 Ti mwa Yoowo erutthu yootheene enkhalaaya yoolipeene, ekumanihiweene ni mikumano sootheene, ni enunnuwaaya, nitho eniipuhihaaya mwaneenaaya moosivelani, mipatta sootheene sivaraka mitekosaya." 
Ephesians4:17 Hiiho miyo kinooleelani, ni mwa Apwiya kinnanyeserera, weera muheettetho ntoko amalapo, aneetta mwa soowuupuwelasaya sa siiyo." 
Ephesians4:18 Soowuupuwelasaya siri sooriipihiweene, ni awo aamwalamwaxiwa ni okumi wa Muluku niwoko na ohisuwela ori mwa yaawo onrweela wa wuuma mirimasaya." 
Ephesians4:19 Atthweene yaawo, eriheiyeene soowuupuwela sa nnene, yaahiiveleela moohuureyani, epakaka ni ohiisuumaaliha murima mikhalelo sootheene sa ohitteela." 
Ephesians4:20 Wa soothesene, khamuxuttenre nyuwo mooteene yoola omusuwela Kristu." 
Ephesians4:21 Mwa yeeyo, nyuwo mohiiwa yuulummwaka ya Yoowo ni mwa Yoowo mooxuttihiwa mwaha wa ekhaikhai eri mwa Yeesu." 
Ephesians4:22 Vano, mwaha wa mweettelo wa khalayi, nyuwo mwaaxuttihiwa weera mwiirule wa mutthu a khalayi, oniinanariha ni soohaawela soolokottha," 
Ephesians4:23 weera sitatuxiwe sinyowani soowuupuwelasanyu sa mmunepani," 
Ephesians4:24 ni weera mungwaretho mutthu munyowani, opakiwe weera alikane ni Muluku moororomeleyani ni muntteelihoni na ekhaikhai." 
Ephesians4:25 Tivawo khula mutthu a nyuwo ahiye wootha ni uulume ekhaikhai wa mukhwaawe, niwoko ootheene nri mipatta sa erutthu emoharu yeeyo." 
Ephesians4:26 Nyuwo mwaanyoonyiwaka, muhittheke. Ni ohiile nyuwo nlelo munyoonyiweene," 
Ephesians4:27 nitho muhimvahe nipuro Satana. 
Ephesians4:28 Yoowo iiya, ahiiyetho. Ohiyanawaya, avare muteko, apakaka etthu yootthuneyaxa ni matataawe weera akhalane etthu yoomvaha yoowo ori moohaawani." 
Ephesians4:29 Ehikhume mmwaanomwanyu masu oonanara, mene masu paahi angwera waapuhiha akina ntoko entthuneyaaya weera yaavahe mahala yaale aniiwa." 
Ephesians4:30 Muhithananihe Munepa Wootteela wa Muluku, mwa Yoowo nyuwo mohiiyaatheriwa eneneero wa nihuku na ovuluxiwa." 
Ephesians4:31 Mwiixoopole wa soowaawa, owali, onyoonyiwa, waakhulana, waapa, nitho wa soonanara sootheene." 
Ephesians4:32 Mureerelane murima mmorelanaka ikharari mukina ni mukhwaawe, mulevelelanaka ntoko Muluku oolevelenlaaweni mwa Kristu." 
Ephesians5:1 Tivawo, mukhale anamatakiha a Muluku ntoko anamwane oosiveleya," 
Ephesians5:2 ni mukhale moosivelani, ntoko Kristu onisivenlaawetho ni iivaherenre wa hiyo ntoko yoovaha ni yoowiiveleela yoomusiveliha Muluku." 
Ephesians5:3 Variyariwanyu ohikhale hata wuuluma wa oraruwa, hata wa mukhalelo mukina wa ohitteela, naari wa wiinlela mihakhu, niwoko itthu iya khasintthuneya wa ootteela." 
Ephesians5:4 Muhiromoletho masu oowuuliha muru, hata nyaha sa ololo, hata iperwa sa ohuureya siri soohiphwanelela. Ohiyanawaya, muulumeke masu ootthapela." 
Ephesians5:5 Vano nyuwo musuweleke nnenesene yeeyo: Khaawo namahuureya, hata oohitteela, naari namwiinlela mihakhu (eyo tiiyo olapa miluku sikina) anaakhele omwene wa Kristu ni Muluku." 
Ephesians5:6 Ahikhale anoolokottheni ni masu a siiyo. Siri niwoko na itthusene seiyo isara sa Muluku sinaakhuruwela atthu oohiiwelela. 
Ephesians5:7 Tivawo, muhipake itthusene seiya vamoha ni yaawo." 
Ephesians5:8 Vano, khalayeene mwaari epiphi, mene vano muri waara mwa Apwiya. Mweetteke ntoko anamwane a waara," 
Ephesians5:9 niwoko yoowiima ya waara eri oreera murima, ororomeleya, ni ekhaikhai." 
Ephesians5:10 Mwaase osuwela yeeyo enaasiveliha Apwiya. 
Ephesians5:11 Muhiiraaneke ni miteko sihiniima sa epiphi. Ohiyanawaya, moonihereke iyo ntoko sa epiphi." 
Ephesians5:12 Vano, hata oromola seiye awo ampakaaya mpiphini ti soowuuliha muru." 
Ephesians5:13 Vaheera sootheene sinkuxiwa mwa waara, sinthatuwa soowooneya," 
Ephesians5:14 niwoko waara ommwaleela itthu sootheene. Tivawo yeeriwaaya: “Muvenye, nyuwo munkona, muvenyerere mookhwaani, ni waara wa Kristu oniwoomwaleeleni.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Mwiipasoope ni mweettelowaanyu – khaahiyono ntoko alolo, mene ntoko asuweli," 
Ephesians5:16 mvarelaka muteko nnenesene ehuhu yootheene, niwoko mahuku ala ari oonanara." 
Ephesians5:17 Tivawo, muhikhale alolo, mene musuwele ti heeni otthuna wa Apwiya." 
Ephesians5:18 Muhihapaliwe ni eviinyu, niwoko mwemmo wookhalamo olavilavi, mene muhiye woosareyeni Munepa," 
Ephesians5:19 muulumaka variyariwanyu ni masalmu ni icipo soohiyanahiyana sa Munepa, mwiipaka ni mwaattottopelaka Apwiya," 
Ephesians5:20 muntthapelaka mahuku ootheene Muluku Atiithi wa itthu sootheene mwa Nsina na Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu. 
Ephesians5:21 Mwiiwelelaneke mukina ni mukhwaawe moomoovani Kristu. 
Ephesians5:22 Axaara, ngwiiweleleke asiiyinyu ntoko wa Apwiya," 
Ephesians5:23 niwoko mulopwana ti muru wa muthiyana, ntokotho Kristu ti Muru ni Mvuluxa wa ekerexa, eri erutthwaawe." 
Ephesians5:24 Hiiho, ntoko ekerexa emmwiiwelelaaya Kristu, ewiiweleleketho axaara asiiyaya mwa soothesene." 
Ephesians5:25 Asilopwana, mwaasiveleke axaarinyu ntoko Kristu osivenlaawe ekerexa ni ohiixinnyerera wa yeeyo" 
Ephesians5:26 weera atteelihe, arapihaka ni maahi niwoko na masu," 
Ephesians5:27 ni weera yiixoonihere wa Yoowo mwaneenaawe ntoko ekerexa yoovuwa woohikhala malepa, naari makunyantta, hoye hoye etthu yoolikana, mene yootteela ni yoohikhala ni nthowa." 
Ephesians5:28 Mooteene yoowo, asilopwana ontthuneya weera yaasiveleke axaaraya ntoko erutthwaaya. Yoowo onimusivela mwaariye, oniisivela mwaneenaawe." 
Ephesians5:29 Vekhaikhai, khaawo otonke othanya erutthwaawe. Ohiyanawaya, owo onoociha ni onookosoopa, ntokotho Kristu ompakaawe ni ekerexa," 
Ephesians5:30 niwoko nri mipatta sa erutthwaawe. 
Ephesians5:31 “Tivawo, mulopwana anaahiye atithawe ni amayawe, ni anaathukumane ni mwaariye, ni ooweeli awo eniithatuwe erutthu emoha paahi.”" 
Ephesians5:32 Nno ti ntikhinelo noowiixera, mene kinghima wa Kristu ni ekerexa." 
Ephesians5:33 Wa soothesene, khula mulopwana a nyuwo amusiveleke mwaariye ntoko mwaneenaawe, ni mwaara amuttittimiheke iyawe." 
Ephesians6:1 Anamwane, ngwiiweleleke asinaangolowaanyu mwa Apwiya, niwoko eyo ti ya ororomeleya." 
Ephesians6:2 “Mwaattittimihe atithinyu ni amayinyu,” nna ti nlamulo noopacera nrino yoororomelihiwa:" 
Ephesians6:3 “weera sootheene siweetteleni nnene ni mukhalane iyaakha sincipale mweelaponi.” 
Ephesians6:4 Asitiithi, muhaatannyeke anamwanaanyu. Ohiyanawaya, mwaahuweke moolakani ni mmahusihoni a Apwiya." 
Ephesians6:5 Ipottha, ngwiiweleleke asineene a nyuwo a vathi ni nttittimiho, woova, ni murima wootheene, ntoko wa Kristu." 
Ephesians6:6 Muhiwiiwelele paahi weera mwaasivelihe awo yoowehawehakani, mene, ntoko ipottha sa Kristu, mpakeke otthuna wa Muluku ni murima wootheene." 
Ephesians6:7 Mwaarumeeleke ni murima wooreera ntoko wa Apwiya, ohikhanle wa atthu," 
Ephesians6:8 niwoko moosuwela weera Apwiya eniimutthuvele khula mutthu wa yooreera ompakaawe, hata ekhale epottha, naari akhale neethi." 
Ephesians6:9 Nyuwo asineene, mweetteleke mooteene yoowo ni ipotthasanyu. Musuwelaka weera Apwiyaaya ni Apwiyaanyu ari wiirimu, ni awo khaanono nthalu ni atthu, muhoopopihe ipotthasanyu." 
Ephesians6:10 Vanonto, mwiilipihe mwa Apwiya ni mwa ikurusaya sitokotoko." 
Ephesians6:11 Ngwareke soowarela soowanela ekhotto sootheene sa Muluku weera ngwere okhala oolipa opwaha mikhalelo sa Diyabu*," 
Ephesians6:12 niwoko owanawahu khoohiyono ni erutthu, naari ephome, mene ni ikuru ni asitokweene a mmunepani, ni malamulelo a elapo ya vathi ela ya mpiphini, aani owanawahu ori ni minepa soonanara sa wiirimu." 
Ephesians6:13 Tivawo, ngwareke sowarela sowanela ekhotto sootheene sa Muluku weera ngwere wiixaakiha munihukuni na onanara, ni mwaamalihaka opaka sootheene, mukhale yeemelelo." 
Ephesians6:14 Hiiho mweemele oolipeene, mwiitthukelaka ni laamba a ekhaikhai, ngwaraka malaya a eyuuma ari oowaakheliwa ni Muluku," 
Ephesians6:15 ni ngwanreene ni isapato soolikana sinrweela wa masu ooreeraxa a murettele. 
Ephesians6:16 Mukuxeketho exikudu* ya nroromelo, mwa yeeyo nyuwo mmwiwere ocipiha nyuupa sootheene sivarelaka sa namatakhala." 
Ephesians6:17 Ngwareke ekapasete ya ovuluxiwa ni ekatana ya Munepa, eri masu a Muluku." 
Ephesians6:18 Ehuhu yootheene muvekeleke mwa Munepa ni mavekelo ni midyoonttelelo sootheene. Muupuwelaka yeeyo, mwiiwehawehe ni muvekeleke ni ovilela wa ootteela ootheene." 
Ephesians6:19 Mukivekeleleketho miyo, weera Muluku akivahe masu, weera kithaliheke woohoova ntikhinelo na masu ooreeraxa," 
Ephesians6:20 mwa yaawo kiri namutthenga ootthukiweene. Muvekele weera miyo kuulume ni olipa murima, ntoko ontthuneyaaya weera kipake." 
Ephesians6:21 Tikhiko, munna oosiveleya ni murumeiyi oororomeleya a Apwiya, anooleeleni sootheene weera nyuwotho musuwele ihaalisaka ni mitekosaka." 
Ephesians6:22 Koorumihenleni owo niwoko na etthweene yeela, weera musuwele ihaalisahu, ni weera owo oolipiheni murima." 
Ephesians6:23 Murettele okhale ni axunna, ni osivela vamoha ni nroromelo onrweela wa Muluku Atiithi ni wa Apwiya Yeesu Kristu." 
Ephesians6:24 Mahala ekhale ni ootheene anaasivela Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu ni osivela woohimala. 
Philippians1:1 Ya Pawulo ni Timootheyo, arumeiyi a Yeesu Kristu, wa ootteela ootheene mwa Kristu ari oFilipi vamoha ni asitokweene ankosoopa* ni adikoni*:" 
Philippians1:2 wa nyuwo mahala ni murettele wa Muluku Atithihu ni Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu. 
Philippians1:3 Kinnamutthapela Mulukwaaka khula emaara miyo kingwuupuwelaakani nyuwo. 
Philippians1:4 Imaara sootheene koovekelelakani nyuwo, kimvekela ni ohakalala" 
Philippians1:5 niwoko na wiiwananawanyu ni masu ooreeraxa, okhuma nihuku noopacera mpaka olelo." 
Philippians1:6 Kooviriyeliwa weera Owo aapacenre muteko wooreera mwa nyuwo, anaakwanihere yoowo mpaka nihuku na Kristu Yeesu." 
Philippians1:7 Ti wooreera miyo koonaka hiiha sa nyuwo, woonaka weera nyuwo muri mmurimanimwaka, niwoko, hata kikhalaka moonyooroni, hata kikhalaka oowiixaakiha ni oolipihera masu ooreeraxa, ootheene nyuwo munkhala ni miyo mmahalani mwa Muluku." 
Philippians1:8 Muluku ti namoonaaka moota miyo kunkheliwaka ni nyuwo ootheene moosiveliwani vancipale mwa Kristu Yeesu. 
Philippians1:9 Nivekelonaka ti nna: weera osivelawanyu waandyeerereye, wootepaxa moosuwelani ni moomwalamwaxani yooreera ni yoonanara," 
Philippians1:10 weera musuwele yeeyo eri yooreera yoopwaha ni weeratho mukhale ootteela ni woohikhala malepa mpaka nihuku na Kristu. 
Philippians1:11 Kimvekela weera musareye ni yoowiima ya ekhaikhai. Yoowiima ela enrweela niwoko na Yeesu Kristu wa ovuwa ni ottottopela wa Muluku. 
Philippians1:12 Kintthuna weera musuwele, axunnaka, weera yeeyo yaakikhumelenle, yookhavihera opwahereriha masu ooreeraxa." 
Philippians1:13 Niwoko na yeeyo yoosuweliwa ni anamalipelela ootheene a empa etokotoko ya mutokweene, ni ni akinatho ootheene, weera kitthukiwe niwoko na Kristu." 
Philippians1:14 Ni axunna ancipale oolipiheriwa mwa Apwiya niwoko na otthukiwawaka, weera elaleiye ni nthiti nincipale masu a Muluku ehoovaka." 
Philippians1:15 Ettiitthu weera akina anlaleiya sa Kristu niwoko na nrima ni ohiiwanana, mene akina anlaleiya ni murima wooreera." 
Philippians1:16 Ookisera anlaleiya ni osivela esuwelaka weera miyo kinkhala va kaakihaka masu ooreeraxa. 
Philippians1:17 Awo akina anlaleiya sa Kristu niwoko na otthunawaya asineenaaya, khoohiyono ni murima wa ekhaikhai, yuupuwelaka weera anoowera okihaawiha miyo kitthukiweene." 
Philippians1:18 Empwattheiya hai? Etthu yootthuneyaxa ti weera, hata ni murima woolokottha, naari ni murima wa ekhaikhai, Kristu onoolaleiwa ni tivawo kinghakalalaaka. Mwa yeeyo, nkipwaherere ohakalala." 
Philippians1:19 Vano koosuwela weera, niwoko na mavekelowaanyu ni ekhavihero ya Munepa wa Yeesu Kristu, yeeyo ekikhumelenle eniimalele ni ovuluxiwawaka." 
Philippians1:20 Kingweherera ni murima wootheene ni kinroromela weera nkirwa kuuliwa muru ni yakhalaru etthu. Ohiyanawaya, kinroromela weera ntoko ehuhu yootheene, hiiho vaanaano vaava Kristu anunnuwihiwe mweerutthunimwaka: okhalaka mookumini, hoye hoye mookhwaani," 
Philippians1:21 niwoko wa miyo okumi ti Kristu ni okhwa ti owina. 
Philippians1:22 Kapwaherera okhala, yeeyo eniikhavihere mutekwaaka. Vano nkisuwenle yooreera othanla!" 
Philippians1:23 Nlelo kiri vamarekhano: Kinghaawela opwaha weera kikhale ni Kristu, yeeyo eri yootepaxa ooreera." 
Philippians1:24 Wa soothesene, kiweerelakani nyuwo ootthuneya wootepaxa weera kikhale mweerutthuni." 
Philippians1:25 Kiviriyeliweene ni seiyo, koosuwela weera nkikhale ni nkipwaherere ni nyuwo ootheene weera kiwunnuwiheni ni koohakalaliheni munroromeloni." 
Philippians1:26 Hiiho, miyo karwa wooxekurani veeli, ohakalalawanyu mwa Kristu Yeesu waatte niwoko na miyo." 
Philippians1:27 Yookhala etthu emoha paahi yoopwattha: mweettelowaanyu okhale moota woophwanelela masu ooreeraxa a Kristu. Hiiho, hata miyo karowa ni kiwoonakani, hata kiiwa paahi sa nyuwo kihikhalakawo, kisuwele weera nyuwo mukhale oolipa mwa munepa mmoha paahi, ngwanaka ni murima mmoharu niwoko na nroromelo na masu ooreeraxa," 
Philippians1:28 muhiwoovaka hata vakhaani yaawo ari amwiittanaanyu. Wa yaawo eyo eniikhale eneneero ya oriheya, mene wa nyuwo eneneero yoovuluwa, ni eyo enrweela wa Muluku." 
Philippians1:29 Vano, wa nyuwo moovahiwa weera muhimuroromele paahi Kristu, menetho ohaawa niwoko na Yoowo," 
Philippians1:30 woonaka weera nyuwo mungwana owanawene weiwo moonnaanyu kaawannaaka ni muniiwaanyu weera nlelo kineera kiwanaka. 
Philippians2:1 Vano, Kristu oolipiha mirimasanyu; osivelawawe woowoovahani opepesa; nyuwo mookhalano wiiwanana ni Munepaawe, mookhalano osivela ni ikharari," 
Philippians2:2 vanonto mukwanihere ohakalalawaka muupuwelaka moota mmoha; mukhalaka ni osivela omoha, munepa mmoha ni otthuna omoha paahi." 
Philippians2:3 Muhipake naari etthu emoha niwoko na wiipwatthawanyu asineenaanyu, naari niwoko na wiixoona, mene mwiiyevihaka, mwaattittimihe akina ntoko asitokweenaanyu." 
Philippians2:4 Khula mutthu a nyuwo ahaasaaseke sooreerasawe paahi, mene sooreera sa akinatho." 
Philippians2:5 Mweette ni mweetteloweene yoowo aarinaawe Yeesu Kristu: 
Philippians2:6 naamwi Owo areene Muluku, khaatthunne ovarexexa ikurusene seiye." 
Philippians2:7 Aahiya ni otthunawawe mwaneenaawe sootheene aarinaawe athatuwaka murumeiyi, aani, ntoko mutthu." 
Philippians2:8 Aphwanyiweene mmukhaleloni mwa omutthu, ohiiyeviha mwaneenaawe, iiwelelaka mpaka okhwa, aani, okhwa vamuttandani!" 
Philippians2:9 Tivawo Muluku omunnuwihalaawe Yoowo ni nipuro na osuluxa, ni oomvaha Nsina noopwaha masina ootheene" 
Philippians2:10 weera, mwa Nsina na Yeesu, makutha a ootheene ari wiirimu, elapo ya vathi, ni mmooroni ekokhore," 
Philippians2:11 ni atthu a muulumo ootheene elape weera Yeesu Kristu ti Apwiya, wa ovuwa wa Muluku Atiithi." 
Philippians2:12 Hiiho, oosiveleyaaka, ntoko mwiiwelelaanyu mahuku ootheene, khoohiyono miyo kaakhalaaka variyariwanyu paahi, mene wootepaxa vaanaano vaava miyo kinkhalaaka ottaiwene, mureherereke ovuluwawanyu wa mmunepani ni woova ni othukumela." 
Philippians2:13 Vano, ti Muluku omvara muteko mwa nyuwo weera mutthune ni muwere otthunawawe wooreera." 
Philippians2:14 Mupake sootheene muhittaandawulaka ni muhaakhulanaka," 
Philippians2:15 weera mukhale woohikhala nthowa ni ootteela, anamwane a Muluku oohikhalano nthowa variyari wa ekhapira yoonanara ni yootakhala, mwa yeeyo nyuwo munaara ntoko ithenyeeri sa wiirimu." 
Philippians2:16 Mvarexexe nnenesene masu a okumi weera, vanihukuni na Kristu, wiixoonihereye weera nkitthimanke naari nkivanre muteko wa siiyo." 
Philippians2:17 Wa soothesene, hata kirihiwaka ntoko yooveleela yoowura vasulu wa yooveleela ni muteko onrweela wa nroromelonanyu, koohakalala ni kootteeliwa murima ni nyuwo ootheene." 
Philippians2:18 Hiihotho nyuwo mutteeliwe murima ni muhakalale ni miyo. 
Philippians2:19 Kinroromela mwa Apwiya Yeesu woorumihelani woowaakuveya Timootheyo weera miyotho kikhale ni murima woolipa, kaakhelelaka ihaalisanyu." 
Philippians2:20 Nkinono mukina ntoko yoowo onaasaasa mpuhaanyu ni murima wooreera," 
Philippians2:21 niwoko ootheene anaasaasa otthunawaya asineenaaya, ohikhanle otthuna wa Yeesu Kristu." 
Philippians2:22 Nyuwotho moosuwela weera Timootheyo aahoonihera ororomeleyawawe, niwoko aavara vamoha ni miyo mmutekoni wa masu ooreeraxa ntoko mwaana a mpatta wa atithawe." 
Philippians2:23 Ti yoowo kineeraaka koorumiheleni, koonakaru itthusaka moota sineeraaya wooweetta," 
Philippians2:24 kaaroromelaka Apwiya weera miyotho kirowe woowaakuveya. 
Philippians2:25 Wa soothesene, kinuupuwela weera ontthuneya woohokoloxerani munnaka Epafrodito, namuteko a mutekwaaka, mukhwaaka mukhottoni ni murummwa mwaamurumihalaanyu weera arumeele soohaawelasaka." 
Philippians2:26 Vano owo onunkheliwa ni nyuwo ootheene ni onimweeteteya, niwoko mwaahiiwa weera owo aamvoreiwa." 
Philippians2:27 Mwa yeeyo aamvoreiwa ni aahanle vakhaani okhwa, mene Muluku aammorela ikharari yoowo, ni ohikhanle paahi yoowo, mene miyotho weera miyo kihitepe othananaxa." 
Philippians2:28 Tivawo kineeraaka kimurumihe woowaakuveya weera mwaamoonaka veeli, muhakalale ni miyo kihikhale ni othanana." 
Philippians2:29 Mmwaakhele yoowo mwa Apwiya ni ohakalalaxa ni mwaattittimihe atthu ntoko yoowo," 
Philippians2:30 niwoko owo aahanle vakhaani okhwa mwaha wa osivela wa muteko wa Kristu, alevaka okumaawe weera akivahe ekhavihero nyuwo mwahaawenraanyu ovaha." 
Philippians3:1 Wookisera axunnaka, muhakalale mwa Apwiya. Nkinkhulumuwa woolepelani veeli itthu imoharu seiyo, ni seiyo siri itthu soowoolipiherani nyuwo." 
Philippians3:2 Mwiipasoope ni alapwa. Mwiipasoope ni yaawo ampaka soonanara; yaawo antthuna wiineliwa paahi. 
Philippians3:3 Vano, ti hiyo nri wiineliwa, hiyo ninlapaahu mMunepani wa Muluku, hiyo nniivuwihaahu mwa Kristu Yeesu, ni khaninroromela naari etthu emoha mweerutthuni," 
Philippians3:4 hata kikhalanaka mathowa ororomela mwa yeeyo. Akhala mukina onuupuwela weera ookhalano mathowa a ororomela mweerutthuni, ootepaxa ti miyo." 
Philippians3:5 Miyo kiineliwe kimalaka mahuku mathannamararu a oyariwawaka, muYixrayeli a epuumba ya Benyamini; muHeberi ooyariwa ni aHeberi; munlamuloni muFarisi*;" 
Philippians3:6 munthitini namattharatthara a ekerexa; moottharani ekhaikhai ya nlamulo, oohikhala malepa." 
Philippians3:7 Mene yeeyo khalayi yaari yoowina wa miyo, vano kinoona ntoko yooriheya niwoko na Kristu." 
Philippians3:8 Wootepaxa, kinoona sootheene ntoko oriheya saalikanxiwaka ni otokweene wa esuwelo ya Kristu Yeesu Apwiyaaka. Niwoko na Yaawo koovaherera itthu sootheene. Vekhaikhai kinoona seiyo ntoko mahiloka weera kimphwanye Kristu" 
Philippians3:9 ni kiphwanyiwe mwa Yoowo, kihikhalanaka ekhaikhaiyaaka enrweela munlamuloni, mene waakhuleliwa weiwe onrweela munroromeloni mwa Kristu, waakhuleliwa weiwe onrweela wa Muluku okhalihiweene munroromeloni." 
Philippians3:10 Kintthuna omusuwela Kristu, ikuru sa ovenyererawawe, aani kintthuna okhala mpatta wa ohaawawawe, kithatuwaka ntoko Owo mookhwaanimwawe," 
Philippians3:11 munroromeloni, weera kikwaniheretho ovenyerera wa akhwiiye." 
Philippians3:12 Nkineera weera koophwanya sootheene, naari kookwanihera, mene kinnatthara weera kiphwanye sootheene seiya, niwoko miyotho koophwanyiwa ni Kristu Yeesu." 
Philippians3:13 Axunna, nkinuupuwela weera miyo koowera seiya sootheene, mene kimpaka etthu emoha: kittiwalaka itthu siri ottuliwaka, ni kipwahereraka wa seiyo siri ohoolowaka," 
Philippians3:14 yoomeene kiniilipiherano yeeyo kaahaawelaaka nri ntthuvelo na wiirimu Muluku oniitthanenlaawe mwa Kristu Yeesu. 
Philippians3:15 Ootheene hiyo nunnuwale mmunepani nuupuweleke itthu iyo mooteene yoola, ni mwa etthu ekina nyuwo muupuwela moota mukina, Muluku anoothaliherenitho yeeyo." 
Philippians3:16 Ontthuneya paahi weera neetteleke mwa yeeyo niphwannyaahu. 
Philippians3:17 Axunna, mukitakihe ni mwaawehexexeke yaawo aneetta moota niwoonihenraahuni." 
Philippians3:18 Vano, ntoko kooleelaakani imaara sincipale, ni vano kinooleelanitho ni maithori: aakhala ancipale ankhala ntoko amwiittana a muttanda wa Kristu." 
Philippians3:19 Mwaha wa yaawo, ommaleloniwaya ti oriheya; mulukwaaya ti nipwiipwi, ni ovuwawaya ori mwa yeeyo eri yoowuuliha muru; awo anuupuwela paahi itthu sa elapo ya vathi." 
Philippians3:20 Wa soothesene, hiyo nri atthu a wiirimu, weiwo nningwehereraahu ni murima wootheene Mvuluxa mmoha, Apwiya Yeesu Kristu." 
Philippians3:21 Ni ikurusene seiyo soolamulelano sootheene Owo anaatatuxe erutthwaahu yoowiiyeviha weera elikane ni erutthwaawe yoovuwaxa. 
Philippians4:1 Tivawo, axunnaka, nyuwo kinoosivelani ni kingwunkhelani, ohakalalawaka ni ecireembaaka, mukhaleke oolipeene mwa Apwiya, oosiveleya!" 
Philippians4:2 Kinimdyoonttelela Ewodiya ni Sintikho weera yuupuwele etthu emoha mwa Apwiya. 
Philippians4:3 Aani miyo kinoovekelani nyuwo mukhwaaka oororomeleya weera mwaakhavihere, niwoko awo aawana vamoha ni miyo niwoko na masu ooreeraxa vamohatho ni Klemente ni anamitekwaaka akina. Masinaaya ari mulivuruni ya okumi." 
Philippians4:4 Muhakalale mwa Apwiya, kinoophitelatho: muhakalale!" 
Philippians4:5 Wiiyevihawanyu okhale woosuwanyeya ni ootheene. Apwiya aakhuveela. 
Philippians4:6 Muheeteteeleke naari etthu emoha, mene mwa soothesene mwaasuwelihe Apwiya mmavekelonimwanyu, muvekelaka, mudyoonttelelaka ni muntthapelaka Muluku." 
Philippians4:7 Ni murettele wa Muluku ompwaha soowuupuwela sootheene onuuthokorore mirimasanyu ni soowuupuwelasanyu mwa Kristu. 
Philippians4:8 Woomalihera axunnaka, mutthare sootheene seiyo siri sa ekhaikhai, sa yoottittimiheya, sa yoororomeleya, sa yootteela, sa yoosiveleya, sa yoophwanelela – aani mwaasaase sootheene sooreera simphwanelela ottottopela." 
Philippians4:9 Sootheene seiyo nyuwo muxuttenraanyu, mwaakhenlaanyu, mwiiwalaanyu ni moonnaanyu wa miyo, mweereke seiyo. Ni Muluku a murettele anaakhale ni nyuwo." 
Philippians4:10 Koohakalala vancipale mwa Apwiya, niwoko woomalihera mookhalanotho ehuhu ya woonihera okipwatthawanyu. Vekhaikhai nyuwo mwannakipwattha, mene khamwaarino ehuhu yoowoonihera." 
Philippians4:11 Nkinghima yeeyo kihaawelaka etthu, niwoko kooxuttera okhala oohakalalela mweehuhuni yootheene." 
Philippians4:12 Koosuwela okhala moohaawani ni okhala moopuhani. Kooxuttera okhala ni ohakalala mahuku ootheene, hata kivonaka, hata ni etala, hata kikhalanaka sincipale, naari ohaawa." 
Philippians4:13 Kingwera soothesene mwa Yoowo onkilipihera. 
Philippians4:14 Wa soothesene, moopaka yooreera wookhala vamoha ni miyo moohaawanimwaka." 
Philippians4:15 Ntoko nyuwo aFilipi musuwenlaanyu, ompacereroni kaapaceraaka olaleiya masu ooreeraxa, miyo kaavenyaaka oMasedoniya, mwaari nyuwo paahi ekerexa emoha yaakikhavihenre moovahani ni ngwaakhelani." 
Philippians4:16 Vano, kireene oTesalonika ni ohaawa, nyuwo khamwaakirumme ekhavihero emaara emoha paahi, mene emaara ti emaara." 
Philippians4:17 Khoohiyono weera miyo kinaasaasa soovaha, mene kinghaawela yeeyo eneera yaandyeerere ntthuvelonanyu." 
Philippians4:18 Kohaakhela sootheene ni sookaattela. Kohaattano woowaakhela wa Epafrodito soovaha seiyo nyuwo mwaarumihalaanyu. Iyo siri yoovaha yoowunkhela yooreera, yooveleela emoha yoowaakhuleliwa ni yoomusiveliha Muluku." 
Philippians4:19 Mulukwaaka anaavahe sootheene munghaawelaanyu ni mihakhusawe soovuwa mwa Kristu Yeesu. 
Philippians4:20 Wa Mulukwaahu ni Atiithi okhale ovuwa woohimala. Ame*. 
Philippians4:21 Mwaavahe isalaama ootteela ootheene mwa Kristu Yeesu. Axunna ari ni miyo animoovahani isalaama. 
Philippians4:22 Ootteela ootheene animoovahani isalaama, wootepaxa yaawo ari a empa ya Seesari." 
Philippians4:23 Mahala a Apwiya Yeesu Kristu ekhale ni munepaanyu. Ame*. 
Colossians1:1 Ya Pawulo, murummwa a Kristu Yeesu mwa otthuna wa Muluku, ni munna Timootheyo," 
Colossians1:2 wa ootteela ni axunna oororomeleya mwa Kristu ari oKolosi: mahala wa nyuwo, ni murettele onrweela wa Muluku Atithihu." 
Colossians1:3 Mahuku ootheene ninnamutthapela Muluku, Atiithi a Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu noovekelelakani nyuwo," 
Colossians1:4 niwoko nohiiwa suulummwaka sa nroromelonanyu murinaanyu mwa Kristu Yeesu, ni sa waasivelawanyu ootteela ootheene," 
Colossians1:5 niwoko na oweherera onoowehererani wiirimu. Nyuwo woopacera mohiiwa sa oweherera wu mwaha wa masu a ekhaikhai, masu ooreeraxa" 
Colossians1:6 yoophwannyeni. Mwa elapo yootheene ya vathi masu ooreeraxa aniima soowiima yunnuwaka, ntoko oneereyaaya variyariwanyu okhuma ehuhu mwiiwalaanyu masu ooreeraxa, ni mwiiwexenxaanyu mahala a Muluku mwa ekhaikhai." 
Colossians1:7 Nyuwo mwaaxuttihiwa ni Epafra, mukhwiihu oosiveleya, murumeiyi oororomeleya a Kristu niwoko na nyuwo," 
Colossians1:8 mwa yoowo onileenle sa osivelawanyu mwa Munepa. 
Colossians1:9 Tivawo, okhuma nihuku niiwalaahu yeeyo, khaninghiyerera woovekelelani, nivekelaka weera nyuwo mukhale oosareya ni esuwelo yootheene ya otthuna wa Muluku, vamoha ni miruku sootheene ni wiiwexexa wa mmunepani." 
Colossians1:10 Nimvekela yeeyo weera mweettelowaanyu okhale woowaaphwanelela Apwiya, ni weera mwaasivelihe Yaawo mwa soothesene, mwiimaka soowiima sa miteko sooreera, munnuwaka mwa esuwelo ya Muluku." 
Colossians1:11 Nimvekelatho weera nyuwo muthatuwe oolipa ni ikuru sootheene niwoko na ikuru sa ovuwawawe weera muvilele sootheene ni oweherera ni ohakalala," 
Colossians1:12 mwaatthapelaka Atiithi yoophwanelingheni waakhela okumi woohimala vamoha ni ootteela moomweneni wa waara. 
Colossians1:13 Vano Awo aanoopola moolamuliwani wa epiphi ni aanithaamihera moomweneni wa Mwanaya Oosiveleya," 
Colossians1:14 mwa Yoowo nookhalano ovuluxiwa, aani elevelelo ya soottheka." 
Colossians1:15 Owo ti Ekhalelo ya Muluku oohooneya, Ntthaara na ephattuwelo yootheene," 
Colossians1:16 niwoko mwa Yoowo soopattuxiwa itthu sootheene siri wiirimu ni vathi – soowooneya ni soohooneya; sikhalaka ihice, naari soowera; ikuru, naari otokweene. Itthu sootheene sipattuxiwe ni Yoowo ni wa Yoowo." 
Colossians1:17 Sihinaaye sootheene, Owo aakhala, ni mwa Yoowo sootheene sookhala." 
Colossians1:18 Owo ti Muru wa erutthu eri ekerexa. Owo ori Epacerero ni Ntthaara variyari wa akhwiiye weera akhale oohilikanxereya a soothesene. 
Colossians1:19 Vano, aasivelihiwa Muluku weera ekwanihero yootheene ekhale mwa Yoowo," 
Colossians1:20 ni weera niwoko na Yoowo siiraanyihiwe itthu sootheene ni Muluku, sikhalaka sa wiirimu, hata sa vathi. Aawenre yeeyo akhalihaka murettele niwoko na ephomaawe evuuvihiwe vamuttandani." 
Colossians1:21 Khalayi nyuwo mwaamwalamwala ni Muluku, ni mmuupuwelonimwanyu mwaari amwiittana niwoko na mweettelowaanyu woonanara." 
Colossians1:22 Vanotho Owo oowiiraanyihani niwoko na okhwa wa Kristu mweerutthuni weera awoonihereni vahoolowawe ootteela, woohikhalano nthowa ni oowoopowa wa soowoothera sootheene," 
Colossians1:23 mwapwaherera oolipeene ni ookhalihiweene munroromeloni, muhisusaka wa nroromelo mwaakhenlaanyu mwiiwakaru masu ooreeraxa. Awo ti masu ala nyuwo mwiiwalaanyu, ni alaleeriwe atthu ootheene a elapo ya vathi, ni miyo Pawulo koothatuwa murumeiyi a masu ooreeraxa ala." 
Colossians1:24 Vano, koohakalala moohaawanimwaka niwoko na nyuwo, niwoko yeeyo kinghaawa mweerutthunimwaka niwoko na ekerexa eri erutthu ya Kristu enkwanihera soohaawa Kristu ohaangwaawe wa yeeyo." 
Colossians1:25 Koothatuwa murumeiyi a ekerexa, ntoko muteko Muluku okivanghaawe weera koothalihereni nnenesene masu a Muluku," 
Colossians1:26 ntikhinelo niipithihiwe wa ihuhu ni ikhapira sikina, mene vano nohooniheriwa wa ootteelaawe." 
Colossians1:27 Wa yaale Muluku aalakela waasuweliha variyari wa amalapo mihakhu soovuwa sa ntikhinelo nna, nri Kristu mwa nyuwo, oweherera wa ovuwa." 
Colossians1:28 Hiyo nnimulaleiya Yoowo, nimoopereraka ni nimuxuttihaka khula mutthu ni miruku sootheene weera niwoonihere atthu ootheene ookwanela mwa Kristu." 
Colossians1:29 Wa yeeyo miyo kimvara muteko kiwanaka ni ikuru sootheene simvara muteko mwa miyo. 
Colossians2:1 Kintthuna weera musuwele moota kingwanaaka mwaha wa nyuwo, ni wa yaawo ari oLawodiseiya, nitho wa ootheene ahinaaye okisuwela." 
Colossians2:2 Kimvara muteko weera ekhale oolipihiweene mirimasaya, ni ekhale vamoha moosivelani ni ewere mihakhu sootheene ni esuwelo yootheene weera esuwele nnenesene ntikhinelo na Muluku, eyo tiiyo Kristu." 
Colossians2:3 Mwa Yoowo soovithiwa mihakhu sootheene sa miruku ni sa esuwelo. 
Colossians2:4 Miyo kinooleelani yeeyo weera ahikhale mutthu aneera oolokottheni ni masu oolokottha. 
Colossians2:5 Vano, naamwi kihikhalaka weiwo mweerutthuni, miyo kiri ni nyuwo mmunepani ni koohakalala woowoona makhalelowaanyu ooreera ni moota mulipalaanyu munroromeloni murinaanyu mwa Kristu." 
Colossians2:6 Tivawo hiiho ntoko nyuwo mmwaakhenlaanyu Kristu Yeesu ntoko Apwiya, mpwaherere okhala mwa Yoowo," 
Colossians2:7 muthipeliweene ni mupuhihiweene nnenesene mwa Yoowo, mulipihiweene munroromeloni, ntoko muxuttihiwaanyu, mwaattaka mootthapelani." 
Colossians2:8 Mwiipasoope weera ahikhale mutthu aneera oopakeeni ipottha sa miruku sa siiyo ni soolokottha sinrweela wa ikhovelelo sa atthu ni makhalelo a elapo ya vathi ela, ohikhanle wa Kristu." 
Colossians2:9 Vano, mwa Kristu enkhala ekwanihero yootheene ya omuluku mweerutthuni," 
Colossians2:10 ni mwa Yoowo ori muru a ikuru ni olamula wootheene nyuwo mohaakhela ekwanihero. 
Colossians2:11 Mwa Yoowo nyuwo mohiineliwatho, khoohiyono wiineliwa ompakiwa mweerutthuni, mene wiineliwa opakiwe ni Kristu, mwa weiwo ori oruliwa wa mukhalelo wootthekeya wa erutthu." 
Colossians2:12 Yeeyo yeereiye nyuwo mwaavithiwaanyu vamoha ni Kristu moopatisani ni mwaavenyererihiwaanyu ni Yoowo niwoko na nroromelonanyu mukuruni sa Muluku, mwa Yoowo omvenyererihale Kristu mookhwaani." 
Colossians2:13 Nyuwo mwaaraanyu ookhweene mootakhalani ni moohiineliwani wa erutthwaanyu, Muluku ohoohihimuxani vamoha ni Kristu. Owo oonilevelela sootakhala sootheene," 
Colossians2:14 ni aamaliha ekaratta ya sookopasahu ni soonyesereriwasaya, mwa seiyo saanoothenre hiyo niwoko na nlamulo. Owo aavenxa ekaratta ele, akhomelaka vamuttandani," 
Colossians2:15 ni awaakhaka ikapwitthi sa ikuru ni otokweene aahuulihiha muru mwaatthuni, awinaka seiye vamuttandani." 
Colossians2:16 Tivawo muhimuhiye mukina oothorihakani niwoko na yeeyo nyuwo munkhuuraanyu, naari mungwuraanyu, hoye hoye niwoko na efesta ekina ya ediini, naari na wuupuwelela nyeeri sinyowani, hoye hoye nihuku na eSaabadu." 
Colossians2:17 Itthu iya siri irungu sa yeeyo yeera erwe; wa soothesene, ekhaikhai emphwanyaneya mwa Kristu." 
Colossians2:18 Muhimuhiye mukina oniixeera oowiiyeviha ni onaalapa andyelo awooceelihakani owina ntthuvelo. Mutthweene yoowo onthaliha nnenesene nyoonelosawe ni soowuupuwelasawe sa erutthu sinthatuwa soowiixoona. 
Colossians2:19 Owo khanlipihiwa vamoha ni Muru ori Kristu. Niwoko na Yoowo erutthu yootheene, yoolipihiwa ni yookumanyihiwa munkumana ni misemba, engwera wunnuwa, ntoko Muluku ontthunaawe." 
Colossians2:20 Woonaka weera mohookhwa vamoha ni Kristu wa mikhalelo sa elapo ya vathi, heeni munttharaanyu ikano sa ele, ntoko nlelo muri a yeeyo?" 
Colossians2:21 Kinghima sa ikano ntoko: “Muhivarele muteko! Muhilawihe! Muhitave!” 
Colossians2:22 Itthu sootheene iyo nsiriheye muhoolo, niwoko sinrweela wa malamulo ni mahusiho a mutthu." 
Colossians2:23 Ikano seiyo sookhalano wiixeera wa miruku, niwoko siniixeera moota wa ediini, wa wiiyeviha ni wa wiixuumaaliha erutthu. Vaheera iyo khasimvareleya muteko, niwoko khasingwera olamula soohaawela sa erutthu." 
Colossians3:1 Tivawo, woonaka weera nyuwo moovenyerera vamoha ni Kristu, mwaasaase itthu seiyo siri wiirimu, weiwo Kristu okilaathiyaawe moono mulopwana wa Muluku." 
Colossians3:2 Mutthokelele itthu sa wiirimu ohiya sa vathi. 
Colossians3:3 Nyuwo mohookhwa, ni vano okumaanyu woovithiwa ni Kristu mwa Muluku." 
Colossians3:4 Kristu ori okumaanyu ooniheriwaka, vano nyuwotho mmooniheriwe ni Yoowo moovuwani." 
Colossians3:5 Tivawo mwiive sootheene siri sa mukhalelo wa erutthu yootthekeya: oraruwa, ohitteela, soohaawela sa olavilavi, soohaawela soonanara, ni wiinlela mihakhu, ori olapa miluku sikina." 
Colossians3:6 Ti niwoko na itthusene seiyo sineeraaya saarweele isara sa Muluku yaale ankhala ni ohiiwelela. 
Colossians3:7 Mwaakhovelela otthara itthusene seiyo mookuminimwanyu wa khalayi. 
Colossians3:8 Vanonto, muhiye itthu sootheene iya: isara, onyoonyiwa, otakhala, waapa, masu oonanara ni wuulumawanyu." 
Colossians3:9 Muhootherane mukina ni mukhwaawe, mweenre nyuwo murulaka mukhalelo wa khalayi ni mitekosaya," 
Colossians3:10 ni moowara onyowani onrehereriwa woohihiyerereya moosuwelani, ntoko ekhalelo ya Mpattuxaanyu." 
Colossians3:11 Mwa Yoowo khawowo muGrego, naari muYuda; oowiineliwa, naari oohiineliwa; mmalapo, naari muXitha*; epottha, naari neethi, mene Kristu ti sootheene ni ori mwa ootheene." 
Colossians3:12 Tivawo, ntoko muloko woothanliwa ni Muluku, wootteela ni woosiveleya, mwiiwarihe murima wa ikhararixa, murima wooreera, wiiyeviha, murima woomaala ni moopixani murima." 
Colossians3:13 Muvilelaneke mukina ni mukhwaawe ni mulevelele milattu araayano akina ni akhwaaya. Mulevelele ntoko Apwiya yoolevelenlaayani. 
Colossians3:14 Opwaha soothesene, mwiiwarihe osivela ori yookumanela enkhaliha omoha wookwanela." 
Colossians3:15 Murettele wa Kristu okhale mphuki mmirimanimwanyu, woonaka weera nyuwo mwiitthaniwe weera mukhale mmuretteleni ntoko mipatta sa erutthu emoha paahi. Ni mutthapeliwe." 
Colossians3:16 Masu a Kristu ekhaleke mwa nyuwo moota wookwana. Muxuttihane ni mulakane mukina ni mukhwaawe ni miruku sootheene, ni mwiipe masalimu ni icipo sikina sa mmunepani, muntthapelaka Muluku mmirimanimwanyu." 
Colossians3:17 Sootheene mumpakaanyu, hata mmasuni, naari mmutekoni, mupake yeeyo mwa Nsina na Apwiya Yeesu, muntthapelaka Muluku Atiithi mwa Yaawo." 
Colossians3:18 Axaara, ngwiiweleleke asiiyinyu, ntoko ontthuneyaaya mwa Apwiya." 
Colossians3:19 Axiiya, mwaasivele axaarinyu ni muhiwuumele murima yaawo." 
Colossians3:20 Anamwane, ngwiiweleleke asinaangolowaanyu, niwoko eyo enaasiveliha Apwiya." 
Colossians3:21 Asitiithi, muhaatannyeke anamwaniinyu weera awo ehiporore." 
Colossians3:22 Ipottha, ngwiiweleleke asineene a vathi mwa sootheene, khoohiyono paahi weera mwaasivelihe, naari awo yoowehexexakani, mene ni murima wa ekhaikhai ngwoovaka Apwiya." 
Colossians3:23 Sootheene mumpakaanyu, mupakeke ni murima wootheene ntoko wa Apwiya, ohikhanle wa atthu," 
Colossians3:24 musuwelaka weera mmwaakhele wa Apwiya ntthuvelo na yoohiyeriwa*. Ti Kristu Apwiya nyuwo munimurumeelaanyu. 
Colossians3:25 Yoowo ompaka sootakhala anaakheletho sootakhala, ni mwa yeeyo khaniwowo nthalu." 
Colossians4:1 Asineene, mvahe wa ipotthasanyu yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai ni yootthuneya, musuwelaka weera nyuwotho mookhalano Apwiyaanyu ari wiirimu." 
Colossians4:2 Muvekele ni nthiti, muwehaweheke ni mutthapeliwe." 
Colossians4:3 Ehuhuweene yeeyo munivekeleletho hiyo weera Muluku ahule mulako wa mutthengaahu weera niwere olaleiya ntikhinelo na Kristu, mwa nenno miyo kootthukiwa." 
Colossians4:4 Mvekele weera miyo kithalihere nna nnenesene, ntoko ontthuneyaaya opaka." 
Colossians4:5 Mweetteke ni miruku variyari wa atthu oomokoni, muvarelaka muteko ihuhu sootheene." 
Colossians4:6 Mahuku ootheene wuulumawanyu okhale woosiveleya ni wooweleeliwa maakha weera musuwele moota woomwaakhula mutthu ti mutthu. 
Colossians4:7 Tikhiko anooleeleni ihaali sootheene mwaha wa miyo. Owo ti munna oosiveleya, murumeiyi oororomeleya ni namuteko mwa Apwiya." 
Colossians4:8 Miyo kinoomurumiha wa nyuwo ni nthowa nna weera musuwele nnenesene sootheene sineereiya ni hiyo, ni weera owo oolipiheni mirimasanyu." 
Colossians4:9 Owo anaarwe ni Onesimo, munna oororomeleya ni oosiveleya, ori mmoha a nyuwo. Awo eniyoothalihereni sootheene sineereiya nno." 
Colossians4:10 Aristarkho, mukhwaaka mukaliposo, onimoovahani isalaama, nitho Marku, munna a Barnaba. Nyuwo mwaahaakhela malamulo mwaha wa Marku owo. Vano owo arwa wooxekurani, mmwaakhelele." 
Colossians4:10 Aristarkho, mukhwaaka mukaliposo, onimoovahani isalaama, nitho Marku, munna a Barnaba. Nyuwo mwaahaakhela malamulo mwaha wa Marku owo. Vano owo arwa wooxekurani, mmwaakhelele." 
Colossians4:11 Yeesu, iitthaniwatho Yusto, onimoovahani isalaama. Awo ari paahi a wiineliwa amvara muteko ni miyo wa omwene wa Muluku, ni yannakilipihera murimaaka." 
Colossians4:12 Epafra ori mmoha a nyuwo ni murumeiyi a Kristu Yeesu onimoovahani isalaama. Owo onnawana woohihiyerera mmavekeloni wa nyuwo weera nyuwo mupwaherere oolipeene mwa otthuna wootheene wa Muluku ntoko atthu atokweene munroromeloni ni ooviriyeliwaxa. 
Colossians4:13 Vano kinimukhalela onamoona weera owo onnavara muteko vancipale niwoko na nyuwo, ni wa yaawo ari oLawodiseiya ni oHiyerapoli." 
Colossians4:14 Luuka, meediku oosiveleya, ni Dema animoovahani isalaama." 
Colossians4:15 Mwaavahe isalaama axunna a oLawodiseiya, nitho Numfa ni ekerexa enthukumana vaatewawe." 
Colossians4:16 Yaasommwaka ekaratta ela variyariwanyu, mureherereke weera yasommwetho mukerexani ya oLawodiseiya, ni weera nyuwo musometho ekaratta ya oLawodiseiya." 
Colossians4:17 Mwamuleele Arkipo: “Mwiipasoope okwanihera muteko mwaakhenlaanyu mwa Apwiya.” 
Colossians4:18 Miyo, Pawulo, kinlepa isalaama iya ni ntatanaka. Muupuwelele onyoorowaaka. Mahala ekhale ni nyuwo." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Ya Pawulo, Silvano ni Timootheyo, wa ekerexa ya aTesalonika mwa Muluku Atiithi ni Apwiya Yeesu Kristu: wa nyuwo mahala ni murettele." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Ninnamutthapela Muluku wa ootheene nyuwo, nooromolakani nyuwo mmavekelonimwahu." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Ninnuupuwelela mahuku ootheene vamaithoni wa Muluku mitekosanyu sinruweriwa ni nroromelo; nthitinanyu nneettihiwa ni osivela, ni ovilelawanyu onrweela wa waaweherera Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Axunna oosiveleya mwa Muluku, noosuwela weera Owo oothanlaleni," 
1Thessalonians1:5 niwoko maswaahu ooreeraxa khayoophiyenreni nyuwo ni masu paahi, menetho ni ikuru, ni mwa Munepa Wootteela, ni mooviriyelani wootheene. Nyuwo moosuwela mweettelo naaraahuno variyariwanyu niwoko na nyuwo." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Mwa yeeyo, nyuwo moothatuwa anamatakihaahu, ni a Apwiya. Waarookhalaru ohaawa wincipale, nyuwo mwaahaakhela masu a Muluku ni ohakalala onrweela wa Munepa Wootteela." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Ni hiiho moothatuwa ethoonyero wa aKristu ootheene ari oMasedoniya ni wAkhaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Vano, okhuma wa nyuwo mutthenga wa Apwiya waamwaramwareya, khoohiyono paahi oMasedoniya ni wAkhaya, menetho mweelaponi yootheene nroromelo nyuwo murinaanyu mwa Apwiya noosuwanyeya. Tivawo ohintthuneyaaya ohima etthu ekina mwaha wa yeeyo." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Atthweene yaawo anthaliha moota nyuwo mwaanaakhenlaanyu, ni moota muhokoleenlaanyu wa Muluku, muhiyaka miluku sikina weera munrumeele Muluku mukumi ni a ekhaikhai," 
1Thessalonians1:10 ni moota mungwehereraanyu wiirimu orwa wa Mwanawe, mwa Yoowo Muluku omvenyererihalaawe mookhwaani: Yeesu, omvuluxa wa isara sineera sirwe." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Axunna, nyuwo moosuwela weera wooxekuraniwahu khawaahiyono wa siiyo." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Naari mweeraru nihasuliwaka ni niruwaniwaka oFilipi, ntoko musuwenlaanyu, naalipiha murima ni ekhavihero ya Mulukwaahu, woolaleerani masu ooreeraxa a Muluku variyari wa wiittana wincipale." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Vano, olaleiyawahu khoonrweela mootapanyani, naari wa mikhalelo soohitteela, hata khanuupuwela weera noolokottheni." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Ohiyanawaya, ninuuluma ntoko asilopwana oowaakhuleliwa ni Muluku avahereriwe masu ooreeraxa. Khannuuluma hiiho weera naasivelihe atthu, mene wa Muluku onsuwela mirimasahu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Nyuwo moosuwela nnenesene weera khanitonke wuuluma masu oonyeenga, naari nihaasaka mihakhu, Muluku ti namoona." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Khanaasaasa ovuwa wa atthu, naari wa nyuwo, hata wa akina." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Orookhalaru weera hiyo naawera woolemelani ntoko arummwa a Kristu, hiyo noothatuwa ooreera murima variyariwanyu, ntoko maayi onaakosoopa anamwanaawe." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Hapo nohoosivelani moota ola, khanaalakenle woovahani paahi masu ooreeraxa a Muluku, menetho okumaahu, niwoko nyuwo moothatuwa oosiveleyaxaahu." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Axunna, vekhaikhai munuupuwelela mitekosahu ni okhulumuwawahu. Nannavara muteko ohiyu ni othana weera nihikhale oomulemela mutthu, hiyo noolaleerakani masu ooreeraxa a Muluku." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Nyuwo ni Muluku muri anamoona weera hiyo naarino mweettelo wootteela, wa ekhaikhai ni woohikhala malepa variyariwanyu nyuwo munroromela." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Vano, moosuwela weera naamupwattha mutthu ti mutthu a nyuwo, ntoko nireene atithinyu," 
1Thessalonians2:12 nilipihaka murima, nipepesaka ni nikhalelaka onamoona weera nyuwo mweettele moota woophwanelela wa Muluku, mwa Yoowo owiitthanenleni wa omwenaawe ni ovuwa." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Ninnamutthapelatho Muluku nihihiyereraka, niwoko, ngwaakhelani nyuwo masu a Muluku wa hiyo, khamwaakhenle ntoko masu a mutthu, mene, ntoko araaya ekhaikhai, ntoko masu a Muluku amvara muteko mwa nyuwo munroromela." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Niwoko nyuwo, axunna, moothatuwa anamatakiha a ikerexa sa Muluku siri oYudeiya mwa Kristu Yeesu. Nyuwo mwaahaawa itthusene seiyo niwoko na mulokwaanyu asineenaanyu, hiiho ntoko ikerexa iye saahaawaaya niwoko na aYuda," 
1Thessalonians2:15 mwa yaawo yaawiivale Apwiya Yeesu ni maprofeeti, nitho yaanisoondale hiyo. Awo khaanimusiveliha Muluku ni ari amwiittana a ootheene," 
1Thessalonians2:16 yeereraka weera enooceelihe wuuluma ni amalapo ni awo ehivuluxiwe. Moota ola animwaandyeerera sootthekasaya asineenaaya, ni isara sa Muluku sohaarweela yaawo." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Wa soothesene, hiyo, axunna, nireene ehuhu vakhaani ottaiwene wa nyuwo – mweerutthuni, khoohiyono mmuupuweloni – nintthunaxa weera niwooneenitho ekhove ni ekhove niwoko na munkhela nirinaahu wa nyuwo." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Naatthuna wooxekurani – miyo Pawulo muneenaaka, kheehiyono emaara emoha paahi, mene emaara ti emaara kaaheerera; wa soothesene, Satana aanooceeliha." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Vano, ari taani owehererawahu, ohakalalawahu, hoye hoye ecireembaahu vamaithoni wa Apwiya Yeesu moorwaanimwaya, ohikhanle nyuwo?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Mwa yeeyo, nyuwo muri ovuwawahu ni ohakalalawahu." 
1Thessalonians3:1 Tivawo kihiweraka owehereratho, kaalakela weera hiyo nihale meekhaahu wAtheena," 
1Thessalonians3:2 ni hiiho naamurumiha Timootheyo, munnihu ni namuteko a Muluku mwa masu ooreeraxa a Kristu, weera oolipihereni mirimasanyu ni oohakalaliheni munroromeloni," 
1Thessalonians3:3 weera ahikhale mukina aneera attikinyiwe wootepaxa mwa soohooxa iya. Moosuwela nnenesene weera niitthaneliwe wa seiyo. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Hiyo naaraahu ni nyuwo naahooleelani weera naarwa osoondiwa, ni yeeyo vekhaikhai yookhumelela, ntoko nyuwo musuwenlaanyu." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Tivawo, kihiweraka ovilela, kaamurumiha Timootheyo weera asuwelihiwe mwaha wa nroromelonanyu. Kaahoova weera namweerera ohoohapuxani ephiro ya ekhaikhai, othatuwaka wa siiyo mutekwaahu." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Wa soothesene, Timootheyo oophiya wa nyuwo, anileelaka ihaali sooreera mwaha wa nroromelonanyu ni osivelawanyu, eeraka weera mahuku ootheene nyuwo munninuupuwelelaxa nnenesene, mutthunaka onoona hiyo, ntoko hiyotho nintthunaahu owoonani." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Tivawo, axunna, moohaawelanimwahu ni soohooxa sootheene noolipihiwa mwaha wa nyuwo niwoko na nroromelonanyu." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Ni vano hiyo ninkhala vekhaikhai, woonaka weera nyuwo muri oolipa mwa Apwiya." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Nnimutthapele Muluku moota heeni woowaatta niwoko na nyuwo, ni na ohakalala wootheene nirinaahu vahoolowawe mwaha wa nyuwo?" 
1Thessalonians3:10 Ohiyu ni othana ninnavekela woohihiyerera weera niwere owoonani ekhove ni ekhove, ni weera nookwaneliheni yeeyo ehanle ni nroromelonanyu." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Muluku Atithihu muneenaawe ni Apwiyaahu Yeesu ereherere ephiro weera niphiye wa nyuwo. 
1Thessalonians3:12 Apwiya yunnuwihe moota woowaatta osivelawanyu murinaanyu mukina ni mukhwaawe ni wa ootheene, mooteene yoowo osivelawahu woowaatta wa nyuwo." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Awo elipihere mirimasanyu weera mukhale oohikhala malepa ni ootteela vamaithoni wa Mulukwaahu Atiithi moorwani mwa Apwiyaahu Yeesu vamoha ni ootteelaaya ootheene. 
1Thessalonians4:1 Woomaliha, axunna, noohooxuttihani moota wooweetta weera munsivelihe Muluku, ni mwa Yoowo nyuwo munimweera weetta. Vano, ninoovekelani ni ninoodyoonttelelani mwa Apwiya Yeesu weera mupwahereraxe mwa mweetteloweene yoowo." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Nyuwo moosuwela malamulo noovanghaahuni mwa Apwiya Yeesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Otthuna wa Muluku ti weera nyuwo mutteelihiwe: musembe oraruwa. 
1Thessalonians4:4 Khula mutthu a nyuwo asuwele olamula erutthwaawe muneenaawe moota wootteela ni woottittimiheya," 
1Thessalonians4:5 khoohiyono ni soohaawela soonanara ntoko amalapo ahimusuwenle Muluku. 
1Thessalonians4:6 Mwaha wa yeeyo, ahikhale mukina aneera amutthekele munneiye, naari ampakele yoonanara. Apwiya eniittaruxe miteko sootheene iyo, ntoko nooleenlaahuni nnenesene," 
1Thessalonians4:7 niwoko Muluku khaniitthanenle ohitteela, mene otteelihiwa." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Tivawo yoowo onkhootta itthusene seiya khanimukhootta mutthu, mene Muluku onoovahani Munepaawe Wootteela." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Mwaha wa omusivela mukhwiinyu khoontthuneya woolepelani, niwoko nyuwo asineenaanyu mooxuttihiwa ni Muluku osivelana mukina ni mukhwaawe." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Vekhaikhai munaasivela axunna ootheene a elapo yootheene ya oMasedoniya. Wa soothesene, axunna, ninoonyesererani weera mutepaxe opwaherera mwa yeeyo." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Mwiilipihere okhala ni okumi woomaaleleya; mungwehexexe nnenesene nakoswaanyu, ni muvare muteko ni matataanyu, ntoko nooleenlaahuni," 
1Thessalonians4:12 weera mweettelowaanyu wa khula nihuku owine nttittimiho na yaawo ari oomokoni, ni muhihaawele etthu ya mukina." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Axunna, khanintthuna weera nyuwo mukhale oohisuwela mwaha wa yaawo akhwiiye, weera muhiithananihere, ntoko akina ahikhanleno oweherera." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Naroromela weera Yeesu ohookhwa ni oovenyerera, ninoororomelatho weera Muluku onimwaaruuha vamoha ni Yeesu yaawo akhwiiye mwa Yoowo." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Ninooleelani nyuwo, nittharaka masu a Apwiya, weera hiyo nri akumi ni nneera nikhale mpaka orwa wa Apwiya, khaninrowa waahoola yaawo akhwiiye." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Apwiya aneenaaya moolamulani, munsuni na ndyelo mutokweene ni woorumani wa nipalapatta na Muluku, eniikhuruwe wiirimu, ni yaawo akhwiiye mwa Kristu eniivenyerere toko." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Vahoolowaya hiyo nneera nikhale ni okumi nnikuxiwe ni yaawo mmahutteni weera naakumanane Apwiya osulu. Ni hiiho nnikhale ni Apwiya mahuku ootheene oohimala. 
1Thessalonians4:18 Mulipiheraneke mukina ni mukhwaawe ni masu ala. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Vano, axunna, wa ihuhu ni mahuku oohoolo khoontthuneya woolepelani," 
1Thessalonians5:2 niwoko nyuwo asineenaanyu moosuwela nnenesene weera nihuku na Apwiya nnirwe ntoko namwiiya ohiyu. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Akina yeera: “Murettele ni weetta nnene,” vano woowaakuveya ophwatiwa ngwaakhuruwele, ntoko onrweela woowaakuveya ovoreiya wa oyara wa muthiyana, ni awo hata vakhaani khaanrowa woopowa." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Nyuwotho, axunna, khamukhanle mpiphini; tivawo nihuku nno khanirwa nootutuxerani ntoko namwiiya." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Nyuwo ootheene muri anamwane a waara; anamwane a othana. Khanihiyono a ohiyu, naari a epiphi." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Tivawo nihikone ntoko akina, mene niipasoope ni nikhale oohula maitho." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Vano, yaawo ankona, ankona ohiyu, ni yaawo anghapaliwa, anghapaliwa ohiyu." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Wa soothesene, hiyo nri a othana nikhale oohula maitho, niwaraka eyuuma ya vakakasani ya nroromelo ni osivela, ni ekapasete ya oweherera ovuluxiwa." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Niwoko Muluku khanithanlenle isara, mene weera naakhele ovuluxiwa mwaha wa Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians5:10 Awo anikhwenle hiyo weera, hata nivenyaka, hata nikonaka, nikhale vamoha ni Yaawo." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Tivawo, mulipihe mirimasanyu ni mupuhihaneke mukina ni mukhwaawe, ntoko mwa yeeyo nyuwo mumpakaanyu." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Ninoovekelani, axunna, weera mwaattittimihe yaawo anlipihera ovara muteko variyariwanyu, ni anoohoolelani mwa Apwiya nitho anoolakani." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Mwaattittimihaxeke moosivelani niwoko na mutekwaaya. Mukhaleke ni murettele mukina ni mukhwaawe. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Ninoodyoonttelelani nyuwo, axunna: ngwooperere atthu ooreesi; mwaalipihere yaawo oohilipa; mwaakhavihere ookhulumuwa; mwaavilele ootheene." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Mwiipasoope weera ahikhale mukina aneera amuhokoloxere isikula mukhwaawe, mene mahuku ootheene mukhale ooreera murima mukina ni mukhwaawe ni wa ootheene." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Muhakalale mahuku ootheene. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Muvekele woohihiyerera. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Mutthapele mwa ihuhu sootheene, niwoko wu ti otthuna wa Muluku wa nyuwo mwa Kristu Yeesu." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Muhicipihe Munepa. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Muhiramuse ithalihero sa otthuna wa Muluku," 
1Thessalonians5:21 mene ngwehexexe itthu soothesene, ni mwaakhulele yeeyo eri yooreera." 
1Thessalonians5:22 Mususe wa soonanara sootheene. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Muluku muneenaawe a murettele ootteeliheni woowaatta. Munepaanyu, okumaanyu ni erutthwaanyu yootheene ethokororiwe woohikhala malepa moorwaani wa Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Yaawo angwiitthanani ari oororomeleya ni eniipake yeeyo. 
1Thessalonians5:25 Axunna, munivekeleletho hiyo." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Ngwuulumihe axunna ootheene ni ebeecu yootteela. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Kinoovekelani nyuwo vamaithoni wa Apwiya weera ekaratta ela esommwe ni axunna ootheene. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Mahala a Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu ekhale ni nyuwo. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Ya Pawulo, Silvano ni Timootheyo, wa ekerexa ya aTesalonika mwa Muluku Atithihu ni Apwiya Yeesu Kristu:" 
2Thessalonians1:2 mahala wa nyuwo, ni murettele onrweela wa Muluku Atiithi ni Apwiya Yeesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians1:3 Axunna, ontthuneya omutthapela Muluku mahuku ootheene niwoko na nyuwo, ni eyo yoophwaneleya, niwoko nroromelonanyu ninnunnuwa khula nihuku, nitho osivelawanyu murinaanyu mukina ni mukhwaawe." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Tivawo niniivuwiha mwaha wa nyuwo vamaithoni wa ikerexa sa Muluku niwoko na nroromelo ni ovilela munooniheraanyu moosoondiwani wootheene ni mmahooxoni ootheene nyuwo mumvilelaanyu. 
2Thessalonians1:5 Sootheene iyo sinoonihera weera nthorihelo na Muluku nri na ekhaikhai, eyo tiiyo weera Muluku anaawiitthaneni oophwanelela omwene wa Muluku, mwa yoowo nyuwo onoohaawihani." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Ti ekhaikhai weera Muluku anaalivele ni soohooxa yaale anoohooxani nyuwo," 
2Thessalonians1:7 ni anoovaheeni wiitthuuwa nyuwo munghasuliwa, ni wa hiyotho. Eyo eniikhumelele Apwiya Yeesu eneeraaya yooniheriwe wiirimu variyari wa nlumi na mooro, nivarelaka vamoha ni andyelowaaya a ikuruxa." 
2Thessalonians1:8 Vano, Awo eniyaattaruxe yaawo ahimusuwenle Muluku, ni ahiniiwelela masu ooreeraxa a Apwiyaahu Yeesu." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Awo eniihaawe ottaruxiwa wa ophwatiwa woohimala, ekhalaka ottaiwene wa ekhove ya Apwiya ni wa ovuwa wa ikurusaya." 
2Thessalonians1:10 Eyo eniikhumelele vanihukuni Awo eneeraaya erwe weera evuwihiwe mwa ootteelaaya, ni ettottopeliwe ni yaawo ootheene yaaroromenle vamoha ni nyuwo muroromenle onamoonaahu." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Nuupuwelaka yeeyo, ninnavekela woohihiyerera wa nyuwo, weera Muluku oophwaneliheni wiitthaniwawanyu, ni akwanihere ni ikuru soohaawelasanyu sooreera sootheene ni miteko sootheene sa nroromelonanyu." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Hiiho Nsina na Apwiyaahu Yeesu nnivuwihiwe mwa nyuwo, ni nyuwo mwa nenno, mwaha wa mahala a Mulukwaahu ni Apwiya Yeesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Axunna, mwaha wa orwa wa Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu ni othukumanawahu ni Yaawo, ninoodyoonttelelani nyuwo:" 
2Thessalonians2:2 muhittikinyeye mmurimanimwanyu, naari muhoopopihiwe woowaakuveya, hata ni munepa mukina, hata ni masu, naari ni ekaratta, ntoko yaari yawihu, ehimaka weera nihuku na Apwiya noophiya." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Ahikhale mutthu onoolokotthani hata vakhaani. Nihuku nno khaninrwa ophiya ohinaaye ohiiwelela otokotoko wookisera, ni wooniheriwa wa mutthu a yoottheka*, mwaana a oriheya." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Owo anaakhale mwiittana a sootheene seiyo siri sa Muluku, hoye hoye soolapiwa, ni aniivuwihe wa itthu iyo mpaka anaakilaathi vaNipuroni Nootteela* na Muluku, alaleiyaka weera owo muneenaawe ti Muluku." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Khamunuupuwelela weera nlelo kaaraaka ni nyuwo, kannooleelani sa seiyo?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 Vano moosuwela yeeyo emmooceeliha yoowo, weera owo ooniheriwe mwa ehuhuwaawe." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Vekhaikhai, ntikhinelo na otakhala nneera nivaraka muteko vaanaano vaava, ehalaka paahi weera evenxiwe yeeyo emmooceeliha." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Vahoolowaya anooniheriwe namatakhala owo, ni Apwiya Yeesu eniimwiive ni iphumu sa eyanowaaya ni eniimphwate ni orwawaya." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Orwa wa namatakhala owo ori ni ekhavihero ya Satana ni ikuruxa, ineneero ni sootikhiniha," 
2Thessalonians2:10 aalokotthaka yaawo anriheya ni sootakhala sootheene. Awo anriheya, niwoko yaakhootta osivela ekhaikhai weera evuluxiwe." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Tivawo Muluku onaarumihelaawe ikuru soolokottha weera eroromele soowootha 
2Thessalonians2:12 ni ethorihiwe ootheene yaawo ahiroromenle ekhaikhai, mene yaatthuna sootakhala." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Vano, ontthuneya hiyo omtthapela Muluku mahuku ootheene wa nyuwo, axunna oosiveliwa ni Apwiya, niwoko okhuma ompacereroni Muluku aahoothanlani weera muvuluxiwe mmutekoni wootteeliha wa Munepa Wootteela ni munroromeloni mwa ekhaikhai." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Owo owiitthanenleni yeeyo ni maswaahu ooreeraxa weera mwaakhele ovuwa wa Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu. 
2Thessalonians2:15 Tivawo, axunna, mupwaherere ni murima woolipa ni muvarexexe masu muxuttihiwaanyu, hata ekhove ni ekhove, naari ni ekarattaahu." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Apwiya Yeesu Kristu aneenaaya ni Mulukwaahu Atiithi, mwa Yoowo onisivenle ni onivanghe opepesa woohimala ni ororomela wooreera niwoko na mahala," 
2Thessalonians2:17 yoolipiheni mirimasanyu ni yoolipihereni mwa miteko sooreera ni masu ooreera ootheene. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Woomaliha, axunna, munivekelele hiyo weera masu a Apwiya emwarawareye woowaakuveya ni evuwihiwe, ntoko yaakhumelenlaaya variyariwanyu." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Muvekeletho weera hiyo nivuluxiwe wa atthu ooriheya ni oonanara, niwoko khaahiyono ootheene anroromela." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Apwiyatho ti oororomeleya. Awo anoolipiherani ni anoothokororani mwa namatakhala. 
2Thessalonians3:4 Nohaaroromela Apwiya weera nyuwo mumpaka ni munoopwaherera opaka yeeyo hiyo noolamulenlaahuni. 
2Thessalonians3:5 Apwiya yeettiheke mirimasanyu moosivelani wa Muluku ni moovilelani wa Kristu. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Axunna, hiyo ningwoopererani mwa Nsina na Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu weera mususe wa yoowo munna ootheene onkhala moota wa oreesi, ahittharaka ekhovelelo mwaakhenlaanyu wa hiyo." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Vano nyuwo asineenaanyu moosuwela moota ontthuneyaaya otthara mweettelowaahu, niwoko khanaakhanle ni oreesi hiyo naaraahu variyariwanyu," 
2Thessalonians3:8 hata khanaaciiye etthu ya mukina nihilivaka. Ohiyanawaya, nannavara muteko woovihaxa ohiyu ni othana weera ahilemeliwe mukina a nyuwo," 
2Thessalonians3:9 khoohiyono niwoko khanaakhalanne ikuru soopakano yeeyo, mene niwoko naatthuna okhala ethoonyero yooreera nyuwo owera otthara." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Hiyo naaraahu nlelo ni nyuwo, naahoolamulelani ha: Akhala mukina ohintthuna ovara muteko, ahicetho." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Vano, nohiiwa weera variyariwanyu akina ari ooreesi; awo khamvara muteko, mene anoowaanganyera atthu." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Wa yaale nnaalamula ni nnaalipihera mwa Apwiya Yeesu Kristu weera evare muteko nnenesene, ni hiiho eceeke yooca ya asineenaaya." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Wa nyuwo, axunna, muhikhulumuwe opaka yooreera." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Akhala mukina ohiniiwelela maswaahu a ekaratta ela, munthoonye ni muheette ni yoowo, weera owo uuliwe muru." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Wa soothesene, muhimpake ntoko mwiittana, mene mmooperere ntoko munna." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Apwiya aneenaaya a murettele yoovaheeni murettele ehuhu yootheene ni moota wootheene. Apwiya ekhale ni nyuwo ootheene. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Miyo, Pawulo, kinlepa esalaama ela ni ntatanaka eri eneneero mwa ikarattasaka sootheene. Ti mooteene yoola kinlepaaka." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Mahala a Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu ekhale ni nyuwo ootheene. 
1Timothy1:1 Ya Pawulo, murummwa a Kristu Yeesu munlamuloni na Muluku, Mvuluxaahu, ni na Kristu Yeesu, owehererawahu." 
1Timothy1:2 Wa Timootheyo, mwanaka a ekhaikhai munroromeloni: mahala, ikharari ni murettele wa Muluku Atiithi ni Kristu Yeesu Apwiyaahu." 
1Timothy1:3 Kaavenyaaka kirowaka oMasedoniya, kaahoodyoonttelelani weera mukhale wEfeso weera mwaalamule atthu akina ehixuttihe mahusiho makina oolokottha," 
1Timothy1:4 hata ehaatthare andiisi ni ikhapira soohimala sinruuha toko ohiiwanana ohiya okhavihera muteko wa Muluku ori munroromeloni. 
1Timothy1:5 Etthu kintthunaaka ni wooperera wu ti osivela onrweela mmurimani wootteela ni moosuwelani wooreera ni munroromeloni na ekhaikhai. 
1Timothy1:6 Akina aahiya itthusene seiya, ehokoleelaka masu a siiyo," 
1Timothy1:7 etthunaka okhala anamawera a nlamulo*, ehiiwexexaka yeeyo anghimaaya, naari itthu mwa seiyo anaakhulelaxaaya." 
1Timothy1:8 Noosuwela weera nlamulo ti nooreera, mukina aattharaka ni moota wootthuneya." 
1Timothy1:9 Noosuwelatho weera nno khanipakeliwe wa oowaakhuleliwa ni Muluku, mene wa anamatakhala ni oohiiwelela; wa oohitteela ni anamattheka; wa yaawo ahimmwaakhulela, hata ahinimuttittimiha Muluku; wa yaawo angwiiva atithaya ni amayaya; wa anamwiiva;" 
1Timothy1:10 wa anamararuwa ni anraruxana alopwanaru; wa yaawo anaavara atthu weera yaathumihe; wa anamootha ni yaawo anlipela moota woolokottha; ni wa wakhalaru wiittana okina wa nihusiho na ekhaikhai. 
1Timothy1:11 Nihusiho nna ninxuttiha sa masu ooreeraxa oovuwa a Muluku ooreelihiwa, mwa yaawo Owo okivaherenraawe." 
1Timothy1:12 Kinimutthapela Kristu Yeesu Apwiyaahu, okivanghe ikuru ni onkiitthana oororomeleya, akikhalihaka mmutekoni ola." 
1Timothy1:13 Aani, kaarookhalaru khalayi namaveiha, namasoonda ni namawana, vano koophwanya omoreliwa ikharari, niwoko kaapaka yeeyo kihisuwelaka ni kihiroromelaka." 
1Timothy1:14 Wa soothesene, mahala a Apwiyaahu kooriheliwa miyo moota woowaatta, vamoha ni nroromelo ni osivela ori mwa Kristu Yeesu." 
1Timothy1:15 Masu ala ti oororomeleya ni oophwanela waakhuleliwa nnenesene: Kristu Yeesu aarweenle elapo ya vathi waavuluxa anamattheka, ni a yaawo miyo kiri ootepaxa." 
1Timothy1:16 Mene ti niwoko na yeeyo miyo kiphwannyaaka omoreliwa ikharari, weera mwa miyo, namattheka ootepaxa, Kristu Yeesu oonihere owehererawawe ni ovilela woohimala ntoko ethoonyero wa yaale yeera emuroromele Yoowo wa okumi woohimala." 
1Timothy1:17 Wa Mwene oohimala, Muluku mmoharu oohikhwa ni oohooneya, nikhale nttittimiho ni ovuwa mahuku ootheene oohimala. Ame*." 
1Timothy1:18 Timootheyo mwanaka, kinoovaha nlamulo nna nintthara masu oyeeheriwaawo weyo weera ottharaka, owane owana wooreera," 
1Timothy1:19 ovarexexaka nroromelo ni wuupuwela wooreera, niwoko akina, ekhoottaka masu ale, yaahapuwa munroromeloni na ekhaikhai." 
1Timothy1:20 Variyari wa yaawo ori Himeneyo ni Alesandre, mwa yaawo kimvaherenraaka Satana weera exuttere ohiveiha." 
1Timothy2:1 Woopacera, kingwooperera weera sipakiwe midyoonttelelo, mavekelo, sooveka ni sootthapela mwaha wa atthu ootheene;" 
1Timothy2:2 wa mamwene ni wa ootheene anlamula, weera nikhaleno okumi woomaaleleya ni mmuretteleni, mmurimani mwa omuluku ni munttittimihoni nootheene." 
1Timothy2:3 Eyo ti yooreera ni yoosiveliha vamaithoni wa Muluku Mvuluxaahu," 
1Timothy2:4 mwa Yoowo onghaawela weera atthu ootheene evuluxiwe ni esuwele ekhaikhai. 
1Timothy2:5 Vano, ookhala Muluku mmoharu ni ookhala Mmoharu paahi eriyari ya Muluku ni atthu: Mulopwana Kristu Yeesu," 
1Timothy2:6 mwa Yoowo iilenve mwaneenaawe weera awoopole atthu ootheene – onamoona waavahiwe ehuhu yootthuneya. 
1Timothy2:7 Wa yeeyo kookhalihiwa namalaleiya ni murummwa, muhusiha a nroromelo na ekhaikhai wa amalapo. Kinghima ekhaikhai – nkinootha." 
1Timothy2:8 Kintthuna weera alopwana evekele mapuro ootheene, yeemexaka matata ootteela, ehikhalaka ni isara, naari ehinyakhulihanaka." 
1Timothy2:9 Mooteene yoowo kintthuna weera athiyana eware moota woophwanela, woohuuliwa muru ni woowiiyeviha, ehiiphwanelihaka ni mayihi ootthaviwa, hata ni eyuuma, naari maluku oorikaxa, naari ni ikuwo soorikaxa," 
1Timothy2:10 mene yiiphwanelihaka ni miteko sooreera, ntoko ontthuneyaaya wa athiyana animulapa Muluku." 
1Timothy2:11 Muthiyana ontthuneya oxuttera amaalaka ni iiwelelaka soothesene. 
1Timothy2:12 Nkinimutthunihera muthiyana weera axuttihe, naari amulamule mulopwana. Wa soothesene, akhaleke oomaala." 
1Timothy2:13 Niwoko Adamu aapacenre opattuxiwa, ni vahoolowawe Eva." 
1Timothy2:14 Ni Adamu khaalokotthiwe, mene aani, muthiyana, areene oolokotthiwa, aathatuwa namattheka." 
1Timothy2:15 Vano, muthiyana anaavulixiwe woowaayara anamwane, owo akhala munroromeloni, moosivelani, mootteelani ni ngwiisuumaalihani." 
1Timothy3:1 Masu oororomeleya ti ala: Akhala mutthu onghaawela okhala mutokweene onkosoopa* ekerexa, onoohaawela muteko wooreeraxa." 
1Timothy3:2 Ontthuneyatho weera mutokweene onkosoopa* akhale oohikhalano nthowa, mulopwana a mwaara mmoha, oowehaweha, oowiisumaaliha, oottittimiheya, oowaakhela aletto, ni oowera oxuttiha;" 
1Timothy3:3 ohimusivele ohapaliwa, ahikhale ni isara woowaakuveya, mene akhale oomaaleleya, namurettele, ni ohimusivele musurukhu." 
1Timothy3:4 Eettiheke nnenesene etthokwaawe, ni anamwanaawe emwiiweleleke ni nttittimiho noophwanela." 
1Timothy3:5 Mukina aahiwera weettiha etthokwaawe, anaawere hai weettiha ekerexa ya Muluku?" 
1Timothy3:6 Ahikhaleke oorukunxa murima vaanaano, weera ahiixoone ni ahimorele yoottheka emoharu yeeyo omorenlaawe Diyabu*." 
1Timothy3:7 Ontthuneyatho okhaleliwa onamoona wooreera ni atthu a omokoni weera ahimorele ngwootheriwani, hata muntaphani na Diyabu*." 
1Timothy3:8 Hiihaawotho, adikoni* ontthuneya weera ekhale oophwanela nttittimiho, atthu a ekhaikhai, ehaasivele eviinyu yincipale, naari soowina soowiiya." 
1Timothy3:9 Evarexexeke ntikhinelo na nroromelo ni wuupuwela wootteela. 
1Timothy3:10 Epacereke toko wooniwa murimaaya, ni vahoolowaya yaahiphwanyiwa ni etthu yoowoothera, ekhaleke adikoni*." 
1Timothy3:11 Hiihaawotho, athiyana ekhaleke oophwanela nttittimiho, oohaapa, mene oowiisuumaaliha ni oororomeleya mwa soothesene." 
1Timothy3:12 Mudikoni* akhaleke mulopwana a mwaara mmoha paahi, ni aweettiheke nnenesene anamwanaawe ni etthokwaawe mwaneenaawe." 
1Timothy3:13 Yaale anrumeela nnenesene, eniiphwanye nipuro noottittimiheyaxa ni murima woolipaxa munroromeloni mwa Kristu Yeesu." 
1Timothy3:14 Kinoolepela itthu iya, naamwi kiwehereraka orowa owoona woowaakuveya." 
1Timothy3:15 Miyo kapisatho, onoosuwela mweettelo wootthuneya wa atthu Mpaani mwa Muluku eri ekerexa ya Muluku mukumi, ereene marimbu ni mathipelo a ekhaikhai." 
1Timothy3:16 Woohihovela weera ntikhinelo na ediinaahu ti ntokotoko: Yeesu ooniheriwe mweerutthuni, aakhuleliwe ni Muluku mMunepani, ooniwe ni andyelo, olaleiwe mmilokoni, ororomeliwe mweelaponi, ni aakheleliwe moovuwani." 
1Timothy4:1 Vano Munepa oneera nnenesene weera ehuhu yookisera, akina eniihiye nroromelo ni eniitthare minepa soolokottha ni mahusiho a minepa soonanara." 
1Timothy4:2 Mahusihoweene yaawo anrweela wa atthu oolokhottha ni oowootha, murimaaya woowuuma." 
1Timothy4:3 Awo ankhoottiha othelana ni oca yooca Muluku opattuxalaawe weera eciwe ni otthapela ni yaawo anroromela ni ansuwela ekhaikhai. 
1Timothy4:4 Vano, sootheene Muluku opattuxalaawe ti sooreera, ni khasintthuneya okhootta itthu saakheliwa ni otthapela," 
1Timothy4:5 niwoko ti sootteelihiwa ni masu a Muluku ni mmavekeloni. 
1Timothy4:6 Weyo waaxuttiha axunna masu ala, onuukhale namuteko ooreera a Kristu Yeesu, oowunnuwihiwa ni ekhaikhai ya nroromelo ni munihusihoni nooreera otthanraawo." 
1Timothy4:7 Vano, waasembe andiisi oohitteela a siiyo, ni wiireherere okhala ni murima wa omuluku." 
1Timothy4:8 Wiireherera erutthu omvareleya muteko vakhaani; wa soothesene, wiireherera okhala ni murima wa omuluku omvareleya muteko mwa soothesene, niwoko wookhalano yoororomelihiwa ya okumi wa vaanaano ni wa muhoolo." 
1Timothy4:9 Masu ala ti oororomeleya ni oophwanela waakhuleliwa nnenesene. 
1Timothy4:10 Ninnavara muteko ni ninnawana mmunepani, niwoko noomuroromela Muluku mukumi Mvuluxa a atthu ootheene wootepaxa yaawo anroromela." 
1Timothy4:11 Waalamule ni waaxuttihe itthu seiya. 
1Timothy4:12 Ahikhale mukina onooveiha weyo niwoko na omiravowaawo, mene okhale ethoonyero wa atthu mmasuni, mmweetteloni, moosivelani, munroromeloni ni muntteelihoni." 
1Timothy4:13 Mpaka ehuhu ya orwawaka, opwaherere ni nthiti osoma mwaatthuni wa Yoolempwa*, olaleiya ni oxuttiha." 
1Timothy4:14 Ohicipihe yamahala eri mwa weyo waavahiwaawo ni masu anthalihera otthuna wa Muluku wiiyaatheriwaawo matata a ahooleli a ekerexa. 
1Timothy4:15 Okhale ni nthiti mwaha wa itthu seiya, ni wiileve wa seiya weera ootheene yoone wunnuwawawo." 
1Timothy4:16 Othokorore nnenesene mweettelowaawo ni nihusihonawo, opwahereraka ovilela mwa itthusene seiyo, niwoko opakaka yeeyo, onoovuluxiwa weyo mwaneenaawo ni yaawo angwiiwa." 
1Timothy5:1 Ohimuhiihe mulopwana oowuuluvala ni masu oolipa, mene omulipihere ntoko owo areene atithawo, ni waalipihere amiravo ntoko axunneiyo;" 
1Timothy5:2 asithiyana oowuuluvala ntoko amayawo; asimwali ntoko asirokoriyo mootteelani mootheene. 
1Timothy5:3 Waakosoope asinaamukhweli yaale ari vekhaikhai moohaawani. 
1Timothy5:4 Vano, akhala naamukhweli orino anamwane, naari osuulu, awo epacere toko oxuttera okwanihera ediinaaya ni miteko yaapasoopaka amusaaya asineenaaya ni waatthapela axinaangolo, niwoko yeeyo enoomusiveliha Muluku." 
1Timothy5:5 Naamukhweli onghaawa vekhaikhai ni ahikhanleno emusi, onnamuroromela Muluku ni onnavekelaxa ohiyu ni othana ni midyoonttelelo." 
1Timothy5:6 Naamukhwelitho yoowo onkhala wa ohakalala wa elapo ya vathi, hata areene ni okumi, ohookhwa." 
1Timothy5:7 Waaxuttihe itthu iya weera awo ehikhale ni nthowa. 
1Timothy5:8 Akhala mukina ohinaakosoopa amusaawe, wootepaxa a vaatevawe, owo ookhootta nroromelo ni ootepaxa ompwahaxa mutthu oohiroromela." 
1Timothy5:9 Alepeliwe mulivuruni ya asinaamukhweli yoole paahi orino woopwaha iyaakha miloko mithannamosa wunnuwawawe, aari oororomeleya ni iyawe," 
1Timothy5:10 oosuweliwa nnenesene niwoko na mitekosawe sooreera; miteko ntoko waahuwa anamwane, owaakhela matata meeli aletto, orapiha inaawo sa ootteela, waakhavihera yaawo ari mmahooxoni, ni iilevaka opaka miteko sooreera sootheene." 
1Timothy5:11 Ehilepeliwe mulivuruni yeeyo asinaamukhweli oohuuluvala, niwoko soohaawelasaya sa erutthu sawina nthiti wa Kristu, antthuna othelana." 
1Timothy5:12 Hiiho, awo aniiruuhela othorihiwa asineenaaya, niwoko yaananariha yoororomelihiwaaya yoopacera." 
1Timothy5:13 Ohiya toko yeeyo, anxuttera oreesi yeettaka empa ti empa, ni khaankhala ooreesi paahi, mene anthatuwa oowaapa ni ootthunaxa osuwela sootheene, yuulumaka itthu soohitthuneya." 
1Timothy5:14 Tivawo kinaalakaaka asinaamukhweli oohuuluvala weera ethelane, yaayare anamwane, ni yeettihe vaatewaya ehimvahaka nthowa na oveiha namwiittana." 
1Timothy5:15 Vekhaikhai, akina aahapuwa weera emutthare Satana." 
1Timothy5:16 Akhala muthiyana mukina muKristu orino asinaamukhweli veemusiniwawe, ontthuneya waakhavihera. Ehireiwe ekerexa murindi woolemela, weera asinaamukhweli anghaawa vekhaikhai ekhaviheriwe ni yeeyo." 
1Timothy5:17 Ahooleli aneettiha nnenesene ekerexa aaphwanela matthuvelo meeli, wootepaxa yaawo mitekosaya siri olaleiya ni oxuttiha," 
1Timothy5:18 niwoko Yoolempwa* yeenre: “Muhiphure eyano ya emombe enttikittha inuku’ ni ‘Namuteko omphwanela nlivonaawe.” 
1Timothy5:19 Ohaakhulele yoowoothera ni muhooleli ehikhaviheriwe ni anamoona eeli, hoye hoye araru." 
1Timothy5:20 Yaawo anttheka, ontthuneya waattaruxa, mwaatthuni weera akristu akina yoove." 
1Timothy5:21 Miyo kingwooperera vamaithoni wa Muluku, wa Kristu ni wa andyelo oothanliwa, weera othokorore itthu iya, othorihaka moota woororomeleya ni ohikhalaka ni nthalu." 
1Timothy5:22 Ohimwiiyaathere matata mukina moota woowaakuveya, ohikhale ni nthowa mwaha wa soottheka sa akina. Wiithokorore ootteeleene." 
1Timothy5:23 Ohipwaherere owura maahi paahi, mene owuretho eviinyu vakhaani niwoko na nipwiipwinawo ni irettasawo soohihiyerereya." 
1Timothy5:24 Soottheka sa akina sinsuwanyeya sihinaaye othorihiwa, vano soottheka sa akinatho sinsuwanyeya vahoolo wa nthorihelo paahi." 
1Timothy5:25 Mooteene yoowo ni miteko sooreera – ti soosuwanyeya, ni seiyo soohisuwanyeya khasingwereya opwaherera wiipithiheya." 
1Timothy6:1 Ootheene yaale ari akaporo yaattittimihaxeke yaawo anaalamula, weera Nsina na Muluku ni nihusihonahu nihiveihiwe." 
1Timothy6:2 Seiyo siri ipottha sinlamuliwa ni aneene aKristu sihaattittimiheke yaawo vakhaani, niwoko ari axunna. Ohiyanawaya, ontthuneya waarumeela moota woopwahaxa, niwoko yaawo anrumeeliwa ni mitekosaya ari oororomeleya ni oosiveleya. Waaxuttihe ni owooperere itthusene seiya." 
1Timothy6:3 Akhala mukina onxuttiha mahusiho oolokottha, ni ohinaakhulela nihusiho nooreera na Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu ni nihusiho na murima wa omuluku," 
1Timothy6:4 vano owo ti oowiixoona ni khaniiwexexa etthu, akhalanaka soohaawela soonanara wa ovaanyihana ni onyakulihana mwaha wa masu, ni iyo sinrowa ophiya ni nrima, waakhulana, oruwana, ihovasi soonanara" 
1Timothy6:5 ni oohiiwanana woohihiyerera variyari wa atthu ootakhala, mwa yaawo ekhaikhai yohiiyiwa, ni anuupuwela weera murima wa omuluku ti naattuuttu a owina musurukhu." 
1Timothy6:6 Vekhaikhai, murima wa omuluku ni omaaleleiya ti naattuuttu a owina otokotoko." 
1Timothy6:7 Vano hiyo khaniruuhale etthu mweelaponi, ni khaningwera okuxa etthu mwa yeeyo." 
1Timothy6:8 Tivawo, nakhalano yooca ni yoowara, mwa seiyo nnikhale oohakalala." 
1Timothy6:9 Yaawo antthuna okhala oopuha ammora ngweereriwani vancipale, mmiraakhoni, ni moohaawelani wa siiyo ni wa onanariha onaarongha atthu mmilepeni ni moophwateyani," 
1Timothy6:10 niwoko osivela musurukhu ti mukwankhwaari wa soonanara soohiyanahiyana. Atthu akina, ehaawelaka musurukhu, yaahapuwa munroromeloni, yiikacamihaka ni sookacamiha sincipale." 
1Timothy6:11 Wa soothesene, weyo, mulopwana a Muluku, otthawe itthu sootheene iyo ni waasaase waakhuleliwa ni Muluku, murima wa omuluku, nroromelo, osivela, ovilela ni murima woomaaleleya." 
1Timothy6:12 Owane owana wooreera wa nroromelo. Ovarexexe okumi woohimala, mwa yoowo weyo woohiitthaniwa waalampaawo okhalela onamoona wooreera variyari wa anamoona ancipale." 
1Timothy6:13 Vamaithoni wa Muluku omvaha sootheene okumi, ni wa Kristu Yeesu aakhalenlaawe onamoona wooreera ohoolo wa Ponsiyo Pilatu, miyo kinoowooperera:" 
1Timothy6:14 othokorore nlamulo nna moota wookwanela ni woohikhalano nthowa mpaka woonihereya wa Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu. 
1Timothy6:15 Wooneya iwo Muluku anaakhumelelihe ehuhu yootthuneya, Muluku ooreelihiwa ni Namalamula mmoharu, Mwene a mamwene ni Pwiiya a asipwiiya," 
1Timothy6:16 mmoharu oohikhwa ni onkhala ngwaarani woohiphiyeya, mwa Yoowo khaawo amoonne, naari ongwera omoona. Wa Yoowo nikhale nttittimiho ni ikuru soohimala. Ame*." 
1Timothy6:17 Waaleele yaawo ari oopuha ehuhu ela weera ehikhale oowiixoona, naari ehiroromele mihakhu soohilekela, mene emuroromele Muluku onnivaha sootheene woowaatta weera nihakalale." 
1Timothy6:18 Waaleele weera epake yooreera, ekhale oopuha mmitekoni sooreera, oolikana ovaha ni ookawela itthusaya." 
1Timothy6:19 Moota ola awo eniithukumanye muhakhwaaya asineenaaya, mathipelo oolipa wa ehuhu ya muhoolo, ni hiiho eniiwere okumi wa ekhaikhai." 
1Timothy6:20 Timootheyo, othokorore yeeyo ovahereriwaawo. Osembe nyaha sa siiyo ni soohitteela ni miruku sa wiittana siniitthaniwa moolokotthani “esuwelo.”" 
1Timothy6:21 Akina, ettharaka seiyo, yaahapuwa munroromeloni. Mahala ekhale ni nyuwo." 
2Timothy1:1 Ya Pawulo, murummwa a Kristu Yeesu mootthunani mwa Muluku mwaha wa yoororomelihiwa ya okumi eri mwa Kristu Yeesu," 
2Timothy1:2 wa Timootheyo, mwanaka oosiveleya: mahala, ikharari ni murettele wa Muluku Atiithi ni Kristu Yeesu Apwiyaahu." 
2Timothy1:3 Kinnamutthapela Muluku, Yoowo kinimurumeelaaka ni murima wootteela, ntoko yaamurumeenlaaya makholowaaka, kiwuupuwelelaka weyo woohihiyerera ohiyu ni othana mmavekelonimwaka." 
2Timothy1:4 Kohuupuwelela maithoraawo, ni kinghaawela vancipale owoona weera ohakalalawaka okhale wookwanela." 
2Timothy1:5 Kinuupuwelela nroromelonawo noohiixeera naapacenre okhala mwa amunno Loyide ni mwa amayawo Eunisi, ni vano kooviriyeliwa weeratho ninkhala mwa weyo." 
2Timothy1:6 Tivawo kingwuupuxeraaka weera opwaherere wiiseela nlumi na yamahala ya Muluku eri mwa weyo niwoko na owiiyaathera matataaka.
