2Timothy1:7 Vekhaikhai, Muluku khanivanghe munepa woowoova, mene munepa wa ikuru, osivela ni wa wiisuumaaliha." 
2Timothy1:8 Tivawo, ohuuliwe muru okhalela onamoona mwaha wa Apwiya, naari niwoko na miyo kiri namatthukiwaaya, mene ovilele vamoha ni miyo ni ikuru sa Muluku soohaawa niwoko na masu ooreeraxa." 
2Timothy1:9 Muluku Owo oonivuluxa ni ooniitthana ni wiitthana wootteela, khoohiyono niwoko na itthu hiyo naapankaahu, mene niwoko na olakelawawe ni mahalaawe mwaneenaawe. Mahala awo nivahiwe mwa Kristu Yeesu ehinaaye opacera ehuhu," 
2Timothy1:10 ni nohooniheriwa vaanaano vaava ngwoonihereyani wa Mvuluxaahu Kristu Yeesu. Owo oophwata okhwa ni oowera okumi ni ohikhwa niwoko na masu ooreeraxa. 
2Timothy1:11 Miyo kookhalihiwa namalaleiya, murummwa, ni muhusiha a masu ooreeraxa ala." 
2Timothy1:12 Niwoko na yaawo, miyo kinoohaawatho, mene nkinuuliwa muru, niwoko koomusuwela Yoowo kinimuroromelaaka, ni koosuwela nnenesene weera Owo ti a ikuru weera athokorore yeeyo mpaka nihuku nno kaamvaherenraaka." 
2Timothy1:13 Opwaherere ni nroromelo ni osivela mwa Kristu Yeesu, ottharaka ekhalelo ya nihusiho nooreera, mwa nenno weyo okiiwalaawo." 
2Timothy1:14 Mwaha wa yeeyo ovahereriwaawo, othokorore mwa Munepa Wootteela onkhala mwa hiyo." 
2Timothy1:15 Weyo woosuwela weera ootheene a elapo ya wAsiya aakihiya, mpaka Figelo ni Hermogenetho." 
2Timothy1:16 Apwiya emorele ikharari vaate wa Onesiforo, niwoko imaara sincipale owo annakilipiha murima ni khuuliwe muru niwoko na otthukiwawaka." 
2Timothy1:17 Ohiyanawaya, aphiyakaru oRooma, aakaasaasa ni nthiti mpaka okiphwanya." 
2Timothy1:18 Apwiya emvahe mahala weera yoowo aphwanye ikharari vamaithoni wa Apwiya nihuku nno. Weyo woosuwela nnenesene sookhaviherasawe aakipakenlaawe wEfeso. 
2Timothy2:1 Tivawo, weyo mwanaka, olipihere murima mmahalani ari mwa Kristu Yeesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Ni masu okiiwalaawo kihimaka variyari wa anamoona ancipale, waavaherera atthu oororomeleya weera ekhaletho oowera waaxuttiha akina." 
2Timothy2:3 Ovilele vamoha ni miyo soohaawa ntoko nakhotto ooreera a Kristu Yeesu. 
2Timothy2:4 Yoowo ori nakhotto khampwattha miteko sikina sa okumi; owo onghaawela omusiveliha mutokweene a anakhotto paahi. 
2Timothy2:5 Hiihotho, mutthu ontthimaka ni akina khangwera owina ahiiwelelaka ikano sa otthimaka iwo." 
2Timothy2:6 Namalima omvara muteko wooviha ti yoowo ompacera olawiha soowiima sa soohepha. 
2Timothy2:7 Otthokelele yeeyo kinghimaaka, niwoko Apwiya eniyoovahe wiiwexexa mwa soothesene." 
2Timothy2:8 Omuupuwelele Yeesu Kristu, ovenyererihiwe mookhwaani, a ekhapira ya Davide, ntoko maswaaka ooreeraxa kinlaleiyaaka," 
2Timothy2:9 mwa yaawo kinghaawa mpaka kootthukiwa ni onyooro ntoko namatakhala. Wa soothesene, masu a Muluku khaatthukiwe." 
2Timothy2:10 Tivawo kimvilelaaka sootheene niwoko na oothanliwa, weera awotho yaakhele ovuluxiwa ori mwa Kristu Yeesu ni ovuwa woohimala." 
2Timothy2:11 Masu ala aaphwanela ororomeliwa: Hiyo nakhwa ni Yoowo, nnikhaletho ni okumi ni Yoowo." 
2Timothy2:12 Hiyo navilela ni Yoowo, nnilamuletho ni Yoowo; namukhootta Yoowo, Owo anaanikhoottetho." 
2Timothy2:13 Nakhala oohiroromeleya, Owo onookhala oororomeleya, niwoko khangwera wiikhootta mwaneenaawe." 
2Timothy2:14 Opwaherere owuupuxera atthu ootheene itthu iya, owoopereraka yaawo vamaithoni wa Muluku weera ehivolowe moonyakulihanani mwaha wa masu. Eyo kheemphanyereya etthu, ohikhanle waananariha yaawo aniiwa." 
2Timothy2:15 Waasaase wiixoonihera wa Muluku, ntoko mutthu oowaakhuleliwa, ntoko namuteko ohikhanleno etthu yoomuulihiha muru, ni onreherera nnenesene masu a ekhaikhai." 
2Timothy2:16 Osembe soowuuluma sa siiyo ni soohitteela, niwoko yaawo antthara moota owo, anoopwaherera wootepaxa wa murima woohitteela." 
2Timothy2:17 Mahusihowaaya animweettelelana ntoko eretta enkhuura erutthu. Variyariwaya ari Himeneyo ni Fileto. 
2Timothy2:18 Awo yaahapuwa mwa ekhaikhai, yeeraka weera ovenyerera wa atthu wookhumelela, ni hiiho aananariha nroromelo na akina." 
2Timothy2:19 Wa soothesene, nthipelo noolipaxa na Muluku ninkhala nooweemelaxa, ni nookhalihiwa ni yoolempwa ela: ‘Apwiya anaasuwela yaawo ari awaya’ ni ‘Ootheene anlapa Nsina na Apwiya, esuseke sootakhala.’" 
2Timothy2:20 Mpaani etokotoko khasimphwanyeya paahi nyaapu sa iyuuma soorikaxa, menetho nyaapu sa nyiri ni oloko; sikina mutekwaaya woottittimiheya, vaheera sikina mutekwaaya woohittittimiheya." 
2Timothy2:21 Akhala mukina oniirapiha mwa itthusene seiyo sookisera, anaakhale mwaapu woottittimiheya, wootteelihiwa ni woovareleya muteko wa Apwiya, ni wooreherereliwa muteko wooreera wootheene." 
2Timothy2:22 Otthawe soohaawela soonanara sa omiravo, ni otthare waakhuleliwa ni Muluku, nroromelo, osivela, ni murettele, vamoha ni yaawo angwiitthana Apwiya ni murima wootteela." 
2Timothy2:23 Osembe ovaanyihana wa ololo ni wa siiyo, niwoko weyo woosuwela weera wu ongyara onyakulihana." 
2Timothy2:24 Murumeiyi a Apwiya khantthuneya onyakulihana, mene aani, ontthuneya okhala oosiveleya ni ootheene, oowera oxuttiha ni opixa murima." 
2Timothy2:25 Ontthuneya waalaka amwiittanaawe ni murima woomaaleleya, aroromelaka weera Muluku aavahe orukunxa murima, aasuwelihaka ekhaikhai," 
2Timothy2:26 weera hiiho yuupuwelele nnenesene ni yoopowe mmuraakhoni wa Diyabu*, aatthunkaaya weera epake otthunawawe." 
2Timothy3:1 Osuwele yeeyo: mahuku ookisera nsikhumelele ihuhu soowoopihaxa. 
2Timothy3:2 Atthu eniikhale oowiipwattha, a milili, oowiikuxa, oowiixoona, ooveiha, oohiwiiwelela asinaangolo, oohitthapela, oohitteela," 
2Timothy3:3 oohaasivela amusaaya, oohiiraana, anamwaapa, oohiisuumaaliha asineenaaya, ootakhala, amwiittana a yooreera," 
2Timothy3:4 anamavariha, oohuulihiwa muru, oowiivuwiha, oosivela soohaawela sa erutthu woopwahaxa omusivela Muluku," 
2Timothy3:5 yiixeeraka a murima wa omuluku, mene ekhoottaka ikurusaya. Osusetho wa yaawo." 
2Timothy3:6 Ti yaawo aneetteetta vaate ti vaate ni anaapaka okaporo athiyana oohilipa, oosareya soottheka, mwa yaawo aneettihiwa ni soohaawela soonanara soohiyanahiyana." 
2Timothy3:7 Awo annaxuttera mahuku ootheene, mene kheerwa ewera osuwela ekhaikhai." 
2Timothy3:8 Ntoko Iyane ni Iyambe yiittannaaya ni Moisesi, alopwana awo ankhoottatho ekhaikhai. Soowuupuwelasaya soonanarihiwa, ni mwaha wa nroromelo ari ookhoottiwa." 
2Timothy3:9 Wa soothesene, awo khaanrowa ottai. Ntoko yeereiyaaya ni yaale eeli, ololowaaya onuusuwanyeye ni atthu ootheene." 
2Timothy3:10 Wa soothesene, weyo woosuwela nihusihonaka, mweettelowaaka, otthunawaka, nroromelonaka, opixiwaka murima, osivelawaka ni ovilelawaka;" 
2Timothy3:11 woosuwelatho osoondiwawaka, ohaawawaka, seiyo saakikhumelenle wAntiyokhiya, wIkoniyo ni oListra. Hapo koovilela osoondiwa! Apwiyatho aakivuluxa wa itthusene seiyo sootheene." 
2Timothy3:12 Vekhaikhai, ootheene anghaawela okhala mwa Kristu ni murima wa omuluku, eniisoondiwe." 
2Timothy3:13 Wa soothesene, oonanara ni oolokottha eniitepaxe onanara elokotthaka ni ereene oolokottheya." 
2Timothy3:14 Weyotho, opwaherere okhala mwa yeeyo oxuttenraawo, yeeyo oviriyelihiwaawo, niwoko weyo wohaasuwela yaawo yooxuttihale." 
2Timothy3:15 Vano, okhuma enamwanaawo woosuwela Yoolempwa* Yootteela, engwera woovaha miruku sinrongha woovuluwani niwoko na nroromelo mwa Kristu Yeesu." 
2Timothy3:16 Yoolempwa* yootheene yohiiseeleliwa ni Muluku, ni engwera ovareleya muteko wa ohusiha, ohiiha, olaka ni oreherera mwa ekhaikhai," 
2Timothy3:17 weera mulopwana a Muluku akhale oowera ni oorehereriwa nnenesene wa muteko wooreera wootheene. 
2Timothy4:1 Vamaithoni wa Muluku ni wa Kristu Yeesu, oneeraawe aathorihe akumi ni akhwiiye, ni kuupuwelelaka wooniherawawe ni omwenaawe, kinoodyoonttelelaxa:" 
2Timothy4:2 olaleiye masu, okhale oolikana ihuhu sootheene, ovaanye, ohiihe, olipihere ni opixa murima wootheene mmahusihoni." 
2Timothy4:3 Vano, eniiphiye ehuhu atthu eneeraaya ehitthune ovilela nihusiho na ekhaikhai. Ohiyanawaya, ettharaka soohaawelasaya asineenaaya, eniyaathukumanye anamahusiha weera yaathalihere yeeyo maaruwaaya anghaawelaaya wiiwa." 
2Timothy4:4 Awo eniikhootte wiiwa ekhaikhai, yaahokoleelaka andiisi a khalayi." 
2Timothy4:5 Wa soothesene, weyo wiipasoope mwa soothesene, ovilele soohaawa, ovare muteko wa namalaleiya a masu ooreeraxa, ni okwaniheraxe mutekwaawo." 
2Timothy4:6 Wa miyo, kooyeehiwa ntoko yooveleela yoowura. Yookhuveela ehuhu ya opwahawaka." 
2Timothy4:7 Koowana owana wooreera, koomaliha otthimakawaka, koothokorora nroromelo." 
2Timothy4:8 Vano enookiweherera ecireemba ya ekhaikhai Apwiya, Mphuki oororomeleya, eneeraaya ekivahe nihuku nno, ni khoohiyono wa miyo paahi, menetho wa ootheene ansivela orwawaya." 
2Timothy4:9 Waasaase okumana ni miyo woowaakuveya," 
2Timothy4:10 niwoko Dema ookihiya miyo, asivelaka elapo ya vathi, ni aarowa oTesalonika. Kresente okenle oGalata, ni Titu okenle oDalmasiya." 
2Timothy4:11 Ti Luuka paahi ori ni miyo. Omurwaane Marku, niwoko owo onoowera okikhavihera mmutekoni." 
2Timothy4:11 Ti Luuka paahi ori ni miyo. Omurwaane Marku, niwoko owo onoowera okikhavihera mmutekoni." 
2Timothy4:12 Koomurumiha Tikhiko wEfeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Weyo waarwaaka, okiruuhele mukaandyowaaka kihiyalaaka mpaani mwa Karpo oTrowade, nitho ilivurusaka, woopwahaxa seiyo sa exapala." 
2Timothy4:14 Alesandre, namahana, ookipaka itthu soonanara sincipale. Apwiya eniimulive ntthuvelo ophwanenlaawe." 
2Timothy4:15 Weyotho wiipasoope ni yoowo, niwoko owo aatepa okhala mwiittana a maswaahu." 
2Timothy4:16 Ngwiixaakihanimwaka woopacera, khaawo aarwiiye okikhavihera; ootheene yaakihiya. Eyo ehitthariwe." 
2Timothy4:17 Apwiyatho yaari ni miyo ni aakivaha ikuru weera mutthenga olaleiwe nnenesene ni miyo, ni weera amalapo ootheene yiiwe owo. Ni miyo koovuluxiwa mmwaano mwa mwatto." 
2Timothy4:18 Apwiya eniikivuluxe mwa muteko woonanara wootheene, ni eniikironghe oovuluxiweene moomwenenimwaya wa wiirimu. Wa Yaawo okhale ovuwa mahuku ootheene oohimala. Ame*." 
2Timothy4:19 Omvahe isalaama Priska ni Akila, ni vaate wa Onesiforo." 
2Timothy4:20 Erasto oohala oKorinto, mene Trofimo kimuhiyale avoreiwaka oMileto." 
2Timothy4:21 Waasaase orwa ohinaaye mulaala. Eubulo, Prudente, Lino, Klawudiya ni axunna ootheene anoovaha isalaama." 
2Timothy4:22 Apwiya ekhale ni munepaawo. Mahala ekhale ni nyuwo ootheene. 
Titus1:1 Ya Pawulo, murumeiyi a Muluku ni murummwa a Yeesu Kristu, weera aweettihe oothanliwa wa Muluku munroromeloni ni mwesuweloni mwa ekhaikhai, engweettihera murima wa omuluku." 
Titus1:2 Nroromelo ni esuwelo ela yoolipiheriwa munroromeloni ya okumi woohimala, mwa yoowo Muluku oohootha aaroromelihalaawe ehinaaye ehuhu." 
Titus1:3 Vano, ehuhu yootthuneya Owo aasuweliha maswaawe mwaha wa olaleiya kaalamuleliwaaka ni Muluku Mvuluxaahu." 
Titus1:4 Wa Titu, mwanaka a ekhaikhai munroromelonimwahu: Mahala ni murettele wa Muluku Atiithi ni wa Kristu Yeesu Mvuluxaahu." 
Titus1:5 Miyo koohiyaleni oKreta weera mureherere seiyo sihanle ni mwaakhalihe asitokweene mukerexani ya esidade ti esidade ntoko koolamulenlaakani. 
Titus1:6 Ontthuneya weera mutokweene a ekerexa akhale oohikhalano nthowa, mulopwana a mwaara mmoha, ni akhaleno anamwane oororomela, oohootheriwa ni olavilavi, naari oohiiwelela." 
Titus1:7 Ontthuneya weera mutokweene onkosoopa* a Muluku akhale oohikhalano nthowa: oohiixoona, oohaakuva onyoonyiwa, oohihapaliwa, oohikhalano oruttu, hata oohiinlela mihakhu soohiloka." 
Titus1:8 Akhale oowaakhela aletto, ootthuna yooreera, a miruku, a ekhaihai, ootteelihiwa, oowiisuumaaliha," 
Titus1:9 avaraka nnenesene mutthenga woororomeleya, ntoko moota owo oxuttihiwaawe weera awere waalipiha akina mirima ni mahusiho ooreera, ni awere waavaanya yaawo amvirikanya." 
Titus1:10 Vekhaikhai, variyari wa atthu oowiineliwa aakhala ancipale oosesera, anaasa wuuluma paahi ni anamalokottha." 
Titus1:11 Vano, ontthuneya weera awo emaalihiwe, niwoko annanariha imusi sikina, exuttihaka itthu soohitthuneya niwoko na wiinlela mihakhu." 
Titus1:12 Mmoha a mprofeetaaya asineenaaya aaheera: “Mahuku ootheene aKreta ti anamootha, inama soonanara, anamaca ooreesi.”" 
Titus1:13 Onamoona ola ti wa ekhaikhai. Tivawo, mwaahiihe yaawo nnenesene weera ekhale ni nroromelo nooreera," 
Titus1:14 ni weera ehiwiiweke andiisi a aYuda ni malamulo a atthu ankhootta ekhaikhai. 
Titus1:15 Wa ootteela, sootheene siri sootteela, mene wa oohitteela ni oohiroromela kheewo eri yootteela. Mwa yeeyo, soowuupuwela nitho mirimasaya siri soonanarihiwa." 
Titus1:16 Awo aneera weera aamusuwela Muluku, mene ni mitekosaya anoomukhootta. Ari oothanyeya, oohiiwelela, ni oohiwera opaka hata etthu emoha yooreera." 
Titus2:1 Wa soothesene, nyuwo muxutte nihusiho na ekhaikhai." 
Titus2:2 Mwaaxuttihe anamuuluvala alopwana weera ekhale oowiiwehaweha, oottittimiheya, a miruku ni oororomeleya munroromeloni, moosivelani ni moovilelani." 
Titus2:3 Mooteene yoowo, mwaaxuttihetho anamuuluvala athiyana weera yeetteke ni mukhalelo wootteela, ehaapaka ni ehihapaliwaka, ni weera ekhale oowera oxuttiha yeeyo eri yooreera." 
Titus2:4 Hiiho, awo anoowera waalaka asimwali oothelana waasivela asiiyaya ni anamwanaaya," 
Titus2:5 ekhale a miruku, ootteela, oosuwela okilaathi vaatevaya, ooreera murima, oowiiwelela asiiyaya, weera masu a Muluku ehikhale ooveihiwa." 
Titus2:6 Mooteene yoowo, mwaalipihe murima amiravo weera ekhale a miruku." 
Titus2:7 Mwa soothesene mukhale nyuwo muneenaanyu ethoonyerowaaya a mikhalelo sooreera, mupakaka miteko sooreera. Muxuttihe ni murima wa ekhaikhai ni woottittimiheya," 
Titus2:8 muulumaka masu oolipa khaawo angwera okusanyiha, weera amwiittanaanyu yuuliwe muru, ehoonaka etthu yoonanara mwaha wa hiyo." 
Titus2:9 Muxuttihe ipottha weera siwiiwelele asineenaaya mwa soothesene, saasaasaka waasiveliha sihaavirikanyaka," 
Titus2:10 sihiwiiyeraka, mene soonihereka weera simphwanela ororomelihiwaxa weera hiiho sivuwihe mwa sootheene nihusiho na Muluku Mvuluxaahu." 
Titus2:11 Vano, mahala a Muluku anruuha ovuluwa ahoonihereya wa atthu ootheene." 
Titus2:12 Awo annihusiha okhootta sootakhala ni soohaawela sa erutthu, ni weetta ni miruku, ekhaikhai ni murima wa omuluku ehuhuweene yeela," 
Titus2:13 niwehereraka oweherera wooreelihiwa: wooniheriwa woovuwa wa Mulukwaahu Mutokweene ni Mvuluxa Yeesu Kristu. 
Titus2:14 Yeesu Owo iiveleenle wa hiyo weera anivuluxe wa sootakhala sootheene ni atteelihe muloko wa Yoowo mwaneenaawe, muloko mmoha ori ni nthiti opaka miteko sooreera." 
Titus2:15 Muxuttihe itthusene seiya, mulipiheraka ni moopereraka ni ikuru sootheene. Ahikhale mukina aneera ooramuseni." 
Titus3:1 Ngwuupuxere ootheene weera yaatthare mamwene ni asitokweene, ewiiweleleka yaawo ni ekhalaka oolikaneene mahuku ootheene weera epake sootheene siri sooreera." 
Titus3:2 Ngwuupuxereketho ehimwaapeke, naari mutthu mmoha, ni weera ekhale ni murima wa murettele, oosiveleya ni ewoonihere atthu ootheene murima woomaaleleyaxa mahuku ootheene." 
Titus3:3 Khalayi hiyotho naari oohikhala ni miruku, oohiiwelela, oolokotthiwa, ni ootthukiwa ni mikhalelo soohiyanahiyana sa soohaawela sa erutthu. Naakhala mootakhalani ni munrimani, nireene oothanyeya, nithanyanaka mukina ni mukhwaawe." 
Titus3:4 Woonihenraayatho murima wooreera ni waasivela atthu wa Muluku, Mvuluxaahu," 
Titus3:5 Owo oonivuluxa ni otteelihiwa wa oyariwa wanaaveeli, ni orehereriwa wa Munepa Wootteela, ohikhanle niwoko na miteko sa ekhaikhai naapankaahu, mene niwoko na ikhararisawe." 
Titus3:6 Muluku oniyeehenre hiyo Munepa wookwana mwa Yeesu Kristu, Mvuluxaahu," 
Titus3:7 weera, nireene oowaakhuleliweene niwoko na mahalaawe, hiyo nithatuwe anamwaakhela, niwehereraka okumi woohimala." 
Titus3:8 Masu ala ti oororomeleya, ni kintthuna weera nyuwo mulipihere nnenesene itthu iya, weera yaawo animuroromela Muluku epake miteko sooreera. Itthusene seiya siri sooreeraxa ni sinnaakhavihera atthu." 
Titus3:9 Wa soothesene, musembe waakhulana wa siiyo, ikhapira, ohiiwanana ni ovaanyihana mwaha wa nlamulo, niwoko itthu iyo siri soohikhavihera ni sa siiyo." 
Titus3:10 Mwaha wa yoole ontannya ohiiwanana, mmooperere emaara yoopacera ni yanaaveeli, ni vahoolowaya mwamusembe." 
Titus3:11 Nyuwo moosuwela weera mutthu owo ori ookhoromana ni mootthekani, mwaneenaawe oothorihiwa." 
Titus3:12 Koorumihelakani Artema, hoye hoye Tikhiko, mweerere okikumanano oNikopoli, niwoko kaalakela okhala weiwo mulaala wootheene." 
Titus3:13 Mwaavahe sootheene singhaaweleya wa mukwaha wa Zena, namwaakiha, ni Apolo weera ehikhale eneera yaahaleele." 
Titus3:14 Atthwaahu ehusere opaka ni nthiti miteko sooreera, weera sihaathowe soohaawelasaya sa khula nihuku ni ehikhale oohiruwera." 
Titus3:15 Ootheene ari ni miyo animoovahani isalaama. Mwaavahe isalaama wa yaala annisivela munroromeloni. Mahala ekhale ni nyuwo ootheene. 
Philemon1:1 Ya Pawulo, namatthukiwa a Kristu Yeesu, ni munna Timootheyo, wa Filemone, namuteko oosiveleya vamoha ni hiyo," 
Philemon1:2 wa murokora Apefiya ni wa Arkipo, mukhwiihu moowanani, nitho wa ekerexa enthukumana owannyinyu:" 
Philemon1:3 Wa nyuwo, mahala ni murettele wa Muluku Atithihu ni wa Apwiya Yeesu Kristu." 
Philemon1:4 Mahuku ootheene kinnamutthapela Mulukwaaka, kiwuupuwelakani nyuwo mmavekelonimwaka," 
Philemon1:5 niwoko kinniiwa suulummwaka sa nroromelonanyu mwa Apwiya Yeesu ni sa omusivelawanyu Yeesu vamoha ni atthu ootteela ootheene. 
Philemon1:6 Kinoovekela weera nyuwo mwaakhalelaka onamoona nroromelonanyu, eyo enimoowerelani esuwelo yookwanela ya sooreera sootheene nraahuno mwa Kristu." 
Philemon1:7 Osivelawanyu wookihakalaliha vancipale ni wookipepesa, niwoko nyuwo, munnaka, moolipihera mirima sa atthu ootteela." 
Philemon1:8 Tivawo, naamwi kikhalanneene otaphuwa mwa Kristu weera koorumiheni okwanihera ekoongoraanyu," 
Philemon1:9 miyo nkeere woovekelani etthu moosivelani. Miyo, Pawulo, vano kohuuluvala, nitho namatthukiwa a Kristu Yeesu," 
Philemon1:10 kinoodyoonttelelani niwoko na mwanaka Onesimo, mwa yoowo kimuyanraaka kitthukiweene." 
Philemon1:11 Khalayeene owo khaahiyono oovareleya muteko wa nyuwo, mene vaanaano ookhala wa nyuwo ni miyotho." 
Philemon1:12 Kinoomuruma woohokoleelani, mwa yoowo ori ntoko mpatta wa murimaaka." 
Philemon1:13 Kaatthuna areene ni miyo weera akikhavihere vanipuronivanyu, miyo kitthukiweene niwoko na masu ooreeraxa." 
Philemon1:14 Nkitthunnetho opaka etthu, ohikhanle ni otthuniheriwawanyu, weera yakhalaru etthu muneeraanyu mupake, ehikhale yoonyesereriwa, mene etthu yootthunaanyu." 
Philemon1:15 Apaale owo aamwalamwaxiwa ni nyuwo ehuhu vakhaani weera nyuwo mmwaakheletho wa mahuku ootheene," 
Philemon1:16 ahikhalakatho ntoko epottha, mene opwaha epotta, aani, ntoko munna oosiveleya. Owo ti oosiveleyaaka wootepaxatho wa nyuwo – ntoko mweerutthuni nitho mwa Kristu." 
Philemon1:17 Hiiho, nyuwo mwaakoonaka ntoko mukhwiinyu munroromeloni, mmwaakhele ntoko kireene yoomi." 
Philemon1:18 Owo oopahulani, hoye hoye ooliha etthwaanyu, mukiweheke miyo." 
Philemon1:19 Miyo, Pawulo, kinlepa ni ntatanaka – nkilive. Muhittiwale weera nyuwo mookikoongoriha okumaanyu muneenaanyu." 
Philemon1:20 Aani, munnaka, kintthuna waakhela wa nyuwo etthu emoha yooreera mwa Apwiya. Mulipihere murimaaka mwa Kristu." 
Philemon1:21 Kinoolepelani kisuwelaka weera nyuwo munookiiwelela ni munoopaka woopwahaxa yeeyo koovekenlaakani. 
Philemon1:22 Ohiya toko yeeyo, mukirehererele nipuro na okona, niwoko kingweherera okhala ni nyuwo niwoko na mavekelowaanyu." 
Philemon1:23 Epafra, mukhwaaka a mukaliposo, ongwuulumihani," 
Philemon1:24 ntokotho Marku, Aristarku, Dema ni Luuka, amvara muteko ni miyo." 
Philemon1:24 ntokotho Marku, Aristarku, Dema ni Luuka, amvara muteko ni miyo." 
Philemon1:25 Mahala a Apwiya Yeesu Kristu ekhale ni munepaanyu. 
Hebrews1:1 Khalayi Muluku aahuuluma ni makholowaahu imaara sincipale ni moota woohiyanahiyana ni iyano sa maprofeeti; 
Hebrews1:2 mahukutho ookisera ala uulumale ni hiyo mwa Mwaana, mwa Yoowo aamukhalinghe Namwaakhela a itthu sootheene, ni mwa Yoowo Muluku opankaawe ephattuwelo yootheene." 
Hebrews1:3 Mwaana ori otutha wa ovuwa wa Muluku, ni ethoonyeroweene yeeyo ya mukhalelo wa Muluku, akhalihaka sootheene ni ikuru sa nsunawe. Aakwanihenraawe otteelihiwa wa yoottheka, aakilaathi moono mulopwana wa ovuwa wa musulusulu." 
Hebrews1:4 Mwaana oothatuwa Mutokweenexa oowaapwaha andyelo, niwoko Muluku oomvaha Nsina nri ntokweene wa masinaaya." 
Hebrews1:5 Vano, Muluku khanamweerele naari ndyelo mmoha: “Weyo ti Mwanaka; olelo kohooyara,” naari: “Miyo nkikhale Atithawe ni Owo anaakhale Mwanaka.”" 
Hebrews1:6 Nitho Muluku aamoonihenraawe Mwanawe mmoharu mweelaponi, eenre: “Andyelo ootheene a Muluku ontthuneya weera yamulape.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Mwaha wa andyelo, eenre: “Owo onaatatuxa andyelowaawe epheyo, ni arumeiyaawe malumi a mooro.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Mwahatho wa Mwaana, eenre: “Ehicaanyu ya olamula eri yoohimala, ni ekopo ya omwenaanyu eri ya ekhaikhai." 
Hebrews1:9 Moosivela ekhaikhai ni moothanya yoonanara, tivawo Muluku ori Mulukwaanyu owunnuwihalaaweni vasulu wa asikhwiinyu, oottikitthelakani makhura a ohakalala.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Vanotho eenre: “Ompacereroni Nyuwo, Apwiya, mwaahiiyaathi mathipelo a elapo ni wiirimu ori miteko sa matataanyu." 
Hebrews1:11 Iyo nsiriheye, mene nyuwo mmwihale; sootheene nsuuluvale ntoko ikuwo sa khalayi." 
Hebrews1:12 Nyuwo mmwipinde iyo ntoko mukaandyo, ni nsiceendyiwe ntoko ikuwo, mene nyuwo munkhala oohiceendyeya, ni iyaakhasanyu khasimmala.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Muluku khanamweerele naari ndyelo mmoha: “Okilaathi moonowaaka mulopwana mpaka kineeraaka kiwiiyaathi amwiittanaawo vathi va inaawosawo.” 
Hebrews1:14 Vano, andyelo ari taani? Awo ari minepa soorumeela, sirumihiwe weera saarumeele yaawo eneera ephwanye ovuluwa." 
Hebrews2:1 Tivawo, ontthuneya weera niiweleleke nnenesene yeeyo niiwalaahu weera nihihapuwe." 
Hebrews2:2 Vano, mutthenga waarumihiwe ni andyelo waari woottittimeheyaxa, moota wooweera ootheene yaawo yaatthenke, naari yahiiwelenle, ahaakhela nttaruxo noophwanela." 
Hebrews2:3 Wootepaxa, nnoopowe hai hiyo nakhootta ovuluwa otokotoko ntoko wu? Ovuluwa wu waathalihiwe woopacera ni Apwiya, ni vahoolowaya woolipihiwa ni yaawo yiiwale." 
Hebrews2:4 Mulukutho ookhalela onamoona ovuluxiwa iwo mwaha wa ineneero, sootikhiniha, miteko sa ikuru soohiyanahiyana, ni samahala sa Munepa Wootteela sivahiwe ntoko otthunawaya." 
Hebrews2:5 Khoohiyono wa andyelo Muluku aaroromenlaawe olamula wa elapo ya omaalo, mwa yeeyo hiyo nnuulumaahu," 
Hebrews2:6 mene wookhala mpatta wa Yoolempwa* weenre: “Mutthu taani weera mumpwatthe, naari mwaana a mutthu weera munxekure?" 
Hebrews2:7 Nyuwo moompaka yoowo ohanle vakhaani olikana ni andyelo; moongwariha ni ovuwa ni nttittimiho," 
Hebrews2:8 ni soothesene mwiiyaathiye vathi va inaawosawe.” Muluku ohiiyaathi soothesene vathi va mutthu, entaphulela weera kheewowo ehikhanle moolamulanimwawe. Wa soothesene, vaanaano, khannaaye woona weera soothesene siri vathi va inaawosawe." 
Hebrews2:9 Mpatta mukina nimmoona Yoole, wa ehuhu vakhaani aayevihiwe vakhaani waapwaha andyelo, Yeesu aawarihiwe ni ovuwa ni nttittimiho niwoko na okhwa ohaangwaawe. Mmahalani a Muluku Yeesu aalawiha okhwa wa mpuha wa ootheene." 
Hebrews2:10 Aweettihaka ancipale a anamwanaawe wa ovuwa, waatthuneya wa Muluku, Apwiya ni Mpattuxa a itthu sootheene, oomutatuxa Namapacera a ovuluwawaya ookwanela, aviraka moohaawani." 
Hebrews2:11 Vano, Yoowo ontteeliha ni yaawo antteelihiwa, anrweela wa mmoha paahi. Tivawo Yeesu khanuuliwa muru woowiitthana axunneiye." 
Hebrews2:12 Owo eenre: “Nkiromole nsinananyu wa axunnaka; nkiwiipeleni icipo sa ottottopela variyari wa ekerexa.” 
Hebrews2:13 Nitho: “Kinoororomela mwa Yoowo.” Owo eenretho: “Kiri va ni anamwane Muluku okivanghaawe.” 
Hebrews2:14 Tivawo, woonaka weera anamwane ari a erutthu ni ephome, Owo aathatuwatho mukhalelo mmoharu wa yaawo weera amphwate ni okhwawawe yoowo orino ikuru sa okhwa, eyo tiiyo Diyabu*," 
Hebrews2:15 ni weera awoopole yaale mookuminimwaya yaari ipottha niwoko na woova wa okhwa. 
Hebrews2:16 Vano, ti ekhaikhai weera khoohiyono wa andyelo Owo ompwatthaawe, mene wa ekhapira ya Abrahaamu." 
Hebrews2:17 Tivawo waatthuneya weera Owo aathatungwe ntoko axunneiye mmakhaleloni ootheene, weera akhale Mutokweene a asaserdoti* a ikharari ni oororomeleya mmutekoni mwa Muluku, ni weera iiraanyihe soottheka sa muloko." 
Hebrews2:18 Hapo Owo muneenaawe oohaawa eereriwaka, onoowera waakhavihera yaawo aneereriwa." 
Hebrews3:1 Tivawo, axunna ootteela, nyuwo muri a wiitthana wa wiirimu, mmuupuwelele nnenesene Yeesu ori Murummwa ni Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* nnimulapaahu." 
Hebrews3:2 Aari oororomeleya wa Yoole aamukhalinghaawe, hiiho ntoko Moisesi aaraawe oororomeleya Mpaani mootheene mwa Muluku." 
Hebrews3:3 Vano, hiiho ntoko mutthu onteka empa ti oopwaha empa yootekiwa, hiihotho Yeesu oophwanela ovuwa ompwahaxa Moisesi." 
Hebrews3:4 Khula empa entekiwa ni mutthu, mene Muluku ori Namateka a sootheene." 
Hebrews3:5 Moisesi aari oororomeleya ntoko murumeiyi Mpaani mootheene mwa Muluku, akhalelaka onamoona yeeyo yaarwa ohimmwa vahoolo," 
Hebrews3:6 mene Kristu ti oororomeleya ntoko Mwaana a Empa ya Muluku. Vano, Empeene yeeyo ti hiyo, navarela nnenesene oweherera ni ororomela mwa weiwo ninroromelaahu." 
Hebrews3:7 Mwa yeeyo, ntoko Munepa Wootteela oneera: “Olelo, nyuwo mwiiwa nsunawe," 
Hebrews3:8 muhuumihe murimaanyu ntoko mwaapakaanyu, munkhoottaka Muluku ehuhuweene yeele ya weereriwa munikareni." 
Hebrews3:9 Waari weiwo makholowaanyu yaakeerenraaya, ehikiiwelelaka Miyo, naamwi yoonaka yeeyo kaapankaaka woovira iyaakha miloko mixexe." 
Hebrews3:10 Tivawo kaanyoonyeraxiwaaka ekhapireene yeele ni kaaheera: ‘mirimasaya singhapuwa mahuku ootheene, ni awo khaasuwenle iphirosaka.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Hiiho kaalipela moonyoonyiwanimwaka: ‘awo kheerwa evolowa ngwiitthuuwanimwaka.’” 
Hebrews3:12 Mwiipasoope, axunna, weera hata mmoha a nyuwo ahikhalane murima woonanara ni woohiroromela onsusa wa Muluku mukumi." 
Hebrews3:13 Ohiyanawaya, mulipihaneke mirima mahuku ootheene mukina ni mukhwaawe, nireene nlelo nihuku nniitthaniwa “olelo,” weera hata mmoha a nyuwo ahuumihiwe murima ni olokottha wa yoottheka." 
Hebrews3:14 Vekhaikhai, hiyo nri mpatta wa Kristu, navarela nnenesene mpaka ommaleloni nroromelo nne naakhalannaahu ompacereroni." 
Hebrews3:15 Tivawo elempwaaya: “Olelo, nyuwo mwiiwa nsunawe, muhuumihe murimaanyu, ntoko mwaapakaanyu, munkhoottaka Muluku.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Yaari taani yiiwale ni yahiiwelenle? Khayaahiyono ootheene Moisesi aavenxalaawe wExipitu? 
Hebrews3:17 Wa taani Muluku aanyoonyeringwaawe siviraka iyaakha miloko mixexe? Khoohiyono ni yaale yaatthenke, mwa yaawo irutthusaya saamorenle munikareni?" 
Hebrews3:18 Wa taani Muluku aahimmaawe alipelaka: “Kheerwa evolowa ngwiitthuuwanimwaka”? Yaahimmwa yaawo yahiiwelenle. 
Hebrews3:19 Ninoona weera waari niwoko na ohiroromela awo yahaawenraaya ovolowa. 
Hebrews4:1 Moone, yoororomelihiwa ya ovolowa ngwiitthuuwani mwa Muluku emvara muteko mpaka olelo. Tivawo, niipasoope weera hata mmoha a nyuwo ahiyeleele ehuhu ya ovolowa ngwiitthuuwani wu." 
Hebrews4:2 Vano, masu ooreeraxa aalaleiwatho wa hiyo, hiiho ntoko wa yaawo, mene mutthenga ale yiiwalaaya khawaatekeleiye etthu, niwoko yaawo yiiwale khayaakhenle mutthenga ole ni nroromelo." 
Hebrews4:3 Hiyo ninroromela, ti hiyo nimvolowa ngwiitthuuwani wu, ntoko Muluku eenraawe: “Hiiho kaalipela moonyoonyiwanimwaka: awo kheerwa evolowa ngwiitthuuwanimwaka.” Aaheera yeeyo, naamwi mitekosawe simalihiweene okhuma ephattuwelo ya elapo." 
Hebrews4:4 Mpatta mukina, Owo aahuuluma masweene ala sa nihuku nanaathannameeli: “Ni nihuku nanaathannameeli Muluku aahiitthuuwa wa mutekwaawe wootheene.”" 
Hebrews4:5 Wa nipuro nihimmwale vaanaanoweene, eenretho: “Kheerwa evolowa ngwiitthuuwanimwaka.”" 
Hebrews4:6 Vano, woonaka weera yaale khalayeene yiiwale masu ooreeraxa khayaavolongwe ngwiitthuuwani mwa Muluku niwoko na ettiyamaaru, ti ekhaikhai akina ahanle ovolowa." 
Hebrews4:7 Tivawo Muluku omvaha veeli nihuku nimoha nniitthaniwa “olelo.” Vahoolo wa iyaakha sincipale, uulumaka ni eyano ya Davide, Muluku eenre, ntoko ehimmwalaaya: “Olelo, nyuwo mwiiwa nsunawe,muhuumihe murimaanyu.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Vano, waari weera Yoxuwa aahaavaha atthu wiitthuuwa, Muluku saano ahuulumme vahoolowaya sa nihuku nikinatho." 
Hebrews4:9 Hiiho, woohalatho wiitthuuwa wa eSaabadu wa muloko wa Muluku." 
Hebrews4:10 Ootheene amvolowa wiitthuuwa wa Muluku aniitthuuwatho wa mitekosaya, ntoko Muluku iitthuuwalaawe wa mitekosawe." 
Hebrews4:11 Tivawo, nilipihere ovolowa wiitthuuwawene weiwo weera ahikhale mukina aneera amore, attharaka ethoonyero ya yaale yahiiwelenle." 
Hebrews4:12 Masu a Muluku ari ni okumi ni oowera, ni oowiithaxa oopwaha yakhalaru ekatana eniitha ninno ninno. Awo amvolowa mpaka weiwo ammwaramwaxaaya okumi ni munepa, munkumana makhuva ni ikhinda, ni anthoriha soowuupuwela ni soohaawela sa murima." 
Hebrews4:13 Vamaithoni a Muluku kheewo eriwo yoowiipithiheya mweephattuweloni yootheene. Sootheene sohooneleliwa ni sohooneya vamaithoni wa Yoowo hiyo nneeraahu nimwaakhuleke. 
Hebrews4:14 Tivawo, woonaka weera nookhalano Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* mutokotoko, Yeesu, Mwaana a Muluku ovolongwe wiirimu, nivarexexe ni murima wootheene nroromelo ninlapaahu." 
Hebrews4:15 Vano, khaninono mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* ohingwera onimorela ikharari ni ohilipawahu, mene aani, Mukina aavinre ngweereriwani wootheene ntoko hiyo, ahitthekakatho." 
Hebrews4:16 Okhalaka hiiho, nikhuveeleke ehice ya mahala ni murima woolipa weera naakhele ikharari, ni weera niphwanye mahala annikhavihera ehuhu ya ohaawela." 
Hebrews5:1 Ahooleli a asaserdoti* ootheene anthanliwa variyari wa atthu, ni anthoonyiwa weera emurumeele Muluku mwaha wa atthu, ni weera yoonihere soovaha ni sooveleela niwoko na soottheka." 
Hebrews5:2 Hapo owo ori oohilipatho, onoowera waamorela ikharari yaawo ahisuwenle ni anghapuwa." 
Hebrews5:3 Tivawo ontthuneyaaya weera owo avahe sooveleela niwoko na sootthekasawe nitho na soottheka sa muloko. 
Hebrews5:4 Khaawo omvara nttittimiho nna mwaneenaawe, mene ontthuneya wiitthaniwa ni Muluku ntoko iitthaniwaawetho Aharoni." 
Hebrews5:5 Mooteene yoowo, Kristu khaavanre mwaneenaawe ovuwa wa okhala Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, mene Muluku aamweerela: “Weyo ti Mwanaka; olelo kohooyara.”" 
Hebrews5:6 Vano, eenre nipuro nikina: “Weyo ti Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* mahuku ootheene mmukhaleloni mwa Melkhisedeki.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Wa mahuku ootheene a okumaawe a mweelaponi, Yeesu annamvekela ni annamdyoonttelela, akhuwelaka ni maithori Yoowo aawera omvuluxa mookhwaani, ni iiwiwe niwoko na wiiwelelawawe otokotoko." 
Hebrews5:8 Aarookhalaru Mwaana, Owo aaxuttera wiiwelela niwoko na yeeyo aahaangwaawe." 
Hebrews5:9 Ni aakwanihenraawe wiiwelelawawe, aathatuwa Naattuuttu oohimala a ovuluxiwa wa ootheene ammwiiwelela," 
Hebrews5:10 areene ookhalihiwa ni Muluku weera akhale Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* mmukhaleloni mwa Melkhisedeki. 
Hebrews5:11 Vano, mwaha wa seiyo nookhalano masu mancipale, mene ti woorika woothaliherani, niwoko nyuwo muri oowiiwexexa vakhaani." 
Hebrews5:12 Mwa yeeyo, naamwi otthuneyaka weera mukhale ahusiha ehuhuweene yeela, ontthuneyatho weera mukina ooxuttiheni veeli mahusiho oopacera a masu a Muluku. Aani, nlelo mungwura mukaka, ehikhanle yooca yoolipa." 
Hebrews5:13 Yoowo ongwura mukaka, nlelo ori mwanamwane, ni khansuwela nihusiho na waakhuleliwa ni Muluku." 
Hebrews5:14 Yoocatho yoolipa ti wa atthu atokweene, mwa yaawo angwera osuwela ohiyana wa yooreera ni yoonanara niwoko na orehererawaya ni nthiti." 
Hebrews6:1 Tivawo, nihiye mahusiho oopacera mwaha wa Kristu, ni nipwaherere mpaka nikhale atokweene, nihivonyeraka veeli mathipelo awo: orukunxa mirima wa miteko sinrongha mookhwaani; nroromelo mwa Muluku;" 
Hebrews6:2 nihusiho mwaha wa opatiso; wiiyaathera matata; ovenyererihiwa akhwiiye, ni othoriha woohimala." 
Hebrews6:3 Hiiho nnipake Muluku atthuna. 
Hebrews6:4 Vano, wakhala weera atthu amwaleeliwe emaara emoha, yaalawiha mahala a wiirimu, yaakhenle Munepa Wootteela," 
Hebrews6:5 yaahoona oreera wa masu a Muluku ni ikuru sa ehuhu ya omaalo," 
Hebrews6:6 ni vahoolowaya yamora, khoongwereya wa yaawo weera ekhale oorongheliwatho orukunxa murima, niwoko asineenaayaru animuthomeiya veeli Mwaana a Muluku, ni ammuulihiha muru mwaatthuni." 
Hebrews6:7 Vano, etthaya engwura epula enrupa imaara sincipale ni emvaha soohepha soovareleya muteko wa yaawo anlima, ennaakhela mareeliho a Muluku." 
Hebrews6:8 Etthayatho enruwera nyiiwa ni malaxi eri yoohivareleya muteko, ni ehanle vakhaani weera elamphwe. Ommaleloniwaya ti yoohisiwa." 
Hebrews6:9 Oosiveleya, hata nuulumaka itthusene seiya, nooviriyeliwa wa itthu sooreera soopwaha mwaha wa nyuwo; itthu sinrongha moovuluwani." 
Hebrews6:10 Muluku khahiyono oohiroromeleya, Owo kharwa attiwala mitekosanyu, naari osivelawanyu mmoonihenraanyu, niwoko mohaakhavihera ootteela ni nlelo mumpwaherera waakhavihera yaawo." 
Hebrews6:11 Nintthuna weera khula mutthu a nyuwo oonihere nthiti noolikana ntoko hiiho mpaka ommaleloni, weera mulipihere owehererawanyu." 
Hebrews6:12 Ohiyanawaya, khanintthuna weera mukhale ooreesi, mene weera mwaatakihe yaawo anaakhela soororomelihiwa munroromeloni ni moovilelani." 
Hebrews6:13 Hapo khaakhanle mukina mutokweenexa oomulipela, Muluku aamuroromelihalaawe Abrahaamu, aahiilipela mwaneenaawe," 
Hebrews6:14 eeraka: “Vekhaikhai, Miyo nkooreelihe ni nkoovahe ikhapira sincipale.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Hiiho, vahoolo wa oweherera ni ovilela, Abrahaamu aahaakhela yoororomelihiwa ele." 
Hebrews6:16 Atthu animulipela mukina ori mutokweene waapwaha yaawo, ni nlipelo ninlipihera yeeyo ehimmwale, nimalihaka masu ootheene." 
Hebrews6:17 Muluku aatthuna woonihera ni ekhaikhai ya nnenesene wa yaale yeera yaakhele yoororomelihiwa weera olakelawaya khoorwa onceendyeya. Tivawo, aalipihera yoororomelihiwa ele ni nlipelo." 
Hebrews6:18 Vano, sookhala itthu piili sahaawereya oceendyiwa: yoororomelihiwa ni nlipelo. Ni mwaha wa itthusene seiyo khoongwereya weera Muluku anilokotthe. Hiiho, hiyo nikhaleke oolipihiweene, hiyo nnimutthawela Muluku weera nivare nnenesene oweherera nivahiwaahu." 
Hebrews6:19 Nookhalano oweherera wu ntoko nipuro noolipihiwa mookuminimwahu, noolipa nnenesene. Nroromelo nna nimvolowa mpuwa mwa empa yootteela mpaka wiithela wa ekuwo etokotoko," 
Hebrews6:20 mwemmo Yeesu aavolongwaawe ntoko Muhooleli vanipuroniwahu, athatuwaka Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* oohimala mmukhaleloni wa Melkhisedeki." 
Hebrews7:1 Melkhisedeki owo, mwene a oSalemi, ni musaserdoti* a Muluku musulusulu, aamukumanano Abrahaamu aahokoleelaawe owaani aawinakaru mamwene ni owo aamureeliha Abrahaamu." 
Hebrews7:2 Vano, Abrahaamu aamvaha yanaamuloko ya soothesene. Woopacera nsinanawe nintaphulela ‘mwene a ekhaikhai,’ ni vahoolowaya ‘mwene a oSalemi’ entaphulela ‘mwene a murettele.’" 
Hebrews7:3 Owo onkhala musaserdoti* mahuku ootheene, woohikhala atiithi, amaayi, ekhapira, epacerero, naari emalihero ya okumi, alikanxiweene Mwaana a Muluku." 
Hebrews7:4 Muupuwele otokweene wa mulopwana ola: mpaka nikholo Abrahaamu aamvaha yanaamuloko sa seiye aaruuhalaawe okhottoni. 
Hebrews7:5 Nlamulo ninnaxuttiha weera asaserdoti* variyari wa epuumba ya Leevi yaakhele yanaamuloko wa muloko, eyo tiiyo wa axunneiye, naamwi awo ekhalaka ekhapiratho ya Abrahaamu." 
Hebrews7:6 Wa soothesene, mulopwana owo, ahaakhanle a epuumba ya Leevi, aahaakhela yanaamuloko ni aamureeliha Abrahaamu aarino soororomelihiwa." 
Hebrews7:7 Woohihovela, mukhaaneene onreelihiwa ni mutokweene." 
Hebrews7:8 Mpatta mmoha, yaale anaakhela yanaamuloko ari atthu ankhwa, mpatta mukina, yoole onaakhela ti yoowo oneereliwa weera onkhala ni okumi." 
Hebrews7:9 Onoowereya ohima weera Leevi onaakhela yanaamuloko, oomulivatho Melkhisedeki yanaamuloko ni matata a Abrahaamu," 
Hebrews7:10 niwoko Melkhisedeki aamukumanannaawe Abrahaamu, Leevi aari nlelo mweerutthuni mwa nikholonawe." 
Hebrews7:11 Vano, waari ni osaserdoti* wa aLeevi muloko wa Yixrayeli waakhenlaaya malamulo. Moone, wawereya okwanihera yookwanela ni osaserdoti* wa aLeevi, heeni waatthuneyaaya weera aphiye nlelo Musaserdoti* Mukina mmukhaleloni wa Melkhisedeki, ohikhanle wa Aharoni?" 
Hebrews7:12 Wakhala oceendya wa osaserdoti*, ontthuneya weera okhaletho oceendya wa nlamulo." 
Hebrews7:13 Vano, Yoowo mwa Yoowo singhimmwaaya itthu iya aari a epuumba ekina. Khaawo a epuumbeene yeela otonke orumeela valtaarini* ntoko musaserdoti*." 
Hebrews7:14 Ntoko esuweliwaaya, Yeesu ori a epuumba ya Yuda, ni Moisesi khanahime etthu ya epuumbeene yeele uulumaawe sa osaserdoti*." 
Hebrews7:15 Yeeyo nimalinghaahu ohima ti yoosuwanyeyaxa akhumelelaka, Musaserdoti* Mukina oolikana ni Melkhisedeki," 
Hebrews7:16 mwa Yoowo aathatungwe Musaserdoti*, ohikhanle ni malamulo mwaha wa epuumba, mene ni ikuru sa okumi woohiphwateya." 
Hebrews7:17 Mwaha wa Yoowo, Yoolempwa* enaakhulela: “Nyuwo ti Musaserdoti* oohimala mmukhaleloni wa Melkhisedeki.”" 
Hebrews7:18 Malamulo a khalayi aamala, niwoko yaari oohilipa ni a siiyo," 
Hebrews7:19 woonaka weera malamulo ale khayaawenre yookwanela. Woovoleihiwa wa hiyo oweherera woopwahaxa, mwa yoowo hiyo nimmwaattamelaahuno Muluku." 
Hebrews7:20 Ni eyo khayaakhumelenle woohikhala nlipelo. Akina yaathatuwa asaserdoti* woohikhala nlipelo," 
Hebrews7:21 mene Owo oothatuwa Musaserdoti* ni nlipelo Muluku aamweerenlaawe: “Apwiya aalipela ni kheerwa eceendya olakelawaya: Nyuwo ti musaserdoti* oohimala.” 
Hebrews7:22 Niwoko na nlipelo nne, Yeesu oothatuwa yoororomelihiwa ya wiiraanyiha otokweenexa." 
Hebrews7:23 Moone, yaakhala asaserdoti* ancipale, niwoko okhwa onniwooceeliha opwaherera mmutekonimwaya." 
Hebrews7:24 Hapotho weera Yeesu onkhala mahuku ootheene, ookhalano osaserdoti* woohimala." 
Hebrews7:25 Tivawo, Owo ongweraawe waavuluxa nnenesene yaawo ammwaattamela Muluku mwa Yoowo, niwoko Owo onkhala mahuku ootheene weera aavekeleleke yaawo." 
Hebrews7:26 Vano, ti Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* ntoko Ola hiyo nnimuhaawelaahu: ootteela, oohikhala ni nthowa, oohittheka, oomwalamwalihiwa ni anamattheka, ni awelihiweene wiirimu woopwahaxa." 
Hebrews7:27 Khahiyono ntoko asaserdoti* akina. Owo khanghaawela ovaha sooveleela nihuku ti nihuku, woopacera wa sootthekasawe, ni vahoolowaya wa soottheka sa muloko. Owo ohiiveleela khuluwi wa sootthekasaya, iivelenlaawe mwaneenaawe." 
Hebrews7:28 Vano, nlamulo nnaakhaliha atthu ari oohilipa weera ekhale ahooleli a asaserdoti*, mene nlipelo niphiyale vahoolo wa nlamulo, noomukhaliha Mwaana ookwanela weera akhale Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* mahuku ootheene." 
Hebrews8:1 Moone, marimbu oottittimiheyaxa hiyo nninghimaahu ti ola: nookhalano Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, ntoko Ola, mwa Yoowo okilaathiye wiirimu moono mulopwana wa ehice ya Otokweene," 
Hebrews8:2 ni onrumeela vaNipuroni Nootteela*, vatabernaakuluni* ya ekhaikhai Apwiya apankaaya ahikhanle mutthu." 
Hebrews8:3 Ahooleli a asaserdoti* ootheene aakhalihiwa weera evahe soovaha ni sooveleela, ni tivawo, waatthuneya weera Owotho akhaleno etthu yooveleela." 
Hebrews8:4 Owo aari mweelaponi, saano ahikhanle Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti*, woonaka weera aakhala yaale amvaha sooveleela soonyesereriwa ni malamulo." 
Hebrews8:5 Awo anrumeela vaNipuroni Nootteela* nri etakiho ni munttuusi wa nenno nri wiirimu. Tivawo Moisesi oopereriwaawe eeraawe apake etabernaakulu*: “Mwiipasoope woopaka sootheene ntoko moota mooniheriwaanyu vamwaakoni.” 
Hebrews8:6 Wa soothesene vano, muteko Yeesu aakhenlaawe ti woopwahaxa wawaya, hiiho ntoko wiiraanyiha, mwa weiwo Yeesu ori Namawera, ti woopwahaxa wa iwe wa khalayi, niwoko wiiraana onyowani wookhalihiwa ni soororomelihiwa soopwahaxa." 
Hebrews8:7 Vano, wiiraanyiha woopacera waari wookwanela, khawaatthuneya waasaasa wanaaveeli." 
Hebrews8:8 Wa soothesene, Muluku aahoona weera mulokwaawe waari ni milattu, ni aaheera: “Animoowa mahuku, anghima Apwiya, kineeraaka kipake wiiraana onyowani ni empa ya aYixrayeli ni ya aYuda." 
Hebrews8:9 Khoorwa okhala ntoko wiiraana kaapankaaka ni makholowaaya nihuku kaavarenlaaka ni matata weera kaavenxe wExipitu. Niwoko awo khayaapwaherenre ngwiiraanyihanimwaka, Miyo koosusa wa yaawo, anghima Apwiya." 
Hebrews8:10 Wu ori wiiraana Miyo kineeraaka kipake ni muloko wa aYixrayeli vahoolo wa mahuku awo, anghima Apwiya: Nkihele malamulowaaka mmuupuwelonimwaya, ni nkilepe yaawo mmirimanimwaya. Nkikhale Mulukwaaya, ni awo eniikhale mulokwaaka." 
Hebrews8:11 Khaawo anaamuxuttihe mukhwaawe, hata munneiye eeraka: ‘Mwaasuwele Apwiya,’ niwoko ootheene awo eniikisuwele, okhuma asikhaani mpaka asitokweene." 
Hebrews8:12 Vano, Miyo nkaalevelele sootakhala, ni nkirwa kuupuwelelatho sootthekasaya.”" 
Hebrews8:13 Iitthanaka wiiraana wu ‘onyowani,’ Muluku aapaka wohuuluvala iwe woopacera, ni yeeyo eri ya khalayi ni yoowuuluvala, ehanle vakhaani olakaseiya." 
Hebrews9:1 Moone, wiiraanyiha woopacera waakhalano malamulo a olapa nitho etabernaakulu* ya vathi." 
Hebrews9:2 Yaatekiwa etabernaakulu* emoha, mwa yeeyo ekwartu yoopacera yiitthaniwa Nipuro Nootteela*, waaraayamo onyaari, meesa, ni ipaawu sootteelihiwa." 
Hebrews9:3 Wiithela wa ekuwo etokotoko yanaaveeli yaari ekwartu yanaaveeli, yiitthaniwa nootteela na ootteela*," 
Hebrews9:4 yaaphwanyaneyaayamo altaari* a eyuuma yoorikaxa ya erubani*, ni Arka* a wiiraana ookhuneelaxiwa ni eyuuma yoorikaxa. Mwemmo waakhala mwaapu wa eyuuma yoorikaxa ereenemo emana*, ni ekopo ya Aharoni yaaphuwale makukhu, ni itthaabwa sa wiiraana." 
Hebrews9:5 Vasulu wa Arka* yaari akerubini* a ovuwa, mwa yaawo yaakhuneela ettiyelo ya Arka* ni erunguwaaya. Mwaha wa itthusene seiye khaninrowa othaliha ni masu mancipale vaanaano vaava." 
Hebrews9:6 Sireene hiiho sootheene soorehereriwasene, asaserdoti* yannavolowa imaara sincipale mukwartuni yoopacera ya etabernaakulu* weera ekwanihere mitekosaya." 
Hebrews9:7 Wa soothesene, mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* paahi aavolowa ekwartu yanaaveeli emaara emoha paahi vayaakhani. Khaavolowa woohikhala ephome, mwa yeeyo owo aaveleelela sootthekasawe ni wa soottheka muloko waapakaaya niwoko na ohisuwelawaya." 
Hebrews9:8 Munepa Wootteela onnoonihera hiiho weera, nireene nlelo Nipuro Nootteela* noopacera, ephiro wa nootteela na ootteela* nlelo kheehuliwe." 
Hebrews9:9 Nno nri niphwanaphwaniho wa mahukwaahu, nooniheraka weera soovaha ni sooveleela soovahiwa khasaawera omvaha namalapa murima wookwanela otteela," 
Hebrews9:10 woonaka weera saapwatthela paahi sooca, soowura, miteko soohiyanahiyana sa orapiha ni maahi, malamulo oomokoni soolamuliwa paahi, mpaka ehuhu ya wiiraana onyowani." 
Hebrews9:11 Kristu orwiiyaawe ntoko Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* a itthu sooreera sa vaanaano, aavira mutabernaakuluni* etokweene ni yookwanelaxa, mwa yeeyo ehitekiwe ni atthu, eyo tiiyo ehikhalaka ya ephattuwelo ela." 
Hebrews9:12 Owo aavolowa emaara emoharu paahi mwa nootteela na ootteela*, ohikhanle ni ephome ya ipuri, naari ya imombe ixaana, mene ni ephomaawe mwaneenaawe, ni hiiho aakwanihera ovuluwa woohimala." 
Hebrews9:13 Waari weera ephome ya ipuri ni ya imombe ilopwana ni ettuura ya emombe exaana ethiyana emisiweene wa yaawo ari oohitteela enimwaatteeliha, mooteene yoowo weera awo anthatuwa ootteela omokoni," 
Hebrews9:14 woopwahaxa ephome ya Kristu, mwa Yoowo iivaherenre ni Munepa woohimala ntoko Yoovaha yookwanela wa Muluku, eniitteelihe mirimasahu sa miteko sa okhwa weera nimurumeele Muluku mukumi." 
Hebrews9:15 Tivawo, Kristu ti Namawera a wiiraana onyowani, weera yaawo aniitthaniwa ephwanye yoororomelihiwa ya yoohiyeriwa* yoohimala. Owo oowera wiiraanyiha weiwo, niwoko okhwenle elevelelo ya soottheka sipakiwe ehuhu ya wiiraanyiha woopacera." 
Hebrews9:16 Mwaha wa etestamentu*, ontthuneya woonihera weera yoowo opanke yeeyo, ohookhwa," 
Hebrews9:17 niwoko etestamentu* emvara muteko paahi mutthu muneene akhwiyeene – kheemvara muteko areene mukumi yoowo opanke. 
Hebrews9:18 Tivawo, hata wiiraanyiha woopacera khawaavanre muteko, ohikhanle ni ephome." 
Hebrews9:19 Moisesi, amalihaka olaleiya malamulo ootheene a nlamulo wa muloko wootheene, aakuxa ephome ya imombe ixaana ni ipuri vamoha ni maahi, mapururu ooxeera a ikhondoolo, ni iphandi sa hisopo*, ni aamisera elivuru eneenaaya ni muloko wootheene, eeraka:" 
Hebrews9:20 “Ela ti ephome ya wiiraanyiha, mwa weiwo Muluku oolamulenlaaweni weera mwiiwelele.”" 
Hebrews9:21 Mooteene yoowo, aamisera etabernaakulu* ni itthu soovarela muteko sootheene sa ikhovelelosaya." 
Hebrews9:22 Mwa yeeyo, nlamulo ninnyesereriha weera itthu sootheene sitteelihiwe ni ephome, ni ohikhanle ovuuviha wa ephome, kheewowo elevelelo." 
Hebrews9:23 Tivawo, waatthuneyaaya weera itakiho sa seiyo siri wiirimu sirapihiwe ni sooveleela iye, mene itthu sa wiirimu sa ekhaikhai ni sooveleela soopwahaxa." 
Hebrews9:24 Vano, Kristu khaavolongwe vaNipuroni Nootteela* noopakiwa ni atthu, etakiho emoha ya yeele ya ekhakhai. Owo aavolowa wiirimu oneenexa, weera iixoonihere vamaithoni wa Muluku niwoko na hiyo." 
Hebrews9:25 Khaavolowa weera iivaherere imaara sincipale, ntoko mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* omvolowa nootteela na ootteela* eyaakha ti eyaakha ni ephome ya inama." 
Hebrews9:26 Waari hiiho, waatthuneya weera Kristu ahaawe imaara sincipale, okhuma ompacereroni wa elapo ya vathi. Vanonto, ephiyaka emalihero ya ehuhu, Owo orwiiye emaara emoharu paahi weera avenxe yoottheka niwoko na wiiveleelawawe muneenaawe." 
Hebrews9:27 Mooteene yoowo okhaliheriwaawe mutthu okhwa emaara emoha paahi ni vahoolowaya athorihiwe ni Muluku," 
Hebrews9:28 hiihotho Kristu oovahereriwa ntoko Yooveleela emaara emoha paahi weera avenxe soottheka sa ancipale. Anaawe emaara yanaaveeli, ohikhanle ovenxa soottheka, mene weera aaruuhele ovuluwa yaawo aningweherera." 
Hebrews10:1 Nlamulo ti munttuusi paahi wa sooreera sineera sirwe, ohikhanle ekhaikhai ya seiyo. Tivawo, khaningwera waakwaneliha ni sooveleelasene seiyo simvahiwa eyaakha ti eyaakha yaawo anaattamela weera elape." 
Hebrews10:2 Nawera waakwaneliha, sooveleela saarowa omala. Niwoko waari hiiho, anamalapa, etteelihiwaka emaara emoha, wa mahuku ootheene khayoonatho nthowa na sootthekasaya." 
Hebrews10:3 Wa soothesene, sooveleela iyo eyaakha ti eyaakha sinnuupuxera sa soottheka," 
Hebrews10:4 niwoko khoongwereya weera ephome ya imombe ni ipuri evenxe soottheka. 
Hebrews10:5 Tivawo, Kristu awaaka mweelaponi, aaheera: “Yooveleela ni yoovaha khamwaatthunne, mene mwaakirehererela erutthu." 
Hebrews10:6 Sooveleela soohisiwa, naari soovaha wa yoottheka khasoosivenleni." 
Hebrews10:7 Vano kaaheera: Kiri va. Yoolempwa* mulivuruni mwaha wa Miyo: kirweenle weera kipake otthunawanyu, Muluku.”" 
Hebrews10:8 Woopacera Owo aaheera: “Sooveleela ni soovaha, sooveleela soohisiwa ni soovaha wa yoottheka khamwaatthunne, naari khasoosivenleni.” Seiyo saapakeliwe niwoko nlamulo naanyeserera." 
Hebrews10:9 Vano aapwaherera: “Kiri va. Kirweenle weera kipake otthunawanyu.” Owo ommaliha soopacera weera ekhalihiwe yooveleela yanaaveeli. 
Hebrews10:10 Mootthunani wu, nootteelihiwa niwoko na yooveleela ya erutthu ya Yeesu Kristu, evahiwe emaara emoha wa mahuku ootheene." 
Hebrews10:11 Nihuku ti nihuku asaserdoti* ootheene aneemela ni ampaka mitekosaya sa ediini, evahaka mahuku ootheene sooveleelasene seiyo sihingwera ovenxa soottheka." 
Hebrews10:12 Vaheera Musaserdoti* Ola, amalihakaru yooveleelaawe yoohimala emoharu wa yoottheka, aakilaathi moono mulopwana wa Muluku." 
Hebrews10:13 Evenyero vaavaale, Owo onooweherera mpaka amwiittanaawe yiikaathiwe vathi wa inaawosawe." 
Hebrews10:14 Vano, niwoko na yooveleela emoharu Owo ohaakwaneliha wa mahuku ootheene yaawo antteelihiwa." 
Hebrews10:15 Munepa Wootteela onnikhalela onamoona mwaha wa yeeyo. Woopacera Apwiya yeenre: 
Hebrews10:16 “Wu ti wiiraana kineeraaka kipake ni yaawo vahoolo wa mahuku ale, aneera Apwiya. Nkihele malamulowaaka mmirimanimwaya, ni nkilepe mmuupuwelonimwaya.”" 
Hebrews10:17 Ni yaapwaherera: “Sootthekasaya ni sootakhalasaya nkirwa kuupuwelelatho.” 
Hebrews10:18 Weiwo enkhalaayawo elevelelo, khoontthuneya ovahatho yooveleela." 
Hebrews10:19 Vano, hiyo nookhalano oweherera otokotoko weera nivolowe mwa nootteela na ootteela* niwoko na ephome ya Yeesu," 
Hebrews10:20 mphironi enyowani ni ekumi Owo onihulenlaawe eviraka mukuwoni etokotoko, eyo tiiyo mweerutthunimwawe," 
Hebrews10:21 ni nookhalanotho Musaserdoti* mutokotoko vaate wa Muluku. 
Hebrews10:22 Tivawo, nimwaattamele Muluku ni murima wa ekhaikhai ni noosareya ni nroromelo, nikhalanaka mirima soomisiwa sa mathowa, ni nikhalanaka irutthusahu soorapihiwa ni maahi ootteela." 
Hebrews10:23 Nivarexexe nnenesene oweherera ninlapaahu, niwoko Yoowo ororomelihale ti oororomeleya." 
Hebrews10:24 Nuupuwele moota heeni nneerahu nilipihane mukina ni mukhwaawe wa osivela ni miteko sooreera. 
Hebrews10:25 Nihihiye othukumana mukerexani, ntoko akina ankhovelelaaya, mene nilipihanaxeke mukina ni mukhwaawe, woonaka weera nihuku eneeraaya erwe Apwiya ninnaattamela." 
Hebrews10:26 Napwaherera ottheka mwayiini vahoolo woowaakhela esuwelo ya ekhaikhai, kheenghala yooveleela ekina wa yoottheka." 
Hebrews10:27 Onihalenle paahi oweherera nthorihelo noowoopihaxa na Muluku, ni mooro ovarelaka oniwaahise amwiittana a Muluku." 
Hebrews10:28 Yoowo aakhoontte nlamulo na Moisesi aahookhwa woohimoreliwa ikharari, nthowanawe nakhaleliwa onamoona ni anamoona eeli, hoye hoye araru." 
Hebrews10:29 Munuupuwela hai? Ottaruxiwa heeni wootepaxa omphwanela yoole omunyikanlaawe ni inaawo Mwaana a Muluku, yoole oveihale ephome ya wiiraana emutteelihale ni ooruwana Munepa wa mahala?" 
Hebrews10:30 Vano, noomusuwela Yoole eenre: “Isikula ti sawaka, ti Yoomi kinrowa ottaruxa.” Nitho: “Apwiya eniithorihe mulokwaaya.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Ti woowoopihaxa omorela mmatatani mwa Muluku mukumi. 
Hebrews10:32 Muupuwelele mahuku oopacera, mwa yaawo vahoolowaya mwaamwaleeliwaanyu, mwaavilenlaanyu ekhotto etokotoko ya ohaawa." 
Hebrews10:33 Imaara sikina nyuwo mwaaruwaniwa ni mwaari moohaawani mwaatthuni, imaara sikinatho mwaahaawa vamoha ni yaawo yaahaawihiwa hiiho." 
Hebrews10:34 Nyuwo mwaahaamorela ikharari yaawo yaari okaliposo, ni mwaahaakhulela ni ohakalala waakhiwa wa sooreelasanyu, niwoko mwaasuwela weera mookhalano sooreela sitokweene ni soohimala." 
Hebrews10:35 Tivawo, muhiiyeleelihe nroromelo murinaanyu, niwoko nno nnitthuveliwe nnenesene." 
Hebrews10:36 Ontthuneya weera nyuwo muvilele mooteene yoowo weera mwaamalihaka opaka otthuna wa Muluku, nyuwo mwaakhele yeeyo Owo ororomelihalaawe." 
Hebrews10:37 Vano, woowaakuveyaxa “Yoowo aneera arwe, anaarwe, ni kharwa alekela." 
Hebrews10:38 Yoowo aakhuleliwa ni Miyo anaakhale munroromeloni, mene ahokoleela ottuli, khakisiveliha.”" 
Hebrews10:39 Wa soothesene, hiyo khanihiyono a yaale anghokoleela ottuli ni amphwatiwa, mene a yaale anroromela ni amvuluxiwa." 
Hebrews11:1 Moone, nroromelo ti yooviriyela weera yeeyo ningwehereraahu enookhumelela, ni ti waakhulela wa itthu nihinoonaahu." 
Hebrews11:2 Vano, waari niwoko na nroromelo asitokweene a khalayi yaakhenlaaya onamoona wooreera." 
Hebrews11:3 Ni nroromelo ninniiwexexa weera ephattuwelo epattuxiwe ni nsu na Muluku, moota wooweera itthu soowooneya sikhumme mwa soohooneya." 
Hebrews11:4 Munroromeloni Abeli aamvaha Muluku yooveleela yoopwahaxa ya Kayini. Munroromeloni owo aahooneliwa okhala ntoko mutthu owaakhuleliwa ni Muluku, eenre Owo aakhulelaka soovahasawe. Naamwi akhwaaka, munroromeloni nlelo owo onimweera wuuluma." 
Hebrews11:5 Munroromeloni Henookhi aakuxiwa, moota wooweera khoonne okhwa, “Owo khamphwanyiwa, niwoko Muluku aamukuxa.” Vano, ahinaaye okuxiwa, Yoolempwa* yeenre weera owo aamusiveliha Muluku." 
Hebrews11:6 Nihikhanle nroromelo, khoongwereya omusiveliha Muluku, niwoko yoowo ommwaattamela Muluku, ontthuneya ororomela weera Owo ookhala ni weera onnaatthuvela yaawo ammwaasaasa." 
Hebrews11:7 Munroromeloni Nowe, oopereriweene itthu nlelo sahaakhumelenle ni eettihiweene ni woova wootteela, aapaka nikula weera avuluxe emusaawe. Niwoko na nroromelo owo aathoriha elapo ya vathi ni aahaakhela waakhuleliwa ni Muluku onrweela niwoko na nroromelo." 
Hebrews11:8 Munroromeloni Abrahaamu, iitthaniweene, aahiiwelela ni aarowa vanipuroni, mwa nenno vahoolowaya eeraawe aakhele ntoko nawawe, aari mweeraru ahisuwenle aarowaawewo." 
Hebrews11:9 Munroromeloni aakhala mweelaponi yoororomelihiwa ntoko areene mweelaponi ya anamarwa. Aakhala muheemani vamoha ni Isaaki ni Yakobe, mwa yaawo yaahaakhela yoororomelihiweene yeeyo." 
Hebrews11:10 Vano, owo aaweherera esidade ni mathipelo mwa yeeyo namavaanelaaya ni namatekaaya ti Muluku." 
Hebrews11:11 Munroromeloni Abrahaamu, aarookhalaru namuuluvala nitho Sara oohiyara, aahaakhela ikuru sa omuyara mwaana, niwoko aaroromela weera Yoowo aamuroromelihale aari oororomeleya." 
Hebrews11:12 Hiiho wa mulopwana ole ari ohikhalanaru ikuru, yaakhuma atthu ancipale ntoko ithenyeeri sa wiirimu soowaatta, ni oohaalikeleya ntoko ehaava ya mukerekhere wa ephareiya." 
Hebrews11:13 Ootheene ale akhwiiye munroromeloni. Awo khayaakhenle soororomelihiwa, yoonne ni yunkheliwe iye ottaiwene paahi, esuwelaka weera yaari anamarwa ni aletto mweelaponi." 
Hebrews11:14 Awo anuuluma hiiho, anoonihera weera anaasaasa ewaani ekina." 
Hebrews11:15 Yuupuwelenle elapweene yeele yaakhumelenlaaya, yaamukhalano ehuhu ya ohokoleela." 
Hebrews11:16 Vano, ohiya toko yeeyo, awo yaaweherera ewaani yootthuneyaxa, eyo tiiyo ewaani ya wiirimu. Tivawo, Muluku khaniixuulihiha muru iitthaniwaka Mulukwaaya, niwoko ohaarehererela esidade emoha." 
Hebrews11:17 Munroromeloni Abrahaamu, ootiwaka murima ni Muluku, aamuvaha Isaaki ntoko yooveleela. Yoole aakhelenle soororomelihiwa aahanle vakhaani omwiiva mwanawe mmoharu," 
Hebrews11:18 waarookhalaru weera Muluku aamuleela: “Isaaki anaakhale epacerero ya ekhapiraanyu.” 
Hebrews11:19 Abrahaamu uupuwenle weera Muluku ti ongwera waavenyereriha akhwiiye ni, moota mukina, aamwaakhela Isaaki mookhwaani." 
Hebrews11:20 Munroromeloni Isaaki aamureeliha Yakobe ni Esawu mwaha wa muhoolomwaya. 
Hebrews11:21 Munroromeloni Yakobe, ahanleene vakhaani okhwa, aahaareeliha anamwane ootheene a Yoseefe, ni aamulapa Muluku, uuramelaka vathokani ya ekopwaawe." 
Hebrews11:22 Munroromeloni Yoseefe akhwaaka, aahuuluma sa okhuma wa aYixrayeli wExipitu ni aalamula mwaha wa makhuvaawe." 
Hebrews11:23 Munroromeloni, Moisesi ayariwakaru, aavithiwa ni asinaangolowaawe nyeeri miraru, niwoko awo yaahoona weera khaahiyono mwaana ntoko akina, ni khayoomve ekano ya mwene." 
Hebrews11:24 Munroromeloni Moisesi, areene mutokweene, aakhootta wiitthaniwa mwaana a mwaana muthiyana a Farawu*," 
Hebrews11:25 athanlaka ohasuliwa vamoha ni muloko wa Muluku ohiya soohaawela sootthekeya sa ehuhu vakhaani. 
Hebrews11:26 Owo aahuupuwela weera ohasuliwa niwoko na Kristu ti mpuha woopwahaxa mihakhu sa wExipitu, niwoko aawehexexa ntthuvelonawe." 
Hebrews11:27 Munroromeloni aavenya wExipitu, ahoovaka isara sa mwene, ni aavilela, niwoko aamoona Yoowo ori oohooneya." 
Hebrews11:28 Munroromeloni aampaka mPaska* ni aalamula weera milako sittikittheliweke ni ephome, weera namaphwata ahitave matthaara a aYixrayeli." 
Hebrews11:29 Munroromeloni muloko waalapuwa ephareiya yooxeera ereene ntoko etthaya yoowuuma, mene atthu a wExipitu, yeereraka opaka yeeyo, yaahookhwa emireyaka." 
Hebrews11:30 Munroromeloni ixiri sa oYeriko saapittuwa vahoolo woorukureeriwa ni muloko mahuku mathannameeli. 
Hebrews11:31 Munroromeloni, puuta Rakhabi khaakhwiiye vamoha ni yaawo yaari oohiiwelela, niwoko owo aawaakhela vaatewawe anamahottela yaarummwe owehaweha elapo." 
Hebrews11:32 Nkeeretho hai? Nkinono ehuhu yoowuuluma sa Gideyoni, Baraki, Samsoni, Yefte, Davide, Samuweli ni maprofeeti," 
Hebrews11:33 mwa yaawo munroromeloni yaawinne omwene, yaapaka itthu sa ekhaikhai, yaahaakhela soororomelihiwa, yaawala iyano sa amwatto," 
Hebrews11:34 yaacipiha ikuru sa mooro, ni yaahoopowa wiitha wa ekatana. Ohilipawaya waatatuxiwa ikuru, ni awo yaathatuwa oolipa mukhottoni ni yaahaatthawiha anakhotto a ilapo sikina." 
Hebrews11:35 Athiyana yaawaakhela anamakhwaaya niwoko na ovenyerera. Akina yaahasuliwa vancipale ni yaakhootta woopoliwa weera ekwanihere ovenyerera wootepaxa. 
Hebrews11:36 Akina yaahaawa ni oveihiwa ni owaxuliwa, akina yaatthukiwatho ni onyooro ni yaawaleliwa okaliposo." 
Hebrews11:37 Yaavonyiwa maluku, yaakheriwa eriyari, yaahiiviwa ni wiitha wa ekatana. Yaaneetteetta ewanreene ixapala sa ikhondoolo ni ipuri, ethaamihiweene, ehooxiwaka ni ehasuliwaka." 
Hebrews11:38 Elapo ya vathi khayaaphwanenle. Yanneetta etthawatthawaka mmakareni ni nnyaakoni, nnyattani ni mmakhukuni." 
Hebrews11:39 Ootheene awo yaahaakhelela onamoona wooreera niwoko na nroromelonaya. Wa soothesene, khaawo mmoha a yaawo aakhenle yeeyo yaaroromelihiwaaya." 
Hebrews11:40 Muluku aavaanela etthu yooreeraxa wa hiyo, eyo tiiyo weera awo ekwanelihiwe vamoha ni hiyo." 
Hebrews12:1 Tivawo, neenre nirukureeriwaka ni anamoona ancipalexa, hiyo niixoopole mwa soothesene sinnooceeliha, ni mwa soottheka sinnitthukaxa. Nnitthimakele ni ovilela ephiro Muluku oniiyaathenraawe ohoolowahu," 
Hebrews12:2 ningwehexexaka Yeesu ori ompacereroni ni ommaleloni wa nroromelonahu. Owo aavilela muttanda, aramusaka wuulihawaya muru, asuwelaka ohakalala waamuweherera. Vano ori ekilaathelo moono mulopwana wa ehice ya Muluku." 
Hebrews12:3 Mmuupuwele Yoole ovilenle mweerutthunimwawe wiittana otokotoko wa anamattheka, weera nyuwo muhikhulumuwe, naari muhikhale oohilipa murima." 
Hebrews12:4 Mukhottoni ni soottheka, nyuwo nlelo khamuwananne iye moota wooweera ephomaanyu yoovuuvihiwa." 
Hebrews12:5 Nyuwo moottiwala masu a olipiha murima Muluku aaweerenlaaweni ntoko anamwane: “Mwanaka, ohiramuse olaka wa Apwiya, ni ohikhale oohilipa murima awo yoolakaka." 
Hebrews12:6 Vano, Apwiya animulaka yoowo animusivelaaya, ni animuttaruxa khula mutthu ammwaakhulelaaya ntoko mwanaya.”" 
Hebrews12:7 Mwavilela olakiwa, Muluku anooreherereni ntoko anamwane. Mwaana heeni ohinlakiwa ni atithawe?" 
Hebrews12:8 Vano, nyuwo mwaahilakiwaka (nuupuwelelaka weera olakiwa ti wa anamwane ootheene), khweeli nyuwo khamuhiyono anamwane a ekhaikhai, mene a oraruwiwa." 
Hebrews12:9 Ohiya toko yeeyo, naakhalano asitithihu a vathi yaanilaka, ni hiyo nannaattittimiha. Wootepaxa ontthuneya weera hiyo niwiiwelele Atiithi a minepasahu, weera hiiho nikhale ni okumi." 
Hebrews12:10 Asitithihu yaanilaka ehuhu vakhaani, ntoko yuupuwelaaya weera waari wooreera, Mulukutho onnilakela mpuhaahu weera niphwanye ntteelihonawe." 
Hebrews12:11 Naalakiwaka, kheehiyono ehuhu yoohakalaliha, mene yoothananiha. Vahoolowayatho olakiwa onruwera yoowiima ya waakhuleliwa ni Muluku, ni murettele wa yaawo alakiwe." 
Hebrews12:12 Tivawo, mulipihe matata ookhulumuwa ni makutha oohilipa." 
Hebrews12:13 Mpakele iphiro soowookowa inaawosanyu, weera ootuthunya ahitepaxe, mene alamihiwe." 
Hebrews12:14 Mwiilipihe weera mukhale mmuretteleni ni atthu ootheene ni weera mukhale ootteela, niwoko ohikhanle ntteeliho, khaawo eniwoone Apwiya." 
Hebrews12:15 Mwiipasoope weera ahikhale mukina, anaasuse wa mahala a Muluku ni weera naari mukwankhwaari mmoha woowaawa ohiphuwe, oruuhaka sookacamiha waananarihaka ancipale." 
Hebrews12:16 Ahikhale namararuwa mmoha, naari mutthu onramusa itthu sootteela, ntoko Esawu, mwa yoowo aathumihale ikurusawe sa ntthaara mwaha wa yooca emoha paahi." 
Hebrews12:17 Ntoko musuwenlaanyu, vahoolowaya, ahaawelaka waakhela nreeliho, aakhoottiwa. Khaawenre oceendya yeeyo yaamukhumelenle, naamwi aasaasaka nreeliho ni maithori." 
Hebrews12:18 Nyuwo khamwaaphiyale vamwaakoni ovarelaka ongwereya otava, hata mpiphini, munihutteni nooriipa, naari ettheku etokotoko," 
Hebrews12:19 oruma wa nipalapatta, naari oruma wa masweene yaawo weera yaawo yiiwa, yaadyoonttelela weera ehileeliwetho, naari nsu nimoha." 
Hebrews12:20 Khayaawera ovilela yeeyo yaalamuleliwaaya: “Mpaka mwaamunama atava mwaako, ontthuneya weera avonyiweke maluku.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Vano, yookhumelela ele yaari yoowoopihaxa moota wooweera mpaka Moisesi aaheera: “Kinoothukumela ni woova!.”" 
Hebrews12:22 Nyuwotho moophiya vamwaakoni oSiyoni, wa oYerusaleemu wa wiirimu, wa esidade ya Muluku mukumi. Moophiya wa andyelo oohaalikeleya ethukumanneene ni ohakalala," 
Hebrews12:23 wa ekerexa ya matthaara, wa yaawo masinaaya alempwale wiirimu. Moophiya wa Muluku, Mphuki a atthu ootheene, ni wa minepa sa yaale akwanihenre okwanela," 
Hebrews12:24 wa Yeesu, Namawera a wiiraana onyowani ni wa ephome emisiwe, mwa yeeyo enuuluma yooreeraxa opwaha ya Abeli." 
Hebrews12:25 Mwiipasoope weera muhimukhootte Yoowo onuuluma. Yaawo yaakhoontte omwiiwa yoowo aawooperera mweelaponi, khayoopongwe ottaruxiwa. Woopwahaxa hiyo nnithorihiwe, namukhootta yoole onnooperera areene wiirimu." 
Hebrews12:26 Ehuhuweene yeele nsunawe naateterexa etthaya, mene vano yoororomelihiwa ti ela: “Emaara emohatho nkiteterexe, ohikhanle etthaya paahi, mene wiirimutho.”" 
Hebrews12:27 Masu “emaara emohatho” anthoonyera ovenxiwa wa seiye singwereya oteterexiwa, eyo tiiyo itthu sipattuxiwe, moota wooweera sihale seiyo sihingwereya oteterexiwa." 
Hebrews12:28 Tivawo, woonaka weera nnaakhela omwene woohiteterexeya, nittottopele, ni hiiho nimulape Muluku moota woowaakhuleleya, ni nttittimiho ni woova." 
Hebrews12:29 Vano, Mulukwaahu ti mooro woolalihaxa." 
Hebrews13:1 Mupwaherere osivelana mukina ni mukhwaawe ntoko axunna. 
Hebrews13:2 Muhittiwale oletto, niwoko epakaka yeeyo, akina yaawaakhela andyelo ehisuwelaka." 
Hebrews13:3 Ngwuupuwelele yaawo ari okaliposo ntoko nyuwotho mureene vamoha ni yaawo. Ngwuupuweleletho yaawo anghasuliwa ntoko nyuwo muhaawaka mweerutthuni asineenaanyu. 
Hebrews13:4 Othelana ontthuneya weera ottittimiheyeke ni ootheene. Ororomeleya variyari wa mulopwana ni mwaariye ontthuneya weera ottittimiheyeketho, niwoko Muluku anaathorihe alavilavi ni anamararuwa." 
Hebrews13:5 Muhilamuliweke ni osivela wa musurukhu, ni muhakalaleleke yeeyo murinaanyu, niwoko Muluku mwaneenaawe eenre:“Nkirwa koohiya, naari koothaama.”" 
Hebrews13:6 Hiiho ninoowera ohima ni nroromelo: “Apwiya ti ekhaviherowaaka, nkinoova. Anaawere okeeriha eheeni mutthu?”" 
Hebrews13:7 Ngwuupuwelele yaawo ari ahoolelaanyu, yoothalihenreni masu a Muluku. Moone emalihero ya okumaaya ni mutakihe nroromelonaya." 
Hebrews13:8 Yeesu Kristu ti oohiceendyeya: osilo, olelo ni mahuku ootheene." 
Hebrews13:9 Muhikuxiwe ni makhalelo a mahusiho ootheene oohiyanahiyana a amalapo. Ti wooreera weera murimaahu olipihiwe ni mahala, ohikhanle ni yooca, mwa yeeyo ehingwera waapuhiha yaawo anca." 
Hebrews13:10 Nookhalano altaari*, mwa yaawo atthu anrumeela mutabernaakuluni* khaantthuniheriwa ocawo." 
Hebrews13:11 Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* onkuxa ephome ya axinama mpaka vaNipuroni Nootteela na Ootteela* ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, mene irutthusaya singhisiwa okerekhere wa esidade." 
Hebrews13:12 Hiihotho Yeesu aahaawa okerekhere wa milako sa esidade weera atteelihe muloko niwoko na ephomaawe. 
Hebrews13:13 Tivawo, nivenye, nirowaka wa Yoowo okerekhere wa esidade, nivilelaka ohittittimihiwa Owo ovilenlaawe." 
Hebrews13:14 Vano, khaninono vathi esidade yoohimala, mene nnaasaasa yeeyo eneera erwe." 
Hebrews13:15 Niwoko na Yeesu, nimvahe Muluku mahuku ootheene yooveleela ya ottottopeliwa, eri yoowiima ya iyano sinlapa Nsinanawe." 
Hebrews13:16 Muhittiwale opaka yooreera, naari okawana, niwoko Muluku onghakalalela sooveleela ntoko iyo." 
Hebrews13:17 Ngwiiwelele asitokweenaanyu ni mwaakhuleleke ikurusaya. Awo anookosoopani, nyuwo, esuwelaka weera awo ankela owaakhula Apwiya mwaha wa nyuwo. Ngwiiwelele weera mitekosaya sikhale ohakalala, ehikhanle etthu yoolemela, niwoko eyo khayaavareleya etthu wa nyuwo." 
Hebrews13:18 Munivekelele hiyo. Noororomela weera nookhalano murima wooreera, ni ninghaawela okhala moota woottittimiheya mwa soothesene." 
Hebrews13:19 Kinoodyoonttelelani weera muvekele, weera woowaakuveya miyo kikhale vamoha ni nyuwo." 
Hebrews13:20 Ti ohaawelawaka weera Muluku a murettele omvenyererihale Yeesu Apwiyaahu, Mukukhuli mutokweene a ikhondoolo, mwa Yoowo owenre ni ephomaawe wiiraanyiha woohimala," 
Hebrews13:21 ookwaneliheni nyuwo mwa sooreera sootheene weera mupake otthunawawe. Owo awere mwa hiyo muteko woomusiveliha mwaha wa Yeesu Kristu, mwa Yoowo okhale ovuwa woohimala. Ame*." 
Hebrews13:22 Axunnaka, kinoovekelani nyuwo weera muvilele maswaaka a owoopererani. Vekhaikhai, miyo kohoolepelani masu vakhaani." 
Hebrews13:23 Kintthuna weera musuwele weera munnihu Timootheyo ootaphuliwa. Owo aphiya woowaakuveya, nkirwe kiwooneni vamoha ni yoowo." 
Hebrews13:24 Mwaavahe isalaama wa asitokweenaanyu ootheene ni wa ootteela ootheene. Yaawo ari a wItaliya animoovahani isalaama. 
Hebrews13:25 Mahala ekhale ni nyuwo ootheene. 
James1:1 Ya Yakobe, murumeiyi a Muluku ni a Apwiya Yeesu Kristu, wa ipuumba muloko ni piili simwaramwareiye variyari wa miloko: Salaama!" 
James1:2 Axunnaka, muupuwelele weera ti ohakalala otokotoko nyuwo mwaaviraka ngweereriwani woohiyanahiyana," 
James1:3 niwoko moosuwela weera nroromelonanyu neereriwa, ninruwera ovilela." 
James1:4 Ontthuneya weera ovilela okwaniheriwe weera nyuwo mukhale atokweene munroromeloni, ni a ekhaikhai ehoohaleelakani etthu." 
James1:5 Akhala mukina a nyuwo onthoiwa miruku, amvekele Muluku onaavaha ootheene ni ohakalala ni otthuna wootheene, ni vano anaavahiwe." 
James1:6 Wa soothesene, amvekele ni nroromelo, ahihovelaka, niwoko yoowo onghovela onoolikana ni mutekuteku wa mphareiyani, onkuxiwa ni owali wa epheyo." 
James1:7 Mulopwana owo ahuupuwele weera anaakhele etthu wa Apwiya," 
James1:8 niwoko ti mutthu orino soowuupuwela piili, ni ori ooceendyaceendya mwa sootheene ompakaawe." 
James1:9 Vano, munna oniiyeviha iivuwiheke niwoko na nipuronawe noottittimiheyaxa;" 
James1:10 munnatho oopuha iivuwiheke ngwiiyevihanimwawe, niwoko anaavire ntoko ithutu sa ntuphini." 
James1:11 Vano nsuwa ningwela ni ovihawaya woovarela ni ninnyaaliha mwiri, ni ethutwaaya eniimore, ni oreera wa ekhalelowaaya enoophwatiwa. Mooteene yoowo, namapuha anaanyaale, areene oopwattha mitekosawe." 
James1:12 Ooreelihiwa mulopwana omvilela ngweereriwani, niwoko avilela, anaakhele ecireemba ya okumi Muluku aaroromelihalaawe yaawo animusivela." 
James1:13 Akhala mukina oneereriwa, aheere: “Kineereriwa ni Muluku.” Muluku khangwereya weereriwa ni yoonanara, ni khaawo ommweereraawe." 
James1:14 Wa soothesene, khula mutthu oneereriwa ni soohaawelasawe mwaneenaawe soonanara. Ti soohaawela iyo sinimpurula ni sinimweettiha mutthu." 
James1:15 Vano, soohaawela iyo sarupala, singyara soottheka; ni soottheka siitthwa, singyara okhwa." 
James1:16 Axunnaka oosiveleya, muhiilokotthe." 
James1:17 Yoovahiwa yooreera yootheene ni yamahala yookwanela yootheene enrweela wa Atiithi a waara, mwa Yaawo ahinceendya ntoko irungu sooceendyaceendya." 
James1:18 Awo yaalakela oniyara ni masu a ekhaikhai, weera nikhale ntoko soowiima soopacera sa sootheene seiyo Awo apattunxaaya." 
James1:19 Axunnaka oosiveleya, muupuwelele yeeyo: mukhale oowaakuva wiiwa, mene oopisa wuuluma, hoye hoye onyoonyiwa," 
James1:20 niwoko isara sa mutthu khasinruwera yeeyo Muluku ontthunaawe. 
James1:21 Tivawo, mwiixoopole wa ohitteela wootheene ni sootakhala soowaatta, ni mwaakhele ni murima woowiiyeviha masu yaaliwe mmurimanimwanyu, mwa yaawo anoowera woovuluxani." 
James1:22 Mweetteleke masu, khoohiyono wiiwaru paahi, mwiilokotthaka mwaneenaanyu." 
James1:23 Yoole oniiwa masu, mene ahineettela, onlikana ni mutthu onoona ekhovaawe valoolani," 
James1:24 ni, iixoonaka, onoovenya ni woowaakuveya onoottiwala ekhovaawe." 
James1:25 Mutthutho ontthokelela nnenesene nlamulo nookwanela ninruuha oneethi, ni ompwaherera munlamuloni nno, ahittiwalaka iiwalaawe, mene eettelaka munlamuloni, anaareelihiwe mwa yeeyo ompakaawe." 
James1:26 Akhala mukina onuupuwela weera kiri mulipa a ediini, mene ahiwehawehaka nluminawe, oniilokottha mwaneenaawe. Ediinaawe eri ya siiyo!" 
James1:27 Vano, ediini Muluku Atithihu onaakhulelaawe ntoko yootteela ni yoohikhala malepa, ti ela: waakosoopa akwaasuni ni asinaamukhweli mohaawanimwaya ni wiisusiha wa soovaliha sa mweelaponi." 
James2:1 Axunnaka, ntoko aKristu mwa Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu, oovuwa, muhikhale ni nthalu ni atthu." 
James2:2 Moone ha: waari weera mmuthukumanonimwanyu mulopwana mmoha angwanreene munela a eyuuma yoorikaxa ni ikuwo soorikaxa omvolowa, nitho omvolowa mulopwana oohaawa awanreene ikuwo soothaala siriipaleene." 
James2:3 Nyuwo mwangwehexexa nnenesene yoowo owanre ikuwo soorikaxa ni mwamweerela: “Nipuro noottittimiheyaxa nri va,” mene wa oohaawa mwamweerela: “Weyo weemeleke vawo,” hoye hoye “okilaathiki vathi kiniikaathaaka inaawosaka,”" 
James2:4 vano mweera hiiho, khamumpaka nthalu muthorihaka ni soowuupuwela soonanara?" 
James2:5 Mwiiwe, axunnaka oosiveleya: Muluku khaathanlale oohaawa vamaithoni wa amalapo weera ekhale oopuha munroromeloni ni yaakhele yoohiyeriwa* ya omwene Owo aaroromelihalaawe yaawo animusivela Yoowo?" 
James2:6 Nyuwotho munaaramusa oohaawa. Khaahiyono oopuha yaawo anoohasulani? Khaahiyono yaawo anooronghani nyuwo wa atthu anuuluma milattu? 
James2:7 Khaahiyono yaawo amveiha nsina nooreera na Yoowo nyuwo muraanyu awawe? 
James2:8 Nyuwo mwatthara nlamulo na Mwene nimphwanyeya mwa Yoolempwa* neenre: “Munsivele mukhwiinyu ntoko muniisivelaanyu mwaneenaanyu,” munoopaka moota wooreera." 
James2:9 Mwapaka nthalu ni atthu, munoottheka ni munoothorihiwa ni nlamulo ntoko atakhali." 
James2:10 Vano, yoowo oniiwelela nlamulo nootheene, mene onkwattula ni mpatta mmoha paahi wa nenno, anaakhale ni milattu ntoko khiiwelenle nlamulo nootheene." 
James2:11 Owo eenre: “Muhiraruwe” eenretho: “Muhiive.” Nyuwo mwaahiraruwa, mene mwiiva, munookhala mutthu oohiiwelela nlamulo." 
James2:12 Muulume ni mweette ntoko atthu anrowa othorihiwa ni nlamulo na oneethi," 
James2:13 niwoko yoowo ohimmorela ikharari anaathorihiwe woohimoreliwa ikharari. Ikharari singwina othoriha! 
James2:14 Emvareleya eheeni, axunnaka, akhala mukina oneera ookhalano nroromelo, owo ahikhanleno miteko? Apaale nroromelo nno ninoowera omvuluxa?" 
James2:15 Akhala munna, hoye hoye murokora mmoha ahaawelaka soowara ni yooca ya khula nihuku," 
James2:16 ni mmoha a nyuwo amweerela: “Murowe ni murettele, ni mooreke ni mwace mpaka ovona,” ahimvahaka etthu, emvareleya eheeni?" 
James2:17 Hiihotho, nroromelo paahi noohihooliwa ni miteko, nohookhwa." 
James2:18 Mukinatho aneere: “Nyuwo murino nroromelo ni miyo kirino miteko.” Mukoonihere nroromelonanyu noohikhalano miteko, ni miyo kinoowooniherani nroromelonaka mwa mitekosaka." 
James2:19 Nyuwo munroromela weera ori Muluku mmoha paahi. Ti wooreera! Mpaka minepa soonanara sinroromela yeeyo, ni sinthukumela." 
James2:20 Nyuwo oohikhalano miruku! Muntthuna woona weera nroromelo noohikhalano miteko khaninkhavihera? 
James2:21 Abrahaamu, nikholonahu, khaakhuleliwe niwoko na miteko, owo aamvaherenraawe mwanawe Isaaki valtaarini*?" 
James2:22 Nyuwo munoowera woona weera nroromelonawe ni mitekosawe saavara muteko vamoha, ni nroromelo nookwanelihiwa mmitekoni." 
James2:23 Hiiho yookwaniheriwa Yoolempwa* eneera: “Abrahaamu aamuroromela Muluku, ni tivawo aakhuleliwaawe ni Yoowo,” ni owo aahiitthaniwa nthamwene a Muluku." 
James2:24 Mwiiwexexe weera mutthu onaakhuleliwa ni miteko, ohikhanle paahi ni nroromelo." 
James2:25 Hiihotho yaaheereiya ni puuta Rakhabi. Khahiyono owo aakhuleliwe niwoko na miteko, aawaakhenlaawe anamahottela ni aatthawihenraawe ephiro ekina?" 
James2:26 Hiiho, ntoko erutthu ehikhanle ni munepa ekhwiiyaaya, hiihotho nroromelo nihikhalanne miteko nohookhwa." 
James3:1 Axunnaka, muhitthune okhala ootheene nyuwo ahusiha, niwoko nyuwo moosuwela weera hiyo ninghusiha, nnithorihiwe vancipalexa." 
James3:2 Hiyo ootheene ninkwattuliwa mmootani woohiyanahiyana. Akhala mukina ohinkwattuliwa ni wuuluma, mulopwana owo ti ookwanela, ni awerakatho olamula erutthwaawe yootheene." 
James3:3 Hiyo nahela efreyo* mmwaano mwa ikavalu* weera iyo siniiwelele, hiyo ninoowera olamula enama yootheene." 
James3:4 Muupuweleletho sa makula: ari mweeraru ereene matokotoko ni yoopeliwaka ni epheyo etokotoko, aneettihiwa ni etthaabwa ekhaanene ya ottuli ntoko otthuna wa namweettiha a nikula." 
James3:5 Hiihotho nlumi nri mpatta mukhaanene wa erutthu, mene niniivuwiha ni itthu sitokotoko. Moone moota mooro wa maaceeso mukhaaneene ongweraaya ohisa ntuphi ntokotoko." 
James3:6 Hiihotho nlumi nri mooro mmoha. Nri elapo ya otakhala. Niikaathiwe variyari wa mipatta sa erutthwaahu ninnananariha erutthu yootheene, nihisaka ephiro yootheene ya okumaaya, nireene nno mwaneenaaya noopattihiweene ni mooro wa Satana." 
James3:7 Mikhalelo sootheene sa asinama, ipalame, sowiipurula ni soopattuxiwa sa mphareiya sinlamuliwa, aani sinlamuliwa ni mukhalelo wa atthu." 
James3:8 Wa soothesene, khaawo ongwera olamula nlumi. Nno nri yoonanara yoohilamuleya, noosareya yoohapala eniiva." 
James3:9 Ni nno ninaatthapela Apwiya ni Atiithi, nitho ninaalapha atthu oopattuxiwa ni ekhalelo ya Muluku." 
James3:10 Wa eyanoweene yeeyo anrweela mareeliho ni olapha. Axunnaka, yeeyo kheentthuneya!" 
James3:11 Weeraka wa naattuuttu mmoha anookhuma maahi oocoocowa ni maahi oowaawa? 
James3:12 Axunnaka, apaale onoowera mwiri wa efiigu wiima soowiima sa sooliveira*, naari ematta ya iwuuva* ifiigu? Mooteene yoowo naattuuttu a maahi oosiva maakha khaangwera okhumihatho maahi oocoocowa." 
James3:13 Taani variyariwanyu ori musuweli ni orino wiiwexexa? Owo oonihere yeeyo ni mweettelowaawe wooreera, ni ni miteko soopakiwa ngwiiyevihani onrweela mmirukuni." 
James3:14 Wa soothesene, nyuwo mwakhalano mmirimanimwanyu nrima noowaawa ni soopwatthasanyu paahi, muhiivuwihe mwa yeeyo, hata muhikhootte ekhaikhai." 
James3:15 Moota wa miruku ola khoonrweela wiirimu, mene wa vathi; khoohiyono wa Munepa, mene wa minepa soonanara." 
James3:16 Vano, weiwo niraayawo nrima ni otthuna mpuhaawe mwaneenaawe, iwo wookhalatho onyakhulihana ni mikhalelo sootheene sa soonanara." 
James3:17 Mirukutho sinrweela wiirimu siri toko sootteela; vahoolowaya siri sa murettele, soosiveleya, sowiiwexexeiya, soosareya ikharari ni soowiima sooreera, soohikhala ni nthalu ni sa ekhaikhai." 
James3:18 Yoowiima ya ekhaikhai enaaliwa mmuretteleni ni yaale ampaka murettele. 
James4:1 Sinrweela woowi ikhotto ni onyakulihana ori variyariwanyu? Khasinrweela wa soohaawela singwanawana mweerutthunimwanyu? 
James4:2 Muniinlela itthu ni khamumphwanya. Muniiva ni munnakhalela nrima, mene khamungwera ophwanya yeeyo muntthunaanyu. Munnyakulihana ni mungwana. Khamurino, niwoko khamumveka." 
James4:3 Mwaavekaka, khamunaakhela, niwoko mumveka ni murima woolokottha, muvekelaka itthu wa soohaawelasanyu soonanara weera muhakalalele seiye." 
James4:4 Anamararuwa! Khamusuwenle weera onthamwene ni elapo ela ti omwiittana ni Muluku? Yoowo ontthuna okhala nthamwene a elapo ya vathi oniikhaliha mwiittana a Muluku. 
James4:5 Apaale munuupuwela weera Yoolempwa* enghima vasiiyo weera Munepa Muluku okhalihalaawe mwa hiyo ontthunaxa weera hiyo nikhale wa Yoowo paahi? 
James4:6 Vano Owo onnivaha mahala matokotoko oopwaha. Tivawo Yoolempwa* yeenraaya “Muluku ti Mwiittana a atthu oowiixoona, mene omvaha mahala wa atthu oowiiyeviha.”" 
James4:7 Vanonto mmwiiwelele Muluku. Muhimwiiwelele Diyabu*, ni owo anootthaweni." 
James4:8 Mmwaattamele Muluku ni Owo anaawaattameleni. Munyawe matataanyu, anamattheka, ni mutteelihe mirimasanyu, nyuwo murino soowuupuwela sookawanyeya!" 
James4:9 Mwiithananihere, mulalamike ni mwiinle. Otheiyawanyu otatuxiwe othanana, ni ohakalalawanyu otatuxiwe olalamika." 
James4:10 Mwiiyeviheke vamaithoni wa Apwiya, ni Awo eniyoovuwiheni." 
James4:11 Axunna, muhaapaneke mukina ni mukhwaawe. Yoowo onuuluma soonanara sa munneiye, hoye hoye omuthoriha, onuulumela nlamulo ni onthoriha nno. Mwaathorihaka nlamulo, khamunkwanihera nenno, mene muniikhaliha ntoko mphuki a nenno." 
James4:12 Ookhala Namalamula ni Mphuki mmoharu paahi: Yoole ongwera ovuluxa ni onanariha. Mene nyuwo taani oomuthoriha mukhwiinyu? 
James4:13 Mwiiwe vano, nyuwo muneera: “Olelo, naari omaalo, ninrowa esidade ele, hoye hoye ekina, nnakhale weiwo eyaakha yootheene, nimweettaka nakoswaahu ni niwinaka musurukhu.”" 
James4:14 Nyuwo hata khamusuwenle etthu eneera yookhumeleleni omaalo! Okumaanyu ti heeni? Muri ntoko etthapwe enrwa wa ehuhu vakhaani ni vahoolowaya enoomwareya. 
James4:15 Ohiyanawaya, ontthuneya weera: “Apwiya yatthuna, nnikhale ni nnipake ela, hoye hoye ele.”" 
James4:16 Wa soothesene, nyuwo muniixunnuwiha ni muniixoona. Wiixunnuwiha wootheene ntoko wu, ti woonanara." 
James4:17 Tivawo, yoowo onsuwela weera ontthuneya opaka yooreera ni khampaka, onoottheka." 
James5:1 Vano, mwiiwe, nyuwo anamapuha. Mwiinle ni mulalamike niwoko na soohaawasanyu sinookhuruwelani." 
James5:2 Mihakhusanyu sohuntta, ni atthumpwiha aakhuura ikuwosanyu." 
James5:3 Iyuumasanyu soorikaxa soociwa murawa, ni murawaaya onuuwoothereni ni onuukhuure erutthwaanyu ntoko mooro. Nyuwo mohaattano mihakhu mahuku ookisera ala." 
James5:4 Moone, nlivo na anamiteko ahemphe mmattamwanyu nyuwo muhaalimvaanyu ninniitthanaxa. Olalamika wa anamahepha wohiiwiwa ni Apwiya a ikuru sootheene." 
James5:5 Nyuwo mookhala moopuhani ni soohaawelasanyu mweelaponi ya vathi, ni moovona yooca vanihukuni na wiiviwa." 
James5:6 Nyuwo mohaathoriha ni mowiiva atthu oohikhalano nthowa, hata yaawo ehikhalaka amwiittanaanyu." 
James5:7 Tivawo, axunna, ngweherere ni ovilela mpaka orwa wa Apwiya. Moone moota namalima ongwehereraawe weera emattaawe eruwere soohepha sootthuneyaxa, ni moota ongwehereraawe ni ovilela mpaka otthula ni omala wa epula." 
James5:8 Mukhaletho oopixa murima, ni mulipihere mirimasanyu, niwoko orwa wa Apwiya wookhuveela." 
James5:9 Axunna, muhaapaneke mukina ni mukhwaawe weera muhithorihiwe. Mphuki ori vamulako!" 
James5:10 Axunna, ngwuupuwelele maprofeeti yuulumale mwa Apwiya ntoko ethoonyero ya opixa murima moohaawani." 
James5:11 Ntoko nyuwo musuwenlaanyu, hiyo ningwiitthana ooreelihiwa yaale yaavilenle. Nyuwo mohiiwa sa opixa murima wa Yobe, ni mohoona ommaleloni Apwiya yaamurehererenlaaya. Apwiya oosareya murima wooreera ni omorela ikharari." 
James5:12 Vano, axunna, muhilipele, hata ni wiirimu, hata ni vathi, naari ni yakhalaru etthu ekina. Mweera: “aani,” ekhaleke “aani” ni mweera: “hoye,” ekhaleke “hoye,” weera muhithorihiwe." 
James5:13 Ookhala mukina variyariwanyu onghaawa? Avekele. Ookhala mukina onghakalala? Iipe icipo sa ottottopela. 
James5:14 Ookhala mukina a nyuwo oovoreiwa? Owo awiitthane asitokweene a ekerexa weera awo emvekelele ni emuttikitthele makhura mwa Nsina na Apwiya. 
James5:15 Vano, nivekelo nipakiwe munroromeloni nnimulamihe muretta owo. Apwiya eniimvenxe, ni aatthenke, anaaleveleliwe." 
James5:16 Tivawo mulapelane sootthekasanyu mukina ni mukhwaawe, ni muvekelelane mukina ni mukhwaawe weera mukhale oolamihiwa. Nivekelo na mutthu oororomeleya ti na ikuruxa ni noowereya." 
James5:17 Eliya aari mutthu ntoko hiyo. Owo aavekela ni nthiti weera ehirupe epula, ni khayaarupale wa iyaakha tthaaru ni eriyari ya eyaakha." 
James5:18 Aavekelatho, ni erimu yaarumiha epula ni etthaya yaaruwera soowiimasaya." 
James5:19 Axunnaka, akhala mukina onghapuwa ephiro ya ekhaikhai ni mukinatho amuhokoloxera," 
James5:20 muupuwelele yeeyo: Yoowo onimurukunxiha murima namattheka weera ahiye ephirowaawe ya yoottheka, anaavuluxe okumi wa mutthu owo, ni anaawere elevelelo ya soottheka sincipale." 
1Peter1:1 Ya Pedru, murummwa a Yeesu Kristu, wa oothanliwa a Muluku ari anamarwa mweelaponi, emwalamwanleene oPonto, oGalata, oKapadosiya, wAsiya ni oBitiniya," 
1Peter1:2 mwa yaawo Muluku Atiithi aathanlale mootthunanimwawe woohimala, avarelaka muteko Munepa Wootteela ontteeliha, weera emwiiwelele Yeesu Kristu ni emisiwe ni ephomaawe. Mahala ni murettele muvahiwe woowaatta." 
1Peter1:3 Ooreelihiwa akhale Muluku, Atiithi a Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu. Niwoko na ovenyerera mookhwaani wa Yeesu Kristu, Muluku, mwa ikhararisawe sitokotoko, oonivaha oyariwa onyowani woosareya ni oweherera wa okumi." 
1Peter1:4 Oonivahatho waakhela yeeyo yoohiriheya, yoohuntta ni yoohiphwateya, mwa yeeyo Owo onoothokororelani wiirimu, nyuwo" 
1Peter1:5 muri oowaakihiwa ni ikuru sa Muluku niwoko na nroromelo mpaka wa ophiya ovuluxiwa, mwa weiwo oneera wooniheriwe ehuhu yoomalihera." 
1Peter1:6 Mwa yeeyo nyuwo munghakalala, naamwi otthuneyaka ohaawa wa ehuhu vakhaani sooweereriwa soohiyanahiyana" 
1Peter1:7 weera noonihereye nroromelonanyu nri na ekhaikhai. Mpaka eyuuma yoorikaxa engwereya ophwateya enimweereriwa ni mooro. Ontthuneya weera mpaka nroromelonanyu, nri nootthuneyaxa noopwaha eyuuma yoorikaxa, neereriwe mpaka ottottopela, ovuwa ni nttittimiho Yeesu Kristu ooniheriwaka."
