1Peter1:8 Hata muhimoonaka, nyuwo munimusivela, ni, naamwi muhimoonaka vaanaano vaava, nyuwo munimuroromela. Eyo enooruuhelani ohakalala otokotokoxa woohiwereya othaliha," 
1Peter1:9 niwoko nyuwo munimwaakhela ntthuvelo na nroromelonanyu, eyo tiiyo ovuluxiwa wa okumaanyu." 
1Peter1:10 Maprofeeti, mwa yaawo yuulumale sa mahala mwaakhenlaanyu, yaahaasa ni yaasomela ovuluwawene wu." 
1Peter1:11 Yaasaasa woonelela ehuhu ni sookhumelela ni ekhavihero ya ithoonyero saavahiwa ni Munepa wa Kristu. Vano, Munepa waari mwa yaawo waalaleiya soohaawa Kristu eeraawe avilele ni ovuwa eeraawe aakhele." 
1Peter1:12 Muluku aawoonihera weera mutthenga yaalaleiyaaya, khawaahiyono wa asineenaaya, mene wa nyuwo. Awo yaahuuluma sa itthu nyuwo mwiiwalaanyu vaanaanova wa anamalaleiya a masu ooreeraxa, mwa yaawo yuulumale ni Munepa Wootteela orumihiwe wiirimu. Siri itthu mpaka andyelo antthunaxaaya osuwela." 
1Peter1:13 Tivawo, mukhale oolikana mwa soowuupuwelasanyu. Muwehaweheke ni muweherere mahala muneeraanyu mvahiwe Yeesu Kristu ooniheriwaka." 
1Peter1:14 Ntoko anamwane oowiiwelela, muhitthareke soohaawela soonanara sa khalayi mwaaraanyu oohisuwela." 
1Peter1:15 Mooteene yoowo Yoole owiitthanneni oraawe ootteela, nyuwotho mukhale ootteela murima mwa soothesene mumpakaanyu," 
1Peter1:16 niwoko yoolempwa: “Mukhale ootteela murima, niwoko Miyo ti ootteela.”" 
1Peter1:17 Woonaka weera mungwiitthana Atiithi Yaawo anthoriha ehikhalaka nthalu miteko sa mutthu ti mutthu, mweetteke ni woova ehuhu ya mukwahaanyu wa vathi." 
1Peter1:18 Moosuwela weera moovuluxiwa mwa mikhalelosanyu sa siiyo sa okhala nyuwo mwaakhenlaanyu ni makholowaanyu. Khamvuluxiwe ni itthu sooriheya ntoko iyuuma soorikaxa," 
1Peter1:19 mene ni ephome yootthuneyaxa ya Kristu, ntoko ya eputtiputthi yoohikhala ni nlepa, naari yoohirakala." 
1Peter1:20 Owo aathanliwe ehinaaye opattuxiwa elapo ya vathi, ni ohooniheriwa ehuhuweene yeela yoomalihera wa mpuhaanyu." 
1Peter1:21 Niwoko na Yoowo nyuwo munimuroromela Muluku omvenyererihale Yeesu mookhwaani ni omvuwihale. Hiiho nroromelonanyu ni owehererawanyu onkhala mwa Muluku. 
1Peter1:22 Vano, mutteelihiweene okumaanyu wa wiiwelela wa ekhaikhai weera mwaasivele ni ekhaikhai axunna, mwaasivele vancipale mukina ni mukhwaawe ni murima wootteela." 
1Peter1:23 Nyuwo mooyariwa veeli, ohikhanle wa mmiso onriheya, mene wa mmiso ohinriheya niwoko na masu ookumi ni oohimala a Muluku." 
1Peter1:24 Vano: “Omutthu wootheene ori ntoko munyepu, ni ovuwawaya wootheene ntoko ethutu ya ntuphini. Munyepu onoonyaala ni ethutu enoomora," 
1Peter1:25 masutho a Apwiya ankhala mahuku ootheene.” Ala ari masu mulaleeriwaanyu. 
1Peter2:1 Mwiirule wa soonanara ni soolokottha sootheene nitho wa wiixeera, nrima ni soowaapa sootheene." 
1Peter2:2 Ntoko anamwane ooyariwa vaanaano, muhaaweleke mukaka wootteela wa Munepa, weera niwoko na yoowo, nyuwo munnuwe mwa ovuluxiwa," 
1Peter2:3 woonaka weera moolawiha weera Apwiya ti ooreera. 
1Peter2:4 Ngwaattamele Apwiya, Nluku nikumi, nikhoottiwe ni atthu, mene nithanliwe ni Muluku ni noottittimiheyaxa wa Yoowo." 
1Peter2:5 Nyuwotho, ntoko maluku makumi, mutekiwe mpaani mwa mmunepani weera mukhale osaserdoti* wootteela, muvahaka sooveleela sa mmunepani sowaakhuleliwa ni Muluku niwoko na Yeesu Kristu." 
1Peter2:6 Vano, Yoolempwa* yeenre ha: “Moone, kiniiyaathi oSiyoni nluku noolipiha, nithanliwe ni noottittimiheyaxa, ni yoole onroromela mwa nenno, khaarwa uuliwa muru.”" 
1Peter2:7 Tivawo, wa nyuwo munroromela, nluku nno ti noottittimiheyaxa, mene wa yaawo ahinroromela: “Nluku anamateka akhoonttaaya, nenno noothatuwa nluku nootthuneyaxa,”" 
1Peter2:8 ni “Nluku nookwattula ni mwala woowuuwiha.” Yaawo ahinroromela, anookwattuliwa, niwoko khaaniiwelela mutthenga, ni awo athanleliwe yeeyo." 
1Peter2:9 Wa soothesene, nyuwo muri ekhapira yoothanliwa, osaserdoti* wa emwene, muloko wootteela, muloko ori wa Muluku paahi, weera mulaleiye ikuru sa Yoole owiitthanneni nyuwo okhuma mpiphini mpaka waarawawe wootikhiniheya." 
1Peter2:10 Khalayi nyuwo hata khamwaahiyono muloko, mene vano muri muloko wa Muluku; khamwaamoreliwe ikharari, mene vano moomoreliwa." 
1Peter2:11 Oosiveleya, kinoowoopererani ntoko anamarwa ni aletto mweelaponi weera mususe sa soohaawela sa erutthu singwana mookuminimwanyu." 
1Peter2:12 Mweette ni mukhalelo wooreera variyari wa amalapo. Mooteene yoowo awo yaawootherakani nyuwo weera mumpaka yoonanara, eniyoone yooreera mumpakaanyu, ni eniimuttottopele Muluku vanihukuni na oxekura." 
1Peter2:13 Niwoko na Apwiya, ngwiiwelele atthu a ikuru ootheene, naari mwene ntoko ikuru sitokotokoxa," 
1Peter2:14 hata aguvernadori, arummwe, ni mwene weera yaattaruxe yaawo ampaka yoonanara ni yaattittimihe yaawo ampaka yooreera." 
1Peter2:15 Vano, Muluku ontthuna weera nyuwo mpake yooreera, weera hiiho mmalihe ohisuwela wa atthu oohikhalano miruku." 
1Peter2:16 Mweetteke ntoko maneethi, mene muhivareleke muteko oneethaanyu ntoko nthowa opaka yoonanara. Mweetteke ntoko arumeiyi a Muluku." 
1Peter2:17 Mwaattittimihe atthu ootheene, mwaasivele axunna, mmoove Muluku, ni munttittimihe mwene." 
1Peter2:18 Ipottha, ngwiiwelele asipwiiyaanyu ni nttittimiho nootheene, khoohiyono paahi yaawo ari ooreera murima, menetho yaawo ari oonarara murima." 
1Peter2:19 Vano, ti woottottopeleya weera mwaha wa murima wooreera vamaithoni wa Muluku mukina avilele soohooxa sa soohaawela soohiphwanelela." 
1Peter2:20 Nttottopelo heeni mwavilela owaxuliwa mpankeene yoonanara? Vaheera nyuwo mwavilela ohaawa niwoko na opaka yooreera, eyo ti yoottottopeleya vamaithoni wa Muluku." 
1Peter2:21 Mwa yeeyo nyuwo mohiitthaniwa, niwoko Kristutho ohaawenle nipuronanyu, oohiyerakani ethoonyero weera muntthareke Yoowo." 
1Peter2:22 “Owo khaatthenke, ni hata yoolokottha emoha khayaaphwanyiwe mmwaanomwawe.”" 
1Peter2:23 Aaruwaniwaawe, khaahokoloxera; ahaawaawe, khoopopiha, mene iileva wa Yoole onthoriha ni ekhaikhai." 
1Peter2:24 Owo mwaneenaawe aavilela mweerutthuni sootthekasahu vamuttandani weera hiyo nikhwe wa soottheka, mene nikhale ni okumi wa ekhaikhai ya Muluku. Niwoko na makhwattaawe nyuwo moolamihiwa." 
1Peter2:25 Vano, nyuwo mwaari ntoko ikhondoolo soothweelela, mene vano moohokoleela wa Mukukhuli ni Mutokweene onkosoopa* okumaanyu." 
1Peter3:1 Mooteene yoowo, axaara, ngiiweleleke asiiyinyu. Hiiho, hata ekhalaka akina a yaawo oohiroromela mutthenga wa Muluku, anoowiniwa wa nroromelo niwoko na mweettelowaanyu. Khoontthuneya weera nyuwo muulume," 
1Peter3:2 niwoko awo animoona mweettelowaanyu ngwoovani wootteela. 
1Peter3:3 Oreerawanyu ohikhale omokoniwanyu, ntoko otthava mayihi, owara iyuuma soorikaxa, naari soowara sooreera." 
1Peter3:4 Ohiyanawaya, oreerawanyu okhale mmurimanimwanyu, ntoko munepa woowiisuumaaliha ni murima woowiitthaala. Vano, oreerawene weiwo woohiriheya ori woottittimiheyaxa vamaithoni wa Muluku." 
1Peter3:5 Vano owo waari moota asithiyana ootteela a khalayi yaamuroromela Muluku yiirehereraaya. Awo yaawiiwelela asiiyaya," 
1Peter3:6 ntoko Sara, aamwiiwelelaawe Abrahaamu ni aamwiitthana apwiya. Nyuwo muri anamwanaawe Sara mwapaka yooreera ni mwaahoova." 
1Peter3:7 Mooteene yoowo nyuwo, axiiya, musuweleke nnene okhala ni axaarinyu, mwaattittimihaka ntoko mpatta woohilipa, ni ntoko anamwaakhela vamoha ni nyuwo a mahala a okumi, weera mavekelowaanyu ehooceeleye." 
1Peter3:8 Vano, nyuwo ootheene mukhale ni murima mmoharu. Mukhalelaneke murima wooreera, musivelaneke ntoko axunna; mukhale a ikharari ni oowiiyeviha." 
1Peter3:9 Muhilive yoonanara ni yoonanara, naari oruwaniwa ni oruwana. Ohiyanawaya, mureelihe, niwoko wa yeeyo nyuwo moothanliwa weera mwaakhele nreeliho." 
1Peter3:10 Vano, “Yoowo ontthuna osivela okumi ni woona mahuku oohakalaleya, athokorore nluminawe mwa soonanara ni eyanowaawe mwa masu oolokottha." 
1Peter3:11 Mususe wa yoonanara, ni mpake yooreera. Mwaasaase ni mutthare murettele." 
1Peter3:12 Niwoko maitho a Apwiya anaaweha atthu oororomeleya, ni maaruwaaya aniiwa mavekelo a yaawo, mene Apwiya ti mwiittana a yaawo ampaka yoonanara.”" 
1Peter3:13 Taani anoopakeni yoonanara nyuwo mwaasaasaka ni nthiti opaka yooreera? 
1Peter3:14 Wa soothesene, hata mwahaawa niwoko na oreera, nyuwo muri ooreelihiwa. Muhoove yeeyo awo anoovaaya, ni muhituthuwe." 
1Peter3:15 Munttittimihe toko Kristu ntoko Apwiya mmurimanimwanyu. Mahuku ootheene mukhale oolikaneene weera ngwaakhule yakhalaru atthu eneera yookohakoheni mwaha wa oweherera ori mwa nyuwo. 
1Peter3:16 Mpaketho yeeyo ni wiiyeviha murima ni nttittimiho, mukhalanaka murima wooreera. Hiiho, yaawo anuuluma soonanara sa mweettelowaanyu wooreera mwa Kristu, eniiyuuliwe muru mwa sowaapasaya." 
1Peter3:17 Fataari ohaawa opakaka yooreera, wakhala otthuna wa Muluku, ohikhanle ohaawa opakaka yoonanara." 
1Peter3:18 Vano, Kristutho aahaawa emaara emoharu niwoko na soottheka, oohittheka wa anamattheka, weera aneettihe anironghaka wa Muluku. Owo aahiiviwa mweerutthuni, mene oohokoleela okhala ni okumi mukuruni sa Munepa," 
1Peter3:19 mwa Yoowo Kristu aarowa ni aalaleera minepa sootthukiwa sa akhwiiye. 
1Peter3:20 Ti minepa sa yaawo khalayi yahiiwelenle, ehuhuweene yeele Muluku aawehereraawe ni ovilela mmahukuni a Nowe nikula neera nipakiwaka. Mwa nenno, atthu vakhaani paahi, vekhaikhai athannaararu, yaavuluxiwa ni maahi," 
1Peter3:21 ni awo ti ethoonyero ya opatiso mwa weiwo vano onoovuluxani nyuwotho. Ovuluxiwa iwo khoohiyono ni ovenxiwa wa nikhurumela na mweerutthuni, mene ni omvekela Muluku murima wooreera niwoko na ovenyerera wa Yeesu Kristu," 
1Peter3:22 owenle wiirimu ni, ori moono mulopwana wa Muluku, weiwo andyelo, elamulelo ni ikuru sootheene simmwiiwelelaaya Yoowo." 
1Peter4:1 Moone, woonaka weera Kristu aahaawa mweerutthuni, ontthuneya weera nyuwotho mwiilipihe ni muupuwelo mmoharu owo: Yoowo ohaangwe mweerutthunimwawe, oomaliha soottheka." 
1Peter4:2 Hiiho, ehuhu emuhaleenle mweelaponi, akhale weera apake otthuna wa Muluku, ohikhanle opaka soohaawela soonanara sa atthu." 
1Peter4:3 Vano ehuhu evinre, yoovira ehuhu yincipale nyuwo mpakaka yeeyo enaasiveliha amalapo, mweettaka moolavilavini, moohaawelani soonanara, moowurani, ngwiipeliwani, moowuraxani, ni moolapani miluku sikina soothanyeya." 
1Peter4:4 Mwa yeeyo amalapo antikhina weera nyuwo muhaahoolele awo mphironi ya itthusene seiyo soonanara, tivawo anooruwanaayani." 
1Peter4:5 Wa soothesene, awo eniimwaakhule Yoole ori oolikana weera aathorihe akumi ni akhwiiye." 
1Peter4:6 Tivawo yaalaleeriwaaya masu ooreeraxa mpaka akhwiiye, weera awo, hata ethorihiweene mweerutthuni ntoko mpatta wa omutthu, ewere okhala mwa Munepa ntoko Muluku ontthunaawe." 
1Peter4:7 Emalihero ya itthu sootheene yookhuveela. Tivawo, mukhale oowehaweha ni oowiisuumaaliha, weera muvekele." 
1Peter4:8 Opwaha soothesene, musivelanaxeke mukina ni mukhwaawe, niwoko osivela onkhuneela soottheka sincipale." 
1Peter4:9 Mwaakhelelaneke nnenesene mukina ni mukhwaawe mmavaate, muhittaandawulanaka." 
1Peter4:10 Khula mutthu avareleke muteko mahala aakhenlaawe, weera aarumeeleke akina, ntoko murumeiyi oororomeleya a mahala a mikhalelo soowaatta sa Muluku." 
1Peter4:11 Akhala mukina onuuluma, uulume ntoko mutthu onuuluma masu a Muluku. Akhala mukina onrumeela, arumeele ni ikuru Muluku omvahaawe, moota wooweera mwa itthu sootheene Muluku avuwihiwe mwaha wa Yeesu Kristu. Wa Yoowo okhale ovuwa ni ikuru mahuku ootheene. Ame*." 
1Peter4:12 Oosiveleya, muhitikhine ni sooweereriwa soolipaxa sinkhumelela variyariwanyu, ntoko ereene etthu yootikhiniheya." 
1Peter4:13 Ohiyanawaya, muhakalale moohaawani vamoha ni Kristu muneenaawe weera waathupululiwaka ovuwawawe, nyuwo muhakalalaxe." 
1Peter4:14 Nyuwo mwaruwaniwa niwoko na Nsina na Kristu, munookhala ooreelihiwa, niwoko Munepa wa ovuwa, Munepa wa Muluku onkhala mwa nyuwo." 
1Peter4:15 Akhala mukina a nyuwo onghaawa, ahikhale niwoko na okhala namwiiva, namwiiya, namatakhala, naari ntoko oothurumela itthu sa akhwaawe." 
1Peter4:16 Wa soothesene, mwaahaawaka ntoko muKristu, muhuuliwe muru, mene mumvuhiwe Muluku niwoko na Nsina nna." 
1Peter4:17 Vano, yoophiya ehuhu weera opacere othoriha Empa ya Muluku. Ni, othoriha wapacera ni hiyo, eniikhale emalihero heeni ya yaawo ahiniiwelela masu ooreeraxa a Muluku?" 
1Peter4:18 Nitho “Waari woorika ovuluxiwa oororomeleya, vano ankha wa mutakhali ni namattheka?”" 
1Peter4:19 Tivawo, yaawo anghaawa niwoko na otthunawawe Muluku, ontthuneya weera evaherereke okumaaya wa Mpattuxa oororomeleya ni epake yooreera." 
1Peter5:1 Ntoko mutokweene mukina, kingwooperera asitokweene ari variyariwanyu, kireene namoona a ohaawa wa Kristu, ni woonaka weera nkikhale mpatta wa ovuwa oneera wooniheriwe." 
1Peter5:2 Mukukhule muhuwo wa Muluku ori wa olamulawanyu. Mweettiheke yoowo, ohikhanle moonyesereriwani, mene ni murima wootheene, ntoko Muluku ontthunaawe; ohikhanle niwoko na milili, mene ni soohaawela sa orumeela;" 
1Peter5:3 ohikhanle, ntoko atthu anaalamula yaawo muvahereriwaanyu, mene ntoko ethoonyero wa muhuwo." 
1Peter5:4 Iixooniheraka Mukukhuli Mutokweene, nyuwo mmwaakhele ecireemba yoohiriheya ya ovuwa." 
1Peter5:5 Mooteene yoowo, amiravo, ngwiiwelele asitokweene. Mukhale ootheene oowiiyeviha mukina ni mukhwaawe, niwoko “Muluku ti Mwiittana a oowiixoona, mene onaavaha mahala oowiiyeviha.”" 
1Peter5:6 Tivawo, mwiiyevihe vathi va ntata na ikuru sootheene na Muluku, weera Owo oovuwiheni ehuhu yootthuneya." 
1Peter5:7 Mumvaherere Yoowo sooweeteteela sootheene, niwoko Owo onookosoopani nyuwo." 
1Peter5:8 Muhule maithwaanyu a mmunepani ni muwehawehe, niwoko mwiittanaanyu, Diyabu*, oneetta oorukureerakani, ntoko mwatto oniipa, amwaasaka taani aneeraawe angwere omukhuura." 
1Peter5:9 Munkhootte, mukhalaka oolipa munroromeloni, musuwelaka weera axunninyu a mweelaponi yootheene anghaawa ni soohaawasene seiyo." 
1Peter5:10 Vahoolo woohaawa ehuhu vakhaani, Muluku a mahala ootheene, mwa Yoowo owiitthanenleni ovuwawawe woohimala mwa Kristu Yeesu, anookwaneliheni, anookhaliheni, anoolipiheni ni anaaweemexeni." 
1Peter5:11 Wa Yoowo sikhale ikuru soohimala. Ame*. 
1Peter5:12 Kohoolepelani nyuwo ni ekhavihero ya Silvano, mwa yoowo miyo kimmoonaaka weera ori munna oororomeleya, weera koolipiheni, nitho kikhalele onamoona weera ala ti mahala a ekhaikhai a Muluku. Mwa yaawo, mupwaherere oolipeene!" 
1Peter5:13 Ekerexa ya oBabiloniya, yeeyo eritho yoothanliwa, enimoovahani isalaama, nitho mwanaka Marku." 
1Peter5:13 Ekerexa ya oBabiloniya, yeeyo eritho yoothanliwa, enimoovahani isalaama, nitho mwanaka Marku." 
1Peter5:14 Muulumihaneke mukina ni mukhwaawe ni ebeecu ya osivela. Murettele okhale wa nyuwo ootheene muri mwa Kristu. 
2Peter1:1 Ya Simeyoni Pedru, murumeiyi ni murummwa a Yeesu Kristu, wa yaale yaakhenle, ntoko hiyo, nroromelo noottittimiheyaxa niwoko na waakhuleliwa wa Mulukwaahu ni Mvuluxa Yeesu Kristu:" 
2Peter1:2 Mahala ni murettele ekhale ni nyuwo moota woowaatta moosuwelani mwa Muluku ni mwa Yeesu Apwiyaahu. 
2Peter1:3 Itthu sootheene ninghaawelaahu wa okumi ni murima wa omuluku noovahiwa ni ikuru sa Muluku, nimusuwelaka Yoowo oniitthanenle ovuwa ni oreera murima." 
2Peter1:4 Hiiho Owo oonivaha soororomelihiwa sitokotoko ni soottittimiheyaxa weera, niwoko na seiyo, nyuwo mukhale mpatta wa mukhalelo wa omuluku ni weera mutthawe soonanara siri mweelaponi niwoko na soohaawela soonanara." 
2Peter1:5 Tivawo, mwiilipihereke weera mwaandyeerere nroromelonanyu ni oreera murima, ni oreera murimaanyu ni osuwela," 
2Peter1:6 osuwelawanyu ni wiisuumaaliha, wiisuumaalihawanyu ni ovilela, ovilelawanyu ni murima wa omuluku," 
2Peter1:7 murimaanyu wa omuluku ni omusivela munninyu, ni omusivelawanyu munninyu ni osivela." 
2Peter1:8 Mwakhalano woowaatta mikhalelo iyo mookumunimwanyu, iyo nsooceelihe weera nyuwo muhikhale oohivareleya muteko ni oohiima moosuwelani wootheene wa Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu." 
2Peter1:9 Wa soothesene, mukina aahikhalano iyo, khanoona, ori ni evaasi, attiwalaka otteelihiwawawe wa soottheka sa khalayi." 
2Peter1:10 Tivawo, axunna, mwiilipihere weera mukhale oolipa mwa wiitthanawanyu ni othanlawanyu, niwoko mweettela mweetteloweene yoowo, khamurwa mukwattuliwatho." 
2Peter1:11 Hiiho nyuwo mmwaakheliwe nnenesene mwaavolowaka moomweneni woohimala wa Apwiyaahu ni Mvuluxaahu Yeesu Kristu. 
2Peter1:12 Tivawo, kinoowuupuxerani nyuwo mahuku ootheene sa seiya, naamwi musuwelaka ni mukhalaka oolipa mwa ekhaikhai mwaakhenlaanyu." 
2Peter1:13 Kinoona weera ti wootthuneyaxa owuupuxerani nyuwo ehuhu kiraaka miyo nlelo muheemani ya erutthu ela," 
2Peter1:14 niwoko koosuwela weera kihanle vakhaani ohiya eheema ela, ntoko Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu akithupululenlaaya." 
2Peter1:15 Nkipake soothesene weera, hata ohoolo wa opwahawaka, nyuwo muupuwelele itthusene seiya." 
2Peter1:16 Nuulumalaahu sa ikuru ni orwa wa Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu, khaninaatthara andiisi a atthu yaawuupuwelaaya. Ohiyanawaya, hiyo naahoona ni maithwaahu otokweenaaya." 
2Peter1:17 Awo ahaakhela ovuwa ni nttittimiho wa Muluku Atiithi, nsu na ovuwa otokotokoxa neenraaya: “Ola ti Mwanaka oosiveleya, onkisiveliha.”" 
2Peter1:18 Hiyo asineenaahu naahiiwa nsu nne naarweela wiirimu naaraahu ni Apwiya vamwaakoni wootteela. 
2Peter1:19 Nsu noolaleiwa ni maprofeeti nookhalano noolipaxa, ni wa nyuwo onuukhale wooreera mwiiwelela nnenesene nsu nno, ntoko nireene onyaari onaara vanipuroni nri ni epiphi, mpaka oyaaka ni oxa, ni Tthanda aakhumme mmurimanimwanyu." 
2Peter1:20 Musuwele toko iya, weera khaawo ongwera otaphulela masu a maprofeeti ni mirukusawe muneenaawe," 
2Peter1:21 niwoko khaawowo masu a maprofeeti arwiiye ni otthuna wa mutthu, mene atthu, yeettihiwe ni Munepa Wootteela, yaahuuluma mpatta wa Muluku." 
2Peter2:1 Vano, yaakhumelela maprofeeti oolokottha variyari wa muloko, ntokotho eneeraaya ekhumelele maprofeeti oolokottha variyariwanyu. Awo eniiruuhe muxiirini mahusiho oolokottha oophwata, mpaka yaakhoottaka Apwiya anlamula sootheene, mwa Yaawo awooponle. Hiiho eniyiiruuhele ophwateyawaya woowaakuveya." 
2Peter2:2 Atthu ancipale eniitthare iphiro soowuuliha muru sa atthweene yaawo, ni niwoko na yaawo, ephiro ya ekhaikhai eniiveihiwe." 
2Peter2:3 Mwa mililisaya atthweene yaawo eniiwiiyeeni ni andiisi oolokottha. Mene okhuma khalayi othorihiwawaya waakhala vamoha ni yaawo, ni ophwateyawaya khoonkona." 
2Peter2:4 Vano, Muluku khaawuurenle andyelo yaatthenkaaya, mene aahaavonyera mmooroni aahiyaka ootthukiweene mpiphini mpaka nihuku na othorihiwa." 
2Peter2:5 Naari khuurenletho elapweene yeele ya khalayi aaruuhenlaawe mirupi mulokweene yoowo woonanara, mene aamooponle Nowe, namalaleiya a ekhaikhai, vamoha ni atthu athanneeli." 
2Peter2:6 Aathorihatho isidade siitthaniwa Sodoma ni Gomora, ahisaka seiye mpaka othatuwa ettuura, apakaka iye ethoonyero sa seiyo seera saakhumeleleke atakhali." 
2Peter2:7 Aamvuluxatho Looti, mutthu a ekhaikhai, aahooxiwa, ni mweettelo woohiixuumaaliha wa yaale oolavilavi." 
2Peter2:8 Vano, akhalaka variyariwaya nihuku ti nihuku, mulopwana owo oororomeleya aathananihiwa mmunepanimwawe niwoko na soonanara oonaawe ni iiwaawe." 
2Peter2:9 Tivawo, nnoona weera Apwiya aasuwela owoopola atthu a murima wa omuluku wa sooweereriwa ni waatthuka atakhali wa nihuku na othorihiwa," 
2Peter2:10 wootepaxa yaale antthara soohaawela soonanara sa erutthu ni anramusa ikuru. Ereene oowuuma murima ni oowiixoona, atthweene yaawo khaanoova oveiha ikhalelo sa wiirimu." 
2Peter2:11 Wa soothesene, hata andyelo, naamwi ereene atokweene mukuruni ni moowerani, khaanoothera ikhalelosene seiye ni masu ooruwana vamaithoni a Apwiya." 
2Peter2:12 Vano atthweene yaawo amveiha yeeyo ahisuwenlaaya, ni ari ntoko asinama ehuupuwelaka, ettharaka ekhalelowaaya, ekhalaka weera evariwe ni yiiviwe. Eniiriheiye mooriheyanimwaya asineenaaya." 
2Peter2:13 Awo eniihaawe ophwateya ntoko nlivo wa soonanara apankaaya. Antthuna omaaliha soohaawelasaya mwaatthuni. Ari makhurumela ni malepa, anghakalala mwa soonanarasaya ecaaka vamoha ni nyuwo." 
2Peter2:14 Maithwaaya esareiyeene ni oraruwa, awo khanghiyerera ottheka. Anaalokottha atthu oohilipa, ni mirimasaya siri soosareya milili. Ari anamwane a olapha!" 
2Peter2:15 Awo aahiya ephiro ya ekhaikhai ni aahapuwa, ettharaka ephiro ya Balaami, mwaana a Bosori, aasivenlaawe nlivo na otakhala," 
2Peter2:16 mene aahoopereriwa mwa otakhalawawe ni buuru mmoha, enama yoohuuluma, yuulumale ni nsu na mutthu ni aahooceeliha ololo wa mprofeeti ole." 
2Peter2:17 Atthu awo ari anaattuuttu oohikhalano maahi, etthapwe yeettihiwe ni ettheku. Oriipa wa epiphi onimwaaweherera." 
2Peter2:18 Awo anuuluma masu oowiixoona a siiyo, ni anaalokottha ni soohaawela soohiisuumaaliha sa erutthu yaawo aneera waatthawa yaale ankhala mwa soonanara." 
2Peter2:19 Yaaroromelihaka akina oneethi, awo asineenaaya ari ipottha sa otakhala, niwoko mutthu ori epottha ya yeeyo enimulamula." 
2Peter2:20 Atthu yoopowa soonanara sa elapo ya vathi woowaasuwela Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu Mvuluxa, ni vahoolowaya enavitikeleliwatho elamuliwaka ni seiyo, awo anootepa onanaraxa opwaha woopacera." 
2Peter2:21 Waamureera awo yahaasuwenle ephiro ya ekhaikhai, ohikhanle vahoolo wa osuwela, okhootta nlamulo nootteela yaavahiwaaya." 
2Peter2:22 Yaahaakhumelela yaawo yeeyo miruku sa ekhaikhai singhimaaya: “Mwalapwa oohokoleela marapheyowaawe,” nitho “Ekhumba yoorapihiwa yoohokoleela wiivottokolela vattokoni.”" 
2Peter3:1 Oosiveleyaxa, ela ti ekaratta yanaaveeli kinoolepelaakani. Mwa soopiili, kintthuna owuupuxerani wuupuwelawanyu wooreera, weera" 
2Peter3:2 nyuwo muupuwelele masu yuulummwale khalayi ni maprofeeti ootteela ni malamulo a Apwiyaahu ni Mvuluxa arummwaanyu yooxuttihalaayani. 
2Peter3:3 Musuwele toko iya, weera wa mahuku oomalihera eniikhumelele anamaveiha, eveihaka ni ettharaka soohaawelasaya asineenaaya," 
2Peter3:4 mwa yaawo eniyeere: “Ori woowi orwawawe woororomelihiwa? Okhuma okhwa wa makholowaahu sootheene simpwaherera ntoko okhuma ompacereroni wa ephattuwelo.” 
2Peter3:5 Vaheera awo animwiittiwaliha mwayiini weera khalayi, niwoko na masu a Muluku, waakhala wiirimu ni elapo, ni eyo yaapattuxiwe ni maahi ni yiikaathiwe variyari wa maahi." 
2Peter3:6 Vano, elapo ya ehuhuweene yeele yaamireya ni yaaphwatiwa ni maahi ale." 
2Peter3:7 Ni masweene yaawo, wiirimu ni elapo ya vaanaano vaava ensungeriwa mooro, ethokororeliweene nihuku na othorihiwa ni na ophwatiwa wa atthu oonanara." 
2Peter3:8 Muhittiwale yeeyo, oosiveleya: Wa Apwiya nihuku nimoharu ti ntoko iyaakha macira muloko, ni iyaakha macira muloko ntoko nihuku nimoharu."

3John1:11 Oosiveleya, muhitakihe yeeyo eri yoonanara, mene eri yooreera. Yoowo ompaka yooreera ori a Muluku, mene yoowo ompaka yoonanara khamoonne Muluku." 
3John1:11 Oosiveleya, muhitakihe yeeyo eri yoonanara, mene eri yooreera. Yoowo ompaka yooreera ori a Muluku, mene yoowo ompaka yoonanara khamoonne Muluku." 
3John1:12 Vano, mwaha wa yoowo Demetriyo, atthu ootheene anghima nnene, ni ekhaikhai eneenaaya enghimatho nnene. Hiyotho ninnuuluma nnene sa yoowo, ni nyuwo munsuwela weera onamoonaahu ti wa ekhaikhai." 
3John1:12 Vano, mwaha wa yoowo Demetriyo, atthu ootheene anghima nnene, ni ekhaikhai eneenaaya enghimatho nnene. Hiyotho ninnuuluma nnene sa yoowo, ni nyuwo munsuwela weera onamoonaahu ti wa ekhaikhai."

3John1:15 Murettele okhale ni nyuwo. Asinthamwene a wenno anoovahani isaalama. Mwaasalaamihe mmoha-mmoha asinthamwene a weiwo.
