Jude1:1 Ya Yuda, murumeiyi a Yeesu Kristu, ni munneiye Yakobe, wa yaawo yiitthaniwe, yaasiveliwe ni Muluku Atiithi ni yaakosoopiwe ni Yeesu Kristu:" 
Jude1:2 Ikharari, murettele ni osivela owaatteleni." 
Jude1:3 Oosiveleya, naamwi kaatthuna vancipale woolepelani mwaha wa ovuluxiwawahu, kohoona weera waatthuneya woolepelani ni woonyesererihani weera muwane niwoko na nroromelo nivahiwe emaara emoharu wa ootteela." 
Jude1:4 Vano, atthu akina, mwa yaawo nthorihelonaya naalempwale khalayi, ahiivoleiha muxiirini variyariwanyu. Awo ari atakhali, etatuxaka olavilavi mahala a Mulukwaahu ni animkhootta Yeesu Kristu, Namalamula mmoharu, Apwiyaahu." 
Jude1:5 Naamwi nyuwo musuwelaka sootheene iyo, kintthuna owuupuxerani veeli weera Apwiya aavuluxa muloko mmoha wExipitu, mene vahoolowaya, yaahaaphwata yaawo yahaaroromenle." 
Jude1:6 Apwiya ahaatthuka mpiphini ni onyooro woohimala wa othorihiwa wa nihuku ntokweene andyelo yahaakosoompe mikhalelosaya sa ikuru, mene yaahiya nipuronaya." 
Jude1:7 Moota woolikana ni iya, Sodoma ni Gomora, ni isidade sa mukerekheremwaya, sohiileva wa olavilavi ni wa oraruxana asilopwanaru. Sittaruxiweene ni mooro woohimala, iyo simvarela muteko ntoko ethoonyero." 
Jude1:8 Mooteene yoowo, anamaloha awo amvaliha irutthusaya asineenaaya, ankhootta ikuru ni amveiha ikhalelo sa wiirimu." 
Jude1:9 Wa soothesene, hata ndyelo mutokweene Mikhayeli, aavaanyihanaawe ni Diyabu* ewanelaka erutthu ya Moisesi, kheerenre omoothera, amveihaka ni moota wooveiha Diyabu*, mene eenre: “Apwiya yoohiiheyoomuhiihe!”" 
Jude1:10 Awo amveiha sootheene ahiniiwexexaaya ni anniriheya ni itthusene seiyo asuwenlaaya, ettharaka mikhalelo sa erutthu ntoko inama sihikhalanne soowuupuwela." 
Jude1:11 Ii! Anoohaawa! Niwoko yaatthara ephiro ya Kayini; ni yaasaka nlivo, yaatthara olokottha wa Balaami; ni yaaphwatiwa moonyakulihanani wa Kore." 
Jude1:12 Atthweene yaawo ari malepa mwa mfestanimwanyu, ecaaka vamoha ni nyuwo oohikhalano nttittimiho. Ari akukhuli aniiciha asineenaaya paahi. Ari mahutte oohikhalano maahi, yeettihiwaka ni epheyo, nyiri sa elimwe sihiimaka etthu, sikhwaaka veeli, sipheliwaka ni mukwankhwaari." 
Jude1:13 Ari mitekuteku sa owali sa mphareiyani, sikhumihaka nipheru na mitekosaya soowuuliha muru; ithenyeeri sithweelenle, mwa yaawo aathokororeliwa epiphi etokotokoxa yoohimala." 
Jude1:14 Henookhi, ekhapira yanaathannapiili okhuma wa Adamu, aathaliha mwaha wa yaawo: “Moone, Apwiya angwa ni ootteelaaya oohaalikeleya" 
Jude1:15 weera yaathorihe ootheene, ni yaahimahime atakhali ootheene niwoko na mitekosaya soonanara sootheene apankaaya mootakhalani, ni niwoko na masu ooruwana anamattheka oonanara murima amuulumenlaaya Muluku.”" 
Jude1:16 Awo ari anamattaandawula ni ankhala oohihakalala, ettharaka soohaawelasaya soonanara; ari oowiixoona ni aniixeera ni akina, mene niwoko na opwatthawaya asineenaaya paahi." 
Jude1:17 Wa soothesene, oosiveleya, muupuwelele yeeyo yuulummwale ni arummwa a Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu." 
Jude1:18 Awo yaaweerelani nyuwo: “Mahuku oomalihera, eniikhumelele anamaveiha eneera etthare soohaawelasaya sootakhala.”" 
Jude1:19 Awo ari yaawo ankhumiha ohiiwanana variyariwanyu, ettharaka soohaawela sa eruttwaaya ni ehikhalanne Munepa." 
Jude1:20 Wa soothesene, nyuwo, oosiveleya, mupwaherereke wunnuwa munroromelonimwanyu nootteelaxa, mvekelaka mwa Munepa Wootteela." 
Jude1:21 Mwiithokorore moosivelani mwa Muluku, muwehereraka weera ikharari sa Apwiyaahu Yeesu Kristu soorongheni mookumini woohimala." 
Jude1:22 Mwaamorele ikharari yaawo anghovela. 
Jude1:23 Mwaavuluxe akina ngwookholaka mmooroni; wa akinatho, mwaamorele ikharari ni woova, muthanyaka mpaka ikuwo sivalihiwe ni otakhala wa erutthu." 
Jude1:24 Wa Yoole ongwera owooceelihani wuuwa ni owooniherani vahoolo wa ovuwawawe woohikhala nlepa ni moohakalalani otokotoko," 
Jude1:25 wa Muluku mmoharu, Mvuluxaahu okhale ovuwa, otokweene, ikuru ni olamula niwoko na Yeesu Kristu Apwiyaahu, okhuma ehinaaye ehuhu yootheene, vaanaano vaava ni wa mahuku ootheene. Ame*." 
Revelation1:1 Ethupululo ya Yeesu Kristu, Muluku aamvanghaawe weera awoonihere arumeiyaawe mwaha wa seiyo sineera sikhumelele woowaakuveya. Amurumihelaka ndyelowaawe, Owo aamusuweliha murumeiyaawe Yohaane," 
Revelation1:2 mwa yoowo onkhalela onamoona wa masu a Muluku ni wa onamoona wa Yeesu Kristu, aani wa soothesene oonnaawe." 
Revelation1:3 Ooreelihiwa ti yoole onsoma masu a ethupululo ela, ni ooreelihiwa ti yaale aniiwa ni anthokorora masu alempwale mwa yeeyo, niwoko ehuhu ehanle ti ekhaaneene." 
Revelation1:4 Ya Yohaane, wa ikerexa ithannapiili siri wAsiya: Wa nyuwo mahala ni murettele onrweela wa Yoole ori, aari, ni anaarwe, ni wa minepa mithannamiili siri ohoolo wa ehicaawe," 
Revelation1:5 ni wa Yeesu Kristu ori Namoona oororomeleya, Ntthaara mwa anamakhwa, Namalamula a mamwene a elapo yootheene. Wa Yoole onnisivela ni onivulunxe wa sootthekasahu niwoko na ephomaawe, ni" 
Revelation1:6 onikhalinghe omwene ni asaserdoti* weera nimurumeele Mulukwaawe ni Atithawe, wa Yoowo okhale ovuwa ni ikuru soohimala. Ame*." 
Revelation1:7 Moone weera Owo onimoowa mmahutteni, ni maitho ootheene eniimoone, yaaletho yaamuhomme, ni miloko sootheene sa elapo ya vathi nsilalamike niwoko na Yoowo. Hiiho onuukhale! Ame!*" 
Revelation1:8 “Miyo ti Alfa* ni Omega*,” yeenre Apwiya Muluku, “Yaawo ari, yaari, ni eniirwe, a ikuru sootheene.”" 
Revelation1:9 Miyo, Yohaane, munninyu ni mukhwiinyu moohaawani, moomweneni, ni moovilelani mwa Yeesu, kaari ocirumbani yiitthaniwa Patmo niwoko na masu a Muluku ni na onamoona wa Yeesu." 
Revelation1:10 Munihukuni na Apwiya, kaahiiphwanyera mMunepani, ni kaahiiwa ottuliwaka nsu ntokweene ntoko nipalapatta," 
Revelation1:11 neeraka: “Mulepe yeeyo munoonaanyu, ni murumihele wa ikerexa ithannapiili siri wEfeso, oSmirna, oPergamu, oThiyatira, oSardi, oFiladelfiya ni oLawodiseiya.”" 
Revelation1:12 Kaarukunuwa weera kimoone taani uuluma ni miyo. Kirukunuwaka, kaahoona iyuuma soorikaxa ithannapiili saarino iveela," 
Revelation1:13 ni variyari wa iyo Mukina oolikana ni Mwaana a mutthu, ni mukaandyo woorakama ni angwanreene vakakasani laamba a eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Revelation1:14 Muruwaawe ni mayihaawe yaari ootteelaxa ntoko mapururu a eputtiputthi, aani, ntoko etthapwe, ni maithwaawe yaari ntoko nlumi na mooro." 
Revelation1:15 Inaawosawe saari ntoko eyuuma yoowiitthwaxa vamooroni, ni nsunawe ntoko oruma wa maahi mancipale." 
Revelation1:16 Aakhalano ntatanawe na moono mulopwana ithenyeeri ithannapiili ni mmwaanomwawe yaakhuma ekatana yoowiitha ninno ninno. Ekhovaawe yaari ntoko nsuwa noopaka ni ikuru sincipale. 
Revelation1:17 Kimoonakaru, kaamorela vanaawoniwawe ntoko mutthu okhwiiye. Vano Owo aakiikaathera ntatanawe na moono mulopwana, anakeerela: “Muhoove, Miyo ti Oopacera ni Oomalihera." 
Revelation1:18 Miyo ti Yoole onkhala ni okumi; kaahookhwa, mene vano kinkhala ni okumi mahuku ootheene oohimala. Ni kookhalano ixaavi sa okhwa ni sa Hadesi*." 
Revelation1:19 Mulepe itthu moonnaanyu, seiyo sinkhala ni seiyo sineera sikhumelele." 
Revelation1:20 Nna ti ntikhinelo na ithenyeeri ithannapiili moonnaanyu muntatanimwaka na moono mulopwana, ni na iyuuma soorikaxa ithannapiili sirino iveela: ithenyeeri ithannapiili ti andyelo a ikerexa ithannapiili, ni iyuuma soorikaxa ithannapiili sirino iveela ti ikerexa ithannapiili.”" 
Revelation2:1 “Wa ndyelo a ekerexa eri wEfeso, mulepe: Awo ti masu a Yoole orino ithenyeeri ithannapiili muntatanimwawe na moono mulopwana, ni oneetta variyari wa iyuuma soorikaxa ithannapiili sirino iveela." 
Revelation2:2 Koosuwela mitekosanyu soovihaxa ni ovilelawanyu. Koosuwela weera khamungwera waavilela atthu oonanara murima ni mwaawoota murima yaawo aniixeerela arummwa ehikhanle, ni mohoonelela weera awo ari anamalokottha." 
Revelation2:3 Nyuwo moovilela ni moohaawa niwoko na Nsinanaka ni khamunkhulumuwa. 
Revelation2:4 Wa soothesene, kookhalano yoowootherani ela nyuwo: moohiya osivelawanyu woopacera." 
Revelation2:5 Muupuwelele weiwo mwamonraanyu! Murukunxe murima ni mupake miteko mwaavaraanyu ompacereroni. Mwaahirukunxa murimaanyu, nkoorweeleni ni nkivenxe vanipuroniwaya eyuumaanyu yoorikaxa erino iveela." 
Revelation2:6 Wa soothesene, ela ti yooreeraanyu: Nyuwo munthanya miteko sa aNikolawo mwa seiyo Miyotho kinthanyaaka." 
Revelation2:7 Yaawo arino maaru, yiiwe yeeyo Munepa onleelaaya ikerexa! Wa namawina nkimutthunihere oca sa mwiri wa okumi ori mParadisu* wa Muluku." 
Revelation2:8 “Wa ndyelo a ekerexa eri oSmirna, mulepe: Awo ari masu a Yoole ori Oopacera ni Oomalihera, Yoole aakhwiiye, ni vano ori ni okumi." 
Revelation2:9 Koosuwela sohooxasanyu ni osiwaanyu, mene nyuwo muri ni mihakhu! Koosuwela oveiha wa yaawo aniixeerela aYuda ehikhanle, ereene toko eSinagoga* ya Satana." 
Revelation2:10 Muhoove wa itthu muneeraanyu muhaawe. Miyo kinooleelani: Diyabu* anaavonyere akina a nyuwo mukaliposo weera aweerereni, ni nyuwo mmwihaawe osoondiwa woomalaka mahuku muloko. Mukhale oororomeleya mpaka okhwa ni Miyo nkoovaheeni ecireemba ya okumi." 
Revelation2:11 Yaawo arino maaru, yiiwe yeeyo Munepa onleelaaya ikerexa! Namawina kharwa ahaawa naari vakhaani okhwa wanaaveeli." 
Revelation2:12 “Wa ndyelo a ekerexa eri ya oPergamu, mulepe: Awo ti masu a Yoole orino ekatana yoowiitha ninno ninno." 
Revelation2:13 Koosuwela munkhalaanyu, weiwo eraayawo ehice ya Satana. Wa soothesene, nyuwo moopwaherera moota woororomeleya mwa Nsinanaka, ni khamukhoontte nroromelonanyu mwa Miyo, hata wa mahuku a Antipa, namoonaaka oororomeleya, mwa yoowo iiviwe mwa esidadeene yeeyo onkhalaawewo Satana." 
Revelation2:14 Wa soothesene, kookhalano soowoohimahimani sikina nyuwo: Nyuwo mookhalano iwo atthu antthara mahusiho a Balaami, mwa yoowo aamuxuttihale Balaki waareiya muraakho aYixrayeli weera ece sooca sooveleeleliwa miluku sikina, ni weera epake olavilavi." 
Revelation2:15 Mooteene yoowo mookhalano akina antthara mahusiho a aNikolawo. 
Revelation2:16 Tivawo, murukunxe murimaanyu! Mwaahirukunxa, kinimoowa woowaakuveya ni nkaawanane yaawo ni ekatana ya eyanowaaka." 
Revelation2:17 Yaawo arino maaru, yiiwe yeeyo Munepa onleelaaya ikerexa! Wa namawina nkimvahe emana* yoovithiwa. Nkimvahetho nluku nootteela ni nsina nnyowani noolempwa mwemmo, noosuweleiya paahi ni yoowo onaakhela." 
Revelation2:18 “Wa ndyelo a ekerexa eri oThiyatira, mulepe: Awo ti masu a Mwaana a Muluku, mwa Yoowo maithwaawe ari ntoko nlumi na mooro, ni inaawosawe ntoko eyuuma yoowiitthwaxa vamooroni." 
Revelation2:19 Koosuwela mitekosanyu, osivelawanyu, nroromelonanyu, orumeelawanyu ni ovilelawanyu, ni koosuwelatho weera miteko sooreera sa vaanaano soopwahaxa seiye sa khalayi." 
Revelation2:20 Wa soothesene, kookhalano yoowootherani ela nyuwo: Munimvilela muthiyana owo Yezabeli oniixeerela mprofeeti. Owo onaaphariha arumeiyaaka ni mahusihowaawe weera epake olavilavi ni ece yooca yooveleeleliwa miluku sikina." 
Revelation2:21 Koomvaha ehuhu yoorukunxa murimaawe wa olavilavaawe, mene owo khantthuna." 
Revelation2:22 Vano kinoomuttaruxa kimurumihelaka eretta etokotoko ni nkaaruuhele ohaawa otokotoko yaawo anraruwa ni yoowo yaahirukunxa murimaaya wa miteko owo omvaraawe. 
Revelation2:23 Nkiwiive anamwane a muthiyana owo. Vano, ikerexa sootheene nsisuwele weera Miyo ti Yoole onsuwela nnenesene soowuupuwela ni mirima, ni khula mutthu nkimwaakhelihe ntoko mutekwaawe omphwanelaaya." 
Revelation2:24 Wa nyuwo akina ari oThiyatira, nyuwo muhintthara mahusihowaawe ni muhisomme yeeyo awo aneeraaya ti ixiiri soowiixeraxa sa Satana, wa nyuwo kineera: nkooreyani murindi mukina," 
Revelation2:25 mene muvarexexe nnenesene yeeyo murinaanyu mpaka Miyo kineeraaka kiwe. 
Revelation2:26 Wa yoole ongwina ni onkwanihera mitekosaka mpaka ommaleloni, kinoomvaha ikuru sa olamula miloko:" 
Revelation2:27 “Owo anaalamule ni ekopo ya eyuuma, ni anaapwexakase ntoko mwaapu wa oloko” –" 
Revelation2:28 hiiho ntoko Miyotho kaakhenlaaka ikuru wa Atithaka. Nkimvahetho Tthanda. 
Revelation2:29 Yaawo arino maaru, yiiwe yeeyo Munepa onleelaaya ikerexa!" 
Revelation3:1 “Wa ndyelo a ekerexa eri ya oSardi, mulepe: Awo ari masu a Yoole orino minepa mithannamiili sa Muluku ni ithenyeeri ithannapiili. Koosuwela mitekosanyu. Moosuwanyeya ntoko ekerexa ya okumi, mene eri yookhweene." 
Revelation3:2 Muvenyeke! Mwaalipihere yaawo ahanle ni eneera ekhwe, niwoko nkimphwanya mitekosanyu sookwanela vamaithoni wa Mulukwaaka." 
Revelation3:3 Vano, muupuwelele yeeyo mwaakhenlaanyu ni mwiiwalaanyu. Mwiiwelele ni murukunxe murima. Mwaahivenyatho, nkirwe ntoko namwiiya, ni nyuwo khamurwa musuwela ehuhu heeni kineeraaka kirwe wa nyuwo." 
Revelation3:4 Wa soothesene, mookhalano iwo oSardi atthu vakhaani ahinanaringhe ikuwosaya. Awo eniyeette ni Miyo ni ikuwo sootteela, niwoko aaphwanela." 
Revelation3:5 Namawina anaawaretho ikuwo sootteela. Nkirwa kicipiha nsinanawe mulivuruni ya okumi, mene nkimwaakhulele vamaithoni wa Atithaka ni andyelowaaya." 
Revelation3:6 Yaawo arino maaru, yiiwe yeeyo Munepa onleelaaya ikerexa!" 
Revelation3:7 “Wa ndyelo a ekerexa eri ya oFiladelfiya, mulepe: Awo ari masu a Yoole ori Ootteela ni a ekhaikhai ni orino exaavi ya Davide. Yeeyo onghulaawe, khaawo ongwera owala, ni yeeyo ongwalaawe khaawo ongwera ohula." 
Revelation3:8 Koosuwela mitekosanyu. Moone, koowiiyaatherani ohoolowanyu nsele noohuleya khaawo ongwera owala. Koosuwelatho weera murino ikuru vakhaani, mene moothokorora maswaaka ni khamukhoontte Nsinanaka." 
Revelation3:9 Miyo kinimwaanyesereriha yaawo ari a eSinagoga* ya Satana, yaawo aniixeerela weera ari aYuda ehikhanle, ereene toko anamootha, weera erwe yookokhoreleni inaawosanyu ni esuwele weera kohoosivelani nyuwo." 
Revelation3:10 Woonaka weera nyuwo moothokorora maswaaka aneera muvilele, Miyotho nkoothokororeni wa ehuhu yooweereriwa yeeyo ehanle vakhaani ophiyera elapo ya vathi yootheene, weera eweerere yaawo ankhala vathi." 
Revelation3:11 Kinimoowa woowaakuveya. Mulipihe yeeyo muraanyuno weera ahikhale mukina aneera oowatuleni ecireembaanyu. 
Revelation3:12 Kinimukhaliha namawina marimbu Mpaani mwa Mulukwaaka, ni vaavaawo kharwa akhuma. Nkilepe mwa yoowo Nsina na Mulukwaaka ni nsina na esidade ya Mulukwaaka, Yerusaleemu enyowani, mwa yeeyo enkhuruwa wiirimu wa Muluku ni nkilepetho mwa yoowo nsinanaka nnyowani." 
Revelation3:13 Yaawo arino maaru, yiiwe yeeyo Munepa onleelaaya ikerexa!" 
Revelation3:14 “Wa ndyelo a ekerexa eri ya oLawodiseiya, mulepe: Awo ari masu a Ame*, Namoona oororomeleya ni a ekhaikhai, Namalamula a ephattuwelo ya Muluku." 
Revelation3:15 Koosuwela mitekosanyu. Koosuwela weera khamuhiyono ooriira, naari ooviha. Fataari mwaari ooriira, hoye hoye ooviha!" 
Revelation3:16 Hiiho, woonaka weera muri ookuttiheya, oohiriira, naari oohiviha, Miyo kihanle vakhaani woorapheyani mmwaanomwaka." 
Revelation3:17 Nyuwo muneera: ‘Miyo namuhakhu. Koophwanya mihakhu ni nkinghaawela etthu,’ khamusuwenletho weera muri oothoiwa, oowuuliheya muru, oohaawa, oohoona ni muri pwitipwiti." 
Revelation3:18 Miyo kinoolakani weera muthume wa Miyo eyuuma yoorikaxa yoowiitthwihaxiwa mmooroni, weera muthatuwe namuhakhu, ni ikuwo sootteela soowara weera muttiyeleele ohiwarawanyu woowuuliha muru, ni murette wa maitho, weera muttikitthele maithwaanyu ni moone." 
Revelation3:19 Kingwooperera ni kinaalaka yaale kinaasivelaaka. Tivawo, mweetteke ni nthiti ni murukunxe murimaanyu." 
Revelation3:20 Moone, Miyo koheemela vamulako ni kineera: “Hoodi!” Akhala mukina oniiwa nsunaka ni onghula nsele, kinoovolowa ni kinimooca vamoha ni yoowo, ni owo ni Miyo." 
Revelation3:21 Nkimvahe namawina ikuru sa okilaathi vamoha ni Miyo vahiceniwaka, hiiho ntoko Miyotho kiwinnaaka ni kikilaathiyaaka vamoha ni Atithaka vahiceniwaya." 
Revelation3:22 Yaawo arino maaru, yiiwe yeeyo Munepa onleelaaya ikerexa!”" 
Revelation4:1 Vahoolo wa itthusene seiya kaaweha, ni ohoolowaka waakhala mulako woohuleya wiirimu. Nsu kiiwalaaka woopacera nuulumaka ni miyo ntoko nipalapatta, naaheera: “Ngweleke va ni kinoowooniherani yeeyo eneera ekhumelele vahoolo wa itthusene seiya.”" 
Revelation4:2 Wootutuxereya kaaphwanyaneya mMunepani, ni ohoolowaka yaakhala ehice wiirimu, ni Mukina akilaantheene vaavaawo." 
Revelation4:3 Mukhalelowaawe Yoole aakilaathiye waari ntoko yaspe* ni sardonikisi*. Muura waalikana esmeralda* waarukureera ehice. 
Revelation4:4 Vano, ihice miloko miili niixexe sikina saarukureera ehice ele, ni asitokweene miloko miili naaxexe ekilaantheene mwemmo. Awo yaawanre ikuwo sootteela nitho icireemba sa eyuuma yoorikaxa mmurumwaya." 
Revelation4:5 Wa ehiceene yeele waakhuma overunya, sooruma ni okukutteya. Vahoolowaya saavarela mithuko mithannamiili, siri minepa mithannamiili sa Muluku." 
Revelation4:6 Ohoolo wa ehice yaakhalatho etthu yoolikana ni ephareiya ya ningaraasi, yoowooneela ntoko nluku na ekristalo*. Eriyari, mukerekheremwaya ehice, saari ikhalelo ixexe sa okumi soosareya maitho ohoolo ni ottuli." 
Revelation4:7 Ekhalelo yoopacera yaari yoolikana ni mwatto; yanaaveeli ni emombe elopwana; yanaararu yaarino ekhove yoolikana ni mulopwana, ni yanaaxexe yaari ntoko xaaka avavaka." 
Revelation4:8 Ekhalelo ti ekhalelo yaarino mapupha mathannamosa ni yaasareya maitho mapuro ootheene – mpaka mmapuphani. Ohiyu ni othana sihiitthuuwaka sineera: “Ootteela, Ootteela, Ootteela ti Apwiya Muluku a ikuru sootheene, yaari, ari, ni eniirwe." 
Revelation4:9 Imaara sootheene ikhalelo sa okumi simvahaaya ovuwa, nttittimiho ni sootthapela wa Yoole okilaathiye vahiceni ni onkhala ni okumi woohimala," 
Revelation4:10 asitokweene miloko miili naaxexe animukokhorela Yoole okilaathiye vahiceni ni animulapa Yoole onkhala ni okumi woohimala, evonyeraka icireembasaya ohoolo wa ehice, yeeraka:" 
Revelation4:11 “Nyuwo moophwanela waakhela ovuwa, nttittimiho ni ikuru, Apwiya ni Mulukwaahu, niwoko moopattuxa itthu soothesene, ni iyo sinkhala ni sipakiwe niwoko na otthunawanyu.”" 
Revelation5:1 Vano kaahoona muntatani na moono mulopwana na Yoole okilaathiye vahiceni elivuru elempweene mpuwa ni omokoni ni iwalelo* ithannapiili. 
Revelation5:2 Kaamoona ndyelo mmoha oolipa, akhuwelaka ni nsu ntokotoko: “Taani omphwanela ohula iwalelo ni ohula elivuru?”" 
Revelation5:3 Khaawotho a wiirimu, naari a vathi, hata a vathi wa etthaya aawera ohula elivuru, hata aaweha yeeyo." 
Revelation5:4 Kaahiinla vancipale niwoko na ohiphwanyaneya, naari mmoha oophwanela ohula elivuru, hata oweha mpuwamwaya." 
Revelation5:5 Vano mmoha a asitokweene aakeerela: “Muhiinle, moone! Mwatto a epuumba ya Yuda, mukwankhwaari wa Davide, aawina weera ahule elivuru ni ahule iwalelo ithannapiili.”" 
Revelation5:6 Kaahoona Eputtiputthi yaakhala ntoko yoowiiviwa, yeemenleene eriyari ya ehice yaarukureeriwe ni ikhalelo ixexe sa okumi ni asitokweene. Eyo yaarino manyaka mathannameeli ni maitho mathannameeli ari minepa mithannamiili sa Muluku soorumiheliwa elapo yootheene." 
Revelation5:7 Eyo yaahaattamela ni yaahaakhelela elivuru wa ntata na moonowaawe mulopwana na Yoole okilaathiye vahiceni. 
Revelation5:8 Yaakhelaka, ikhalelo ixexe sa okumi ni asitokweene miloko miili naaxexe yaakokhorela ohoolo wa Eputtiputthi. Khula mutthu a yaale aakhalano makita ni nyaapu soopakiwa ni eyuuma yoorikaxa soosareya ni mwiixi woowunkhela, mwa yoowo ori mavekelo a atthu ootteela," 
Revelation5:9 ni awo yaahiipa ecipo enyowani: “Moophwanela waakhela elivuru ni ohula iwalelosaya*, niwoko mohiiviwa ni moomuthumela Muluku atthu a epuumba, nuulumo, muloko ni elapo yootheene." 
Revelation5:10 Nyuwo mohaakhaliha yaawo omwene ni asaserdoti* wa Mulukwaahu ni awo eniilamule vathi vaava.” 
Revelation5:11 Vano, kaaweha ni kaahiiwa nsu na andyelo oohaalikeleya. Awo yaarukureera ehice, hiiho ntoko ikhalelo sa okumi ni asitokweene," 
Revelation5:12 ni yaahiipa ni nsu ntokotoko: “Yoophwanela ti Eputtiputthi yiiviwe weera yaakhele owera, mihakhu, miruku, ikuru, nttittimiho, ovuwa ni ottottopela!”" 
Revelation5:13 Kaahiiwa soopattuxiwa sootheene siri wiirimu, vathi, vathi wa etthaya ni mphareiyani seeraka: “Wa Yoole okilaathiye vahiceni, ni wa Eputtiputthi okhale ottottopela, nttittimiho, ovuwa ni ikuru wa mahuku ootheene oohimala!”" 
Revelation5:14 Ikhalelo ixexe sa okumi saaheera: “Ame”*, ni asitokweene yaakokhorela ni yaalapa." 
Revelation6:1 Kaaweha Eputtiputthi yaahunlaaya ewalelo* yoopacera ya ithannapiili. Vano kaahiiwa ekhalelo ya okumi emoha yeera ni nsu ntoko etari: “Ngweeke!” 
Revelation6:2 Kaaweha, ni ohoolowaka yaakhala ekavalu* emoha yootteela, ni yoole eettiha aakhalano muupa. Aavahiwa ecireemba ni owo aavenyawo, ntoko namawina oolikana owina." 
Revelation6:3 Ehulakaru Eputtiputthi ewalelo* yanaaveeli, kaahiiwa ekhalelo ya okumi yanaaveeli yeera: “Ngweeke!”" 
Revelation6:4 Vano yaakhuma ekavalu* ekina yooxeera. Yoole eettiha aahaakhela ikuru weera avenxe murettele wa elapo ya vathi, ni awere weera atthu yiivaneke. Aavahiwa ekatana etokotoko." 
Revelation6:5 Ehulakaru Eputtiputthi ewalelo* yanaararu, kaahiiwa ekhalelo ya okumi yanaararu yeera: “Ngweeke!” Kaaweha ni ohoolowaka yaakhala ekavalu* yooriipa. Yoole eettiha aakhalano mmatatani muringo." 
Revelation6:6 Vano kaahiiwa etthu yaalikana ntoko nsu variyari wa ikhalelo sa okumi ixexe, neera: “Muringo mmoha wa etrigu onkhala edinaariyu* emoha ni miringo miraru sa esevada* sinkhala edinaariyu* emoha, ni muhinanarihe makhura, naari eviinyu!”" 
Revelation6:7 Ehulakaru Eputtiputthi ewalelo* yanaaxexe, kaahiiwa ekhalelo ya okumi yanaaxexe yeera: “Ngweeke!”" 
Revelation6:8 Kaaweha, ni ohoolowaka yaakhala ekavalu* yootteelela. Yoole eettiha iitthaniwa Okhwa, ni Hadesi* aamutthara vakhiviruweene. Yaavahiwa ikuru wa mpatta wanaaxexe wa elapo ya vathi weera awiive ni ekatana, etala, ikwerere ni asinama oowoopiha a ntuphini." 
Revelation6:9 Ehulakaru ewalelo* yanaathanu, kaahoona vathi valtaarini* minepa sa yaale yaakhwiiye niwoko na masu a Muluku, ni na onamoona yaakhalenlaaya." 
Revelation6:10 Awo yaakhuwela ni nsu ntokotoko: “Mpaka yaakhani, Namalamula, Ootteela ni Ekhaikhai nnoowehereraahuni weera mwaathorihe atthu amanke elapo ya vathi ni mwiinlele ikuhu ephomaahu?”" 
Revelation6:11 Vano khula mutthu a yaale aahaakhela mukaandyo wootteela, ni yaaheereliwa weera ewehereretho vakhaani, mpaka okwanele waatta wa asikhwaaya ni axunnaya yeera ekhweeke ntoko yaawo." 
Revelation6:12 Kaahoona Eyo yaahunlaaya ewalelo* yanaathannamosa. Waakhumelela otetereya otokotoko. Nsuwa naariipa ntoko makhala oohisiwa; mweeri waaxeera ntoko ephome," 
Revelation6:13 ni ithenyeeri sa wiirimu saamorela vathi ntoko ifiigu sikithi simmoraaya mmwirini waapukunyiwaka ni epheyo etokotoko. 
Revelation6:14 Wiirimu waapindiwa ntoko elivuru yookhuniwa, ni nyaako ni icurumba sootheene saasusihiwa mmapuronimwaya." 
Revelation6:15 Vano, mamwene a elapo ya vathi, asitokweene, ahooleli a anakhotto, mathadyiri, alipa a ikuru – ootheene, hata ipottha, hata maneethi – yaahiipitha mmakhukuni ni nnyattani sa nnyaakoni." 
Revelation6:16 Awo yaakhuwelela nyaako ni nyala: “Munimorele ni munivithe wa ekhove ya Yoole okilaathiye vahiceni ni wa isara sa Eputtiputthi! 
Revelation6:17 Vano, noophiya nihukunaya ntokotoko na isara, ni taani anaawere ovilela?”" 
Revelation7:1 Vahoolowaya, kaawoona andyelo axexe yeemenleene mmattuumbani maxexe a elapo, evaraka ipheyo ixexe sa elapo weera epheyo ehoope mweelaponi, naari mphareiyani naari mmwirini mmoha." 
Revelation7:2 Vano, kaamoona ndyelo mukina aweelaka ninkhuma nsuwa, areeneno ewalelo* ya Muluku mukumi. Owo aahaakhuwelela ni nsu ntokotoko andyelo axexe wa yaawo yaavahiwe ikuru weera enanarihe elapo ni ephareiya:" 
Revelation7:3 “Muhinanarihe hata elapo, hata ephareiya, naari nyiri mpaka hiyo nneeraahu niwiikaathere iwalelo vayuuci sa arumeiyi a Mulukwaahu.”" 
Revelation7:4 Vano kaahiiwa waatta wa yaale yiikaatheriwe: atthu 144 000 wa ipuumba sootheene sa aYixrayeli. 
Revelation7:5 Wa epuumba ya Yuda yahiikaatheriwa atthu 12 000. Wa epuumba ya Rubeni, atthu 12 000. Wa epuumba ya Gadi, atthu 12 000." 
Revelation7:6 Wa epuumba ya Aseri, atthu 12 000. Wa epuumba ya Nafitali, atthu 12 000. Wa epuumba ya Manaxe, atthu 12 000." 
Revelation7:7 Wa epuumba ya Simeyoni, atthu 12 000. Wa epuumba ya Leevi, atthu 12 000. Wa epuumba ya Isakari, atthu 12 000." 
Revelation7:8 Wa epuumba ya Zabuloni, atthu 12 000. Wa epuumba ya Yoseefe, atthu 12 000. Wa epuumba ya Benyamini, atthu 12 000." 
Revelation7:9 Vahoolowaya kaaweha, ni ohoolowaka yaakhala atthu ancipalexa mwa yaawo khaawo aawera owaalikela. Yaakhala wa ilapo, ipuumba, miloko, ni muulumo ootheene. Yaarimweemela ohoolo wa ehice ni wa Eputtiputthi, ewanreene mikaandyo sootteela ni emvarenleene mmatatanimwaya kancesa." 
Revelation7:10 Awo yaakhuwela ni nsu ntokotoko: “Ovuluwa ori wa Mulukwaahu okilaathiye vahiceni ni wa Eputtiputthi.” 
Revelation7:11 Andyelo ootheene yaarimweemela erukureenreene ehice, asitokweene ni ikhalelo sa okumi ixexe, ni awo yaahuuramihela ekhovaaya vathi ohoolo wa ehice ni yaamulapa Muluku," 
Revelation7:12 yeeraka: “Ame!* Ottottopela, ovuwa, miruku, otthapela, nttittimiho, owera ni ikuru sikhale wa Mulukwaahu wa mahuku ootheene oohimala. Ame!*”" 
Revelation7:13 Vano mmoha a asitokweene aakikoha: “Ala awanre mikaandyo sootteela – taani, ni ankhumelela woowi?”" 
Revelation7:14 Miyo kaamwaakhula: “Apwiya nyuwo moosuwela.” Mutokweene ole eenre: “Awo ari yaawo avinre moosoondiwani otokotoko ni yaakattha mikaandyosaya ni yaatteeliha iyo mwa ephome ya Eputtiputthi. 
Revelation7:15 Tivawo, awo araaya ohoolo wa ehice ya Muluku ni animurumeela othana ni ohiyu vaNipuroniwawe Nootteela, ni Yoole okilaathiye vahiceni anaakhuneele yaawo ni etabernaakulu*." 
Revelation7:16 Kheerwa evoliwa etala, naari ntthona. Nsuwa ni oviha khoorwa waapaka yoonanara," 
Revelation7:17 niwoko Eputtiputthi eri eriyari ya ehice eniikhale Mukukhulaaya. Eyo eniweettihe wa anaattuuttu a maahi makumi. Ni Muluku anaawuukutthe mmaithonimwaya maithori ootheene.” 
Revelation8:1 Eyo ehulakaru ewalelo* yanaathannapiili, waakhala omaala wiirimu wa eriyari ya ewoora emoha." 
Revelation8:2 Kaawoona andyelo athanneeli yeemenleene ohoolo wa Muluku, ni awo yaavahiwa mapalapatta mathannameeli." 
Revelation8:3 Ndyelo mukina aahaattamela ni aaheemela valtaarini*. Aakhalano mwaapu wa eyuuma yoorikaxa waarino mwiixi woowunkhela. Wa yoowo aavahiwa mwiixi woowunkhelaxa mwincipale weera aveleele, vamoha ni mavekelo a atthu ootteela ootheene valtaarini* a eyuuma yoorikaxa ari ohoolo wa ehice." 
Revelation8:4 Ni mmatatani mwa ndyelo waawela mwiixi wunkhelaxa vamoha ni mavekelo a atthu ootteela ohoolo wa Muluku. 
Revelation8:5 Ndyelo aakuxa mwaapu ole, aasariha mooro wa altaari*, anavonyera elapo ya vathi, ni vano saakhala itari, oruma, overunya ni otetereya." 
Revelation8:6 Vano, andyelo athanneeli yaarino mapalapatta mathannameeli yaareherera weera yiipe." 
Revelation8:7 Ndyelo oopacera aahiipa nipalapattanawe, ni yaakhala maralala ni mooro wootakanseriwa ni ephome mwa seiyo saavonyeriwa vathi. Waahisiwa mpatta wanaararu wa elapo, mipatta sanaararu sa nyiri ni malaxi makithi ootheene." 
Revelation8:8 Ndyelo anaaveeli aahiipa nipalapattanawe, ni etthu yoolikana ni mwaako mutokotoko ovarelaka yaavonyeriwa mphareiyani. Mpatta wanaararu wa ephareiya waathatuwa ephome," 
Revelation8:9 saahookhwa sanaararu sa soopattuxiwa sa okumi mphareiyani, ni mpatta wanaararu wa makula waaphwatiwa." 
Revelation8:10 Ndyelo anaararu aahiipa nipalapattanawe, ni ethenyeeri etokotoko, evarelaka ntoko muthuko, yaamora wiirimu wa mpatta wanaararu wa nyooloko ni wa anaattuuttu." 
Revelation8:11 Nsina na ethenyeeri ti Absinto. Vano mpatta wanaararu wa maahi waathatuwa woowaawa, ni ancipale yaahookhwa niwoko na maahi yaathatungwe oowaawa." 
Revelation8:12 Ndyelo anaaxexe aahiipa nipalapattanawe, ni mpatta wanaararu wa nsuwa, wa mweeri, ni wa ithenyeeri waamaniwa, moota wooweera mpatta wanaararuwaaya waariipa ni mpatta wanaararu wa othana ni wa ohiyu khawaanre." 
Revelation8:13 Miyo kiwehaka hiihaale, kaamwiiwa xaaka aavamve eriyari ya erimu, eeraka ni nsu ntotokotoko: “Ii! Ii! Ii! Anoohaawa yaawo ankhala elapo ya vathi niwoko na oruma wa mapalapatta a andyelo araru akina ahanle vakhaani wiipiwa!”" 
Revelation9:1 Ndyelo anaathanu aahiipa nipalapattanawe, ni kaahoona ethenyeeri yaamorenle vathi ekhumaka wiirimu. Ethenyeeri yaavahiwa exaavi ya ehime yoowiixera*." 
Revelation9:2 Ehulakaru ehime yoowiixera*, waatthuwa vaavaale mwiixi, ntoko wa niikho ntokotokoxa. Nsuwa ni wiirimu waariipa niwoko na mwiixi waatthuwa wa ehime yoowiixera*." 
Revelation9:3 Wa mwiixi ole saakhuma misoope saarwiiye mweelaponi, ni saavahiwe ikuru, ntoko ikuru sa awalisi a mweelaponi." 
Revelation9:4 Iyo saalamuliwa weera sihinanarihe hata malaxi a elapo ya vathi, naari nyiri, hoye hoye itthu sikina sa ntuphini, mene paahi atthu yahaakhanleno eneneero ya Muluku vayuuciniwaya." 
Revelation9:5 Khasaavahiwe ikuru soowiiva, mene aani, weera saahasule wa nyeeri mithanu. Vano, ohasuliwa eneeraaya ehasuliwe ori ntoko ohaawa wa mutthu aalummwaka ni walisi." 
Revelation9:6 Wa mahuku awo, atthu eniyaasaase okhwa, mene kheerwa ephwanya; eniihaawele okhwa, mene okhwa oniwaatthawe yaawo." 
Revelation9:7 Misoope saalikana ni ikavalu* soorehereriwa weera siwane ekhotto. Mmurumwaya saakhalano etthu yoolikana ni ecireemba ya eyuuma yoorikaxa, ni ekhovaaya yaalikana ni ekhove ya mutthu." 
Revelation9:8 Mayihaaya yaari ntoko mayihi a asithiyana, ni maino ntoko maino a mwatto." 
Revelation9:9 Saakhalano etthu yoowiixaakihera ekakasa ntoko yoowiixaakihera ekakasa ya eyuuma, ni oruma wa mapuphaaya waari ntoko oruma wa ikavalu* ni ikaaro sa ikavalu* sincipale sitthimakelaka okhottoni." 
Revelation9:10 Saakhalano nyiila ni mipuule ntoko sa awalisi, ni nyiilasaya saakhalano ikuru soowaahasula atthu wa nyeeri mithanu." 
Revelation9:11 Saakhalano mwene ori ndyelo a ehime yoowiixera*, nsinanawe vaHeberi ti Abadoni ni vaGrego orino nsina na Apoliyoni." 
Revelation9:12 Ii! Ohaawa woopacera woovira. Ohaawa miili ohanle okhumelela. 
Revelation9:13 Ndyelo anaathannamosa aahiipa nipalapattanawe, ni kaahiiwa nsu nimoha naakhumelela munnyakani valtaarini* a eyuuma yoorikaxa nri ohoolo wa Muluku." 
Revelation9:14 Nno naamweerela ndyelo anaathannamosa aarino nipalapatta: “Waataphule andyelo axexe atthukiwe wa mooloko mutokweene Efratesi.” 
Revelation9:15 Andyelo axexe yaarehereriwe wa ehuhu, nihuku, mweeri ni eyaakha ele aataphuliwa weera yiive mpatta wanaararu wa atthu." 
Revelation9:16 Waatta wa anakhotto yeettiha ikavalu* waari wincipalexa. Kaahiiwa waatta iwe. 
Revelation9:17 Ikavalu* ni anamweettiha kaawoonnaaka kireene mMunepani yaakhalano ekhaleloweene ela: Yowiixaakiheraaya ekakasa yaari yooxeera ntoko mooro ni yooriipela ni yancaano ntoko enxofre*. Nyuru sa ikavalu* saalikana ni nyuru sa amwatto, ni mmwaanomwaya waakhuma mooro, mwiixi ni enxofre*." 
Revelation9:18 Mpatta wanaararu wa atthu waahookhwa niwoko na sohooxa seiya tthaaru sa mooro, mwiixi ni enxofre* saakhumme mmwaanomwaya." 
Revelation9:19 Ikuru sa ikavalu* saari mmwaanomwaya ni mmiilanimwaya, niwoko miilasaya saari ntoko inowa, ni saakhalano nyuru mwa seiyo saananarihaayano." 
Revelation9:20 Yaawo yaahanle ehiiviwe ni sohooxa iye, waarookhalaru hiiho, khayaarukunxale murimaaya wa miteko sa matataaya. Awo khayaahiyale olapa minepa soonanara ni miluku sikina sa iyuuma soorikaxa soohiyanahiyana; sa maluku ni sa nyiri; seiyo sahaawera woona, wiiwa, naari weetta." 
Revelation9:21 Khayaarukunxaletho murimaaya wa omwiiva mutthu, wa okhwiraaya, wa olavilavaaya, naari wa soowiiyasaya." 
Revelation10:1 Vano kaamoona ndyelo mukina oolipa akhuruwaka wiirimu, areene munihutteni ni muura vamuruwawe. Ekhovaawe yaari ntoko nsuwa, ni nyettosawe saari ntoko amarimbu a mooro." 
Revelation10:2 Aavarela elivuru ekhaanene yoohuleya mmatatanimwawe. Aahiikaathi mphareiyani nnaawonawe na moono mulopwana ni nnaawonawe nikina vatthayani," 
Revelation10:3 ni aakhuwela ni nsu ntokotoko naalikana murika wa mwatto. Akhuwelakaru, itari ithannapiili saaruma." 
Revelation10:4 Sirumakaru itari ithannapiili, miyo kaatthuna olepa, mene kaahiiwa nsu nimoha na wiirimu neeraka: “Ngwale seiyo itari ithannapiili sihimalaaya ni muhilepe.”" 
Revelation10:5 Vano, ndyelo kaamoonnaaka eemenleene mphareiyani ni vatthayani, aaheemexa ntatanawe na moono mulopwana" 
Revelation10:6 ni aamulipela Yoole onkhala wa mahuku oohimala, Yoole opattuxale wiirimu ni sootheene siri mwemmo, elapo ni sootheene siri mwemmo ni ephareiya ni sootheene siri mwemmo, eeraka: “Khoorwa opisatho." 
Revelation10:7 Mahukutho ndyelo anaathanneeli aneeraawe iipe nipalapattanawe nnikwaniheriwe ntikhinelo na Muluku, ntoko Owo aaleenlaawe arumeiyaawe, maprofeeti.”" 
Revelation10:8 Vano naakuulumela veeli nsu kiiwalaaka nuulumaka wiirimu, neeraka: “Murowe, mwakuxe elivuru yoohuleya eri mmatatani mwa ndyelo eemenle mphareiyani ni vatthayani.”" 
Revelation10:9 Hiiho kaarowa wa ndyelo ni kaamvekela weera akivahe elivuru ekhaanene. Owo aakeerela: “Mukuxeke ni mukhuureke! Eyo eniiwaawihe mmirimanimwanyu, mene eniicoocowe mmwaanomwanyu ntoko oravo.”" 
Revelation10:10 Kaakuxa elivuru ekhaanene mmatatani mwa ndyelo, kinakhuura. Yaakisiva miyo mmwaanomwaka yoocoocowa, ntoko oravo, mene kikhuurakaru, mmirimwanimwaka waawaawihiwa." 
Revelation10:11 Vano kaaheereliwa: “Ontthuneya weera nyuwo muthaliheretho mwaha wa miloko, ilapo, muulumo ni mamwene mancipale.”" 
Revelation11:1 Kaavahiwa ettheere yoolikana ni ekopo weera kiphime ni kaaheereliwa: “Murowe ni mwaphime Empa ya Muluku ni altaari*, ni mwawaalikele anamalapa ari weiwo." 
Revelation11:2 Mwahiyeke nipuwa na vaate wa Empa ya Muluku, muhiphime, niwoko nno avahiwe amalapo. Awo eniinyikale esidade yootteela wa nyeeri miloko mixexe ni miili." 
Revelation11:3 Nkaavahe ikuru anamoonaaka eeli, ni awo eniithalihere otthunawaka wa mahuku 1 260, ewanreene esaakho ya olalamika." 
Revelation11:4 Awo ari nyiri miili sa sooliveira* ni iyuuma soorikaxa piili sirino iveela sinkhala ohoolo wa Apwiya a elapo. 
Revelation11:5 Akhala mukina ontthuna waananariha, mmwaanomwaya onuukhume mooro oneera waahise amwiittanaaya. Awo antthuna weerera waapaka yoonanara, eniikhwe mooteene yoowo." 
Revelation11:6 Asilopwana ala aakhalano ikuru soowala wiirimu, moota wooweera ehirupe epula ehuhu eneeraaya ethalihereke otthuna wa Muluku ni ikuru sootatuxa maahi ephome ni soomana elapo ni soohooxa sootheene sakhalaru imaara eneeraaya etthune." 
Revelation11:7 Awo yaamalihaka onamoonaaya, enama ya mmunepani enrweela ngwiixerani eniyaawanane, eniyaawine ni eniiwiive." 
Revelation11:8 Mittembosaya nsiriheliwe mmuseweni mutokweene wa esidade etokotoko, mwa yeeyo eniitthaniwa moota wa mmunepani Sodoma ni Exipitu, weiwo athomeiwaayatho Apwiyaaya." 
Revelation11:9 Wookwana mahuku mararu ni eriyari emoha ya nihuku atthu a miloko, ipuumba, muulumo ni ilapo sootheene eniiwehawehe mittembosaya, ni awo khaanrowa otthunihera weera mittembosaya sivithiwe mmahiyeni." 
Revelation11:10 Atthu ankhala mweelaponi eniihakalale niwoko na seiyo, ni eniipake ifesta, evahanaka samahala mukina ni mukhwaawe, niwoko anamoona eeli awo yaahaakacamiha atthu ankhala mweelaponi." 
Revelation11:11 Evirakatho mahuku mararu ni eriyari emoha ya nihuku, wiiseelela wa okumi wa Muluku waahaavolowa ni awo yaaheemela, ni woova otokotoko waahaamorela yaale yaawoonne." 
Revelation11:12 Vano awo yaahiiwa nsu ntokotoko na wiirimu naaweerenle: “Ngweleke, ngweeke nno.” Awo yaawela munihutteni mpaka wiirimu amwiittanaya yaawehaka." 
Revelation11:13 Ehuhuweene yeele emoharu waakhala otetereya otokotoko ni mpatta wanaamuloko wa esidade waahononeya. Atthu macira miloko mathannameeli yaahookhwa mootetereyani wa elapo. Atthu yaahanle ni okumi yaahoova vancipale ni yaamvuwiha Muluku a wiirimu. 
Revelation11:14 Ii! Ohaawa wanaaveeli woovira; wanaararu onuurwe woowaakuveya. 
Revelation11:15 Ndyelo anaathanneeli aahiipa nipalapattanawe, ni yaakhumelela masu matokotoko wiirimu, yeeraka: “Omwene wa elapo ya vathi woothatuwa omwene wa Apwiyaahu ni wa Kristuwaawe, ni Awo eniilamule mahuku ootheene.”" 
Revelation11:16 Asitokweene miloko miili naaxexe yaakilaathiye vahiceniwaya ohoolo wa Muluku yaahuuramiha ikhovesaya mpaka vathi, enamulapa Muluku," 
Revelation11:17 yeeraka: “Nnootthapelani Nyuwo, Apwiya Muluku a ikuru sootheene muri ni mwaari, niwoko mookuxa ikurusanyu sitokotoko ni moopacera olamula." 
Revelation11:18 Amalapo yaanyoonyiwa; ni isarasanyu soophiya. Yoophiya ehuhu yoowaathoriha akhwiiye ni yoowaatthuvela arumeiyaanyu, maprofeeti ni ootteelaanyu ni yaawo anoova Nsinananyu –asikhaani ni asitokweene – ni yoowaaphwata yaawo amphwata elapo.”" 
Revelation11:19 Vano yoohuliwa Empa ya Muluku wiirimu, ni yaahooniwa mwemmwe Arka* a wiiraanawawe. Waakhala overunya, oruma, itari, otetereya wa elapo ni maralala matokotoko." 
Revelation12:1 Ni eneneero etokotoko ni yootikhiniheya yaahooneya wiirimu: muthiyana awanreene nsuwa, ni mweeri vathi wa inaawosawe ni ecireemba ya ithenyeeri muloko ni piili mmurumwawe." 
Revelation12:2 Owo aarupala ni aakhuwela ni ovoreiya, niwoko aahanle vakhaani oyara." 
Revelation12:3 Yaahooneya wiirimu eneneero ekina: edrakoni* etokotoko yooxeera yaarino nyuru mithannamiili ni manyaka muloko, ereeneno nyurusaya icireemba ithannapiili." 
Revelation12:4 Mwiilaaya waahiipurulela mpatta wanaararu wa ithenyeeri sa wiirimu. Edrakoni* yaaheemela ohoolo wa muthiyana aahanle vakhaani oyara weera emukhuure mwaana mulopwana ehuhu eeraawe ayariwe. 
Revelation12:5 Owo aamuyanre mwaana mulopwana, mwa yoowo eera alamuleke ilapo sootheene ni ekopo ya eyuuma. Mwanawe aawatuliwa aronghiwaka wa Muluku ni wa ehicaawe." 
Revelation12:6 Muthiyana aatthawela munikareni, wa nipuro aareherereliwaawe ni Muluku weera weiwo acihiwe ni Muluku mahuku 1 260." 
Revelation12:7 Vano, yaakhala ekhotto wiirimu. Mikhayeli ni andyelowaawe yaawana ni edrakoni* ni edrakoni* vamoha ni andyelowaaya yaawanatho." 
Revelation12:8 Khayaawenretho, ni hiiho yaayeleela nipuronaya wiirimu." 
Revelation12:9 Edrakoni* etokotoko yaavonyeriwa vaate, enoweene yeele ya khalayi yiitthaniwa Diyabu*, hoye hoye Satana enlokottha elapo yootheene. Eyo vamoha ni andyelowaaya yaavonyeriwa elapo ya vathi." 
Revelation12:10 Kaahiiwa nsu ntokotoko na wiirimu neera: “Vano woophiya ovuluwa, ikuru ni omwene wa Mulukwaahu, ni olamula wa Kristuwaawe, niwoko aavonyeriwa vaate namoothera a axunnihu, mwa yoowo ongwoothera axunnihu ohoolo wa Muluku othana ni ohiyu." 
Revelation12:11 Awo yaamuwina ni ephome ya Eputtiputthi, ni ni masu a onamoona akhalenlaaya. Awo khayaakhoontte oleva okumaaya asineenaaya." 
Revelation12:12 Tivawo, wiirimu, muhakalale ni yaawotho ankhala mwemmo! Ii! Enoohaawa, elapo ni ephareiya, niwoko Diyabu* ohookhuruwelani nyuwo! Owo oonyoonyiwa vancipale, niwoko oosuwela weera erino ehuhu vakhaani." 
Revelation12:13 Yoonakaru edrakoni* weera yaavonyeriwa vathi, yaapacera omusoonda muthiyana ole aamuyanre mwaana mulopwana." 
Revelation12:14 Aavahiwa muthiyana mapupha meeli a xaaka mutokotoko weera owo awere ovava mpaka nipuro aareherereliwaawe munikareni, weiwo eeraawe acihiwe ehuhu, ihuhu ni eriyari ya ehuhu, ottaiwene wa enowa." 
Revelation12:15 Vano enowa yaarapheela mmwaanomwaya maahi ntoko mooloko ottuli wa muthiyana weera akumburuliwe ni maahi a mooloko ole. 
Revelation12:16 Wa soothesene, etthaya yaamukhavihera muthiyana ole, ehulaka eyanowaaya ni emiraka mooloko yoowo edrakoni* yaarapheiyaaya mmwaanomwaya." 
Revelation12:17 Edrakoni* yaamunyoonyeriwa muthiyana ole ni yaavenya weera awane ni yaale a ekhapiraawe, yaawo aniiwelela malamulo a Muluku ni amvarexexa nnenesene onamoona wa Yeesu." 
Revelation12:18 Vano edrakoni* yaaheemela mukerekhere ephareiya. 
Revelation13:1 Kaahoona enama ya mmunepani emoha yaakhumale mphareiyani. Yaarino manyaka muloko ni nyuru mithannamiili ni icireemba muloko mmanyakanimwaya, ni khula muru waarino nsina nooveiha." 
Revelation13:2 Enama ya mmunepani koonnaaka yaalikana ni havara, mene yaarino inaawo ntoko inaawo sa ursu* ni eyano ntoko eyano ya mwatto. Edrakoni* yaavaha enama ele ikurusaya, ehicaaya ni owerawaya otokotoko." 
Revelation13:3 Muru mmoha wa enama ya mmunepani waavulalihiwa ntoko waari mookhwa, mene nikhwatta na okhwa nne naavolihiwa. Elapo yootheene yaatikhina ni yaatthara enama ya mmunepani." 
Revelation13:4 Yaakokhorela edrakoni* yaavanghaaya ikuru wa enama ele ni yaakokhorelatho enama ele, yeeraka: “Taani onlikana ni enama ya mmunepani? Taani ongwera owanano yeela?”" 
Revelation13:5 Enama ele yaavahiwa eyano weera elaleiye masu oowiixoona ni ooveiha, ni ikuru weera elamule nyeeri miloko mixexe ni miili." 
Revelation13:6 Yaahula eyanowaaya weera emuveihe Muluku, ni weera eruwane Nsinanawe ni etabernaakulu* ni yaawo ankhala wiirimu." 
Revelation13:7 Yaavahiwa ikuru weera yaawaneno ekhotto ootteela ni yaawine. Yaavahiwatho ikuru ni ipuumba, miloko, muulumo ni ilapo sootheene." 
Revelation13:8 Atthu ootheene ankhala elapo ya vathi eniilape enama ele, ootheene yaawo masinaaya khaalempwale okhuma ephattuwelo ya elapo mulivuruni ya okumi ya Eputtiputthi yiiviwe." 
Revelation13:9 Yaawo arino maaru, yiiwe!" 
Revelation13:10 Akhala mutthu onrowa okaliposo, okaliposo anaarowe. Akhala mukina aneera iiviwe ni ekatana, aniiviwe ni ekatana. Va ontthuneya ootteela ovilela moota woororomeleya." 
Revelation13:11 Vano kaahoona enama ya mmunepani ekina, evenyaka mweelaponi ni manyaka meeli ntoko eputtiputthi, mene yuulumale ntoko edrakoni*." 
Revelation13:12 Yaanyeserera ikuru sootheene sa enama yoopacera mwa nsinanaya, ni yaahaanyeserera atthu ootheene a elapo ya vathi weera elapeke enama yoopacera, mwa yeeyo nikhwattanaya naavolihiwa." 
Revelation13:13 Yaawera opaka ineneero sitokotoko, mpaka yaakuruxa mooro wiirimu mpaka vathi vamaithoni wa atthu." 
Revelation13:14 Niwoko na ineneero yaatthuniheriwaaya opaka mwa nsina na enama yoopacera, eyo yaahaalokottha atthu a elapo ya vathi. Yaahaalamulela opaka ecaambulo ya enama yoopacera weera ettittimihe enama ele yaavulalihiwe ni ekatana, nitho yaalamihiwe." 
Revelation13:15 Yaavahiwa ikuru weera evahe omumula ecaambulo ya enama yoopacera, moota wooweera eyo ewere wuuluma ni ewiive ootheene yaawo ankhootta olapa ecaambuloweene yeele." 
Revelation13:16 Yaahaanyesereratho weera ootheene, asikhaani ni asitokweene, oopuha ni oohaawa, maneethi ni ipottha, yaakhele eneneero emoha muntatani na moono mulopwana, hoye hoye vayuucini" 
Revelation13:17 weera khaawo eera awere othuma, naari othumiha, ahikhanleno eneneero eri nsina na enama ya mmunepani, hoye hoye nuumuru na nsinanaya." 
Revelation13:18 Va sintthuneya miruku. Yoole orino miruku, oonelele nuumuru na enama, niwoko nri nuumuru na mutthu. Nuumurunaya nri 666." 
Revelation14:1 Vano kaaweha, ni ohoolowaka yaaheemela Eputtiputthi vamwaakoni oSiyoni, ni vamoha ni Yeeyo atthu 144 000, vayuuciniwaya yaalempwale nsina na Eputtiputthi ni na Atithaya." 
Revelation14:2 Kaahiiwa oruma wiirimu ntoko oruma wa maahi mancipale ni etari etokotoko. Oruma kiiwalaaka waari ntoko oruma wa anamakita ewiipaka amakitaaya. 
Revelation14:3 Awo yaahiipa ecipo enyowani ohoolo wa ehice, ikhalelo ixexe ni asitokweene. Khaawo yaawera oxuttera ecipo ele, ehikhanle atthu 144 000, mwa yaawo yoopoliwe mweelaponi." 
Revelation14:4 Awo ti yaawo ahiivalihale ni asithiyana, niwoko khayaakonanne asithiyana, ni antthara Eputtiputthi weiwo entthunaaya orowa. Yaathummwale variyari wa atthu ni yaavahiwa wa Muluku ni Eputtiputthi ntoko mpatta woopacera wa yaale oororomela." 
Revelation14:5 Hata yoowootha emoha khayaaphwanyiwe mmwaanomwaya – ari oohikhalano nthowa. 
Revelation14:6 Vano kaamoona ndyelo mukina avavaka wiirimu, areeneno masu ooreeraxa oohimala weera aalaleere atthu ankhala elapo ya vathi, wa ilapo, ipuumba, muulumo ni miloko sootheene." 
Revelation14:7 Owo aaheera ni nsu ntokotoko: “Mmoove Muluku ni mumvuwihe, niwoko yoophiya ehuhu ya othorihawawe. Munlape Yoole opanke erimu, etthaya, ephareiya ni anaattuuttu a maahi.”" 
Revelation14:8 Ndyelo anaaveeli aamutthara eeraka: “Oomora, oomora Babiloniya mutokweene, owurihale ilapo sootheene eviinyu ya soohaawela sa olavilavaaya!”" 
Revelation14:9 Ndyelo anaararu ahaatthara, akhuwelaka ni nsu ntokotoko: “Akhala mukina onlapa enama ya mmunepani ni ecaambulowaaya, ni aakhela eneneerowaaya vayuucini, naari mmatatani," 
Revelation14:10 anaawuretho eviinyu ya isara sa Muluku, mwa yeeyo emiiniwe yoohitakanseriwa ekoomixi ya isarasawe. Anaattaruxiwe ni enxofre* emvarela ohoolo wa andyelo ootteela ni Eputtiputthi." 
Revelation14:11 Mwiixi wa ottaruxiwa wa atthweene yaawo onuutthuwe mahuku ootheene oohimala. Wa ootheene yaawo anlapa enama ya mmunepani ni ecaambulowaaya, ni wa yaale anaakhela eneneero ya nsinanaya, khoowowo wiitthuuwa othana ni ohiyu." 
Revelation14:12 Va ontthuneya weera evilele ootteela aniiwelela malamulo a Muluku, ni animutthara Yeesu moota woororomeleya." 
Revelation14:13 Vano kaahiiwa nsu na wiirimu neeraka: “Mulepe. Ooreelihiwa ti akhwiiye ankhwa mwa Apwiya okhuma vaanaano vaava mpaka ohoolo.” “Aani,” oneera Munepa, “Awo eniyiitthuuwe okhulumuwawaya, niwoko mitekosaya nsaatthare." 
Revelation14:14 Kaaweha, ni ohoolowaka naari nihutte nootteela, ni akilaathiyeene munihutteni Mukina oolikana ni Mwaana a mutthu, areeneno vamuruwawe ecireemba ya eyuuma yoorikaxa ni mmatatanimwawe ecikwaakhwa yoowiithaxa." 
Revelation14:15 Vano ndyelo mukina aakhuma wa Empa ya Muluku aamukhuwelela ni nsu ntokotoko Yoole aakilaathiye munihutteni, eeraka: “Mukuxe ecikwaakhwaanyu ni muhephe, niwoko ehuhu ya ohepha yoophiya, ni soohepha sa mweelaponi sohiitthwa." 
Revelation14:16 Hiiho Yoole aakilaathiye munihutteni aakuxa ecikwaakhwaawe ni aahepha elapo ya vathi. 
Revelation14:17 Ndyelo mukina aakhuma wa Empa ya Muluku wiirimu areenenotho ecikwaakhwa yoowiitha. 
Revelation14:18 Ni ndyelo mukinatho orino ikuru mmooroni aakhuma valtaarini*, ni aamukhuwelela yoole mukina aarino ecikwaakhwa yoowiitha, eeraka: “Mukuxe ecikwaakhwaanyu yoowiitha ni muthukumanye mikonkha sa iwuuva* sa evideira* sa mweelaponi, niwoko iwuuvasaya sohiitthwa.”" 
Revelation14:19 Ndyelo aahepha elapo ya vathi ni ecikwaakhwaawe, ni aathukumanya iwuuva*, anavonyera vanipuroni ntokotoko noowaama iwuuva* na isara sa Muluku." 
Revelation14:20 Iyo saanyikalasiwa vanipuroni nne okerekhere wa esidade, ni yaakhuma ephome vanipuroni nne, wiixerawene wookwana muxiko wa ikavalu*, orakamawaya ikolomeetru* macira mararu." 
Revelation15:1 Kaahoona wiirimu eneneero ekina etokotoko yootikhiniheya: andyelo athanneeli yaarino soohooxa ithannapiili sookisera, niwoko ni iyo sinkwanihereya isara sa Muluku." 
Revelation15:2 Kaahoona etthu ekina yoolikana ni ephareiya ya ningaraasi yootakanseriwa ni mooro, ni mukerekheremwaya yaawo yaawinne enama ya mmunepani ni ecaambulowaaya ni nuumuru na nsinanaya. Awo yaahaakuxa amakita yaavahiwaaya ni Muluku," 
Revelation15:3 ni yaahiipa ecipo ya Moisesi, murumeiyi a Muluku, ni ecipo ya Eputtiputthi: “Sitokotoko ni sootikhiniheya siri mitekosanyu, Apwiya Muluku a ikuru sootheene. Soowookowa ni sa ekhaikhai siri iphirosanyu, Mwene a ilapo." 
Revelation15:4 Taani aneera ahiwooveni, Apwiya, ni aneera ahivuwihe Nsinananyu? Vano, Nyuwo paahi ti ootteela. Ilapo sootheene nsirwe ni nsilape ohoolowanyu, niwoko mitekosanyu sa ekhaikhai sohooniheriwa.”" 
Revelation15:5 Vahoolowaya kaaweha, ni yaahuleiya wiirimu Empa ya Muluku, etabernaakulu* ya onamoona." 
Revelation15:6 Yaakhuma wa Empa ya Muluku andyelo athanneeli yaarino soohooxa ithannapiili. Awo ewanreene mikaandyo sootteela ni soowaara, ni yaahiitthukela vakakasani ni ekuwo yoorikaxa." 
Revelation15:7 Vano emoha ya ikhalelo sa okumi ixexe yaahaavaha andyelo athanneeli ikoomixi ithannapiili sa eyuuma yoorikaxa soosareya ni isara sa Muluku onkhala mahuku ootheene oohimala. 
Revelation15:8 Empa ya Muluku yaasareya mwiixi wa ovuwa wa Muluku ni ikurusawe, ni khaawo aawera ovolowa Mpaani mmwe, sihinaaye okwanela soohooxa ithannapiili sa andyelo athanneeli." 
Revelation16:1 Vano kaahiiwa nsu ntokotoko naarweela wa Empa ya Muluku, niweerelaka andyelo athanneeli: “Murowe, mwarihele vatthayani ikoomixi ithannapiili sa isara sa Muluku.”" 
Revelation16:2 Ndyelo oopacera aarowa ni aarihela vathi ekoomixi, ni yaakhumelela makhwatta oonanara ni oovoreiyaxa, mwa yaale yaarino eneneero ya enama ya mmunepani ni yaalapa ecaambulowaaya." 
Revelation16:3 Ndyelo anaaveeli aarihela mphareiyani ekoomixaawe, ni eyo yaathatuwa ephome ntoko ya namakhwa, ni itthu sootheene sa okumi sa mphareiyani saahookhwa." 
Revelation16:4 Ndyelo anaararu aarihela nnyoolokoni ni anaattuuttu a maahi ekoomixaawe, ni awo yaathatuwa ephome." 
Revelation16:5 Vano kaamwiiwa ndyelo aarino ikuru sa maahi ootheene, eeraka: “Othorihawanyu ti wa ekhaikhai, Nyuwo muri ni mwaari, Ootteela," 
Revelation16:6 hapo awo avuuvihale ephome ya atthu oororomela ni maprofeeti, ni vano Nyuwo mohaawuriha ephome, ntoko awo aphwanenlaaya.”" 
Revelation16:7 Kaawiiwa altaari* yaakhulaka: “Aani, Apwiya Muluku a ikuru sootheene, othorihawanyu ti wa ekhaikhai ni woororomeleya.”" 
Revelation16:8 Ndyelo anaaxexe aarihela vansuwani ekoomixaawe, ni naavahiwa nsuwa ikuru weera naahise atthu ni mooro." 
Revelation16:9 Awo yaahisiwa ni oviha otokotoko ni yaalapha Nsina na Muluku orino ikuru sa soohooxa iya. Wa soothesene, yaakhootta orukunxa murimaaya, naari omvuwiha Muluku." 
Revelation16:10 Ndyelo anaathanu aarihela ekoomixaawe vahiceni ya enama ya mmunepani, ni omwene waakhala mpiphini. Atthu yaakhuura malumaaya asineenaaya, niwoko noowoona ovoreiya," 
Revelation16:11 ni yaamveiha Muluku a wiirimu niwoko na ovoreiyawaya ni makhwattaaya. Wa soothesene, yaakhootta orukunxa murimaaya wa mitekosaya." 
Revelation16:12 Ndyelo anaathannamosa aarihela mmoolokoni mutokweene Efratesi ekoomixaawe, ni maahaaya yaawelela weera yaarehererele ephiro mamwene anrweela ninkhuma nsuwa." 
Revelation16:13 Vano kaahoona sikumaka minepa soonanara miraru soolikana ni anaphulu mmwaanomwaya edrakoni*, enama ya mmunepani ni mprofeeti oolokottha." 
Revelation16:14 Siri minepa soonanara simpaka ineneero sootikhiniheya. Iyo sinrowa wa mamwene ootheene a elapo ya vathi, weera saathukumanyihere ekhotto ya nihuku ntokweene na Muluku a ikuru sootheene." 
Revelation16:15 “Moone, kingwa ntoko namwiiya! Ooreelihiwa ti yoole ongwehaweha mmunepani, ni onthokorora ikuwosawe, weera aheette woohiwara, ni weera sihooniwe soowuulihasawe muru.”" 
Revelation16:16 Vano saahaathukumanyiha mamwene vanipuroni niitthaniwa vaHeberi Harmagedoni*. 
Revelation16:17 Ndyelo anaathanneeli aarihela musulu ekoomixaawe, ni wa Empa ya Muluku naakhuma nsu ntokotoko naarweela vahiceni, neeraka: “Yoopakiwa.”" 
Revelation16:18 Waakhala overunya, oruma, itari ni otetereya otokotoko wa elapo. Khoonakhumelele otetereya wa elapo ntoko wu okhuma apattuxiwakaru mutthu mweelaponi." 
Revelation16:19 Esidade etokotoko yaakawanyiwa mipatta miraru, ni isidade sa ilapo saamora. Muluku aamuupuwelela Babiloniya mutokweene ni aamvaha ekoomixi ya eviinyu ya isara sa isikulasawe." 
Revelation16:20 Icirumba sootheene saatthawa, ni nyaako sootheene khasawereya ophwanyiwa." 
Revelation16:21 Maralala matokweene wiirimu yaahaamorela atthu, maluku matokotoko a maralala, nilemenleene nimoha-nimoha ikiilu* miloko miraru. Atthu yaamveiha Muluku niwoko na maralala, niwoko yoohooxa ele yaari yoowoopihaxa." 
Revelation17:1 Mmoha a andyelo yaarino ikoomixi ithannapiili aakaattamela, anakeerela: “Ngweeke, kinoowooniherani othorihiwa wa puuta mutokotoko okilaathiye mmaahini mancipale," 
Revelation17:2 mwa yoowo mamwene a elapo ya vathi araruwannaayano. Atthu a elapo ya vathi yaahapaliwa ni eviinyu ya oraruwawawe.” 
Revelation17:3 Vano ndyelo aakikuxa mMunepani akironghaka munikareni. Weiwo kaamoona muthiyana, awenleene enama yooxeera ya mmunepani, esareiyeene masina ooveiha ni yaarino nyuru mitannamiili ni manyaka muloko." 
Revelation17:4 Muthiyana aawanre ikuwo sakanka ni sooxeera, aphwaneliweene eyuuma yoorikaxa, maluku oorikaxa ni oowaaraxa. Aavarela mmatatanimwawe ekoomixi ya eyuuma yoorikaxa, yoosareya sootakhala ni ohitteela wa oraruwawawe." 
Revelation17:5 Vayuuciwawe yaakhala yoolempwa ela: “NTIKHINELO: BABILONIYA MUTOKWEENE, MAAYI A MAPUUTA NI A SOOTAKHALA SA ELAPO.”" 
Revelation17:6 Kaahoona weera muthiyana aahapaliwa ephome ya atthu ootteela, ephome ya anamoona a Yeesu. Kimoonakaru, kaatikhinaxa." 
Revelation17:7 Vano ndyelo aakeerela: “Heeni muntikhinaanyu nyuwo? Kinimoothaliherani ntikhinelo na muthiyana ola, ni na enama ya mmunepani erino nyuru mithannamiili ni manyaka muloko owo owenlaawe." 
Revelation17:8 Enama ele moonnaanyu yaari, vanotho kheehiyono, ni ehanle vakhaani okhuruwela ngwiixerani, erooke wooriheyani. Atthu a elapo ya vathi, mwa yaawo masinaaya ahilempwale mulivuruni ya okumi okhuma ephattuwelo ya elapo, eniitikhine yoonaka enama, niwoko eyo yaari, kheehiyono, nitho ehanle orwa." 
Revelation17:9 Va ontthuneya esuwelo ya miruku. Nyuru mithannamiili siri mattumuxa mathannameeli, mwa yaawo muthiyana okilaathenlaawe." 
Revelation17:10 Siritho mamwene mathannameeli. Mathanu yaamora, mmoha ookhala ni mukina khanaaye okhumelela, mene aphiya, ontthuneya okhala ehuhu vakhaani." 
Revelation17:11 Enama ya mmunepani yaari, ni vano kheehiyono, ti mwene anaathannararu. Owo ori a mathannameeli ni anaarowe oriheya." 
Revelation17:12 Manyaka muloko moonnaanyu ari mamwene muloko ahinaaye waakhela olamula, mene eniyaakhele wa ewoora emoha ikuru sa mwene vamoha ni enama ya mmunepani." 
Revelation17:13 Awo arino ohaawela omoharu paahi ni eniivahe ikurusaya ni olamulawaya enama ya mmunepani. 
Revelation17:14 Eniiwane ni Eputtiputthi, mene Eputtiputthi eniiwine, niwoko eri Apwiya a asipwiiya ni Mwene a mamwene ni oowiitthaniwaaya, oothanliwaaya ni oororomeleyaaya eniikhale vamoha ni Eyo.”" 
Revelation17:15 Vano ndyelo aakeerela: “Maahi mancipale moonnaanyu okilaathiyaawe puuta, siri miloko, atthu ancipale, ilapo ni muulumo." 
Revelation17:16 Enama ele ni manyaka muloko moonnaanyu eniimuthanye puuta. Iyo nsimuronghe mmilepeni, nsimuhiye oohiwara, nsikhuure erutthwaawe ni nsimuhise ni mooro," 
Revelation17:17 niwoko Muluku oohela mmurimanimwaya ohaawela opaka yeeyo ontthunaawe, aakhulelaka ovaha enama ele ikuru iyo sirinaaya weera elamule mpaka ekwaniheriwe masu a Muluku." 
Revelation17:18 Muthiyana mmoonnaanyu ti esidade etokweene enaalamula mamwene a elapo ya vathi.” 
Revelation18:1 Vahoolowaya kaamoona ndyelo mukina aakhuruwa wiirimu. Aarino ikuru sitokotoko, ni elapo yaamwaleeliwa ni waarawawe." 
Revelation18:2 Vano aakhuwela ni nsu noowera, eeraka: “Oomora, oomora Babiloniya mutokweene! Owo oothatuwa nipuro sinkhalaaya minepa soonanara, ntthawelo wa minepa soonanara sootheene, ntthawelo wa ipalame sootheene soohitteela ni soothanyeya," 
Revelation18:3 niwoko ilapo sootheene soowura eviinyu ya soohaawela sa oraruwawaya. Mamwene a elapo ya vathi aararuwano, ni ananakoso yaareela asineenaaya ni mihakhusawe soowaatta.”" 
Revelation18:4 Kaahiiwa nsu nikina wiirimu neeraka: “Muvenye mwa yoowo, mulokwaaka, weera nyuwo muhittheke vamoha ni yoowo, ni weera soohooxa sineera simmorele sihoophwanyeni nyuwo." 
Revelation18:5 Vano, soottheka sa Babiloniya sohaandyeerereya mpaka wiirimu, ni Muluku ohuupuwelela sootakhalasawe." 
Revelation18:6 Munlive ni nikhoobiri nenenenno; munlive veeli wa yeeyo opankaawe, mmwaandyeererele mipatta miili mwa ekoomixaawe mwaneenaawe." 
Revelation18:7 Muringoweene yoowo owo iivuwiheraaweno ni sooreela iivaherenraaweno, vano muvarele muteko muringo owo ophima ottaruxawawe ni soohooxasawe. Mmurimanimwawe owo aamwiivuwiha: ‘Kikilaathiye ntoko pwiyamwene; nkihiyono naamukhweli, ni nkirwa kilalamika.’" 
Revelation18:8 Tivawo vanihukuni nimoha paahi soohooxasawe sinoomphiyera: okhwa, olalamika ni etala. Owo anaahisiwe ni mooro, niwoko Apwiya Muluku animuthoriha ti a ikuru sootheene." 
Revelation18:9 Mamwene a elapo ya vathi ararungweno ni apunghe ni mihakhusawe yoona mwiixi wa ohisiwawawe, eniyiinle ni eniilalamike wa yoowo." 
Revelation18:10 Oowoopopihiwa niwoko na ottaruxiwawawe, eniikhale ottaiwene ni eniikhuwele yeeraka: “Ii! Ii! Enoohaawa, esidade etokweene, Babiloniya, esidade yoowera! Wa ewoora emoharu woophiya othorihiwawawo!" 
Revelation18:11 Ananakoso a elapo ya vathi eniyiinle ni eniilalamike niwoko na yoowo, eenre ahikhalaka onthumatho soothumihasaya:" 
Revelation18:12 soothumiha sa iyuuma soorikaxa, maluku oorikaxa ni maluku oowaaraxa, ekuwo ya eliinyu*, ikuwo sa kanka, saseda* ni sooxeera; moota wootheene wa mwiri woowunkhela; soopakiwa soohiyanahiyana sa maino a etthepo; mwiri woottittimiheyaxa, ebronze*, eyuuma ni maramore*;" 
Revelation18:13 soothumiha sa kanela*, sooreerela sooreeraxa, erubani*, makhura oowunkhelaxa, eviinyu, makhura wa sooliveira*, ephepa, etrigu, imombe, ikhondoolo, ikavalu*, ikaaro sa ikavalu*, ni erutthu ni okumi wa atthu." 
Revelation18:14 Awo eniyeere: ‘Soopwaha soowiima seiyo waahaawelaawo. Mihakhusawo ni soowaarasawo sootheene soolakaseya. Khasirwa siphwanyiwatho.’ 
Revelation18:15 Ananakoso a itthusene seiya yaapuhale ni mihakhusawe, eniikhale ottaiwene oowoopopiheya ni ottaruxiwawawe, ni eniyiinle ni eniilalamike," 
Revelation18:16 ekhuwelaka: ‘Ii! Ii! Enoohaawa, esidade etokweene, ewanreene ekuwo ya eliinyu*, yakanka ni yooxeera, yaaphwaneliwe ni eyuuma yoorikaxa, maluku oorikaxa ni maluku oowaaraxa!" 
Revelation18:17 Mwa ewoora emoharu, muhakhu mwincipale ole woohononiwa!’ Anamweettiha a makula ootheene, anamukwaha ootheene a mmakulani, anamiteko a makula ootheene ni ootheene amvara muteko mphareiyani eniikhale ottaiwene." 
Revelation18:18 Woowoona mwiixi wa ohisiwawawe, eniikhuwele: ‘Kheetonke okhala esidade ekina yoolikana ni esidade etokotoko ela’!" 
Revelation18:19 Eniihele ntthupi mmurumwaya, ni eniikhuwele, yiinlaka ni elalamikaka: ‘Ii! Ii! Enoohaawa, esidade etokweene, weiwo ootheene yaarino makula mphareiyani yaapuhaaya ni mihakhusaya! Wa ewoora emoharu eyo yoohononiwa." 
Revelation18:20 Muhakalale niwoko na yeeyo, wiirimu! Muhakalale, atthu ootteela, arummwa ni maprofeeti! Muluku oothoriha mooteene yoowo ntoko eyo yooreherenraayani.’”" 
Revelation18:21 Vano ndyelo oolipaxa mmoha aavenxa nluku ntokotoko naakhala ntoko wunnuwa wa nxilo ntokotoko, anavonyera mphareiyani, aneera: “Ni ikurusene seiya eniivonyeriwe vathi esidade etokweene Babiloniya, weera ehirwe ephwanyiwetho." 
Revelation18:22 Khoorwa wiiwiwa mwa weyo oruma wa anamakita ni anacipo, anampetta ni anamwiipa a mapalapatta. Kharwa aphwanyiwa mwa weyo naruso mmoha a yakhalaru eruso. Khoorwa wiiwiwa mwa weyo oruma wa nxilo." 
Revelation18:23 Khoorwa waara mwa weyo waara wa onyaari mmoha. Khanirwa niiwiwa mwa weyo nsu na namatthomera, naari namatthomeriwa. Ananakoswaawo yaari asitokweene a elapo ya vathi. Ilapo sootheene saalokotthiwa ni okhwiraawo." 
Revelation18:24 Mwa yeeyo yoophwanyiwa ephome ya maprofeeti ni ya ootteela ni ya ootheene yiiviwe mweelaponi.” 
Revelation19:1 Vahoolowaya kaahiiwa wiirimu etthu yoolikana ni onyakula wa atthu ancipale, ekhuwelaka: “Haleluya!* Ovuluwa, ovuwa ni ikuru siri sa Mulukwaahu," 
Revelation19:2 niwoko nthorihelonawe nri na ekhaikhai ni noororomeleya. Owo oomuthoriha puuta mutokweene onanaringhe elapo ya vathi ni oraruwawawe. Aahiinlela ikuhu ephome ya arumeiyaawe.” 
Revelation19:3 Ni yaakhuwelatho: “Haleluya!* Mwiixi onrwa mwa yoowo onnawela mahuku ootheene oohimala.” 
Revelation19:4 Asitokweene miloko miili naaxexe ni ikhalelo ixexe sa okumi saakokhora ni saamulapa Muluku aakilaathiye vahiceni ni saakhuwela: “Ame*! Haleluya!*” 
Revelation19:5 Vano naarweela vahiceni nsu nimoha, nikhuwelaka: “Munttottopele Mulukwaahu, nyuwo arumeiyaawe ootheene, nyuwo asikhaani ni asitokweene, mummoova!”" 
Revelation19:6 Kaahiiwa etthu yoolikana ni onyakula wa atthu ancipale, yoolikana ni oruma wa maahi mancipale ni itari sitokotoko, ekhuwelaka: “Haleluya*, niwoko Apwiya Mulukwaahu a ikuru sootheene anlamula." 
Revelation19:7 Nitteeliwe murima, nihakalale ni nimvuwihe, niwoko yoophiya ehuhu ya othelana wa Eputtiputthi, ni ootthomeriwaaya ohiireherera." 
Revelation19:8 Aavahiwa ekuwo yootteettheya, yoowaara ni yootteela weera aware.” Ekuwo yootteettheya eri miteko sa ekhaikhai sa atthu ootteela." 
Revelation19:9 Ndyelo aakeerela: “Mulepe: Ooreelihiwa ti oowiitthaneliwa efesta ya othelana wa Eputtiputthi.” Aaheeratho: “Ala ti masu a ekhaikhai a Muluku.” 
Revelation19:10 Kaamorela inaawosawe weera kimulape, mene owo aakeerela: “Muhipake yeeyo! Kiri murumeiyi ntoko nyuwo, ni ntoko axunninyu anlipihera moota woororomeleya onamoona wa Yeesu. Mmulape Muluku! Vano, okhalela onamoona mwaha wa Yeesu ti othalihera otthuna wa Muluku mmunepani.”" 
Revelation19:11 Kaahoona wiirimu ohuleiyeene ohoolowaka ni ekavalu* yootteela mwa yeeyo Namweettihaaya oniitthaniwa Oororomeleya ni Ekhaikhai. Owo onthoriha ni ongwana ni ekhaikhai. 
Revelation19:12 Maithwaawe ari ntoko malumi a mooro, ni mmurumwawe sookhala icireemba sincipale. Owo ookhalano nsina, mwa nenno khaawo onsuwela, ahikhanle mwaneenaawe." 
Revelation19:13 Aawara mukaandyo omiseriweene ni ephome ni nsinanawe ti Nsu na Muluku. 
Revelation19:14 Anakhotto ancipalexa a wiirimu yaamutthara, ewanreene ikuwo sootteettheya, sootteela, ni soohikhala malepa, ni ewenleene ikavalu* sootteela." 
Revelation19:15 Mmwaanomwawe enkhuma ekatana yoowiithaxa, mwa yeeyo anaavulaliheno miloko. “Owo anaalamule ni ekopo ya eyuuma.” Owo onnyikala iwuuva* sa eviinyu ya isara sa isikula sa Muluku a ikuru sootheene." 
Revelation19:16 Mmukaandyonimwawe ni vatakhwiniwawe noolempwa nsina nna: MWENE A MAMWENE NI APWIYA A ASIPWIIYA. 
Revelation19:17 Kaamoona ndyelo eemenleene vansuwani, aakhuwelelaka ni nsu ntokotoko apalame ootheene amvava eriyari erimu: “Ngwe, muthukumane wa efesta etokotoko ya Muluku" 
Revelation19:18 weera mukhuure enama ya mamwene, asitokweene a anakhotto, alipa a ikuru ni ya ikavalu* ni anamweettihaaya, enama ya ootheene: maneethi ni ipottha, asikhaani ni asitokweene.”" 
Revelation19:19 Vano kaahoona enama ya mmunepani ni mamwene a elapo ya vathi ni anakhottwaaya, ethukumanneene weera engwanane Yoole aawenle ekavalu* ni anakhottwaawe." 
Revelation19:20 Enamatho ele yaavariwa, nitho mprofeeti oolokottha aapanke ineneero sootikhiniheya mwa nsinanaya, mwa seiyo owo aalokotthannaawe yaawo yaarino eneneero ya enama ni yaalapa ecaambulowaaya. Ooweeli yaavonyeriwa ereene ni okumi vantthiyani na mooro omvarela ni enxofre*." 
Revelation19:21 Yaawo yaahanle yaahiiviwa ni ekatana yaakhuma mmwaano mwa Yoole aawenle ekavalu*. Ni apalame ootheene yaavona ni enamaaya. 
Revelation20:1 Kaamoona ndyelo akhuruwaka wiirimu, akuxaleene mmatatanimwawe exaavi ya ehime ya moowiixera* ni onyooro mutokotoko." 
Revelation20:2 Owo aatthuka edrakoni*, enowa ya khalayi eri Diyabu*, Satana, ni aamutthuka iyaakha macira muloko." 
Revelation20:3 Aamvonyera moowiixera, aawala ni aahiikaathi ewalelo* vasuluwaya, weera hiiho amooceelihe olokottha ilapo mpaka simale iyaakha macira muloko. Vahoolowaya ontthuneya weera owo ataphuliwe wa ehuhu vakhaani." 
Revelation20:4 Kaahoona ihice, mwa seiye yaakilaathenlaaya yaale yaavahiwe ikuru weera ethorihe. Kaahoona okumi wa yaawo yaahitiwe niwoko na onamoona wa Yeesu ni na masu a Muluku. Awo khayaalampe enama, hata ecaambulowaaya ni khayaakhenle eneneerowaaya vayuuci, naari mmatatani. Awo yaavenyerera ni yaalamula vamoha ni Kristu wa iyaakha macira muloko." 
Revelation20:5 Yaale yaahanle a akhwiiye khayaahokoleenle okhala ni okumi mpaka omala iyaakha macira muloko. Wu ti ovenyerera woopacera. 
Revelation20:6 Ooreelihiwa ni ootteela yaawo eniikhale a ovenyerera woopacera. Okhwa wanaaveeli khoonaawera yaawo; awo eniikhale asaserdoti* a Muluku ni a Kristu, ni eniilamule vamoha ni Yoowo wa iyaakha macira muloko." 
Revelation20:7 Saamalaka iyaakha macira muloko, Satana anaataphuliwe otthukiwawawe," 
Revelation20:8 ni anaavenye weera alokotthe ilapo siri mmaloothoni maxexe a elapo, eyo tiiyo Agogi ni Amagogi, weera aathukumanyere ekhotto. Waattawaya ori ntoko muhaava wa mukerekhere ephareiya." 
Revelation20:9 Awo yaaheetteetta mweelaponi yootheene ni yaarukureera ekwarteli ya atthu ootteela, esidade yoosiveleya, mene mooro waakhuruwa wiirimu ni waahaahisa." 
Revelation20:10 Diyabu* aalokottha aavonyeriwa vantthiyani na mooro omvarela ni enxofre*, weiwo yaavonyeriwaaya enama ya mmunepani ni mprofeeti oolokottha. Awo eniittaruxiwe othana ni ohiyu mahuku ootheene oohimala." 
Revelation20:11 Vahoolowaya kaahoona ehice etokoko yootteela, ni Yoole aakilaathiye. Elapo ni erimu yaatthawa vahoolowawe, ni nipuronaya khaniphwanyiwetho." 
Revelation20:12 Kaawoonatho akhwiiye – asitokweene ni asikhaani – yeemenleene ohoolo wa ehice, ni ilivuru saahuleya. Elivuru ekina yaahuleya, elivuru ya okumi. Akhwiiye yaathorihiwa mwaha wa mitekosaya, ntoko saalempwale mulivuruni." 
Revelation20:13 Ephareiya yaahaavaherera akhwiiye yaari mwemmo, ni okhwa ni Hadesi* yaahaavaherera akhwiiye yaari mwemmo, ni khula mutthu aathorihiwa mwaha wa mitekosawe." 
Revelation20:14 Okhwa ni Hadesi* saavonyeriwa vantthiyani na mooro. Ntthiya na mooro ti okhwa wanaaveeli. 
Revelation20:15 Nsina na mukina nahaaphwanyiwe mulivuruni ya okumi, owo aavonyeriwa vantthiyani na mooro." 
Revelation21:1 Vano kaahoona erimu enyowani, ni elapo enyowani, niwoko erimu ni elapo yoopacera yaavira, ni ephareiya yaahiya okhala." 
Revelation21:2 Kaahoona esidade yootteela, Yerusaleemu munyowani, yaakhuruwa wiirimu wa Muluku, yoorehereriwa ntoko ootthomeriwa oophwaneliwa wa iyaya." 
Revelation21:3 Kaahiiwa nsu ntokotoko naarweela vahiceni neeraka: “Vano etabernaakulu* ya Muluku eri ni atthu, ni Owo anaakhale ni yaawo. Awo eniikhale mulokwaawe ni Muluku muneenaawe anaakhale ni yaawo, ni anaakhaletho Mulukwaaya." 
Revelation21:4 Owo anuukutthe mmaithonimwaaya maithori ootheene. Khoorwa okhala okhwa, hata olalamika, hata wiinla, naari ovoreiya, niwoko itthu soopacera soovira." 
Revelation21:5 Yoole aakilaathiye vahiceni aaheera: “Kimpaka sinyowani itthu soothesene!” Nitho: “Mulepe yeeyo, niwoko masu ala ti a ekhaikhai ni oophwanela ororomeliwa.”" 
Revelation21:6 Aakeerelatho: “Yoopakiwa. Miyo ti Alfa* ni Omega*, Epacerero ni Emalihero. Wa yoowo anaavoliwe ntthona, nkingwurihe woohiliva maahi a naattuuttu a okumi." 
Revelation21:7 Namawina anaakhele soothesene iya ni Miyo nkikhale Mulukwaawe, ni owo mwanaka." 
Revelation21:8 Anamahovela, oohiroromela, ootakhala, anamwiiva, anamararuwa, akhwiri, atthu oolapa miluku sikina ni anamootha ootheene – nipuronaya nnikhale vantthiyani na mooro omvarela ni enxofre*. Iwo ti okhwa wanaaveeli.”" 
Revelation21:9 Mmoha a andyelo athanneeli yaarino ikoomixi ithannapiili soosareya ni soohooxa ithannapiili sookisera aakaattamela, anakeerela: “Ngweeke, kinoowooniherani otthomeriwe, mwaara a Eputtiputthi.”" 
Revelation21:10 Owo aakikuxa mMunepani, akironghaka omwaako mutokotoko woorakamela osulu ni aakoonihera esidade yootteela, Yerusaleemu yaakhuruwa wiirimu wa Muluku." 
Revelation21:11 Eyo yaara ni ovuwa wa Muluku, ni waarawaya waari ntoko waara wa nluku noottittimiheyaxa, ntoko nluku na yaspe* ni ekristalo*." 
Revelation21:12 Yaarino exiri etokotoko ni yoorakamelaxa osulu erino milako muloko ni miili, ni andyelo muloko neeli vamulakoni. Mmilakoni yaalempwale masina a ipuumba muloko ni piili sa aYixrayeli." 
Revelation21:13 Saakhala milako miraru mpatta wa ninkhuma nsuwa, milako miraru ottuttuwani wa esidade, milako miraru mpatta wa ohittowaya, ni milako miraru mpatta wa ninkela nsuwa." 
Revelation21:14 Exiri ya esidade yaarino mathipelo muloko ni meeli, ni vasuluwaya yaari masina a arummwa muloko neeli a Eputtiputthi." 
Revelation21:15 Ndyelo uulumale ni miyo aarino ekopo yoopakeliwa eyuuma yoorikaxa weera aphime esidade, milakosaya ni exiraaya." 
Revelation21:16 Esidade yaari ya malootho maxexe, mweerakameloni ni mweekhuveeloni moolikanela. Owo aaphima esidade ni ekopo. Mweerakameloni waari ikilomeetru* 2 200 – mweekhuveeloni ni orakamawaya waalikana ni mweerakameloni." 
Revelation21:17 Owo aaphima exiri, ni mwiittaaya waari imeetru* miloko mithannamosa niithanu, ntoko ephimelo ya atthu ndyelo aavarelaawe muteko." 
Revelation21:18 Exiri yaapakiwe ni maluku a yaspe*, ni esidade yaapakiwe ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yoowiitthwihaxiwa, yoolikana ni ningaraasi noowiitthwihaxiwa." 
Revelation21:19 Mathipelo a exiri ya esidade yaaphwanelihiwa ni moota wa maluku oottittimiheyaxa oohiyanahiyana. Nthipelo noopacera naari yaspe;* nanaaveeli safira;* nanaararu kalsedoniya;* nanaaxexe esmeralda;* 
Revelation21:20 nanaathanu sardonikisi;* nanaathannamosa yaspe;* nanaathannameeli krisolito;* nanaathannaararu berilo;* nanaathannaxexe topaziyo;* nanaamuloko krisoprazo;* nanaamuloko nimmoha yasinto*, ni nanaamuloko ni meeli ametista*." 
Revelation21:21 Milako muloko ni miili yaakhala maluku oowaaraxa muloko ni meeli, khula mulako waapakeliwe ni nluku noowaaraxa nimoha. Musewe mutokweene wa esidade waapakeliwe ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yoowiitthwihaxiwa, ntoko ningaraasi noowooneela." 
Revelation21:22 Nkoonne Empa ya Muluku ekina musidadeni, niwoko Apwiya Muluku a ikuru sootheene ni Eputtiputthi ari empaaya yootteela." 
Revelation21:23 Esidade kheenghaawela nsuwa, hata mweeri weera omwaleele, niwoko ovuwa wa Muluku onnamwaleela, ni Eputtiputthi ti onyaaraaya." 
Revelation21:24 Atthu a ilapo sootheene eniyeette ngwaaranimwaya, ni mamwene a elapo eniiruuhele ovuwawaya esidade ele." 
Revelation21:25 Maselaaya kheerwa ewaleyatho othana, naari iwe khoorwa okhala ohiyu." 
Revelation21:26 Ovuwa ni nttittimiho na atthu a ilapo nniruuheliwe esidade ele. 
Revelation21:27 Mwa yeeyo kheerwa evolowa etthu yoohitteela, hata mukina ompaka etthu yoowuuliha muru, naari yoolokottha, mene paahi yaawo masinaaya alempwale mulivuruni ya okumi ya Eputtiputthi." 
Revelation22:1 Vano ndyelo aakoonihera mooloko wa maahi a okumi, oowaara ntoko ekristalo*, okhumaka vahiceni ya Muluku ni ya Eputtiputthi" 
Revelation22:2 eriyari ya musewe mutokweene wa esidade. Okhopela ni okhopela wa mooloko waakhala mwiri wa okumi, ohephiwaka imaara muloko ni piili sa soowiimasaya, wiimaka khula mweeri wa eyaakha. Makukhu a mwiri mutekwaaya waalamiha atthu a ilapo." 
Revelation22:3 Khoorwa okhalatho olapha okina. Ehice ya Muluku ni ya Eputtiputthi eniikhale musidadeni, ni arumeiyaawe eniimurumeele." 
Revelation22:4 Awo eniyoone ekhovaawe, ni Nsinanawe nnikhale vayuuciwaya." 
Revelation22:5 Khoorwa okhalatho ohiyu ni khoorwa ohaaweleya waara wa onyaari, naari wa nsuwa, niwoko Apwiya Muluku eniyaamwaleele, ni awo eniilamule mahuku ootheene oohimala." 
Revelation22:6 Ndyelo aakeerela: “Masu ala amphwanela ororomeliwa ni ti a ekhaikhai. Apwiya, Muluku a minepa sa maprofeeti, yaamurumiha ndyelowaaya weera ewoonihere arumeiyaaya itthu sihanle vakhaani okhumelela.”" 
Revelation22:7 “Moone, kinrwa vaanaano vaava. Ooreelihiwa ti yaawo anthokorora masu a ethalihero ya otthuna wa Muluku mulivuruni ela.”" 
Revelation22:8 Miyo, Yohaane, ti yoole iiwale ni oonne itthusene seiya. Kiiwalaaka ni koonnaaka, kaamorela inaawo sa ndyelo aakoonihenraawe itthu iya weera kimulape." 
Revelation22:9 Mene owo aakeerela: “Muhipake yeeyo! Kiri murumeiyi ntoko nyuwo ni axunninyu, maprofeeti, ni ntoko yaawo anthokorora masu a elivuru ela. Mmulape Muluku!”" 
Revelation22:10 Vano aakeerela: “Muhiwalele masu a ethalihero ya otthuna wa Muluku ya elivuru ela, niwoko ehuhu yookhuveela." 
Revelation22:11 Yoowo ompaka yoonanara, atepe opaka yoonanara; yoowo ori mutakhali, atepe okhala mutakhali; yoowo ori a ekhaikhai, atepe okhala a ekhaikhai, ni ootteela atepe okhala ootteelihiwa.”" 
Revelation22:12 “Moone kinrwa vaanaano vaava. Ntthuvelonaka nri ni Miyo ni nkimutthuvele khula mutthu mwaha wa yeeyo aapakaawe. 
Revelation22:13 Miyo ti Alfa* ni Omega*, Oopacera ni Ookisera, Epacerero ni Emalihero." 
Revelation22:14 Ooreelihiwa ti yaawo ankattha soowarasaya, weera ewere ophiya vamwirini wa okumi, ni weera evolowe musidadeni, eviraka mmilakoni." 
Revelation22:15 Omokoni wa esidade ankhala alapwa, akhwiri, anamararuwa, anamwiiva, anamalapa a miluku sikina ni ootheene yaawo ansivela ni ampaka soowootha." 
Revelation22:16 Miyo, Yeesu, koomurumiha ndyelowaaka weera oovaheeni onamoona ola wa ikerexa. Miyo ti Mukwankhwaari ni Ekhapira ya Davide, ni Tthanda oowaaraxa.”" 
Revelation22:17 Munepa ni ootthomeriwa aneera: “Nkarwani!” Ni ootheene yaawo aniiwa yeere: “Nkarwani!” Yoole omvoliwa ntthona, arweeke; ni yoole ontthuna, awureke woohiliva maahi a okumi." 
Revelation22:18 Kingwooperera ootheene yaawo aniiwa masu a ethalihero ya otthuna wa Muluku mulivuruni ela: Akhala mukina onaandyeerera etthu wa elivuru ela, Muluku anaamwaandyeerere soohooxa silempwale mulivuruni mu." 
Revelation22:19 Akhala mukina omvenxa hata nsu nimoha mwa elivuru ela ya ethalihero ya otthuna wa Muluku, Muluku anaavenxe mpattaawe wa mwiri wa okumi ni wa esidade yootteela, ntoko silempwalaaya mulivuruni mu." 
Revelation22:20 Yoole onkhalela onamoona mwaha wa itthusene seiya oneera: “Aani, kinrwa vaanaano vaava!” Ame*, nkarwani, Apwiya Yeesu!"
